“Except for the eyes and hair color, madam’s appearance was exactly the same as with that woman. Perhaps it’s just a coincidence, but I hope that you’ll give me an honest answer.” Chen Rui stood up slowly with a serious face.

Sabrina was annoyed in her heart. No matter how high his mechanical skill is, his strength is only at Demon King. He actually dares to speak to me in this tone. It’s even more annoying than his admiration and flirting just now.

However, this guy is deeply respected by Manu and the crystal dragon. Since I still have to make use of him now, I must not turn my face.

“To be honest, that woman is indeed a little related to me.” Sabrina sighed. Seeing Chen Rui frowned, she immediately explained, “However, please rest assured, master. That woman is my rival. Even her brother was killed by my scheme. If there is a chance, I’ll definitely help you to deal with her!”

The hostility on Chen Rui’s face gradually disappeared, but his mood didn’t calm down: These two women with similar appearances are indeed related. The so-called rival doesn’t mean that they don’t belong to the same faction, just like Sabrina and Izola.

In other words, Isabella is also a part of this organization? If Roman’s father and Isabella are really siblings, then was Broc’s murder of Roman’s father planned by Sabrina? These things seem very complicated.

“Master, I’m sorry that this face reminds you of unpleasant things.” Sabrina put on her veil sadly.

“It’s me who should apologize.” Chen Rui shook his head quickly, “It was me that was rude. Despite the similar appearance, you’re completely different from that malicious woman. You’re still the most beautiful woman in my heart. Whenever you have a request, I won’t say no!”

“Is that true?” Seeing Chen Rui’s serious look, Sabrina sighed, “Actually, I wanted to entrust Fatilu to you today, but it’s a pity that you’re not interested in Fatilu. My effort is in vain.”

“Why entrust? What happened?” Chen Rui asked along her tone.

Sabrina looked sad and lowered her head to conceal the faint power from her right eye. She looked even more pitiful, “I believe you’ve heard from Fatilu that my husband, Azgalor is very fond of a woman named Izola. This woman is from the Mammon Royal Family, and her strength is comparable to me. Besides, she is insidious. She has schemed more than once to replace me as the main wife.”

“Did Sir Azgalor just let her be?”

“He is heartless, and he has always favored her. He even wanted to give one of my important tasks in the Crystal Valley to that woman. The situation is getting worse for me. I received information that she’ll return to the Crystal Valley in 3 days. Based on that woman’s personality, she’ll definitely harm me further. I’ve already put my life and death out of my mind, but I can’t let go of Fatilu. Therefore, I want to entrust her to master. With your current prestige, you should be able to protect Fatilu from being harmed by that woman.”

Coming back in three days? That means Kia’s mother, Freya will come back together! Chen Rui nodded secretly. He could feel that Sabrina used [The Eye of Incubus] when she said that. The power was weak and subtle, making the emotions stronger. He immediately pounded the table furiously, “What?! Madam, if you trust me, you can ask me for anything!”

“I obviously trust you, master.” Sabrina’s golden eyes lit up, then they dimmed again, “If master is willing to help, we’ll clearly win, but there is no need to offend that vicious woman for me.”

“I’m part of the Nightmare Valley and Sir Jacob takes me very seriously, so the woman can’t do anything to me! It’s just that I have a condition.” Chen Rui looked at Sabrina passionately. Finally, he made a decision and changed his tone, “I want that woman from the Fallen Angel’s capital!”

Voluntary labor will only be suspicious, so I must request a condition. However, this woman is clearly making an empty promise. She isn’t really trying to “pay”. At most, she is only willing to use her daughter as a bargain.

In fact, Chen Rui was also acting. That was why he made a “compromise”, which was to get Isabella. It was an empty promise anyway.

This condition reassured Sabrina, but at the same time she felt strangely uncomfortable, as if the person “pursuing” her turned to another woman even though she wasn’t very interested in the suitor.

However, judging from the “master’s” hatred, he wants Isabella because it is nothing more than revenge. It’s likely to be sadistic. Certainly, I cannot rule out the possibility of him using the similar face to vent his desire for me. Thinking of this, Sabrina’s bizarre possessiveness and jealousy seemed to be somewhat satisfied.

“I promise you, but it’s not possible now. When that woman loses her value, I can swear by the surname of the Leviathan Royal Family that she’ll be master’s most satisfying plaything.

Chen Rui confirmed the assumption that Isabella was a member of this force. Actually, he was happy with the fight between Sabrina and Izola. He deliberately acted like he was contemplating, then he finally agreed.

chapters.title: Chapter 280 - The Beginning Of The Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 280 - The Beginning Of The Plan

Compared with the importance of the entire Crystal Valley, the fight between Sabrina and Izola was only a tiny wave. However, if used properly, it might cause a horrifying tsunami and even become a key point. Certainly, he also had to try rescuing Kia’s mother, Freya.

The three Demon Overlords had greatly exceeded his original forecast in front of Christina. The result of war in this world was often determined by the handful of the strongest. If the battle against the strongest couldn’t be won, it’d be pointless no matter how much reinforcement Catherine sent. Now, two of the three Demon Overlords were out and only the crystal dragon, Jacob was left. Also, Azgalor was likely to see through the puppetry on Fatilu. Therefore, it must be launched before Azgalor returns.

Cutting one finger was better than damaging ten fingers. The most ideal result was to kill the crystal dragon, Jacob and end this base at once. However, since the crystal dragon could become the enemy of Paglio at his peak state, his strength was probably above the other two Demon Overlords. He had to find a way to weaken or make him lose his combat power.

There were too many steps to be considered, and he couldn’t take any wrong moves. In the enemy’s lair, he would lose everything if he took a wrong step. Chen Rui wanted to think about it, but waves of extreme fatigue caused by the training ground came. Sabrina noticed his fatigue, so she didn’t make him stay any longer. She let the maid send him back to his place at the Nightmare Valley.

Chen Rui fell into a deep sleep. After waking up the next day, he was energetic and was reminded by his maid, “It’s time to go to Sir Jacob to learn magic circle.”

Every few days, Chen Rui would go to Jacob to “learn” Dragon Inscription and study magic circles. Although he already held back, his understanding of Dragon Inscription still surprised the crystal dragon, so he began to teach with reservations. Chen Rui knew the crystal dragon’s thoughts, but he pretended not to know while sneering secretly. Although he could also learn some knowledge from a different angle from Jacob, from the level of understanding on Dragon Inscription alone, he had already surpassed the crystal dragon.

Today was the day of crystal dragon’s treatment with the magic circle, but he didn’t limit Chen Rui’s access. The reason was very simple. Chen Rui used the algorithm of [Deep Analysis] and attempted to change the details of a magic circle the last time. It made the recovery speed increase by 1%.

One shouldn’t underestimate that 1%. The entire magic circle was composed of ancient runes, Dragon Inscription and ordinary magic circle, interlocking with each other. A small change would cause a chain reaction and even crash the entire magic circle. Chen Rui’s ability to increase the speed without compromising the original functions was already a remarkable achievement. Although Jacob was jealous of his talent in magic circle, it was the time to make use of his talent now. Therefore, Jacob naturally provided the greatest convenience.

With the help of [Deep Analysis], Chen Rui had understood this magic circle quite thoroughly. The 1% accelerated recovery was only a small part of his successful analysis. The purpose was to win the trust of the crystal dragon. The subsequent attempts were mainly to understand the secrets of the six ancient runes. Unfortunately, there were still no clues.

The mist from the Spring of Resurrection was like a sauna, making people feel sleepy. Chen Rui suddenly had an idea, “That’s it!”

Crystal dragon’s heart was moved, “Is there any new discovery?”

Chen Rui nodded excitedly, “I had an idea initially. Now I finally have some clues. If it succeeds, it can improve the lasting time and recovery effect of the entire magic circle. The time isn’t certain, but it’s definitely not like once every 7 days at present. As for the effect, it was likely to increase by 30% to 50% ”

The crystal dragon was moved. If it really could achieve the effect that Arthur said, wouldn’t my recovery of injury increase exponentially?

When Chen Rui proposed his idea, the crystal dragon, who was also a magic circle expert, was not only jealous, but he was even more admired. According to the idea proposed by Chen Rui, this improvement was definitely possible, but many details had yet to be further tested and confirmed.

“Sir Jacob, if this improvement is successful, it’ll cost a lot of the superior magic crystal, that is, gold crystal or at least blood crystal. In other words, it’s increasing the consumption of magic crystals to improve recovery efficiency.”

“There is no problem with the magic crystal. I can recruit manpower for emergency mining and refining now. I’ll definitely accumulate the large amount of magic crystals needed at the fastest speed.”

Chen Rui’s plan made Crystal Dragon very excited. Let alone consuming superior magic crystals. As long as his injury could be healed, it didn’t matter if the entire vein was depleted. It seems that my previous plan to win over and make friends with this genius was smart. Once he becomes a grandmaster, I’ll control him tightly within my hands to be used only by me.

The injury was the biggest problem that had troubled the crystal dragon for the past 2000 years. As magic and potions weren’t ineffective on him, he could only use some special methods to recover. After escaping from death in battle, the crystal dragon was still traumatized. To avoid encountering that terrible opponent again, he had been staying mostly indoor and dare not to get too much attention. However, he didn’t know that his enemy had also been trapped for 2000 years.

Chen Rui added another sentence happily, “It may be used once every three days, and it can be used for the entire day at a time. The [Sleep] inscription that sir taught me last time can also be used to further strengthen the recovery effect.”

“[Sleep]? It’s far less effective than the compound inscription of [Deep Slumber] and [Recovery]. Cough… Oh right, you haven’t learnt that inscription yet. I’ll teach you next time.” The crystal dragon immediately tried to hide what he exposed, but he didn’t know he was being taken into a “cage” step by step by Chen Rui.

After discussing for a while, the crystal dragon felt even stronger that this plan was highly feasible, so he was very excited. As for the Dragon Inscription, a lot of adjustments needed to be made, so that was definitely his responsibility. Originally, Jacob had been bored in the Crystal Valley. It seemed that he finally found something meaningful to do, so he was full of energy.

As the crystal dragon was overjoyed, he gifted Chen Rui some superior crystal dragon’s scales and a horn left from his previous metamorphosis, which were all extremely rare alchemy materials. On the way back to the lab, Chen Rui seemed to be in a good mood. Once the improvement of the magic circle was successful and put into practical use, it was time for the final launch.

Upon returning to the lab, Chen Rui entered the Super System. Instead of immediately starting training, he entered the exchange center. In accordance with the principle of consuming the enemy to strengthen himself, these days, he converted a large amount of aura material in the Crystal Valley, which had already exceeded the amount needed to purchase the artifact “Thunderous Sound” blueprint. Since he could squander, might as well squander now as he might not have the opportunity again. It would be the best to accumulate the 100 million auras needed to promote to the next level – Phecda state.

Chen Rui spent 20 million aura in the exchange center and bought the blueprint for “Thunderous Sound”. The crafting of such treasure cannot be done manually， so he had to use the refinery’s automatic refining function. After inserting the blueprint and all the materials, the system prompted that it’d take 1 hour to complete crafting, and it’d consume 100,000 auras. Thank god! Not as bad as I thought! Chen Rui waited patiently for an hour to pass. He finally witnessed the creation of Super System’s first treasure, which was equivalent to an artifact.

Thunderous Sound (Treasure) – double lightning magic damage by 20% chance; damage against undead increased by 220%; movement speed increased by 55%; 25% chance to double the damage; 30% chance of additional lightning attack; must recognize owner.

The attribute was slightly different from the one recorded on the blueprint. The lightning magic damage was reduced while several other attributes were improved. It seemed that the blueprint recorded the basic attributes while the specific equipment attributes were randomized.

However, the function of doubling the lightning magic damage was useless for Chen Rui anyway. Chen Rui only knew some earth magic due to the effect of earth elemental heart. He had zero knowledge on air magic. However, the following attributes were quite amazing. Even the seemingly useless ‘damage against undead increased by 220%’ might show unexpected effects when facing certain types of enemies. He still had a nemesis that was proficient in necromancy.

The Thunderous Sound was a cloud-shaped ornament with a matching red string, which had a style of ancient China. After dripping blood to accept the recognition, Chen Rui tied it around his neck. Suddenly, he had a feeling that they were connected deeply. Other than him, it was just an useless decoration for anyone else who got this Thunderous Sound.

After completing the production of Thunderous Sound, Chen Rui once again entered the training ground. His Dark Star Territory was just at the initial stage whether in terms of his understanding or strength. Manu’s remaining strengthening power hadn’t been fully absorbed into his own use, so he had to continue training.

The training that went on for hundreds of days was extremely boring. Sometimes that loneliness could drive people crazy. However, he had to persist. Only those who could withstand what others couldn’t, would be able to do what others couldn’t.

In the blink of an eye, three days passed and Sabrina’s rival, Izola, finally arrived at the Crystal Valley.

Izola was a Mammon Royal Family. She had long blue hair, and there was no veil on her face. To be extremely fair, she was slightly inferior in terms of look as compared to Sabrina. She was very tall. She was about 1.8 meter. She looked arrogant and her cheekbones were a little high. There were some murderous intentions at the corner of her eyes, and her temperament were quite similar to a royal sister.

Chen Rui finally met Kia’s mother Freya. Freya’s eyes were a bit similar to Kia. Although she wasn’t as beautiful as Kia, she had a pitiful look that made people pity and give her mercy.

This time, Izola not only brought back Freya but also a group of people. One of the two leaders was Chen Rui’s acquaintance, Horford, a dual-specialized master who “lost” in the mechanic contest: the other was a dark elf. Many of the group were wearing mechanic robes.

Chen Rui couldn’t help but wonder. I’m the best “potential” in the Demon Realm to become a grandmaster. No matter which force I’m placed in, I’ll 100% be recruited. Horford is a dual-specialized master, and he is probably the disciple of the Demon Realm’s top mechanic master, Nate, so it was understandable that he is recruited by the Crystal Valley. Then, why are these mechanics here…?

Chen Rui suddenly thought that Sabrina once said that Izola “robbed” an important matter she was responsible for and won the trust of Azgalor. Is it related to this mechanic?

When he was thinking about it, Horford saw Chen Rui, stopped and a strong hostility emerged from his surprised eyes.

Izola discovered Horford’s anomaly and saw him staring at a stranger in Crystal Valley like he was looking at an enemy. She frowned and asked, “Master, is that your nemesis?”

Horford shook his head while his eyes were still fixed on Chen Rui, “He isn’t really my nemesis, but he should be my rival.”

“Since he is your rival, I’ll help you get rid of him!” Izola stepped forward and a black halo appeared in her hand.

Race: Greed Royal Family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B+ Physique: B Strength: B Spirit: B+ Agility: B+

It seemed that Izola emphasized heavily on magic training. She didn’t bother who was right and wrong and immediately went for the kill. She was indeed sinister, and she was indeed Sabrina’s rival.

The black halo flew to his front instantly with a terrible destructive breath.

How to train your crystal dragon 🤔?

chapters.title: Chapter 281 - Challenge And Freya
chapters.body:
Chapter 281 - Challenge And Freya

Chen Rui didn’t move. He seemed to be astonished by the prompt of the [Analytical Eyes] that Sabrina was right behind him.

Surely, a light blue mist appeared in time to block the black smoke. The black smoke was constantly eroding the fog, but its own power was also gradually weakening. Soon, it disappeared.

Chen Rui felt the shocking breath of the two confronting energy, which was indeed not what he could handle now. Sabrina’s strength seemed to be slightly more powerful, but it didn’t rule out the possibility of Izola retaining her strength.

“So mighty, Izola.” Sabrina’s soft laughter sounded,”Want to kill someone the minute you return. Are you trying to show off to me?”

Izola snorted without refuting. Her arrogant expression seemed to be saying, what if I’m showing off?

“I was just being kind lest you make a big mistake.” Sabrina was indifferent, “Do you know who this is? If you really hurt him, not only Sir Manu but even Sir Jacob won’t let you go.”

Izola frowned. At that moment, Horford walked to her and whispered a few words. Izola was moved slightly. She took a few more looks at Chen Rui and said, “It turned out to be the top genius master in the Demon Realm. Izola was being rude just now.”

Chen Rui clearly just “woke up” from the brink of life and death. With a terrified look, he nodded angrily. Izola wanting to kill “master” the moment they met was out of Sabrina’s expectation, but it was going according to Chen Rui’s plan since the greater the hostility between them, the better.

Izola knew she was careless, but she didn’t want to admit defeat in front of Sabrina, so she said, “I’ve long heard about your accomplishment, master. I was going to invite you, but unexpectedly, you’ve come here in advance.”

Without waiting for Chen Rui to answer, Sabrina said, “By the way, Fatilu, you haven’t met Aunt Izola right?”

Fatilu walked forward from Sabrina’s back and sneered without calling Izola her aunt, “Is this father’s concubine? I thought it should be a beauty, but she looks quite ordinary.”

“Fatilu, be careful with your words.” Sabrina smiled, “This is your father’s favorite aunt.”

Fatilu said disdainfully, “She is just a woman that knows how to charm men. Besides, no matter how good she is on the bed, she is still an inferior demonic bird that can’t lay eggs.”

Those harsh words made Izola’s face pale out of anger. It was difficult for the powerhouses to conceive a child. Although she was favored by Azgalor, her lack of fertility had always been her greatest regret. Now, being called out by Faitlu in the public made her murderous intentions rose suddenly.

“Fatilu, you’re too rude!” Sabrina pretended to scold, but there was no hint of reprimanding her. She stepped forward to the front of her daughter and faced Izola’s murderous intentions without showing any sign of weakness, “I forgot to tell you. It was because Master Arthur accepted Fatilu’s invitation that he joined the Crystal Valley. Currently, he is the talent that Sir Manu’s values the most.”

Izola suppressed her anger and said coldly, “Sabrina, what the hell are you trying to say?”

“I remember… You took the control of Mystic Valley from me with your schemes back then, am I right?” Sabrina’s eyes fell on the group of mechanics behind Izola, “Every time, you pretend and boast. but there’s still nothing. Whatever that you can show are my previous results. Now… it’s time to return it! I’ve obtained the consent of Sir Manu and Sir Jacob on this matter already.”

Izola’s eyes narrowed slightly, but her eyes looked even fiercer, “Are you trying to solve this with the old rule?”

“If we don’t go according to that old rule, do you have a chance if we compete based on strength?” Sabrina sneered. Her blonde hair fluttered, and her coat blew without wind as an intimidating breath spread out. Izola’s face got even paler. She took one step after another step backward. Her body was full of black smoke. Clearly, she was performing some kind of dark magic to withstand Sabrina’s breath. In [Analytical Eyes], Sabrina’s Comprehensive Strength Assessment had reached what Chen Rui expected, early stage of the Demon Emperor!

Sabrina didn’t exert any more power and slowly withdrew, “Since I lost to you in that rule the last time, I’ll naturally take it back unscathed now!”

Izola took a deep breath and calmed her mind. Her eyes glanced at Chen Rui, who was behind Sabrina and said coldly, “Do you think recruiting a so-called genius can win Norris?”

“Say no more.” Sabrina laughed lightly, “Capabilities are everything. How about we invite Sir Jacob as the judge? The time will be set as 7 days later.”

“Fine! If I lose, the control of the Mystic Valley will be returned to you.” Izola sneered, “What if you lose again?”

“Then, the Mystic Valley will be yours forever, and I’ll not fight with you again.”

“Not so easy! If you lose, move out of the blue house in the Devouring Hall!” Izola said with a cold face.

Sabrina stopped Fatilu who was about to jump out to start scolding. She calmly replied, “Alright!”

“Sabrina, you said it yourself! Don’t regret it!” As Izola said that, she was about to leave, then Sabrina’s cold voice sounded, “Freya, has the wound on your hand recovered? Is it fun to go sightseeing with Izola this time?”

Kia’s mother, Freya shuddered suddenly. Izola suddenly turned around and sneered, “It was me who healed her wound and I was the one that took her out. What do you want?”

Then, Sabrina said with a smile, “She’s just a lowly servant. I don’t bother that much. However, going out with you this time, she must’ve obtained a lot of information right. I should reward her handsomely later!”

A cold light flashed in Izola’s eyes. Then, Freya groaned as her palms suddenly spasmed violently, and her ten fingers were broken off entirely, “Hmph! I’ll return to you in its original state!”

Izola’s move made Chen Rui’s initial good impression from her protecting Freya suddenly turned into disgust. Although fingers were connected to the heart, Freya clenched her teeth tightly and didn’t dare to cry in pain. Obviously, she often suffered from this kind of inhumane torture.

Chen Rui could tell that Freya was the victim in the fight between these two women or just a performance tool. One of them intentionally treated her while the other treated her poorly. Izola cured her wounds earlier not for sympathy or compassion, but it was to break it again on this occasion.

Izola confronted Sabrina for a while, but she lost interest and left with a group of people.

“Such a vicious woman.” Sabrina chuckled lightly, “Come here, Freya, I’ll heal you when we reach home.”

The phrase “heal” made Chen Rui shudder. He had a deeper understanding of the viciousness of these two women. Freya came tremblingly and dared not look up at Sabrina.

“Master, isn’t this woman a little familiar-looking?” It was Fatilu who spoke, “Remember that Kia who you can see but not touch? This is that bitch’s mother.”

Freya shivered slightly when she heard Kia’s name.

“Oh?” Chen Rui showed a look of interest. Fatilu’s words were naturally spoken under his control.

“Fatilu was right. If master is interested, I can give this woman to you.” Sabrina said. Freya was just a trivial character in her heart that she could torture when she was bored. Now that she could use this trash to win over Master Arthur, it was naturally worth it.

“Kia’s mother? This identity makes me kind of interested now.” Chen Rui tried to make his smile look evil. He held Freya’s chin, “Looks good. However, does this woman also have that annoying Devour Physique?”

“Of course not. Otherwise, why would I give it to the master?” Sabrina smirked, “Since master is willing to accept it, then I’ll help her fix her hands first.”

“No! This way… I like it even more.” Chen Rui showed a strange look. Actually, he also felt very perverted, but the more he perverted he seemed, the more he could protect Freya. If he was too concerned or nervous, it would cause Sabrina to suspect. In any case, with the presence of [Soul Shackles], Freya’s life was still not guaranteed.

Sabrina chuckled, “Master is really an interesting person… Freya, you’ll be this master’s woman from now on. Dolly, immediately take Freya to the Nightmare Valley. Remember, don’t give her any healing potions!”

The maid, Dolly responded and took Freya away. Although Freya’s [Soul Shackles] hadn’t been removed, she was finally able to escape from Sabrina’s abuses temporarily. Also, for the time being, she probably wouldn’t be tortured by the [Soul Shackles]. Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief in secret and said, “Okay, madam, let’s get back to business. What the hell is going on in the Mystic Valley?”

Sabrina shook her head, “I was just trying to beware of this woman, but I didn’t expect her to attack you. In order to release my anger, I directly challenged her on the Mystic Valley without discussing with you in advance. I still haven’t apologized to you.”

“It’s nothing. Today I was almost killed by this vicious woman for no reason. I must make her regret it!”

Seeing Chen Rui’s hateful look, Sabrina was thinking that her plan worked and told him the story about Mystic Valley.

Mystic Valley was the largest forbidden area in the Crystal Valley. It contained certain taboo or secret weapon facilities, and they recruited a large number of mechanics and professionals. The mechanics that Chen Rui saw on occasion were just the tip of the iceberg.

Originally, the control was in the hands of Azgalor’s main wife, Sabrina and even Azgalor had to be a little fearful of her. Later, Izola recruited a dark elf mechanic master, Norris, who obtained the appreciation of Master Toto, the master craftsman of the Mystic Valley. He also challenged Sabrina’s right-hand man, Spanda, the leader of the Mystic Valley. In the end, Spanda died and Norris became the new leader, which was equivalent to Izola taking over the Mystic Valley. Since then, she had become more favored by Azgalor.

That had always been on Sabrina’s mind. This time, she wanted Chen Rui to challenge Norris to regain control of the Mystic Valley. She valued Chen Rui not only for his “genius” but also because the challenge of the Mystic Valley wasn’t only about mechanics. It also inclded some other mysterious things. Even an almighty genius might not be able to win. The key point in Sabrina’s bet was Jacob’s judgement. The crystal dragon was a guy who didn’t play according to common sense. With Chen Rui’s intimate relationship with him, even if he lost, as long as Jacob said, “Master Arthur wins.” Who would dare to say half a word? That’s the strength of a powerhouse!

Chen Rui only found out that the forbidden place where even Manu’s badge couldn’t enter was hiding such a secret. He was more curious about what was inside. Since he was here to work as an undercover, he must definitely strive to destroy the power of Crystal Valley to the maximum extent. I really have to be in the limelight this time!

“Madam, may I ask what was the content of the last challenge?”

“It’s hard to explain at once.” Sabrina groaned, “What about I’ll take you to tour the Mystic Valley tomorrow. Although Izola is in charge now, entering and taking a look is still fine. On Sir Jaboc’s side, it’s better that you let him know in advance. It’s not that I don’t trust master’s capability, but preparing something in advance can prevent the other party from doing tricks. Do you understand, master?”

Seeing Chen Rui nodded, Sabrina smiled and said, “I’ll leave this to you, master. It doesn’t matter if you go to Sir Jacob a little later. You should go back and take a rest first. There is a feast waiting for you. After staying hungry for so many days, it’s time to eat a ‘full meal’.”

Fatilu snorted with dissatisfaction. Chen Rui smirked and walked toward the Nightmare Valley.

In his house at the Nightmare Valley, Freya was waiting. Her ten broken fingers were indeed not treated, and there was a lot of cold sweat on her head due to the pain. Yet, she endured it and didn’t dare to make a sound.

“All of you can retreat.” Chen Rui said. Then, the maids retreated and closed the door.

To be honest, although Freya’s appearance wasn’t as good as Kia, she was definitely quite charming. She was definitely one the best among the succubus. In the Demon Realm, their concept of age and seniority were messed up. Freya didn’t look that much older than Kia, and her submissive look made people want to abuse her.

In this plane, “marrying both the mother and daughter” wasn’t a taboo in both the Demon Realm nor the Human Realm. Due to the long lifespan of demons, many nobles were proud of having mother and daughter concubines. There were even messier and higher seniority relationships.

Chen Rui did have feelings for Kia, but he really didn’t feel the same for Freya. Although he had already integrated into this world and he could do anything he liked to Freya, his taste hadn’t yet reached that powerful “level” unfortunately.

Freya only knew that she couldn’t escape from being tortured and defiled. Over the years, she had almost been numb. It was only when she heard Kia’s name that the little hidden hope in her heart would be lighted again. No matter what price she had to pay, as long as she could learn about her daughter’s news, it was worth it.

That Great Demon approached slowly. Despite her psychological preparation, Freya’s body was still tight. She bowed stiffly. Strangely, the guy didn’t act as she expected. Instead, he took out a bottle of potion, pulled the stopper and handed it to the front of her mouth, “Drink it.”

Is it some kind of aphrodisiac or psychedelic … Freya was puzzled in her heart, but she didn’t dare to resist. After drinking it, she felt a warm current. The pain from her hand was immediately reduced by half. This is clearly a healing potion. Besides, its effect is even dozen times better than the one Izola gave. No! Even more!

Immediately afterward, her palm was held by her opponent. After waves of severe pain, her broken phalanges were actually connected. Under the effect of the healing potion, her injuries were recovering at a rapid rate.

“Thank you sir.” No matter what her opponent wanted, Freya showed her gratitude and bowed at Chen Rui again.

“From now on, you’ll be my maid. Now, pick a room to rest. Without my permission, no one is allowed to disturb and don’t talk to anyone if not needed. When someone asks you, tell them it’s my order.” Chen Rui’s words were out of Freya’s expectation, “Don’t ask why. You just have to follow the instructions.”

Freya felt like she was in a dream. She finally responded in time, bowed and left.

chapters.title: Chapter 282 - Mystic Valley
chapters.body:
Chapter 282 - Mystic Valley

After settling Freya, Chen Rui returned to the bedroom and started training in the training ground. Since Freya was still under the control of Sabrina’s [Soul Shackles], there were many things that he couldn’t disclose. It was to himself and also to protect Freya.

To really let Freya and Kia regain freedom, he must remove the [Soul Shackles]. The possibility for Sabrina to remove it by herself was zero. Asking her to remove it would be even harder, and it might even cause suspicions. The best way was to kill Sabrina. Yet, that was very difficult. Even without alerting everyone else, with Chen Rui’s current strength, he couldn’t do it if they fought head-on.

Now that Azgalor and Manu hadn’t returned, he must make good use of Sabrina and Izola’s bet and contradiction. Together with the controlled Fatilu, it should be a key entry point.

The next day, Chen Rui came to the blue house in the Devouring Hall. Sabrina had been waiting there for a long time.

Sabrina didn’t say any nonsense. She took Chen Rui to the end of the Crystal Valley. The road was getting narrower, and the sky above was becoming one line. The place was very dangerously steep. After walking through the passage, a cave finally appeared in front of them.

No one dared to stop Sabrina along the way, but Sabrina was stopped at the entrance of the cave. These were two Beelzebub Royal Family, both of them were middle-stage Great Demon Kings. Beside them, there were a team of crystal men. Besides, all of them were leader-level, Great Demon Kings. It seemed that this place was guarded heavily.

One had to know that even if an estate only had a few Great Demon Kings. For example, in the Dark Moon Estate, only Shea had reached this level.

Sabrina snorted, “Guli, Phil, both of you dare to stop me?”

Guli frowned, “Madam Sabrina, please forgive us. Madam Izola ordered no outsiders be allowed to enter.”

“Outsiders?” Sabrina’s eyes flashed coldly. The surrounding temperature suddenly dropped. The water on the ground began to freeze into ice.

Phil quickly said, “Don’t misunderstand, madam. The outsider is regarding the Great Demon behind you. I believe madam also knows that this part of our responsibility. If you’re in control, we’ll still faithfully execute this order.”

The chill from Sabrina’s body slightly reduced, then she said coldly, “Izola and I have set a challenge date. This is the challenger. I brought him to have a look at the situation today. It shouldn’t be a problem right?” Guli still insisted, “That’s non-compliant, madam. No matter whether he is the challenger or not, he can’t enter the Mystic Valley!”

“If madam, you want to go in, please feel free. If this Great Demon can get permission from Madam Izola or Master Toto, it’ll obviously be fine as well. However, if you don’t have permission, please don’t make it hard for us.” Phil said politely, but he was still conveying the same thing.

Sabrina didn’t expect to be stopped by the door. She felt embarrassed in front of Chen Rui. The killing intention on her face could even be felt over her veil.

Guli and Phil looked at each other, and they saw the helplessness in each other’s eyes. However, the current master of the Mystic Valley was Izola. If they let both of them in, their ending might be even worse. They started withdrawing slowly. As they waved their hand, the still crystal men started to move their joints and approached.

The strength and speed of the crystal men were relatively weak, but their defense was extremely high, especially magic defense. Besides, they had no fear of death, But they had relatively weak combat power. They couldn’t be compared with the [War Puppet] of the Lust Royal Family. Guli and Phil didn’t really want to fight Sabrina. They just wanted to delay until someone in-charge came to resolve the dilemma.

A magic steel armor appeared simultaneously on Guli and Phil. Guli seemed to be a mage as he was chanting spells quickly with his mouth. Then, a huge translucent air shield appeared in front of him and Phil. They were obviously only defending instead of attacking.

Sabrina intended to show her authority, so she didn’t rush to attack. She waited for them to complete all that, then her figure instantly appeared in front of them. Chen Rui felt that her figure had suddenly become four or five. At the same time, a high-speed beating sound came from the crystal men’s bodies. The violently trembling air shield lasted only a few seconds, then it was demolished. Demon Emperor and Great Demon King were indeed an insurmountable gap.

Chen Rui could barely see Sabrina’s movements at the full extent of his eyesight. Oftentimes, he could only rely on [Analytical Eyes] to judge her position. He couldn’t help being shocked. The moment that Guli and Phil were in crisis, someone suddenly shouted, “Stop!”

The intensive beating stopped and Sabrina’s figures returned to one. When she returned to Chen Rui’s side, her face wasn’t red nor was she breathless. She looked like nothing had happened. The body of those durable crystal men on the opposite had many cracks. The crystal men were quite similar to the crystal dragon where their recovery was very slow after being damaged. This level of damage most likely needed to take a very long time to recover.

An old-looking dark goblin with grey hair came out from inside. Although he was only a Higher Demon, Sabrina showed considerable respect. She nodded, “Master Toto, I haven’t seen you for a long time.”

Chen Rui found out that the dark goblin was the master craftsman of the Mystic Valley. If the dark elf commander, Norris was equivalent to the chief executive officer, then Master Toto was the technical director. Besides, in the Mystic Valley, the latter’s status was higher than the former.

“Madam Sabrina, please don’t make it difficult for Guli and Phil, they are only doing their job. Besides, no outsiders are allowed to enter is a rule set by you back then.” Toto bowed slightly to Sabrina and glanced at Chen Rui, “I’ve heard the incident between two madams. Is he the challenger seven days later?”

“Yes, Master.” Sabrina laughed, “Master Arthur is the most promising person in the world to become a grandmaster.”

“Trio-specialized, magic circle genius?” Toto’s tone seemed to be somewhat indifferent. “It’s just that the Mystic Valley isn’t a Mechanic Alliance. Perhaps this genius doesn’t have much use. Besides, if he fails in the challenge, he might lose his life. Then, he will be useless even if he has great potential…”

“However, if you insist on participating, then come in and take a look.” With Master Toto’s permission, Guli and Phil naturally dared not to stop him anymore. In fact, if it wasn’t for Sabrina’s mercy just now, even with the crystal men, they couldn’t stop her.

Sabrina and Chen Rui followed Master Toto into the cave. After passing through a few dim and complicated byways, Chen Rui felt that the scene suddenly lit up before his eyes. The scene had completely changed. The cave was just an entrance. After passing it, it was a huge “space” in the open air.

It was completely different from the mysteriousness that he imagined. It was full of bustling people like a huge factory. What made Chen Rui surprised was a huge object in scaffolding in the distance. It resembled a humanoid form with a dark red shell.

Is it Gundam? Am I seeing it right? Red colour, horn, 3x speed [1]… Could it be that the captain also cross-overed?

Chen Rui was almost blinded. He rubbed his eyes and looked carefully. This humanoid was still quite different from Gundam. Master Toto saw his surprised look and said proudly, “That is a giant puppet that is currently being tested. The giant puppet is built after the [War Puppet] of the Asmodeus Royal Family. If the test is successful, even ordinary demons can use this puppet.” At that time, a muffled sound came and the ground was shaking slightly. Master Toto frowned, “That should be the power magic cannon test. There are still some problems in terms of control, but its power is very strong. It seems that the defensive magic circle around the experimental site must be rebuilt.”

Upon witnessing, Chen Rui finally understood that no matter in which world, the passion for creation and invention would never be exhausted. The Mystic Valley before his eyes was obviously a research center where a group of “scientists” gathered in the Demon Realm. Certainly, the main purpose of their research was for war.

Master Toto took both of them to another experimental site, then he proudly introduced several research results: the previous Gundam, artillery, and missiles are related to the mechanics. Now, it’s about biotechnology.

Chen Rui shuddered to see that these crazy “scientists” attempted to avoid the long hours of research. Instead, they used potions, magic circles or even cross-breeding with demonic beasts to induce direct mutations on demons. The mutated demons only had crazy fighting instincts with no fear nor pain while their combat power increased several times, tens of times or even more.

This mutation test wasn’t very successful at present as the control rate and survival rate weren’t high. Also, most test subjects would die in a short period of time after exhausting their vitality to fight. Once this kind of experiment achieved a certain success, then an army with terrifying combat power would be established.

With this kind of mutant army’s combat power, an ordinary powerhouse could hardly retreat unscathed unless they reached a certain peak.

All in all, that was a rather terrifying experiment. In this lab, Chen Rui also saw a somewhat familiar scene. The test subject would receive a self-explosive potion. After consuming it, their eyes, ears, nose and mouth would emit a dazzling silver light. Then, their entire body would burst apart. This kind of potion could be used in suicide bombing, and it could also be used on some spies to prevent the disclosure of secrets.

Chen Rui remembered that he had seen a similar situation at Mountain Xilang. The exhibitor was the deputy leader of the mining office, Connor. Although he was a minor role, he tricked Athena to fall into the danger of the main pit and tempted Chen Rui to save her. He even destroyed the magic barrier and finally self-exploded. He was exactly the same as these tested demons, but his strength wasn’t as good as the test subjects. He seemed to be the previous batch of test recipients. Chen Rui just realized that Connor turned out to be part of this force!

Master Toto was right. Even if Chen Rui was a mechanic genius, he really wasn’t of much value in this type of “research institute”.

This huge force already had top-level fighters. If the researches of the Mystic Valley succeeded and put into practice, then it would definitely erupt fully when it reached a certain level. By then, the Demon Realm’s situation would most likely have earth-shattering changes.

Chen Rui wasn’t sure if the fallen royal families of Beelzebub and Leviathan would rise again, but he could be sure of one thing: that the entire Demon Realm would fall into a horrifying war. Since I’m already here, for myself, my loved ones, my friends and for the hard-won peace protected by a woman, I have to do something.

It seemed that Crystal Valley’s mission was far more complicated and difficult than he imagined.

No matter what world, the passion for giant robots 🤖 never dies! Why not Gundam 00!!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 283 - Challenge
chapters.body:
Chapter 283 - Challenge

Chen Rui only mentioned 3 “innovations” to change Master Toto’s attitude toward him.

“Firstly, this Gundam… urm, puppet, can we consider designing and testing separately according to function? For example, defense, attack and speed types. Also, can it be transformed into a demonic beast to ease combat or marching?”

“Second, that missile… No, can a tracking function be added to the launch of magic cannon to lock on target?”

“Thirdly, although the magic cannon has poor maneuverability, a defensive object that can move as freely as a horse carriage can be designed and equipped with the magic cannon to become a mobile attack fortress? By the way, let’s call it a tank…”

Master Toto was a purely technical guy, so he was not ashamed to ask questions. He quickly grabbed a pen and asked while writing them down like a little reporter who was interviewing. Although Chen Rui was purely layman in the machinery, his “creatives” were so frightening that Master Toto was shocked – lack of skills could be trained, but things like creativity were natural inspirations. It couldn’t be plagiarized (someone was guilty).

After some discussion, under the “contribution” of Chen Rui’s creativity and a few physics knowledge, Master Toto with his eyes lit no longer questioned his title as a genius. He was a true all-round genius. He was still a genius in any field.

Originally, Sabrina wanted to use the relationship between the crystal dragon and Chen Rui to win the challenge. Unexpectedly, Chen Rui could actually rely on his own ability to win the approval of the most prestigious master craftsman in the Mystic Valley. Perhaps he could truly win by then. She gave Chen Rui a thumbs-up secretly. Seeing the two of them talking speculatively, she walked away to avoid disturbing them.

After learning that Chen Rui was also born fameless instead of a disciple of some “famous master”, Master Toto, who also came from a “cult”, had a better impression of Chen Rui. Yet, a good impression was one thing, but the challenge was another matter.

Chen Rui’s opponent this time was Norris, the commander of the Mystic Valley, who killed Spanda, the former commander. The challenge in the Mystic Valley wasn’t about combat power, but the content of certain research.

The “profession” of the former commander, Spanda was a secret technique in beast taming and mind control, so he was a talent in “biotechnology”. Norris defeated Spanda in his strongest field. In the end, Spanda was dead and Norris climbed to the throne of commander without dispute.

“Master Toto, can you tell me exactly what the challenge is?”

Toto’s answer surprised Chen Rui. The scope could be “machinery” or “biology” research. There was no limit to the content. Based on the previous challenge, it should be decided by the challenger. The time when Norris won the position of commander was a challenge where both of them were confined in a sealed magic circle with a mad beast. They had to use mind control, spirit, various magic or secret techniques to control the mad beast to attack each other.

The rules were one cannot kill the mad beast nor directly attack the opponent. Whoever dies first will lose. Therefore, this challenge was also called the deathmatch.

Mad beast was the highest research achievement of Mystic Valley. It was a terrifying modified half beast hald demon creature. It was bloodthirsty and aggressive with considerably high combat power. Currently, it was only a semi-finished product, so it was extremely difficult to control. Even if with the highest level beast taming skill or mind control skill, it was still difficult to control it.

In that duel, Norris and Spanda used all their powers in the duel which was very exciting. In the end, under the control of Norris, the mad beast tore Spanda into pieces, and Norris won the final victory.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked: This challenge isn’t a physical battle between two people, but the cruelty is even higher. It’s the same in every field, the winner stays and the loser dies.

“Norris is proficient in dark magic, curse and mind control secret techniques. The previous content will probably be used in this challenge. You have great potential to become a grandmaster, but every field has its specialization. You’re definitely not his opponent in this. I suggest you not participate in this challenge. You can come directly to the Mystic Valley, and I’ll appoint you as the deputy master craftsman!”

Master Toto had some good intentions. It was mainly because he couldn’t bear a talent who might become a grandmaster and had potential in “scientific research” to die. The position as the deputy master craftsman was also wanted by many. Even the dual-specialized mechanic master, Horford, brought by Izola was only a “project leader” at an ordinary level. For Chen Rui who just arrived to be below one person and above many people was unprecedented.

Chen Rui couldn’t really stay here as a mad scientist, so he obviously wouldn’t accept that kindness. Instead, he asked indifferently, “Master, if these experiments are successful, the whole Demon Realm will be turned upside down. By the time, war will break out…”

“Yeah!” Master Toto’s eyes lit up, “That’s right! By then, these new weapons will come in handy! It’ll definitely cause unexpected lethality! Even Demon Overlords might be exhausted! This is definitely a significant, great success! My name, Toto will be recorded in the history of demons! Haha…”

Chen Rui probed a few more questions, but it made Master Toto even more excited. He was completely immersed in the huge desire to be worshipped by later generations. Chen Rui finally understood that Master Toto was a fanatic. It was harder to persuade him to change his idea of being famous in the “history of science” than to persuade a demonic tiger to become a vegetarian. As long as I’m famous, I don’t care if it’s for good or bad things. As for maintaining the peace of the universe, fuck that.

That “reminder” made Master Toto like the future deputy master craftsman even more. He took him to tour for a while more. Finally, Sabrina took Chen Rui out of the Mystic Valley with satisfaction.

Sabrina saw that Chen Rui was silenced along the way, and she thought he was fearful after learning the cause of Spanda’s death. She comforted, “Master, don’t worry. Today, we are mainly trying to give you a rough idea. It was just right that I saw you discussing the giant puppet. As long as you ask Sir Jacob for help to set the challenge related to this, you can win safely.”

“Madam, the content can remain unchanged…” Chen Rui shook his head. Regarding those puppets and other things, he could still boast his way through, but when it came to actual contesting, he definitely couldn’t make it. Even though he had used [Deep Analysis] to record many relevant data, neither biology nor machinery were something that he was good at. Even with [Deep Analysis], he couldn’t understand them at once, so he clearly couldn’t compete in it.

On the contrary, the most likely challenge was a bit hopeful. He didn’t know whether he could communicate with the mad beast via [Analytical Eyes]. Yet, based on the situation described by Master Toto, the mad beast should be a fighting machine with only killing instincts, so the possibility for communication was extremely small. God-Eating Mask should be able to make the mad beast a puppet, but the number of puppets had reached the upper limit of two. Fatilu definitely couldn’t be discarded, so he could only discard Snowden who was far away in the Red Spirit Estate. It was just that he must wear the mask on his face to cast puppetry. In that way, God-Eating Mask would be exposed. Now, there was only one reliable method. That was to realize the power of black territory from Shura, which contained the characteristic of manipulation, such as control and confusion.

“Content unchanged?” Sabrina was taken aback. Chen Rui was from the Nightmare Valley, and he was greatly valued by Uncle Manu. If he died in the Mystic Valley because of her, Manu would never let her go.

“These few days, I need to calm down and think hard about how to help you win this challenge.”

Sabrina noticed that he wasn’t talking simply. After all, it was a matter of life and death. It couldn’t be taken as a child’s play. She thought in secret: Could it be that Master Arthur still possesses a powerful mind-controlling technique?

Sabrina thought for a while and said, “Okay. I won’t intervene too much. I’ll leave everything to you, master. Tell me if you need anything.”

“I just want to trouble madam to gather some materials. The more the better, the sooner the better. I need to make an item to face the challenge in six days.”

The materials listed by Chen Rui were mostly rare materials for making Thunderous Sound. It was even enough to make multiple copies. Some of them were materials for [Aura Conversion]. Anyway, at such a critical moment, he might as well take more advantages.

Sabrina frowned slightly when she heard the names of these materials, but she didn’t doubt it because the challenge was related to Chen Rui’s life. She thought about it and pointed out that there were one or two pieces that she couldn’t gather. It was still better than Chen Rui’s expectation. He believed that Sabrina wouldn’t take him lightly at this time.

In that way, Chen Rui returned to the Nightmare Valley. The effect of the grandmaster level healing potion was indeed extraordinary. Freya’s hand had basically recovered, but when she saw him, she was still very cautious. Chen Rui comforted a few words and began training in his lab.

Seven days passed by quickly. It was finally the challenge day at the Mystic Valley.

As expected by Chen Rui, Norris, the commander, chose the content of the previous challenge which was a deathmatch of controlling mad beast.

In the Mystic Valley, the crystal dragon, Jacob came personally as the judge. Both sides were Sabrina and Izola respectively. The people from the Mystic Valley were usually immersed in work, most of them, except for those who couldn’t walk away, came to watch this exciting challenge that rarely happened.

Norris was Izola’s aide, a dark elf with mutated bloodline, and his strength reached the level of early stage Great Demon King. From the analysis of his comprehensive strength, he was a mage. This made Chen Rui think of another Great Demon King in the Dark Moon, Skye.

If it was a direct one-on-one battle, with Chen Rui’s combat power and his characteristics like [Anti-Magic], Norris could be easily killed (surely, under the premise of not exposing his strength). However, the challenge today wasn’t to fight directly. Instead, they had to control the mad beast to attack each other. If one of them lost, the loser would be in a life danger.

Based on strength, “Arthur” was only an early stage Demon King whereas Norris was an early stage Great Demon King. Besides, Norris was proficient in mind control, and he had the record of defeating the former commander, Spanda. Therefore, his chances in winning were higher. Almost everyone was optimistic about Norris.

Norris glanced at Chen Rui with a cruel smile, “Demon Realm’s top genius mechanic master? The person who’s most likely to become a grandmaster? It’s you who’s suiciding. After being torn into pieces by the mad beast, let’s see how you become a grandmaster!”

Before Chen Rui refuted, a stern voice sounded, “Master Arthur, try your best. You’ll be fine with me being here no matter whether you win or lose.”

Norris’ smile froze on his face. The one who spoke was today’s judge, the strongest Demon Overlord in the Crystal Valley – the crystal dragon, Jacob.

Is that still a judge?! He is already cheating before it starts!

Jacob couldn’t bother about those things. Master Arthur was the key to improving his recovery magic circle. Besides, he was also an important servant in the future so nothing should ever happen to him. As for the fight between the two women, it had nothing to do with him.

This deathmatch was so one-sided. Chen Rui literally loses nothing if he loses the deathmatch.

chapters.title: Chapter 284 - Deathmatch
chapters.body:
Chapter 284 - Deathmatch

Soon, both of them came to the challenge site, standing in front of a magic circle.

A magic cage was pushed in. In the magic cage, it was a huge monster that was about three meters tall. It had a grisly appearance, muscular, two sharp horns on its head, blood-red eyes, sharp fangs and covered with purple skin.

There were armor-like scales growing on its shoulders, chest, abdomen and outside of the thighs. Its tail was thick and long with barbs on it. The most terrifying thing was its right arm. It was humongous, and its palm had turned into giant claws.

That was the mad beast. In [Analytical Eyes], the race was shown as “Unknown”. The comprehensive strength assessment had reached B+, the peak of Great Demon King. Its stats were: Physique: B+, Strength: A-, Spirit: C, Agility: B.

It seemed that it was a terrifying highly offensive monster with a terrifying value of A- in strength. The only weakness was its spirit which was the reason why it could be controlled. With the strength of this monster, even Norris couldn’t stand it. Therefore, from a certain perspective, the conditions on both sides were equal.

“Wait a minute.” Norris said, “Arthur is a mechanic master, so he must have a lot of magic items. To be fair, I ask that no items can be used for this deathmatch.”

Sabrina sneered, “If you want the so-called fairness, then why don’t you first confine your strength to early stage of the Demon King level?”

Izola surely wouldn’t agree. She immediately refuted, “That’s impossible. This challenge was proposed by you, so Norris should decide the rules.”

“Didn’t he already decide the mad beast rule? Why don’t we change the content of the challenge? What about magic circles?” Sabrina knew that Chen Rui had specially created a “magic item” in preparation for the challenge. If she let go, the preparation would be wasted, so she obviously wouldn’t let go of that advantage.

“Stop it!” The judge, crystal dragon spoke, “Both parties can use any magic equipment or items. Start now, hurry up!”

After Jacob said so, no one dared to have any objections. There was no other way. Strength was the greatest rule.

Norris wasn’t unprepared. Immediately after his “proposal” was rejected, he put on a ring and a necklace, and took out a skull-shaped wand. He secretly thought that these should make his mind control more powerful.

However, when he saw Chen Rui’s equipment, the sense of superiority suddenly disappeared. Chen Rui wore a set of metal armor, helmet, shin guards, leather gloves, rings, and cape. He was fully equipped and armed to his teeth. The most annoying part was that he was even holding a huge buckler. He looked just like a mobile equipment storage.

There wasn’t a shortage of mechanic masters present, so they naturally could tell that the quality of these equipment were extraordinary. They were likely to be quasi-legendary grades or even legendary grades. Is it all made by him? Trio-specialized. It’s really enviable!

In reality, most of these things were from Paglio’s treasures. The matching of equipment was a profound knowledge. The final attributes of the wearer weren’t as simple as adding up each piece of equipment. Some equipment could complement each other whereas some couldn’t be layered, and they might even restrain each other. Although Chen Rui’s current set wasn’t all legendary grade equipment, the overall coordination was quite good, especially his defense had reached a very high level. The main function of the entire set of equipment was just to cover up.

“Master Arthur actually has such equipment.” Jacob’s eyes lit up, and his eyes fell onto the buckler. His overwhelming greed was showing on his face, “That shield… is it an artifact?”

Artifact! As soon as the crystal dragon said that, a sudden commotion was raised around. Norris felt like crying. That’s just bullying. Legendary grade equipment is still fine, but he even has an… artifact?

Izola and Sabrina were both surprised. Sabrina had already recognized the shield and said movingly, “Illusive Demon Shield… Demon Shield?”

There were more whispers around: Illusive Demon Shield? One of the highest grade seven artifacts in the Demon Realm? The strongest shield?

Isn’t that the Leviathan Royal Family’s artifact? Why is it with Arthur? Did Madam Sabrina give it to him?

“This was lent to me by Sir Manu a few days ago for research.” Chen Rui answered himself, “Unfortunately, I still have no clue until now. However, even if I can’t exert the power of the artifact, it should be fine to block as a usual shield. I hope I won’t break it.”

Many people showed their contempt for the riches – Breaking the strongest armor in the Demon Realm? Not to mention the mad beast, even Demon Overlords can’t break it!

Izola’s face suddenly became gloomy, and her heart was doomed. It wasn’t only because of Chen Rui’s equipment or the Illusive Demon Shield, (outsiders only know Illusive Demon Shield, but they don’t know that IIlusive Shield and Demon Shield can be separated) but also because Manu actually gave the Illusive Demon Shield to “Arthur”. This showed the degree of his importance. If “Arthur” died here, Manu would definitely retaliate madly.

The one with the worst mood wasn’t Izola but Norris. Even if he took out all his possessions, it wasn’t comparable to the value of the shield. Arthur has a full set of superb equipment and the support of Sir Manu and Sir Jacob. How am I supposed to compare?

Now, Norris didn’t know whether he should win or lose. However, losing the deathmatch was equivalent to suiciding, so it was obviously impossible. He was just hoping that the crystal dragon could save “Arthur” in time, then judge him as the winner.

After making up his mind, Norris calmed his mind and put all the distractions behind him. He strode into the magic circle and Chen Rui followed him with a full set of equipment.

After the two walked in, the magic circle began to light up. The magic circle acted like a seal, which could prohibit entry and exit, and prevent the audience from being injured.

The door of the magic cage slowly opened. The mad beast that had been previously isolated by the cage suddenly exuded a horrifying breath that mixed with a bloody and rotten smell. It sent chills down their spine. Chen Rui tried to communicate with [Analytical Eyes] when he first went in, but he could only feel the madness and violent killing breath. There was no rational consciousness at all. This was similar to the demonic flies he encountered at Mountain Xilang. However, those demonic flies were created by the bloodline talents of the Beelzebub Royal Family; whereas the mad beast had its own consciousness, but this consciousness simply couldn’t control or communicate.

The mad beast had been imprisoned and tested. Now that he was free from the cage, he immediately transferred his anger to the two people outside. He roared loudly and pounced toward Norris, who was the closest. The mad beast’s speed was rated B which was weaker as relative to its strength and physique. However, it was still the level of Great Demon King. It was quite scary. Norris’ reason for getting close to the beast wasn’t to suicide but to control it within the effective range of mind control. After all, he had the previous experience so he seemed calm.

At the moment that the mad beast pounced, Norris’s eyes flashed as a powerful spirit surged out. The huge body of the beast suddenly stagnated. When it was only two meters away from Norris, its action actually froze in mid-air.

Chen Rui once saw this kind of [Psychokinesis] from Snowden. It could be offensive and defensive, and it can be used at will. It was very good. Norris’ [Psychokinesis] was obviously better than Snowden by a lot to actually confine the mad beast at the peak of Great Demon King.

The mad beast’s strength erupted and broke away from the imprisonment of [Psychokinesis]. Yet, it didn’t attack Norris who was in front of it. Instead, it set its bloody eyes onto Chen Rui who was far away. It turned out that Norris knew that he couldn’t confine the mad beast for a long time, so he immediately switched the power of his spirit. He used a dark magic called [Hatred Transfer] to transfer the mad beast’s hatred onto Chen Rui.

Chen Rui had prepared for a long time. Before the beast attacked, he took out an item and threw it to the ground. It suddenly emitted a strong dazzling light. Even the audience outside the magic circle was blinded by the strong light and couldn’t open their eyes. The only one unaffected was the crystal dragon, Jacob while Sabrina and Izola with strong spirit also quickly adjusted to the sudden change. There were a few people left that could see the situation in the field clearly.

The most “damaged” were clearly the mad beast and Norris in the magic circle. Their eyes were aching like being stung by needles. They couldn’t see anything at all.

The mad beast with stinging eyes was angered. He felt that his target’s breath (Chen Rui) disappeared instantly, even his smell was gone. He seemed to have left this place. Due to his anger and blinded eyes, he began to swing his giant claws out of fury.

The moment Norris was blinded, he knew something was wrong. He quickly released the defensive magic [Magic Shield] that he had prepared just in case. His decision was right. As soon as Norris released the magic shield, he felt a violent tremor and his entire body was knocked out. Fortunately, with the magic shield, he wasn’t damaged, but his grim face had already looked pale.

Despite the increase in spirit with his equipment and the greatly strengthened defense of the magic shield, it could only block one of that terrifying blow. After landing, the defensive magic suddenly collapsed. The sound of the landing caused the mad beast to rush toward him again. At that time, Norris had desperately used some spirit to restore some vision. He vaguely saw the mad beast running toward him, and he was suddenly taken aback. It was too late to cast a magic shield, so he had to cast [Psychokinesis] again to confine the movement of the mad beast.

That [Psychokinesis] was very exhausting, especially if the target was too powerful. The difficulty was high. Norris’ face was full of cold sweat, but his means were far more than that. Waves of energy radiated from his pupils and the beast’s tightly closed eyes opened involuntarily. Its bloody pupil gradually turned dull as if it was no longer affected by the blinding effect, and it turned its head to look at Chen Rui.

Chen Rui frowned. The beast seemed to be hypnotized. In this case, it would be useless to use the “flash bomb” technique again.

Before he thought of a plan, the beast suddenly accelerated. It appeared in front him instantly and swung its claws. Chen Rui had no time to think and could only raise the Demon Shield to defend. At present, he could only use his Demon King strength. Besides, the mad beast was extraordinarily terrifying. “Klang!” and Chen Rui flew backward for seven to eight meters while the Demon Shield also fell to the ground. Although the mirror-like buckler had no damage, he seemed unable to lift it up anymore.

The beast rushed over again. The crystal dragon, Jacob frowned. He was ready to rescue at any time. Chen Rui’s eyes flashed and the beast’s momentum suddenly slowed down. Simultaneously, a huge earth wall appeared, stopping the mad beast’s path.

Earth Magic: [Decelerate]! [Earth Wall]!

The crystal dragon nodded secretly. Although he took a long time, being able to launch two different magic at once. This showed that his potential was quite good.

In a blink of an eye, a large area of cracks appeared on the earth wall. Immediately after, the giant claws of the mad beast penetrated. With a scratch, the earth wall collapsed. At that moment, Chen Rui had fled, but he didn’t have time to pick up the Demon Shield on the ground.

Chen Rui fled in the direction of Norris. The mad beast that had torn the [Earth Wall] rushed toward his side. Chen Rui pretended to be chanting, then he suddenly waved his hand. The speed of the mad beast suddenly slowed down. At the same time, Norris also felt that his body was several times heavier. It couldn’t move for a while: [Gravity]!

Since Chen Rui waved his hand toward the mad beast and [Gravity] was an AoE magic, so it wasn’t a foul. Norris was a mage, so he felt extremely strenuous in the gravity field. He secretly scolded his opponent for being cunning. He had a thought and raised his wand strenuously. His target was also the mad beast. A black mist spread gradually.

“[Dark Sky]!”

It was large AoE dark magic that could confuse an opponent’s vision. The stage was suddenly enveloped by black mist and the audience’s vision outside was disrupted again. They were unable to see the scene inside.

Norris smiled creepily and cast another magic. A large number of arms emerged from the ground, grabbing the mad beast and preventing it from moving. They looked very ghastly and scary. Surely, not just the beast but Chen Rui and himself were caught and unable to move.

Norris understood that [Dark Sky] might not be able to block the sight of powerhouses like the crystal dragon and Sabrina, so he dared not break the rule. He was just playing on the edge like Chen Rui by using two AoE magic to stop the mad beast and also limit Chen Rui’s actions and vision at the same time.

This magic wasn’t directly affecting the body, so the characteristic of [Anti-Magic] wasn’t triggered. Besides, Chen Rui was at Demon King-level strength, so he couldn’t get rid of those “ghost hands”. The scene seemed a little like a horror movie. He even had goosebumps at once.

Outside the field, the crystal dragon’s eyes were radiating a clear light. He looked through the [Dark Sky]. He could see that the mad beast had broken free from the ground and was getting closer and closer. Now, both Chen Rui and Norris couldn’t move so it was obviously the final moment to decide the victory.

This kind of deathmatch, whether it was spirit or items, couldn’t be used recklessly. A misstep could mean life and death. However, with the equipment of “Master Arthur”, as long as there wasn’t any huge accident, even if he lost, the crystal dragon should be able to save him.

The distance between Norris and Chen Rui were very close; it was less than two meters. As a mage, Norris wasn’t affected by the dark sky, so he controlled the mad beast as he approached. His target was obviously Chen Rui aside from him.

Chen Rui learned the movement of the mad beast with [Analytical Eyes]. Knowing that it was the final moment, he couldn’t be hiding anymore. The ring on his hand suddenly emitted a dark blue light to cover up the string of black gas appearing from the tip of his fingers. The black gas mixed into the [Dark Sky] and drifted toward the beast. The gas actually penetrated into its head. The mad beast’s figure suddenly paused, and it changed its direction slowly to Norris.

Norris was taken aback. He didn’t expect that his opponent actually wasn’t affected by [Dark Sky], and he could even use item to counterattack. He felt that his spirit that was controlling the beast seemed to have fallen into a quagmire. He immediately activated his secret technique, accompanied with his talent in mind control to strengthen his spirit output. He was in a tug-of-war with Chen Rui. Both of them were at a stalemate.

Although the mad beast was powerful, it was weak in spirit. Suddenly, his brain was confused as if two controllers were issuing opposite commands at the same time. It didn’t know who to obey.

Both Sabrina and Izola looked serious at the same time. Whoever could win the final victory of this tug-of-war would become the winner of this deathmatch!

That is why you don’t drag the time with your enemy. Defeat him in one shot if you have to. 🔫

chapters.title: Chapter 285 - Welcome The Spy Into The Headquarter! The Beginning Of Chaos
chapters.body:
Chapter 285 - Welcome The Spy Into The Headquarter! The Beginning Of Chaos

As time passed, magic such as [Dark Sky] and [Gravity] had disappeared. The audience could finally see the scene of the field clearly. They saw that Chen Rui and Norris weren’t far away from each other; while the scary mad beast was just 5 to 6 meters away from both of them. They formed an irregular triangle. The tall body of the mad beast was trembling slightly, seeming hesitating.

Everyone could see that the commander, Norris and the mechanic genius were at a stalemate. Although “Arthur” was obviously relying on the power of magic items, it was still quite unexpected for such stalemate to occur.

Norris was secretly shocked. Initially, according to the information available to him, Arthur was extremely talented in magic circles and even received the master craftsman, Master Toto’s acknowledgement in puppet making and others. After considering, he finally decided the challenge’s content to be the mad beast. Unexpectedly, with only Demon King-level strength, Arthur had such a secret technique and with the help of his item, he could tie with Norris!

Compared with the cold sweating Norris, although Chen Rui, who was using “items”, didn’t seem so strenuous, he looked extremely serious. Norris’s secret technique which combined spirit and [Psychokinesis] was indeed powerful. If it wasn’t for the power of dark territory, the beast would be completely under his control now.

Currently, two spiritual energies were colliding in the mad beast’s mind. Although the power of the dark territory was pure and powerful, it wasn’t a skill to control the mind. In terms of “quality”, Chen Rui had an absolute advantage but in terms of “quantity”, he wasn’t as good as Norris’s full output. Besides, despite the seven days of special training, the power territory still couldn’t last long without the [Galaxy Territory]. If this continued, Chen Rui might lose.

Even without the restrictions under their feet, neither of them dare to move easily lest their opponent take advantage of the carelessness.

Under the strong impact of spiritual energies, Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes] suddenly felt a trace of abnormality and his thoughts moved. Norris immediately noticed that his opponent’s mind was loosened and he quickly increased his spirit output.

The mad beast roared while covering his head for a while and began moving towards Chen Rui. The speed was very slow as if it was in a slow motion movie but its heavy steps seemed to be stomping on everyone’s heart.

Chen Rui was still resisting stubbornly. It took a long time for the mad beast to take a step. Norris could feel Chen Rui’s spirit weakening and he was overjoyed.

Under everyone’s intense gaze, every minute seemed like a long hour. The mad beast finally came to Chen Rui. At that distance, as long as it waved its paws, its horrifying giant arm with sharp, long claws would hit Chen Rui directly. Even if Chen Rui was wearing legendary grade equipment, it couldn’t defend that tremendous power. Therefore, the crystal dragon had already stood up slowly.

The mad beast seemed to be hesitating and there was an odd twist at its neck. Norris felt an unknown resistance and his spirit was actually going to be broken. I didn’t expect “Arthur” to have such strength still! Obviously, he wouldn’t give up. He couldn’t bother about the recoil of the secret technique. He bit his tongue and used the power of blood to make his control suddenly increased by tenfold.

The mad beast covered his head in pain and roared. Its huge mouth suddenly opened into an exaggerated width of more than one meter. Its sharp teeth and strange, ugly mouth appeared in front of Chen Rui, seemingly about to devour Chen Rui whole and tear him apart. The crystal dragon’s hand revealed a faint crystal light, as soon as the mad beast made another move, he would attack immediately.

However, at that moment, a change suddenly occurred. The mouth of the mad beast returned to its original state and his angry eyes turned to Norris, who thought he was winning. Its figure flickered and had instantly rushed toward Norris. This time, Norris was too late to react. His claws struck with strong wind. Under the terrifying force, Norris’s flesh and blood blasted everywhere. Norris, who was too late to cast his defensive magic, instantly became a pile of minced meat and it was disgusting to look at.

Norris was still in disbelief before his consciousness disappeared. He was regretful because he had even stronger curses that weren’t used. The problem was that the changes just now were too fast…

Most of the people outside the field hadn’t reacted. No matter what the process was, the final result was already in front of them. Norris died and “Arthur” was still alive.

Norris, the commander of the Mystic Valley, died in front of a Demon King opponent!

What surprised the audience was that after the mad beast killed Norris, It slowly walked toward Chen Rui and knelt down. It lowered its head and let Chen Rui’s hand pet its head. That gentle look stunned the “scientists” who studied the mad beast and they thought there was something wrong with their eyes. Chen Rui patted its head and slowly walked out of the magic circle while the mad beast remained unmoved.

This kind of mind-control fully convinced all the people. Norris really died in a fair fight.

“You’re indeed a genius. This game, Arthur wins! You’re the commander from now but don’t forget our business.” The crystal dragon praised but he didn’t forget to remind Chen Rui his so-called business of improving the magic circle.

Sabrina was overjoyed whereas Izola’s face was very bitter. Norris was one of her two best assistants. She never expected such a tragic death. Also, based on the crystal dragon’s tone, he had a very close relationship with Arthur. Together with Arthur’s relationship with Manu, she could only endure it for the time being.

After walking out of the magic circle, the ring with blue light in Chen Rui’s hands suddenly burst open. His body swayed and he almost fell, seemingly exhausted both his strength and item. NOt to forget that he was only a “Demon King”. Relying on secret technique and buffing items, it was a miracle for him to persist until the end.

That look was definitely an act. In reality, when the two spiritual energies collided just now, the memory of the mad beast that was originally lost due to the experiment was miraculously recovered. Chen Rui keenly noticed that with [Analytical Eyes]. When his initial dark power was on the verge of disappearing, he immediately changed to communicating with [Analytical Eyes], which was why the mad beast moved towards Chen Rui step by step.

The mad beast was originally a mutated Great Demon. Due to his talents, he was kidnapped as a test subject when he was still a child and eventually transformed into a half-human and half-beast monster, even losing his ability to talk. The recovery of his memories bit by bit terrified him.

Chen Rui immediately expressed his kindness and willingness to help the mad beast. The IQ of the mad beast was only equivalent to a child. After feeling Arthur’s goodwill, he was naturally fully convinced by this person who could communicate with himself. Although he almost killed Chen Rui under Norris’s control, he got rid of Norris’s control with Chen Rui’s help and killed Norris at once.

In fact, in case he couldn’t control the mad beast with dark power, Chen Rui still had a trump card.
