It was to give up Snowden as a puppet and use the helmet as a cover-up to control the mad beast with the power of God-Eating Mask. However, that might be detected by a powerhouse like the crystal dragon. Therefore, this “accident” was perfect for him.

“Keep the mad beast in the cage first. Temporarily stop all experiments and remain the food supply. When I recover, I will test him alone.” Chen Rui’s voice was weak but his current identity was already the commander of the Mystic Valley. Together with his undisputed performance just now, no one dared to take him lightly.

The mad beast couldn’t speak but its hearing was intact. It understood that it was what they had negotiated in its consciousness. It was very grateful and entered the cage obediently, making everyone in awe.

Izola handed a crystal symbolizing control to the judge, Jacob without saying a word and left with a bitter face while Sabrina’s harsh laughter came from behind.

Sabrina was indeed proud. Betting on “Master Arthur” was the smartest decision. Now that the Mystic Valley was back in her hands, her position was more stable. As long as she could give birth to a descendent of Beelzebub Royal Family, then even if her husband, Azgalor became an emperor, her position as the empress would still be unshakable. She might even take control of her son to hold actual power at a certain stage.

Surely, these were just long-term plans. The current plan had been completed successfully. After losing control of the Mystic Valley, Izola had no way to compete with her.

Sabrina was secretly calculating while rejoicing. As the crystal dragon said, “Arthur” is definitely a genius. Nowadays, he is also known as the commander of the Mystic Valley. Although he’s part of Manu’s party, I must try my best to win his support. When necessary, I can even use actual honey trap.

However, Sabrina didn’t know that Chen Rui’s plan also succeeded in a crucial step. Originally, when there was no Mystic Valley, his plan was only a preliminary structure, which had now been perfected. From the current situation, it was proceeding very smoothly.

Her success this time undoubtedly led the spy into the headquarter, which was the beginning of Crystal Valley’s complete chaos.

In the following days, during the handover of the Mystery Valley, there were a lot of troubles. It was obviously caused by Izola’s men. Sabrina mercilessly suppressed them but it was still chaotic.

Sabrina was also mentally prepared for this. When Izola first took over the Mystic Valley from her hands, Sabrina also did a lot of these tricks so it’d be fine after the transition.

Instead, Chen Rui, the commander, didn’t need to deal with any specific matters. He just had to research the “mad beast”. After a careful communication with the mad beast, he learned that the mad beast had a name called Lafar. After some “mental control”, Lafar became Chen Rui’s bodyguard and followed him docilely all day long. Surely, that docility was only toward Chen Rui. Even if someone wanted to study this strange mad beast, they didn’t dare to offend this new commander that represented Sir Manu and Madam Sabrina.

The crystal dragon’s recovery magic circle was very important in Chen Rui’s plan. Therefore, he had accelerated the progress of his research these days and was almost close to success. Everything was proceeding smoothly according to the plan and was just waiting for the final launch.

chapters.title: Chapter 286 - Freya’S Thoughts
chapters.body:
Chapter 286 - Freya’S Thoughts

Days passed ——

On this day, Chen Rui and Sabrina walked out from the entrance of the Crystal Valley side by side.

“I’m really grateful to madam this time to let me out of the valley.” Chen Rui said with a happy face, “If it isn’t because Sir Jacob is in a deep sleep within the magic circle and I need to refer to the Dragon Inscription at the Misty Swamp for the Illusive Demon Shield, I wouldn’t trouble madam to come out with me. It’s just that Sir Jacob’s inscriptions are really amazing. Coming here from the Misty Swamp only requires a simple [Teleportation], but there is such a complicated path from here to the Misty Swamp.

Sabrina shook her head, “It’s just a trivial matter. Master doesn’t have to be so polite. If you want to be calculative, then I don’t even know how to thank you.”

“I don’t know when I’ll have time to come out to take a breather again. Although I can ask for anything in the valley, I always feel like I’m caged. Please forgive me, madam. I’m just being honest with my feelings.”

Sabrina sighed, “You’re right. No matter how good the valley is, it’s still only a cage. However, this world that we’re living in is also a giant cage as no one can escape the shackles of time and space. Perhaps the only thing we can do is to desperately grasp more shackles to control and imprison others so that we can eliminate our inner fear.”

“Madam is someone with a story.” Chen Rui took a look at her, “I hope that one day, I’ll be qualified to listen to madam’s story.”

“Master, you have to be patient with everything. The easier it is to get, the less interesting it is.” Sabrina chuckled and shifted the topic, “By the way, I received news from outside that there are rumors that treasure was recently discovered around the area outside the valley. A lot of people came to look for the treasure. Although Crystal Valley has Sir Jacob’s [Hidden] inscription and magic circle, we still need to be more careful about the valley’s defense and concealment. We’ll just have to wait for this rumor to be forgotten.”

Chen Rui instinctively felt that this treasure hunt wasn’t so simple. It may be related to Christina. It had been many days since he arrived at the Crystal Valley. Although he used the magic item to send a signal that he was “alive”, he couldn’t deliver any other information such as the three Demon Overlords. Besides, he wasn’t sure if the signal would be interfered by the Dragon Inscription within the valley.

Christina cleverly used this method to test. She was likely trying to obtain more information before launching the plan. It seemed that she was also well prepared. In any case, this plan must succeed. By then, not only could they destroy the Crystal Valley and eliminate the enemy’s headquarters, but there was also a great chance to kill Paglio’s enemy.

However, going out to “research” this time was also part of his plan, and it was also a very crucial step.

“I think I’m patient enough.” Chen Rui shook his head with a bitter smile and stopped mentioning about that tactfully. “By the way, the mess in the Mystic Valley seems to have calmed down recently. However, I always feel like Izola won’t give up so easily. She might be planning something bigger.”

“Hmph! She is just struggling with her last breath. However… you better be cautious, master, especially pay attention to your safety.”

“Madam, why don’t invite me to be a guest at your blue house?”

“Master!” Jacob came excitedly at that moment with his face full of joy.

“It seems that there’s no such opportunity.” Sabrina deliberately made a laugh of regret. Then, she bowed at Jacob and left.

“Sir Jacob, are you awake?” Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “How’s the effect?”

“The effect is so good! You really are a genius! What about I grant Luna to you?” Jacob was exulted.

With Chen Rui’s support, the improvement of the magic circle was completed successfully and the crystal dragon was very happy. Now, the magic circle could double the recovery speed of Jacob, and the interval between each use had been reduced from 7 days to 2 days. Both the effect and efficiency were much better than expected. It was just that under the effect of compound inscriptions consisting of [Deep Sleep] and [Recovery], Jacob would fall into a recovery slumber for an entire day, and it was hard for him to awake.

It was the first trial, and it indeed succeeded. Now, Jacob’s recovery speed was greatly accelerated, so he was naturally ecstatic. At that time, he was almost killed by Paglio, and he still had lingering fear until now. Before he recovered, he never dared to leave the Crystal Valley easily. Now that he found a shortcut in recovering his injuries, he looked at Chen Rui differently now. He evenoffered his favorite maid, Luna to ChenRui.

Chen Rui shook his head solemnly, “Rewards aren’t necessary. I’ve already got enough benefits from you. Moreover, I can’t take all the credits. Without sir’s Dragon Inscription, it wouldn’t have achieved such a result.”

Originally, this magic circle was used to harm the dragon, but he actually received the crystal dragon’s appreciation in return. He was a little guilty. The main thing was because that Luna… was a thick-waisted minotaur maid. The heavy taste wasn’t something he could handle.

Luna was also the crystal dragon’s favorite maid. If he really offers her to Chen Rui, he’d be embarrassed to take her back. Jacob was still a bit reluctant. Now that he heard Chen Rui humble words, even though he was usually moody, he couldn’t help but to have a better impression of this “good comrade” who didn’t ask for anything in return.

“Hmm… weren’t you interested in the puppet’s heart the last time? I’ll lend it to you for research for a few days.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. He wanted to make that request, but he was afraid that it might raise Jacob’s suspicion. Now that Jacob initiated, he naturally couldn’t pretend anymore, “That’s awesome! Thank you, sir!”

The puppet’s heart was the treasure of the Beelzebub Royal Family. It had a great effect on creating puppets. Jacob asked for it from Azgalor. Originally, the crystal men were puppets made by the crystal dragon with a strange power of his body. With the help of the puppet’s heart, he could create more and stronger crystal men. Also, he could control the crystal men to a certain extent. Jacob offered the puppet’s heart was clearly to further win over Chen Rui because based on Chen Rui’s potential and understanding of magic circles, there was likely room for further improvement. Certainly, he also stated that he was “borrowing” not “giving”.

Moreover, the strongest among the crystal men, the leader, was only at Great Demon King. Even in the worst scenario, with his Demon Overlord-strength, he didn’t have to be worried about Chen Rui controlling the crystal men to do anything too bad.

However, in this world, there were even worse scenarios that one could expect…

“I know that the puppet’s heart is very important to you, so I dare not borrow it for too long. What about I return to sir when sir wakes up from the magic circle next time?”

When Crystal Dragon heard it, he was thinking that it was only three days, so he nodded immediately. He took the puppet’s heart from his space ring and gave it to Chen Rui.

Chen Rui took the translucent yellow crystal carefully, revealing an extremely excited look, “Please forgive me, Sir Jacob. Time is very precious now. I can’t wait to study it. I’ll take leave first.”

The crystal dragon was in a very good mood, so he simply waved his hand generously and returned to the Crystal Lair. When Chen Rui returned to the Nightmare Valley, Freya greeted him and served him some snacks, “Sir, you’re back. You didn’t eat anything when you went out this morning. Now, there is still some time before lunch, so you can eat some snacks and fruits first.”

As Chen Rui was in a hurry as he invited Sabrina to go out this morning. He was indeed a little hungry now. He immediately picked up a snack and ate it, “Is there any wine?”

These days, in order to disguise his identity, drinking had almost become his second nature.

Freya hesitated for a moment, “Sir, finish these snacks first. Otherwise, the wine will be bad for your health.”

Chen Rui smiled at her, “Okay.”

Although his Great Demon’s face was a little ugly, that smile made Freya feel unprecedentedly secure. That security was something that the tormented succubus had never felt in the past years. A strange emotion suddenly rose in her heart. She said lightly, “Sir, my injuries have all recovered. Thank you sir for the high grade potion.”

“Oh, it’s nothing.” Freya was Kia’s mother, and her life experience was miserable, so Chen Rui would certainly not be stingy with that bit of potion. He didn’t ask her to do anything special here on usual days. She just had to take care of his daily diet and send back those maids given by Manu along the way. As for himself, he spent most of the time training in the lab.

“Sir… that…” Freya looked hesitant, but she brought up her courage to say, “Do you want Freya to sleep with you tonight?”

These days, those behaviors that Freya expected never never happened. Although this master was always exhausted after coming from the lab every day and slept immediately after eating, so he didn’t have the time to do “other things”. Yet, Freya, who had been tortured for many years, could feel that this master might not be who she expected to be. In contrast, he was a very good master.

Although some things were inadvertent, like those precious, high-grade potions, she felt a warmth that she hadn’t felt for a long time.

Following such a master was hundreds of times better than the original one. The more she felt so, the more afraid she was to go back to the olden days. Therefore, she volunteered to sleep with him, hoping to become a more favored maid. Then, the chance of her being sent away would be a lot smaller.

Chen Rui didn’t expect Freya to make such a request, so his eyes suddenly became weird. He shook his head and said, “No need.”

Freya looked a little sad, “Do you despise me because I used to…”

“No.” Chen Rui shook his head. Freya was beautiful, soft and belonged to a lovable type. Unfortunately, she was Kia’s mother. That preconceived concept stopped him from having any thoughts. Although such things were very common in the Demon Realm, and the ages and appearance of mother-daughter weren’t a problem for demons with hundreds of years of life, Chen Rui came from another world deeply rooted with a sense of morality. Having several spouses was already the limit. So, such mother-daughter-con was really unacceptable.

“If I guessed it right, you’re doing this… just to know about Kia from me?”

Freya heard her daughter’s name, and her voice started trembling slightly, “Kia… currently she’s…”

“As far as I know, she is very good. I can only tell you this. If you really want the best for her, don’t ask anything. Understand?” Chen Rui didn’t expose everything. Although Freya shouldn’t be Sabrina’s spy, it was at the critical moment of the plan, he couldn’t afford any mistakes.

“I understand. Thank you, sir. I’ll retreat now.” Freya stared at Chen Rui for a moment. Her eyes were flashing with a rare brilliance. When she walked to the door, she suddenly smiled slightly, “Actually… Sir didn’t guess everything correctly.”

Freya’s moving smile was very similar to Kia. At that instant, Chen Rui was a little lost, but he soon returned to normal. He knocked his head for having weird thoughts. The final launch was already imminent. Every step forward couldn’t have any mistakes, so he had to consider carefully.

Hmmm another candidate? Shouldn’t be right?

chapters.title: Chapter 287 - Beast Chaos
chapters.body:
Chapter 287 - Beast Chaos

Compared with the chaos that appeared from time to time previously, the Mystic Valley seemed a lot quiet the past two days. Those who deliberately caused chaos and mistakes had been found by Sabrina who was prepared. Everyone regardless of their position was killed without mercy.

The merciless method used by Sabrina to show her authority was very effective. It was much smoother and more decisive than when Izola took over the Mystic Valley. Now, everyone in the Mystic Valley was trying to protect themselves. They were always careful as they were afraid to be involved. They were also very respectful toward the new commander, “Arthur”, who had a strong background.

Compared with Sir Jacob and Sir Manu of Demon Overlord-level, Madam Sabrina was merely a small character standing behind the commander. If Sabrina could represent Sir Azgalor, Commander “Arthur” had been unanimously supported by the three masters of the Crystal Valley. In terms of his capabilities, not only was he the Demon Realm’s top genius mechanic master, but also he defeated the Great Demon King, Norris in the deathmatch. His talents and capabilities in creation had also been praised by Master Toto, the master craftsman. Whether it was prestige, capabilities or background, he was the best, so there was basically no one who dared to challenge his authority.

If Chen Rui was really just an ordinary mechanic master, he should be satisfied to achieve his current status and treatment. Unfortunately, he was an undercover.

Chen Rui was viewing the map of Mystic Valley with Master Toto in the tallest office at the Mystic Valley. Their discussions were engaging. It turned out that Chen Rui recently wandered around the valley according to the original map and proposed to re-plan the layout of the Mystic Valley by separating the management of various types of research institutes and resources to avoid confusion or accidents. Master Toto agreed with that idea. He found this new commander increasingly pleasant to his eyes. Master Toto also voiced a few opinions. At that time, someone outside the door loudly reported, “Commander! Something’s bad!”

“What are you shouting for?!” Chen Rui snorted, “Tony! Don’t disturb the master craftsman’s thoughts!”

With the mad beast, Lafar guarding at the entrance, the person who came to report didn’t dare to approach. He was just shouting from a distance, “Something happened, commander! The magic circles on the cages in the demonic beast lab suddenly lost effect. All the demonic beasts have escaped!”

“What?!” Master Toto was taken aback. Most of the demonic beasts used in the experiment were mutated. Some of their combat powers were also really high. Now that they all escaped, it woulld likely cause a lot of casualties.

The conflict between Izola and Sabrina was well known throughout the Crystal Valley. When Izola took over the Mystic Valley, Sabrina wasn’t holding back on causing mess. This time, it was likely to be similar to those days. It was Izola’s revenge.

For these fights between the upper-level, those below naturally wouldn’t dare to get involved, including Master Toto. However, now that even the experimental demonic beasts had been “released”, it would definitely cause a huge mess. It couldn’t be neglected.

Chen Rui was also shocked, “Let’s go check it out! Master Toto!”

As Master Toto’s concerns, Mystic Valley was already in chaos. Demonic beasts fled in chaos everywhere. Many of which started attacking the people in the valley. The protection outside the Mystic Valley was secure and powerful, but most of them within were technical workers, so their combat power wasn’t outstanding. Besides, there were powerful demonic beasts like hydra and manticore among these demonic beasts, causing heavy casualties at once.

“Lafar, protect me and Master Toto! Tony, immediately leaves the valley to make an urgent report to Madam Sabrina. When you pass the gate, ask Guli and Phil to assist with the crystal guards!” Chen Rui’s decisiveness made Master Toto grateful and secretly admired.

Tony hurried away after receiving the order. Soon, Guli and Phil hurried in with the crystal guards from the valley’s entrance and killed a lot of demonic beasts. There was a very powerful manticore. Guli was accidentally hit by its tail needle. and his entire body immediately turned green-purple. Even his Great Demon King’s strength couldn’t stop the spread of poison. As his movement slowed down, he was torn into pieces by the manticore.

The remaining Phil could barely protect himself, so it was even more difficult for him to command the crystal guards. At the critical moment, he heard the commander shouted, “Phil, hold the manticore down with magic. I’ll command the crystal men!”

As he said, Chen Rui took out a yellowish brown crystal and inserted his spirit into it. Suddenly, he had a strange feeling as if there were countless invisible threads that connected himself with all the nearby crystal men, allowing him to control their every move. The crystal men were the main combat power of the Crystal Valley. They were puppets created by the fusion of crystal dragon’s power and the puppet’s heart. They had some instinctive behaviors, but they had no self-consciousness. Therefore, they would faithfully execute the controller’s commands.

The guards at the Crystal Valley used a crystal provided by the crystal dragon to control the actions of the crystal men. Yet, the “authority” given by this crystal wasn’t huge. It had a strict control over the number of crystal men being controlled; whereas the puppet’s heart represented the highest authority.

Within seconds of Chen Rui’s thoughts, the crystal men had surrounded and trapped the manticore.

The manticore was a powerful demonic beast. It had a lion’s body, scorpion’s tail, wings on its back. It was very fast, and its tail and claws were venomous. This mutated manticore had reached Demon Emperor-level. Fortunately, its wings were severely damaged in an experiment, so its flying ability was temporarily lost. Otherwise, it’d be even more difficult to deal with. Although the manticore couldn’t fly, it had a territory-like green power force around it. Those that got close would be poisoned. Luckily, it was useless toward the crystal men.

However, the strength and speed of the manticore still had an absolute advantage. It even destroyed several Demon King-level crystal leaders. The rest still continued to surround under Chen Rui’s control. Phil, who finally had his hands freed, began casting magic and barely stabilized the situation. However, that was only temporary. Besides, there was a hydra close to Demon Emperor-level not far away. If this continued, they might not be able to hold it.

Many of the “projects” under research were destroyed and collapsed due to the emergence of demonic beasts. Master Toto was frightened and furious, and even his heart was bleeding. He quickly said, “Master Arthur, please ask Sir Jacob for help. Otherwise, the Mystic Valley will be destroyed!”

“No! Sir Jacob should be in the magic circle by now. No one can disturb him. He would need at least an entire day to come out!” Chen Rui also looked anxious, “I’ve already sent someone to bring Madam Sabrina. Why hasn’t she…” At that moment, a clear voice sounded. It was Sabrina’s voice.

Everyone suddenly felt that the temperature had dropped sharply, and they started to shiver. The movement of the hydra suddenly slowed down. Its body was gradually froze like an ice sculpture. However, the hydra’s strength wasn’t small. Soon, a large area of cracks appeared on the ice sculpture and shattered. The hydra hissed loudly and its hiss was extremely sharp. Including Chen Rui, everyone around him felt extremely uncomfortable and covered their ears. This hydra was mutated. Chen Rui once used hydra to deal with Broc at the Silent Night Wetland. At that time, the female hydra’s mutated ability was a poisonous breath while the one in front of him now was a sound attack.

However, this strange sound made by its mutated talent wasn’t transmitted by ears but from all five senses. Even the mad beast, Lafar, who was also at the peak of the Great Demon King, couldn’t endure such a special attack because of its weak spirit. Lafar cried in pain while his ears and noses overflowed with blood. Some of the weaker ones even died on the spot. In contrast, the powerful manticore wasn’t greatly affected.

The target of the hydra wasn’t the others but Sabrina. The rest were merely affected by the strong impact. Sabrina was the most damaged. Her veil was actually stained with red. She was obviously damaged by surprise. Sabrina’s eyes flickered with cold light, and her vibe rose. A blue mist trapped the hydra. Within the mist, hisses of the hydra and clear cutting sound could be heard. Yet, the hisses this time wasn’t that mutated talent’s attack but miserable cries.

The cries stopped as the mist gradually dissipated. What appeared in front of their eyes was a real ice sculpture. There was no sign of life at all, and its nine heads were all lost. There were even frozen fragments of its limbs on the ground.

After Sabrina dealt with the hydra, she set her sights on the manticore’s battlefield. These escaped demonic beasts were all imprisoned and continuously experimented. Thus, they weren’t at their best state yet they shouldn’t be underestimated.

The manticore was at the early stage of Demon Overlord. In the case of the same level of strength, demonic beasts were superior over ordinary demons. Just now, her attention was entirely on the manticore and she also underestimated her enemies. Therefore, she was damaged by the hydra’s mutated attack and suffered a lot of internal injuries. Now, the Mystic Valley was in chaos and the casualties were heavy. Seeing that the crystal men couldn’t stand any longer, Sabrina took a deep breath, suppressed her injuries and charged toward the manticore in mid-air.

The manticore felt the threatening breath from the enemy in mid-air, so it swept away the approaching crystal men, exerted force on its feet and charged at Sabrina.

The demon and beast brushed past each other like lightning. Sabrina’s shoulders were covered with a few shocking scratches. Those blood stains were shockingly green. Her body emitted a faint white gas that sealed her wound and prevented the toxins from spreading. The manticore wasn’t doing good as well. Blood was coming out of its one eye. Theycouldn’t be opened anymore.

Sabrina knew she had to eliminate the most threatening, Demon-Overlord beast. A pair of thin gloves appeared on her hands, and the cold breath from her body became more intense. That blue mist started to spread with flashing crystals within. It was obviously the power of pseudo-territory.

The surrounding of the manticore was also revealing a faint green light. Although the two didn’t have direct contact, the two territory’s forces had begun to contend.

In the blink of an eye, the green light and blue mist had mixed up. There were high-speed moving figures of human and beast within. Under such power, even the ground reinforced by the crystal dragon’s inscription began to crack in a large area.

Chen Rui wasn’t slacking off. He ordered Phil to control a part of the crystal men to quickly kill the rest of the demonic beasts. Lafar protected the Master Toto while he used the puppet’s heart to control the rest of the crystal men to form a large circle, surrounding the battlefield between the manticore and Sabrina.

He carefully watched Sabrina’s every move not only with [Analytical Eyes] but also [Deep Analysis]. Such a battle between Demon Emperors with pseudo-territory was rare. Although pseudo-territory wasn’t a real territory, it was still a prototype of Demon Overlord’s territory. Thus, it could provide an important reference for his current Megrez state.

Originally, the manticore’s strength was slightly better, but due to the experiments, its strength was impaired. Therefore, both of them were evenly matched now. None of them could win easily.

As the saying goes, when two tigers fight, one of them must be injured. The current battle situation wasn’t expected by Chen Rui. Now, the crystal dragon had just entered the recovery magic circle and was asleep. Besides, the puppet’s heart that could control crystal men was with him… Thinking of that, Chen Rui’s heart began to heat up.

I thought Chen Rui would keep this Mystic Valley for him to use in the future…

chapters.title: Chapter 288 - The Real Beginning Of Mantis Hunting Cicadas
chapters.body:
Chapter 288 - The Real Beginning Of Mantis Hunting Cicadas

The two territories that combined were separated again. Even with [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui didn’t know what exactly happened between Sabrina and the manticore when the cold air and poisonous gas collided. Yet, judging from the fact that both territories were greatly weakened, it should be a state where both sides were injured.

Both injured… or both killed in the next step?

Even if she didn’t die, the severely injured Sabrina shouldn’t be able to rival this group of crystal men and the mad beast, Lafar… this should be the best time to kill her.

It’s just that the timing isn’t within the plan. Perhaps… the plan can launch in advance?

When Chen Rui was weighing the interest in his heart, the blue mist around Sabrina had turned into countless sharp blades and flew toward the manticore.

Chen Rui once witnessed Broc’s turning mist into “army” at the Silent Night Wetland using [Mimicry] of water magic. The Leviathan Royal Family had natural talent with water magic. Sabrina’s [The Eye of Incubus] was far less talented than Broc, but her [Water Mastery] was far better. Before his eyes, it was a territory realized through water elements – the [Blue Charm Territory]!

In contrast, the green venomous territory of the manticore was much inferior in precision and changes. However, the powerful demonic beast had no fear in the face of countless sharp blades that threatened its life. Instead, it brought out its ferocity. After a roar, the green light instantly converged into its body. It opened its huge mouth immediately after and actually ejected several basin-sized energy projectiles.

That energy projectile was dark green in color. It contained a huge destructive power within. When it collided with the blue blade, a violent chain burst suddenly occurred. Those blades shattered one after another and the nearby crystal men’s bodies actually cracked when they were hit by the splattered “broken blades”. This showed the horrifying power.

This green energy projectile that could induce a chain burst became the nemesis of the blades. In an instant, after shattering countless blue blades, they flew toward Sabrina, exploding her body into pieces. Chen Rui exclaimed, “Madam!”

That “exclaim” was undoubtedly just an act because the energy projectiles only crushed the mimical ice sculpture. In [Analytical Eyes], Sabrina’s figures had appeared above the manticore. There were actually three figures. All of which exuded the same breath and attacked the manticore simultaneously.

Strangely, [Analytical Eyes] showed that Sabrina’s actual body was rapidly changing among the three figures. He couldn’t judge the real Sabrina for a while.

The manticore didn’t have that much time to consider. Its giant scorpion tail whipped and a figure suddenly shattered. At the moment of wrong judgment, the other two had already got close. The manticore’s instinctive reaction was extremely quickly. It endured a punch while striking with its claws and eliminated another one. The figure behind stomped heavily on the manticore’s back, and an obvious dent appeared.

The manticore endured the pain and pierced with its scorpion tail. The sharp and highly poisonous needle smashed the figure again.

All the three figures and the one exploded by the energy projectiles weren’t the actual body?! Chen Rui was shocked: Impossible! [Analytical Eyes] clearly shows…

When the manticore had just exhausted its strength, the fragmented ice crystals floating in the air instantly combined into a woman’s figure and appeared above the manticore’s head, seemingly holding a weapon in her hand.

In that short moment, there was a bright cold light. Then, blood splashed while the manticore’s giant head flew up and rolled far away on the ground. Almost at the same time, the body that lost its head crashed onto the ground.

Sabrina’s figure fell to the ground, and she was panting heavily. Her clothes were covered with corrosive, poisonous wounds. Fortunately, it had been frozen. Chen Rui looked at her right hand and saw her hand was frozen into an ice blade. It was this ice blade that cut off the manticore’s head that was also a Demon Emperor.

Chen Rui finally understood that the mystery of Sabrina’s territory was far more than the countless ice blades on the surface. The actual ultimate skill was her clone in the ice crystals. It was a mysterious talent similar to the [Mimicry] of water magic, allowing her to transfer her actual body among the clones and even combine into a human form with the ice crystals. Every clone was fake or as long as she wanted, every clone could be real too. In that territory, she was basically undead unless her territory was crushed by overwhelming force.

However, judging from Sabrina’s current state, the power consumed by that cloning must be huge. Should I take the chance when she’s exhausted now… Chen Rui’s mind began to turn active again.

The blue mist around Sabrina gradually converged into her body and the ice blade on her hand had disappeared. After drinking a few bottles of potions, she felt better. Then, she heard Chen Rui’s voice, “Madam Sabrina, are you okay?”

“I’m just a little worn out.” Sabrina was indeed injured. Seeing that the surroundings seemed to be settled, she said, “Master, can you help me to the side to rest?”

Chen Rui hurried over and helped her walk to the side of a stone pier. When he touched her body, a strange fragrance came and the touching of skin made his mind ripple. However, Chen Rui’s current thoughts weren’t about the ripple, but he was actually calculating quickly.

Sabrina took two steps and stopped, “Master, your heart seems to be beating really fast.”

Chen Rui was suddenly vigilant. Although Sabrina wasn’t as insightful as Christina or Manu, her means and strength couldn’t be underestimated. He still wasn’t sure how much combat power she had left. Moreover, he had to deal with not only Sabrina but also Izola and others, so it still wasn’t the good time to launch.

“I’m sorry, madam…” Chen Rui responded very quickly, pretending to look away from the deep cleavage between her plump breasts. He looked like he was found peeping at it.

He is still thinking of that at such timing?! Sabrina was annoyed in her heart, but seeing that there were still many people nearby, she couldn’t scold him. Therefore, she just shook her head, “Master, please help me take a seat and rest for a while.”

Chen Rui looked like he just “woke up from a dream”. He quickly helped her to sit down before a stone pier, but he was reluctant to let go of her hand. Until Sabrina gave him a dissatisfied glance, he finally let go reluctantly.

At that time, most of the demonic beasts that escaped from the Mystic Valley were killed by the guards and the crystal men. The rest were captured and sent back to the lab. The chaos finally stopped.

Soon, Master Toto ran toward them with a gloomy face and handed a list to Sabrina, “Madam, our loss this time is quite heavy. The cause of the failure of the magic circle holding the demonic beasts hasn’t yet been determined.”

Sabrina glanced at the list and frowned even harder, “No need to check. I know that woman’s means well. We probably can’t find anything.”

Chen Rui sneered secretly while looking angry on the surface, “This is too much! Does she want to destroy the Mystic Valley?! Madam, from what I see…”

Before he finished his words, a collapsing sound came from afar. The upper body of the giant “Gundam” suddenly broke and fell sideways, shattering into pieces after falling to the ground. It even crushed a lab.

“My giant puppet…” Master Toto almost fainted. That puppet was the work of all his blood and sweat. He even dreamt of becoming famous by this thing in the future, but he didn’t expect such an “accident” to happen. Although the blueprint was still in his mind, it would still take at least several months to repair.

Chen Rui also looked angry. Recently, he had been spending time with Master Toto and put a lot of effort into improving this “Gundam”. Yet, it was unexpectedly destroyed by others like this.

“That fucking bitch!” Chen Rui shouted angrily and clenched his fists, “Madam, we can’t endure anymore! Even if you don’t kill her, you must at least control her!”

Resentment also flashed past Sabrina’s eyes. She didn’t expect Izola to be even more ruthless than she used to be. Today, if “Arthur” didn’t send someone to inform her on time, most people in the Mystic Valley would have died because of the demonic beasts.

Does this woman have the confidence to deal with the blame when the man returns? Or perhaps that man’s bias has reached such a level?

When she thought of Azgalor, Sabrina calmed down again, “No. We don’t have any evidence on our hands now. If we rush to put the blame on her, it’ll only make her laugh. She would even use this against us. We have to bear with it now. What about after Sir Jacob finishes recovery, I need to trouble master to request him to warn Izola. I believe that woman won’t dare to do anything again.”

Chen Rui still looked unwilling, but he certainly wouldn’t involve Jacob. Besides, this matter mustn’t wait until Jacob wakes up!

However, Sabrina’s attitude was as he expected. As the saying went, “watch the fire burning across the river”. This was just a little spark of a prelude.

It was almost dusk when Chen Rui sent Sabrina back to the blue house in the Devouring Hall. Fatilu greeted him. After seeing her mother’s injuries and fatigue and asking for the reason, she was furious. She threatened to find Izola for revenge. Yet, she was stopped by Sabrina.

Chen Rui also helped to persuade a few words before he left the blue house. Upon returning to the Nightmare Valley, Chen Rui had a full meal, then he went to bed early to rest as the next day would be the most critical moment. He needed to take a good rest. However, tonight was destined to be someone’s sleepless night.

Early the next morning, Chen Rui went to Mystic Valley to arrange for the repair. At that time, Phil hurried to report that Madam Sabrina sent someone to report an urgent matter. She asked Chen Rui to hurry to the Devouring Hall.

Chen Rui nodded. To prevent any “accidents”, Chen Rui used the puppet’s heart to arrange the crystal men to guard several important places and strictly forbid anyone to approach before he left.

In the middle of the “basin” in front of the Devouring Hall’s houses, two groups of people were confronting each other.

One side was Sabrina and the other side was Izola. Behind Izola, there was a phsically strong man who was holding an exhausting-looking girl. That girl was Sabrina’s daughter, Fatilu.

Fatilu’s clothes on her upper body were stained red with blood. Besides, her bloody left arm was empty below her elbows. Her arm was cut off!

Chen Rui looked extremely shocked. However, he tried his best to control his nervousness and excitement, making him unprecedentedly calm because the main show of manis hunting cicadas was finally starting, and he was the director.

Turns out it was Izola that caused the chaos in the Mystic Valley. No wonder Chen Rui hesitated a lot.

chapters.title: Chapter 289 - Assassination And Explosion
chapters.body:
Chapter 289 - Assassination And Explosion

“Madam Sabrina, what happened?” Chen Rui asked in surprise, “Why is Ms. Fatilu…”

“Master, you came at the right time.” Sabrina suppressed her anger, “I just sent someone to invite Sir Jacob, but he’s now in the magic circle and mustn’t be disturbed by anyone. Master, you’re Sir Manu’s aide and Sir Jacob’s most valued person. Now, I hope master can help us make a judgement.”

“Him making a judgement?” Izola sneered, “Who doesn’t know his relationship with you in the entire Crystal Valley? He was originally a person from the Nightmare Valley, but he participated in the challenge of Mystic Valley on your behalf and eventually became the commander. In my opinion, the actual relationship between the both of you might even be shameful. Now, you want to let your pursuer make a judgment? That’s funny!”

“Shut up!” Sabrina’s eyes were covered with cold light, “Master and I are just friends! If you dare to say those nonsense again, I’ll tear your mouth now!”

“Exactly! Madam Sabrina and I are innocent!” Chen Rui also said indignantly. However, when he said that, it kind of made it worse. It was like a pair of naked couple raided by police and said, “We’re just chatting.”

“You want to kill me? You’ve already done it, why are you still afraid to talk about it?” Izola smiled disdainfully, “Now isn’t the time to talk about you and that man but your daughter…”

“I don’t care what she did! Even if Fatilu made a huge mistake, I’ll be teaching her. In the worst case, she’ll be punished by her father, not you!” Sabrina’s voice became chilly, “You! Why did you cut off her arm?!”

The Demon Realm’s rule was that the stronger one was, the harder it was to have children, especially when both sides were powerhouses. The matrimony between Sabrina and Azgalor was mainly for interest, so it was reasonable that she wasn’t favored. However, this daughter was the biggest surprise. Unfortunately, she wasn’t a Beelzebub Royal Family, but it was still good enough as a Leviathan Royal Family. Uncle Manu now controlled the Leviathan Royal Family. If there was a chance, her daughter might even become the master of the Leviathan Royal Family in the future.

Sabrina took a lot of effort to have that daughter, so she was spoiling and pampering her usually. Unexpectedly, her arm was actually cut off by Izola today! If it couldn’t be recovered, it’d greatly affect her future combat power and potential. How could she not be angry?!

“Your daughter actually assassinated me last night! I wonder who instructed her!” Izola confronted without fear, “As for her arm… she accidentally broke it herself!”

Sabrina laughed loudly with endless anger in her voice, “Broke it herself? If it’s you, do you believe it?”

Izola sneered, “Whatever. Let alone she broke it herself, so what if I actually cut it off?! She came to kill me. Am I supposed to stand still and let her do it? You want to find an excuse to blame me, but you actually used your daughter as a bait!”

“Nonsense! Why would I use my daughter as bait?” Sabrina stopped laughing. A hint of murderous intentions faintly revealed from her eyes, “If it wasn’t for the chaos you made at the Mystic Valley yesterday injured me, why would Fatilu go to you to avenge me?”

Sabrina knew her daughter’s impulsive character. Yesterday, when Fatilu saw her being injured, she indeed said she’d go to Izola for revenge indignantly. At that time, Sabrina managed to hold her back. Unexpectedly, she still went there at night. However, no matter how impulsive or ignorant Fatilu was, it was for her and for the blue house.

“The Mystic Valley is under your control now. Having trouble is because you’re incapable. What makes you think you can blame others for that?” Speaking of that, Izola felt relieved and was secretly complacent. The troubles that she arranged initially were all suppressed by Sabrina. Unexpectedly, such a big surprise occurred yesterday. I don’t even know which spy did it. I must reward him or her handsomely later.

Although she expected Izola would ridicule, Sabrina was still inevitably angry. Then, she heard Master “Arthur” said, “Madam Izola, we can stop calling into account what you did at the Mystic Valley now, but you must first free Ms Fatilu!”

“Calling into account what I did? Even if you’re from the Nightmare Valley and perhaps carrying the title of commander, you’re not qualified to hoot in front of me! Don’t think that this woman is any good. Sooner or later, you’ll be swallowed whole by her with no bones left!”

“Izola, I’ll give you ten seconds to let Fatilu go.” Temperature dropped suddenly and Sabrina’s strength had risen to a horrifying level. It looked like it was about to launch upon trigger.

Although Izola was assassinated, Fatilu’s strength naturally couldn’t hurt her. She just wanted to use this to suppress Sabrina’s arrogance after winning control over the Mystic Valley. Besides, Fatilu’s arm was indeed broken “by herself accidentally”.

“Attack if you want to, stop talking those nonsense! However, I haven’t gotten low enough to have a hostage! Dotun! Let go of her!” The man named Dotun pushed Fatilu, and she staggered toward Sabrina lightly.

Although her tone was tough, she still gave in. After all, there was no need to fight with her life for such a matter.

Sabrina’s chillness withdrew slightly. She caught her daughter, “Fatilu, how are you feeling?”

Fatilu’s eyes were red while her tears were rolling. She stared at Sabrina speechlessly. She seemed to have her ability to move and speak sealed. Sabrina frowned. A hint of power was radiating from her hand. She removed the seal on Fatilu’s body, then Fatilu immediately cried loudly and said, “My arm was cut by this bitch!”

When Izola heard the word “bitch”, her eyes flashed with killing intention, but she sneered without saying anything. This girl obviously blew up by the item she made, but she still put the blame on me. However, since the matter has reached this point, any explanation will only make the contradiction worse.

“Rest assured. Mommy will restore your arm!” Sabrina comforted Fatilu while her hatred toward Izola grew even stronger in her heart. I can’t let this go definitely, but I have to find a way to heal Faitlu first.

Fatilu suddenly grabbed Sabrina, “Mom, I heard this bitch spoke to her subordinate that she wants to destroy the entire Mystic Valley!”

As soon as that was said, Sabrina and Izola changed their expressions at the same time.

Sabrina didn’t expect Izola to be so bold. The reason for Izola’s change of expression was that she never said anything like that.

Chen Rui aside was even more shocked, “Ms Fatilu, that cannot be joked about! There are very important things in the Mystic Valley!”

Fatilu said with her teeth clenched, “This is what I heard when I was in a coma. It must be right!”

Izola was taken aback. She faintly felt that she had fallen into a big conspiracy. Fatilu’s assassination and framing are most likely part of Sabrina’s plan! Could it be…

“Fatilu! Say it clearly!” Sabrina noticed that Fatilu wasn’t just being unruly. An ominous feeling arose in her heart.

Chen Rui also looked uneasy, “Both madams, I’m going to take a look at the Mystic Valley! I’ll take a leave first!”

The moment he reached the entrance of Devouring Hall, he heard a loud rumbling noise which came from the direction of Mystic Valley. The entire ground was shaking, then it was followed by a continuous loud noise as if something terrifying had exploded. The entire Crystal Valley was alarmed by that explosion. All of them looked in the direction of Mystic Valley.

There was only one exception, the Crystal Lair, where Chen Rui had encouraged the crystal dragon to set up inscriptions to prevent disturbance. Regardless of tremor or noise, they were all isolated. Besides, the way toward the recovery magic circle was filled with defensive inscriptions so outsiders had absolutely no way to enter. Quoting someone, “Nothing can affect Sir Jacob’s most important recovery.”

“That’s bad!” Chen Rui exclaimed and rushed toward Mystic Valley at his “fastest” speed. Several figures were faster than him. Those at the front most were Izola and Sabrina who was carrying her daughter.

The horrifying explosions from the Mystic Valley came continuously. When Chen Rui arrived, he only saw Sabrina, Izola and other people standing with an ugly expression at the entrance. There were people constantly escaping from inside. The people near the blast wave of the explosion were all staggering.

The explosion sound finally stopped gradually. Chen Rui grabbed a familiar-looking guy and shouted angrily, “Tony! What the hell happened?”

Tony spoke with a sour face, “Commander! An unknown explosion occurred at the magic cannon’s test site just now and the defensive magic circle all failed instantly. That power was too terrifying. It spread to other labs. Soon after, the rest of the labs also began to explode. Now, the entire Mystic Valley is destroyed!”

The energy from the magic cannon was extremely huge, and it was the most dangerous experiment. Thus, its defensive magic circle was also the most powerful. After each test, the defensive magic circle must be checked and repaired. Yet, all of them failed this time!

“How could this be? My research is still in there…” Chen Rui let go of Tony and looked like he lost his soul. He then asked aloud, “Where’s Master Toto?”

“The mad beast seems to be protecting the master craftsman at the corner. I don’t know…” At that time, Lafar’s huge body stumbled out of the valley’s entrance. Chen Rui rushed up quickly, only to see Lafar carrying a dark goblin on his shoulder. The person was Master Toto. However, anyone could tell that it was just a dead body.

“Master Toto!” Chen Rui exclaimed. The mad beast looked scared. He bowed his head and dared not look at Chen Rui.

As the director of this act, Chen Rui was also sighing in his heart. In fact, he was hesitating for a long time about the ending for Master Toto. The dark goblin was the master craftsman of Mystic Valley. He was very talented, and he was involved in many research. He was also fanatic over fame and his innovation for war. It would be bad if he fell into the hands of the Crystal Valley forces or Catherine. Therefore, Chen Rui finally decided to give a death-by-accident ending.

As for the Mystic Valley’s research and data, they had been mastered by Chen Rui using [Deep Analysis] and his memory. When necessary, some of them could be used appropriately.

“Who is responsible for the magic circle of the magic cannon?! Didn’t we just strengthen the defense? How could this problem occur?!” Chen Rui yelled hysterically. He was obviously calling blames.

“Master, you don’t have to investigate.” It was Sabrina who said that with a chill that could penetrate one’s spine, “Leave with Fatilu first!”

Izola looked vigilant. Her strength suddenly increased because Sabrina’s intense killing intention had locked onto her tightly. This was by no means the usual bluff!

No!!! The ‘Gundam’!

chapters.title: Chapter 290 - The Emergence Of Cardinal
chapters.body:
Chapter 290 - The Emergence Of Cardinal

Chapter 290: The Emergence of Cardinal

Sabrina looked at Izola like she was facing a dangerous enemy and said with a creepy tone, “Are you going to give up resisting or do you want me to make you give up?”

“Sabrina! What an evil plan!” Izola clenched her teeth and shouted, “I never thought you would sacrifice your daughter and the entire Mystic Valley to deal with me!”

At that point, Izola finally “understood” that she had always underestimated her opponent’s sinister and vicious means!

Sabrina’s face was even gloomier. Since it had reached this point, it could no longer be explained and discussed. She must take down her opponent first!

After Izola knew the “truth”, she obviously refused to admit defeat. If I really fall into her hands, even if I eventually meet Azgalor, I’ll probably only have half my life left. She might even use some means to make me admit that I did all those things. Therefore, I cannot let Sabrina succeed!

“Mom, be sure to avenge me!” Fatilu screamed exasperatedly to worsen the situation.

“Fatilu, leave with master first!” Sabrina’s body was covered with blue mist, blocking the space between Izola and herself, lest Izola holds Fatilu or Chen Rui as hostage.

“Understood. Madam, please rest assured. I’ll definitely protect Ms. Fatilu. Lafar!”

Chen Rui righteously ordered the mad beast to protect the both of them. Then, he used the puppet’s heart to command the crystal men to attack Izola and others before he left quickly.

Izola regretted the previous decision of letting Fatilu go. She indeed had the thought of holding Fatilu as hostage, but Sabrina saw it through unfortunately. However, even though Sabrina’s strength was better than hers, judging from the information provided by Fatilu’s assassination and the spies at the Blue House, Sabrina was badly injured. She used up a lot of strength from the battle with a Demon Emperor level demonic beast. Therefore, Izola should be able to last until the crystal dragon, Jacob, wakes up.

I believe with such a huge incident, Jacob wouldn’t sit still. Besides, Azgalor is already secretly returning to the Crystal Valley. Sabrina doesn’t even know this piece of information. As long as I can hold up until he returns, the truth will definitely be revealed. This insidious woman will finally be crushed entirely!

Chen Rui led Fatilu all the way out of the Mystic Valley and quickly came to the Nightmare Valley. Then, he saw Freya standing at the door worriedly. The noises from the Mystic Valley scared her just now, and she was worried about Chen Rui’s safety. Then, she saw Chen Rui running over with Fatilu and a scary monster.

Fatilu had tortured Freya many times, so Freya bowed at her with fear. Chen Rui couldn’t care so much and said, “Freya, immediately follow Fatilu to leave the Crystal Valley and wait for me at the Bloody Vine City. If you want to see Kia and remove the [Soul Shackles] on both of you, do as I said and don’t ask why!”

His last sentence made Freya’s eyes lit up. She nodded.

As the mad beast was too conspicuous, Chen Rui didn’t let it leave with the two women. He entered the lab for a while and then came out. He made Lafar guard the entrance of the hillside where the lab was located, prohibiting anyone from entering while he walked out of the Nightmare Valley.

At that time, the battle between Sabrina and Izola had inevitably started. Izola’s men were besieged and killed by the crystal men commanded by Chen Rui before he left. She was furious seeing that. However, the most important thing now was to deal with Sabrina, her strongest enemy.

Izola was a Mammon Royal Family. The muscular man next to her was her strongest subordinate, Dotun, a Samuel Royal Family. Both of them were at the peak of Great Demon King. In terms of strength, they had both reached Demon Emperor, but they hadn’t realized the power of territory.

Sabrina’s injuries hadn’t healed, so she couldn’t defeat them at once.

The battle between the three was very fierce. There were traces of terror and destruction along the way, and many innocent people were involved and killed. It was chaotic everywhere. No one dared to come close. Those remaining buildings in the Mystic Valley that survived from the explosion were also destroyed.

Sabrina wanted to kill Dotun and capture Izola, but Izola saw through her plan, so Dotun and her were doing a hit-and-run tactic. Sabrina definitely wouldn’t let that happen. Therefore, she couldn’t bother her injuries and fully activated her territory. She divided into four figures and surrounded the two in a large area of blue mist. The blue mist spread and lowered the temperature at the Mystic Valley to an extremely low level.

Sabrina’s [Blue Charm territory] was based on her [Water Mastery] talent. Dotun was a Samuel Royal Family, and he had [Fire Mastery]. The two elements were mutually restraining. Although Dotun’s strength wasn’t as good as Sabrina, his fire element still weakened the water element significantly.

Certainly, Dotun was more restrained under this water type territory. The damage he suffered was doubled.

Fortunately, Izola’s [Dark Mastery] talent of the Mammon Royal Family played a great role. There was a high-grade magic called [Nightmare Enchantment] in black magic, which could form a protective and lethal area. As a mage, Izola was naturally good at it. Although it couldn’t be compared to territory, it could still relieve Dotun’s pressure to a certain extent.

However, even when the both of them cooperated with their contradicting elements, they were still firmly suppressed by the wounded Sabrina as they gradually lost the ability to resist Sabrina. This was the power of territory. Even if their strength was about the same, the presence of territory made a huge difference.

Dotun knew that Sabrina was still holding back on Izola, but he definitely spared no mercy to kill him. Seeing Izola’s range of [Nightmare Enchantment] was getting increasingly smaller and weaker, it could no longer resist the countless blades in the blue mist. Therefore, he made up his mind and made an all-out decision.

At the moment when the [Nightmare Enchantment] was about to collapse, the magic that Dotun had been preparing launched. Several huge fire pillars that filled with intense heat appeared around him, and the icy power of the Blue Mist Territory was immediately weakened a lot. Yet, fire pillars soon began to shrink and extinguish. Dotun never expected the fire pillars to break the territory. He made use of the firelight to determine Sabrina’s location. He shouted loudly and spat blood to activate his talent – [Bloodfury]. His attack power increased tremendously. Then, he leapt and charged toward Sabrina. Izola was shocked when she saw him attacking. She immediately pointed with her fingers and several spears covered with black smoke shot toward Sabrina from all directions to cover Dotun.

Sabrina waved her hands, then the thousands of blades in the [Blue Charm Territory]suddenly turned into countless shields to cancel off the power of spears. At that time, Dotun had approached Sabrina and punched toward Sabrina with his fist covered in flame. Sabrina punched to defend, but she actually took two steps backward. Her face was hit, and the blue mist around her was mostly evaporated by that punch.

Sabrina frowned. The purity of that flame was amazing. It definitely wasn’t merely fire magic or his [Bloodfury] talent but the power from burning his life. It seems that this guy can tell that I’m determined to kill him, so he wants to fight desperately.

Dotun wanted to risk his life, but Sabrina surely wouldn’t do the same. So, she was just doing hit-and-run to consume his vitality. As Sabrina and Dotun were in close combat, Izola was unable to perform magic to assist at once. However, she knew that the [Blue Charm Territory] was closely related to Sabrina herself. Therefore, she immediately cast dark magic with all her strength to constantly weaken the territory’s water element power.

Sabrina felt Izola’s movement, then she frowned. If it was a real territory, it was connected with the natural forces in the surrounding. Then, Izola’s move would be in vain. Yet, Sabrina was currently casting the Demon Emperor’s pseudo-territory that mainly relied on her own water element power. Thus, there was still considerable impact. She immediately had the thought of ending the battle quickly.

Dotun took advantage of Sabrina’s distraction and hit her abdomen hard with his fist covered in flame. However, the result was unexpected. Sabrina’s body shattered. At the same time, Dotun felt a chill on his chest. Suddenly, a cold, translucent blade had pierced through him. After turning back, it turned out that Sabrina’s figure had already appeared on his back. What was broken just now was just an ice sculpture.

Dotun responded very quickly and held the blade on his chest. As he shouted, the blood from his hand started burning and the ice blade was actually torn half. He immediately turned around and stabbed the broken blade into Sabrina’s towering breasts. Unfortunately, it was still an ice sculpture that shattered again.

Dotun’s full blow actually missed. Feeling that his vitality was disappearing quickly, he spat his last mouthful of blood and activated [Bloodfury] again. His body quickly swelled and then burst. That was a mutual destruction move that Dotun developed based on his talent – [Blood Explosion]!

The burst flesh was covered in flames, splashing within the blue territory. Sabrina’s painful cries could even be heard. She didn’t expect Dotun to have such a self-destructing move, and the damage was extremely shocking. As she didn’t have time to defend, her real body hidden in the territory was severely damaged. The frightened Izola drew with her fingers quickly with blood. Then, a huge blood-red scythe appeared out of thin air and flew toward the source of the cry. When the scythe was close to the source, it suddenly turned into countless sharp qi that enveloped a figure. That horrifying power seemed to be even slicing the space. That was somewhat like Chen Rui’s AoE [Destructive Aura Blow]. Although the area wasn’t as big, it was more lethal.

The strongest single-target dark magic attack – [Dark Blood Scythe]!

That cry sounded even more pitiful. However, almost at the same time, a ghostly figure appeared behind Izola. Before she could react, a heavy blow had already hit her neck. Izola was a mage, so close combat was her weakness. She immediately fainted to the ground.

The blue mist gradually dissipated, revealing Sabrina’s figure. Her white dress was almost entirely stained by her blood. There were countless wounds on her body. Izola’s [Dark Blood Scythe] was still fine, but Dotun’s desperate [Blood Explosion] was a big deal that made her suffer a lot. Together with injuries from the fight with the manticore yesterday, she only had less than half of her strength left now. Certainly, if she wasn’t holding back on Izola and wanted to capture Izola alive, she could kill both of them directly without much effort.

Although she paid a heavy price, she still won eventually. Sabrina, who lost her veil in the battle, smiled proudly. This time, Sabrina had full confidence to completely step Izola under her foot and made Izola never be able to fight with her again.

At that moment, Fatilu staggered over from afar, “Mom!”

Sabrina was taken aback. Didn’t she leave under the protection of Arthur and the mad beast?

“The master is dead!” Fatilu’s first sentence shocked Sabrina. “Master Arthur” is greatly valued by both the crystal dragon and Manu. Especially the crystal dragon, who has publicly expressed his protection over “Arthur” more than once. If he is dead due to the fight between Izola and I, the consequences are unimaginable!

At that moment, Sabrina suddenly had a sense of crisis in her heart. That sense of crisis was trained from countless battles. It had saved her life more than once. Without any hesitation, Sabrina leapt and flashed backward. However, she was still a little slow as a blood wound appeared on her abdomen. It didn’t feel very painful at that time, but a lot of blood flowed out. It seemed the wound was very deep.

Sabrina didn’t look at the wound. White gas came out of her body and her blood was stopped by the freezing power of the water element in time. Her eyes were set on Fatilu’s only right palm which was glowing faintly.

Although Fatilu’s strength was only displayed as the peak of Demon King, Sabrina didn’t dare to underestimate that palm. If she hadn’t responded in time just now, she would have been cut into two by that sharp power!

“You’re not Fatilu. Who are you?!”

Fatilu’s face and figure were distorted bizarrely, turning into a stranger with intact hands. He was wearing leather armor and had black hair and eyes, yellow-skinned. He wasn’t very tall, but his blade-like eyes made it easy for others to ignore his ordinary features.

Black hair and black eyes? Lust Royal Family? Sabrina was secretly surprised. When did such a person get into the Crystal Valley? No! He also transformed into Fatilu’s look. He even purposely showed the characteristic of a broken arm. Could it be…

Her opponent didn’t give her time to think. He leapt and rushed toward her. His palm was like a blade, striking from a distance. Although the blade was still far away, the sharp qi was even stronger than striking directly.

Sabrina almost suffered a huge damage previously, so she didn’t dare to be careless. An ice shield appeared instantly, blocking the qi in mid-air. She shouted and punched from a distance as well. That man didn’t dare to defend directly and avoided. The punch that missed immediately froze the ground.

Sabrina saw the crack on the ice shield and secretly thought: This opponent’s strength is definitely not the Demon King-level on the surface, but he hasn’t reached the level of Demon Emperor as well. He should be at the level of Great Demon King. Yet, that palm blade “talent” is truly amazing. Even a Demon Emperor like me can’t take it directly.

However, having said that, a Great Demon King actually dares to sneak attack a Demon Emperor like me?! Also, he even dares to attack again after failing!

Sabrina’s eyes were full of killing intention. Suddenly, she felt a dangerous breath coming from her opponent. There was a disturbing heat in the air. “Whoosh!” A black flame ignited on the man.

“Power of Nirvana?” Sabrina was well-informed after lurking in the Dark Shadow Empire for many years. She immediately felt the attribute of that flame.

This enemy is indeed an Asmodeus Royal Family!

If Chen Rui wasn’t confident in defeating Sabrina, he wouldn’t show up at all…

chapters.title: Chapter 291 - [Blue Charm Territory] Vs [Dark Star Territory]
chapters.body:
Chapter 291 - [Blue Charm Territory] Vs [Dark Star Territory]

Sabrina was sure that the black flame was a kind of mutated talent on [Nirvana] from the Asmodeus Royal Family. However, why does someone with only Great Demon King’s strength possess such intense intimidation that can even frighten a Demon Emperor like me? What kind of “talent” is that?

The answer was soon to be revealed. There was a little more red light in the flames. The surrounding air became more manic and violent. The ground shook slightly. Numerous web-like cracks continued to spread around the man. A red, giant creature formed by terrifying force emerged from the opponent’s hand. That intense terror made Sabrina feel intimidated. However, that horrifying creature didn’t charge toward her. After rising to the sky, it went straight back to her enemy and engulfed him instantly.

That man was obviously Chen Rui. He knew that he was only a Great Demon King level under normal conditions, and he couldn’t rival Sabrina. Therefore, he didn’t drag the time and immediately used his strongest skill: [Scorching Dragon Possession].

The impact of the Scorching Dragon made a huge hole in the ground. The quakes and cracks were getting more intense. The red force was twisting frantically while countless gravels seemed to have freed from gravity and slowly floated upward under the strong pressure.

The tremor gradually subsided and a blood-red figure flashed out of the dust like lightning, rushing toward Sabrina. He reached to her front in the blink of an eye. Sabrina punched again. This time, Chen Rui didn’t evade. Instead, he took advantage of his momentum and returned with a punch.

At the moment when the two punches collided, both of them were shaken. Sabrina moved four to five steps backward while her arm was shivering slightly as if it was electrocuted. Chen Rui also took three steps back, and a layer of ice had formed on his fist.

Chen Rui mustered his strength, and the solid ice shattered. The confrontation of such strength surprised Sabrina. He was only at Great Demon King, but the strength of that blow actually surpassed her!

Actually, Sabrina overestimated Chen Rui. Even after using [Scorching Dragon Possession], Chen Rui’s strength was only infinitely close to a Demon Emperor. However, there was a factor that couldn’t be ignored, which was his equipment.

Although Chen Rui’s current equipment wasn’t as dazzling as when he challenged Norris at the Mystic Valley, his stats were even higher. He was no longer that rookie. He knew that equipment didn’t have to be dazzling or having skyrocketed high single-attribute. Instead, it had to be suitable for his state. For instance, an artifact that increased magic power by 100 times would be useless for a power-type individual.

His current equipment was the most suitable for him at the moment. Most of them came from Paglio’s treasures except the belt was made by himself. It didn’t have outstanding attributes, and it was only at an excellent grade. Yet, it could maximize the effect and coordinate the role of several other pieces of equipment.

The treasure that played a major role just now was “Thunderous Sound”. That treasure wasn’t limited by the other equipment and can directly improve the overall quality. The punch that hit Sabrina not only manifested double-damage, but it also added with lightning attribute.

After a dazzling number of back-and-forth attacks and defenses, Sabrina tested Chen Rui’s “true” strength. It was slightly inferior to her current state. However, coupled with that powerful skill and thunder “talent”, he definitely could rival her.

She had rich experience. Therefore, she noticed that her opponent used a certain talent or secret technique to reach the strength of the Demon Emperor. However, the greatest difference between Demon Emperor and Great Demon King wasn’t just strength but the power of territory. Although she suffered some damage from Dotun’s self-explosion out of carelessness, she still won safely. If she didn’t have to care about Izola, those two quasi-Demon Emperor enemies, that were infinitely close to Demon Emperor in strength but a lack of territory’s power, would be easily killed by her.

Now, her opponent’s strength had reached Demon Emperor-level. In contrast, she was severely injured and unable to exert her greatest strength. Thus, fighting directly was too risky. She must use the power of territory to directly suppress her opponent.

Sabrina took advantage of Chen Rui’s strength to leap into the air. She actually suspended in the air. A large amount of blue mist surged out. It was Chen Rui’s third time seeing her territory. However, observing from the side was different from experiencing it. That misty territory was equivalent to a tiny world which was much larger than the actual space outside. Chen Rui tried several times, but he still couldn’t escape from the territory.

The effect of the blue mist wasn’t as simple as it seemed. Chen Rui felt a bone-penetrating coldness coming from all directions. Not only did he need to spare some strength to resist that terrifying chill, but his movement was also slowed down a lot. Originally, with the help of Stridebug, Thunderous Sound and other equipment, his speed was higher than Sabrina. However, he was greatly limited now. Not only that, this environment could maximize Sabrina’s [Water Mastery]. No wonder Sabrina was so handy at switching among her clones and mimicry attacks.

Sabrina’s injuries weren’t minor, so she wanted to end the battle quickly. She immediately did the same thing by turning into multiple figures and charged toward Chen Rui simultaneously. Chen Rui reacted with his surfy sea punch. As he punched, waves of surging power were released, and it often contained double-damage and lightning. Therefore, Sabrina’s clones that approached were repelled or destroyed.

What shocked Sabrina was that no matter which clone she switched to, her opponent could always react immediately. Although her enemy was damaged a few times, he had extremely high quality armor on his body and quick reaction. Therefore, she still couldn’t cause any critical damage.

Such a tactic was actually Sabrina’s strongest move. It could integrate her actual body into the [Blue Charm Territory] and used her clones to switch locations, making her movements unpredictable. Unless it was a secret technique like Dotun’s self explosion, she was almost immortal as long as she still had strength. Unexpectedly, her opponent easily saw through her tactic!

Chen Rui was obviously using [Analytical Eyes]. Sabrina switched among the clones really quickly, and he couldn’t catch up with his naked eyes sometimes. He depended on [Analytical Eyes] to cooperate with his muscle reflex to deal with it, so getting injured was inevitable. However, the legendary grade armor was really something. Coupled with his appropriate response, the injuries caused weren’t that serious.

However, that could only defend against Sabrina’s attack. He couldn’t cause any substantial damages. Most importantly, [Scorching Dragon Possession] had a time limit. The offense and defense between them were happening really quickly. Although only five minutes had passed, the remaining time was still very precious, so he definitely couldn’t take too long.

Sabrina attacked while thinking about how to eliminate this difficult enemy. Suddenly, a large number of vines came out of the ground. These vines carried a strange devouring force, and they reproduced and grew extremely fast. They actually absorbed a significant amount of blue mist. Sabrina didn’t expect her opponent to possess such odd skill. She immediately cast a few clones, and many vines were frozen and shattered.

Originally, Chen Rui just wanted to use the gluttonous vine to attract her attention. Unexpectedly, gluttonous vine with entangle, spreading, and devouring properties actually had such a magical effect. Although it was impossible to truly destroy the [Blue Charm Territory], it was enough for him to free his hand to cast a skill that he rarely used – [God Eating]!

[God Eating] was a skill obtained after successfully analyzing the God-Eating Mask. He had to wear the mask to cast it. Actually, there were three skills. The first one was to gain immunity toward all control on his soul. If he wore this mask back then, even Manu wouldn’t be able to cast [Soul Shackles], but he couldn’t expose the artifact in front of Manu. However, Chen Rui remembered afterward that he should be able to isolate the control of [Soul Shackles] if he wore the mask. Yet, in that way, he could only use his identity as “Aguile”.

The second skill was to devour all spirit, magic power and soul attacks, but it could only be used once every seven days. The last skill was [Demonic Flies Transformation], gaining immunity toward one physical attack. Itcould only be used once a day.

Although Sabrina was destroying the vines, she had been paying attention to Chen Rui’s movements. Suddenly, she saw a strange mask appearing on his face. Immediately after, the water elemental power and her spirit went out of control and surged toward the mask as if they were devoured by some ancient ferocious beast. It couldn’t be stopped at all.

The “pillars” of the Blue Charm territory were the water elemental power and spirit. Once the pillars were sucked away, the remaining power naturally couldn’t support the entire territory. It immediately disintegrated.

In the blink of an eye, the blue mist became extremely thin. Sabrina’s real body had also appeared as she could no longer hide within her territory or make clones. She felt a strong fatigue and weakness which was clearly a sign of deficit caused by her territory being devoured.

She never thought that her territory would be broken by someone like that. Besides, it was by a Great Demon King without the power of territory! What kind of talent is that?! Oh right! Devour…

While Sabrian was still in shock, the surrounding had changed greatly. Now, she was in a strange space. There were countless strange spheres with varied texture in the surroundings. However, the color on the surface was like a dark gemstone shining a deep light. These spheres rotated and moved in a strange rhythm from near and far. When they were further, they actually looked like… bright stars?

Are all these “balls” stars?

Sabrina felt that her initial exhausting strength was further weakened. She couldn’t help being shocked… Territory! Could it be that I guessed it wrongly? This “Asmodeus Royal Family” is actually a Demon Emperor with the power of territory?

It can’t be! He obviously used his secret technique to barely reach the level of Demon Emperor. His actual strength is definitely only at the level of Great Demon King. How could he have the power of territory? Great Demon King has the power of territory? How is this possible?

The power of the territory is so realistic. It is definitely not an illusion. Not only does it weaken me, but it also gives a sense of confusion. Even my movement becomes slower.

Chen Ru tapped his leg and his figure quickly appeared before Sabrina. He shaped his hand like a blade and sliced toward Sabrina’s head. Although Sabrina’s territory was devoured, she still had her personal strength. Her hands were immediately wrapped by solid ice, and it formed an ice blade to parry.

“Klang!” The ice blade shattered. That invisible sword qi went directly to Sabrina’s forehead. Sabrina avoided in a panic, but there was still a splash of fresh blood coming from her forehead.

From that blow, she felt that her opponent’s strength increased again, but she knew it was the effect of the territory. Currently, she was exhausted, and she was under the negative effect of the territory. In contrast, her opponent was at his peak. Therefore, she couldn’t rival.

It was difficult for her to escape this territory with her remaining power, so it seemed she had to make a final stand.

Chen Rui used [Scorching Dragon Possession]? Did he plan to escape after killing Sabrina? Or…

chapters.title: Chapter 292 - Unexpected Danger
chapters.body:
Chapter 292 - Unexpected Danger

When Sabrina thought of that, she secretly mustered her strength. Chen Rui’s [Aura Blade] was about to run out of time. Besides, he wanted to end the battle quickly. Therefore, he started to attack quickly and forced Sabrina into a corner. The wounds on her body also constantly increased.

Sabrina couldn’t evade. Thinking to make it a lose-lose situation, she actually didn’t avoid and pierced toward his heart with the ice blade on her hand. A cold light flashed past Chen Rui’s eyes. The [Aura Balde] on his hands continued to slice toward her neck.

If that hit, it would definitely behead her.

Surely, that attack struck Sabrina’s neck without any suspense. Yet, Chen Rui frowned. Then, he saw Sabrina’s body turned into black smoke, causing him to miss. In contrast, the ice blade stabbed firmly into Chen Rui’s chest. Fortunately, the leather armor had high defense. The ice blade could barely penetrate. However, a dangerous omen gave Chen Rui no time to take care of the wound on his chest. He tapped his foot and immediately withdrew.

The black smoke quickly changed back into Sabrina’s body. Blood was flowing out from her right eye, but it was shining a creepy black light. Under the effect of some secret technique, her strength suddenly increased to the maximum. She looked like she was in her peak without any injuries. After a loud scream, a dark blue light beam with a diameter of one meter was shot from her right hand and directly hit Chen Rui who was retreating.

That blow contained a great deal of destruction power. It exhausted all her remaining strength. If she couldn’t destroy her opponent, then she could only sit still and be killed. However, with the strength at her peak state, even if her opponent was wearing legendary grade armor, Sabrina had absolute confidence to completely destroy his body and soul within the armor with this blow.

Unfortunately, Sabrina didn’t know that her enemy had more than legendary grade armor in his hands.

Sabrina’s strongest blow hit Chen Rui directly. To be precise, she hit the layer of blue shield outside Chen Rui’s body. Although the blue shield collapsed instantly, it bought some valuable time for Chen Rui. Another item had appeared in his hand.

The light beam hit on that thing. Although he was pushed back, he still managed to stabilize his body.

The light blue destruction beam gradually extinguished. Sabrina’s face was full of disbelief. Around her, the strange star territory was still shining brightly.

Sabrina, who was exhausted, felt like all her blood was drawn. She fell slowly to the ground, but her eyes were still staring at the object in the man’s hand at her opposite.
