The Dark Shadow Empire’s ruler was second only to Raizen, who was the powerhouse at the tip of the summit in Demon Realm… However, judging from her behaviour at the last moment, he was not entirely hopeless.

Even if she is Catherine, there is still hope.

It is still a matter of strength. At the very least, I must have the strength equivalent to her. Then only I can talk about other things. Before that, “I will definitely return” is just a self-consolation which cannot be put into practice.

Work hard man!

Even if Chen Rui gets greater strength, I don’t think ‘Catherine’ still wouldn’t give up on her perseverance though. 🤨

chapters.title: Chapter 298 - An Interlude Along The Way
chapters.body:
Chapter 298 - An Interlude Along The Way

Chapter 298: An Interlude along the Way

Chen Rui’s infernal affairs in Crystal Valley was considered a great success as of now. The gain was bountiful as well.

The most important thing was the Demon Shield of Leviathan Royal Family’s artifact, Illusive Demon Shield. Together with the Illusive Shield in Delia’s hands, this artifact would be considered complete with all its parts. Similarly, the importance of the ancient runes slab was not small. If one could understand the profound secrets in it, it might be the key to unlocking Paglio’s seal. At the very least, it could also be used as a bargaining chip for Zola.

During this period, he “blackmailed” a lot of precious materials from Manu, crystal dragon and Sabrina. As long as he had a couple more materials which were missing, he could make “Thunderous Sound” again. However, he could not go back to the Mechanic Association for the time being. In addition, there was also the Fountain of Resurrection of unknown use and the massive high-purity magic crystals mined by the crystal dragon for the recovery magic circle. Although it was only a small part of the crystal mine veins, the superb gold crystal and blood crystal alone were worth a heap of fortune. Unfortunately, as a dragon who liked to gather wealth, the treasure of crystal dragon did not seem to be in Crystal Valley. The cautious crystal dragon also remained silent on this. (Crystal dragon yelled with sorrow and anger, You are really too much. You killed my people, took my things and even wanted to confiscate my family possessions?)

The base of Crystal Valley should be completely destroyed already. Manu would definitely die. Azgalor and the crystal dragon were severely injured, especially the crystal dragon. He lost the recovery magic circle, so his injury recovery would be very slow. One of the three bosses had been eliminated. However, it wasn’t sure if there was a stronger guy behind.

Old institutions die hard. Although this time was a serious blow to the organization, it had not reached the point of being uprooted yet. From the information disclosed by Sabrina, Isabella of Fallen Angel Empire should also be part of this force. He would most probably meet these old “friends” in the future.

The most depressing thing for Chen Rui was Freya and Lafar, especially Freya. He thought that he could let her go away safely, but unexpected changes happened. He didn’t know how to explain it to Kia.

Chen Rui sighed. Anyway, I’ll go back to Dark Moon first. If I go to Town Leia from the capital, it would be a longer route. The southeast side of the Bloody Vine Estate is Red Spirit Estate. I’ll go this way.

The regeneration and recovery of the heart was much slower than Chen Rui imagined. He used to “perish together” with Casillas and got his heart pierced in Paglio’s treasure of the Silent Night Wetland last time. However, it was only pierced, not shattered.

Repairing and regenerating were completely two tests. Now Chen Rui had to suffer from the intermittent pain of wound pain and itching growth every day. He secretly swore, I will never do this kind of silly thing in the future… Um… Unless it’s for my woman. Um… plus a few toxic friends as well.

Chen Rui camouflaged to become a lich potioneer. It was not because he wanted to be in the limelight, but because the potioneer’s identity was respected and feared. This business attire was prepared when he was still in the Dark Moon Estate. It was for the sole purpose of concealment when escaping.

Although potioneer was not as highly valued as mechanic, the use and popularity of pharmacy was no less than that of equipment. In case of anything, his knowledge of pharmacy was enough to get away with it.

Since the three major empires still maintained peace on the surface, Chen Rui passed the border and entered the Red Spirit Estate of the Fallen Angel Empire without much difficulty.

Red Spirit Estate was one of the Fallen Angel Empire’s several biggest estates. The area was slightly smaller than the Dark Moon. The estate was crescent shaped. It was adjacent to the northeast of Dark Moon. The northern part was directly connected to the Fallen Angel capital.

After several twists and turns, Chen Rui took a carriage in Town Sam, a border town of Red Spirit Estate. He headed towards Town Moling. When he was in Mountain Xilang previously, he learned from his puppet, Snowden, that the Red Spirit Estate was mainly divided into three major parts. Red Spirit Lord, Josh, controlled the most central and most important Red Spirit city. The remaining two parts were passed to his two sons to manage. It was just like a small kingdom that was divided into a capital and two estates.

Town Moling at the northwest was managed by the youngest son, Kanita. Town Mordo at the southeast, adjacent to Dark Moon, was under Joseph’s responsibility. However, the military power near the two borders was held by Josh himself, just in case.

Lord Josh wanted to train his two sons so that they could excel. On the other hand, he must also beware of the two sons being too good. Whether in the Human Realm or Demon Realm, the power struggle between father-son and between brothers was not a new thing.

Chen Rui was going to Town Moling where Kanita was located. Snowden should be in this town. He could provide some information and convenience.

Due to the small number of carriages available in Town Sam, Chen Rui couldn’t find any empty carriage when he arrived. Due to his potioneer identity, he managed to squeeze into a relatively empty carriage. There was only 1 minotaur and 1 dark elf in the carriage. Both of them looked like tennager around 13 to 14 years old.

The carriage was bumpy on the road, and Chen Rui grimaced in pain occasionally, but his face was covered in a cloak. The potioneer’s robe made the two on the opposite look revered. They only dared to whisper to each other.

With Chen Rui’s hearing ability, he could naturally hear what the two youths said. It was none other than, “this scary potioneer will catch you as an experiment subject and feed you poison” or something like that. He could only smile bitterly. The development trend of potioneer in Demon Realm had inclined toward the “poison potioneer” category. Ironically, countless potioneer masters wanted to become a grandmaster, but none of the black potions of grandmaster level were poison. All of them were buffing potions.

The speed of the carriage was not fast. The road conditions along the way were winding and steep. It was estimated to take 5 to 6 days to reach Town Moling. On the third day, an accident finally happened – Bandits.

The term bandits should be used to describe people who snatch and steal property. But in this world, bandits were all robberies without technical content. As for theft, they were called thieves or burglars.

Chen Rui once destroyed the largest bandits gang which was sent to Dark Moon by the Red Spirit Estate. But it was his first time to be blocked and robbed by bandits since rebirth.

For Chen Rui’s current strength, it was only a dozen thieves. The highest strength was an early Higher Demon. Judging from the broken equipment and the sparse assault in intercepting the carriage, a ‘noob’ could be added in the title of thieves.

Chen Rui saw them from the carriage’s curtains which were opened due to the violent bumping. Although the carriage was almost out of control, and the people inside were all tumbling, these did not hinder Chen Rui’s observation even if he only had a few seconds.

“The people in the carriage, come out with all your belongings immediately. Otherwise, we will kill all of you!”

Demon Realm’s bandits were generally fierce. If the victims didn’t hand over the property or have no money, they would usually be killed. Sometimes survival was not guaranteed even after handing over the property. They most probably couldn’t keep the horse as well.

The coachman shuddered with fright. Although there were bandits appearing on this section, the occurrence was very low. He didn’t know why he was so bloody unlucky to encounter these guys.

The two teenagers in the carriage were also very nervous.

“Tommy, what should we do? We have no money. We will be killed by the bandits. Let’s just fight with them!”

“Don’t be impulsive, Tonk. Even with that thing, you can only kill two people at most,” Dark elf Tommy shook his head anxiously. “They have a dozen people. We definitely couldn’t match them.”

With that said, Tommy looked at the potioneer on the opposite side, “Dear potioneer sir, only sir can help us all now. I believe sir’s poison deterrence should scare off those guys.”

However, “potioneer sir” seemed to be still sleeping like he didn’t know what happen. Tonk knew that it was a critical moment, so he disregarded Tommy’s dissuasion and went over to push this scary potioneer. Unexpectedly, this potioneer sir actually fainted in response. They didn’t know whether he fainted as a result of bumping or shock.

The voice of the bandits outside sounded again, “I’ll count to ten. If you don’t come out, you will be killed for sure!”

“We’re doomed!” Tonk gritted his teeth and took something out of his backpack. “We can only fight for life.”

Tommy panted, and his thin arm took a short dagger from his waist. When he glanced at the potioneer sir’s chest, his eyes suddenly lit up, “Wait!”

Tommy pressed Tonk with one hand which was shaking slightly, “I have a way. If it doesn’t work, then we fight for life!”

Tonk looked puzzled, but he knew that Tommy had always been smarter than himself. So he nodded immediately.

The Great Demon bandit, who was the leader, with the power of Higher Demon had already counted to eight. The bandits slowly surrounded the carriage. The coachman’s vest was soaked. At this moment, a figure finally came out from the carriage. It was a young dark elf.

“Who dares to attack?” The dark elf boy glanced coldly at the surrounding bandits, revealing a predominant attitude. “The great potioneer, Mr. Rolls-Royce is in there. If you don’t want to be poisoned until you are left with dried bones, leave quickly!”

The face of Chen Rui, who was pretending to be fainted, twitched a bit, Rolls-Royce? Are you sure it’s not Ferrari or Porsche?

However, Tonk who was in the car obviously didn’t notice this detail. The minotaur’s hand was holding a thing tightly. It was actually a crossbow. This crossbow seemed to be the foldable type. When it was unfolded, it would be huge.

Potioneer? The bandits looked at each other with fear in their eyes, and the leader frowned, “Little boy, are you planning to scare us away with just one sentence?”

Tommy took out a dark silver badge, “Look at what this is?”

Someone behind the Great Demon exclaimed, “Potioneer badge!”

Potioneer’s reputation as “evil and vicious” had been deeply rooted in the people’s hearts. The emergence of this badge changed the bandits’ facial expressions. The Great Demon leader was of no exception. However, this leader had a little more insight. After looking at the badge, his eyes fell on the dark elf boy. He rolled his eyes and sneered, “Are your hands shaking? Are you afraid? Or… this badge was actually stolen!”

The dark elf boy’s heart tightened, “No! There is indeed a potioneer sir in the carriage.”

Discovering Tommy’s nervousness, the Great Demon was even determined, “Then let this sir come out. We also want to meet this awesome potioneer.”

The cold sweat on Tommy’s forehead dripped. He argued, “You can ask the driver if there is…”

Before he finished his words, the Great Demon had teleported in front of him instantaneously. He grabbed Tommy’s neck, “Little scum, how dare you lie to me! I’ll tear you into pieces!”

Tonk panicked. As he was about to rush out to rescue Tommy, Tonk saw the Great Demon’s movements halted suddenly. His body started trembling, and he couldn’t hold Tommy anymore. With a cry, he started scratching his body frantically. One after another shocking blood marks appeared, yet he still didn’t stop. Soon, he rolled up in the ground, and his body muscles gradually withered. Finally, he turned into a pile of bones under the witness of the horrified bandits.

Such a powerful poison! There is really a potioneer in the car! The bandits who witnessed their leader turned into dead bones dared not stay. They fled in all directions with all their might, for the fear that they would get caught by this silent poison.

Tommy was shocked by the dead bones too. Fortunately, he finally reacted and hurried back to the carriage. He saw Tonk holding a huge crossbow and carefully aiming at the terrifying potioneer who had woken up.

“Keep your weapon, minotaur boy,” To align with the lich face, Chen Rui said old-fashionedly, “As for you, dark elf boy, with the cleverness you just showed, you should know that you would have become dead bones already just like the bandits outside if I intend to harm you. Also… return that badge to me.”

The dark elf boy abruptly hinted to his companion to put away the crossbow, “Sir Rolls-Royce…”

“Don’t call me with that kind of dumb name!” Chen Rui frowned, “My name is Richard. Lafar.”

The dark elf and minotaur looked even more astonished. A potioneer with a surname! Can’t believe that we are in the same carriage with this sir!

The carriage continued the journey with the driver’s relieved and joyful expression. After this incident, the dark elf boy seemed to be a lot bolder. He continued to call “Sir Richard” in a friendly manner. Along the way, he said one or two pharmaceutical terms from time to time. But Chen Rui could hear that these terms were copied and inflexible. If the pharmacy knowledge of “Sir Richard” was a half barrel of water, then Tommy could barely be regarded as a drop of water.

Although Tommy’s plan was exposed in front of the bandits, Chen Rui appreciated Tommy’s wit. This dark elf kid is so diligent to be close to me now. It must be more than just for a pleasing purpose. He must have an ulterior motive.

“Can I see that crossbow?” Chen Rui ignored Tommy and said to Tonk.

Tonk suddenly showed nervousness and clenched the bag in his hand. As Tommy was about to speak, he heard Chen Rui said, “That crossbow seems to be able to shoot three arrows successively?”

Demon Realm already had crossbows since earlier times. Although the shooting speed was fast, it was too slow to reload. Hence, it was rarely armed in a real army. The army was generally equipped with archers. Demon Realm also had many stories like Demon Arch Rangers spreading around, but there had never been a Demon Crossbowman.

Chen Rui clearly saw that Tonk’s crossbow should be a triple-shot crossbow. It should be the first time he saw it in the whole Demon Realm, so he asked.

Tonk hesitated for a while, then he suddenly knelt down with a thud, “Sir, please save my brother Tieke. I am willing to give this crossbow to Sir!”

Can’t Chen Rui just copy the blueprint of a gun from the Human Realm? Isn’t that more powerful🔫 💥

chapters.title: Chapter 299 - : Information And Shock
chapters.body:
Chapter 299 - : Information And Shock

Tonk’s request made Tommy anxious. He had not figured out the potioneer’s background yet, and Tonk had handed over his trump card first.

If the other party is interested in the crossbow, he can immediately kill the two of us with that terrifying poison and snatch the crossbow. If he is not interested, what is the use of pleading?

Chen Rui was really curious about this crossbow. In his original world, there was a ten-shot Yuanrong Crossbow as early as thousands of years ago. It was said that the crossbow was later modified into a fifty-shot crossbow. Unfortunately, the craftsmanship was too complicated. Even the arrows must be custom made. There was no mass production, which led to the loss of transmission.

However, Tonk’s subsequent story aroused Chen Rui’s interest. This crossbow was made by his brother, Tieke. The brothers’ father, Old Buck, was a blacksmith in Town Sam. Old Buck wanted to let his son inherit his business. However, although Tieke was a minotaur with blacksmith talent, he liked to make gadgets like dark goblins. Buck deeply despised his son’s ignorance toward the proper business.

Something happened more than a month ago. Danzell, the little leader of the border fortress defending army, was interested in a magic sword from the Buck Family. He severely wounded Old Buck and forcibly robbed the magic sword. Old Buck later died of serious injury, but the town’s guards protected Danzell. Not only they did not pursue the matter, they declared Buck guilty instead.

Tieke could not tolerate such a shameless man who robbed treasures, killed his father, and even tarnished his father’s reputation. He vowed to take revenge. But his strength was only an Intermediate Demon, while the enemy, Danzell, was a Higher Demon. Tieke had his own way.

His solution was those “gadgets” that his father disdained and hated. A three-shot crossbow with arrows smeared with deadly toxin. It would explode after hitting the target. Finally, Danzell was killed with this crossbow.

Tieke, who avenged his father, failed to escape the pursuit of the border forces. He was taken down on the spot, and was supposed to be executed on the spot. It was rumoured that for some unknown reason, he was escorted to Town Moling. Tommy was an orphan adopted by Old Buck, and he was close to Tieke and Tonk like brothers. He was always smart and alert. When he learned that Tieke was in a trouble, he escaped the defense force’s search with Tonk.

After discovering Tieke’s whereabouts, Tommy exhausted every possible means and took Tonk to the carriage. They planned to go to Town Moling to rescue Tieke. This was originally a near hopeless thing, but the two initiated the trip without hesitation. When they met “Richard potioneer,” the hope seemed to be bigger.

Chen Rui finally understood the real reason why Tommy was being friendly, and even wanted to recommend himself as an apprentice. A potioneer with powerful poison might play a key role in this matter.

“Unfortunately, I have no interest in this crossbow… Chen Rui shook his head.

The dark elf kid had been observing the expression of this potioneer, but he found that there were no fluctuations. He seems to be an extremely cold guy. I originally wanted to build rapport with this potioneer who is a “dangerous person” so that we can get his help. Building relationships is the same as asking someone to go against his own interest, since we have no more bargaining chip that can attract him, it’s better not to waste my efforts anymore to avoid further complications.

Tonk was anxious, “Sir, as long as you are willing to save my brother’s life, I am willing to… be your experiment subject”.

“No”. It was Tommy who interrupted. Tonk actually said what Tommy was most worried about.

The potioneer showed some interest indeed, “Really?”

That kind of expression made the minotaur’s heart chilled, but he nodded despite Tommy’s objection. Of course, Chen Rui wouldn’t really want an experiment subject, but these two teenagers were quite interesting. Since Snowden was in Town Moling, the minotaur’s matter was not a trouble at all. Furthermore, Tieke who could make a triple-shot crossbow might still be worth meeting.

“How about you be my experiment subject for two years? If you can survive, I’ll let you go… A paper roll with incomprehensible text appeared in Chen Rui’s hand. “To prevent you from backing out, we’ll sign a Secret Art Soul Contract. If you violate this contract, you and your loved ones will be destroyed by the destructive power of the rule.

The two youths’ power were just Lesser Demon, so there was no way to condense a real contract. Nor had they seen the so-called “Secret Art Soul Contract” before. They revealed surprised expressions on the spot.

When Tonk gritted his teeth and was about to sign, he was stopped by Tommy, “Sir, if both of us become your experiment subjects, then it only takes a year, right?”

Tonk showed a moved expression, “Tommy, you…”

“Following this sir may not be a bad idea. At least we have enough to eat. I can’t let you enjoy this kind of benefit alone…” Tommy forced a smile.

Hence, according to Chen Rui’s “secret art”, the two teenagers bit their fingers and signed their names on the so-called Secret Art Soul Contract with their blood.

“With this contract, I’m no longer afraid that you will back out. Otherwise, I can tear up the contract in advance, then you will all die. From now on, you must listen to me. You shall not disturb me without my permission…” Chen Rui’s hand moved, and the scroll disappeared automatically. The two looked even more in awe. Then, Chen Rui threw out a few pieces of bread and barbecue, “Oh, since you are experiment subjects, you must maintain sufficient physical strength and a healthy body.”

The long-lost food aroma made Tommy and Tonk, who had not been full for a long time, temporarily forget the future fearful life. They began to gobble up.

Two days later, the three arrived at the destination, Town Moling. The scale of Town Moling surprised Chen Rui. The prosperity and atmosphere of this town were much better than Town Zhenya on the west side of Dark Moon City. Since the town was an important bargaining chip in the rivalry against his elder brother, Joseph, the hard work that Kanita put into Town Moling could be imagined.

Chen Rui found a hotel and settled down. Soon after, Tommy, who inquired about the news, reported that Snowden’s house was at the north of town. Chen Rui left Tommy and Tonk at the hotel and headed north.

Sure enough, within the effective distance of control, he could already sense the existence of the puppet. Snowden walked out of the house and led him straight into the house.

Snowden’s house was equivalent to a small villa; spacious and comfortable. There were many beautiful maids as well. No wonder he was extremely uncomfortable while staying in Mountain Xilang previously. He even returned to Town Moling for a vacation once.

“Master.” If the maids saw Snowden Sir actually obediently called a potioneer like this, they would be so shocked that their jaws would drop. But the two were currently in a secret room without a third person.

Because of Fatilu’s lessons from the past, Chen Rui looked at Snowden carefully and felt that only his eyes were a lack of soul. Snowden received puppetry for less than a year. In addition, he was originally a very cunning person, showing no emotions. One would probably not notice any flaws. No doubt, it would be a different case if it was Azgalor of Beelzebub Royal Family who was proficient in puppetry.

According to Snowden, after Mountain Xilang’s “Red Devils” failure, although Snowden showed good leadership skills by avoiding the annihilation of the whole army, and the change in the most important Town Leia previously was the mistake of the deputy leader, Barnacle. But as the head of the group, Snowden bore an inevitable responsibility for the Red Spirit’s failure to control the Dark Moon West. Snowden was ultimately “unjustly” dismissed from a series of duties.

Kanita knew that Snowden was probably a scapegoat. Plus, Snowden’s strength and capabilities were quite extraordinary, so Kanita was comforting him at that time. Kanita promised to reassign Snowden to an important position once the limelight passed. Snowden was not responsible for specific matters currently, but the upper level of Town Moling knew that he was still an important person under Kanita. Whenever there was an important meeting, he would attend.

Ever since Joseph was putting all his effort in cultivating behind closed door, he finally broke through the bottleneck to become a Demon King-level powerhouse. Lord Josh also attached greater importance to Joseph. This also led to a more intense battle between Kanita and Joseph. Kanita’s dark forces lurking in Town Mordo some time ago suddenly killed a group of Joseph’s elites. They kidnapped a female dark elf, who was escorted by the elite, and held her in a secret prison in the town.

“According to reliable sources, this dark elf woman is sought by Joseph after great difficulty. I heard that she is related to an important person in Dark Moon.”

The dark elf woman is related to an important mission of the Dark Moon?

Chen Rui seemed to think of something. Dark Moon’s important dark elf, Skye? Impossible, then it’s only… Aldas.

Royce once said that in order to recruit Master Aldas, who might be advancing to grand master level, Joseph was doing his best to obtain the whereabouts of the master’s younger sister. They had been separated since childhood. Unexpectedly, after Joseph succeeded, she was kidnapped by accident arising from many causes to Town Moling!

Aldas was an experiment lunatic. Besides showing the roaring “style” from time to time in the experiment, he was not good at expressing his feelings normally. He was sometimes dark elf-style cunning. Chen Rui was well aware of the stubbornness of this dark elf. The capital repeatedly threatened and lured him, but they could not shake his determination to repay her gratitude to Shea. Similarly, Aldas had always kept in mind Chen Rui’s help and gratitude. Every time, he spared no effort to help him in pharmaceutical aspects. Aside from the fact that Chen Rui needed a master potion as a cover-up in order to avoid revealing the grand master potion, Chen Rui basically didn’t need Aldas’ help very much as he could exchange black potions now. However, he always remembered his kind intention.

He happened to encounter this matter now. Whether for official or personal reasons, he must not let his sister fall into Joseph or Kanita’s hands as a threatening bargaining chip.

“Snowden, is it possible to rescue this female dark elf?”

“Kanita happens to be away for an important matter. My confidant, Ivan, is now one of the chiefs of the secret prison. It should not be a problem to inquire about the news, but I’m afraid that it’s impossible to bring this dark elf out directly.”

Snowden was influenced by the puppet mask, so his intelligence and decision-making could only maintain a certain inherent “mode” before being made a puppet. His adaptive skill was not very agile.

But Chen Rui was beaming. Who says it’s not possible. It’s easy when we have an insider!

“Master should be careful of the prison warden, Samuel. He is a new Great Demon King level powerhouse recruited by Kanita.”

Great Demon King? Chen Rui shook his head nonchalantly. He killed Sabrina while she was extremely weak, and he also used the power of two artifacts. In particular, the last fatal blow almost made him fail on the verge of success. With his current strength, plus [Scorching Dragon Possession] and [Dark Star Territory], it was still not enough to deal with a Demon Emperor at normal state. However, a Great Demon King level should not be a problem.

Of course, the precondition was that his injury was fully healed.

At this moment, Snowden’s words shocked Chen Rui, “There is a secret. This Samuel is human.”

chapters.title: Chapter 300 - Samuel! The First Human Encounter In Demon Realm
chapters.body:
Chapter 300 - Samuel! The First Human Encounter In Demon Realm

Chen Rui first learned of the existence of humans in Demon Realm from Glorfin. The human population was very small here. Most of them were powerhouses who wanted to break through some kind of bottleneck. Therefore, they used secret methods to come to the Demon Realm for training.

Although the demons were defeated in the battle five hundred years ago, it was impossible for even the human world to deny the power of demons. Compared to the human world, Demon Realm’s powerhouses were more powerful. The environment was more dangerous, and it was more suitable for life and death breakthroughs. However, humans were the enemy of demons after all. A considerable amount of humans who were training in Demon Realm did not go back alive. But since they had the determination to come to Demon Realm, they must have disregarded their life and death.

There were also a handful of humans who chose to temporarily submit to demons at a price in order to train their strength more safely.

Isabella once said that there was a human powerhouse named Nero in the Fallen Angel Capital. He had a close relationship with Prince Obsidian. The most important thing was Nero had also mastered the method of returning to the human world.

Unexpectedly, there is such a human in Town Moling too!

In addition, Kanita’s motive also aroused Chen Rui’s interest. Kanita made a huge commotion during this trip just to catch a demonic beast.

An Incubus Beast.

The Incubus Beast was a powerful horse demonic beast. It was once believed to be evolved from the fallen holy unicorn of the human world. Its whole body was black, and the horse mane and tail were like the color of flame. Not only it ran speedily, it could float in the air and be immune to all mind control as well. Individuals with mutated bloodlines could also manipulate the lightning that could only be unleashed by the unicorns. The most powerful talent was [Terror], which could weaken the fighting power and fighting spirit of the other party. It was regarded as the most powerful ground mount in the Demon Realm.

Incubus Beasts were solitary demonic beasts and were extremely rare. They could evolve up to Demon Emperor level. This Incubus Beast was said to be a foal, appearing in Thunder Valley which was at the east of Town Moling. Kanita intended to catch the Incubus Beast as a birthday gift dedicated to his father, Josh.

Chen Rui was very curious about the Incubus Beast. But for now, Aldas’ sister must be rescued first.

The secret prison was the place where Kanita secretly detained important people. Even most of the people in this force did not know the specific place. Fortunately, Ivan was one of the little bosses who happened to be Kanita’s aide. Thus, Chen Rui obtained detailed information of the secret prison in a breeze.

The secret prison was located under a remote warehouse at the south of Town Moling. There were not many prisoners in it currently. Coincidentally, the minotaur Tieke, the person that the two teenagers wanted to find, was held there too. Tieke was inadvertently discovered by Kanita’s capable subordinate, Fontein. He felt that the Intermediate Demon had a certain use value because Tieke could use a weapon to kill a Higher Demon. Hence, he got Tieke from the border forces. Fontein did not have the time to report yet, and he followed Kanita to Thunder Valley.

Samuel encountered Kanita a few months ago. He even fought against a veteran under Kanita, Solana, and claimed victory effortlessly. After Kanita recruited him with all his effort, Samuel agreed to join Kanita temporarily.

It was said that Samuel was a human genius. He was young, and he was only one step away from Saint (Equivalent to the high-level strength of Demon Realm – Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord). This time, he came to Demon Realm with the secret method to break through to Saint.

Although Samuel joined the Kanita forces, he was not willing to take care of troublesome matters. He was only willing to be a sharp edge to fight against various powerhouses. The reason why Samuel served as warden was that Kanita told him that there were two Great Demon King-level prisoners in the secret prison. Samuel was not a fool, and he knew Kanita’s intention. However, he did not care as long as he could use all resources to become stronger.

With Ivan’s presence, it was fairly easy to enter the prison, but the key problem was that the prison’s magical cage was very special. Only the warden’s crystal key could unlock it. Otherwise, the prisoners inside would have life danger. Most of the magic circles that Chen Rui knew were related to control devices. The “unlocking” category was not his profession. The only way now was to get the crystal key from Samuel.

Samuel’s human identity was kept secret from the outside world. Only Kanita’s aide, such as Solana and Snowden, knew about it. Samuel and Snowden had several contacts too, and their relationship was quite close. Coincidentally, Samuel liked to drink alcohol. Chen Rui swindled many fine wines when he was posing as the “trio-specialized” master in Crystal Valley. He planned to ask Snowden to treat Samuel to drink in order to understand this human’s background. If it was possible, he would think of a way to get the crystal key and save the people.

Things went very smoothly. Samuel did not refuse Snowden’s invitation. Soon, this human from the human world came to Snowden’s house. This was the first time Chen Rui saw a “similar kind” at Demon Realm.

Samuel was a lean young man with brown hair and blue eyes. His facial features were upright, and his gaze faintly exuded a domineering vibe.

“Sir Samuel.” Snowden poured wine for Samuel personally, “This is a new bottle of purple berry wine from Dark Shadow Empire. Please taste it, sir.”

Chen Rui camouflaged as a lich servant standing behind Snowden.

Race: human. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C+. Physique: C, Strength: C+, Spirit: C+, Agility: C+.

C+ was equivalent to the peak of the Great Demon King. This was the peak of Master in the human world.

“This bottle of wine is barely considered good,” Samuel nodded, “Demon Realm still has the wine delayed effect, but the taste is generally not good.”

Snowden laughed, “If sir said so, I am really looking forward to tasting the wine made by the human world.”

“Then it depends on whether you have this life or not.” A faint white light glowed in Samuel’s hands and circled the wine glass. “You are very smart to not play tricks on the wine.”

“What does sir mean? I only have good intentions to invite sir to wine tasting.” Snowden frowned.

Samuel laughed out loud. His eyes scanned the surroundings like lightning, “Let the irrelevant people leave first.”

Snowden groaned a little, and asked the maids and servants to retreat. As Chen Rui was about to leave, Samuel said, “That lich, stay.”

Chen Rui’s heart moved, and he looked at Snowden. Snowden nodded, and Chen Rui returned behind him.

After all the servants left, Samuel said, “I don’t like pretentious people. Tell me, what is the purpose of bringing me here?”

Snowden frowned more tightly, “Samuel Sir, have you misunderstood something?”

“With this person here, you are not qualified to speak.” Samuel’s eyes fell on Chen Rui. “My innate pair of [Truth Eyes] can detect the existence of a Saint powerhouse. Your strength should be Great Demon King level.”

“Truth Eyes?” Chen Rui didn’t expect the [True Breath Holding] which he used to hide the Demon Overlord power was detected by this human. The world is so big that nothing is really surprising. Just like Catherine’s strongest [War Puppet] met Manu’s bizarre territory, [Breath Holding] finally encountered a nemesis like the [Truth Eyes].

Since it was exposed by the other party, there was no need to continue pretending. Chen Rui restored the appearance of “Richard” and released the Great Demon King level breath.

“Interesting demon. Your transfiguration skill is more advanced than the old guy in the Rogue Union.” Samuel’s eyes lit up, “You should be the person behind Snowden. I have trained Holy Magic since I was a child. I have already sensed something wrong with Snowden earlier. It seems like his mind is controlled by the power of darkness. As expected…”

Transfiguration and Rogue Union should be something in the human world, but Chen Rui was very surprised because Samuel’s ability could actually see through the puppetry performed by God-Eating Mask!

“Don’t worry, Kanita doesn’t know about it. Your Demon Realm battle has nothing to do with me. I only care about what I need.” Samuel stared at Chen Rui, “That is to advance to a Saint powerhouse and become stronger! Understand?”

“Understood,” Chen Rui nodded. “But I think Sir Samuel has misunderstood. I invited sir to come because I want two people who are in the secret prison. I’m not planning to recruit you into some force or anything like that.”

“The two Demon Kings in the prison? I see.” Samuel took a sip of wine calmly. “The two guys are not very powerful. I’m not interested anymore, but you… As long as you can beat me, you can take away anyone as you wish!”

Chen Rui didn’t explain his goal was other prisoners. The original plan to steal the crystal key had failed. From Samuel’s tone, this battle was inevitable. Chen Rui nodded and said, “Let’s change another place. I don’t want to destroy Snowden’s yard.”

“No need,” Samuel took out a strange cube. “This item is called Horadric [1]. It’s a space battlefield. If we fight inside this, it won’t affect the outside. This item can withstand the battle of early stage Saint, which is your Demon Realm’s Demon Emperor-level power. But I don’t like to withhold my power, so you must have the awareness of death.”

Horadric… Cube? Chen Rui was stunned and secretly thought, Are you sure that it is a space battlefield instead of an alchemy synthesis prop?

The cube glowed, and then a gleaming gate appeared. Samuel glanced at him and walked toward the gate.

“Unless you reach the peak strength of Saint, don’t do pointless things like trying to destroy the Horadric. Also, it’s not too late for you to run away now, but I will divulge Snowden’s matters.”

Chen Rui smiled slightly and didn’t explain. He followed Samuel straight into the gleaming gate.

Although the name Horadric Cube was a bit misleading for a cross-over person, Samuel was right. This was really a vast space.

“What environment are you good at fighting in?” Samuel’s figure appeared in front of him. “Abyss volcano? Dark swamp? Or the valley of undead breath?”

Chen Rui was a little surprised in his heart. The function of this environmental change is already similar to the training ground of the Super System. It seems that Horadric… Uh, the battlefield cube is really an amazing alchemy work. It’s probably a legendary grade quality at least, or even a quasi-artifact.

“Anything.” Any environment was the same for Chen Rui; even in harsh environments like deep sea and surfy sea.

This answer surprised Samuel, and he smiled disdainfully, “I think you haven’t understood your opponent’s strength yet. I said, you need to have the awareness of death.”

“According to the level of human strength, you have reached the peak of Master,” Chen Rui grinned, “Your spirit and strength are very strong, so you must be practicing both martial arts and magic. Your speed is quite good, but… in terms of stamina, you’re relatively weaker. Am I right?”

If the previous [Truth Eyes] surprised Chen Rui, then [Analytical Eyes] greatly shocked Samuel now. His green pupil suddenly shrank, and his face was replaced with dignity, “Dragon Bright Empire Silver Knight, Samuel. Kemplot is your name.”

It should be [Fake Eyes] 👀. He didn’t even notice Chen Rui was a human too.

chapters.title: Chapter 301 - Strange Killing Move And [Body Of Light Blessing]
chapters.body:
Chapter 301 - Strange Killing Move And [Body Of Light Blessing]

“Richard.”

Chen Rui said indifferently, “Although my body is not at its best, my winning percentage should still be quite large.”

This sentence was not bragging. Some of the basic star levels in the Super System were also synchronized with the power level of this world, such as Alkaid state and Alioth state. But at the Megrez state presently, after learning the mystery of territory, there was basically no opponent at the same level. However, with the later increase of strength and territory, plus the power of the Scorching Dragon, it was not impossible for him to leapfrog to challenge the Demon Emperor directly.

“Shameless bragging! You could see through my strength level only because of some kind of demon talent just like my eyes!” Samuel sneered. Chen Rui felt his vision was blurred for a moment, and the surrounding scene became a huge arena. Of course, there was no audience.

“Analysing battle tactics is useless. Cut the crap and make a move!” As soon as his words ended, Samuel’s figure had rushed toward Chen Rui like electricity. His speed was impressive.

Although Samuel’s speed was fast, it seemed inferior than the time when Chen Rui faced Roman. This meant that with the same level of strength, the speed of the Belphegor Royal Family was unparalleled.

Samuel was at the peak of the Great Demon King, so his strength was much greater than that of Chen Rui. Samuel’s attacks were vigorous and impactful. Chen Rui didn’t block it directly, but used a new tactic which he learned from the battle between Catherine and Azgalor.

At that time, Catherine weakened Azgalor’s strength and flicked the powerful red lightning power with seemingly soft movements. This technique should have the same mystery as Tai Chi in another world.

Chen Rui was just an otaku before rebirth, and he did not learn Tai Chi before. But as a novel fan, he learned a few things such as “using will without exerting strength” from Jin Yong’s [1] martial arts novel masterpieces. He had long mastered the “Alioth State”, so he already had a deep understanding of the strength. That kind of tide-like punching impact came from this.

He tried Catherine’s technique many times on the way to Town Moling. He even deliberately entered the Super System and chose to train in a water flowing environment. This kind of training was mainly static because his injury did not allow too much vigorous training. It was a good opportunity to experiment it now.

Samuel launched a series of attacks and kept suppressing his opponent, but this “Richard’s” defense was very weird. The seemingly soft technique had no strength, but he always warded off the attacks in time. Even if he was hit, the injury was minimized. At first, he was still not familiar with this technique, and loopholes appeared from time to time. Later, he became more and more proficient. He even emitted sudden force from time to time. The attacks also carried thunder from time to time. It was impossible to defend effectively.

The weirdest thing was that Samuel’s rapid speed was often slowed down inexplicably. It was as if he had fallen into mud and couldn’t move his limbs freely.

Samuel was secretly vigilant. This method is quite strange. Although I have the upper hand now, if the battle situation continues this way, I will exhaust more and more power. Then, I will never be able to cause fatal damage to the enemy. The other party has learned that my stamina is relatively weaker. Could it be that he wants to use a protracted war to bring me down?

Samuel was actually overthinking. Chen Rui was just trying to use him to master that new defensive technique. As for the “sudden force emission” and “thunder” were the effects of Thunderous Sound. Samuel’s strength was stronger than Chen Rui’s current state, but under this increasingly proficient defensive technique, Chen Rui was able to effectively suppress the other party’s attacks with minimal consumption.

Samuel knew that a long battle would be unfavorable, so he flashed out of the battle circle. With a long sword in his hand, he slashed toward Chen Rui. A white crescent-shaped ray flew from the air suddenly. It was extremely sharp.

The change was sudden, and the crescent ray was an attack of pure energy. Chen Rui could not resolve it with that newly learnt technique. When the ray was approaching, Chen Rui teleported and dodged. Samuel had fought many battles since coming to Demon Realm, and he was not shocked by this teleportation at all. The long sword in his hand was like a wind, and crescent energy slashed towards Chen Rui continuously. Chen Rui launched teleport again and appeared in front of Samuel. Although Samuel was caught off guard, he didn’t panic. The long sword turned into a band of light, wrapping Chen Rui tightly in it.

When Samuel once again gained the upper hand, a warning sign emerged in his heart suddenly. He raised his sword and blocked the opponent’s blow, but he could not stop the sharp energy from passing through the physical entity. While he dodged hastily, the armor on his chest had been cut by a sharp weapon, opening up another startling wound.

Human physique was weaker than demons. Their regeneration and healing power were also much worse. The blood kept flowing non-stop in that instant. Samuel forced back Chen Rui to draw away the distance with his sword. A white light appeared in his hand. The originally deep wound healed at a rapid rate. In the blink of an eye, only a faint scar remained.

This kind of healing effect was far better than the healing technique of the water element. Chen Rui also felt a special element power. It was an affectionate and warm light element!

The Demon Realm’s environment was most suitable for dark elements, and the power of light elements was relatively weak. Thus, the training of demons was the training of dark elements power and dark magic; the human world was the exact opposite. It was the first time Chen Rui saw this kind of light magic just now.

Samuel watched cautiously at Chen Rui’s palm which had a faint glow. This kind of attack can actually penetrate the physical defense and issue volley attacks. If it was not the protection of the leather armor, I would be severely injured just now.

“That was a strong blow. You didn’t disappoint me indeed. You are stronger than Solana. I can see that you didn’t use all your strength. So did I.” Samuel’s breath began to increase greatly, and his whole body began to radiate the brightness and warmth like the sun! “Physique of demons is generally better than humans. You have seen that my stamina is not strong, so I will not fight a protracted battle with you~ Next, I will use my strongest power to defeat you instantly!”

The sun ray was getting brighter. At this moment, Samuel who was in the midst of the rays suddenly sensed a terrifying breath. The light and heat radiating from his body was suppressed by a “strange” black flame power.

What kind of long horrifying creature is this? A snake-like demonic beast? Absolutely not! It should be a super creature far above all demonic beasts! Even above the dragon clan!

This opponent is actually integrated with the power of this creature! Although the battle space of the Horadric was extremely strong, the tremor of space caused by the enormous power still gave Samuel a long-lost chill.

This overwhelming level of power is actually almost reaching Saint! No, he can only be regarded as a Quasi-saint, just like my old opponent, Paul. Even so, it was enough to destroy the confidence in his heart to win!

This opponent actually hides such a terrifying strength!

No, I haven’t defeated Paul. I haven’t reached Saint yet. I haven’t regained my favorite woman. I can’t die in this place! There was a strong unwillingness in Samuel’s heart, but he had no choice. When his thoughts turned, the arena of the battle space suddenly turned into clouds, and the two were floating in the air.

Above the clouds, the real sun was shining brightly. Suddenly, a strong light element power filled Samuel’s whole body. It was as if this was not the Demon Realm, but the Light Summit in the human world.

This kind of bright space could maximize the power of the light element. But even in the quasi-artifact Horadric battle space, there were strict restrictions on the deployment of this space condition. It would take one month to restore its power after being used once. Probably in this Demon Realm where the light element was suppressed, Horadric’s recovery speed would be several times slower. However, it was worth it to be able to defeat this extremely dangerous enemy!

Samuel, who activated the light space, regained his confidence. The power of the light element was the nemesis of demons. He could perform light magic beyond his own level as he pleased here. Meanwhile, the other party’s dark element power would be greatly suppressed. Unless this opponent really reached Saint, or else he was absolutely impossible to win!

“[Holy Support]!” Samuel waved his long sword, and a ray of light refracting colourful beams fell on his body. His strength and spirit were greatly enhanced in an instant.

“Demon! Die! You will end in my strongest blow!” Samuel’s breath had risen to the peak. His sharp sword pointed at Chen Ru, “[Dawn Extinction]!”

A huge light mark appeared on the clouds under Chen Rui’s feet suddenly. It looked like a combination of complex magic circles. The magic circles showed countless luminous spots. They were quickly connected together in a mysterious way. It became a light ball in the blink of an eye and engulfed Chen Rui. Destructive explosions could continuously be heard from the light ball. Even the surrounding clouds were shaking.

After Samuel launched this attack, the wound on his chest that was injured by [Aura Blade] burst open. He was bleeding profusely, and his momentum plummeted. This technique was the perfect fusion of power and magic. When it was used in this light space particularly, the impact increased more than double. It almost exhausted all his strength. The other party would definitely die.

Samuel just breathed a sigh of relief, and his expression suddenly changed as if he saw something unbelievable. The explosion power in the light ball suddenly weakened, and it rapidly shrank in an acute tremor. Finally, it merged with the enemy’s ‘body’.

“This is your strongest finishing blow?” Chen Rui showed a doubtful face. This [Dawn Extinction] looks powerful, but the actual effect is far lower than I imagined. It was not even as powerful as the previous crescent-shaped energy attack. Not only that, a part of the light had automatically transferred into my body, supplementing my previous consumption.

A beneficial… killing technique?

Is this killing the enemy? Or surrendering to the enemy?

Samuel was in disbelief of his finishing blow “surrendering to the enemy”. It took a long time for him to respond, “Impossible!”

Is it the [Heart of Light and Dark] of the Lucifer Family? No! [Heart of Light and Dark] is engulfing. It is by no means an assimilation like this!

Immediately afterward, Samuel seemed to think of an unimaginable thing. His body shivered, “You are not a demon!”

As they were in a fierce battle now, Chen Rui did not give Samuel the opportunity to continue to talk to himself. Chen Rui’s body moved and appeared in front of Samuel. Chen Rui’s palm was like a knife, beheading him.

Samuel did not avoid nor give way. His whole body burst with dazzling light. Chen Rui’s blow struck his head, but Samuel’s body burst suddenly. He exploded into a white light which flashed away quickly. Although he avoided this blow with secret technique, there was still blood flowing out of Samuel’s head.

After pulling away the distance, Samuel shouted, “[Light Rope Bind]!”

When the light flashed, Chen Rui felt his body was tightened as if he was tightly wrapped by countless arms. He could not move for a while. Then, the strange feeling appeared again. A part of the light power was absorbed by his body, and the binding power suddenly weakened. The binding effect suddenly dispersed after being shaken off by the strength of Scorching Dragon.

Samuel was shocked to the core. He blurted out, “[Body of Light Blessing]… it is really [Body of Light Blessing]!”

[1] Jin Yong is a well-known Chinese martial arts novelist.

Hmm? Was Chen Rui someone important to Samuel?

chapters.title: Chapter 302 - His Royal Highness Arthur
chapters.body:
Chapter 302 - His Royal Highness Arthur

When Samuel was distracted, Chen Rui, who had broken free from the binding, appeared in front of him. A berserk punch which contained the power of the Scorching Dragon, hit Samuel’s lower abdomen. Samuel crouched in pain. Chen Rui turned his palms into claws and clasped onto Samuel’s face. Then, the [Aurora Shot]’s destructive power was about to gush out.

Samuel’s reaction seemed to be a lot slower. He spat out a few words vaguely with his clasped face, “Wait… I admit defeat!”

The surrounding environment changed back to the original open space. Chen Rui slowly let go of his clasped palms. Samuel sighed with relief and gasped, but Chen Rui did not withdraw his hands. His five fingers were pointing at Samuel, and a powerful destruction force was at stand-by, “You have only two ways now, surrender to me or die.”

Samuel can notice my human identity, Snowden’s puppet body, and my [Breath Holding]. This kind of person must be in my own hands!

“Before I choose to die or surrender, I want to figure out one thing first.” Samuel had calmed down, and there was not much fear in his eyes, “Who are you, Royal Highness?”

“Royal Highness?” Chen Rui was taken aback. Did Samuel recognize the wrong person?

“Royal Highness, you don’t need to conceal anymore. There are only two of us in this battle space,” Samuel bowed slightly. It seemed that this etiquette was common to both worlds, “The damage of the light magic will be substantially weakened for the people who have [Body of Light Blessing]. It will also automatically absorb the power of the light element. [Body of Light Blessing] is extremely rare. It can only be found in the purest royal blood of the two great holy empires. What I want to ask now is the surname of Royal Highness. Is it Roland or Sherbert?”

“To be honest, this the first time I heard about [Body of Light Blessing].” Chen Rui pointed to his brain, “I entered the Demon Realm by accident more than a year ago. At that time, I had a serious concussion. Many memories are now fragmented. I only remember that my name is Arthur. As for my surname, I have no impression at all.”

“Arthur? Are you Royal Highness Arthur? You are actually in the Demon Realm!” Samuel was startled and looked at Chen Rui repeatedly. “No, I have seen Royal Highness Arthur a few times. He is way more handsome than you…”

Chen Rui was currently using the appearance on the Earth before rebirth. Samuel’s remark hurt his self-esteem, but it was obvious that Samuel was an acquaintance of Arthur. Chen Rui had the intention to learn more about this body, so he removed his [Camouflage] technique, and restored his face to Arthur’s face.

“Sure enough, it is Royal Highness Arthur!” Samuel was so excited that he knelt down on one knee. He pressed his right hand on his heart, “Son of Carlo Kemplot, Samuel, pays respect to Royal Highness!”

“Wait!” Chen Rui remained vigilant. “Before you tell a story or make up a story, you must make a choice first.”

Samuel cut his palm without hesitation, and the blood turned into a flame-like figure, “I, the Silver Knight, Samuel. Kemplot swore with light and blood that I will always follow Royal Highness Arthur. Roland . If I betray him, I will be destroyed into ashes under the trial light.”

Chen Rui didn’t want any vows. He wanted the master-servant contract. At this time, a notification popped up in the Super System, “Unknown spiritual link is found, label – level b. Can be canceled or disconnected. Accept or decline?”

Chen Rui chose to accept, and there was a new line in the spiritual link: The Blood Oath of Light.

The subject is Samuel. Kemplot. Attributes: loyalty and never give up.

Although it is not the master-servant contract that I imagined, the attributes are still very reliable. But… it seems to be a bit too smooth right? After revealing my overbearing identity, he bowed his head to me immediately? What is with the surname of Roland? Is it a human royal family?

“It seems that I have lost a lot of important memories,” Chen Rui knew that the Super System would not deceive people. He withdrew his oppressive forces immediately. In fact, it was still very difficult to exert [Scorching Dragon Possession] with his current physical state. His heart was already in deep pain.

“You tell me everything you know now, including the situation of the human world. Tell me everything.”

“Yes, Royal Highness.”

This title made Chen Rui feel awkward, but he still listened patiently.

The human world coexisted with various creatures such as the elf, hobbit and human. The human population was the largest and had the widest territory.

In the human world, there were countless small countries and forces, but there were only two giants that were truly recognized by the Light Divinity Temple: Blue Glory Empire and Dragon Bright Empire. They were known as the two great holy empires.

The two great holy empires had been established for thousands of years. Considering the short life of human beings, it was quite a long time. Although there were ups and downs, under the coordination of the Divinity Temple, a delicate balance could always be maintained.

The Light Divinity Temple was the highest symbol of light and order. It was also the source of light magic. The coronation of the emperors of the two great empires must be presided over by the highest spiritual leader of the temple, the great priest. This was somehow similar to the European historic Pope which Chen Rui knew about.

Roland was the supreme royal surname of Dragon Bright Empire. Arthur. Roland was the third son of Lex. Roland, the current emperor of Dragon Bright Empire. Arthur owned the richest Golden Estate of Dragon Bright Empire.

Chen Rui only knew from Arthur’s memory fragments that “himself” was a nobleman who was goof-off and carefree. He did not expect himself to be the prince of the strongest human empire. He even had his own fiefdom! The standard second generation of the powerful and rich!

Then the question arose. How could such an important person come to Demon Realm “accidentally”?

According to Samuel, after the disappearance of Royal Highness Arthur, Lex the Emperor was extremely furious. He ordered a search across the country, but he found nothing in the end. Arthur had a fiancee, Landbis, the princess of the Blue Glory Empire. After the incident, the marriage between the two countries was forced to suspend. Fortunately, Lex the Emperor had a special bloodline sense. He was always determined that Arthur was still alive, so the estate remained. But it was taken care of by the second prince, Garfield. Roland.

The reason for Samuel’s easy surrender was simple. Arthur was originally the direct leader and benefactor of the Kemplot Family. The Kemplot Family was one of the two major families in the Golden Estate. They were also a famous commercial family in the empire, which had been involved in multiple areas. The huge wealth made the Kemplot Family become the target of jealousy. During an unforeseen catastrophe, if it were not for Arthur defending them in front of Lex the Emperor, the Kemplot Family almost suffered an annihilation for the entire family. For this, Carlo felt very grateful. He also became the tax officer of Golden Estate.

Samuel swore allegiance to the “lord” as a prince and became a follower. It was not only to repay gratitude, but it was also a great honor.

After Arthur’s disappearance, the representative lord, Garfield, retrenched the officials of the estate. Carlo, who had offended Garfield, was one of them. He was almost imprisoned too. Fortunately, Carlo was well prepared and withdrew in time. Nevertheless, the Kemplot Family suffered various levels of suppression, which resulted in heavy losses.

Samuel was one of the empire geniuses. His teacher Johnson was a well-known swordmaster. Before his death, Johnson passed on his power to his disciples. Therefore, Samuel reached the peak of Master, and Horadric was also Johnson’s relic.

In a duel hosted by the Divinity Temple, Samuel was defeated by Paul publicly. Paul was the top talented swordsman of the empire and also Samuel’s love rival. The woman Samuel loved was ordered by her father to marry Paul. The repeated setbacks made Samuel almost unable to recover. In order to clear the shame and regain his lover, Samuel used some kind of secret technique to come to Demon Realm. He vowed not to return until he reached Saint.

If it weren’t for [Body of Light Blessing] and the familiar appearance, Samuel wouldn’t believe that the powerhouse who beat him turned out to be the Royal Highness Lord who indulged in feast and pleasure all day.

Is he hiding his strength all the while? Or did he have some incredible encounters in Demon Realm? Anyway, this time Royal Highness Arthur was blessed by misfortune. He really deserved to be the descendant of King Roland of Dragon Bright.

Chen Rui then understood the true origin of “Arthur”. From Samuel’s description, his “disappearance” was very suspicious. It was definitely a conspiracy. The planner might be the direct beneficiary, Garfield or other princes. It might also be related to the Princess Landbis of Blue Glory Empire whom he was going to marry. Unfortunately, many memories had been lost, and they couldn’t be connected into a complete plot.

Chen Rui was still very interested in Samuel’s arrival to Demon Realm and the method of returning. According to Samuel’s answer, he paid an expensive price to ask an elf space magician master to break through the space and came to Demon Realm through secret channels. This method was very risky. If it failed, he would fall into space and die in the turbulence. As for the return method, a secret method was used to implant a strange “seed” in the body. It was equivalent to a one-time fixed coordinate transmission. But you couldn’t go back and forth repeatedly. You must use that risky space again when you want to go to Demon Realm next time.

According to Samuel’s own requirements, this “seed” must be activated by Saint’s power. Otherwise, he would stay in Demon Realm for forever. It was worth noting that the “seed” would not disappear after the owner’s death, which meant that it could be taken by others.

As long as Chen Rui killed Samuel, he might get a chance to return to the human world.

“Unfortunately, I’m in Demon Realm and I can’t contact my father. Otherwise, the news of Royal Highness’ safety will reach the human world. This will inspire many people including Lex Royal Highness!”

“No! The first thing you have to do is keep it secret. No matter whether you can reach Saint’s strength and return to the human world, you must not reveal my news and identity to anyone without my permission.”

Chen Rui said with a solemn face, “I am not strong enough to control my own destiny now. When my strength is enough, I will appear in front of those enemies in an overriding gesture. In their frightful gaze, I’ll take back everything that belongs to me! You too, understand?”

“Understood!” Samuel’s eyes showed respect and eagerness. He knelt on one knee, “Please allow me Samuel. Kemplot to become the sharpest sword in the hands of Royal Highness, cutting off all the thorns in the road ahead!”

Poor Samuel. He didn’t know that this “Royal Highness” just didn’t want to go back. That prince appeared glorious, but it was actually extremely dangerous. He had to encounter deceptions and schemes every day. If he was not careful, he might encounter “accidents” at any time just like when he fell into the Demon Realm.

Demon Realm is much better. There are buddies and girls. I might as well just stay here, marry some beloved witches and be the son-in-law of the demons for life.

Was the Super System a talent of “Arthur” or it was something that surpassed the human and demon worlds?

chapters.title: Chapter 303 - A Little Black Horse In The Thunder Valley
chapters.body:
Chapter 303 - A Little Black Horse In The Thunder Valley

The secret prison was originally a secret barrack. Due to the expansion of Town Moling, it was not suitable as a barrack, so it was renovated into a prison. Then, the secret barrack was transferred to the outskirts at the west of the town.

Kanita had worked painstakingly on Town Moling for many years. The secret military power he held was very strong, as was probably Joseph. There would be a protracted battle between the two brothers. It was just that a strong army was directly proportional with high expenses. In addition to the fierce battle with Joseph, Kanita had shown signs of being unable to make ends meet over the years. He urgently needed money to fill the loopholes. The tax rate of Town Moling had been increased several times, but his financials were still low.

This time, Kanita went to the Thunder Valley to capture the Incubus Beast. It was mainly a gift for his father, Josh’s birthday. When he managed to please his father, he would ask for funding assistance. Otherwise, who would be willing to give away such a rare demonic beast?

The Thunder Valley was a large area, and Kanita finally got some clues with great difficulty. Kanita suddenly received Snowden’s magic message, saying that the newly recruited human powerhouse, Samuel, had an urgent matter to report.

“Sir Samuel, what happened?”

The Great Demon King’s strength was the strongest combat power under Kanita. Although the two sides used each other, Kanita trusted Samuel very much because this human’s purpose was to break through his own strength. He had no other motives. If he was put into good use, he should be able to become the sharpest weapon under Kanita.

“Sir Kanita, you really signed me up for troublesome matters.” Samuel shook his head. “Guarding the secret prison is not an easy job.”

Kanita frowned slightly, “What happened in the prison?”

“A very troublesome virus! It can cause people to be infected with terrible diseases, and they spread quickly,” Samuel said solemnly, “If it is not controlled, the entire Town Moling will be infected and become a dead town!”

Kanita was extremely shocked. Town Moling was his base. If the virus were allowed to spread, the foundation that he had been painstakingly operating for many years would be destroyed.

“The source of this virus is the dark elf woman who came to the prison some time ago! The patients nearby her cell and several jailers were infected. I can temporarily suppress it with my light magic. But in Demon Realm, the light element cannot unleash its maximum power. It cannot really decontaminate it.”

“Damn it!” Kanita felt like he had fallen into a well-designed trap. It turns out that the dark elf woman is actually Joseph’s poison plan. The purpose is to destroy Town Moling!

Samuel said, “The only solution is to kill this woman and all the infected people. Then, let Snowden help me to gather some herbs. Finally, use [Decontamination] to completely annihilate the virus in their corpses to avoid further infection.” Kanita rejoiced, “Great! Sir Samuel, I’ll leave everything to you! You can mobilize all the power. Snowden will fully assist you.”

Samuel nodded and closed the magic communication. Kanita breathed a sigh of relief. I didn’t expect Joseph to have such a vicious trap. I even “initiated” the kidnapping of the infection source, the dark elf woman, from Joseph. I can only suffer this loss silently.

Fortunately, there is Samuel, a human who is proficient in light magic. This time, I am really lucky. It seems that I need to take extra measures against this kind of trap in the future.

Kanita, who wasted his brain cells in vain, would never have thought that the so-called virus was just Chen Rui’s strategy to successfully take away two prisoners. Of course, this confusion must be blamed on Joseph.

As Kanita was thinking, his subordinate, Fontein suddenly came to report, “Sir Kanita, Sir Solana sent a signal. He found the trace of the Incubus Beast!”

Kanita was refreshed. He hurriedly followed Fontein. From afar, he saw a black figure running quickly out of the canyon in front.

The black figure was a horse, but the appearance and breath were very common. Kanita frowned, Isn’t this just a normal black magic horse?

Dogs barking sounds could be heard from a distance. It was mixed with a loud squeal. “Sir Kanita, stop it!”

Kanita noticed that the black horse was not big in size. Its body had many injuries, but its speed was amazing. It galloped smoothly on the rugged mountain road. Kanita charged immediately without thinking. He quickly chanted the spell, and large areas of ice began to freeze on the misty mud ground. Fontein also quickly ran in the woods behind him. He activated the pre-set chained magic traps one by one.

The ice on the ground slowed down the speed of the black horse. At that moment, the little black horse’s eyes glowed with red light, its momentum suddenly increased, and its appearance also changed. A single horn appeared on its head, and the mane and tail became a fiery red color.

It is an Incubus Beast indeed! Plus, it can change its appearance too! It must be the best of mutated bloodlines!

Kanita’s eyes brightened, and his hands recovered even more quickly. His magic power had been exerted to the extreme. He dragged this Incubus Beast wholeheartedly, waiting for Solana’s arrival as well as the full activation of the trap and magic circles behind.

With a cry, the Incubus Beast’s hoofs suddenly burst into flame. The solid ice under its feet melted suddenly. The Incubus Beast got rid of the hindrance and accelerated again.

Fortunately, Fontein had activated all the magic traps in the woods. Under the constant pressure of Kanita’s ice cones, wind blades and other means, the Incubus Beast’s escaped toward the woods direction. Just when Kanita thought it fell into the trap, the Incubus Beast turned around violently and changed direction. It ignored those magic attacks and ran straight toward Kanita.

The wind blade wounded the Incubus Beast’s skin. Blood spilled on the ground. The blood stains actually burned, but the Incubus Beast still rushed recklessly. Kanita’s strength had reached the middle level of Demon King. He felt a dangerous breath from this Incubus Beast. Its strength should be above him, so he dared not fight head on and evaded quickly.

Before he could catch a breath, a red light of hatred flashed in the Incubus Beast’s eyes. A lightning flashed quickly. Before Kanita could finish his protective magic spell, he was hit by the lightning. If it wasn’t for his wind magic training for many years, so his wind element resistance had accumulated to a certain degree, he wouldn’t be able to withstand the Incubus Beast’s lightning talent. Kanita was immediately knocked to the ground. Electrical sparks popped on his severely painful body, then it was accompanied by a series of intense paralysis.

Kanita originally wanted to force the Incubus Beast to go toward the trap. Unexpectedly, the Incubus Beast’s wisdom was so high, and it was extremely fierce. Kanita was careless for a moment and was struck down by the lightning. He suddenly lost his ability to move. Seeing the Incubus Beast approaching, he couldn’t help yelling in his heart.

At this time, the dogs’ barking sound was getting closer and closer. Several dark shadows loomed over it. They were ferocious cerberus. The Incubus Beast was not afraid of the cerberus. However, it had suffered a lot from Solana, so it dared not stay. It gave up on Kanita and ran faraway.

While Kanita suffered a loss in the Thunder Valley, the “source of virus” in Town Moling, the dark elf woman, and the “infected”, Tieke had been secretly released.

This dark elf woman was called Lisa. She looked pretty and resembled Aldas. She seemed very dispirited. It was not sure whether she was the master’s sister. The answer would be revealed once she met Aldas. As for Tonk’s older brother, Tieke’s mental and physical appearance was quite special. When he was taken from the prison, he actually drew various sketches similar to crossbows on the ground. Sure enough, he was a guy who “ignored his proper business”. He still had the heart to play with these things despite being held in jail.

After some dress-ups, Snowden took Lisa and Tieke, plus the two young men in the hotel to Dark Moon. However, he took the Dark Shadow Empire route from Town Sam to the Dark Shadow capital, and then to Town Leia. When they reach the western part of Dark Moon via Town Leia, Snowden would hand over the people to Tim of Mountain Xilang. This was Chen Rui’s arrangement. Although they had detoured, Snowden was Kanita’s trusted confidant. He was a character well-known by Joseph’s side. If they took the Town Mordor route, they would probably be exposed. Therefore, they went this way. Furthermore, it would be quite safe and appropriate to temporarily handle the people to Tim.

Samuel remained in the secret prison as Kanita’s warden. This encounter with Samuel was a huge gain for Chen Rui. Not only did he know his “life history” and accepted a Great Demon King follower, the most important thing was Samuel’s appearance gave his biggest plan the most needed supplement. His next critical action could really kick off now.

The starting point of this action was set in Town Moling!

The most important thing for Chen Rui now was to return to the Dark Moon first. He did not leave with Snowden, Tieke and the others. Instead, he went to Thunder Valley. Incubus Beast was good stuff. Even if he couldn’t get it, he couldn’t let Kanita succeed.

In his latest completed plan, Kanita should continue to maintain a fiscal deficit and urgently need a large amount of funds instead of getting the Incubus Beast to alleviate his economic crisis.

The Incubus Beast did not know that it had become the target of both parties. It was still desperately running away. There were serious injuries on his body. Due to its special physique, it needed to look for a rare coro fruit in Thunder Valley. Not only would it replenish its stamina, it could also recover its magic power and injury.

On a mountain rock beside a stream, the exhausted Incubus Beast finally found a bunch of coro fruit. The pale red fruit hung on the vine, which looked like an exquisite gem.

“Fruity!” The Incubus Beasts walked toward the coro fruit excitedly.

Just after crossing the stream, the Incubus Beast suddenly stopped vigilantly. There was someone yawning on the mountain rock.

Enemy! When did he appear?

He must be a powerful enemy!

The Incubus Beast’s eyes glowed with red light. Due to the numerous days of escape, its physical and magical powers were on the verge of exhaustion, but the hatred in its eyes was getting stronger and stronger. With the Incubus Beast’s natural ferociousness, it would not submit to these damn enemies even if it had to die.

Strangely, the man sitting on the ground did not attack. Instead, he stretched out, stood up, and muttered a few words to himself. He actually walked toward the coro fruit and plucked it. The Incubus Beast was startled. It snorted while slowly condensing its remaining power, preparing to make the final stroke.

“Little black horse, what’s wrong?” The voice of the enemy suddenly came into the Incubus Beast’s brain. It was not in the Incubus Beast’s form now, so it looked like an ordinary black magic horse.

The Incubus Beast didn’t expect this person to communicate directly with it. It took a few steps back cautiously. The man raised the coro fruit and smiled while saying, “You want to eat this bunch of fruit?”

“Fruity!” The Incubus Beast gasped, staring closely at the fruit in the man’s hand.

“I wanted to eat it initially… Forget it. Here you go.”

This man actually threw the fruit over. The Incubus Beast leaped and grabbed the fruit in the air like a swift hellhound.

The Incubus Beast’s wisdom was not low. Although it was eating, it had always been alert to the other party. However, after it had finished eating, the man still did not make any move. The Incubus Beast’s hostility was slightly reduced. It swallowed the fruit and drank some stream water. As it was about to leave, the man’s voice sounded again in its head, “Little black horse, you like to eat fruit? I still have some here. Do you want them?”

The Incubus Beast’s nose suddenly twitched. Its eyes fell on the fruit in the man’s hand and couldn’t look away at that moment. The breath of power emanating from that fruit was many times stronger than the coro fruit! It was the first time that it had seen this fruit in the Thunder Valley for so long!

“Fruity!” No matter whether it was to replenish strength or to fill up the stomach, the coro fruit was far from enough. The Incubus Beast was very tempted looking at the fruit in the man’s hand. This person should have no hostile intentions, but he seems not to be messed with too. It’s probably hard to snatch it by force.

“Little black horse, take it!” The man smiled and threw the fruit over again. The Incubus Beast did not pick it midair. Instead, it let the fruit fall off the ground and break apart. But it could not stand the tempting fragrance. Finally, after taking a few bites, it couldn’t help eating them all.

As soon as it raised its head, the man who was originally on the mountain rock had appeared in front of it. The Incubus Beast was shocked. As it was about to react, the man handed over another fruit to it. “It’s not delicious after breaking apart. Here you go.” The fragrance of the fruit and the kindness felt in its consciousness made the Incubus Beast hesitate for a long while before finally getting over to eat the fruit in the man’s hand. It ate a few fruits at once. The good impression it had toward this person increased exponentially. It didn’t even resist the man’s gentle touch.

“Little black horse, how did you get hurt? I’ll help to cure you.” The man took out a bottle and poured it on its wound. There was a cool and comfortable feeling. It felt the recovery speed of the injury was obviously accelerating.

The Incubus Beast squirted its nose and rubbed the man intimately. Although this man is powerful, he is not an enemy. Plus, he’s a really good man.

This guy was naturally Chen Rui. He spent a day’s effort to come to the Thunder Valley. The purpose was to meet the Incubus Beast. He met the little black horse by chance. The black horse didn’t catch his attention initially. It wasn’t until [Analytical Eyes] showed the corresponding prompt that he started to pay attention to it.

Race: Incubus Beast (mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C+. Physique: C+, Strength: C, Spirit: C+, Agility: B-.

[Analytical Eyes] showed that the strength of the Incubus Beast was the peak of Demon King while its agility had reached the level of Great Demon King. However, the breath it revealed on the surface was only Intermediate Demon. It seemed that at least one of this Incubus Beast’s mutated bloodline skill was to hide its breath.

A demonic beast that knows “[Breath Holding]” and “[Camouflage]”?

Would this horse join Chen Rui’s forces? Or would it fight back?

chapters.title: Chapter 304 - Who Touched My Horse
chapters.body:
Chapter 304 - Who Touched My Horse

After discovering the strange talent of the Incubus Beast, Chen Rui was suddenly very interested. After hearing its longing for the fruit via [Analytical Eyes], he originally wanted to use the “fruit” as a bait to catch it. However, when he got the bunch of fruit, he was surprised that this bunch of fruits exuded a faint aura. It was like the devil pomeg fruit that he got in Town Leia!
