Therefore, the following tragic story of the abduction of a kind little black horse unfolded.

Without Kanita’s hunt which showed the strong contrast of “treatment”, and without its demand for “fruits” due to its stamina exhaustion, the content of this story might turn into a kind little black horse fighting bravely to get rid of human trafficker… Uhm, horse trafficker abduction. However, this happened coincidentally. The little black horse had already deemed Chen Rui as a good guy.

At this moment, the dog barking in the woods across the stream caused the Incubus Beast to be vigilant. It stomped its hoofs unsteadily, “Enemy! Enemy!”

The man’s kind voice sounded in his head, “Don’t be afraid, just watch me beat them away.”

Sure enough, a group of people led by Kanita came out of the woods. They also brought a few cerberus. Obviously, they found the Incubus Beast by following its blood and breath.

Chen Rui knew that his successful abduction was contributed by Kanita and the others as well. Thus, it was time for him to “pay back” now.

The first sentence of his “gratefulness” was, “Who touched my horse?”

Kanita was taken aback for a while. He saw that the Incubus Beast stayed quietly at the side of this person, and it didn’t run away. It really seemed like that was the case.

The Incubus Beast has a master? So what?

This man seems to be just the strength of Higher Demon. I can easily kill him with anyone from my side. I really don’t understand why the Incubus Beast would recognize this weak person as its master? Or this guy doesn’t even know that this horse is the strongest ground demonic beast mount?

Kanita sneered. Fontein on the side didn’t play along to ask, “Why is the master laughing?” Instead, he jumped out arrogantly and shouted, “This is Sir Kanita, the controller of Town Moling. If you are tactful, offer the horse immediately…”

As soon as his words ended, Chen Rui had appeared in front of Fontein without warning. He didn’t seem to move at all, but Fontein’s words suddenly stopped. Chen Rui didn’t look at Fontein at all. He just set his eyes on Kanita, “Did you touch my horse?”

After saying this, Fontein’s head fell off. Kanita’s facial expression suddenly changed. Fontein has the strength of an early Demon King. Yet, he was killed by this Higher Demon in the blink of an eye… No! He is definitely not a Higher Demon!

The strongest person, Solana took a step forward, blocking in front of Kanita, “Sir, please stop!”

“You’re just a middle stage Demon King. Other than spirit, your physique and strength are not worth mentioning.” Chen Rui glanced at Solana with disdain and extended a hand. “I can turn you into powder with one hand in less than a minute.”

Chen Rui was right that he could kill Solana, but these words were absolutely bluffing. Solana felt a chill in his heart as if he felt like he was naked in front of the other party. This enemy is still the breath of a Higher Demon. However, he could kill the Demon King-level Fontein without much effort. He could easily peep through my strength and weakness now. He is really unfathomable.

Chen Rui walked forward slowly. When Solana was about to cast magic, he realized that the surrounding scenes were different. It seemed that something was changing. The change became clearer every time the opponent took a step.

This was a bizarre scene. He was surrounded by strange balls of all sizes, showing dark and magnificent colors. The rotating rhythm seemed to contain some kind of supreme mysterious law.

Not only that, Solana, Kanita and all the people in this scene felt that their power had inexplicably reduced a lot. There was a feeling of weakness or dizziness from time to time.

Solana’s face changed drastically. He was drenched in cold sweat. Finally, he lost his courage to fight. He uttered a word with great difficulty, “Territory.”

Kanita on the side also changed his complexion. A powerhouse with territory is at least a Demon Emperor!

In the whole Red Spirit Estate, Kanita only knew one Demon Emperor. It was his father, Josh Alvin, but he was only an early stage Demon Emperor. The mysterious “Higher Demon” in front of him was a terrifying powerhouse who was at least at the same level as his father!

“Since you touched my horse, you need to pay the price.” Chen Rui put his hands behind his back, and there was no sign of movement. Although he was still exuding the breath of the Higher Demon, no one dared to take the initiative to attack or even move.

There had been no traces of gods in Demon Realm for a long time. Tens of thousands of years? Hundreds of thousands of years? God knows if the old Demon God had fallen asleep. Even Demi-God like Demon Supremo hardly appeared. This meant that Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord were the top powerhouses. Their territory power had long been deemed God-like.

The territory power of this mysterious powerhouse in front of him was obviously not fully unleashed. Once it was launched, everyone could be wiped out instantly except for the “powerhouse” himself. No one doubted this.

If a Demon Emperor-level powerhouse was placed at Crystal Valley, he would only be a department manager. There were even more powerful general managers and chairmans. But placed in such a place as Town Moling, he was definitely a legendary powerhouse that everyone looked up to!

“The son of Red Spirit Lord, Kanita. Alvin pays respect to sir.” Kanita had finally recovered from the shock. He hastily bowed and saluted.

“Sir.” Solana also said, “Please forgive my previous rudeness. This incident is just a misunderstanding. We didn’t know that the powerful demonic beast is sir’s mount. Please forgive me, sir.”

Chen Rui shook his head, revealing a slight murderous breath in his voice, “I don’t care who your father is, or if there are any misunderstandings. My horse is injured by you now. You must give me a satisfactory explanation. Otherwise, you will all die here.”

This kind of tone was already considered polite to Kanita. After all, they were just ants in front of a powerhouse of this level. If they encountered one with a bad temper, they would be directly killed. This was probably because he had concerns about Kanita’s identity.

“I would like to express my sincerest apology to sir regarding this matter, and I am willing to pay a satisfying compensation to sir.” Kanita said, “I am under my father’s order to control Town Moling at the south of Thunder Valley. If sir has any requests in the future, you can instruct me anytime. I will definitely do it for sir!”

The following was a time for a mutually voluntary rip off. After paying a high price, Kanita and others left the Thunder Valley as if they were amnestied. What surprised the Demon Emperor-level powerhouse sir was that Kanita’s compensation included a so-called ancient treasure map. For Kanita, using this incomplete map to exchange for his life was a valuable use of trash. For Chen Rui, this seemingly familiar map remnant seemed to be part of the map obtained from Dodo previously. Unfortunately, it was still incomplete. He would keep it in the storage warehouse first for now.

“Little black horse, this fruit is for you.” Chen Rui touched the Incubus Beast’s mane affectionately. He took out an aura fruit which was different from devil pomeg, “I still have a lot of these fruits, but unfortunately they have to be eaten once I take it out. Otherwise, they will wither.”

This Incubus Beast was a mutated bloodline. Its physique was very special. It urgently needed the rare coro fruit to assist its growth and fortification. However, even in coro’s sole production area, Thunder Valley, the fruit production was very rare. This “kind man” offered more wonderful fruits which were more potent than coro fruit. How could the little dark horse not be moved?

“Fruity, fruity…”

Seeing the little black horse automatically following him, the cunning horse trafficker showed a sly smile. The abduction plan was successfully completed.

Compared with Chen Rui who took the little black horse along relaxedly, Manu could only be described with anger and despair at the moment. After fleeing with the secret technique, he soon received the news that his elites were wiped out. At the same time, Blood Vine City was controlled. His initial clever trap was almost uprooted.

What was even more troublesome was that his “body” was always filled with a strange power after escaping from the Crystal Valley. It inflicted excruciating pain on him. Although he seemed to be alive and looked much younger, the price of maintaining this state was at the cost of a huge amount of vitality and magic power. If this continued, not only would his power decline rapidly, he couldn’t even survive.

It’s all because of that maniac. A genius maniac who is definitely dead now. Although his death is a pity, it is also a grateful death.

“Sir Manu.”

It was Broc who spoke. He took out a small jar, “This is the violet smoke liquid that is extracted today. However, there are several materials that are getting harder to find.”

“No matter how hard it is, you must obtain it!” Manu snorted and took the small jar. He pulled the stopper and drank it. This violet smoke liquid was extracted from various rare plants such as violet smoke flower using secret recipes. Since Manu drank it, the strange power in his body had been greatly suppressed.

Broc noticed that Manu’s hands were shaking. The cold light in his eyes was fleeting, “Sir, the Bloody Vine City has been completely exposed, and Crystal Valley has also been destroyed. What should we do next?”

Manu closed his eyes and felt the comfort of the pain being soothed by the violet smoke liquid. He took a deep breath, “The change in Crystal Valley has caused us heavy losses this time. The Dark Shadow Empire will definitely suppress and hunt our forces throughout the country now. It’s better for you to go back to the border fortress and act in a low-key manner temporarily. Don’t attract the capital’s attention.”

“Got it.” Broc asked tentatively, “About His Royal Highness, do you want…”

“No need. I will contact myself.” Manu frowned. “You better pay more attention to the whereabouts of Azgalor and Jacob. Contact them as soon as possible.”

Broc nodded. He suddenly showed a strange grin, “Sir, is there any other instructions?”

This grin tightened the sensitive Manu’s heart. Manu narrowed his eyes and made a pondering look. He was actually circulating his power secretly, and suddenly his face changed greatly.

“Don’t be surprised, Sir Manu. You have been trying to hide your injury, but how can you hide it from me? As you know, I am the first general of the Dark Shadow Empire. You did not suffer “magic damage” but the strongest Nirvana power instead.” Broc was still grinning “Violet smoke flower can’t actually suppress the Nirvana power. It will only condense it before violently bursting. The suppression you felt previously is just a hallucination produced by other drugs. However, it is really not easy to trick you to take the violet smoke liquid. It turns out that the previous costs are worth it. Now that you have drank it for seven days, it is time for me to harvest…”

An intense rage surged in Manu’s heart. He thought that his cleverness was above others. He was cautious in every aspect, but he actually fell in Broc’s hands. If it wasn’t the territory power of the terrifying woman. If it wasn’t the maniac…

It was a pity that there were not so many “ifs” in reality regardless of who you were.

At this moment, the Nirvana power which had been suppressed in Manu’s “body” began to spread frantically; his original power had completely scattered. As Manu desperately condensed his power, he felt a sense of danger. Although his consciousness already had the idea of dodging, his body couldn’t make the corresponding movements. He only felt a pain on his chest, then he was penetrated by the long sword, “Blood River”.

Another companion that would fight for food with Dodo?

chapters.title: Chapter 305 - Sheriff’S Yard
chapters.body:
Chapter 305 - Sheriff’S Yard

Chen Rui knew nothing about the power struggle of the Leviathan Royal Family. At this moment, he was calmly riding the little black horse from Town Mordor. Shortly afterwards, he passed the border gate smoothly with his potioneer identity as well as the appearance and breath of the little black horse, Incubus Beast and entered the Dark Moon territory.

After so many changes and adventures in the Dark Shadow Empire, Chen Rui’s longing for Athena became stronger and stronger. Not only for Athena, but also for Kia, Shea, Alice, Paglio and more.

The Incubus Beast was swift. Three days later, the little black horse’s figure appeared at Dark Moon’s east city gate. Even in the evening when the light was not very bright, Chen Rui could still see that the spirit, appearance and temperament of those city gate guards had changed significantly from before. It seemed that through this period of training, there had been a tremendous boost in the overall quality.

The shops along the way were hastily preparing for the start of the night market. Since the opening of the night market organized by the Cloak Gang, it received unanimous praise from everyone in Dark Moon City. It became a favorite place for the demons who liked to hang out at night. It had effectively promoted the economy and consumption.

Currently, the night market was divided into two parts: southwest and southeast. Southwest was dominated by small merchants and hawkers, while southeast was a joint sales point for large and medium-sized merchants. Each had its own characteristics. As the controller, Cloak Gang had substantially increased their revenue. The hotpot restaurant was still very popular. It had opened three branches now, becoming the “special dish” of Dark Moon.

The businessmen also ushered in the spring that was only available in the human world. They only needed to pay taxes and Cloak Gang’s protection fees to freely operate. They didn’t have to consider the various “filial pieties” and extortions in the past, and their enthusiasm also greatly increased.

Chen Rui also saw a new shop selling the special products of Dark Shadow Empire. Celine had become the heir of the Custer Family. She gradually took over the power passed over by Patriarch Croz. Under her operation, Custer Family’s actions had slowly begun. The first step in the trade between Dark Moon and Dark Shadow Empire had been successfully executed.

With the Custer Family card, Dark Moon’s purchase of food from the Dark Shadow Empire would be very smooth. At least on the bright side, Shea had been able to cope with the capital’s food sanctions some time ago.

However, food sanctions were only a means of capital. If they only defended passively, then Dark Moon would be fragmented and completely broken one day under these step by step suppressions. Therefore, they must find ways to counterattack.

After the events of Town Moling, it was getting closer to the implementation of the most important plan. If the overall plan was successful, Shea was likely to become the empire’s empress step by step. She would dominate the Fallen Angel Empire and make it stand equally with the other two empires.

The problem was that when the Demon Realm and the Human Realm had a large-scale war again two hundred years later, the Fallen Angel Empire would definitely participate. No matter which side won, to him as a human, even as “the prince of the human’s Holy Empire,” neither seemed to be a good result. Moreover, his life span was at least tens of thousands of years, so similar distresses might continue to follow…

As Chen Rui was thinking about it, he had a headache. But everything will be alright when the time comes. Anyway, there are still two hundred years. I’ll think about it later.

He led the little black horse all the way to the sheriff’s house.

Since the human sheriff had been in a coma for a long time, there were fewer and fewer visitors. After the sheriff’s lover, Athena, was appointed as the representative sheriff, many more people came to visit the ill “human” suddenly. However, they were all rejected by Athena. One’s attitude toward another would change with social position. That was the hypocrisy of the world, regardless of the place.

Sheriff’s house was not small, but the location was relatively remote. The people of Dark Moon knew that this gloomy house did not have any guards or servants. People, who had ulterior motives to attempt to sneak into the house, would vanish into thin air. It was said that this place was full of powerful magic circles set by Sir Gauss who was under Princess Royal. No one dared to enter this place without permission from Madam Athena. In fact, compared with the real characters who set these magic circles, Sir Gauss could only be unfortunately classified as an ant.

Chen Rui entered the house easily. He made two turns and came to the yard easily. If it was another person, that person would probably enjoy Dragon Inscription or Guardian Vines’ “intimate contact” within three steps.

Walking into the yard, he saw Roman smiling apologetically while talking to Delia. On the side were Dodo and Paglio, who looked pleased and gloating, but he didn’t see Athena.

They saw a “Great Demon” with a horse walking in instead of Athena whom they expect. Everyone showed surprised expressions.

Paglio responded the fastest. He grinned and raised his glass. Slime poured a full glass of wine like a conditioned reflex.

“Look who is back?” Roman also reacted. Before Chen Rui recovered his face, Roman had walked over with a sly smile, “The trio-specialized mechanical master who shocked Demon Realm? Damn, are you the illegitimate child that Demon God threw in this world?”

Paglio felt the same way about this. But as the first person who met Chen Rui, he had been “trained hard.” He was more used to it. Roman’s fuss was like Paglio in the past. Paglio just smiled profoundly on the spot which showed the demeanor of a dragon.

“Why do I sense a sour taste? When did jealousy become synonymous with the Sloth Royal Family?” Chen Rui had recovered his original face. “Delia, are you sure this guy is not an Envy Royal Family’s spy sneaking into the Belphegor Royal Family?”

“Leader, I’m sure.” Although the Silent Night Wetland campaign had passed for a long time, Delia was still accustomed to calling Chen Rui as leader. She answered in a serious tone. There was a hint of playfulness in her eyes, “A stupid guy like this…”

Before Delia could finish speaking, Roman said sadly, “But I’m also the son-in-law of the Envy Royal Family…”

“Hmph, shameless guy!” Delia blushed and said toward Paglio’s direction, “Dodo!”

Slime just found out that his master had come back, but he couldn’t join the conversation abruptly. As soon as he heard Delia calling him, he immediately transformed into Roman in a show off manner.

“That’s so unfair!” Dodo, who transformed into Roman, took the opportunity to drink a huge mouthful of wine, then sighed at the sky, “Demon God! Open your omnipotent left eye that can charm all women and bless your poor believer… Even flirting with a beautiful girl will be caught by Delia! No way! I can’t be hanged on a tree! I want the entire forest!”

“You better go look for the entire forest. My tree doesn’t welcome you.” Delia looked at the stunned Roman with an awkward. She knocked his head, “Don’t say everything has passed. With your abundant experience, you should know that women are very vengeful.”

“It surely is unfair!” Chen Rui seemed like he had a sudden realization. “Delia, don’t worry. As a leader, I fully support your choice!”

“You are too vicious!” Roman made a threatening gesture in an attempt to pounce forward in order to express his anger. This action caused the little dark horse behind Chen Rui to misunderstand, and it seemed vigilant.

Feeling the power of this enemy, the little black horse changed into the Incubus Beast form without hesitation. The single horn above its head flashed, and the mutated lightning talent burst out. This transformation attracted everyone’s attention. Roman squealed and launched the [Flash] talent of the Belphegor Royal Family. He actually avoided the lightning.

It was not that Roman’s speed had reached or exceeded the speed of light. This evasion was a kind of mind reaction. With the talent of [Flash], he avoided this extraordinary lightning in an instant. Even without [Analytical Eyes], it could be seen that Roman’s strength had taken a huge leap forward than before. He should have reached the level of the Great Demon King.

The little black horse did not continue to attack because Chen Rui had already told him using his mind that the people here were all his friends. Of course, the most important thing was that the little black horse was not an opponent of Roman now. If it had reached Great Demon King level, Chen Rui would not mind letting this forest fanatic have a lightning bath.

“Incubus Beast!” Delia was taken aback. Putting aside the Incubus Beast’s strength, its temperament is extremely ferocious. It is one of the most difficult demonic beasts to tame. This Incubus Beast can emit lightning and even transform. It is definitely a rare mutated bloodline.

Surprisingly, it is as gentle as a hellhound in front of Chen Rui. Isn’t it the case? When Chen Rui threw a fruit, the Incubus Beast that returned to the black horse form jumped high and caught it in the air. Is this a horse… or a dog?

Roman pointed at Chen Rui and then pointed to the Incubus Beast who was still hostile. He was speechless for a while. Jealousy. It was plain jealousy. This is too unfair. Leader must know some evil spell. He snatched all my luck!

Chen Rui was too lazy to argue with this guy. He did not look at the flattering Dodo too. His attention was focused behind him. Another person walked into the yard with familiar steps. He almost knew who she was without looking back.

Just like how she knew him. Her appearance was not the most beautiful in the Demon Realm. But in his heart, she was the most beautiful.

When the beautiful red eyes which were slightly tired saw Chen Rui’s back, they instantly gleamed with surprise and joy. She met directly with his gaze.

She sped up her steps. She did not care about her friends’ gaze in the yard or the vigilant eyes of the little black horse behind him. She came to him and hugged him, while he hugged her at the same time.

“Athena, I am back.”

“En.”

Those were very plain words, but they were full of happiness.

Even the little black horse was infected by this emotion. It silently put away its hostility.

The two felt each other’s heartbeat and warmth. They silently exchanged their longing thoughts after parting. They almost forgot the time until…

“Delia, I’m back.”

“Get lost!”

“…”

How would Chen Rui unfold his plan? Was it by getting rid of the Red Spirit Estate’s control of the Dark Moon?

chapters.title: Chapter 306 - Athena’S Request
chapters.body:
Chapter 306 - Athena’S Request

Chapter 306: Athena’s Request

The light of the two moons had quietly changed to purple. The seemingly gloomy sheriff house was full of clamour which was unknown to the outsiders. It was very lively.

“My sir leader, sir uncle, you are too shameless! We huddled up here to keep watch of your body, but you are enjoying the superb wine and beauty in that wonderful place!” Roman was shamelessly drinking the fine wine that Chen Rui brought from Crystal Valley, while stuffing some into his space ring. He kept whining indignantly. He was evidently a brat who ate, stole and had a dirty mouth.

“You actually met Jacob?” Paglio revealed a serious expression. Then, he immediately showed his nature, “Did you get his treasures? As a life-sharing partner, I have the right to ask for the share of the stolen goods! Do not try to hide or beat around the bush. I know your cunning and greed very well!”

Chen Rui had just told half of his story, but he was interrupted several times by these two guys. He was quite speechless.

What made Chen Rui even more speechless was Dodo, who was not listening at all. Instead, he transformed to Chen Rui’s appearance, holding an apple in each hand. One of his hands was swaying in front of the little black horse, while the other was stuffed into his mouth. He murmured, “Fruity… Fruity…”

Since seeing Chen Rui teasing the little black horse with fruit, Dodo had become interested in this new guy. Unexpectedly, the slime could understand the little black horse’s voice. Unfortunately, the horse was not bothered at all. When it was annoyed, it just used [Terror] on this fake clone.

Paglio’s expression had sublimated to a hateful yet helpless look, “As a noble dragon with rich financial management experience, I, Master Paglio, have not been out to plunder… collect those wasted property for a long time. I deliberately went out a few times previously, but this damn place is really a remote hinterland. There are no decent treasures, let alone artifacts! A giant dragon actually can’t sleep in a heap of treasures. That emptiness feeling is simply the ultimate shame!”

He even has an emptiness feeling? Chen Rui immediately looked gloomy, Paglio even went out to spy on potential targets and explore the way. Does he know what it means to not do anything to harm one’s neighbors? Fortunately, Dark Moon City is a poor place. There is really no treasure that can interest this dragon.

Chen Rui directly threw out a gold crystal bed which he stole last time when the crystal dragon was sleeping. He threw it ruthlessly toward the dragon with the stink of treasures. Paglio caught it and examined it carefully for a while with his treasure expert eyes. Finally, he was grinning from ear to ear, and he laid down directly in front of everyone. He showed a pleased expression. The so-called dragon dignity and temperament was thrown away to the damn human world.

How do I know these two strange guys…with an unreliable servant? Fortunately, Delia and Athena are still very good listeners. As he was thinking about this, he saw Delia looking at him expectantly. She then pointed to herself.

It is rare that we have a normal cutie team member. She is actually badly influenced by two unscrupulous brats as well! Chen Rui reluctantly took out a pair of extremely thin gloves which were seized from Sabrina. They had high defense and could enhance the power of the water element.

Seeing Delia received them happily as Chen Rui sighed secretly. I’m so pitiful.

Athena looked at all these with a smile. She never withdrew the hand he was holding.

Chen Rui’s story continued, and when it came to the thrilling part, even the two guys who liked to interrupt him were silent.

Paglio got up from the gold crystal bed and said with interest, “That Empress Catherine defeated Jacob who allied with two other who are the peak of theDemon Overlords by herself?”

Chen Rui did not tell the whole story. He also changed the plot slightly. He only said that Catherine the Great came in person, while he faked death by lying on the ground and witnessed all these.

“Yes, the guy named Manu should be close to death. If Jacob and Azgalor did not escape quickly, there would definitely be more casualties.”

Paglio really showed his seriousness this time. The strength gap between Demon Overlords is huge. I am very clear of Jacob’s strength. Catherine even has this kind of power. Even if I recovered to my peak state, I’m afraid that I am not her opponent. Moreover, I am now limited by the seal. I just recovered to the peak of Demon Emperor. I don’t even see any clues on the six ancient runes slabs. It seems that my only hope is to find the fairy dragon, Zola. Whatever it is, we’ll see by that time. Sleeping on this gold crystal bed is not worse than sleeping on a pile of black crystal coins. At least tonight I can have a solid dream.

Delia was surprised to see that Chen Rui took out the greatest artifact, Demon Shield, of the Leviathan Royal Family from his “body”. This state of “integration” should represent the highest recognition by the artifact. What surprised her even more was that she could not sense the strange connection anymore despite being originally recognized by the Demon Shield. The IIlusive Shield could not be combined with Demon Shield in this case.

Chen Rui was very surprised. Does Super System’s [Deep Analysis] have the function of “seizing control”? The fully resolved God-Eating Mask can’t even be taken down. This is… equipment binding? Sigh…

Originally, he analyzed Demon Shield in order to frame Broc and increase the chance of survival. In the battle, the Demon Shield did save his life. However, this made the original successor, Delia, lose control of it now. Chen Rui could not help regretting it.

Delia saw Chen Rui’s thoughts, and she smiled gently, indicating that it was okay. With the IIlusive Shield, she was still able to resist Broc’s [Soul Shackles]. The others naturally assumed it was the inheritance of the ancient grand master’s strange power. Otherwise, how could a human integrate with the seven artifacts? Chen Rui had more than Demon Shield. He had a complete artifact like God-Eating Mask. It was just that in terms of power, it seemed to have weakened.

Roman didn’t mind either. Stubbornness and jokes aside, he was very clear when it came to serious matters. Both his and Delia’s lives were saved by Chen Rui. It was also Chen Rui’s credit that he was with Delia now. Not to mention Demon Shield, he wouldn’t mind even if it was Belphegor Royal Family’s artifact, Breeze Shadow Boots.

A quiet night.

“Shall we sign a symbiotic contract?”

Athena was lying in Chen Rui’s arms in the room when she suddenly said this.

“I know you can carry more than one contract.” Athena raised her head and looked at Chen Rui seriously. “Although I don’t know how to implement a symbiotic contract, Paglio should be able to help us.”

Chen Rui noticed that Athena was not kidding. He asked surprisingly, “Why do you have such an idea?”

“Three years ago, Roman and Delia adventured together in Silent Night Wetland and almost died; three years later, Delia went to Silent Night Wetland, and Roman still accompanied her. And me? When you were risking your life in Silent Night Wetland and Dark Shadow Empire, I stayed alone in this so-called safe place.”

“I’m not a vase. I have the ability and courage to face danger with my beloved man.” Athena’s eyes were red.” I understand that you are looking out for me. Just like when Roman left Delia, he was also looking out for her. But is Delia happy?”

Chen Rui was shocked. Since the battle in the underground world of Mountain Xilang, he never wanted Athena to face danger again, but he had not thought about it from her perspective.

“I know it’s a bit selfish to say this. Your wisdom is amazing. My father was amazed by your plans and calculations. I won’t destroy your plans or become your burden.” Tears sparkled at the corner of Athena’s eyes. “I just want to connect my life with you. I want to face life and death with you even if I am not by your side.”

Chen Rui stared at the beloved woman in front of him. She was still persistent even when in tears.

He recalled the scene of Mountain Xilang when facing Glorfin. She turned into her demonic form; her whole body was burning a fiery flame of life.

“But I still love you. It’s not like, but love.”

“Maybe we will meet again in a certain hell like the story you told me. No matter what, don’t forget me!”

This sentiment of living and dying together had been deeply engulfed in their souls. Even if it was the last moment of dying, it would not disappear.

Chen Rui’s eyes were a little wet. He held her face, gazing affectionately at the crystal red eyes as if they were the most precious gem in the world, “Athena, I have a few questions. If I don’t have a house, car and money, would you still accept my gaze?”

“Of course.” Athena replied, feeling a little strange. If there is no house, can’t we build it together? Just like the cozy cottage in the Mountain Xilang green leaves forest. Although it is simple, it is more cozy than all the luxurious and spacious houses I used to live in. Car… Is it a luxury carriage? What else can you do with it besides showing off? As for the money… It’s fine as long as it’s enough to spend. I don’t like any special luxury goods anyway. Sometimes, he just buys me ordinary clothes, and it is enough for me to be happy for a long time.

“What if I don’t have the power?”

Athena blushed, “Actually… you had stolen my heart back at the black rainforest. At that time, you were just a powerless human; at least that was what you showed me.”

Chen Rui straightened up and said solemnly to Athena, “So, the last question. Miss Athena, regardless through poverty, sickness or death, are you willing to stay with this man for a lifetime?”

Athena suddenly understood what happened. The hand she held started trembling out of nervousness. She said firmly, “I do, regardless of poverty, sickness or death.”

Chen Rui felt warm in his heart. Suddenly, he knelt down on one knee and put a magic ring on her ring finger on her left hand, “This is an ancient custom, which means… even if you want to back out in the future, I will snatch you back shamelessly… Although it is quite sudden, take this magic ring, which I made by myself, as a promise in advance. When the time is right in the future, we will have a grand ceremony that will be memorable for life.”

After he finished, he added another sentence, “This is the deepest bond and the best symbiotic contract.”

Athena’s heart was instantly filled with great happiness and surprise. Tears raced down her cheeks again. This time it was a sweet taste. Their lips and tongue were tightly intertwined, just like their two hearts.

After the affectionate kiss, the emotional couple almost couldn’t control it. Fortunately, Chen Rui finally restrained the desire in his heart. After all, Athena’s 20th birthday hadn’t arrived yet. He couldn’t ruin her best chance to advance to the Great Demon King because of his impulsive action.

After calming down for a moment, Athena’s low voice sounded, “During your trip to the Dark Shadow Empire this time… Did you meet her?”

“I met her once only.” Chen Rui didn’t want to reveal Christina’s identity. He just said that he met her at the palace before going to the Crystal Valley.

“Oh.” Athena didn’t probe further. It was as if she was just asking casually, so it was enough to hear an answer. But Chen Rui still heard the “dissatisfaction” in between her lines. I remember that this heroine once vowed solemnly to promise that she will not be jealous. She agreed to accept Christina as well as the little princess and Kia, but now…

“Don’t think too much,” Chen Rui shook his head and said, “Actually, it’s hard for me and her… to have any results.”

Athena was jealous when she talked about Christina just now, but suddenly there was a feeling of guilt again now. She felt like she was really a narrow-minded jealous woman. After all, even a self-disciplined person like her father had twelve wives. In comparison, Chen Rui indeed had so much less. She immediately added, “By the way, Kia… is very pitiful. When she and Princess Royal return from the White Feather Estate, let her come back to stay here.”

Chen Rui glanced at her in surprise, He felt guilty thinking that he had “provoked” other women even after having Athena. But at this point, it would certainly be impossible to abandon Kia. Fortunately, Athena had included Kia in the acceptable “inside” personnel; thanks to the Demon Realm environment.

He was smart enough not to say much about this matter. He asked a question to change the topic, “What’s the matter with the White Feather Estate?”

Athena’s answer caused Chen Rui to frown. Dark Moon, Red Spirit, White Feather and Blue Lava were the four major estates of the Fallen Angel Empire. White Feather Lord, Sicali, was an admirer of Princess Royal. He was also the biggest lord supporter of Dark Moon. This time, he invited Princess Royal to the estate for an official visit. One purpose was to show the attitude of White Feather to the capital, while the other was to give some assistance to the capital’s sanctions.

Chen Rui knew about White Feather Estate, but he didn’t know that Lord Sicali was actually an admirer of Shea. Chen Rui and Shea had a blurry relationship which was inclined toward a flirtatious feeling. Hence, when he heard of this now, he felt a little uncomfortable.

Athena had always misunderstood the relationship between Chen Rui and Shea, but she did not notice his slight emotional fluctuation at the moment. She just sighed, “Princess Royal does not know about Kia’s matter. In order to prevent her from taking the opportunity to do mischief in the estate, Shea specially took her to White Feather Estate. The affairs in the estate are handled by Old Gauss, Old Ford of Saiful Family and me. Your method is very effective. After the guards have undergone special training, they have eliminated several bandits. It is a remarkable change. The recruitment went smoothly too. It’s just that… some guys with excess energy will cause trouble from time to time. They even had a conflict with the imperial guards not long ago.”

Chen Rui noticed her tiredness when she came back today. He felt sorry for her and hugged her tightly. “I’m sorry that I made you overworked.”

Athena shook her head, “I’m happy to be able to help you. Plus, I grew up in a barrack since I was a kid. I like that kind of atmosphere.”

“Excess energy?” Chen Rui thought for a while. “Relax, I’ll find a solution.”

“En…” Athena moved comfortably on his chest. There were plenty more trivial troubles. But as soon as her man came back, it was like she had a backbone. The complicated things became simple.

This Sicali didn’t seem like a good guy 🤨… Would he bring surprise or disaster to the Dark Moon?

chapters.title: Chapter 307 - The Football Of The Demon Realm Version That Was Modified In The Midst Of Laughters
chapters.body:
Chapter 307 - The Football Of The Demon Realm Version That Was Modified In The Midst Of Laughters

Most of the barrack problems were caused by those guys with excess energy resulting from too much male hormone secretion. There had been several conflicts with the imperial guards who always had a tense relationship. They ended with severe injuries each time. Kaguron, Athena, and Arux still had considerable prestige, so no one was killed yet.

Vitality and vigour were also a kind of courage. It could be channelled but not blocked. Demons were inherently belligerent. If they could be strangled to death, they would not be called demons. Chen Rui’s method was inspired by the method in the novel he read previously ~ competitive sports.

In terms of team sports, nothing was more attractive than football. This was known as the world’s most popular sports. He believed that the confrontation and teamwork would also be recognized by this world.

So, two days later.

Except for the squad responsible for guarding the city gates and patrolling, the rest of the guards were all gathered in the barrack.

In the barrack, the representative sheriff, Athena, and the chief instructor, Arux, stood on the stage. After a period of intensive training, the garrison guards had completely submitted to the two supreme controllers. Their eyes were full of respect.

Athena said, “Those who clashed with the imperial guards 3 days ago, step forward!”

Those people did not hesitate; they stood out from the team together. Athena’s sharp eyes swept across these dozens of people. These guys bow their heads with guilt.

“Are you aware of your mistakes?”

These people knew that they were in trouble, so they were all mentally prepared to answer “yes” in unison.

Athena pointed to a minotaur, “You, tell me what is the biggest mistake?”

“Yes!” The minotaur replied, “We shouldn’t fight against the imperial guards. This violates the regulations of Madam Athena!”

Athena looked at the guards who were standing straight, “Tell me, is he correct?”

When everyone answered “Yes” simultaneously, Athena shouted, “No!”

“Their biggest mistake was not violating my regulations. It was the fact that 15 people failed to defeat 10 imperial guards. This is a humiliation of our garrison guards! Everyone tell me, should they be punished?”

Athena’s words made the garrison guards look at each other. Then, there was a hint of strange excitement on their face. Even the guys who stepped forward were of no exception. They exclaimed in unison, “Should!”

In fact, the progress of the guards had been very fast. In this fight incident, there were injuries to both parties. If it was in the past, 30 men couldn’t even fight against the imperial guards.

“After the dismissal, everyone will go to the military judge to get 20 strokes!” Athena asked again, “Everyone tell me, should we earn our reputation back?”

The voices of two thousand people off the stage sounded out in unison, “We should!”

“The garrison guards and imperial guards are the two sharpest scythes and the closest comrades in Princess Royal’s hands. The scythes should be stained by the enemy’s blood, not our own people!” Athena’s tone changed, “However, Demon Realm advocates the supremacy of the stronger ones. Even among our guards, there is a competition for survival of the fittest. If the leader can’t beat the soldiers, he will revert to an ordinary soldier too! I have obtained Princess Royal’s permission through magic communication. We will have a fierce battle competition with the imperial guards to decide the victory and defeat! Do you want to teach the imperial guards a hard lesson in front of everyone in the Dark Moon City? Do you want to be above the imperial guards in the future?”

Battle competition? This instigated the enthusiasm of the guards. All their faces showed excitement. They answered loudly and unanimously, “Yes!”

Athena nodded, “Next, Instructor Arux will explain the rules of this battle competition in detail.”

Arux bowed to Athena, stepped forward, took out a bizarre ball object, and began to explain. It was not easy to accept a new thing. He said a lot, but the people off-stage still didn’t quite understand. You can only step or hit this ball with your feet or head? And you still have to get it into the opponent’s box?

Too much theory was useless. The best way was to practice. Arux selected 22 soldiers and started the demonstration.

Then, accidents started to happen frequently.

Everyone chased the ball together without differentiating teams. Even the goalkeeper was no exception…

Fists, claws, horns and even teeth were used, but not feet…

The goalkeeper kicked the ball directly to the opponent’s goalkeeper at a distance of 100 meters due to the excessive strength. The opponent’s goalkeeper held the ball and threw it back to the opposing goal. The players in the middle could only stare at the ball in the air. Their head turned neatly to the left and right repeatedly…

The poor ball finally couldn’t stand the violent torture and burst on the spot…

The first football trial failed completely. It seemed that outright imitation would not work. It must be improved according to local conditions. It must have something unique to Demon Realm.

After thinking about it, Chen Rui improved the football. He greatly weakened the elasticity and engraved a magic circle that increased its weight and power consumption. It required considerable strength to be kicked.

A few days later, it finally seemed a bit plausible, but there were still accidents as usual.

An accidental header caused the ball to be penetrated, and it hung on the sharp horn. The minotaur was simple-minded. He thought since it was not a foul to use the head and feet, he just pierced the ball with his horn and charged rampantly. After knocking down all the people who were blocking him, including the goalkeeper, he “threw” himself into the goal and scored…

The opponent’s minotaur imitated that method. As a result, it turned into a rugby game. A minotaur who was piercing the football rushed toward the goal. Behind him was a large group of people who were pulling his arms, tripping his legs and grabbing his pants. In the end, this powerful minotaur charged into the goal with his bare butt…

In this case, a variety of weird and frivolous battle tactics emerged endlessly. For example, after kick-off, a group of strong men formed a circle and protected the ball in the center. Whoever came forward would get kicked away. Finally, this circle of men walked into the goal unstoppably…

A disgusting guy actually swallowed the ball with his talent. While others were not paying attention and were looking for the ball, he rushed all the way into the opponent’s goal and vomited out again. Fortunately, it was not by pulling…

The goalkeepers were not lacking in tricks either. When the opponent rushed toward him, he simply grabbed the crossbar of the goal and pulled hard. The whole goal was completely submerged into the land. Even the goal was gone. Lets see how you can score now?

In the end, Chen Rui, who was watching the competition on the sidelines burst into an enormous belly laugh. He couldn’t stand it anymore. He went back to continue improving it…

After numerous reforms, the first-generation exhilarating football of the Demon Realm version was finally officially created.

This ball was made by Chen Rui using Super System’s refine function and his mechanics. The texture, elasticity and sturdiness was extraordinary. It could be regarded as a master-level work.

This ball would absorb power. It required a lot of effort to kick it. When it crossed the goal line, it would also emit a flame-like light, representing victory.

The stadium was widened, and a simple magic circle was added to increase the gravity accordingly. The goal was also reinforced.

Even though they still encountered many problems after that, they were solved one at a time. The garrison guards who adapted to rule and the venue gradually fell in love with this aggressive battle ball sport.

Not only the garrison guards, but the imperial guards also began to try this sport under the lead of Commander Kaguron.

Under Chen Rui’s proposal, the garrison guard team and the imperial guard team had a competition that was not open to the public in the arena. The audience was only Old Gauss, Athena, Kaguron, others and some soldiers from both sides.

Since they had not been in contact with this sport for a long time, in addition to the exciting scenes, there were also many jokes made in the competition. Eventually, they were able to abide by the rules and played to the end. Finally, the garrison guards team won 10-6. The seemingly proud garrison guards held their heads high. At this time, Old Gauss took the opportunity to represent Princess Royal Highness to announce that there would be an open tournament in the arena a month later. At that time, tens of thousands of spectators would come to watch. The winning team would receive a generous prize of 50 high-quality armor sets.

When the fully confident garrison guards and the imperial guards who were unwilling to accept defeat heard the news, they were all high-spirited. They were determined to beat each other in front of all the Dark Moon spectators and show their pride once and for all.

The garrison guards who returned to the barrack looked unusually excited. The players were welcomed like heroes, and their morale was unprecedentedly high. More people began to actively study and participate in this sport. Even when the wide-sized barrack was divided into three football fields, it could hardly meet the increasing enthusiasm and needs of the guards.

Of course, this sport couldn’t completely replace the military training. With Chen Rui’s suggestion, Athena made corresponding adjustments to the training content and arrangements on normal days. Those with excellent performance and fastest progress could prioritize participating in battle ball activities.

Outstanding performers would serve as the garrison guards representatives. They would participate in the open competition with the guards in the arena a month later. As a result, the soldiers were more motivated. The results were remarkable.

The arena controlled by Arux had been inactive since the heroic deeds of No. 64 “Aguile”. Chen Rui launched the “battle ball” with the purpose of killing two birds with a stone. Besides solving the conflicts between the guards, it would also be the arena’s main profitable project in the future.

Old Gauss greatly admired Chen Rui’s mind. From the perspective of training, this sport includes strength, speed, stamina and gravity-adaptability training. More importantly, it will build teamwork; From an entertainment perspective, it is an exhilarating battle that can attract many enthusiasts for a long time; From the economic benefits perspective, this is a project that can promote the development of the surrounding economy and bring huge benefits. Not only that, this kind of activity is likely to cause all residents to follow and imitate in the long run. This can further improve Dark Moon’s combat strength and cohesion, which is more conducive to the Princess Royal’s ruling.

Since coming to the Dark Moon, this human has introduced so many innovations, and many of them are incredible. This time, he created this wonderful “battle ball”. Old Gauss felt fortunate that such a talent was on his side rather than his enemy. He was also thankful that Chen Rui had returned to the Dark Moon Estate after acquiring a series of promising genius titles. Why won’t the Princess Royal consider the marriage proposal?

After the success of the arena trial, the follow-up work was assigned to Old Gauss and Arux. Chen Rui did not focus on this aspect. After all, compared with the real plan, this was only a brief interlude.

Before rushing to Town Moling, he must explain to Shea face-to-face regarding some of the necessary affairs. The cooperation in the plan could possibly have some changes. He also had to somehow tell Kia about Freya.

At this time, unexpected news came from the Town Yankou at the south of the Dark Moon. Something strange happened in the cemetery of Town Yankou.

Cemetary… ghouls🧟♂️?

chapters.title: Chapter 308 - Undead Magic! Dark Clouds That Shrouded The Town
chapters.body:
Chapter 308 - Undead Magic! Dark Clouds That Shrouded The Town

Town Yankou used to be a famous ancient battlefield with countless corpses buried there. There was also a vast Heroic Spirit Cemetery. This time it was the Heroic Spirit Cemetery where many strange things happened. The tombs were excavated, and all the bones were stolen. Immediately after that, there was a series of missing residents in the town. The whole town was shrouded in a horror atmosphere. Due to the missing and fleeing residents, the population decreased sharply. Even the new guards sent there disappeared.

“It is said that some people have seen several walking skeletons outside the town, while some people have seen former acquaintances become unconscious zombies,” said Athena. “The people in Town Yankou are feeling panicky now. This matter must be resolved as soon as possible. ”

Sheriff was not only responsible for the security of Dark Moon City, but also for the safety of all areas in the estate. This should have been Chen Rui’s responsibility, but he could not make public appearances at the moment, so it became Athena’s shoulders.

“Zombies.” Chen Rui frowned. Although the zombies immediately remind him of incidents like the Raccoon City and the T virus, those were just the movie plots of the original world. In this realm, only the undead magic was related to the undead beings.

Even in Demon Realm, undead magic was not a popular magic. Generally, researchers would choose secluded places such as deep mountains and forests. It was rare to directly start in a densely populated area of an empire.

“There is no doubt that there must be a guy who is proficient in undead magic behind all these.”

Delia groaned, “As long as we get rid of this magician, then Town Yankou’s problem will be solved naturally.”

This sentence was agreed by everyone. Athena nodded and said, “Yes, I will now lead the guard to Town Yankou to find and kill this magician.”

“I’ll go with you.” Chen Rui, Delia and Roman said in unison.

Paglio said, “Delia, you have reached the crucial moment of advancing to the Great Demon King. I think you may break through at any time in the next few days, so you must stay. Roman, you should also stay and protect Delia, just in case. I am almost sick from staying in the Dark Moon lately. This time, I will accompany Athena and Chen Rui. With the master’s presence, the magician will become ashes with just a wave of hand.”

Due to [Soul Shackles], Delia’s advancement had been very challenging. She was stuck at the peak of Demon King for a long time. Roman was originally below her strength, but he had broken through to the Great Demon King now while Delia still failed to break through this hurdle. Fortunately, in the original underground cave of the Mellon Family, there was the wonderful Aurora Frost which made Delia one step closer to the breakthrough. As long as she could reach the Great Demon King, plus the role of IIlusive Shield, the danger of her [Soul Shackles] would be greatly weakened. If she could go beyond Broc’s level, [Soul Shackles] would disappear automatically, but this was very difficult. The best way was to kill Broc.

As soon as Roman heard that Delia had reached a critical moment of breakthrough, he immediately stopped insisting and agreed.

Therefore, Paglio, Chen Rui, and Athena set off with 50 guards to Town Yankou. One or two was actually enough to deal with the magician. The purpose of the guards following was to maintain the order of chaos. Arux stayed in Dark Moon City to continue to train soldiers and organize the battle ball training. In order not to affect Delia, they also brought along the boring Dodo and the little black horse who disliked Roman.

Initially, Delia and Athena wanted to name the Incubus Beast, but the Incubus Beast was used to hearing Chen Rui calling it “little dark horse.” It actually recognized this low-class name, leaving everyone quite speechless.

Chen Rui naturally would not use his true identity, so he camouflaged to look like a magician. Paglio’s identity was a swordsman. Both of them were generals from the Wales Family of Warlock Fortress.

4 days later, this team arrived in Town Yankou. Due to the economic depression of the Dark Moon City for decades, several towns in the country were generally poor and backward. They could not be compared with other estates. The population of Town Yankou was originally small, but after the incident, it was obviously more dilapidated.

The first thing Athena did upon entering the town was to find the Mayor Sheikh, a big fat Great Demon. The estate sheriff was equivalent to the real power figure after the lord, and the sheriff; even commanded an army. Mayor Sheikh was under the Saiful Family. Knowing Athena’s background, his attitude was very flattery. Athena was too lazy to chat with him, so she directly asked about the incidents in Town Yankou.

Sheikh was stunned. He seemed afraid to be blamed. He stuttered while talking about it. About two months ago, many graves in the Heroic Spirit Cemetery were excavated. According to the men sent there, those graves were dug inside out. It meant that the corpses were resurrected and came out of the graves by themselves. At that time, Sheikh wanted to report to the Dark Moon City, but Garrison Captain Seman stopped him, saying that further investigation was needed before reporting. Sheikh considered that Mellon Family and Saiful Family were fighting fiercely at that time. This matter might be used by Mellon Family, so he adopted Seman’s opinion. As a result, the situation intensified. Not long ago, even Seman himself disappeared. Sheikh didn’t dare to hide anymore, and he quickly reported to the Dark Moon City.

Athena frowned. Sheikh knew about the incident, but did not report it. He had an unshirkable responsibility. Although she was not good at politics, she also understood that the Saiful Family was a strong supporter of Princess Royal Shea. This was not the time to hold him accountable, but to kill the magician as soon as possible.

Athena did not stay in Sheikh’s mayor residence. Instead, she led the soldiers to move in the original defense station. At present, everyone in the town was insecure and panic-stricken. They desperately needed to calm the people’s hearts. According to Chen Rui’s opinion, they would split up and act separately. Athena gathered the original remaining guards in the town and arranged separate patrols to pacify the mood of the townspeople. Paglio went to the cemetery to investigate the situation. Chen Rui headed to the town to further collect information and learn more about the inside story.

When Chen Rui returned to the defense station, Paglio had already returned. According to the observation of the poison dragon, the Heroic Spirit Cemetery indeed had a breath of undead magic.

Moreover, the purity of that breath was very high. It was more powerful than imagined. Judging from Paglio’s experience, this magician was likely to have reached the Demon Emperor level.

Due to the age and inherited power that had not been completely digested, Shea’s strength was only the peak of the Great Demon King. She was weaker than the other three major lords. A Demon Emperor-level powerhouse was considered second to none in the Dark Moon Estate. No wonder he dared to openly start with a densely populated area.

Of course, this “second to none” excluded Paglio. With the effect of black potion and Aurora Frost, the poison dragon’s strength had recovered to the peak of Demon Emperor level. Plus his original Demon Overlord level combat experience and insights, he should have no opponents at the Demon Emperor level. Unfortunately, due to the ancient runes, Paglio could only stop here as he could no longer advance further. If the opponent was a Demon Emperor, it should not be a big deal if the poison dragon was present.

Chen Rui gained a lot of intel too. He used [Camouflage] and other methods to find out a lot of information. As the mayor, Sheikh’s reputation was not very good. There was corruption, bribery and bullying of the townspeople. Garrison Captain Seman wasn’t any better. He used cruel means. Those who offended him would be imprisoned in a secret black jail where there was basically no possibility of survival. If it wasn’t because the undead incident was too terrifying, the disappearance of Seman would make everyone applaud. According to the townspeople’s feedback, skeletons and zombies had appeared before in the north Black Rock Mountain and the west Rocque Mountain. Black Rock Mountain was still okay. Rocque Mountain was originally a haunted place in Town Yankou. Some brave people entered it previously, and none of them survived. No one dared to approach these two zones now.

Paglio nodded and said, “Eat some food first and take a break. Tonight we will split up. I will go to Rocque Mountain and Chen Rui will go to Black Rock Mountain! Put the skeletons made by the undead magician into his mouth!”

Chen Rui frowned, “I feel that this matter is not that simple.”

“Don’t complicate a simple problem. There is nothing to hesitate. Just catch the undead magician directly, and you will understand everything.” Paglio said disapprovingly. He immediately made a decision, “Athena is the head of the guard. She shall preside over here with Dodo. Just a mere undead magician. Chen Rui and I can solve it in the shortest time.”

As night came, a black shadow appeared in the woods at the foot of Black Rock Mountain. It was Chen Rui riding on the little black horse.

In order to be cautious, Chen Rui had already put on a set of equipment. He had always worn Thunderous Sound on his neck. The attribute that doubled the undead damage should play an incredible effect in this kind of battle.

At this moment, there was a sudden movement in the front. A set of white skeletons appeared within the two’s vision. It was immediately followed by another one. As more and more moonlight shone through the forest, it revealed a densely-packed, rugged land of bones. It was very creepy.

Race: Skeleton (Undead), Comprehensive Strength Assessment: E-. Physique: E-, Power: E, Spirit: F-, Agility: F.

The skeleton men felt Chen Rui and the little black horse’s non-undeath breath. They slowly surrounded him. The skeleton movement made piercing squeaks. Their comprehensive strength was early Intermediate Demon. This strength was useless to Chen Rui and Paglio regardless of its quantity. Chen Rui punched in the air and struck a skull in the front. Its body shattered suddenly, but its lower limb was still walking. However, it was quickly destroyed by the surging wave repercussions.

Chen Rui remembered that Paglio said that the undead magician liked to use huge-crowd strategy. It was best not to waste power and time in vain. He immediately urged the little black horse to go. He punched fists speedily along the way and smashed all the nearby skeletons. The speed of the little black horse was very fast. Before the skeletons approached them, they had dashed out of the enclosure and passed the woods soon.

Despite the ruggedness along the way, the little black horse was galloping like it was on the even ground. The mountain path of Black Rock Mountain had been completely occupied by undead. The combat power of these undeads were not strong. The highest zombie leader only reached the early stage of the Higher Demon, but the overwhelming number made Chen Rui secretly frightened. These undeads probably totalled to thousands of them. If they formed an army with their immortal characteristics and clashed with the Dark Moon’s guards. Even if the guards could win, they would suffer substantially.

Furthermore, thousands of undead were not necessarily the maximum limit of this magician. Once it reached a sufficient quantity or even quality, it was enough to threaten the safety of the entire Dark Moon Estate.

A zombie army? Was the magician someone from the capital? Or did he not belong to any faction?

chapters.title: Chapter 309 - Terror Knight And An “Old Friend”
chapters.body:
Chapter 309 - Terror Knight And An “Old Friend”

A dozen of floating figures stopped Chen Rui’s path at the foot of the mountain.

Race: Phantom (Undead), Comprehensive strength: D+. Physique: D, Strength: D, Spirit: D+, Agility: D+.

Chen Rui learned a lot about undead magic from Paglio, but it was the first time he saw phantoms. They were quite similar to the mythical ghosts from his previous life. He took a second look at them curiously. These phantoms looked like ordinary people, and their bodies were semi-transparent. Especially the part below the knee which did not seem solid; it looked very strange.

There was a mutated phantom leader who had reached C-, Demon King level. It was the first that drift toward Chen Rui. Its speed was very agile.

Chen Rui jumped off the little black horse and punched toward the phantom, but the fist seemed to hit the illusory figure and passed through. However, the phantom’s attack was definitely not illusory. As it skimmed over his arm, a faint blood stain appeared, and it was tingling. It seemed that the attack was poisonous. However, this mere poison had no effect on Chen Rui. Its attack could only cut a little skin.

Chen Rui attacked again with another punch. The punch did not miss this time. It felt like he had hit a piece of cotton or fabric, and the force couldn’t be exerted on it.

After the phantom was hit, it cried miserably. Its whole body twisted and vanished into thin air. It turned out that the blue electric sparks emitted from the fist was the additional effect of the Thunderous Sound. Together with the attribute of dealing 220%damage to the undead, this phantom leader was killed in one blow.

At the same time, a roar came from a room, “Which damn guy destroyed my mutated phantom leader?!”

The phantom was an undead transformed from a deceased person who had a strong spirit during his lifetime. It had a strong immunity to physical damage, and it was sometimes invulnerable. This was the case of Chen Rui’s first punch. Although the power of the second punch was weakened by half, the special effect of Thunderous Sound and the huge difference in strength between the two sides caused the phantom leader to be killed outright.

Mutated phantom leaders were rare, so this magician was very furious.

“Alahan, get this guy for me immediately! Even if he’s dead, I want his corpse!”

Beside him, a black-armored man nodded slightly and turned away.

After Chen Rui wiped out the phantom leader, he punched in succession to kill the phantoms that surrounded the little black horse because he feared that the little black horse would be hurt. He rode forward for a while. All of a sudden, the little black horse looked vigilant and stopped its pace.

A black figure appeared on the hillside in front of them. This guy was completely covered in black armor. Chen Rui could not see his true face. He was riding a horse which was also black. His dark eyes were emitting gruesome cold light.

Race: Terror Knight (Undead), Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B. Physique: B-, Strength: B+, Spirit: B-, Agility: B.

Race: Phantom Horse (Undead), Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C. Physique: C+, Strength: C, Spirit: D, Agility: C.

The terror knight was made from the special soul of a deceased and corpses. During his lifetime, he was a powerful knight. Due to some kind of willpower or curse, his soul could not be dissipated. Resurrected with the undead body, he used resentment and killing as the source of strength. He had strong strength and combat skill.

The terror knight was the highest grade creature that undead magic could produce. The achievements of the magicians who could create terror knights could be described as the top in undead magic. Particularly, the terror knight in front of him also had Great Demon King-level strength. This trip to Town Yankou with Athena seemed to be the most appropriate choice. Otherwise, she would encounter unpredictable danger.

The terror knight did not speak, and a spear appeared in his hand. He directly rode the phantom horse toward Chen Rui. This combination of an individual power and horsepower was very impactful. Chen Rui did not dare to take it head on, so he dodged with the little black horse.

With [Analytical Eyes]’s communication ability, his tacit understanding with the little black horse was very good. However, this kind of horse riding combat was indeed out of his league. The strength and quality of the terror knight himself had reached the peak of the Great Demon King. Plus the unity of the individual and horse, the impact was really not suitable for head on battle.

After the opponent evaded several times, a red light flashed in the terror knight’s eyes. He seemed to be mocking Chen Rui’s cowardice. Chen Rui waved his hand, the terror knight felt that his speed suddenly slowed down. The horsepower advantage could not be exerted, so he immediately pulled the rein and jumped off the horse. The spear in his hand had been replaced by a long sword, and he walked toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui did not retreat. He told the little black horse to leave, and he went toward the terror knight. The terror knight exuded delusive black mist. His originally slow movement suddenly accelerated a lot.

Weakening the effectiveness of magic? Is it a talent or magic? Chen Rui was secretly surprised. Before he could think much, the sword of the terror knight had slashed over with terrifying breath. It seemed that the effectiveness of [Decelerate] was greatly reduced. Chen Rui had not used [Aura Blade] yet. A rare sword appeared in his hand. The two swords clashed, and suddenly there was spark everywhere. Chen Rui took 4 steps back to stabilize his body, while the terror knight just swayed a little. After a while, it seemed that Chen Rui was indeed inferior in terms of strength.

However, the battle was not solely based on strength. Stridebug appeared at Chen Rui’s feet. Along with the acceleration of Thunderous Sound as well as the remaining decelerate effect on the terror knight, Chen Rui’s speed was obviously faster than his opponent other side. His long sword attacked the opponent like a storm. He had quite a style of aswordsman.

On the other side, the phantom horse also targeted the little black horse and rushed toward it. This time, the little black horse did not give way like the last time. Its body suddenly became the real figure of Incubus Beast.

“Incubus Beast!” The magician who was using magic to watch the battle from a distance exclaimed. There was ecstasy in his voice, “Incubus Beast will definitely make the best phantom horse! Even if only the skeleton remains, it is also the best quality material for skeletal warhorse!”

The little black horse’s transformation was completed in an instant. It collided with the phantom horse. The phantom horse staggered back and sent out a strange force of spiritual oppression. However, the little black horse was completely immune to spirit techniques. Similarly, due to the special characteristics of the undead, the little black horse’s [Terror] talent had no effect on the phantom horse. Nonetheless, the little black horse’s talent was more than just [Terror].

As the blue electric light flashed, a blue arc emerged around the phantom horse. Its movement was stiffened for a moment, while the little black horse had rushed over like the wind. It turned abruptly and made a back kick, hitting directly at the phantom horse’s abdomen and sending it far away. The phantom horse was shaky and barely stood firm. If it was an ordinary demonic beast, it might be seriously injured this time, but the undead had no pain. Therefore, after standing steadily, the phantom horse rushed toward the little black horse again. However, it was obvious that the phantom horse was suppressed in absolute disadvantage whether in terms of talent, attack or strength.

“Incubus Beast of mutated bloodline!” The undead magician’s voice was even more excited, “I must get it!”

Compared with the little black horse’s advantage, Chen Rui’s battle situation seemed to be more challenging. Although he was still faster than the terror knight, his swordsmanship was indeed far behind. The terrorist knight could hit him at key points with just a thrust. Chen Rui’s swordsmanship was taught by Athena. It was mainly based on some basic offensive and defensive movements as well as timing. This was still sufficient to deal with ordinary opponents. However, the swordsmanship of the terror knight in front of him was probably beyond Athena. Chen Rui was obviously not an opponent.

“Ding!” The sword in Chen Rui’s hand had been blown away, but this was a flaw he deliberately exposed. The real killing moved was the hand without the sword. With a glowing light, it slashed toward the terror knight’s head. The terror knight’s sword miraculously returned to his front again. The knight blocked horizontally, but it only stopped the physical palm. The invisible sharp qi had penetrated the long sword and swept past the terror knight’s neck.

The knight’s head suddenly flew up along with his head-armor. It fell to the ground with a “thud” sound, but no blood was spotted. While Chen Rui was stunned, the long sword in the hands of the terror knight, who had lost his head, twisted rapidly into a dark arc that shrouded himself. The terror knight was actually not affected at all.

Chen Rui teleported a step late, and blood had spattered from his arm. Then, an uncomfortable feeling came from the wound. It seemed like he was invaded by some corrosive force. Fortunately, he had a special physique. He soon dispelled that force.

At this moment, the scene suddenly became dark and foggy. A figure appeared from the dark fog. He was wearing a black cloak, and looked very eerie.

Chen Rui leaped and distanced himself from the terror knight. He motioned the little black horse to come back to his side. The terror knight did not chase. He walked to the side and picked up the head armor. There seemed to be nothing in it, but when the head armor was connected, it emitted a faint red light again.

Race: Corpse Necromancer (Projection). Comprehensive strength: B.

It turns out that this undead magician is a corpse necromancer. Plus, the one in front of me is a projection! Chen Rui suddenly felt a strangely familiar feeling.

“Who are you? You even broke into my forbidden land! If you want to survive, present me your Incubus Beast and submit to me!”

Chen Rui took a deep breath and quickly circulated the power of his body. It was this voice! It really is that “old friend”!

Not only this old friend was not a stranger to Chen Rui, but also to Roman, Delia and even Paglio.

Roman, Delia and Chem Rui got “acquainted” with him in the Silent Night Wetland, while Paglio had “intersection” with this old friend many years ago – 2000 years ago. The most outstanding master of dark magic, Guradam, the undead magic master!

2000 years ago, Guradam discovered the Fountain of Vitality in Silent Night Wetland and killed the original occupant to make it his secret training place. Unexpectedly, a more ruthless character came later to kill Guradam. The Fountain of Vitality’s underground caves served as a place for him to place his treasures. This “ruthless character” was Paglio. However, Paglio did not expect that Guradam, who was easily exterminated by him, could use the undead magic to fake death. Then, under the condition of being imprisoned in the treasure cave, Guradam took a great risk to transform his body into an undead corpse necromancer. As a result, Chen Rui nearly lost his life in the hands of Guradam while searching for treasures. Eventually, Chen Rui inflicted serious injury on Guradam with the resurrection potion and successfully escaped with the treasures.

Corpse necromancer, Guradam, was the director of the entire undead incidents in Town Yankou!

Poor Guradam had to face his nemesis again 😢.

chapters.title: Chapter 310 - Poison Dragon Vs Corpse Necromancer
chapters.body:
Chapter 310 - Poison Dragon Vs Corpse Necromancer

Although the strength of this projection was only a Great Demon King level, if he joined forces with the terror knight, it would probably be quite difficult for Chen Rui to win. Moreover, the real strength of Guradam was the Demon Emperor level. It was not what Chen Rui could contend with now.

However, Chen Rui was currently using a stranger face that Guradam did not recognize.

Chen Rui thought about it, bowed, and replied, “Dear undead magician master, I’m an investigator from Dark Moon City who rushed to Town Yankou in order to investigate the missing people in the town. The dead bodies in the cemetery should be enough to be used by the master. Why do you still need to abduct the powerless townspeople?”

“Investigator?” Guradam sensed that the enemy was at Great Demon King level. Just the projection and terror knight should be able to win over him easily. He sneered instantly, “Hmph! I just borrowed the dead bodies in the cemetery. As for living people, other than people who come by themselves like you, I have not planned to turn all living people into undead yet. But when my experiment is successful, I don’t mind turning the entire town or even the entire estate into an undead paradise.”

Chen Rui frowned. Guradam does not need to lie in this situation. So what happened to the missing population in the town, including Garrison Captain Seman?

As Guradam was about to speak, he suddenly sensed something. His facial expression changed dramatically while he shouted, “The altar at the west is destroyed by someone! Damn it!”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. Poison dragon should have succeeded.

“It must be your partner! How dare you destroy my most important life box recovery plan! I will tear you to pieces!” Guradam roared in rage. He pointed at the ground suddenly. A large number of terrifying arms emerged from the ground, grasping Chen Rui and the little black horse firmly.

Chen Rui once experienced this technique in Crystal Valley’s deathmatch. Although he was shocked, he did not panic. The little black horse appeared very frightened. It unleashed its talents, but it was unable to break free.

From Guradam’s words, Chen Rui heard some clues. It turns out that the corpse necromancer indeed suffered a greater injury than I imagined after being splashed by the resurrection potion last time; even affecting his soul essence in the life box.

So the reason why Guradam has done so many things in Town Yankou is probably to use the death and soul power of the ancient battlefield to restore the life box. But he will never expect that there will be an inevitable clash between opposing people. He met his old enemy again.

The corpse necromancer gritted his teeth and said, “No! I can’t just let you go! I want to make your body into the most despicable skeleton. Then, I will draw your soul out to accept eternal torment in the hell fire! Not only that, everyone in this damn town will be the funerary objects for destroying my plan!”

Guradam mumbled. The wind in the mountains suddenly became extremely cold. His body exuded a large amount of black mist that mixed with a faint light. It rose to the sky, forming a dark cloud. Even the moonlight became dim. Chen Rui could feel that this dark cloud was filled with enormous power of terror and evil.

“This is the strongest death spell I created by combining dark magic and undead magic, [Dark Hell]. It can devour the vitality of all living creatures in the range, turning them all into undead creatures! Even at the level of Great Demon King, you will not be able to survive! I want you to open your fearful eyes to see how these people become dried corpses, then I will slowly concoct you in the end!”

Guradam raised his hands to the sky, and the black clouds drifted slowly toward Town Yankou. At this moment, he suddenly heard a sound, “Guradam!”

Guradam was suddenly stunned as his real name was shouted. A strange mask suddenly appeared on the face of his enemy. Guradam seemed to see something unbelievable. His hands started trembling as he said in shock and anger, “You…”

As soon as his words sounded, the dark clouds drifting away in the air seemed to have encountered a strong attraction force; they quickly returned. The huge spirit and magic power poured into the mask like a tide. They became thinner instantly, and immediately disappeared without a trace.

The mask disappeared again, revealing a face familiar to Guradam. Chen Rui smiled and said, “Sir corpse necromancer, to be precise, his projection. It’s been a while.”

“It’s you!” Guradam shrieked. His hatred rose to the zenith instantaneously. This face was something he could never forget. In Silent Night Wetland, it was this guy who repeatedly destroyed my perfect plan. Eventually, he took away all the treasures. Even the life box is almost taken away by this person.

The reason why I came to the ruins of this ancient battlefield and worked hard to build the altar to recover the damaged soul essence is also this person’s fault!

His new and old hatred surged together. Guradam’s eyes glowed with intense red light, but he did not dare to act because black flames had come out of the other person’s body.
