He had already suffered a lot from the power of this flame in Silent Night Wetland. It was the nemesis of the undead power. Moreover, [Dark Hell] had almost exhausted the spirit and magic power of his projection just now. After it was totally devoured, he could not use any magic at the moment.

“Kill him!” Guradam issued an order to the terror knight. The terror knight immediately slashed his sword toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui’s hands were illuminated with white light. He launched a huge light ball to the terror knight. The terror knight sensed the destructive power of white light, but he didn’t manage to dodge. His sword glowed with red light, and he blocked horizontally with the sword. His body was pushed back by the huge pressure of [Aurora Shot], leaving an amazing trace on the ground.

While the terror knight resisted [Aurora Shot], Chen Rui jumped. His fist which was burning with Nirvana fire struck the corpse necromancer. The corpse necromancer could not cast magic. His spirt devouring power still existed, but this enemy had an extremely bizarre power. Even if Chen Rui did not have the terrifying black flame, Guradam dared not exert the devouring power. He remembered that he was almost trapped in the enemy’s consciousness territory last time.

The corpse necromancer did not dare to take the punch head on, so he immediately retreated. But how could the magician, who had lost all his advantages, be Chen Rui’s opponent in close combat? Suddenly, Guradam sensed a dangerous breath behind him. When he turned around, he saw that the other party had appeared instantly behind him; a punch penetrated his body. Although this form of corpse necromancer was originally not afraid of any physical attack, the black flame was an absolute nemesis. Plus the double damage to the undead added on the Thunderous Sound, this punch had caused a heavy damage to this projection. Chen Rui did not give him a chance to take a breather. He launched a series of attacks. The corpse necromancer who was hit by black fire screamed miserably.

When the terror knight struggled to use his sword skills to cut [Aurora Shot] in half, the corpse necromancer’s body was already covered with deadly flames, “Don’t think that destroying my projection can stop my actual body! I want to make the whole town… …”

Chen Rui was taken aback. The current Guradam was no longer the corpse necromancer confined to the treasure. After escaping from Silent Night Wetland, it was likely that he had already possessed or recovered many terrible means. Although Chen Rui devoured the projection’s [Dark Hell], this was incomparable to the territory that was desperately released by the corpse necromancer’s actual body last time in the treasure. It was likely that the Demon Emperor-level actual body had quite terrifying power.

Judging from the words before the projection was extinguished, Guradam’s actual body is likely to be near Town Yankou. He can even be in the town! Athena and Dodo are in town! I don’t know if Paglio has returned at this time. In any case, I can’t stay here any longer. I must return to Athena immediately!

Chen Rui thought of this, and he launched [Aurora Shot] continuously at the terror knight. When the terror knight parried and dodged, Chen Rui had rushed over to the phantom horse who was fighting with his little black horse. Chen Rui waved, and before Chen Rui touched the phantom horse, the sharp qi had struck it in the air with the speed of light. The phantom horse wailed, and its front leg seemed to be cut off by a sharp blade. Chen Rui no longer had the intention to keep fighting. He rode the little black horse and ran back with maximum speed.

The terror knight had much more experience in dealing with [Aurora Shot] this time. But when he skillfully used the force of his sword to remove that terrifying power, he saw the phantom horse limping and standing unstably. Meanwhile, the enemy had already rushed down the mountain speedily. The two red lights in the black head-armor flared as he thrusted his long sword on the ground ruthlessly, venting his anger toward the enemy’s cowardly escape.

Chen Rui had no mood to think about the terror knight’s thoughts. The swordsmanship and strength of the terror knight were very strong. It was by no means a victory he could achieve in a short time. The situation in Town Yankou was urgent, so he could no longer waste his time and power there. He must go back immediately!

Incubus Beast’s full speed running was very impressive. With Chen Rui’s attack, he killed his way out of the large crowd of skeletons, and rushed out of the woods. From a distance, the entire Town Yankou had been covered with a dark and gloomy mist. It looked particularly bewitching and mysterious.

Chen Rui was very shocked. The little black horse with intelligence understood his worries. Flames appeared at its hooves, and the speed increased again. It was like a lightning-like flame, burning towards the murky dark abyss.

They had already approached the black mist. These mists seemed to have the effect of enchanting and confusing one’s mind. The little black horse and Chen Rui were not affected, and they rushed straight in. The sight of the town made Chen Rui’s heart sink. The whole town was lifeless. There was not even a sound of barking. The guards and patrol soldiers had fallen to the ground. There were still some fallen figures in the streets in front. These people seemed to be breathing. They were only affected by the black mist and lost their consciousness.

Am I a step slower? Chen Rui felt anxious and rode the little black horse toward the defense station.

Since the devouring power of God-Eating Mask had been used once in Black Rock Mountain, he could only use it again after 7 days. Currently, he could only buy time by using the Nirvana fire and [Scorching Dragon Possession]. He was not sure if he could drag until Paglio was back.

Before he arrived, he felt the violent power fluctuations ahead. For a while, it was a terrible death atmosphere. The next moment, it was replaced by a bewitching and mysterious power. This power finally relieved Chen Rui’s anxious heart— It’s Paglio!

In front of the defense station, there was no one standing except for three figures.

Athena had switched into a fighting form with flames burning on her body. The [Blazing Eyes] that Chen Rui gave her recently was in her hand. Dodo stood on her shoulder while showing his teeth. He looked fierce, but it somehow seemed like putting a front.

The strongest collision was between two people. The black robe that was suspended in the air was Guradam’s body. Opposite him was a sturdy, black-haired man in a robe, Paglio. This time, the “old friends” 2000 years ago also met.

Guradam was killed abruptly by Paglio in the past. Guradam only remembered it was a huge dragon, but he hadn’t seen this human body yet, so he didn’t recognize Paglio. A huge blood-red scythe appeared in Guradam’s hands and cut toward Paglio. Paglio’s figure suddenly appeared in front of the high-speed scythe and pointed his finger. Before the strongest single unit attack of the dark magic, [Dark Moon Blood Scythe], could unleash, it was corroded quickly at the speed visible to the naked eyes. In the blink of an eye, the particles dissipated without a trace. At the same time, the figure of the poison dragon returned to his original position, as if he had not made any move.

“What power is this? Poison? Even the energy body condensed by magical elements can be corroded!”

Guradam was taken aback. He had never seen anyone cracking magic like this. Furthermore, the terrifying power was quite strange. This man’s strength is unfathomable. Even during my peak, I’m afraid I still can’t match with him. Such a powerhouse is rare even in an estate. Why did he come to this remote town?

Paglio said disdainfully, “Cut the crap! My least favorite thing is skeletons!”

Guradam grumbled, “The whole town is shrouded in my territory’s [Shadow of Death] now. I can draw all the vitality in it as a source of strength. You may not be able to beat me!”

The poison dragon didn’t say anything, but another voice sounded, “Guradam, I have devoured most of your spirit power. You even dared to court death now. You can’t escape this time.”

As soon as Athena heard Chen Rui’s voice, she was immediately delighted. She saw a figure burning with black flame appeared, then it was followed by a horse. The flame seemed to be the nemesis of the power of death. The surrounding black mist melted like ice and snow, and it could not be closed.

This familiar figure made the corpse necromancer show a strong hatred. He gritted his teeth and said, “Where’s my terror knight?”

“You better worry about yourself.” Chen Rui smiled confidently, “This time, you will not be as lucky as last time.”

When he mentioned last time, all the dark power in the corpse necromancer’s body surged with anger, “Hand over the treasure! I can give you a quick death. Otherwise, you will not escape the power of the [Shadow of Death] even with the protection of this man!”

As soon as Paglio heard the word “treasure”, he was instantly interested. His eyes glared at Chen Rui, this cunning and greedy human actually got another treasure. He even wanted to hide it from me, Master Paglio!

Chen Rui knew the temperament of the poison dragon very well. At first glance, he knew what the dragon was thinking. He said calmly, “This skeleton is talking about the treasure of Silent Night Wetland. Do you understand now?”

Paglio had a sudden realization. Treasure and corpse necromancer. So that’s the case!

Meanwhile, Guradam was still threatening at this side, “I’ll give you the last three seconds to consider. Hand over all of my treasure!”

As soon as he finished saying it, the corpse necromancer suddenly felt a strong murderous intent. It actually originated from the mysterious man. The man gritted his teeth and asked, “Your ‘treasure’?”

Would Guradam still be afraid of his ‘weakened old friend’?

chapters.title: Chapter 311 - The Ancient Undead Magic System
chapters.body:
Chapter 311 - The Ancient Undead Magic System

Paglio pointed to the sky, and all the black mist began to change color quickly. It gradually changed from the original dark black to a dire green. This was not just a color change, but the suppression and erosion of the territory power. Guradam felt that his territory power was swallowed by countless terrifying demonic beasts, and began to shrink quickly. A strong recoil force was produced in the process of shrinking, which rendered Guradam howling in pain.

Chen Rui had brought the little black horse to Athena. When he saw Paglio demonstrating his power, he felt contempt for a while. This dragon has a trigger point that will make him rage when touched. The poison dragon’s trigger point right now is none other than his treasures. What a damn dragon who loves wealth like his life!

If Guradam’s soul essence was not injured, and if his projection’s spirit power was not devoured, he would not be so easily defeated. Unfortunately, there were not so many “ifs”. His territory had been completely eroded by Paglio’s poison power, and he was trapped in it instead. He could only reluctantly use his remaining magic power to create a protective area in order to get a chance to breathe.

Chen Rui shook his head and sighed, “I forgot to introduce him to you. This greedy… Uhm, this powerhouse who is good at financial management is the real owner of ‘your’ treasure, Paglio.”

The two red lights in Guradam’s eyes suddenly froze and landed on the man who was pointing at the sky. It was as if he saw something unbelievable. If he was still a living person, he would surely be sweating profusely.

Paglio lowered his hand and grinned at Guradam. A powerful dragon breath was released. Although this dragon breath was not an absolute suppressing force for Guradam, the matter proved by this dragon breath was enough to make Guradam tremble.

Guradam’s body started shaking. As an undead magician who transformed himself into a corpse necromancer, he was already immune to spiritual magics such as fear and chaos, but at this moment, he was terrified from the bottom of his heart.

This man is a giant dragon! And it was the terrifying giant dragon who squeezed me to death easily like an ant in the past! Over the years, although I have always cursed this opponent who killed me, I am even more fearful of him. I never thought that I am actually facing this terrifying enemy again!

“Paglio, this guy is somehow the most outstanding undead magician 2000 years ago. It’s a pity to kill him. If he surrenders, we might as well let him live.” Chen Rui took the opportunity to say. Guradam’s ability is magnificent indeed. If we can subdue such a powerful undead magician, he will probably play a key role in future battles. The production of undead army alone is enough to deter the enemy.

Guradam was not an ordinary character after all. He had recovered from the shock and gritted his teeth, “Even if you wipe out my body now, I will never die as long as my life box still exists. When I recover my strength, I want to turn the entire Dark Moon Estate into a land of undead!”

“It doesn’t matter even if you turn the entire Fallen Angel Empire into an undead kingdom.” Chen Rui deliberately made an unconcerned look and laughed, “Do you naively think that I… am really a so-called estate investigator? Let me tell you, I tracked you all the way here! Otherwise, why would I bring the dragon that you are most afraid of?”

“Impossible! How do you know that I’m here?”

Paglio said, “There’s no need to ramble on with him. This skeleton has a white bone altar in the west. There should also be one on the mountain in the north. This is an ancient ritual sacrifice of the dead where he can use the dead spirit aura to recover his soul essence. So, his life box must be in the area of this town. It might even be in the town. When his body is destroyed, let’s ruin his life box. We’ll see if this nasty skeleton can still jump around!”

Guradam was absolutely terrified. I didn’t expect the other party to see the role and origin of this ritual at a glance. He also inferred the general location of my life box. He is indeed a horrifying dragon.

“Guradam, you have no choice now,” Chen Rui had an idea, “I have three methods that can completely destroy your life box immediately. First, Paglio can completely infiltrate the entire town with his poisonous territory.This can destroy everything within tens of miles, including your life box. You have also seen the second method. I can use space magic to swallow the whole town and then banish them into the space turbulence. You should know that I have this ability. The third method…”

“Remember the ‘water’ previously? It is called Fountain of Resurrection which can cause fatal harm to your soul essence.” A strange spring water suddenly dripped from Chen Rui’s hands. The breath of vitality made the corpse necromancer instinctively feel uncomfortable. “In this method, I will permeate these into the land. Then, I’ll cast a secret technique to form a special territory that can destroy all undead power within 100 miles, including the soul essence in your life box!”

Guradam’s body began to tremble again. I must admit that none of these three methods is to frighten anyone. Once the other party is determined to destroy me, I’m afraid that I can not escape from death. In fact, Chen Rui’s three methods were really bluffing. With Paglio’s current Demon Emperor-level power, he couldn’t really create a poisonous territory, and the cost was too high. Even if the whole town’s lives were sacrificed, it might not be successful.

The second method was also unreliable. Space magic was basically a storage space. As for the space turbulence, it was purely bragging. Chen Rui actually heard this term from Samuel.

The third method was even more bullshit. The Fountain of Resurrection and the Resurrection Potion were completely different concepts. The Fountain of Resurrection might have a certain suppression effect on Guradam, but it was not as strong as a Resurrection Potion. Moreover, the Fountain of Resurrection was only the size of a hole. It was impossible to permeate the whole town.

Chen Rui added another sentence, “Perhaps I will have some ridiculous kindness to let go of your life box in order not to sacrifice the innocent lives in this town?”

This sentence left Guradam completely thoughtless. I am a vicious and merciless person myself. If I put myself in his shoes, I would never give up an enemy who might be a great threat because of the lives of some ants. Furthermore, the dragon is obviously a ruthless character. This can be seen when he killed me without giving me any chance to explain in Silent Night Wetland 2000 years ago.

Guradam suddenly laughed. His hysterical laughter was filled with sorrow and despair, “I didn’t expect that I, Guradam, survived Silent Night Wetland, but I have to die in this place instead! But it’s too early for you to be happy. The magic circle with a destructive curse is engraved on my life box. Once it is detonated, the epidemic and curse will spread around, with this town as the center, until the entire estate. You will also be cursed by my last soul power. Then, [Doom] will accompany you for life until you die!”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. This guy actually still has the final strategy of mutual destruction. I have personally experienced [Doom] before. If we are entangled by this nasty magic all our life, it is indeed quite troublesome. Not to mention that the life box explosion will also cause a large-scale disaster to the Dark Moon Estate. I must not let this happen.

In fact, both sides were afraid of each other now. Guradam was afraid that the threat of the [Doom] curse was not enough to let the other party give up their killing intention. As for the epidemic disaster, it was nothing significant for these people. It couldn’t be used as a threat at all.

“Even if what you said is true, you can’t threaten me.” Chen Rui sneered, “I know a human powerhouse in the capital named Nero. He is a priest of the human world’s Light Divinity Temple who has reached Demon Overlord level. He could surely think of a way to dispel this curse! But I’m very surprised. A corpse necromancer has a long life. You took a lot of risk to transform into corpse necromancer, and you succeeded with great difficulty. If you self-detonate, it is equivalent to taking the initiative to let go of the immortal body after obtaining with great difficulty. Is it worth it?”

Guradam actually didn’t want to die. Chen Rui was right. He risked his life in order to successfully transform himself into an undead. With the endless life, he could further study and develop the undead magic that he loved. He was absolutely unwilling to die in this place.

When the corpse necromancer heard the other person talking about the human holy priests, his heart suddenly sank. Holy Magic was actually an effective means of restraining his curse. Plus, the human was a strong Demon Overlord, but Guradam still said without any signs of weakness, “I created a separate undead magic system within the dark magic. I can be deemed as the most outstanding undead magician in Demon Realm’s history. How can I succumb to you, brutal and shameful brats! Moreover, I don’t believe that a human holy priest will appear in the Demon Realm! Not only [Doom], I will do everything to curse you before I die!”

Chen Rui could see that Guradam already assumed he had come to a dead end. If I continue to force him, we will surely die together, but if I slacken at this moment, then this guy will immediately run away. He will retaliate against Town Yankou and even the entire Dark Moon afterwards. He will never make the same mistake of leaving the life box in a dangerous situation again next time.

An undead magician enemy who was hidden in the dark and couldn’t be killed was indeed quite a headache. Plus, he was also a Demon Emperor level. He was in a dilemma at that moment.

Athena was secretly anxious to hear that the disease and curse would spread on Princess Royal’s estate, but out of trust in her man, she did not say anything. However, the poison dragon did not intend to let go of Guradam. He revealed an impatient look, “Stop talking nonsense to him. First, we will shatter this pair of skeletons. Then, just let his life box explode. With the protection of me, the master’s territory, any kind of shit curse will not hurt you guys.”

Just after hearing the words of the poison dragon, Guradam was even more hopeless in his heart. When he was about to detonate the magic circle desperately, a voice sounded suddenly, “Funny guy, let me tell you something before you die! You’re definitely not the most outstanding undead magician of Demon Realm. Plus, the undead magic system has already existed in ancient times. What you know now is just the tip of the iceberg!”

Guradam was furious. This was his proudest glory. He had surpassed all predecessors who studied undead magic 2000 years ago, and raised undead magic to an unprecedented height. Within these 2 years, undead magic stayed at the level of his research; with no further advancement. This enemy is questioning my greatest achievement now. This is simply unbearable!

When Chen Rui saw Guradam’s irritability, he knew that he had successfully diverted the attention of the other party. He then said, “I received the inheritance of an ancient grand master and learned a lot of secrets. Undead magic is indeed derived from dark magic, but it belongs to a separate system. Its power is no less than that of dark magic! It is similar to the separate space magic which is derived from the water element and the wind element! Unfortunately, for various reasons, it is not passed on today. Moreover, the related classical records have disappeared over time.”

Guradam’s eyes flashed in red. He was apparently a little surprised. He had studied undead magic all his life, but he had never heard of this so-called secret story. He was about to refute it, but the other party continued, “From what I have learnt, the undead magic system is divided into three categories. The first is the summon and transform category; the second is the curse category; the third is the bone and poison category. Each category has many magic branches. I can reveal two types. There is a type of magic in summon and transform category that can transform the skeleton into a skeletal magician that releases elements. It can release a powerful long-range elemental attack. The bone and toxin category has a [Bone Armor] that surrounds the body. It utilises a profound rotation rhythm and dead spirit power to offset, weaken and absorb all attacks from outside.”

Guradam was an expert in undead magic, so he knew that these two kinds of magic were completely feasible when he first heard it. The other party did not create some crazy nonsense.

This so-called three categories of elements originated from a classic game that was popular all over the world. It was one of Chen Rui’s favorite games in that world. Among them, there was the role of necromancer. Chen Rui just made slight modifications to the skills and described them. It really aroused Guradam’s interest.

According to Chen Rui’s understanding, the origin of power developed to be the same in the end. It was just the expression was different. Magic is a form of expression. As long as there was creativity and understanding, the imagined magic might be put into practice. This was also the magical derivation, innovation, and improvement of the 6 major elements: earth, water, fire, wind, light and dark.

Guradam’s current research had actually reached a peak. In other words, he had reached a bottleneck. It was very difficult to progress and innovate. Hearing this statement, his eyes lit up. He felt that the narrow road suddenly became spacious and full of countless possibilities. He was greatly intrigued suddenly. After careful consideration, he desperately wished to find a place to study this quietly. He hastily asked, “What else?”

Chen Rui saw that Guradam was tempted, so he knew, With Guradam’s arrogance, insidiousness and viciousness, if he is forced to submit to me, it may be counterproductive. It’s better to change another approach. Tempt him with benefits first, and then use both hard and soft ways.

“Sir Guradam, you should know that there are no free things in this world. The more so-called free things, the higher the price you need to pay. You have heard the content of two ancient undead magic for free. I think it is time to discuss the price next. Or should I say, can our original hatred relationship be changed by some kind of cooperation?”

I couldn’t wait to see Guradam being cheated by Chen Rui 🤣

chapters.title: Chapter 312 - Subordinate
chapters.body:
Chapter 312 - Subordinate

“I have to admit that the story you made is tempting, but it’s not enough for me to believe it.” Guradam changed his mind and sneered, “If you said that you saw these two ancient magics from a lost classic, I might still believe you. However, don’t you think it’s ridiculous to inherit from the ancient grand master?”

“As I said, just kill him. Why bother to ramble on with this ignorant skeleton?” Paglio interjected disdainfully.

“Be patient, my partner.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I just want to find a person who can revive the glory of the ancient undead magic. Give him the time to make his final choice.”

Partner? Paglio’s attitude and Chen Rui’s words shocked Guradam secretly. This guy turns out to be a dragon knight? But the strength difference between the two of them is too huge; how is it possible? From the tone of the dragon, the ancient grand master matter doesn’t seem to be deceiving…

“Remember how your life box was damaged?” Chen Rui intended to speed up the process. He took out a bottle of black potion and unplugged the stopper. “Or should I say, do you know what potion is made out of the Fountain of Resurrection?”

The breath of the black potion made Guradam tremble. Yes, it was this terrifying potion. At that time, my soul essence was severely injured with unimaginable effects! Wait, the previous one was Fountain of Resurrection, then…

“Resurrection Potion!” Guradam blurted out with a great shock in his heart.

He finally confirmed his long-standing suspicion. What kind of poison can cause such a severe harm to the soul essence in my life box? It is actually the black potion that has been lost for 7,000 years. Adding the 2,000 years in Silent Night Wetland, it should be almost 10,000 years!

Not only that, even Rosenberg, the famous pharmacy grand master more than 9,000 years ago, was said to only reach the Eternal series potions. The Resurrection Potion which represents the highest achievement of pharmaceutics appears in the enemy’s hands now!

Other than the inheritance of the ancient grand master, the corpse necromancer could not find a more reasonable explanation.

Once this guy announces his achievements in pharmacy, he will shock the entire Demon Realm and become the most well known grand master level character.

But Guradam didn’t know that Chen Rui’s other identity, the trio-specialized mechanic master, had already shaken the whole Demon Realm.

Guradam’s gaze to Chen Rui had slightly changed. Demon Realm’s first grand master pharmacy in 10,000 years has gotten the inheritance of the ancient grand master… No wonder even the powerful dragon recognized him as a partner. So that ancient undead magic element is true? So…

His remark of reviving the glory of the ancient undead magic is not a lie!

Guradam felt that there was a fiery enthusiasm in his heart. His previous intention to die had already been reduced by half. If I can inherit the ancient undead magic element and develop it to a greater height, then I will truly become the first undead magician of all time.

After a moment of silence, Guradam finally made a choice. Now that he had been forced to a dead end, he would not be able to die together even if he self-exploded. It would only be a worthless death. Moreover, the ancient undead magic element was too tempting for him to remain unmoved.

“Powerful dragon, I can sign a contract with you.” Guradam murmured, “Not the master-servant contract, but the equality contract. According to the guy, we can have a cooperative relationship.”

“In your dreams!” Paglio snorted coldly while exuding a murderous intent, “Skeleton, you are not qualified to mention the “equality” with the present situation! If it wasn’t for my partner’s sake, I would’ve already destroyed you. I, the master, hate the stubborn guy the most. Since you are so persistent, then…”

As soon as his words ended, the power in the poison dragon’s territory suddenly doubled. The oppressive force made the corpse necromancer’s defensive circle smaller and smaller. In fact, Paglio was also a cunning guy. Knowing that Chen Rui had other plans, his tough attitude was just to cooperate with Chen Rui by playing the role of a bad guy.

If it was the previous corpse necromancer with the determination to choose death over dishonor, he was likely to explode the life box entirely. However, with the intimidation and temptation of Chen Rui and Paglio now, the idea of survival in Guradam’s heart occupied a dominant position. It was difficult to revert to the previous death-insisting mentality. He quickly said, “Subordinate contract! This is my last bottom line. My life is longer than the dragons. I can spend endless time studying the undead magic. I will not let any accident discontinue this.”

The subordinate contract was a high level contract; it was second only to the equivalent contract. It was equivalent to the restrictive relationship between a ruler and the ministers. If the two parties signed the contract, the subordinate, Guradam, could have his own will. He still had to obey and couldn’t betray the general orders. However, Paglio couldn’t control Guradam’s life and death. Once Paglio was dead, the contract would be terminated. It would not be like the master-servant contract where the master could control the life and death of the servant. Moreover, if the master dies, the servant would also die.

Paglio showed a deep pondering look. He looked at Chen Rui’s gaze and replied, “Alright, but your contracting party is not me. It’s him.”

“Him?” Guradam was taken aback. If I signed a subordinate contract with the powerful dragon, I can still accept it. However, this guy is just a Great Demon King. By the way, he was only a Demon King last time…

Guradam remembered it vividly. Last time, this person had not reached the Demon King’s peak level. How did he reach the Great Demon King so quickly? The time in between…

“Yes, it’s me.” Chen Rui knew the reason why Guradam hesitated, “I’m the inheritor of the ancient grand master. Similarly, I am the only one in the entire Demon Realm who knows about the ancient undead magic element.

In fact, it is beneficial for you. My life is definitely not as long as the dragons. Even if I die at an old age, your contract time is only a few hundred years.”

Guradam thought about it quickly. His last sentence is right. If I sign a contract with the dragon, I will probably submit for tens of thousands of years, while the time is definitely much shorter if I sign the contract with this “demon”. Moreover, this person has inherited the teachings of the ancient grand master. At least, he is already a pharmacy master. His potential is quite terrifying. In just a few months, he has soared from the Demon King level to the Great Demon King level. He is very likely to be a Demon Overlord powerhouse in the future, so it is not considered a humiliation. Judging from my current passive situation, signing a contract with this person is the most perfect result.

Eventually, Guradam made up his mind and signed a subordinate contract with Chen Rui. Poor corpse necromancer didn’t know that he was tricked. Due to the symbiotic contract, the time of this subordination would be at least tens of thousands of years under normal circumstances.

However, Chen Rui hadn’t really made long-term plans for thousands of years or tens of thousands of years. He would deal with future matters when the time comes.

As a condition for signing the contract, the corpse necromancer proposed to transform Town Yankou into his own experiment base. It used to be an ancient battlefield with many powerful dead souls and corpses. The terror knight with great swordsmanship whom Chen Rui encountered was actually transformed from the corpse of a rare powerhouse. Guradam originally had two of such top-level terror knights, but the one who was guarding the altar in the west was killed by Paglio.

After Chen Rui pondered for a long time and discussed with Athena for a while, he agreed. Originally Town Yankou was a remote town which was barren and undeveloped. Chen Rui and Shea had already planned to rebuild the towns in the estate. Town Yankou was one of the places that needed to be migrated in the plan. This requirement seemed difficult, but in fact, it was just making use of the favourable situation to push the matter through with little effort.

After the contract was signed, the Super System’s spiritual link added another subordinate contract. This contract was somewhat similar to Samuel’s Blood Oath of Light which could be disconnected and cancelled.

Now that the subordination relationship had been determined, Chen Rui no longer kept Guradam on the tenterhooks. He revealed the necromancer’s skill systems in Diablo 2 based on his memory.

This used to be one of his favorite games, so he recalled the information vividly. Some of them had been modified appropriately. For example, the summon and transform category included skeleton soldier, zombie, phantom, skeleton magician, terror knight, and so on. He also added the phantom dragon from the Heroes of Might and Magic (This was already used in Mountain Xilang anyway). He omitted the vampire, golem and other similar beings due to some reasons.

Some things in the curse category overlapped with the dark magic, so Chen Rui selectively increased or decreased a part of it. As for the bone and poison category, he explained the [Bone Armor], [Bone Prison], [Poison Explosion] and [Corpse Explosion] in detail.

This complete magic system had brought great inspiration to Guradam. Some of the magic and attack forms were outrageous, but some could be realized without taking too much time. Meanwhile, some could be further improved and innovated. The two red lights in the corpse necromancer’s eyes gleamed. His heart was originally upset because he was forced to sign the subordinate contract, but he put it aside instantly. He wished to start experimenting immediately.

However, the most important thing at the moment was to recover the soul essence in the life box.

After the territory disappeared, the mist of the town gradually dissipated. The unconscious people gradually woke up and returned normal again.

However, some things needed to be clarified.

In the mayor’s mansion, Mayor Sheikh was sitting on the ground. He was shivering badly, and his clothes were soaked in cold sweat.

Opposite Sheikh was a skeleton dressed in a robe whose eyes glowed with a gloomy red light. His cold voice carried a hint of creepy joy, “This fresh body is very high in fat and quite good. It’s just nice as an experiment subject for studying the [Corpse Explosion] technique.”

When Sheikh thought of the legendary frightening experiment of the undead magicians, he hastily crawled to the side of Athena while trembling, “Madam Athena, I will say it all! I beg you. For Saiful Family’s sake, don’t let me become the experiment subject of this sir undead magician!”

Athena looked disgusted while Chen Rui stepped forward, blocking in front of Athena. He shouted, “Hurry up! What is the truth about the disappearance of the townspeople and Seman?” As Sheikh lowered his head, his eyes were rolling. Obviously, he was thinking of an idea. Guradam’s cold voice sounded, “It can be seen that this fat pig is a stubborn type. There’s no need to ask anymore. I will extract his soul later and we will know the answer.”

Who is the stubborn type? Sheikh was so scared that he almost peed in his pants when he heard the soul extraction. How would he dare to lie any more? He immediately revealed everything.

It turned out that as the mayor all these years, Sheikh, relying on his background of the Saiful Family, had ruled Town Yankou with his partner-in-crime, Garrison Captain Seman, with bloody and violent means. In this remote place, he was like a local emperor.

One day a few years ago, several townspeople accidentally discovered a green crystal mine in the west of Rocque Mountain. Sheikh identified it as a rare magical material, jade ice crystal. After exploration, Rocque Mountain was rich in jade ice crystal minerals. In order to keep this huge fortune to himself, Sheikh not only did not report this matter to Dark Moon City, he even sealed the news and killed all the people who first discovered the minerals.

However, this incident was discovered by Garrison Captain Seman. Sheikh also knew that he could not own the huge wealth by himself. Hence, he simply got Seman to join him. The two shared the wealth together. Many townspeople who committed petty wrongdoings, or even did not commit any crime at all, were imprisoned and controlled by Seman under various pretexts. They were forced by brutal means to go to Rocque Mountain to mine minerals which were then sold to the two great estates, Blue Lava and Red Spirit, through various channels. In the past few years, nobody knew how many lives were killed. Every piece of jade ice crystal mine that shipped out and every black crystal coin in both of their pockets were covered with blood and howling.

In order to conceal Rocque Mountain’s black mine from outsiders, the two also fabricated an excuse that the undead appeared in the Rocque Mountain. They spread the rumors, making it a “haunted land” that no one dared to approach.

The fish which nibbled at every bait would be caught. Unexpectedly, a powerful undead really appeared in Rocque Mountain. This affected the two people’s long-term financial source, and they were unable to find a solution.

At this time, Athena took over as sheriff and vigorously restructured the defense forces. Garrison Captain Seman was asked to return to the Dark Moon City. Seman secretly thought that if he returned this time, the jade ice crystal mine would probably be monopolized by Sheikh in the future. So, he proposed a huge sum of money as compensation at that time. Firstly, Sheikh was not willing to pay the huge sum. Secondly, he was afraid that Seman would repeatedly blackmail or even report the matter directly. Thus, he simply killed Seman by poisoning him. He then announced to outsiders that Seman was missing and put the blame on the mysterious event of the undead appearance.

Sheikh couldn’t get over the jade ice crystal mine in Rocque Mountain all this while. He could not destroy the undead even though he had sent people there several times. Only then he reported to the Dark Moon City. He wanted to use the power of Dark Moon City to clear the undead, so that he could control the treasure mine again.

“Thump!” After listening to the truth, Athena couldn’t help containing her anger, and slammed the black stone table. The solid stone table suddenly shattered, and Sheikh felt terrified witnessing this.

“Madam Athena, since he has told the truth, he doesn’t have to do the experiment subject of [Corpse Explosion] anymore.” Chen Rui walked to Guradam and looked at Sheikh, who thought he was spared from the ordeal. Chen Rui suddenly smirked, “However, Mr. Guradam, don’t you think the most suitable experiment for this fat pig is decomposing zombies?”

Guradam nodded and smiled wickedly. A red light flashed in his eyes. Sheikh screamed in horror at the words of decomposing zombies before he fainted to death.

Guradam really thought he had made a good deal, but it was still under Chen Rui’s control.

chapters.title: Chapter 313 - Duo Dance Under The Moonlight
chapters.body:
Chapter 313 - Duo Dance Under The Moonlight

The next day, the townspeople of Town Yankou received 1 good news, 1 bad news, and 1 possibly good news.

The good news was that the brutal mayor had finally died accidentally under the hands of the undead. The bad news was that because it was an ancient battlefield, Town Yankou had been eroded by the undead breath and the strange undead power,so it became a cursed land which was no longer suitable for living.

The last news was that Princess Royal, the Lord of Dark Moon City, ordered to seal Town Yankou with a magic circle to avoid the spread of the cursed land. The original townspeople migrated collectively to the southern Town Soto, and each household was appropriately compensated. Although many people were reluctant to leave their homes, they had no choice but to leave because Town Yankou had always had “haunted” issues and now there was even a curse by the undead.

Mayor Sheikh must be severely punished. As Sheikh was backed by the Saiful Family, they used the undead disaster to give him a chance to “die in the line of duty” in order to avoid possible internal conflicts. In fact, Chen Rui kept his promise to let Guradam handle Sheikh. He would definitely not be the subject of the [Corpse Explosion] experiment. Old Gauss immediately arranged the corresponding manpower and transport demonic beasts to come to assist after receiving Chen Rui’s news. Old Gauss even completed the settlement work in Town Soto in advance, while Athena also brought in more guards to maintain safety and order. The migration work was carried out in an orderly manner.

According to the news from Old Gauss, Princess Royal and the others would soon return to the Dark Moon City, accompanying by Kia. When thinking of Kia, Chen Rui’s original affection became a mental burden because Freya’s matter had been suppressing his heart. Whatever ought to happen, will happen sooner or later. I better think of ways to console Kia.

After the townspeople completely left Town Yankou, Chen Rui and Paglio started to work on the “seal”. In fact, they set up the Dragon Inscription and the magic circle to isolate the corresponding area of Town Yankou from outsiders. They repaired the original bone altar that was destroyed, helping Guradam to speed up his soul essence recovery.

As Guradam’s affairs involved the poison dragon and many secrets, it was not suitable to report Shea for the time being, so the jade ice crystal mine in Town Yankou remained sealed first. At least, it must wait until Guradam’s soul essence was fully recovered. Chen Rui’s request for Guradam was simple. Chen Rui would not disturb him on normal days, and Chen Rui would support his experiment as much as possible without damaging the general interests of the estate and civilians. Once the corpse necromancer was needed, he must go all out.

If the undead power of the ancient battlefield could be fully utilised, then Guradam would be able to create a magnificent undead army, which was enough to match the military power of the entire Dark Moon Estate. Plus the undead power, it would definitely be a powerful secret weapon.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of a matter. I have the Tauren and the Medusa tribe of Mountain Xilang, the West road defense forces under Tim, the earth elemental army, the Cloak Gang, and the undead army of Guradam who is now my veritable subordinate. With the help of Paglio, Roman, and Delia, this strength is quite powerful even for a major estate lord. If I want to replace Shea with the absolute force advantage to become the lord of Dark Moon, it wouldn’t seem hard right?

However, Chen Rui didn’t want to do this kind of laborious and silly matter. He witnessed Shea’s hard work and pressure all this while. Sometimes, the battlefield without blood was more terrifying than the real life-and-death battle. You don’t even know when the “comrades” behind you would betray you. For example, Blue Lava Estate who called brother was an ungrateful wretch. He kept playing a good guy role, but he stabbed her behind her back.

If Chen Rui was really keen on status, he would have returned to the human world. The Golden Estate was the richest estate of the Dragon Bright Empire. As the third prince, he was the true lord who might well be able to defeat the rest of his siblings to ascend to the throne. Hiding in the dark and helping Shea to calculate and plan was the limit of what he could do now. Besides, there was something unclear between the Princess Royal and him…

After arranging a series of placement work, Chen Rui, Athena and Paglio returned to the Dark Moon City. Old Gauss told Chen Rui that Shea had returned and was waiting for him in the garden behind the palace.

Chen Rui camouflaged into a servant’s appearance and followed Old Gauss into the royal palace without obstacles. Old Gauss took him to the backyard of the inner courtyard, he then bowed and retreated.

Shea was still in her typical long white dress. Looking at this unfamiliar Great Demon, she was a little surprised at first, but she immediately revealed a knowing look, “This is the Demon Realm’s genius mechanical master? The grand master’s teachings actually have such a wonderful transformation skill.”

“This is not the master’s face…”

Chen Rui did not explain the grand master’s inheritance. His original intention was to use this excuse. Now that Shea took the initiative to assume so, he naturally saved a lot of effort. His face changed again to the appearance of the ‘master’, “This is the one. However, the whereabouts of this master is unknown now. He has most probably encountered an accident.”

Shea nodded and did not dwell further about this. She also did not mention the topic like the Demon Realm’s genius master; she directly said, “This time I went to visit Bailing Estate, Lord Sical gave me a lavish gift before leaving. There are a lot of luxury goods such as unique decorative crystals, colorful feathers, top-grade silk clothing and so on. Plus, there’s a group of goblin and minotaur artisans who are good at construction, saying that they want to help Dark Moon to repair the dilapidated palace.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “This lavish gift is more like a gift to Princess Royal than the Dark Moon Estate. The luxury goods will not alleviate Dark Moon’s current food shortage. Instead, those artisans will increase the Dark Moon’s already-tight food load. Of course, if Dark Moon is just suffering on the surface… I suspect that Sical’s move has a testing intent to find out the real bottom line of Dark Moon. Perhaps there is capital’s permission or pressure behind it.”

The so-called friendship in politics was mostly based on the interest and purpose. It was very likely that at some point when the interest changes or the goal was not achieved, it would not be surprising to fall out and become enemies.

There were very few people like General George who almost persistently supported Shea, who was a weak force, because of a kindness and righteousness. In fact, Chen Rui knew that even his father-in-law was tempted before, so General George only requested to help Shea once without forcing Chen Rui and Athena to be permanently stationed at this precarious place.

The strongest would rule; this was the simplest and highest rule. People could not pin hope on others; they could only rely on themselves.

This was true for individuals as well as the entire estate.

“You’re right.” Shea nodded, “By the way, Sical seems to be interested in Kia whom I brought along.”

Chen Rui frowned. His impression of Sical became even worse. Shea said, “I should have given Kia as a return gift to Sical, but I was afraid that when a genius master returned, he would secretly complain when he didn’t see his maid. So, I sent a set of gifts from the Princess Retail Store to Lord Sical instead.”

The last time Shea told Chen Rui that when she intended to send Kia to the Custer Family because of Dior’s interest in her, Shea noticed Chen Rui’s hidden discomfort. Naturally, she would not repeat the same mistake this time.

“I’m almost clear about Kia’s affairs.” Chen Rui sighed lightly, “She should not be a threat now. The Demon Restrictive Ring can also be removed.”

“She is your maid, so it’s up to you to decide.” Shea’s tone was indifferent.

Chen Rui did not continue on this issue, saying, “This time I obtained the transformation technique of the grand master. The key plan of that step has been perfected. In the current situation, it must be implemented as soon as possible. I intend to go by myself.”

Shea sighed, “As the lord and also the biggest beneficiary of this plan, I don’t want to say anything hypocritical. But… since Mountain Xilang, you have been taking risks personally. This is obviously not what a sage should do. ”

“I never said that I’m a sage. I’m also afraid of death, but this is the most critical part of our overall plan. No one other than me is qualified for this role. Plus… I have made up my mind.” Chen Rui’s tone was undoubtedly determined as if he was the lord, but this near-resolute determination did not disgust Shea. Instead, the coldness in her purple eyes began to melt.

“By the way, I remember… When we met last time, Princess Royal Highness seemed to promise me that you will agree to my little request when I return from solving the problem of the Shadow Empire’s Custer Family?” Chen Rui saw that the atmosphere seemed to be a little awkward, so his tone changed, and his gaze became playful.

This kind of gaze made Shea’s heart inexplicably a little nervous, “About this… we will talk about it later. Sir Sheriff, it’s late already. You can go back and rest now.”

“Talk about it later?” Chen Rui’s eyes twitched ambiguously, and he shook his head, “That’s too far away. Let’s talk about it… Um. Let’s talk about this important issue now. I am going to carry out one of the most dangerous tasks soon. If the lord breaks her promise, it will hurt my enthusiasm.”

“How dare you!” Shea’s tone became stern, seething with lethal breath, “You dare to threaten me!”

This reaction seemed a bit too intense, but it could no longer intimidate Chen Rui. He sighed, “Royal Highness knows the dangers of my trip, and I may not be able to come back. Can’t you even fulfill my last wish? ”

“Stop!” Shea stared furiously at this guy’s undaunted gaze, and she finally gritted her teeth while saying, “If you dare to have any other deranged request apart from the dance that I originally promised, it will be your last living moment now!”

Chen Rui was astonished, “What do you mean deranged request? It’s just the dance… Princess Royal, could it be you were thinking…”

Shea knew that she fell in the words trap again. As she was about to blast off, she saw this guy came over and politely made an inviting gesture. At the same time, a melodious automatic music sounded and played in the back garden.

Bastard, he even set up the music already. He really came prepared!

Shea’s gaze was about to dissect this guy, but when Chen Rui made that inviting gesture, she couldn’t help extending her hand.

Forget it. I’ll take it as fulfilling my promise. As a royal member of Lucifer Royal Family, how can I break my promise?

Shea, who temporarily persuaded herself, resisted the urge to burn this guy with [Dark Flame], and let him hold her hand. When both of their hands first touched, it seemed like there was a current. The marvelous feeling at the prom emerged again. The wonderful feeling at the fingertips flowed into her heart, and her tense heart was gradually softened by this feeling. When she put her hands on his shoulders, the man’s breath was quite close. There was no such strong feeling last time when they were watched by the crowd. Today, there were only two people in this backyard garden; he and she.

The two figures danced along the beautiful melody under the moonlight.

Shea had not danced with anyone since the welcome dance for the capital people, especially this new dance of interest. Chen Rui’s performance was more disciplined than expected, which made Shea gradually lower her guard. Using the words which Alice learned from someone, this was called the gentleman demeanour.

Unbeknown to her, the so-called gentleman was just a more patient wolf.

However, for Shea who had always been busy, it was a rare opportunity to relax. Her steps had become lighter. She had begun to enjoy this long-lost fun. She was more and more in sync with Chen Rui.

Chen Rui also enjoyed dancing with this iceberg princess, especially in such close contact. Her white jade-like skin was clearly visible, and there was a fresh fragrance faintly in his nose. In the entire Dark Moon or even the entire Demon Realm, he was the first man who was so “close” to Shea, and she was “voluntarily”… If the nobles in the estate saw this scene, it would be jaw-dropping for them.

“Hmph!” Shea looked at the smile on Chen Rui’s face. No matter how I see it, I feel like punching it. “What’s so funny?”

“I’m thinking that Princess Royal is a person who keeps her promise. She is indeed my lord.”

“Bastard!” When Shea heard “My lord,” there was a faint heat on her face.

“Even if Royal Highness wants to retaliate, I’m afraid that it will be difficult to find me in the future.” Chen Rui quickly added another sentence to prevent her from blasting off and ruining the atmosphere, “I personally hope to keep my life so that I can come back next time to accept Princess Royal’s punishment.”

Shea’s eyes were a bit gloomy, “Actually this time… You don’t have to come back.”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “In my perception, certain people and certain matters are more important than others.”

Shea stared at his eyes, “You may not be able to get the return you want for your contribution. At that time, I’m afraid it will be too late for you to regret it.”

“Why should I regret it? I remember a phrase in a book that there are always a few encounters in life, and there are always a few silly mistakes. But the important thing is that you have once experienced, met, and been silly…” Without avoiding her gaze, Chen Rui smiled and raised the hands he was holding, “Moreover, I got my return now, right?”

Shea looked at his smile and suddenly felt her heart beating a little faster. The two of them did not speak for a while as they danced quietly in the music. Some subtle things need not necessarily be expressed in words, but both sides could feel it.

“…”, “Why is this music repeated so many times? Your magic props, is it…”

“Uh… It’s just a longer piece of music. It should be almost over…”.

“No! Bastard, how many dances did we do?”

“Uh, I think it’s almost…”.

“It’s actually almost three hours! Damn, you should end your trick now!”

“…”

Where was Chen Rui going? What was the mission?

chapters.title: Chapter 314 - Kia
chapters.body:
Chapter 314 - Kia

Chapter 314: Kia

Alice went to Bailing Estate with her sister this time. Little loli was very business-savvy as she bought a lot of specialty products at Bailing Estate. She brought all of them back to the Dark Moon together with the gift from Bailing Estate’s lord and sold it under the brand of Princess Retail Store. The price was quite expensive, but it had attracted many buyers.

In addition, the Dark Shadow Empire’s top business family, Custer Family, had sent people to come and discuss the opening of the Princess Retail Store branch in the Dark Shadow Empire capital. With the influence of Custer Family, the Princess Retail Store merchandise which were labelled as fashionable and high-end would very likely become popular in the Dark Shadow Empire. This was only the first step in business cooperation between the two sides.

Alice had her hands full as soon as she came back. As the most popular and most effective clerk in the Princess Retail Store, Kia naturally became the busiest person.

“Kia, aren’t you tired?” Alice looked strangely at the high-spirited succubus when they had a rare short break after the guests on the second floor of Princess Retail Store finally left.

“You seem to be particularly energized recently. You are very motivated to do anything. Your entire person seems to be… different from before?”

“Nah.” Of course, Kia wouldn’t say it was because of the disappearance of [Soul Shackles] which had controlled her for many years. She laughed and said, “I’m forcing myself to hold on. Actually, I’m almost worn out. I’m afraid I don’t have the energy to accompany the little princess to the night market tonight.”

“I’m exhausted too. I had to start working straight after coming back from Bailing Estate without taking a rest day.” Alice stretched herself, “I really miss the beautiful and delicious cake last time… How good it is if I can eat it now.”

Speaking of cake, Kia smiled tenderly, “Unfortunately, Sir Chen Rui has not yet awakened, otherwise the wish of the little princess should not be a problem. I hope our sir sheriff will get well soon.” Last time, this human also remembered my birthday. Although he is somewhat silly, he is really a rare kind man. Miss Athena has a good taste indeed. Hopefully that human will recover soon.

By the way, it seems that the previous name of this human is also Arthur, but he’s totally incomparable with the “Master Arthur…”

Alice knew that Chen Rui had woken up, but she wouldn’t reveal it. It was just that when she thought of the cake, it was really mouth-watering. But now Chen Rui should be doing important matters elsewhere that her sister had ordered, so she could only restrain her craving.

“Okay, everyone! Let’s work hard for the shiny black crystal coins! If you can achieve the volume this month, your salary will be doubled!” Speaking of the shiny black crystal coins, little loli clenched her fist and a dragon-like light shined in her eyes, radiating a powerful aura. The “ultimate technique” of salary raise was amazingly powerful indeed. It infected all Princess Retail Store employees rapidly, boosting their morale instantly.

At this time, a dark elf boy came upstairs and looked at all the people upstairs before approaching Kia, “Are you Miss Kia? Someone asked me to send you a letter.”

“I can tell it’s some admirer letter again without even looking at it.” Little loli’s flashing eyes carried some envy. In fact, not to mention Alice’s appearance, the identity of the little princess alone was enough to attract countless suitors, but she had an “overprotective” sister. Many people who had ill intentions had been eliminated in the “early” stage. Even Joseph dared not really show interest in Alice.

Kia smiled shyly. She did receive a lot of such letters, but when she opened the letter and glanced, her gaze suddenly changed.

“Little princess Royal Highness, I have an urgent matter…I want to go out for a while, is it alright?”

Little loli looked at the strange expression in Kia’s eyes and exclaimed, “Kia, you won’t be really deceived by a man, right?”

Kia’s face immediately smeared a rare blush and shook her head, “No, it’s just an ordinary friend. Please, little princess.”

“Friend?” Little loli was skeptical. She thought for a while and agreed, “We are going to close soon anyway. You can go. We’ll directly meet at the palace later. Remember to bring me two South Street’s minced meat pancakes when you come back. By the way, I used up the previous Tong papaya, help me buy one more… Uhm, you know, it’s the one you said…”

Kia knew it was the breast enhancement formula that she said. She smiled and nodded. As she was about to leave, little loli suddenly blinked her eyes and threw a book, “This is for your reference. Kia, be careful!”

Kia took and had a look. Even the succubus who was usually poised could not help but to feel a little embarrassed. The title of the book was actually, “Be careful of the wolf around you! The friendship between men and women which will not survive overnight.

Kia hurriedly walked out of Princess Retail Store and went all the way to West Street. At this time, the sky was gradually gloomy. At the intersection of 14th street, some blind guys noticed the succubus’ exquisite beauty and followed her. Before they followed her till the abandoned house area, a horrifying breath suddenly shrouded over, terrifying those gangsters who were just Intermediate Demon. They were scared witless. None of them dared to get near her.

Chen Rui released a little breath. After scaring away those gangsters, his eyes fell on Kia in front of him. She was still the tempting beauty. The relatively tight maid attire wrapped around her curvy bumps, exuding her breathtaking beauty.

Compared to the time at the Dark Shadow Empire previously, there was less seductiveness and more elegance and charm. Her entire being seemed to have elevated to a whole new level. Her enchanting eyes radiated an attractive splendor.

“Master!” Although Chen Rui’s face was covered in a cloak, Kia recognized the man who had had some kind of intimate “contact” with her at one glance; he was also the first one since her birth. She was extremely excited, and she couldn’t help walking forward.

Facing the surprise on Kia’s charming face, Chen Rui thought of another face resembling her, and he couldn’t help feeling affectionate. He took off his cloak and used the face of “Master Arthur” for the time being.

In Kia’s eyes, this Great Demon looked better than any handsome face, but his dignified look gave her an ominous omen.

“I’m sorry.” Chen Rui didn’t dare to look directly at her earnest gaze. He slightly lowered his head. “Your mother, Freya…”

Kia was shocked, and her heart tightened. She only heard Chen Rui finally say, “She has passed away.”

Kia sensed something was wrong just now, but when her worry was confirmed now, she still couldn’t bear it. Her face suddenly became pale as she couldn’t accept the sudden bad news. She was shaking, and she almost couldn’t stand stably.

For Kia, there was no concept of “father” in life. The man named Azgalor was just a cold and ruthless master. Her creation was just an accidental product after some desires were vented. Even her mother was just a tool in Azgalor’s eyes. If it was not her special Devour Physique, she might have become the lowest venting tool for men.

Azgalor’s first wife, Sabrina, was also a vicious master. Under the control of [Soul Shackles], Kia and her mother were trapped in an almost unending nightmare, enduring inhuman torture. Their only hope for survival was each other’s lives.

The traumatic [Soul Shackles] that had troubled Kia for many years had finally disappeared now. This allowed her to usher in the real hope in life, but her mother, Freya, could never share this hope with her.

Chen Rui gently hugged her trembling body. Kia, like a drowning person who got hold of a drifting wood, leaned on his shoulder and started sobbing.

The two moons in the sky were gradually covered with dark clouds, as if it was grieving for the disappearance of a beautiful woman.

“I’m sorry. I have tried my best.” Chen Rui sighed, gently stroking Kia’s relaxed back that finally stopped sobbing.

Kia leaned on his tear-soaked shoulder and nodded her head gently. It wasn’t the first time she cried on his shoulder. It felt quite reassuring. “I know. Madam Sabrina… she…”

“You don’t need to call her madam anymore.” Chen Rui knew that Sabrina and her daughter’s caused a deep trauma in Kia’s heart, so he immediately showed a firm attitude, “She and Fatilu, plus that Izola… consider them your mother’s funerary object. ”

Kia seemed shocked. She knew Sabrina and Izola. They are both Azgalor’s wives. They have a very high status and are quite powerful, especially Sabrina, who may have reached the Demon Emperor level. They are actually all dead now!

“Master, is your strength the Demon Emperor…”

“No.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I’m far from the Demon Emperor. I killed both of them with a plot. Sabrina is really powerful as she has reached Demon Emperor level. My plan almost failed.”

A Great Demon King level killed a Demon Emperor level! Kia understood what this concept was. Although Chen Rui casually said “almost failed”, she could imagine how much risk this man took to kill Sabrina in order to unlock her [Soul Shackles].

Kia was touched. She suddenly thought of a terrifying thing and exclaimed, “Since you killed them, Azgalor will never let you go. He is a Demon Overlord-level powerhouse. I’m afraid it’s dangerous here. You better escape to a safe place quickly.”

“Relax, Azgalor is severely injured by a Demon Overlord now, so he will be busy taking care of himself. In fact, I only killed Sabrina and Izola. I wanted to let Fatilu who was under my control flee with your mother initially, but she was caught by Azgalor on the way. Fatilu was killed by her father personally.”

“This is Azgalor. In his eyes, the so-called daughter is simply a tool that can be discarded at any time. I didn’t expect it would be the same for Fatilu.” Kia smiled bitterly, “So my mother also…

“The real person who attacked is another Demon Overlord.” Chen Rui clenched his fists and lamented, “I’m also one of the indirect killers. If my plan didn’t go wrong…”

“No,” Kia covered his mouth tenderly. Her red eyes showed deep affection and gratitude, “You have done enough for me. Although you haven’t said much, I know that you must have taken a considerable risk to escape from death.”

Chen Rui held her hand, “As I said before, I was just helping “along the way”. I already had my own plan initially.”

“I also said before.” Kia’s head leaned against his shoulder again, “As long as you don’t mind that I’m a lowly maid, even if you chase me away, you can’t get rid of me.”

“What silly words are you saying?” Chen Rui gently put something on her wrist, “This is a gift for you.”

Kia looked down, and it was a peculiar string of ornaments. Stringed together with the red rope, the ornaments had extremely fine carvings. The delicate beauty exuded strange energy waves. She exclaimed, “This is…”

“My first legendary grade work, Moments of Beauty.” Chen Rui gently stroked her silky hair. “Compared with many immortal beings, our lives are only moments, but there is a beauty that can stop time within this moment. There is always waking up after a nightmare. I only hope that there will be no more pain and sorrow, but real happiness, in your smile in the future. That is the true beauty of your life. Meanwhile, you no longer need this anymore.”

“Ding!” The black Demon Restrictive Ring in Kia’s hands had been broken, and the shattered pieces fell on the ground, making a clear sound.

The beautiful eyes of the succubus were intertwined with astonishment, surprise, joy and moved… Her vision became more and more blurred, and the tears of excitement dropped on the ground.

In front of this man, all her shackles vanished into thin air, but there was a connection that would not break till death in her heart. I feel very happy. If my mother knew, she would be happy for her daughter, right?

Living happily is the best comfort to my mother.

“… Master, can I have it forever?”

“Of course. If you wish to, you can even have its creator forever.” Chen Rui kissed her forehead, “However, you must first listen to an imposter’s confession before that because I have many things which I have been hiding from you. For example, I have a wife” …

Kia startled slightly, and then she whispered, “Kia knows that my identity is lowly, and my physique is too special, so I didn’t dare to expect anything. I only hope to stay with the master as a little maid, as for madam… I will do my best to serve her.”

Although she said that, Kia was still uneasy. She was not surprised about the fact that the “master” had a wife. Not only because the Great Demon men were well-known for being womanizers, but also in my view, there were definitely many women who liked such a capable and excellent man. She was worried about the treatment encountered by her mother, Freya. If she encountered an extremely vicious first wife, then her future… But this man was different from Azgalor, and she also followed him willingly. This was the first man that she was willing to follow. No matter how difficult it was, she would not give up.

As Kia made up her mind, she heard “master” added another sentence, “To be precise, she is my fiancée. Don’t worry, you… know her.”

“I know her?” Kia was truly shocked this time.

“Actually, you and I… knew each other before going to the Dark Shadow Empire, and we were old friends.”

“Ah?” Kia was even more stunned.

“What you see now is not my true face. This is a special ‘innate ability.” It’s not quite convenient to explain it here. If you come with me to a place, you will naturally understand. That place will be your real home in the future. ”

Kia followed him all the way to a remote neighborhood in the northeast. The house was supposed to be very familiar to her. After Kia left this place, she was recruited by the little princess to the Princess Retail Store, and then returned to the palace to live.

An almost unbelievable speculation popped up in Kia’s mind when she was “revisiting the old place” now. When she turned around, she saw that ‘old friend’ who had recovered to his original face or it should be called the ‘the kind man’.

The expression on succubus’s face was quite wonderful, and finally she returned to her strange charm, “You’re really a quite a good liar, isn’t it? My… master?”

Oh my god, the extremely seductive and enchanting demon is back.

And the wolf was back as well🐺…

chapters.title: Chapter 315 - Siblings
chapters.body:
Chapter 315 - Siblings

Chapter 315: Siblings

The next morning, Kia got up early in the morning. Last night, she didn’t return to the palace.

However, unlike some people with complex thoughts, Kia who stayed at the sheriff residence had a long chatty night with Athena.

When Athena learnt about Kia’s experience and Freya’s bad news, she was very sympathetic. Kia was also well aware of Athena’s position in Chen Rui’s heart. She immediately put away the mask she would normally wear and told Athena all of her past events. When she talked about the emotional parts, Athena also shed a lot of tears with her. The two were not strangers initially, but when they were honest with each other, they had endless things to talk about now.

Of course, the hottest topic was about the cunning imposter.

Kia was busy for some time as she skillfully made a hearty breakfast for everyone.

Roman was not jealous of Chen Rui now, he admired him instead – Sir leader is too incredible! Damn, he is a beast!

He swindled a beautiful woman who is capable in every aspect in such a short time. Even more impressive is that Athena is not jealous and got along well with the new chick. Meanwhile my Delia, cooking skills aside, just that Envy Royal Family’s powerful jealousy breath can kill all my flirtatious thoughts.

In fact, Roman had seen Kia who was with Alice during the last outing, but only those who Chen Rui brought into this house were the real insiders.

Kia was a succubus with mutated bloodline. After removing the shackles of the Demon Restrictive Ring, her comprehensive strength was C, which was Demon King level. She was proficient in both the fire and wind magic, and she had a spirit power talent. The legendary grade ornament. “Moments of Beauty” really found the right master. No wonder Shea wanted to restrict her power with the Demon Restrictive Ring.

Chen Rui would not be stingy to Kia who was already his own woman. He gave her all the devil fruits and black potions that could increase her strength. It was probably impossible to reach the Great Demon King in a short time, but the peak of Demon King should not be a problem.

Because Chen Rui had an “intimate” contact with Kia when he was Master Arthur, and with Chen Rui’s intention to take Freya away, Azgalor was likely to suspect Kia. If Kia went “missing”, it would be like an unsought confession. Currently, Chen Rui did not have a candidate to match a Demon Overlord, so Kia still kept her original “work” for the time being. In case that force contacted her, she could pretend that she was clueless about what happened to Freya. If necessary, she could ask whether Sabrina took the initiative to unlock the [Soul Shackles]. Of course, Chen Rui would not let Kia go into danger again, so he gave her a lot of life-saving things. In case of danger, she could escape directly.

Currently, the Dark Shadow Empire must be “hunting down” the force. The seriously injured Azgalor probably would not have the time to take care of a “little character” like Kia.

After Kia prepared the breakfast, she just gazed Chen Rui teasingly and went to the Princess Retail Store. Athena sent a letter to Alice last night to inform Alice that she had asked Kia to stay, lest Alice would worry. Although I didn’t bring the minced meat pancake and that Tong papaya that she craved for, I believe a fragrant butter cake will make little loli smile.

With little loli’s sensitivity, she will surely guess that he is back when she sees the cake, but Chen Rui has not seen Alice in a long time too. After the Dark Moon’s affairs are arranged this time, he needs to go to the Red Spirit Estate and Town Moling immediately. It will take a longer time this round. If it goes well, it would still take several months. Before leaving, he should meet her.

Sometimes, women were empathetic creatures. Athena said earlier that she could accept Kia, but the weight of this sentence was far less than the promise for the Shea sisters; they were still very cautious about Kia. However, after a long talk last night, Athena, who also lost her mother, already regarded Kia as a part of her family. Delia’s parents died in an accident earlier this year, so the three women who experienced the same tragedy became close friends who could talk about anything,

However, when a guy who worshipped the Devil’s Left Eye vaguely proposed to use love and justice to accept some women who were worthy of sympathy and help, Devil’s Left Eye was punched badly; he was forced to convert to worship the great and loyal right eye. Usually, Chen Rui would definitely retaliate by making the situation worse so that his unscrupulous nephew would hold his leg and call him the young master. However, he was not free now because the defense forces sent by Tim of Mountain Xilang had escorted several people to the Dark Moon City.

The brothers, Tonk and Tommy were just fine. The focus was on the dark elf woman, Lisa, because she was probably Aldas’ long-lost sister.

Chen Rui changed to Aguile’s face and settled these people in the former Mellon Family’s old house, which was now the Cloak Gang branch. Soon after, Aldas arrived hastily after receiving the news.

The dark elf master had been living in the secret basement of the laboratory to study the black potion. Slee sent him three meals a day, and he almost never came out. If it wasn’t for the well-known deed of killing the capital’s potioneer genius, many people in Dark Moon would soon forget the top potion master of the estate.

If any Demon Realm potion master knew what was in the dark elf master’s laboratory, they would surely be super envious. Others were doing everything possible to produce a grand master grade black potion, but Aldas was trying his best to obtain some realization from the ready-made black potion.

With a full set of real potions as a reference and the focused research during this time, Aldas research had finally made substantial progress. Although it was not yet possible to produce a black potion, he had already risen to become one of the top potion masters. He was only one step away from the highest level. Although he didn’t know when he would break through, he was certain that this step was closer than all Demon Realm potion masters.

If it was just ordinary business, Aldas, who was at the most important juncture of this realization and experiment, would simply ignore it. However, as soon as he received this news, he immediately stopped the experiment at hand and rushed over.

In a small room arranged by Chen Rui, Aldas met Lisa alone.

The two spent quite a long time in the room, and there were faint crying and scolding sounds. Finally the door opened, and Aldas came out. The expression on his face was very frustrated.

“Master,” Chen Rui welcomed him, “Isn’t this Lisa your sister?”

“Lisa… is indeed my long lost sister.” Aldas smiled bitterly, “It’s just that she couldn’t forgive me because of my mistakes that year.”

It turned out that Aldas’s family was quite well-off, but he was extremely obsessed with pharmaceutics. He once learned from a potioneer. Potioneer was a very costly occupation. Moreover, the potioneer’s conduct was very poor. He just wanted to use this opportunity to extort Aldas’ money. The dark elf who was immersed in it didn’t listen to the persuasion of his father and sister. As a result, the family lost all their fortune and incurred heavy debts. But Aldas still refused to admit his mistake; he didn’t even see his father for the last time in the end.

It wasn’t until the potioneer squeezed out his last drop of value and ran away that Aldas finally repented. He was too ashamed to meet his old father and his sister who hated him, so he left without bidding farewell. He was determined to become a true potion master.

After a lot of hard work, he became a potion master, but he was still poor and desperate. Finally, he passed the master examination with the help of Royal Princess Shea. When he looked back to find his sister, she already left without a trace. Aldas cited this as the greatest regret in his life.

After hearing Lisa’s news, Aldas rushed over without thinking, but he regretted that Lisa had not forgiven him until now. In fact, Lisa had lived a tough life these years. In order to pay off his debts, she suffered a lot. After several twists and turns, she was found by Joseph who had ulterior motives, and she finally ended up in Kanita’s secret prison.

“Lisa was right. If it weren’t for my stupidity and obsession, she would not suffer so much. And my father…” Aldas clenched his fists and lowered his head in guilt.

“Cost and success are directly proportional at some point. Without your stupidity and obsession previously, you may not be a master today.” It was the first time Chen Rui saw the painful expression of the dark elf master. He comforted, “In my view, Lisa still recognises you as her brother in her heart. There is a saying that the deeper the love, the more painful it is. If she is stone-faced and treats you like a passerby, then you should be worried. Give her a little time, and give yourself a little time, she will accept you.”

Aldas nodded and said to Chen Rui, “One of my human friends said that I can trust Sir Aguile as much as I trust him. Thanks to the help of Sir Aguile, Lisa was able to come to Dark Moon this time. Aldas expresses his utmost sincerity. If sir has any need in the future, I will definitely try my best to help. Lisa is not willing to go to my place currently, so she will be staying at Cloak Gang for the time being… I’ll leave her to sir.”

Chen Rui nodded, “My human friend also said that the master’s business is his business. Please rest assured that Lisa will be safe here.”

Aldas looked at the house, and he seemed a little sad as he left.

Chen Rui walked into the room, and Lisa quickly wiped away her tears. She looked at the mysterious man with a mask on his face. Chen Rui said lightly, “You really hate him so much?”
