Chen Rui knew that it was a critical juncture… Previously, Roman almost exploded and died at this step. Chen Rui anxiously waited attentively. He was ready to rescue at any time.

Roman’s body trembled more and more intensely. “Boom! Boom! Boom!” With rumbling bursts, he suddenly became a blood man. Such a bad situation did not happen previously and Chen Rui was taken aback. As he tried to rescue Roman, the blood suddenly turned into a blood mist… It enveloped Roman and gradually formed a strange image in the blood mist which looked like a demonic beast. However, the image was very vague, so the specific appearance was not clear. As time passed… the image began to become clearer.

Originally, this unprecedented change should be a sign of success, but Roman’s body seemed unable to support the completion of the image as he began to shrivel at a speed visible to the naked eye like a dried corpse.

Chen Rui felt the rapid weakening of Roman’s vitality, and it was already weak to the extreme in a blink of an eye. The image of the demonic beast that had been gradually clear began to collapse. It was clearly a sign of death. Chen Rui made a prompt decision to exchange a bottle of resurrection potion… He sprinkled it directly on Roman’s shriveled body, and the vitality of that collapsed “dried corpse” suddenly became stronger. His body and vitality also recovered step by step. It seemed that Chen Rui was lucky with this move as Roman was pulled back from the death line.

The image of the demonic beast condensed by the blood mist was quite clear. This was a demonic beast similar to a mantis with its front paws like two sharp knives.

The “Magic Warrior” of the “Mantis” constellation?

Chen Rui was stunned. The image only lasted for a moment before disappearing in the blood mist… The blood mist began to quickly return to Roman’s left eye.

After a long time… his closed eyes slowly opened, and the pupil of his eye flashed a strange red ray… Even Chen Rui felt the soul shake at the moment of staring at the eye.

When Chen Rui was converging his mind to transfer power for defense, Roman’s pupils had recovered. Although his expression was exhausted, his eyes flashed with ecstasy and excitement.

Chen Rui was overjoyed, “Did you succeed?”

“Hehe, of course. Don’t you know who I am? [The Eye of Evil] already has the power of [Destroying Evil] now, but it still takes time to become familiar with this new power gradually.” Roman’s gaze fell on the empty bottle in Chen Rui’s hand. He shook slightly, “Just now… is it a resurrection potion?”

Chen Rui showed a look of regret, “Yes, even if there is grand master inheritance, it is difficult to get it. It is wasted on a second hand product like you.”

Although Roman didn’t understand the meaning of second hand product, he could hear that it was by no means a commendatory term, so he immediately expressed regret, “The resurrection potion can only be used once in a lifetime, but you actually took away my precious first time. If Delia knew it, she would be sad…”

Chen Rui was dumbfounded, “If you continue to be so disgusting, I’ll give you aphrodisiac [1], and then throw you into a bunch of perverted groups who like men.”

Roman shivered, “Leader… this move is too cruel. You are the real demon.”

“Cut the crap and drink the [Recovery] potion. Eat something and take a good rest, then we capture the evil eye. The time limit for Isabella is 3 days. If we are fast, we may make it in time.”

Roman did not speak any more, and immediately began to regain his strength. This time, he escaped from the dead and had a breakthrough successfully. He also consumed a bottle of the most precious potion that was enough to shake the Demon Realm, but he did not say a word of thanks to Chen Rui. He acknowledged these in his heart. Even though this guy seemed to be outgoing and almost shameless, he was actually not good at expressing his true emotions. Furthermore, some words were unnecessary between partners.

Originally, Roman’s breakthrough had almost exhausted all of his power, but the highest-level resurrection potion’s effectiveness was extraordinary. Coupled with his newly acquired power of [Destroying Evil], his current state was quite fit, but his spirit was too exhausted previously. After a few hours of rest, he finally recovered most of it. Next, he needed to capture and subdue an evil eye that was not lower than his own level. If everything went smoothly, this evil eye would turn into a spiritual body mode, becoming the lifelong companion beast of [The Eye of Evil] that would accompany Roman throughout his life. The two were each other’s contract objects…sharing power and evolving together. When [The Eye of Evil] realized the next power of the evil king, it could also be united with the lifelong companion beast to manipulate the evil eyes that were lower than the power of the lifelong companion beast. The number of manipulations was proportional to its power.

Although Roman had realized the power of [Destroying Evil], his overall strength remained at the early stage of the Great Demon King. However, after gaining the power of [Destroying Evil], he should be able to break through to the small realm very quickly. As for the Demon Emperor, the key lied in the power of the territory… It was still very early.

It was not easy to capture a Great Demon King-level guy in the evil eye’s nest, because these communal demonic beasts would come together when they were provoked. According to Roman, there was also a Demon Emperor-level evil eye tyrant. Although [The Eye of Evil] could generate the breath of enhanced evil eye and live in peace with it, this was in the absence of hostility. Once the hostility was felt by the sensitive evil eye, then it would not be possible for even [The Eye of Evil] to avoid attacks.

For example, if the plover bird wanted to kill the crocodile… Would it still allow the crocodile to forage in its mouth? Its entire body would long be chewed to pieces.

In this case, Chen Rui and Roman could only capture their prey as quickly as possible, and then quickly evacuate. Otherwise, if they were detected by the evil eye tyrant… Perhaps it would be a problem to even get out.

Roman’s advantage was that he wouldn’t be attacked by the evil eye before his hostility was exposed. Therefore, the two men’s plan was that Chen Rui, who had been marked as an “intruder”, would be used as a bait to attract attacks. Meanwhile, Roman would wait for the opportunity to capture an evil eye of the Great Demon King level.

Hence, the previously missing “prey” entered the vision of the evil eyes again. Chen Rui didn’t have to deliberately exude any spiritual communication power… The few extremely vengeful evil eyes floated towards him with several companions. Chen Rui avoided the long range attack of the rays while releasing gluttonous vine to interfere and attract the evil eyes.

The evil eyes were very angry at the obvious provocation of this cunning prey, so they chased him.

If the lights were bright, you could see a string of evil eyes floating behind a high-speed turning figure. The scene was quite hilarious, but Chen Rui himself didn’t feel any joy… Although the speed of the evil eyes were at a disadvantage… but he still couldn’t move faster than their spirit power. There were 3 rays and a spirit shock so far… Fortunately, 2 of the rays were shot by a Demon King-level evil eye, and he was wearing element-resistant leather armor, so he was not hurt. It’s just that the evil eye’s talent for defying defense was too overpowering, and that spirit shock penetrated his spirit defense again, almost knocking him down.

Chen Rui felt that he was more and more like a flesh shield who was attracting and defending against monsters in the dungeon, attracting the hatred of all enemies. The problem was that there was no healer to help him increase his blood, and there was no high-output teammate to kill the monsters. He did not know whether Roman had spotted the target and prepared to defeat the enemy in one strike? The talent of the evil eye was too terrifying, and the number kept increasing. If the tyrant comes, this poor duo would surely be destroyed together.

Roman followed the group of evil eyes. The breath of [The Eye of Evil] he currently exuded was a supplement to the spirit power consumption of the evil eyes, so the evil eyes habitually did not show hostility to him, but he only had one chance. Once he missed it, he could only flee with sir leader.

Roman had spotted an evil eye at the middle stage of Great Demon King behind the big group. Generally speaking, it would be better if the demonic beast, who would accompany the spirit body, was stronger because the lifelong companion spirit body shared power with him. This meant that his power would rise more slowly than normal in the future. Of course, his power would be stronger.

Just as the evil eyes fired one after another while focusing on chasing Chen Rui, Roman finally took action. The wind mastery and the blood talent of “[Flash]” were activated at the same time. As the Great Demon King-level evil eye suddenly condensed, it was already restrained by the wind element. At almost the same time, Roman’s figure had appeared behind the evil eye, punching the head with the giant eye.

The evil eye’s spirit power had reached the peak of the Great Demon King level, so it was aware of the danger, but it was too late to dodge since these incidents happened all of a sudden, and Roman punched directly toward it.

However, Roman’s punch stopped about 10 centimeters away from the evil eye because there was already a thin shield in front of the evil eye. This lightning-like punch only shook the shield but couldn’t break through it.

“Magic shield? Damn mutated talent!” Roman did not expect that the prey that he had been targeted for so long would have such a mutant talent. Many evil eyes had already felt the abnormality behind them, and they began to turn back. The evil eye that was attacked immediately spoke of Roman’s behavior with its special spirit communication, and the evil eyes floated back angrily.

Roman was taken aback and hurriedly increased his power output, but this magic shield was created by the evil eye’s mutated talent whose spirit power was already very powerful. Roman was anxious but he was unable to break through. Instead, there were a few evil eyes floating over and they began to launch a ray attack on him.

Roman hurriedly dodged. The Demon Realm’s strongest speed talent [Flash] really deserved its reputation as none of those rays could hit him. Roman was resolute and did not give up the mutated evil eye. Instead, he braced the rays and the spirit shock to launch a fierce attack – This evil eye had a mutated talent, and if it could surrender to be his lifelong companion beast, his combat effectiveness would also be greatly improved.

At the moment when the shield of the evil eye was about to collapse, a figure suddenly appeared beside him. “Leader?” Although Roman was taken aback, there were only two people underground, he and Chen Rui, so he was not particularly nervous.

“Let’s go!” Chen Rui’s voice was anxious.

“Wait! I’m about to catch this evil eye…”

“Catch a fart, the evil eye tyrant is here!” Chen Rui made Roman have a chill. Without any hesitation, he withdrew his hand and clasped Chen Rui’s arm. His [Flash] talent was activated at full speed and they fled backwards.

“It’s over, the evil eye holds grudges. If I miss it this time, I will be their enemy when I come in in the future.” While Roman said, the speed of his feet was not slowed down at all, and they pulled apart from the evil eyes behind them.

The evil eye tyrant was a Demon Emperor-level evil eye. Perhaps even a typical Demon Overlord powerhouse was not willing to provoke it. The current power of the two was basically for escape only, not to mention that there was such a large group of evil eyes.

“It’s all your fault. You didn’t even defeat one even after watching it for a long time!” Chen Rui felt resentful towards him for failing to succeed. Chen Rui had attracted hatred for so long, but he didn’t even defeat a little beast here.

“How would I know that it even has mutated ability…” Roman knew he was wrong, so he said with a bitter expression, “Otherwise, I would just catch an early Great Demon King.

At this time, they had almost pulled a safe distance from the group of evil eyes behind them. Chen Rui suddenly shook and stopped. As Roman was just about to ask, [The Eye of Evil] suddenly felt a horrifying spirit oppression behind him. His facial expression suddenly changed.

Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes] showed: Race: Evil Eye (mutated). Comprehensive strength: A-.

Physique: B, Strength: B, Spirit: A+, Agility: B

The evil eye at Demon Emperor level… The tyrant!

In terms of agility, it is only B. How can it catch up?

At this moment, the information behind him appeared at the front instantly. Chen Rui and Roman felt this change at the same time, and they were all startled, Teleport!

An evil eye tyrant with the mutated talent of teleport! Even running away is a problem now!

[1] Aphrodisiac is a drug that arouses sexual instinct.

Quick Update: We have edited our patreon community goal to a lower benchmark and the exact value of each goal is revealed.

chapters.title: Chapter 333 - Tough Fight And Gain
chapters.body:
Chapter 333 - Tough Fight And Gain

The biggest weakness of the evil eye was its slower speed. Although long-range rays could make up for this shortcoming to a certain extent (the range of spirit shock was shorter), their lack of mobility made them incapable of chasing quick enemies. However, the evil eye tyrant actually had the mutated talent of teleportation now. It could attack by progressing and defend by retreating, so it had almost perfectly made up for the deficiencies of the evil eye family.

Chen Rui and Roman were about to face such a “perfect” evil eye now. It was even a Demon Emperor-level tyrant.

Chen Rui’s ability could barely approach the early stage of Demon Emperor’s combat power through [Scorching Dragon Possession] and [Dark Star Territory], but the spirit of this mutated tyrant had reached the peak of Demon Emperor level. With the horrifying spirit talent of the evil eye, he couldn’t compete with it even with the help of Roman.

“Lets run separately!” Chen Rui shouted decisively. Roman responded and the two figures suddenly separated.

The evil eye tyrant followed Chen Rui without hesitation because it targeted the intruder with the highest hatred from the very beginning. Moreover, Roman’s current speed was still faster than Chen Rui’s. Obviously, the immediate target was easier to chase.

Chen Rui felt the evil eye tyrant approaching via his [Analytical Eyes]. Before it could attack, he suddenly teleported and rounded back to the entrance of another passage to escape.

The evil eye tyrant had seen the same teleportation skill of this enemy once before, so it was not surprised. Its figure shook and chased him up. Its moving distance was even beyond Chen Rui, and it could be used continuously. After several flickers, it approached him again.

Chen Rui cried secretly as his two teleports had been used up, and he was already at his maximum speed with the help of Stridebug, but he still couldn’t get rid of the tyrant’s pursuit. At this moment, Chen Rui felt that his movements at full speed suddenly “wanted” to slow down. At this critical juncture, he actually had such weird thoughts.

Oh no! Chen Rui realized. This is mind control! Such a terrifying ability!

Although Chen Rui quickly eliminated this interference, the momentary hesitation of the brain just now had reflected on his body. His speed suddenly slowed down, and the evil eye tyrant appeared in front of him.

The evil eye tyrant, who had been chasing this cunning prey unsuccessfully, felt unusually furious and hatred. It was determined to consume his entire soul. In order to prevent the prey from escaping again, it unleashed the most powerful spirit power.

Chen Rui felt dizzy as if a big force was pressing his head from above. His body was suddenly pressed by the huge strength of the spirit power, and he was unable to move. Then, there were hallucinations surrounding him together with countless intertwined spider webs which held him firmly. The entire space was a huge spider web.

Territory!

As Chen Rui groaned in his heart, he saw a huge eyeball appearing in the spiderweb world. It seemed to be more than 10 meters high, and it wasglowing with a strange light. The moment Chen Rui stared at the eyeball, his expression suddenly fell in a trance. A voice kept telling himself to give up resistance and dedicate his life and soul automatically.

No way!

There are still so many things that I have not completed yet. There are still loved ones to guard. How can I give up my life? How can I be defeated in such a place?

At the same time, a warning of abnormal spirit invasion appeared in the Super System. Chen Rui woke up suddenly, and he suppressed the strange death will with his strong will. He bit the tip of his tongue abruptly and got rid of the spirit fluctuation control of that huge eye.

It was just that his body that was bound by the territory still couldn’t move as the huge eye was getting closer and closer. This spider web territory was a bit similar to Manu’s, but the nature was completely different, and its power was much inferior. Manu’s territory could mainly restrain mind control and puppets while this territory was obviously constraint and mind control.

However, the spider web territory was constructed by the spirit power of the peak of the Demon Emperor. It was far from Chen Rui’s ability to contend today. Is it that I have to use the self-destructive method I used in Manu’s territory to get rid of it?

Right! Chen Rui suddenly thought of something. As he was about to unleash it, the huge evil eye image in the center of the territory was suddenly blurred, and it became much smaller. The pressure of that kind of spiritual restraint was greatly reduced. Chen Rui exerted his force and finally broke free.

The entire territory was distorted for a while, but it recovered again soon. A person fell out of thin air in the territory, and it was Roman. The pupil of his left eye was blood red and the corner of his eye cracked open as blood flowed out.

Roman got up on his feet while panting violently. He apparently suffered a severe injury when he interfered with the territory just now.

“Why did you come back again?” Chen Rui was moved in his heart, but he scolded, “Go! Don’t come here to add more troubles!”

“Hehe… I just want to see if I can steal some benefits, but I didn’t expect to be discovered by it.”

Roman had a bit of Paglio’s demeanor. Stubborn and unwilling to admit the truth. He wiped his eyes casually without bothering about his blood-covered hands. He said bitterly, “I’m afraid I can’t escape even if I want to escape now.”

Countless spider webs stretched out from the territory again and rolled toward the two of them. Roman’s bloody eyes glowed with a faint red light. Those spider webs rolled back one after another, but they accumulated more and more. With every additional web, Roman’s pressure increased. He seemed to be unable to withstand it.

This was also the special restraining effect of [Destroying Evil] on the evil eye. If it was the previous Roman, perhaps he would be killed under this kind of peak Demon Emperor level territory with one encounter.

“Put away your [The Eye of Evil]! Quickly!”

Roman closed his eyes without thinking, and the spider web immediately surrounded him. At this moment, a mask appeared on Chen Rui’s face. The spider web gradually became thinner before disappearing under the mask’s strange force. Not only that, the mask was like a great whale absorbing water, swallowing the spirit power of the entire territory at an astonishing speed.

The power of God-Eating Mask’s [God Eater] – devouring all spirit power, magic and soul attacks!

For the evil eye who relied on spirit power, this was the biggest nemesis. The evil eye tyrant did not expect that the other party had such a terrifying skill, and it tried to take back its power, but it was too late. After a few seconds, the entire territory became fragile without the support of the spirit power. In the end, it disappeared without a trace following an exploding sound. The world of “spiderwebs” returned to the pitch dark underground ruins.

The evil eye tyrant had lost most of his spirit power, and its penetrative breath suddenly became a lot weaker. It made hissing noises mixed with horror and resentment. It started to float backwards like it was fleeing, but after pulling apart a certain distance, the huge eyeballs shot out a red ray at Roman.

Roman hurriedly used [Flash] to evade, but he was a step slower, and his outer thigh was hurt by the rays, causing his flesh and blood to spurt out. The wound was much more serious than expected. His flesh and blood were partially vaporized. It seemed that the ray was extremely hot.

Chen Rui’s [God Eater] skill could only be used once every 7 days, so he could no longer use it. He swallowed most of the spirit power of the evil eye just now, causing the territory to collapse, but the basic power of the evil eye still existed. Especially the talent ability of elemental rays, which was quite powerful.

Roman’s leg was injured, so his mobility was greatly affected. The tyrant intended to kill him while he was weak. The terrifying high-temperature rays fired one after another, but none of them were directed at Chen Rui. His act of devouring the territory caused the evil eye tyrant to be very fearful of him. This kind of attack on Roman was also testing and bullying the weakling.

3 more light rays shot over. Seeing that Roman was unable to dodge, Chen Rui’s figure suddenly blocked in front of him. The high-temperature rays hit Chen Rui’s body one after another. To be precise, it hit the shield in his hand.

The ray which was enough to melt metals actually disappeared instantly as it fell on this dark golden shield. There were no scratches on the shiny mirror-like shield, but Chen Rui was shocked by the momentum that he retreated 3 steps consecutively. He almost collided with Roman.

Roman’s eyes widened as he blurted out, “Demon Shield!”

This was the Demon Shield of the Illusive Demon Shield, the highest artifact of the Leviathan Family. It was one of Chen Rui’s gains in the Crystal Valley. Since it had been “cracked” by the [Deep Analysis], the Demon Shield was “bound” to Chen Rui’s body like the God-Eating Mask. He couldn’t even give it back to Delia even if he wanted to.

It might be the reason why it was not integrated with the IIlusive Shield. The function of the Demon Shield was not displayed in the Super System, but Chen Rui could already realize its benefits. Not only the 3 rays of the evil eye tyrant that hit the Demon Shield just now were blocked, at the same time, a warm current passed from the Demon Shield to Chen Rui’s body, quickly replenishing his previously consumed strength and making him quickly gain a steady foothold.

If the role of the IIlusive Shield was to reflect damage while defending, then Demon Shield was to absorb damage. If the power gap between the 2 sides was not particularly large, they could almost be invincible as long as the defense was proper. It was worthy of being the Demon Realm’s strongest defensive equipment.

I wonder what special power will Illusive Shield and Demon Shield have when they are combined into a full-form Illusive Demon Shield.

When Chen Rui moved his mind, his fingers spread out, and a dazzling light ball appeared. It drew a rapid meteor in the darkness which rushed towards the evil eye tyrant. The evil eye tyrant was shocked. If it was an ordinary evil eye, it could only resist, but the tyrant with the mutated skill avoided it with just a teleport.

However, the light ball that hit the air turned and flew over. The tyrant didn’t expect this as it teleported and dodged again, but the chasing light ball changed from 1 to 3. The tyrant instinctively felt that the light ball power seemed to be able to cause considerable damage to it, so it immediately launched a continuous teleport to avoid it. It fired rays from time to time, but unfortunately, it was either dodged by the enemy or blocked by the shield.

This kind of continuous teleportation and ray attack was quite laborious for the evil eye tyrant who had lost most of its spirit power. The gap between teleportations was getting longer which showed that it exhausted a lot of power. However, the control of the [Aurora Shot] was also quite exhausting. Chen Rui’s forehead was already sweaty, and the [Aurora Shot] was slowly weakening during long flight control. Chen Rui launched 3 more [Aurora Shot] in a row before it ran out.

The evil eye tyrant once again used the teleportation to avoid the consecutive [Aurora Shot]. Just as it landed, a figure rushed down from mid-air. The two blue lights in his hands swept toward the tyrant like lightning. It was Roman.

Roman’s timing of the attack was quite well grasped. He had been observing the teleport rhythm of the evil eye tyrant just now. The evil eye tyrant still couldn’t use the teleportation yet.

The advantage of this tyrant was its spirit power. Perhaps because its mutated spirit power was particularly high, the rest of its qualities were relatively low; they were only at Great Demon King level. Close combat was its weakness. As long as this attack was successful, it would definitely be injured severely.

As Roman’s double blades were about to pierce the tyrant, there was a sudden “boom” sound in his head as if he was being hit by a huge wave. His movements were stagnant while his body suddenly fell to the ground. He covered his head with a painful expression. If it wasn’t because the evil eye tyrant had consumed a huge amount of spirit power and the protection of the [Destroying Evil] power, this powerful spirit shock was enough to make him faint on the spot.

The spirit shock which was shot in a rush made the evil eye tyrant’s power to drop drastically. As it was about to release rays to destroy the nasty sneak attacker, it suddenly felt a dangerous breath ahead. It saw the enemy with strange abilities was covered in black flames, and the entire passage was dyed with a strange color.

Originally, ordinary attacks could not break through the tyrant’s mental defenses which were spread all over its skin, but Roman’s dual blades that went all out contained a special [Destroying Evil] power which was the nemesis of the evil eye. Two blue lights were firmly nailed to the tyrant. One of them was nailed to the only huge eye in the center, and a lot of fluid came out of its wound.

The evil eye tyrant screamed in agony, and its spirit power burst out fiercely like a real storm. Roman was severely smashed on the opposite stone wall by an overwhelming powerful force. It almost broke the power that was protecting his body. His internal organs were severely injured as he spat out several mouthfuls of blood. He was almost unable to move.

After the evil eye tyrant burst out of the spirit storm, all kinds of feelings such as confusion and feebleness suddenly appeared in its brain. However, for the evil eye, which was almost immune to negative spiritual magic, this kind of power was not enough to scare it. What horrified it was that all qualities, no matter it was spirit power or speed, had been weakened at the same time.

Immediately afterward, the cave seemed to tremble under the influence of some terrifying force. The terrifying breath brewing on the opposite side had exploded. The evil eye tyrant had to barely open its wounded eyes to vaguely see a winding huge red creature pounced toward it., The terrifying aura emanating from his body made it feel a strong fear.

At this time, the evil eye tyrant was almost exhausted. It could no longer use the teleportation. It could only shift the remaining spirit power to resist it, but it was still unable to take it. The injured eyeball was constantly squirting fluid under the immense pressure, and its protection power was gradually collapsing before it finally lost its consciousness.

After a long time, the tremor of the cave finally stopped.

“This guy is actually not dead?” Chen Rui’s voice was a little surprised. It is indeed a demonic beasts of the Demon Emperor level. It took on the [Scorching Dragon Kill] head on in the [Dark Star Territory], but it hasn’t died yet.

“Not dead?” Roman coughed up blood while barely supporting his body to get up. He suddenly thought of something, and he was euphoric, “I hit the jackpot this time!”

Tame the beast!

chapters.title: Chapter 334 - Nephew
chapters.body:
Chapter 334 - Nephew

As long as this evil eye tyrant could be turned into the lifelong companion spirit body of [The Eye of Evil], then Roman could share power with this Demon Emperor-level tyrant. Then, his power would be improved by leaps and bounds! Not only that, this tyrant’s mutated talent was very powerful, so it would definitely play a very important role in future battles.

Roman’s eyes flashed in green light, “Leader, your brilliance is comparable to the Demon Realm’s 2 moons… No, it is simply comparable to Demon God!”

Chen Rui panted as he drank a bottle of recovery potion. He said harshly, “Cut the crap! You know that I can’t use my power within 24 hours after using this skill. Finish the damn ceremony quickly.”

“Um… leader, I don’t know if I should say something…”

“My time is precious. If you’re talking bullshit like repaying me with your body, say no more.”

Roman said hesitantly, “No… Um… The Demon Emperor-level tyrant which I saw last time doesn’t seem to be this one….”

“Huh… you bastard! Then shouldn’t we run away quickly?”

“……。”

“…”

The luck this time was not as bad as in the Silent Night Wetland last time as they did not encounter any more Demon Emperor-level tyrants or any powerful enemies on the way. They occasionally encountered a few Demon King-level evil eyes, but Roman, who was familiar with the way, got around them carefully.

Finally, the two escaped from this terrifying underground nest and returned to the Trevante Ruins on the ground. The long-lost light made them breathe a sigh of relief at the same time. However, they dared not slacken and kept running into the dense forest before they stopped.

The life breath of the evil eye tyrant was already quite weak. After being awakened, it finally surrendered after being driven by the instinctive desire of demonic beasts to survive and became the lifelong companion beast of [The Eye of Evil]. The [Destroying Evil] power made the evil eye tyrant, who turned to a spiritual body, to become a special mark tattoo that appeared on Roman’s chest.

Roman never dreamed that he would be able to subdue an evil eye tyrant as a lifelong companion beast this time. Under the triumph, his wound ruptured as he grinned with pain, but no matter how , the grin seemed annoying. The evil eye tyrant lost a lot of power this time, and it must take a fairly long recovery period before it could be of any use. There was still half a day left before the 3-day deadline given by Isabella. Chen Rui found the two magic horses tied outside the forest. He rode toward Town Rod where Isabella was with Roman.

Chen Rui learned from Roman that Isabella was indeed his father, Terstein’s younger sister, but the younger sister had to be preceded by the word ‘half’.

At that time, Roman’s grandfather, Tarus, fell in love with a female from the Leviathan Royal Family, Mia, who gave birth to Isabella. However, before that, he had a wife and a child from the Belphegor Royal Family, and this child was Roman’s father. Because the Breeze Shadow Empire of the Belphegor Royal Family was wiped out by the Leviathan Royal Family of the Illusive Demon Empire, there were many people who hated each other between the 2 royal families even though the Illusive Demon Empire was also wiped out later.

Roman’s grandfather overcame many difficulties and insisted on staying with his lover from the Leviathan Royal Family, but due to the hostility and the Belphegor Royal Family’s patriarchal tradition, she would inevitably suffer from contempt and bullying even if her man tried his best to protect her.

In the end, Mia who could no longer take it left angrily with her child. She remarried to someone from the Leviathan Royal Family, and it was said that she gave birth to a daughter.

Roman should really call Isabella his aunty. Even though the people discriminated against Isabella and her mother, Mia, Roman’s father, Terstein still protected this sister. The siblings had a good relationship.

However, people would change according to their own experience. Whether that feeling or family affection could survive after so many years was unknown. Furthermore, even relatives could become insignificant in the face of certain interests and choices. It was the same for demons and humans.

Perhaps due to the Breeze Shadow Boots, Isabella appeared quite cold after Roman revealed his identity. When Roman presented his intentions, Isabella first made things difficult before finally giving a clear answer. Roman’s current level was too low, and he was not qualified. [The Eye of Evil] must at least reach the [Destroying Evil] realm in order to be eligible for the answer.

Isabella “casually” told Roman an information about a ruin called Trevante in the black forest near Town Rod. It was a ruin left by the Belphegor Royal Family. There was an abandoned underground nest in it where a few “evil eyes” could help him raise the level of [The Eye of Evil]. However, Roman himself had the right to choose whether to go or not.

This was the only chance to obtain Breeze Shadow Boots. Roman knew that the ruin might be dangerous, but he did not hesitate to go straight to Trevante. If it weren’t for Chen Rui who came coincidentally, Roman’s trip, and even his life, could have ended with the words “gone forever”.

Analyzing from Roman’s words, Isabella was most probably Sabrina’s elder sister, but the two sisters should be sworn enemies. Sabrina also used Broc to kill Isabella’s brother, who was Roman’s father, Terstein. (There was no direct blood relationship between Sabrina and Terstein)

It was just that Chen Rui didn’t understand why Roman’s grandfather passed the Breeze Shadow Boots to his daughter instead of his son. Doesn’t the Belphegor Royal Family have a patriarchal tradition? Why did Tarus do the opposite?

Chen Rui told Roman about Sabrina. When Roman heard that Isabella and Broc should belong to the same force, he could not help clenching his fist.

“However, there are also enemies or rival factions within the same force. Perhaps that’s the case for Isabella with Broc and Sabrina. Otherwise, you will be in Broc’s hands now.” Although Chen Rui had a very bad impression of Isabella, he still explained his analysis objectively.

Roman nodded, “She instigated me to come to Trevante. Although I almost died, I feel that her intention is not to take my life. If it is to monopolize the Breeze Shadow Boots, she just needs to kill me directly since I cannot compete with her with my current strength.”

“In any case, this woman is not easy to deal with. You already know that she is a member of that mysterious force, so no matter what you say or do, you must be extra careful. Try to stay away from her sight and don’t reveal where Delia is.”

“I understand. Regardless of whether there is news about the Breeze Shadow Boots, I will go back for meditation and training for a while.” Roman suddenly smiled and said, “With the power and realization of the evil eye tyrant, my hope of reaching the Demon Emperor level will greatly increase. Sir leader, if you don’t make progress quickly, then you can admire the existence of this uncle.”

Chen Rui glanced at him contemptuously, “Don’t forget that I’m only a Higher Demon when I first met you while you were at the peak of Demon King power. Now that I have the Great Demon King power, you just barely reach Great Demon King. When you reach the Demon Emperor, maybe I will already be a Demon Overlord.

“…” Roman was speechless for a while.

The two talked all the way, and they were approaching Town Rod.

Chen Rui found Isabella at the highest grade hotel in town.

The appearance of the 2 made Isabella a little surprised, and then she gave Chen Rui an alluring smile, “Charles, I know you will come back safely, but I am still a little worried.

“That place… is indeed a little dangerous, but fortunately, I did not disappoint the expectations of a beautiful lady.”

Although Chen Rui spoke of it casually, the exhaustion that could not be concealed on his face which fully explained the thrill of this trip. He glanced at Roman, “However, as miss said, this guy is very annoying.”

“Um… Charles, you just saw some of my strengths and defined me so arbitrarily. How can I accept this?”

Chen Rui snorted coldly, “Your so-called strengths include ingratitude. Don’t forget who brought you out of that place.”

“I didn’t beg you to take me out. Instead, you wanted to do it yourself. Now it seems that you were commissioned by a lady.” Roman glanced at Isabella, “Is that so, my… madam aunty? This underground ruin that you recommended is really a wonderful place. I almost couldn’t come back because of the few small evil eyes.”

Isabella glanced at Chen Rui, then turned her gaze back to Roman. A red light flashed across her left eye as she nodded, “I can’t afford this title… but you are barely luckier than I expected. I was initially thinking to let this Sir Charles go to collect your body.”

Chen Rui pretended to just realize about the relationship between the two. He frowned slightly and said, “I’m a little tired. I’ll go outside and rest for a while.”

“Sir Charles, you don’t need to avoid it.” Roman grinned, “Since you’re willing to put in such great effort go to such a place to bring me out, should I call you my sir uncle?”

Chen Rui didn’t expect that this silly guy would suddenly use this title in front of Isabella, and he was dumbfounded. He replied with a wry smile, “It will be my honor if I deserve this title. Unfortunately, I’m just a friend of Miss Isabella at the moment….”

Roman interrupted him, “I’m not interested in exploring the level of intimacy between both of you. I just want you to be a witness here. The thing my madam aunty promised me…”

“That thing is in my hand.” Isabella answered instantly without waiting for him to say what it was.

Roman’s eyes lit up, “Then…”

“Then, my promise has been fulfilled. You should get lost now.”

Roman frowned, “Didn’t you agree…”

There was a hint of sarcasm in Isabella’s smile, “I promised to tell you the whereabouts of that thing. You know the answer now.”

This time, it was Roman’s turn to be dumbfounded. In Isabella’s original words, she did not state that she’ll give him the Breeze Shadow Boots, but there were obvious hints in her words. However, it turned out to be such an answer now!

Obviously, he was fooled.

I spent such a long time in Trevante at great risk and almost died. I didn’t expect it at last…

The anger expression on Roman’s face flashed over, but he sneered, “Yes, this is the answer indeed. Then, I will come to madam aunty’s place to take it away at an appropriate time. I won’t show up in the sight of madam aunty before then.”

Roman was also mentally prepared for this result. Since he was certain that the Breeze Shadow Boots was with Isabella, he would come to Isabella again when he had enough strength to take it away. This time his biggest gain was the evil eye tyrant. The most important thing right now was to return to the Dark Moon for training.

After speaking, Roman turned around and left without saying anything further. He originally proposed to Chen Rui that he would stay here until the 24-hour dangerous period of the [Scorching Dragon Kill] was over, but Chen Rui rejected this proposal. Hence, Roman left without hesitation in order not to affect the leader’s plan.

Seeing Roman’s departure, Chen Rui shook his head, “The guy who only sees the surface of the matter is really unlikable.”

Isabella looked curious, “Charles, did you see something more?”

“When I went there, this guy broke through a bottleneck at the critical moment of life and death. Even I can’t overlook the strange power in his left eye. In our human world, there are flying demonic beasts called Thunder Eagles. In order to let the nestling learn how to fly, it will cruelly push them down the cliff time and again. Natural selection will make the fittest survive. Danger and hardships may break the wings of the weaklings, but it can even hold up the wings of the strong ones.”

Isabella smiled charmingly, “This comment is very interesting. Charles, I should admire your expressive ability. It is obviously an evil intention of a little woman, but you can describe it as a kind intention. You are indeed a charming man. By the way, that Jardel should be dead now, right? How should I cover up this matter to make it sound nice? Maybe can I say that in order to relieve his pain, I let his soul return to the embrace of the Demon God?”

“Everyone has their own secrets.” Chen Rui shrugged, “I’m not a particularly curious person. More importantly, I’m not from the Demon Realm, so I’m not interested in these matters. I only hope that miss can give me the most needed help as friends.

“Why do I hear a little… sense of threat?” Isabella frowned, “Is it my illusion?”

Chen Rui smiled and said, “Of course it is an illusion. I also have an illusion. I have been in Town Rod for the past 3 days. I haven’t been to Trevante, and I don’t know some annoying person or a coachman, right?”

“Charles, you are such a wonderful person.” Isabella picked up the wine glass on the table, handed it to Chen Rui with a smile, and poured herself another glass, “Cheers to our common illusion.”

Chen Rui clinked glasses with her and took a sip of wine. He heard Isabella say with a smile, “However, there is something that is not an illusion. That coachman, Jardel, offended our Sir Charles, and as a result…”

“He is killed by me?” Chen Rui asked tentatively.

“That’s the truth, isn’t it?” Isabella glanced at his cup, pretending to be surprised, “Ah“, “That cup… I used it before. I was not careful just now…”

“It turns out that Miss Isabella and I kissed indirectly, but unfortunately, it was only indirect.”

“There will be a chance to get rid of the word ‘unfortunately’.” Isabella said with a smug smile, “I almost forgot to say that Jardel is actually the spy placed by the State Secretary Rommel next to me. Jardel was one of his henchmen. Although I am temporarily trusted by the Regent King, the higher I climb, the greater the injury if I fall. Especially when many people wanted to push a weak woman like me down. For instance, Rommel who is very selfish… ”

The woman is very good at scheming. Her every step is well-calculated. Chen Rui showed a stunned look, and then smiled bitterly, “In that case, I can only stand firmly on Isabella’s side, but this was originally my wish and honor.”

“You can call me Yini. There are not many people who can call me like that. Especially men.” Isabella smiled even more happily.

Chen Rui also secretly breathed a sigh of relief. I finally passed Isabella’s test for the time being. It was really not easy.

Could he really be Roman’s uncle?

chapters.title: Chapter 335 - Being Summoned
chapters.body:
Chapter 335 - Being Summoned

Patreon community goal update: We are close to the 1st community goal now, 37% more!

Isabella had another coachman. Perhaps when Chen Rui killed Jardel, she already had a new candidate. Chen Rui didn’t know if she had contacted the secret force and revealed about the human “Charles” in the past 3 days. The most important thing for him now was to think about how to deal with the most important meeting that was approaching.

The person he was meeting was the ruler of the Fallen Angel Empire, who was Shea’s uncle, Regent Obsidian. Lucifer.

From Chen Rui’s intel, Prince Obsidian was a cunning and suspicious person. Cunning might be part of being talented and visionary, but it did not represent them. Compared with the two real talented and visionary great emperors of the Demon Realm, Prince Obsidian could only be regarded as a regent who could barely sustain the role. However, Chen Rui still dared not slack off.

A few days later, Isabella’s carriage arrived at the capital and drove straight into the inner city where she was respectfully welcomed in.

It was also the highest administrative center of the empire, but the style of the Dark Shadow capital was prosperous and yet plain. It was like a stair-step commercial capital with a palace on a mountain as the center; while the Fallen Angel capital was a flat city structure with a solemn style. One could see the giant fallen angel statue in the palace from a distance. It was the iconic landmark of the capital.

The carriage came to a stop in front of a luxurious house.

“Will you help me down, Charles?” Isabella’s coquettish voice sounded. Along the way, the relationship between the two “progressed expeditiously” as if they were already very close friends.

“It’s a great honor.” Chen Rui got out of the carriage first, and then he politely held Isabella’s hand to get her out of the carriage.

There were a few people at the door of Isabella’s house who seemed to have waited for a long time. The leader was a tall, thin and handsome man who was dressed in gorgeous clothes. When he saw Isabella, he quickly greeted her.

Isabella smiled slightly as she held the hand that Chen Rui was about to let go and stuck her body on it. The plump chest was resting on his arm. Although it was only a partial contact, he could still experience the warmth and amazing bounciness.

Chen Rui was a normal man as well. Although he knew that this woman did this on purpose, his heartbeat still couldn’t help speeding up.

The expression of the man who greeted him instantly got stunned, and his murderous gaze fell on Chen Rui’s arm which Isabella was leaning against. If he had the talent of the evil eye, probably Chen Rui’s arm was already severely injured by now.

Race: Pride Royal Family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B, Physique: B-, Strength: B, Spirit: B, Agility: B-.

“Isabella.” When the man looked at Isabella, he showed a polite smile again as if he was ignoring Chen Rui’s existence. A beautiful and colorful bouquet of flowers appeared in his hand, “This is the 7-colored flowers that I plucked specially from the Rainbow Valley area. Do you like it?”

“Lordan, you should call me Lady Isabella,” Isabella took the flower, smelled it, and smiled gently, “The flower is beautiful. I’ll accept it. Thank you.”

When Lordan saw Isabella accepted the flowers, he said immediately, “In order to welcome Lady back to the capital, I have booked a private room at the Royal Trom Restaurant. Please accept my invitation.”

“I’m sorry, but I’m a little tired. Plus, I have an important guest.” Isabella smiled brightly at Chen Rui, which was completely different from the perfunctory smile she gave Lordan just now. She lovingly held Chen Rui and walked in the house.

So you are not tired when it comes to accompanying this man? As a gleam of cold light flashed in Lordan’s eyes, Chen Rui felt a spirit power hit his head. Lordan’s spirit and power had reached the middle stage of the Great Demon King. Lordan seemed to be training both physical power and magic. However, this impact level of spirit power was nothing to Chen Rui due to his [Anti-Magic] attributes. Moreover, he had also experienced the “training” at the evil eye nest, so he immediately took it indifferently, eliminating that impact completely.

Lordan launched several spiritual impacts in a row, but there was no effect at all. He could only watch Isabella intimately hold the man’s hand as they walked in while he, who was known as the capital’s favorite person, seemed to be just a background.

Lordan had always been arrogant. He had coveted Isabella for a long time. Although this man’s power is definitely above me, this is the capital. As the heir of the elder family, Lincoln Family, of the Fallen Angel Empire, how can I tolerate this stranger showing off in front of Isabella?

In fact, Chen Rui really didn’t mean to be pushy. Isabella deliberately displayed such affection in front of Lordan. It was obvious that Chen Rui was used as a shield. Maybe Lordan understood a little, but he would still vent his anger on Chen Rui.

Lordan’s golden pupils began to turn into black and white. His spirit power suddenly increased exponentially. His spirit power rose to B+, and an invisible spiritual impact surged toward Chen Rui.

This kind of power carried a completely different composition, but they were integrated in a mysterious way. They contained a ghastly breath.

[Heart of Light and Dark]! The strongest blood talent of the Lucifer Royal Family!

The [Heart of Light and Dark] was infinitely remarkable. It could even be considered one of the strongest talents in the Demon Realm Royal Family. Back then, the Lord of Midnight Sun used the [Lock of Light and Dark] to seal the poison dragon, Paglio. It made him unable to leave Blue Lake for even one step despite after he awakened.

In order not to affect Isabella, Lordan used a spirit erosion method. He would not blatantly kill Chen Rui because this would offend Isabella, but he must humiliate this man who dared to approach Isabella (even if he was just a shield) in front of the beauty.

Isabella, who was holding Chen Rui’s arm, sensed something strange, but she had no intention of stopping it. Instead, she got even closer to Chen Rui. This made Chen Rui unable to dodge the power of [Heart of Light and Dark], so he had to take it face on.

Chen Rui frowned slightly. He let the strange power of [Heart of Light and Dark] invade and envelop him. From this first-hand experience, he realized that it was actually 2 completely incompatible forces like fire and water. When it reached the enemy, this kind of fusion would produce explosions that were multiplied. It was infinitely remarkable indeed.

However, Chen Rui had already launched [Star Devouring] before the power of light and dark exploded. Even a Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord could not beat the Super System in his spiritual world. The mere spirit power of a Great Demon King level could not pose a threat even if it was [Heart of Light and Dark]. It would be devoured instantly.

If Lordan was not using this form of attack, Chen Rui could never solve it easily although he was still not afraid of it. However, if Lordan’s light and dark power entered the opponent’s spiritual world with its own origin like [The Eye of Incubus], perhaps both eyes would bleed profusely.

The two had already attacked and defended for several rounds within these few steps. Except for Isabella, no one else was aware of it.

Lordan only felt that the light and dark power he exerted just vanished into thin air because the man still let Isabella hold his hand as they walked forward as if nothing happened.

Lordan was furious. As he was about to force himself to channel his power again, the man suddenly turned around and glanced at him. There was a terrifying breath in these 2 eyes. In an instant, Lordan had an utter destruction feeling. The glance made his heart race. Even his father of Demon Emperor, Damir, never made him feel so.

Lordan’s advancement of spirit power to the peak of the Great Demon King was the result of using [Heart of Light and Dark], so there was already a certain backlash and time limit. Chen Rui’s glare with the territory feeling made Lordan’s forced advancement of power to suddenly backfire because of the disorder. He couldn’t hold it back at that moment and retreated 3 steps before he could stand firmly. His face turned red and white for a while as he forced a mouthful of blood back.

Seeing that the situation was not ideal, an attendant said in surprise, “Sir Lordan…”

Before he could finish his sentence, his face was already severely punched. His entire body flew out, and his life or death was unknown. Lordan ignored the unlucky guy and didn’t speak any more. He just walked onto a luxuriously decorated carriage with a pale face.

“Yini, can you let go of your hands? The nasty guy has left.”

Isabella smiled sweetly, but she didn’t let go, “I think you’ve misunderstood, Charles. I just feel safe holding you like this.”

“It’s not easy to want Yini to owe me a personal favor.” Chen Rui shook his head helplessly.

Chen Rui followed Isabella into her house. Isabella threw the 7-colored flowers that she was holding to the maid. As she took a deep breath, the originally plump breasts rose again, “Home sweet home… By the way, the unlikable guy just now is the heir of the Lincoln Family. It is one of the elder families of the empire. You have to be careful in the future.”

“First is the Minister of Military Affairs, and now the heir of the elder family…” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “Yini is really good at making enemies for me, but I have decided to stand on your side anyway. As for the Regent Royal Highness, please…”

“Relax, with the Red Spirit Lord’s guarantee, there should be no problems. I will report these things to the regent truthfully. Before that, you will stay with me temporarily while waiting for the good news.” Isabella didn’t mention anything about her role and seemed very tight-lipped about it.

However, according to Chen Rui’s analysis, Isabella’s method was likely to make this unfamiliar human more dependent on her in order to further use “Charles” to deal with certain political enemies or maybe due to the mysterious force. In this way, the stronger and more influential “Charles” was, the more beneficial it would be to her, so she would likely play a positive role in facilitating this matter.

That night, Chen Rui stayed in Isabella’s mansion. Nothing special or unusual happened, but the incident itself would definitely attract the attention of interested people.

1 day passed, 2 days, 3 days…

It was not until the fifth day when Chen Rui seemed impatient, Isabella belatedly told him a message, “Royal Highness Obsidian has been too busy these days. I asked people to work around and exerted a lot of effort to turn the Royal Highness’ attention to this matter.”

Chen Rui was secretly disdainful. Isabella is really “busy” these days. She has to change a few sets of clothes every day to participate in this dance or that invitation. She is really the capital’s famous flower indeed. Unfortunately, this flower is very poisonous.

Isabella showed a charming look, “How is Charles going to thank me?”

“As long as this thing succeeds, I can give up 10% of the benefits as a token of appreciation. As long as Yini always supports me, this token of appreciation will be effective for a long time.”

“I am just a widow, and not a lord or emperor… and I am not short of money. I don’t want your benefit.” Isabella shook her head gently, “Actually, I don’t have any requirements. As long as Charles can remember a pitiful and weak lady like me in the future.”

Chen Rui resolutely said, “Well, I owe you a favor then. I swear by the surname of Kemplot Family that I will repay the lady’s help in the future.”

“Women are deceived because they believe in the promises of men too much…” Isabella suddenly laughed, “Charles may be an exception. Alright, I know you are anxious these few days. Here is a pass token. You can take it to go to the palace where someone will take you to see the Regent Royal Highness. I can only do this for you. It is up to you whether you can get the approval of Royal Highness Obsidian.”

Chen Rui took the token and secretly speculated that Obsidian might be testing or conducting related investigations in the past few days. He finally made up his mind to formally contact Chen Rui now. In Isabella’s words, it seemed as though she had really made a great effort.

After thanking Isabella, Chen Rui took the pass token and rushed to the palace. As Isabella said, the palace guard respectfully introduced him into the palace after seeing the token Chen Rui presented.

After walking for a long time, the guard made a gesture of welcome in front of a palace that looked like a side hall and bowed back.

Chen Rui took a deep breath to suppress the nervousness in his heart before walking into the palace.

The hall of the palace was very spacious. There were no guards in it. Only one person was standing in front of the throne with his back toward Chen Rui.

This man had silver hair and wore a blue cloak. Although he was not tall, there was a steady and majestic feeling from a distance. Chen Rui had only experienced this kind of aura in Azgalor and Manu.

This person’s power has probably exceeded the Demon Emperor level!

Chen Rui walked forward along a flat red carpet before stopping on one level of stairs. There was a sudden shake, and his eyes flashed with shock. He immediately bowed and saluted, “Charles. Kemplot, the heir of Dragon Bright Empire’s Kemplot Family paying respect to the Regent Royal Highness.”

He was mentally prepared initially, but he was still shocked when he saw this person. He was not surprised by the powerful strength of this person, but the information displayed in the [Analytical Eyes] instead.

Race: Human!

Comprehensive Strength: Unable to judge!

This man is not Prince Obsidian, but a human!

Isabella revealed that there is a human in the Fallen Angel Capital who has a close friendship with Regent Obsidian. His name was Nero. The man in front of him should be Nero, and he had actually reached the Demon Overlord level!

As the man slowly turned around, his two eyes looked at Chen Rui like cold electricity as if to penetrate Chen Rui’s heart. There was a faint hostility in his voice, “It seems that you have noticed something. I’m not the Regent Obsidian. My name is Nero. Nero. Sherbert.”

Sherbert!

Chen Rui was shocked again. The only 2 Holy Empires recognized by the Light Divinity Temple in the human world, King Sherbert’s Blue Glory Empire and King Roland’s Dragon Bright Empire, were called the Descendants of Light. They seemed to coexist peacefully on the surface, and there were joint-marriages from time to time, but large and small fights had never ceased.

Chen Rui’s body, “Arthur”, was the prince of the Dragon Bright Empire, and Nero in front of him was actually from the royal family of the Blue Glory Empire.

The two royal families of the human Holy Empire actually “met” like that in Demon Realm.

Would Nero be his opponent or…

chapters.title: Chapter 336 - Body Of Light Blessing]! Charles’ Secret
chapters.body:
Chapter 336 - Body Of Light Blessing]! Charles’ Secret

Seeing Chen Rui’s astonishment, Nero said coldly, “I have been in the Demon Realm for 10 years. I remember that 10 years ago, the Kemplot Family was still very prosperous and their financial resources were enough to shake half of the human world.

Could it be that in just 10 years, Dragon Bright’s top business family fell into such dire states? Or you are not the heir of the Kemplot Family? This matter is a scam from the very beginning?”

This sentence should have been a sudden blow, but Chen Rui did not have any special reaction. He knew that the Demon Overlord powerhouse had reached a very nuanced sense of the world, so he had calmed down after being surprised.

With Chen Rui’s state of mind from the [Refined Mind] training, even if the opponent was a Demon Overlord-level powerhouse, it was difficult to see through him. Moreover, he had faced such powerhouses as Manu and Jacob previously whose power should be above Nero. Therefore, facing Nero’s coercive questioning, Chen Rui’s expression remained as usual without any signs of panic.

“Dear royal family, there is no need to explain my identity.” Chen Rui bowed slightly, “As for the Kemplot Family, there is a saying that the world events are unpredictable. Let alone 10 years ago, even a year ago, no one thought it would be like this. My family was sanctioned by the second prince, Garfield, and Lex the Great was also deceived, so…”

“So you resorted to come to ask for help from the demons?” Nero continued Chen Rui’s sentence with a hint of sarcasm on his face.

Chen Rui came here in the name of Prince Obsidian’s summons, but it was the human Nero who appeared here now. Although the existence of Obsidian was not felt in the [Analytical Eyes] range, Chen Rui had every reason to believe that Obsidian was watching every move in the hall in a certain way, so this should be the most important test.

“Demons?” Chen Rui resisted the pressure from Nero, while trying to stay calm, “It seems that I’m not the first human to come to the Demon World. Even sir came here as early as 10 years ago. In a sense, the nature of our behavior is not different. It’s just that you seek for strength, while I seek for much-needed financial support.”

“Besides, the term “demon” is not appropriate right?” Chen Rui continued, “In the human classics, the demon is described as a gruesome, barren and remote world inhabited by a group of ferocious, cunning, cannibal demons. In fact, everyone knows that demons have their own civilization and traditions. Compared with humans, they are just different in appearance. As for cannibalism… It is undeniable that some demons do have blood-eating habits, but most of them do not. If you want to compare, human’s cruel methods to the same kind are more cruel and cunning. It is bloodless cannibalism that hardly even leaves any bones behind. I believe Sir Nero knows this kind of example better than I do.”

Nero sneered and said, “I only know one thing. As long as a part of your words is made public, the Kemplot Family will be completely annihilated.

“However, it’s undeniable that what I said is the truth, isn’t it? Though I will completely reverse what I said just now on some occasions. With Sir Nero’s power, it’s not necessary to use dirty means like a recording stone for weak individuals like me.”

“You do have some guts, maybe you are really the heir of the Kemplot Family” Nero’s hostility had turned to murderous intent, “Then as the Blue Glory Empire Royal Family, I will definitely not let the top business family of Dragon Bright Empire to have opportunity to revive, so you cannot leave here alive today!”

When Chen Rui felt that murderous intent was not a tentative bluff, he shouted, “Sir Nero! This is the Demon Realm, not the Blue Glory Empire! I came to cooperate with the Regent Royal Highness with sincerity and great interest. You have no right to kill me!”

“Power is the right” The terrifying oppression from Nero had enclosed Chen Rui. “Your so-called huge benefits are nothing but wealth. Wealth cannot purchase power. For Prince Obsidian or the entire Fallen Angel Empire, the help of a real Saint powerhouse is far more than what you can give them!”

Chen Rui cursed in his heart. He originally thought that he could use Nero’s relationship as a “hometown buddy” to gain Obsidian’s trust.

“You’re wrong! The benefits I bring are not just wealth! It is the true power that can be held in the hands of the collaborators! Unimaginable power!” Chen Rui yelled, and his voice resounded throughout the hall in an attempt to attract Obsidian’s attention.

“No matter what fancy wordings you use, it’s useless. You can only blame yourself for being so unlucky to meet the Sherbert Royal Family. Plus, if I kill you in Demon Realm, your family will only think that you were killed by demons!”

Nero saw his intention and did not talk any more nonsense. A dazzling light appeared in his hand. Although Nero’s power was far inferior than the Demon Overlords that Chen Rui had encountered, it was impossible for Chen Rui, who had not even reached the Demon Emperor realm, to fight against Nero even if he just advanced to Demon Overlord.

Given the difference in power between the 2 sides, Chen Rui probably wouldn’t be able to hold on for even a few seconds. The most terrible thing was that the life-saving weapons like God-Eating Mask or Demon Shield couldn’t be exposed. Once exposed, his entire plan and previous efforts would go in vain. Hence, he could only escape now. Although it was a pity to be forced to give up in the final step of planning, if he lost his life, he would lose everything.

As the light in Nero’s hand burst out, it abruptly hit Chen Rui like the rays of the evil eye. However, as Nero frowned, he launched the ray in another direction again, then launching another ray after the second ray.

The third shot hit a blue dome. It was a pity that the dome only lasted for two seconds before it was shattered by the terrifying destructive power contained in the light. The repercussions of the light hit the target firmly.

Chen Rui didn’t expect Nero to react so quickly. Both of his teleports were predicted correctly in a short time. Chen Rui couldn’t use teleports for the third time anymore. He could only resist with a protective barrier, but he still couldn’t defend against it. He didn’t even had the time to launch the [Star Gate], then he was hit by that terrifying destructive light.

However, the light actually became several times weaker after penetrating Chen Rui as if most of the power in the light was being absorbed.

Nero’s facial expression changed. Chen Rui felt that a considerable part of the destructive power of the light was transformed into his own power. Knowing that it was the [Body of Light Blessing], he did not dare to hesitate and immediately launched the [Star Gate]. As he was about to enter the gate, a huge force suddenly came from behind with a terrifying flame power.

Before Chen Rui had time to enter [Star Gate], his whole person was knocked back. He felt that his internal organs seemed to be turning. If it weren’t for the characteristics of [Damage Absorption] and [Astral Form], this terrifying blow would have almost killed him.

Immediately after that, the dazzling light appeared again, and most of it was absorbed by Chen Rui’s body too this time, but the shock of the remaining power intensified his internal wounds. He spewed a mouthful of blood.

“[Body of Light Blessing]!” Nero’s body appeared in front of the [Star Gate] in an instant, and he said, “Who on earth are you!”

Chen Rui slowly got up. The power gap between the 2 sides was too large, and the [Star Gate] had already been revealed. Even if he launched any magic like [Scorching Dragon Possession], it would be difficult to escape successfully.

At this moment, another person’s information prompt appeared in the [Analytical Eyes].

Race: Pride Royal Family (mutated).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to judge.

Although I didn’t feel anyone’s breath, the [Analytical Eyes] can’t go wrong. This Demon Overlord-level of Pride Royal Family must be Obsidian! A thought flashed through Chen Rui’s heart, and he began to think quickly. It is already the most critical moment now. Success or failure, life or death will depend on this round.

“If I can choose, I would rather not have this damn [Body of Light Blessing].” Chen Rui ignored his heavy injury. He coughed blood while crawling up with a sneer on his face, which was meant for himself, “Don’t worry. Although this body has blood connections with that man, even if that man knows that I died in your hands, he won’t take it to heart. Because I’m just an illegitimate child.”

These words made Nero even more shocked. Even in the two royal families of the Holy Empire, the [Body of Light Blessing] is extremely rare and can only be born in the purest royal blood. That is to say, “that man” who Charles said is most probably the current Roland king, Lex the Great!

The heir to the top business family of Dragon Bright Empire turned out to be Lex the Great’s biological son!

This “insider secret” made Nero shocked. So who is the mother of “Charles”? Could the woman who gave birth to the [Body of Light Blessing] also be a member of the royal family? Why did he become a shameless illegitimate child to have [Body of Light Blessing]?

Nero himself was also a member of the royal family. Naturally, he knew that the more glamorous was the rich and noble, the more shameful matters that were covered up. Some absurd shameful matters, particularly in the royal family, could be described as “heinous”. However, what Nero cared about now was not these gossip scandals, but the bloodlines mentioned by “Charles”. Although he didn’t know how magical this kind of bloodline induction was, he was sure that it was a kind of talented power unique to the Roland Royal Family.

Once Lex the Great knew that his son died in Nero’s hands, perhaps he wouldn’t be as unresponsive as “Charles” himself thought. Even if it wouldn’t cause a dispute between the two countries, with Lex the Great’s power and character, he would revenge badly in secret. Nero had only recently succeeded in breaking through to the real Saint (early stage of the Demon Overlord). He was far from being able to compete with the senior Saint powerhouses like Lex. Besides, there were more powerhouses in Dragon Bright Empire apart from Lex the Great.

“Why the hell did you come to the Demon Realm for?” Nero weighed it over and over again. Though the same sentence, this question was more like asking on behalf of Obsidian. Even if this Charles was going to die, he couldn’t die in Nero’s hands.

When Chen Rui could feel Nero’s murderous intent weakened, his face showed more mocking expression, “No matter who I am, I’m currently the heir of the Kemplot Family. I came to Demon Realm to seek collaborators.”

“It’s that simple?”

“Isn’t it simple enough? I’m also the man’s biological son, but I don’t have the competing qualifications to inherit the empire. Even so, Garfield refuses to let me go. He wants to put me and the entire Kemplot Family to death!” Chen Rui’s emotions seemed to be agitated. Originally, this was just a backup plot just in case, but now the situation had changed so fast that it could only be the main scene.

Nero was indifferent. Such disputes were common in the royal family. Killing among siblings for power was nothing new in human history.

“I’m not satisfied! I have the [Body of Light Blessing,] but I can only train earth magic! With the power and ability beyond those princes, I can only become a servant crawling under their feet!”

“Charles” clenched his fist, “Not only will I overcome the difficulties, I must also turn the tables for real! Not only I want to bring down Garfield, I also want to bring down everyone including the superior man! I want him to know who is the most excellent successor who can truly inherit the entire Dragon Bright Empire!”

“Even if you can fulfill your wish and ascend to the throne of Dragon Bright Empire, you will still be utterly discredited and will not be tolerated by future generations once the matter of you turning to the Demon Realm for help is exposed.”

Nero dampened Chen Rui’s enthusiasm. He secretly calculated that if the Dragon Bright Empire could be engaged in internal fights, it would be beneficial to the Blue Glory Empire no matter who the final winner was. He changed his mind about Chen Rui now. It was not that he coudn’t kill Chen Rui himself. Instead, he definitely couldn’t kill Chen Rui at all. Having the [Body of Light Blessing] was very convincing.

Ordinary members of the royal family, even Nero himself, did not possess this special physique. This “Charles” must be the direct bloodline of the Dragon Bright Empire, but according to his age, when I left the human world 10 years ago, I have never heard of such a prince in Dragon Bright. It seems that his “life experience” should be true.

“As you said, power is right.” Chen Rui drank a bottle of healing potion and sneered, “History is written by the winner. As long as I become the last winner, it’s up to me to say whether I asked the Demon Realm for help or I was colluding with demons.”

Nero watched him for a while without saying a word. He was secretly thinking about how to use this unexpected opportunity… Threat? Control?

At this time, a voice finally came from behind, “History is written by the winner. I agree with this statement. However, what I want to know is how do you turn the tables by only relying on a precarious business family? How can you bring down those opponents? Plus, what so-called “unimaginable power” can my Fallen Angel Empire get?

Chen Rui’s gaze shifted. The true master finally appeared.

When he turned his head, he saw a man not far behind. This man was burly, blond, bearded, and his facial features were very prominent. His eyes were mesmerizing, and there was a majestic and impenetrable pressure in his eyes. He was the current highest authority of the Fallen Angel Empire, the Regent Obsidian.

The phrase “my Fallen Angel Empire” unabashedly showed his strong possessiveness and ambition.

“This must be Obsidian Royal Highness.” Chen Rui sorted out his somewhat messy clothes and saluted, “First of all, please forgive me, Royal Highness. If it is not for this Sir Nero, who didn’t give me a chance to see Royal Highness and tried to kill me directly, I think Royal Highness may hear me confess my life experience at an appropriate time in the future.

As for Royal Highness’ question… Please allow me to answer Royal Highness alone. I believe we will all get the most satisfactory answer. ”

Obsidian looked at Nero. Nero rolled his eyes and smiled, “Obsidian Royal Highness, I think I can prove one thing. [Body of Light Blessing] can only be created with the purest blood of our 2 human Holy Empire royal families. From the perspective of royal blood, maybe Charles should be called ‘Royal Highness’.

After saying this, Nero turned and left the palace. There were only Prince Obsidian and Royal Highness Charles left in the hall.

Could the main scene be just an act? Or could he achieve it as well? But what did the human realm have for Chen Rui to fight for? Hmmm… perhaps another woman?

chapters.title: Chapter 337 - Diak
chapters.body:
Chapter 337 - Diak

After confirming that Nero had left, Chen Rui said, “Let’s talk about the first step of our cooperative plan. I believe Miss Isabella should have reported the benefits of this plan to Royal Highness. This kind of continuous and generous profit completely…”

“Isabella just told me the information she collected and Josh’s guarantee, she didn’t say anything else, “Obsidian directly interrupted Chen Rui. “In short, Sir Charles, what I want to hear is the key question. This is the only way for you to get a satisfactory answer.” “Before this, I was only planning to cooperate with a lord. I never thought of the opportunity to cooperate with an empire, so I have been brewing some real plans for a long time. It should be ready for implementation now. I can assure Your Highness that the Fallen Angel Empire is the only beneficiary of this project and my only collaborator. This project is definitely not just a huge wealth for Your Highness and me. However, before telling the detailed plan for the first step, I want to ask Your Highness a question.”

When Obsidian heard Chen Rui said, “It’s definitely not just a huge wealth”, his eyes moved slightly, “What’s the question.”

“There is a saying that there is nothing you can’t sell. It’s just a matter of whether the chips are enough. What I want to ask is whether the friendship between Nero and Your Highness can surpass this rule?” Chen Rui wiped the blood stains on the corner of his mouth. “I believe Your Highness has seen the situation just now. I don’t want to have a sharp blade hanging on my head, threatening my life and plans at any time… Maybe it is also our plan…”

“…Our. You used this term too early. I have to know your bargaining chip first. To keep it simple, I don’t like to beat around the bushes.” Chen Rui really simply said a few words, and Obsidian was immediately intrigued when he heard these words.

No one knew what Obsidian and “Charles” were talking about in the palace this morning, but when the human walked out of the palace, the smile on his face seemed confident.

As Chen Rui came out of the palace and walked to the corner of the inner city’s street, he saw a succubus dressed as a maid approaching, “Sir Charles, Lady Isabella invites sir to the Donomie Pavilion outside the city. Please follow me on the carriage, sir.”

Chen Rui nodded, and followed the maid into a carriage. They rushed toward the outer city. The “Donomie Pavilion” was even outside the outer city wall. It was located in the suburbs where it was quiet and remote. Chen Rui initially thought it was a restaurant or something, but it looked like a private house now. I don’t know why Isabella invited me to such a remote place?

“Madam is inside. Please come with me, sir.”

Chen Rui nodded, but he was vigilant and secretly guarding. Although he suffered badly after encountering Nero, his physique was extraordinary. Coupled with the grand master-level healing potion, he was almost fully-recovered.

“Sir, please wait a moment.” The maid took Chen Rui into the yard and bowed back.

The yard was very big. Chen Rui faintly felt a strange breath surrounding it, and this kind of breath even felt somewhat familiar.

After waiting for a while, Isabella still didn’t show up. Chen Rui was not in a rush, so he said indifferently, “Come out, this little trick is meaningless.”

“Hmph!” In the courtyard, a figure appeared out of thin air. It was a young man who was full of energy. His crisp short shirt seemed simple, but the material was the best. He looked extraordinary, but Chen Rui felt that this “extraordinary” was somewhat feigned.

Race: Pride Royal family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C

Chen Rui’s eyes didn’t look at this guy who was only a Demon King, Instead, he looked behind this guy, “There is one more.”

“Oh?” The young man sounded faintly surprised. The shadow behind him suddenly became blurred as they condensed into a human form. It was a fair-skinned black-haired man at about forty years old who was wearing a gray robe. It was just that his skin was a little too fair that it seemed to be a pale, bloodless face.

Race: Greed Royal Family (mutated).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B. Physique: C+, Strength: C-, Spirit: B, Agility: B-

The young man said coldly, “You are indeed quite powerful. No wonder you dared to pester Lady Isabella.”

Chen Rui immediately understood the crux of the matter. He frowned, “Is that why you cheated me here today?”

“First of all, you have to understand one thing. This is the capital, not your kind of unknown place. The condition here is more complicated than you think. If you want to live in this place, or live better, you must understand some rules…”

“Do you mean this warning yourself, or did you say it for someone else?” Chen Rui looked thoughtful. “I remember I offended a guy called Lordan. He even seems to be a heir of a veteran family.”

“Don’t compare me, Diak, with that kind of guy. Lordan is just an incompetent person born from a woman from the side royal family who married the Lincoln Family. I, Diak, am the purest member of the Lucifer Royal Family!” The young man proudly said, “Isabella is mine. If you still don’t act sensibly, be prepared to die. This is definitely not just a warning. Understand?”

As if corresponding to Diak’s threat, the strange breath of the pale middle-aged man became stronger and stronger. Some plants in the courtyard began to wither.

Chen Rui nodded, “Understood.”
