“Then get away from Isabella immediately! If I see you with her again,…” Chen Rui interrupted Diak impolitely, “I have no interest in Isabella and the boring jealousy games you all are playing. I’ll just say that whatever I, Charles, will not let an overbearing little character like you tell me what to do!” If it was before entering the palace today, he still didn’t want to create trouble easily so as not to affect his big plans, but he and Obsidian had confirmed the cooperation plan between the two sides now. Therefore, there was naturally no need to tolerate Diak.

As a collaborator, “Charles” established an image of neither humble nor arrogant in front of Prince Obsidian. Particularly in terms of future plans, he didn’t show any weak attitude at all, and the “blueprint” he described won Obsidian’s praise.

This image must always be preserved.

Besides, dignity was never given by others, but earned by oneself.

“Since you are looking for death by yourself, you can’t blame me! Sulfur!” Diak’s eyes flashed, and his body quickly moved back. The gray-robed man named Sulfur waved his hand and a cluster of black mist appeared around Chen Rui’s body, surrounding him from all sides. It was the dark magic, [Decomposing Mist], which contained extremely vicious poison. As long as a little bit of it was inhaled, the body would be badly poisoned. The internal organs would quickly rot before finally becoming a pile of bones.

Chen Rui didn’t even move, allowing the black mist to cover him. In Diak’s horrified gaze, Chen Rui took a deep breath, and the poisonous mist quickly shrank. He actually sucked in everything.

Diak had personally seen Sulfur use the [Decomposing Mist] on several Demon King-level demonic beasts, and they were down to only skeletons in a short period of time. I didn’t expect that this person did not avoid it and took the initiative to swallow the poisonous mist!

Sulfur also seemed surprised, then he became solemn. He began to be serious about this opponent who was only “an early stage Great Demon King”. He waved continuously, and the sharp black feather arrows condensed by countless dark elements flew toward Chen Rui.

A blue round shield appeared around Chen Rui. Those arrows with strong penetration power could not break the defense of this round shield. Sulfur continued to cast several dark magics, but the shield only showed some cracks. It was still intact.

The time limit of the protective cover was once an hour. It had been an hour since the last fight against Nero now, so the teleportation and the protective cover could be used again.

“This is your threat? I haven’t even attacked slightly until now.” Chen Rui scornfully looked at Diak who was watching the game in the distance. “It seems that you are far behind Lordan. You are an incompetent generation who will only hide behind others and create clamor.” Diak was furious, but he didn’t dare to come over. He shouted, “Sulfur, use your strongest magic. I want to personally see this guy crushed to pieces! Don’t worry, I have sent away the people here!”

Sulfur roared, and his spirit power skyrocketed. Suddenly, something broke out on the ground where Chen Rui was. It was actually a group of 40 to 50 skeletons. At the same time, a group of phantoms floated out. The phantoms were the undead creatures which were transformed from the dead with a strong spirit power when they were alive. They had a strong immunity to physical damage, and could sometimes be completely immune.

Not only that, there were 2 more unidentified creatures beside Sulfur. They had a pale green complexion and a ferocious appearance. The claws in the brown robe had sharp nails, and the cracked mouth corners reveal terrifying fangs.

Race: Vampire (Undead). Comprehensive strength: B. Physique: B-, Strength: B, Spirit: B-, Agility: B

The appearance of those undeads did not surprise Chen Rui because he had felt a little undead breath in the courtyard previously. With the information of the [Analytical Eyes], he could already be sure that the other party was really good at undead magic.

I actually encountered another undead magician!

The appearance of the vampire in front of Chen Rui slightly surprised him. This kind of undead creature production was very complicated. Since no suitable “material” was found, even Guradam hadn’t seen it in that border town last time. Unexpectedly, Sulfur has 2 Great Demon King middle stage vampires! If Guradam knows about it, his eyes would gleam.

The speed and power of the vampire is amazing. It can automatically heal injuries, and it has a certain amount of spiritual magic power which is quite difficult to deal with. Coupled with Sulfur’s own dark magic, it is no wonder that Diak looks confident.

However, Sulfur seems very tired with a lot of sweat on his head. It seems that manipulating these 2 vampires has consumed a lot of his energy. This kind of control power is not comparable at all with Guradam who can control the Great Demon King level terror knight with only his projection.

After Chen Rui’s quick thinking, his figure shifted and rushed towards Diak. Diak knew that he was definitely not an opponent, so he was taken aback and quickly activated a magic ring. His body was suddenly wrapped in a silver light which was obviously a protective item.

Before Chen Rui attacked Diak, the 2 vampires behind him were already close to him like a phantom. The speed was amazing. Chen Rui reluctantly gave up his “plan” to get Diak as his hostage. His figure shook as he fled to the house inside.

“Catch him! Don’t let him run away!” Diak exclaimed in a panic. His previous demeanor was gone.

Chen Rui fled in any way he could in a rush and didn’t choose the main door. Instead, he fled all the way into several houses inside.

It was almost self-defeating as the vampire behind him followed closely. In the blink of an eye, the 3 figures had already gone into the distant house. Even Sulfur couldn’t make a move in time, so he could only control Phantom to chase Chen Rui.

Sulfur was about to chase him, but he felt a strange breath coming from the inside of the house. It was even accompanied by a destructive breath that made his soul tremble. His own strength was actually partially weakened for no reason. He was taken aback. At this moment, the ground trembled, and he could hear the sound of the building cracking and collapsing.

This sound ended soon, and the terrifying breath disappeared. Sulfur suddenly screamed and covered his heart in pain with an unbelievable expression in his eyes.

A figure appeared in the courtyard instantly, and 2 things were thrown to the ground at the same time.

It was the 2 vampires. One had no head as if cut off by a sharp blade, while the other one had a big hole in its chest. Although it was not dead, it had completely lost its combat power. Furthermore, the hole was gradually expanding at a speed visible to the naked eye. It was an unknown terrifying corrosive force which made it unable to heal itself.

Sulfur controlled these 2 vampires of his level by using some kind of soul fusion secret technique. Since one of the vampires was dead while the other was seriously injured now, the spirit trauma to Sulfur was also quite serious.

“Damn it!” Sulfur’s body trembled violently. Not to mention the spirit trauma, what he felt distressed about was these 2 vampires. These were his greatest efforts, yet they were destroyed so easily!

What startled him apart from the vampires was that he also lost connections with the phantoms . It seemed that they were all killed.

It was just a short moment…

What happened in that room? What power is this?

Without waiting for Sulfur to cast the next magic, Chen Rui appeared behind him again in a ghostly manner. With only one blow, the undead magician fainted to the ground. The skeletons around him suddenly stopped moving and fell down one by one as if they had lost their strange vitality.

Chen Rui’s combat skills and tactics had now reached a mature level. If he was going to fight head-on in the yard, it would not be easy for Chen Rui to win over a Mammon Royal Family who was proficient in dark magic, plus the powerful fighting power of vampires. If he wanted to end the fight quickly, he might need to use his trump card of [Scorching Dragon Kill]. By attracting the vampires into the house, he could avoid exposing his own power, and make use of the terrain to destroy each one of them. Combined with the power of the [Dark Star Territory], “Thunderous Sound” artifact and [Aura Blade], he really accomplished everything in one fell swoop. The 2 vampires were killed quickly, while for those phantoms, it was just a piece of cake.

“Let me correct you, I’m not running away.” Chen Rui smiled and walked toward Diak who was in utter disbelief. “I just don’t want you to see my power. I don’t know what the capital rules are, but there is an universal rule regardless of the location. That is fist.”

Diak did not expect that Sulfur sent out the 2 strongest vampires, but they were all killed so easily. Looking at Chen Rui who was slowly approaching, he wanted to escape, but his legs were unable to move like dumbbells.

This “Charles” is terrifying!

The more terrifying thing was that the magic prop that protected his body just now could no longer be used in a short time.

“Don’t kill me! I’m from the royal family! If” Before he finished his words, he was punched hard in his stomach. It was so painful that he crouched, and even his tears came out.

Before he could speak again, he got another kick under his ribs. Diak clearly heard the sound of his rib fracturing. He screamed and fell to the ground.

Diak nodded quickly while covering his wound, not even daring to take a breath, “Sir, spare my life!

I’m foolish for offending sir, and I will never dare to do it anymore.” If Diak had been stubborn, Chen Rui would see him differently, but this guy was hiding behind others while gesticulating at first. He was wagging his tail and begging for mercy now. It was very disdainful indeed.

However, Chen Rui knew very well in his heart that although this guy begged for mercy on the surface, he must be gritting his teeth with hatred and thinking about how to get revenge.

Diak was a member of the royal family. If Chen Rui killed him directly, Chen Rui would definitely have endless troubles which might also affect the plan. If Chen Rui did not kill him, there would still be endless troubles. Chen Rui didn’t want to be alert of a mad dog all the time.

Chen Rui’s gaze fell on the undead magician who had fainted to the ground, and he asked faintly, “You want to survive?” Diak nodded eagerly while he secretly thought, as long as I get through today, I will get back my revenge in folds!

“Then… Take off your clothes immediately!” Diak was dumbfounded, thinking he had heard it wrongly.

“Take off your clothes and pants! I won’t say it the third time!” Chen Rui faintly exuded a terrifying destruction breath.

Diak shuddered as he thought of the capital’s aristocrats who like men, and he felt a chill rise from his spine. He never thought that one day he would also face the crisis of being raped.

He now really regretted what he did to provoke the opponent today~

Which bastard said that Charles and Isabella have a flirtatious relationship? He clearly likes man. Chen Rui’s murderous intention made Diak even more chilled, and at the same time his butt was even more tense. He finally took off his clothes one by one as in shiver if he was a weak woman who was about to be abused.

When Diak tearfully took off his last pair of shorts, the other party’s order came, “Go and take off Sulfur’s clothes!”

Does this Sir want to play threesome? Diak tearfully stretched out the hand of sin to the undead magician who had fainted.

However, things did not seem to be going in his most worried direction.

“Alright, you hug him. Yes, this posture…” “Show a more affectionate expression…” “Giggle in his ears…”

“Change another posture…”

“……………”

“…”

Chen Rui endured the nausea while fiddling with the memory crystal in his hand. He constantly commanded the two naked men to assume various affectionate poses. Of course, it was just postures, and he did not allow the two guys to truly have “in-depth exchange”.

“Okay! Put your clothes on.”

Chen Rui’s voice made the somewhat numb Diak stop and put on his clothes quickly.

“The intimate scenes of you two just now are all in this memory crystal.” Chen Rui threw the crystal in his hand. “I can assume the matter today did not happen, but if I get to know that you dare to make any small movements behind my back, then this crystal will be copied into countless copies and distributed to every corner of the Fallen Angel Empire. If you want to be famous, you might as well try it.”

“You, you are the real demon,” Diak slumped to the ground.

The memory crystal could be another huge business xD

chapters.title: Chapter 338 - Ball
chapters.body:
Chapter 338 - Ball

As soon as Chen Rui returned to his residence, he saw Isabella waiting at the gate and welcoming him in with a smile.

“Welcome back, our senior sir consultant.”

Chen Rui was startled, “Senior consultant?”

“Just now, the Regent Royal Highness has announced that he will hire Sir Charles as the palace’s high grade consultant.” Isabella smiled, “The palace senior consultant has no real power, but the status is high. It is comparable to the nobles with knighthood. There are only a handful of senior consultants in the entire capital. For example, the president of the Fallen Angel Potioneer Association, the president of the Mechanic Association, and so on. Your human buddy Nero is also one of them. It seems that your plan has been successful. Congratulations, Charles.”

“Thanks to you, Yini.” He learned from Obsidian that Isabella did not provide any favored help, but Chen Rui did not expose this matter. “Actually, only the first step of my plan is successful, but this is a very good start.”

Indeed, Chen Rui’s plan had already taken the most successful and critical step.

“Great.” Isabella frowned suddenly, “You… seem to be injured. Did something happen just now? You seemed to be out of the inner city?”

“It’s nothing, just a trivial matter.” Chen Rui didn’t mention Diak’s matter as he shook his head. “As for the injury, I was attacked by Nero when I was in the palace… I almost died in his hands, but it’s okay now.”

“Didn’t the Regent Royal Highness summon you this time? Why would you have a conflict with Nero?”

Chen Rui didn’t know if Isabella had any part in arranging Nero to probe him, so he said casually, “It’s nothing, he’s just in a different force in the human world. I think we should keep a certain appropriate distance because Nero has reached the real Saint level which is the Demon Overlord level of your demons. It will be detrimental to you if you are too close to me.”

“Charles really cares about me.” Isabella said with a grin, “Nero only became Demon Overlord not long ago. He came to Demon Realm for this purpose. It’s just that his current state of power is not very stable. Maybe he will leave the Demon Realm in half a year. As for me… I’m just a small financial adviser, and I’m still insignificant to him. Besides, I also have a good friend called Krobelus. With this friend here, Nero will not dare to do anything to me.”

Chen Rui was surprised. Krobelus is one of the 3 people that Athena had mentioned to be careful of. Judging from the news disclosed by Isabella, the power of Krobelus is even higher than that of Nero.

The foundation of an empire was quite deep including Obsidian himself who was a Demon Overlord powerhouse. There must be a lot of hidden power. Otherwise, Manu and the others would have directly occupied the Fallen Angel Empire. However, the gap between Demon Overlord-level powerhouses was also huge. For example, when the strongest [War Puppet] couldn’t be used, Catherine could still suppress 3 peak Demon Overlord powerhouses at the same level.

I don’t know how powerful Raizen the Great will be.

Nero willleave the Demon Realm in half a year. Once he returns to the human world, he will most likely find out that the so-called “Charles’ plan” is a scam… Regardless of whether Nero will return to the Demon Realm again, my entire plan and launch time must be completed within 6 months just in case.

In the evening, the Fallen Angels palace held a small welcome ball for Chen Rui, the new palace senior consultant.

Those who attended the ball were all the upper-class nobles and celebrities of the empire. As for Chen Rui’s human identity, it was not disclosed just like Nero. Except for a few people in the upper-class core, no one knew that Nero was a human. Everyone knew that he was a mysterious powerhouse recruited by the regent.

Extravagant clothing, luxurious wine and food, overbearing elegance and faces filled with pretentious smiles. These were Chen Rui’s impressions of this kind of palace ball. He never liked this atmosphere, but he had to blend in now and deal with the men and women who came to strike up a conversation with the same pretentious grace.

Chen Rui met many nobles. Among them was Sartre, the patriarch of the Lincoln Family, who was the father of Lordan. Sartre seemed completely unaware of the conflict between his son, Lordan, and Chen Rui because he seemed very friendly.

Contrary to Sartre’s friendly attitude, Isabella’s rival, military minister Rommel seemed indifferent. After Isabella and Chen Rui showed a particularly intimate attitude in front of him, Rommel showed an indescribable smile instead.

Chen Rui didn’t have the mind to think about it so much because his original intention was not to enter the upper level of the capital and develop here. Instead, he only needed to complete his own plan. Moreover, Josh once said that Isabella was the most important help for this plan to be approved by Obsidian. At least she couldn’t be a resistance, so it didn’t matter if he was on Isabella’s side.

Chen Rui also saw the “gay” Diak who was “involved in sex scandal”, but the undead magician Sulfur was not by his side. Diak’s injuries had already healed on the surface with the use of medicine. However, when he met Chen Rui’s gaze, it was as if he saw the most terrifying thing. He quickly lowered his head, and all his former demeanour and arrogance disappeared without a trace.

Thinking of what happened in the suburban courtyard during the day made Diak shudder. Meanwhile, this “Charles” that scared him the most, turned out to be Prince Obsidian’s palace senior consultant. It seemed that he could only avoid him and take another path when he sees Chen Rui in the future.

One thing that surprised Chen Rui was that in addition to the traditional palace dance, there was actually a Waltz at the ball. It seemed that the duo at the Dark Moon really affected the court dance of the entire empire.

“Charles, this is called a Waltz. It was spread by an interesting human.” Isabella asked, “It is said that this is the court dance of the human world?”

Isabella was wearing a lavender evening dress with a white chiffon shawl on her shoulders tonight. It was elegant and noble with a touch of maturity and seduction. The smile on her face inadvertently revealed a faint charm. She looked gorgeous. From time to time, it attracted the attention of men, and even Chen Rui couldn’t help but secretly praise.

“Strictly speaking, it’s not really a court dance. It originated in a village in the Dragon Bright Empire. It was once considered a lowly dance, but over time, the original court dance style which is rigid and formal is gradually being eliminated. In recent years, this relaxed and natural dance with elegant grace has entered the upper class society and is accepted by more human nobles. I believe it will soon become a truly popular court dance.”

Chen Rui’s statement coincided with the origin and development of the Waltz. The reason why he said it vaguely and even brought the time to “recent years” was because he was afraid that Nero would see through it, but this worry was unnecessary at this time because Nero did not come to the ball tonight.

“I see.” Isabella asked expectantly, “Then does Charles know how to dance…”

“Yini, can I have this honor?” Chen Rui spoke first and got up to make an inviting gesture.

Isabella stood up with a smile as she accepted his invitation. The two began to dance to the sound of music. Isabella originally learned Waltz from the booklet given by Chen Rui, and then she brought it into the upper class of the Fallen Angel Empire where it became popular. Chen Rui was naturally proficient in this. He could also make adjustments in some small details to make the two people’s movements more compatible. Isabella felt this change, and her eyes brightened.

Now that the two were quite close, Chen Rui could already smell the scent of Isabella. It was a faint flower fragrance. Although it was not strong, it had a captivating feeling. With the changes in the movements, the two towering plumps were constantly undulating, and the gully in the middle also expanded and contracted accordingly. It was extremely attractive.

Chen Rui admitted in his heart that Isabella was absolutely worthy of the adjective of stunner. Whether it was her beautiful face or mature body, she was full of alluring temptation. Especially her special charming temperament that came from the noblility made people have a strong intent to violate her.

However, when he thought of this woman’s viciousness, the occasional faint thoughts in his heart disappeared without a trace. Moreover, the most beautiful dance partner in Chen Rui’s heart was not the poisonous flower in front of him, but the princess in white whose coldness was melted under the purple moonlight.

Thinking of the duo dancing in the Royal Palace of the Dark Moon, Chen Rui couldn’t help showing a warm smile on his face. Isabella noticed his smile, and a strange expression flashed in her gaze.

The two dancing people seemed to have become the protagonists of the ball. The beautiful dance with the perfect combination attracted almost everyone’s attention. Many people began to imitate their movements. Prince Obsidian who was in the distance also secretly thought, Charles’ dance is elegant and proficient. It’s definitely not an overnight work. If he is not the nobles of the upper class of humans, it is absolutely impossible to have such a performance.

At the end of the song, Isabella showed an alluring gaze, “Charles, I didn’t expect you to dance so well! It’s the first time that I am so in sync with someone.”

“Yini, you also danced very well. This is the happiest time since I came to the Demon Realm.” Chen Rui said with a smile, letting her hold his arm as they sat down on the sofa next to the dance floor.

The dance just now made many noble women look at “Charles” in a different light. There were already daring noble ladies who had come to invite him to dance together, but Isabella firmly “occupied” Chen Rui and performed several dances with him in a row.

This kind of “possessing” behavior stopped when a man walked in front of Isabella. Judging from Isabella’s expression, this man seemed to be her subordinate who wanted to report something urgent to her. Isabella followed the man out.

When Isabella walked away, the women who had been coveted for a long time immediately surrounded him. Some asked about the Waltz to strike up a conversation, while some directly invited him to dance. Chen Rui answered or responded politely.

Even if there was no outstanding performance on the dance floor, women would pay attention to the new palace nobleman. Many women even seduced outrightly, especially the hungry eyes of a few noble ladies which made Chen Rui cringe secretly.

If it was the womanizer who came here, this should be the guy’s greatest paradise.

Chen Rui finally got rid of the entanglement of these women. As he saw a corner with few people, he hurried over.

However, Chen Rui soon discovered that the reason for the lack of people here was because of a woman. Isabella was undoubtedly the most dazzling star in the ball tonight, but the woman in front of her looked no less stunning than Isabella. She had long green hair and wore a decorative green crystal between her eyebrows. She had a slender figure and beautiful features. However, the behavior of this beauty was a total surprise. She only did one thing – eat.

A more accurate description was to pig out.

Most people talked or danced at the party, while the food was just a proper tasting, but this woman seemed to be eating here like it was a banquet. As though there was nothing else in her eyes except food. Judging from the empty plates and bottles at the table, it could be seen that she had eaten a shocking amount of food.

Strangely, no one showed a strange look as if they were accustomed to it. No one invited her to dance as well. Instead, they stayed far away as they seemed… to be fearful of getting close to her.

In any case, at least he did not have to deal with those hungry noble women by hiding here. Seeing this woman eating scrumptiously, Chen Rui also felt a little hungry. As he went straight up, he met the heir of the Lincoln Family, Lordan.

Originally, after witnessing Chen Rui talking with his father and showing off on the dance floor, Lordan was looking gloomy. After spotting him walking towards the green-haired woman, thinking that he was going to talk to this beauty, the expression on Lordan’s face suddenly changed to a sneer. Even Diak, who was secretly paying attention to this side in the distance, lit up his eyes.

Chen Rui did not strike up a conversation as Lordan and Diak imagined. He walked not far from the green-haired woman and was suddenly startled slightly while seeming to frown. However, he sat down on the sofa in front of him and greeted the attendant to send one bottle of wine and 2 plates of food in order to replenish his energy.

As the waiter opened the wine bottle and stepped back, the green-haired woman suddenly turned her head and said to Chen Rui, “Hey! You! Give me the bottle of wine and the plate of beef.”

This tone and request seemed very rude. Chen Rui hesitated for a moment, but he did not refuse. He walked over with the wine bottle and food, and placed it on the table in front of her.

The woman unceremoniously picked up the wine bottle. Without using a wine glass, she gulped a few mouthfuls directly, and gobbled the beef quickly.

“The things I snatch are always delicious.” The woman said happily as she glanced at Chen Rui while nodding, “Good thing you acted appropriately. Old mother [1] will let you go. You can get lost now.”

Chen Rui was startled. Such a beautiful woman, but she ate and drank regardless of her mannerism. Now she even actually called herself an “old mother”…

“Still not getting lost?” The woman’s gaze flickered and suddenly thought of something. She showed a weird smile and handed him the remaining bottle of wine. “You seem new here? Alright, if you drink this bottle of wine, old mother will forgive your rudeness.”

Who is the one being rude?

Moreover, she took a few sips directly from this bottle of wine just now, and she passed it to me directly without hesitation. Could it be that she wants to have an indirect kiss?

Chen Rui noticed that there were already several men looking at this side, including Lordan and Diak in the distance. They all had the same expression, gloating.

[1] A proud and tasteless title that a smug woman call herself.

chapters.title: Chapter 339 - Krobelus, The Enemy’S “Widow”?
chapters.body:
Chapter 339 - Krobelus, The Enemy’S “Widow”?

Chen Rui thought for a while before he took the bottle and finished everything. After drinking, the men looked like they were watching a show.

“It tastes good, but the aftereffect is not good.” Chen Rui stood for a moment before sitting down. As he took out a bottle of wine from the “space ring”, he handed it to the woman, “Try this purple berry wine which was given to me by my brother. It is said to be a specialty of the Dark Shadow Empire.”

The green-haired woman was a little surprised, but she still took it. She didn’t need anything to open the bottle. She bit the bottle cap with her white jade teeth and opened it. After smelling it, she seemed joyful. She took a big mouthful, and then gave it to Chen Rui directly. Chen Rui took it without evading. After taking a few sips, he took out another bottle and handed it to her.

The expressions of the guys who watched the show were petrified as if they had seen some incredible scenes. In fact, Chen Rui did feel the abnormality just now. After receiving the bottle from the woman for the first time, the Super System prompted a reminder, “Poison energy detected and automatically absorbed”. However, even the powerful poison from the poison dragon, Paglio, couldn’t knock off Chen Rui. This level of poison naturally wouldn’t have any effect aside from adding a small amount of aura.

The reason why Chen Rui did not reject the woman at the beginning was not because of her appearance, but because of the hint in the [Analytical Eyes]: Race: Dragon (Emerald Dragon), Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to judge!

I actually encountered another Demon Overlord-level powerhouse at this palace welcome ball! She’s even a dragon!

The emerald dragon was a kind of mutated green dragon with toxicity. It had a strong body and was good at water element magic, but in terms of its toxicity alone, it was still not as good as the most poisonous poison dragon.

When the woman gave Chen Rui the first bottle of wine, she obviously added a little bit of “ingredient.” She wanted to make fun of this new guy, but the other party was unexpectedly not affected at all. In the second time, it was not a mild poison to make fun of others. Instead, it was a rather strong poison, but Chen Rui still drank it indifferently without showing any abnormality.

“Your strength is not good, but your ability is a bit interesting.” The woman nodded as she picked up a plate of fruit on the table and handed it to him, “Try this.”

Chen Rui took it and took a bite. The expression on his face was suddenly distorted. There was no poison in the fruit, but the taste was astringent and pungent. He felt a chill straight through his head, and he couldn’t help shuddering.

His response made the woman smile maliciously, and her face suddenly became cold, “You just ate my most expensive and exclusive sobering food. Hand over all the belongings in the space ring now! Otherwise, don’t blame the old mother for being rude! ”

Damn your exclusive food! It’s even the most expensive?

“Is this a robbery?”

“Of course!” The word made the beauty’s eyes shine.

The dragons are professional robbers who cared for nothing but money!

She is actually doing this openly at the palace ball!

Having said that, Paglio also did the same thing. When his addiction happened, he didn’t care about the principle of not hunting near one’s own home. He went to several places in the Dark Moon, but it was a pity that there was nothing to behold in that poor place.

At this moment, Isabella’s voice sounded, “Charles, you are here.”

The woman frowned when she saw Isabella, “Do you know each other?”

“Of course, Charles is a new trusted friend I have made. I am about to introduce him to you.” Isabella said with a smile, “Charles, this is the best friend I have told you, Krobelus.”

It turns out that this emerald dragon “old mother ” is Krobelus. No wonder even Nero dares not provoke her.

Isabella smiled and said, “What were you two talking about just now? You two seems to be getting along well?”

Seeing the threatening expression of Krobelus, Chen Rui smiled, “I just lost the bet to Miss Krobelus, so I’m willing to accept the defeat. This is my bet, please accept it.”

Krobelus looked surprisingly at the box that Chen Rui handed over and opened it. It was a fist-sized red gem which was exuding magnificent lustre. It seemed to contain strange powers.

To be honest, although this gem was big, it seems a bit lurid, but “big” and “shiny” were important keywords for the dragons’ appreciation of things. Therefore, Krobelus’ eyes suddenly widened. Her light green pupils were full of the red light from the gem now.

Even among her treasures, this gem was considered to be quite large and very bright. It was a top grade gem!

“Um… Charles, you are very nice.” Sure enough, under the bribe of the property, the dragon immediately changed her attitude. The previous robber’s face was entirely gone from her smiley face.

“Charles, I want to bet with you, too.” Isabella’s gaze fell on the gem as she said affectionately. The seductive tone made one become numb.

“Um… Yini, didn’t I just lose to you a string of sea blue beads the day before yesterday? Did you forget about that?” Chen Rui smiled, “I don’t have anything to lose anymore.”

Isabella heard that he would send the bead chain afterwards, so she smiled more attractively, “Gosh, my memory. It’s all because of the little troublesome matter just now. I even forgot about it.”

“Troublesome matter?” Chen Rui asked with concern, “Is everything okay. Do you want me to help?”

“It’s just a small incident that happened in a remote estate. It’s not a big problem.” Isabella answered casually while changing the topic, “Betty, it’s hard to hear you praise a new friend like this, not to mention a man.”

“Betty” was the nickname of Krobelus. In the heart of the emerald dragon beauty, gender doesn’t matter. The key is the treasure. This guy takes the initiative to offer valuable treasures. He is really sensible. She immediately nodded in agreement.

“Charles, Betty is the most beautiful woman in the capital. She is much better than me, but she always has high requirements and despises ordinary men. It is rare for her to have a good impression of you now. This is your chance.” Isabella seemed enthusiastic to make them a pair.

In terms of appearance, Krobelus is indeed a rare beauty, but as a beauty, whether it is eating, drinking, or robbing, she can only be described as a weirdo… No wonder no one dares to approach this area and to invite her to dance. They would probably come with a wealth of money and run back penniless.

“Ms. Krobelus is very powerful. I’m still far short of it. I don’t dare to have this extravagant hope.” Chen Rui shook his head quickly. Maybe only the same weirdo like Paglio could get along well with this fierce lady.

“No matter how powerful a woman is, she’s just a woman.” Isabella sighed, her expression gave people a feeling of pity. Her eyes turned, seeming to imply something.

“What are you talking about?” The central character of the issue, Ms. Krobelus, had just awakened from the charm of the treasure now, so she was completely ignorant of what they were talking about previously.

Isabella held Krobelus’ hand tightly, “I’m saying that our lonely Ms.Betty needs a lover, and Charles is the most suitable candidate.”

“No way! I have only one man in my heart, so I don’t want a lover!” Krobelus shook her head resolutely as she said to Chen Rui righteously, “Don’t think that a little gem can move me. Put away your little attempt!”

Though she said so, she held the “little” gem tightly. Even if a man wanted to “back out”, it would be impossible to take it back.

Seeing Ms.Emerald Dragon’s steadfast expression, Chen Rui secretly sweated, “Ms.Krobelus has misunderstood. It is just a joke by Isabella. The gem is my bet that I lost to you. How can I take it back?” Krobelus seemed to calm down a bit, but Isabella shook her head disapprovingly, “Betty, you are too stubborn. Isn’t that guy named Ranieri dead already? And it’s been so long…”

When Chen Rui heard of the name Ranieri’s accidentally, he didn’t feel anything at first, but he cringed when he suddenly thought of something.

The name Ranieri sounded very ordinary in the Demon Realm just like the name “Arthur”. There were at least several thousands of them if not more. If Chen Rui didn’t know the race of Krobelus, he really wouldn’t be bothered.

However, the beauty in front of me is an emerald dragon, so her man named Ranieri (most likely a dragon) who has died a long time ago, is it…Chen Rui tentatively asked to confirm, “Pardon me for intruding, this man, Ranieri…”

“Ranieri was killed by someone!” Krobelus showed her teeth, and her eyes exuded murderous intention which was completely different from the pretense of the previous robbery. “Although it has been many years, and the enemy is very powerful, I’ll always remember this hatred. I must find that enemy and avenge him!”

Chen Rui’s heart plummeted. It was almost certain that Ranieri was the blue dragon that was killed in the battle with the poison dragon Paglio to fight for the mysterious silver box. Originally, he wanted Paglio to use love to win her over, but he didn’t dare to have this idea now.

The hatred of killing her husband! The poison dragon seal had not been solved now, so his power only recovered to the Demon Emperor realm. If he really faced Krobelus, perhaps he would be made into a roasted dragon.

Judging from Krobelus’s performance, after 2000 years, the hatred had not subsided. This was an indissoluble hatred.

Chen Rui had an idea and said, “I’m sorry to mention the sad past of the lady. If the lady doesn’t mind my limited power, I will help you by then.”

“The power of this enemy is very strong, and your strength is too weak.” Krobelus said it directly, “But your poison-resolving skills should be useful. Let’s talk about it by then.”

Ms.Emerald Dragon certainly didn’t know that the so-called help from this guy was nothing more than shouting, “Comrade, I will help you!”, but stabbing his comrade from the back.

“Unexpectedly, Betty and Charles really get along well.” Isabella smiled, “Should we find a time to go out and relax tomorrow? I heard that rainbow seems to have appeared again in the Rainbow Valley area recently. I don’t know if I can have this luck to see the real Rainbow Valley?”

Chen Rui’s heart moved. He had not been able to get the requiem fruit needed to save the Earth Elemental King in the underground world of Mountain Xilang. It would not be long before the one-year period. Once the time has passed, the requiem fruit could no longer repair the earth elemental heart. Then the Earth Elemental King and elemental heart would really be dead.

The encounter of Earth Elemental King Moore and Chen Rui was just due to the Glorfin incident at the underground in Mountain Xilang. By right, Athena had completely recovered now and Glorfin had disappeared. In a sense, Earth Elemental King had lost his value, so it would be fine even if Chen Rui didn’t care about him.

However, Chen Rui would not do this because Moore was his true friend. Although the fact that he saved the earth elemental underground was enough to offset Moore’s kindness to help Athena, they were friends after all.

Chen Rui always kept the matter of requiem fruit in his mind. He had never forgotten that. He even once requested Catherine the Great for the requiem fruit in public in the Dark Shadow capital’s mechanic contest, but the Dark Shadow Empire did not have such a rare fruit.

He remembered Master Xingxing once said that there was a Rainbow Valley under the jurisdiction of the Fallen Angel Capital. Every time a rainbow appeared there, the valley would appear. When the rainbow disappeared, the valley would disappear again. Someone had strayed into the valley and found a growing requiem fruit there, but he was transported dozens of kilometers away before he could pick it.

The appearance of the Rainbow Valley had no fixed time. Sometimes it was a few months, sometimes several years, and sometimes hundreds of years. Hearing that Isabella said that the Rainbow Valley had recently shown signs of rainbows, Chen Rui, who had originally wanted to go there, became more determined.

Krobelus seemed to recall something and frowned, “I once passed by the Rainbow Valley and felt an unusually dangerous breath there. Yini, you shouldn’t go to that place.”

Chen Rui was secretly surprised. Even a powerhouse like Krobelus felt that it is dangerous. It seems that the Rainbow Valley is not simple, but in order to get the requiem fruit, this trip is imperative. However, if I am going to the Rainbow Valley, I must go alone. It is impossible to bring Isabella or Krobelus along.

“Yini, you should know that my situation is quite urgent. I will leave the capital in these 2 days, and it will take half a month to return at the earliest.” Chen Rui showed an apologetic expression, “I will definitely accompany the two beautiful ladies to go out and have a good time next time. I’ll never refuse.”

“Old mother doesn’t want to go out with a man… Uh, wait!” Krobelus suddenly thought of something, and shook the gem in her hand, “We can go out and have fun, but you have to hand over what you have in exchange of that… Uh… Give a gift that is eye-catching.”

Female robber.

Typical dragon-style greed.

Chen Rui secretly despised the integrity of this emerald female dragon, but he still maintained a graceful smile on his face, “Don’t worry, the lady will be satisfied.”

Isabella nodded, “Okay, all set. Coincidentally, I also need to deal with some small matters in these 2 days.”

In fact, this “small matter” was something that happened in the Dark Moon.

The human sheriff, Chen Rui, who had been in “coma” due to Isabella’s evil voodoo, unexpectedly revived.

Rainbow Valley… what would Chen Rui encounter this time?

chapters.title: Chapter 340 - The Treasure Of The Dark Moon
chapters.body:
Chapter 340 - The Treasure Of The Dark Moon

The Dark Moon City.

The human sheriff, Chen Rui, who had been in a coma after suffering from a strange disease, finally awakened under the efforts of his lover, Athena.

This was bad news for the men who admired Athena. They wanted Chen Rui to die sooner.

For the garrison guard, this was also not good news. Although the human was the officially appointed sheriff, everyone knew he was just lucky. In the heart of the garrison guard, the real army commander was the representative sheriff, Athena. Even if Chen Rui was Athena’s lover, he was not good either.

For Princess Royal Royal Highness, it might be good news. This meant that there was an additional assistant who could play some role. At least the sheriff’s identity could cast a key vote in favor of Princess Royal on certain resolutions.

The Princess Royal and several family representatives went to visit the human sheriff. Although Chen Rui was awake, his body had not fully recovered. He appeared so weak that he could hardly have the energy to speak. The human specifically expressed that he hoped that Athena could still control the garrison guard. He did not want to disrupt the guards that were gradually getting on the right track before he fully recovered. This made the garrison guards very satisfied.

For the residents of the Dark Moon City who were keen on the battle ball, it was just a little more topics to talk about. The battle ball arena was always a full house. It was even hard to get a ticket. Many residents had also spontaneously formed private teams. They even used their own funds to rent the arena for training or competition when there was no formal competition.

However, the hottest topic of the Dark Moon these days was not the battle ball or the human. It was… treasure.

The Demon Realm had probably existed for tens of thousands of years. There went through many ups and downs. Almost every estate in the Demon Realm had a myth of treasures, but most of them were only fake rumors. Very few had been discovered. . .

However, the Dark Moon’s treasure did not seem to be just rumors this time.

First, someone found a strange magic circle in the deep mountains of the Blue Lake Mountain Range to the east of the Dark Moon. Those who went to explore kept spreading the news again and again, attracting a large number of curious people.

Those who were lucky would occasionally get one or two scattered antiques when they enter the magic circle. They were very valuable.

Soon, when the representative sheriff, Athena, led the defense team to investigate this, they found an extremely rare Fountain of Vitality after several hardships.

The Fountain of Vitality was known as the source of vitality. It was said to be able to treat all injuries and strange diseases. It had beneficial effects on longevity, and had various magical effects, especially the top materials for high-grade potions. It was said that the black potions needed the Fountain of Vitality.

The most persuasive incident was that of the human Chen Rui, who had been in a coma after failing to recover despite several medical treatments, had miraculously regained consciousness now under the magical effect of the Fountain of Vitality.

The Fountain of Vitality alone was a very important treasure. However, the magic in that place was mysterious and unpredictable. It would change automatically. When Athena led the team there several times, she could no longer find the original Fountain of Vitality. It had been teleported out every time. Not only that, the magic circle was also quite dangerous. There were often injuries and deaths among the explorers.

However, the more so, the more people came to explore. The discovery of the Fountain of Vitality and the mysterious treasure location by the Dark Moon spread like wildfire. The foreign population who came to the Dark Moon suddenly doubled, and it showed increasing trends.

The Dark Moon Palace.

Old Gauss concluded a detailed report on recent operations and plans, “Princess Royal, is this arrangement alright?”

“Add 2 more teams to the garrison guard’s patrolling.” Shea thought for a moment, “The disputes will increase with the sudden increase in the population. Transfer Kaguli from the Princess Retail Store to the garrison guard. Coupled with the Cloak Gang’s dark forces, we should be able to maintain the stability.”

“Then Alice at the little princess Royal Highness’ side…”

“With Kia, there shouldn’t be a big problem. After unlocking the Demon Restrictive Ring, her power is even above Kaguli. It should not be a problem to protect Alice. Plus, there is also Athena.”

Old Gauss said hesitantly, “With all due respect, I always think Kia…”

“Actually, I myself don’t really trust Kia either.” Shea’s gaze fell on the clouds in the sky, “But I trust that person. He said Kia can be trusted, so I trusted her.”

Old Gauss nodded. His own life was saved by that person, but out of loyalty to Shea, he still said, “I have met a few of his friends previously. They seem to be… extremely powerful. Even the strange demonic beasts that transformed into his appearance gives me a sense of danger. Plus, the Fountain of Vitality… I have a hunch that this person probably held very massive power. Royal Highness should know what I mean. These words are not aimed at him, they are just on the matter.”

“I understand.” Shea nodded gently, “It’s just that, do you think… he is an ambitious person?”

“Everyone has ambitions, the key is the difference in size and goals.” Old Gauss thought about it seriously, and he replied, “Even if he has ambitions… there should be no threat to the Princess Royal for the time being. Otherwise, the famous trio-specialized mechanic master who shook the Demon Realm will not disappear. The original future of this talented master is limitless.”

Not only the mechanic master, but also the pharmacy…grand master. Shea added a sentence secretly. When he left recently, the man left 4 bottles of black potions for her.

A complete set of the Eternal Potions.

Just 1 bottle of these potions was enough to shock the entire Demon Realm. It was even stronger than the trio-specialized genius master. The trio-specialized master was just the person who had the most hope to become the mechanic grand master, but the black potion… could only be produced by a grand master-level potioneer. Furthermore, it was the Eternal Potion that could only be configured by a senior grand master.

Is the inheritance of the grand master really so miraculous?

Although these 4 bottles of potions shocked Shea, she didn’t ask more or ask for more. It was a tacit understanding.

Shea’s father, Grimm, was at the Demon Emperor level power, but her training aptitude was not particularly good, nor was she a mutated royal bloodline. She could only make up for it by extraordinary hard work. Especially after taking the role of a lord, she endured huge pressure from the capital. Besides dealing with cumbersome affairs, she arranged time to train strenuously. Only by improving her power could she preserve the foundation left by her father and protect her only sister. These 2 things seemed to have become her entire life.

Even so, she still reached the peak level of the Great Demon King only. Compared with the other 3 lords, there was a big gap in power.

This set of eternal potions not only improved her own power, but the power inherited from her father could be fully integrated as well. By just comprehending the territory realization of her father’s inheritance, she could break through to the Demon Emperor. This inheritance power was inferior to the real power gained from training and actual combat, but at the very least, she had to reach the Demon Emperor level to truly reach the High Lord level power.

“It seems that I was worrying too much.” Old Gauss smiled, “This strategy is really clever. Those looking for treasure will definitely use the Dark Moon City as a supply base. Perhaps most of them will reside in the Dark Moon. This way, not only will Dark Moon’s economy be promoted, but Dark Moon’s emerging battle ball, night market, Princess Retail Store, and delicacies will quickly spread through these people. This is equal to… according to that person’s words, it’s free advertisement. I believe businessmen from all walks of life will come soon. Princess Royal’s newly built streets, shops and various facilities will be fully utilized.”

“I also admire his mind.” Shea’s eyes showed a faint warmth, “He persuaded me with only a joke. In a prison, the letters from prisoners are subject to strict scrutiny before they are being sent. There is a prisoner who received a letter from his wife saying that she was not in good health and could not do farming for food. The prisoner wrote back to his wife, telling her not to cultivate because of the important things buried in the cultivated land. As a result, his wife wrote again a few days later. She said that the investigators dug up all the cultivated land, so she can easily plant seeds.”

As an old courtier, who was also a senior, who watched the Princess Royal grow up, Old Gauss noticed the slight change in her eyes when Shea mentioned “him”. His mind moved and wanted to propose the marriage proposal again, but he was afraid that the Princess Royal would be disgusted if he said too much. After pondering about it, he gave up the idea again.

With Princess Royal’s personality, it’s better to go with the flow, but no matter what, I need to find ways to tie that person firmly to the Dark Moon.

Shea didn’t know Old Gauss’ thoughts. The focus of her gaze was still at the clouds in the sky as if there was an annoying face there, showing an annoying smile.

However, I really feel like seeing that annoying person.

The treasure incident of the Dark Moon was naturally created by Chen Rui. It was inspired not only by the joke, but also by Catherine’s treasure hunting strategy when she was exploring the Crystal Valley.

The human sheriff’s “awakening” could effectively confirm the existence of the treasure, and lay the foundation for his public appearance and actions in the Dark Moon in the future. It also had a hidden function just in case. It was to create an illusion of appearing at the same time as “Charles”. This would dispel the speculations of those with ulterior motives. In any case, that plan was the most important.

The human sheriff “resting” in the Dark Moon now was Dodo’s transformation. Dodo wore the Evil Blue Tear handed over by Roman who had returned. It could effectively shield its own breath and add “healing from a serious illness.” So, outsiders couldn’t see any flaws.

In an accidental opportunity to travel with friends long ago, Chen Rui saw a very favorable terrain in the Blue Lake Mountain Range. He then spent considerable time and effort there with Paglio to lay out Dragon Inscription and complicated magic circles.

Paglio lacked strength, so he could only deploy inscriptions that barely reach the level of the Demon Emperor, but with Chen Rui’s magic circles, the power might not be as powerful as the Silent Night Wetland, yet the level of ingenuity and complexity was still beyond that. It was equivalent to a huge puzzle circle with innumerable series of magic. It could change automatically. Even if the dragons came, it would be difficult to break in. The ordinary explorers would surely be confused and lost.

Wealth was the easiest thing to attract people. As the number of people who failed in treasure hunting increased, the number of people persevering increased too. In a short period of time, the Dark Moon City became very lively. This was the first time in 400 years.

chapters.title: Chapter 341 - Rainbow Valley
chapters.body:
Chapter 341 - Rainbow Valley

In the capital, Chen Rui took a sum of funds provided by Obsidian and set foot on the portal to the “human world”.

The financial resources of an empire were naturally far more than an estate. Obsidian was quite generous. He directly threw out 1 billion black crystal coins. The regent was still very bold for paying such a huge sum of money to a human whom he recently met. However, Chen Rui was very clear that this number was far from the opponent’s bottom line. It could be said that it was a test.

Chen Rui claimed that this capital income far exceeded his original plan and it could activate most of the projects. Therefore, the profit could be rebated as soon as half a month. The interest rate was 10%. Due to the high amount of investment, Obsidian could make a net profit of 100 million a month. This rate of return was considered quite high.

Chen Rui left the capital and did not return to the Dark Moon, but he went to a mysterious place.

Rainbow Valley.

Compared with the poetic name of Rainbow Valley, Chen Rui’s current location could only be described as “barren hills and turbulent rivers”.

It was spacious, dangerous, and barren. Besides the few seven-colored flowers that he occasionally saw, which could barely be the highlight, nothing valuable could be found at all.

However, the origin of Rainbow Valley was not because of its beautiful scenery. It was said that every time a rainbow appeared here, a mysterious valley would appear. When the rainbow disappeared, the valley would disappear again.

Chen Rui came here for the requiem fruit that could repair the elemental heart, but there was no fixed time for the appearance of this rainbow. The interval might be months, years or days. When there was no rainbow, there would be no trace of that mysterious valley.

When Chen Rui came, he did not see the rainbow. Naturally, he did not see the legendary Rainbow Valley. He was not the first person to explore on a normal day, but he was the only one here now because for thousands of years, none of the people who came to explore got anything. So as time passed, no one was willing to waste their time.

Unlike those who were purely curious explorers. Chen Rui came here for a purpose. However, this was completely different from the “artificial treasure” he made in the Dark Moon. He didn’t find anything like a magic circle, but he still didn’t give up. He took out the tent he carried with him and stayed there.

The whole day passed, but there was still nothing. No rainbow appeared.

Chen Rui had obtained the true inheritance of Paglio’s Dragon Inscription, and he gained a lot of magic circle knowledge from the Mechanic Association, especially from the mysterious magic circle of the ancient magic tower. It was not limited to the category of mechanics. The rainbow was probably the trigger of a certain magic circle, or its appearance could be caused by a certain key point being triggered. Regardless of whether the trigger existed, Rainbow Valley must be truly existing. However, it was usually concealed. He just could not find the entrance to the teleportation or space.

As someone who was proficient in magic circles (almost considered so), Chen Rui had a faint feeling that it was too “reasonable” for him to get nothing in the valley as if everything was produced under the guidance of environment and conditions. This showed some artificial traces. If it was an ordinary adventurer or magic circle researcher, he wouldn’t feel this way.

Of course, it could also be an illusion.

If this feeling was true, then the plants and trees that he saw now may even be part of the concealed Rainbow Valley. In other words, this “magic circle” had been perfectly integrated into nature with almost no flaws.

If it was artificially set by a person, then the person who set up the magic circle… had reached an unpredictable level.

With this assumption, Chen Rui began to pay attention to some details and recorded daily natural changes such as the shadows of the 2 moons, the wind direction, and the location of the hills.

After spending another day, he entered the refinery and connected to the training ground 100 times the time rule. This time, he did not train or craft

equipment, but he carefully sorted out the Dragon Inscription, magic circle knowledge, Mechanical Association notes and information in his mind. He also did some corresponding experiments and calculations in the refinery.

When Chen Rui came out from the refinery, his vision of the valley changed again. After applying the results of his calculations to reality, he searched all the way and finally found a “point” in a rotten waterhole.

This point could not trigger the emergence of the Rainbow Valley. Perhaps it was just an auxiliary node of the mysterious space that was not very useful. For Chen Rui, it was a major breakthrough which fully proved the feasibility of his assumption.

In the next few days, Chen Rui devoted himself to research and calculation and found more points one after another. Some were in caves while some were buried deep under the roots of big trees…

After many deductions using the time rule in the refinery, these “points” were finally connected into veins. After trying to activate the entire “plane” and failed countless times, he finally successfully opened an oval channel which was like a door.

This channel was not like a teleportation point. Instead, it was an entrance to some kind of space. Unknown space was a very dangerous concept as there was a danger of being caught in space turbulence at any time. After the entrance was opened, it immediately began to shrink at a speed visible to the naked eye. In a blink of an eye, it was only the size of the water tank mouth.

This kind of channel was a temporary “variable” with considerable randomness. It would take a lot of effort to deduct next time. Chen Rui gritted his teeth and shook his figure before rushing in.

As soon as he rushed into the space channel, he felt that his body and soul had encountered an irresistible enormous force. He couldn’t see anything in the dizziness. He only felt that the world was spinning and twisting. This twisting feeling continued for nearly half an hour before it gradually disappeared.

Chen Rui who recovered felt his internal organs were tossing. He almost vomited. After he settled down, he was immediately stunned by the sight in front of him.

Looking around, there was greenery everywhere. Clear water was visible from the mountain stream. The air was full of the freshness and fragrance of plants. The forest in front was filled with a thin fog, while the song of birds chirping could be heard from time to time.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of a sentence, “The clouds are bluish like it was about to rain, and fog arises from the water” [1]. It was completely different from the previous look of badland. The beauty in front of him was like a fairyland.

This should be the real Rainbow Valley!

However, this “fairyland” was not simple. It could be described as skating on thin ice. Chen Rui could feel that there were irregular dangers everywhere. The “veins network” was dozens of times more complicated than the outside. If one walked rashly, the lightest consequence was to be teleported out of this space.

From his current position to the forest in front, there were at least 3 unavoidable dangers. He must “crack” them step by step. This dangerous vein network had integrated with Rainbow Valley to become an element. It was very profound and by no means comparable to a simple magic circle. Even if Chen Rui had the experience of entering this place, he couldn’t resolve the secrets in it within a short time. He could only use the most silly method to solve it one step at a time. Fortunately, he stored a large amount of food in his storage warehouse. He could also use the time rule to conduct research and slowly find the requiem fruit steadily.

At the same time, in a strange house, a curvaceous figure in a long dress controlled a strange instrument at a distance of 2 meters in the sky.

“This is the last piece of the best thunder fire crystal, it will start to soften under pressure for about 3 hours. This time, I must grasp the heat and the best time to extract the purest compound elements.” (Self-reminder)

“Will you succeed?” (Doubt)

“Of course, don’t you know who I am?” (Confidence)

“Thunder fire stone is the most unstable crystal. What if you fail again?” (Worried)

“If I fail again, I won’t take a bath for a week, no, a month!” (Gritting teeth)

“It will surely be successful!”

Her white jade-like fingers pointed to the mirror… It turned out that the conversation just now came from the same person.

At this time, the huge crystal ball on the side flashed a red dot brightly.

“Wait! Some little bug seems to have intruded? Strange. I don’t think I have done any blasting tests these days… Forget about it! Anyway, it will disappear soon.”

The little red dot on the crystal ball began to move.

“The little bug actually moved forward. There is a big gift waiting in front of it. He will disappear in 10 seconds. Countdown in 1, 2, 3…”

“Eh? It still doesn’t disappear? Then I’ll give you another minute. If it doesn’t disappear within a minute, I will cut my favorite nails!”

(The red dot still existed)

“The last time! If it is still there after 10 minutes, then I will not eat lunch later!”

(After 10 minutes, the red dot still did not disappear)

“How lucky is it? I’ll give you one last chance! Anyway, there are still 3 hours before I can extract the element. So I can have some fun first… Half an hour! I’ll bet on my dinner tonight!”

(After half an hour, the red dot actually moved forward.)

“Is it the [Divine Blessing] that increases luck? Hmph! Even with the magic blessing, it can’t hide from the vigorous flame circle in front. Poor little bug, you are to disappear at first, but now, you’ll be gone forever! The last hour! I’ll bet on my breakfast tomorrow!”

(In less than an hour, the red dot passed through the vigorous flame circle again and moved on.)

“Woo… damn bug, I’ll give you one last chance…”

“……”

“…”

Chen Rui did not know that he had successfully won a certain lady several times. He finally reached the woods and began to search for the whereabouts of the requiem fruit.

The requiem fruit generally grew closer to the water source. When Chen Rui searched forward along a stream in the woods, he unlocked 2 magic circles, but he found nothing. On the contrary, the surrounding environment had undergone a strange change. There was no way out. Chen Rui, who was lost, walked around aimlessly. He found another spring in front of a deep cave.

This spring exuded mist while revealing a strange breath, giving Chen Rui a familiar feeling. Fountain of Resurrection!

Rainbow Valley actually has a Fountain of Resurrection. This is not like the artificial Fountain of Vitality in the Blue Lake Mountain Range that I faked. It should be a real natural Fountain of Resurrection.

Chen Rui’s mind shifted as he searched around the cave. He finally saw a blue plant under a rock wall with 4 walnut-sized purple fruits hanging down. This shape matched the requiem fruit perfectly!

Not only that, there was also a complex magic circle in front. It seemed to be able to maintain growth and protection. While Chen Rui was studying this magic circle, there was a muffled sound in the distance. It sounded like something burst.

Chen Rui was taken aback. At this moment, there was a strange distortion in the space, and an figure appeared.

“Damn it!”

It was a female voice. She sounded furious as if there was some deep hatred.

“Not only you ruined my most important experiment and made me unable to take a bath for a month, but you also shamelessly took away my 3-day food! It is simply unforgivable!”

This was a slender young woman wearing a long dress with a curvy body. Although she was not comparable to Isabella’s “deadly weapons”, she looked voluminous and well-proportioned. Her long purple hair was casually braided in a bun, and her facial features were delicate and exquisite. Wearing a pair of glasses, she was full of intellectual and amazing beauty.

However, the face of this intellectual beauty was full of resentment and anger. The strange thing was that the beauty just casually set foot in the center of the magic circle. The magic circle that was supposed to explode seemed to be as meek as a cat without even the slightest sign of activation. Chen Rui could be sure that if he stepped in like this, he would definitely end up in pieces.

Unless this magic circle carries a certain strange “intelligent recognition” ability, that is, when it is set, it has been given the highest law of “exception”, and this “exception” is the beauty in front of me.

What surprised Chen Rui even more was that she probed angrily- Ruined her experiment? Made this lady can’t take a bath? Also took away her food… for 3 days?

What do these have to do with me? Chen Rui was puzzled. It was clearly the first time I met her!

This innocent guy didn’t know that he had become the object of “betting”. Not only did he “win” her foods and drinks for 3 days, but he also caused this lady to be distracted which led to the complete failure of her important experiment.

At this moment, Super System’s [Analytical Eyes] showed the beauty’s profile.

Race: Dragon (Fairy Dragon).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to judge.

Fairy… Fairy dragon? Chen Rui was immediately stunned. Even when he saw the crystal dragon, Jacob, in the Crystal Valley, he was not so shocked.

How many fairy dragons are there in the Demon Realm?

Could it be…

Chen Rui’s heart began to throb violently.

As soon as he was about to speak, he saw the silver light flashing in the sky. Before he had the time to react, he fell to the ground with strong silver lightning sparking all over his body- He felt a strange elemental power quickly eroding in his body. This elemental power was not a pure wind element, but a mixed power of wind, fire, and darkness. It spread rapidly in his body like a spider web, destroying his resistance in an instant. He was almost immobile.

Compound magic! Moreover, it is a three-element compound. It is launched in an instant without any preparation. She has almost surpassed the cognitive field of the magic trainer!

The trio-element compound was by no means a simple effect of triple stacking. Although Chen Rui possessed the characteristics of [Anti-Magic] and [Damage Absorption], which could greatly reduce the damage and effectiveness of magic, he was still unable to resist this terrifying trio-element compound magic. He quickly launched teleportation to pull away as he struggled to shout, “Wait a minute, listen to me first…”

[1] A stanza from a poem by Li Bai, a famous Chinese poet.

Indeed, all the dragons really had a weird temper…

chapters.title: Chapter 342 - Fairy Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 342 - Fairy Dragon

The power of the lightning was very special. Chen Rui’s speech seemed to slow down because of the paralysis. “You actually still have the power to escape?” The fairy dragon was slightly surprised, and she instantly appeared in front of him. “The magic damage seems to have been reduced by more than half. Is it because of your physique or equipment? Try this again…”

Before Chen Rui finished his “slow motion” words. The space around him seemed to be distorted. He felt a chill in his heart, and he quickly launched a second teleport. However, this movement seemed to be disturbed strangely. It was shortened by half of the expectation, but it was enough to make the fairy dragon surprised again. Her purple eyes shone straight, “You can actually penetrate through the sealed space while laying down? If you can bear this magic, I’ll let you go.”

As soon as she finished talking, the surrounding space distorted again. Since the two teleports had been used up, Chen Rui immediately activated his protective shield skill. However, the protective shield was more fragile than a bubble in the face of this twisted force. It shattered in an instant. The twisted spatial force wrapped Chen Rui up into the air.

Chen Rui only felt that his bones, flesh and blood and even the soul of his whole body were twisted as if he was a twisted clothes. He was in danger of being torn at any time. He couldn’t help but screamed repeatedly. Fortunately, the power only lasted for a while before disappearing. Chen Rui’s body fell from the air. He felt severe pain all over as if every inch of his bone was broken.

This kind of terrifying magical power was rarely seen in Chen Rui’s life. Although the Red Spirit Lord Josh could also compound magic, he was no different from a kindergarten kid in front of this beautiful woman.

This was the fairy dragon. The strength of the fairy dragon was the weakest among the dragons, but it was the most powerful magician and scholar.

“Huh? You didn’t faint?” The beauty adjusted her glasses frames. Her initial strength was controlled at the level of knocking out the opponent. She was immediately interested, “Let’s try this now…”

“Wait! Didn’t you say you’ll let me go after taking this magic?”

“Oh…” The beauty was dazed, then she showed a lovely smile. “This is the last time…”

Someone was swept up by an ice whirlwind with lightning…

“Wow! The same is true for the ice and electric element! Try the earth type again…”

A moan came from the half ice sculpture, “You said it was the last just now…”

“You heard it wrongly just now. This is the last time. It’s the test before parting.”

…

“Try again, I promise…”

…

“All of my characters are betted on this time!”

…

After several “last attempts” for half an hour, Chen Rui, who had been baptized by various schools of magic, finally couldn’t bear it and simply fainted.

When he woke up, he found himself lying on a stone platform surrounded by weird instruments. He was taken aback and quickly got up. His whole body felt sore. Even his head was dizzy.

Where is this? I am even stripped naked!

Am I raped by… the female hooligan?

Chen Rui shuddered at the thought of the woman just now.

“You wake up faster than I expected, and your physique seems to be stronger than the average demon. You recover in less than a day.” A familiar and pleasant female voice came out of the instruments. Chen Rui was taken aback and hurriedly turned around because he was purely a naked model wearing nothing now.

A long robe was thrown over. Before Chen Rui got dressed in a hurry, the beautiful woman with glasses had already walked over while holding a bowl of soup in her left hand and a spoon in her right. She didn’t shy away from his body. He was probably completely seen by the female hooligan when he passed out.

“Since you ruined my experiment and forced me to be unable to eat for 3 days, so as compensation…” A murderous intent flashed through the captivating purple eyes behind the glasses. “I now officially announce that you are now my servant!”

“Wait!” Chen Rui said quickly, “We have never met before, and your strength is very powerful. How could I destroy your experiment and force you for 3 days… By the way, aren’t you eating now?”

According to the fairy dragon, he only passed out for a day.

The beauty looked at the soup bowl in her hand. She was stunned for a moment, “This… is your illusion.”

“…”

“Actually, I’m just studying the ingredients in the soup. For this great experiment, I don’t hesitate to make myself an experiment subject.”

“…” Chen Rui was speechless, but after experiencing countless “last” baptisms previously, he was already psychologically prepared for the beauty’s moral values. He quickly said, “Well, I’m willing to pay a certain amount of wealth compensation. As for servant… miss, don’t make such a joke.”

As he was talking, he took out a string of sparkling bead chains which were inlaid with colorful and exquisite gems. Each of them was more precious than the cyan gem which he gave to the emerald dragon. It was one of the valuables in Paglio’s treasures.

The fairy dragon’s eyes lit up as she took it. She gave a few compliments, and her eyes on Chen Rui became brighter, “Where did you take this bead from just now? I remember when I experimented earlier, everything on you was taken away by me…”

When Chen Rui heard the word “experiment”, he had sudden chills. He was not robbed when he was in a coma just now, but more terrifyingly, he became a guinea pig!

“In any case, this bead of valuable treasure is enough to offset the little trouble I caused to the lady, isn’t it?”

The fairy dragon nodded and shook her head quickly, “No! You just ruined a top-quality thunder fire stone, and it was the last one! That kind of precious magic material is not comparable to this kind of common item. Unless you can give me a top-quality thunder fire stone, otherwise it cannot compensate for my huge loss.”

Despite what she said, she “conveniently ” kept by the common item bead. She didn’t intend to return it at all.

“Top-quality thunder fire stone…” Chen Rui thought for a while. There happened to be magical materials like top-quality thunder fire stone in the storage warehouse. Although it was not the best, he had a refining room that could make the thunder fire stone reach the highest purity.

When she saw the thunder fire stone that Chen Rui took out of thin air, the fairy dragon looked shock again, “Do you also have space magic…” Before her sentence was finished, her eyes were attracted by the thunder fire stone.

“This one has almost no impurities! It is simply the best of the best!” The fairy dragon was overjoyed, “As long as you give me 3 more, then I will… Hey, what is with your facial expression?”

Chen Rui was quite speechless. Not to mention the use of the phrase “as long as…”, this beauty could only be described as negative in terms of trustworthiness.

“Before I give the lady 3 pieces of top-quality materials. May I know the lady’s name?”

“My name is Zola. Alright, give me the materials.”

Although he was mentally prepared, Chen Rui’s heart raced. He travelled far and wide looking for her, only to find her easily.

It really is Zola! The “madwoman” whom Paglio fears the most!

Zola noticed it immediately and gave him a suspicious look, “You have heard of me?”

Regardless of her looks or special temperament, the stunning beauty in front of her was close to Catherine, but her moral values were a bit low… Nevertheless, Chen Rui still remembered the terrifying “madwoman” described by Paglio. Especially when he was her guinea pig just now without even knowing it, so he immediately suppressed the fear in his heart and said, “No! It’s just…when I hear the name of the woman I admire, my heart beats faster.”

“Admire? You admire me?” Zola was surprised and looked a little dazed, but Chen Rui remembered that she almost froze him into an ice sculpture when she was like this previously.

“Compared with miss’ peerless looks, what I admire more is your profound knowledge!

Chen Rui thought of the poison dragon’s description of Zola. In accordance to her liking, he said, “My name is Richard. I’m a fan of magic circles. I wander around in the Demon Realm to widen the magic circle knowledge. By chance, I came to the Rainbow Valley. It took me a lot of effort to find this space… I called them nodes and veins. I finally opened the space entrance. After entering here. I just realized the magic circles inside are more mysterious. They are 100 times deeper than what I have mastered. Unexpectedly, the creator is a charming lady like Miss Zola. Please allow me to stay here to learn magic circles from you! ”

Now that the fairy dragon has been found, I can’t leave empty-handed. This is the biggest opportunity to unlock Paglio’s seal. Moreover, there is requiem fruit here. It is the only hope to rescue the Earth Elemental King!

Speaking of knowledge. Zola didn’t appear dazed this time, but she looked thoughtful, “By the way, you broke through the space yourself… and also cracked the abandoned magic circles in the woods… After all these years, you are the first……”

Chen Rui was secretly surprised. The complex magic circles in the woods… are actually abandoned!

“You just said you want to stay here to learn about magic circles? Is it true?” Zola looked doubtful.

“Yes, Miss Zola! Please don’t question my enthusiasm for knowledge!” Chen Rui showed a look of excitement. “In order to further improve my knowledge, I even studied the dragon’s unique Dragon Inscription with unimaginable effort. I dare say that even the real giant dragon may not match my attainments now. I thought that my knowledge had reached a bottleneck level and could no longer break through, I did not expect to encounter Miss Zola!”

“Dragon Inscription? Even the real giant dragon can’t match you?” Zola’s eyes flashed with a strange gleam. She drew several luminous symbols in the air. “Tell me first, what does this mean?”

“It turns out that miss is also proficient in this!” Chen Rui pretended to be happy when he met a friend of the same interest. “This is a compound inscription, [Imitate] + [Mirror Image] + [Teleport]. It is most suitable to use with plants on the ground.”

Zola nodded slightly as she moved the symbols directly in the air with her hands. She asked a few more questions, but they didn’t pose difficulty to Chen Rui. With a change of thought, the symbols began to increase a lot. They quickly overlapped and combined into a strange inscription.

Even with Paglio or Jacob, Chen Rui had never seen this kind of inscription arrangement. He said puzzledly, “This kind of overlapping inscription is different from the ordinary compound inscription. I can’t accurately say its meaning…”

Seeing the smug look on the fairy dragon’s face, Chen Rui thought of the node he was looking for when he entered this space. His inspiration flashed and compared with the data in [Deep Analysis] in his mind. He suddenly said, “Space? Could it be the meaning of space? If that’s the case… This Rainbow Valley is an independent space composed of Dragon Inscription and some kind of magic circles?”

This discovery was amazing. For this alone, Zola’s Dragon Inscription achievement was far above Paglio. After all, innovation and conservation were 2 completely different concepts.
