Zola couldn’t help being surprised. This was one of her proudest research results. Yet, it was actually seen through easily by the other party. It seems that this guy’s Dragon Inscription accomplishments have indeed far surpassed the ordinary dragon. He is even not far from the damn poison dragon!

“Very good!” Zola nodded. “At least you are not lying about this. If you are willing to hand over 10 times the best materials and jewelry, then you will be my official assistant from now on!”

Seeing Chen Rui’s suspicious look, Zola immediately added another sentence with a murderous expression, “If you don’t hand it over, then be ready to be a servant!”

It turned out that there was no choice at all. It was a plain robbery.

No matter how enthusiastic she was about knowledge, she was a dragon after all.

Chen Rui was planning to stay anyway. He showed a painful look of bankruptcy as he reluctantly took out his treasures and materials. Zola unceremoniously took it all and nodded in satisfaction, “Great. Welcome, Richard. You will be my assistant in the future! If you can, I hope you can start working immediately!”

Finally, I have the opportunity to learn ancient runes without exposing Paglio! Chen Rui was secretly delighted and asked, “Great! Miss, what are the main tasks of an assistant?”

“Your job is very simple. For example, wash the clothes I put in the house first. Then clean the whole house, remove all the experiment rubbish, make a good lunch, and help me prepare the bath water later…”

Chen Rui was stunned. What kind of assistant is this, I am clearly still a servant!

“Miss Zola, when do I start learning knowledge?”

“The best knowledge comes from practice. You must participate in the usual experiments.” As Chen Rui nodded, Zola’s last sentence changed his face. “It’s the same as I don’t hesitate to try this bowl of soup with my body.”

Damn! It turns out to be a servant + a guinea pig!

Is she trying to kill me?

Chen Rui turned around and fled without thinking. However, a silver lightning was faster than his movements. In the blink of an eye, Chen Rui was knocked to the ground. The power was several times stronger than before. His paralyzed body could not move at all. It seemed that the fairy dragon deliberately increased her magic power based on his [Anti-Magic] physique this time.

“You have to be trustworthy. You said about being an assistant, how can you escape?” The fairy dragon walked over with a smile. In Chen Rui’s eyes, her beautiful and alluring smile was more terrifying than the demon. “Your body has a rare [Anti-Magic] characteristic… As my most important assistant, I will ‘guide’ you in practice… Don’t worry, I promise you will be fine.”

Don’t worry my ass! Thinking of the “trustworthiness” mentioned by the fairy dragon, Chen Rui had a violent chill in his heart. He could now understand why Paglio had to steal the silver box and run away.

xD! This dragon was way beyond Chen Rui’s ability to tame.

Good news! We are close to 1st community goal now! 🎃🎉🎉🎉

chapters.title: Chapter 343 - Assistant
chapters.body:
Chapter 343 - Assistant

Handyman as well as experiment assistant… and experiment subject.

The above was the daily life of the deputy valley owner (self-appointed) of the Rainbow Valley.

The first 2 were not bad, but the most creepy was the third. Chen Rui seemed to have returned to the time when he just came to the Demon Realm and met Aldas. However, when the dark elf master was compared with the miss fairy dragon, he was as harmless as a little white rabbit.

After Zola discovered the [Anti-Magic] characteristics of his body, Chen Rui had to accept all kinds of bizarre magic “baptisms” every day. The fairy dragon tried her best to break through his [Anti-Magic] body. However, the attributes given by the Super System were extremely powerful. Even if it was a powerful Dragon Inscription magic, his body could reduce half of the damage.

Miss fairy dragon persevered in her attempt while someone’s screaming echoed in the colorful magic light, resounding throughout the Rainbow Valley.

For the requiem fruit and ancient runes, I have to grit my teeth and persevere.

Why am I doing this for two gay friends?

Instead of beauties?

Tears flowed down his face…

“Are you sure there is only numbness and pain?” Zola fell on the ground with a puzzled face. She asked Chen Rui, whose body was exuding smoke, “Want to try again? The last time!”

“It’s the third ‘last time’! You can’t say anything else? If I do it again, I will really die!” Chen Rui almost turned into a barbecue by the magic explosion just now. He said weakly, “Since I am like this now, I can’t make dinner later.”

“It’s okay. Didn’t I ask you to make more at noon? Even if you faint to death, I will still have something to eat.”

Chen Rui had a sudden realization. No wonder she praised the bacon pancake so much at noon and asked me to make a few more pieces. I initially thought that she wanted to keep it for supper. I didn’t expect this kind of premeditation. He secretly vowed that he would make a fixed amount for 3 meals a day in the future so that he would never be fooled again!

“You should have felt that there is an active poison in your body that can completely collapse your body’s defensive ability just now. That kind of poison is the real killer move hidden in this flame magic.” Zola frowned and said to herself, “Could it be a difference in physique? Or is there something special about this guy’s physique?”

In fact, that poison power was absorbed by the Super System, but unfortunately the damage of magic could not be absorbed completely. Chen Rui feared that she would discover the secrets of [Regeneration] and [Damage Absorption], so he shook his head quickly, “Definitely not, you must have mistaken!”

“Impossible. I personally tried several times last time, and I clearly felt that kind of…”

“You personally.” Chen Rui just experienced it personally. He knew how unbearable the pain was. The physique of the fairy dragon should be the weakest among the dragons, and it didn’t have the [Anti-Magic] attributes like the crystal dragon or the black dragon, but she actually…

“I said that the best knowledge comes from practice. This is the quality that a great researcher should possess.” Fairy Dragon said triumphantly, preparing to be admired by her assistant.

Chen Rui had goosebumps at the moment. No wonder Paglio once said, “In order to experiment, that crazy woman can dissect herself without hesitation.”

Zola can be so cruel to herself, then her assistant who is actually an experiment subject, isn’t it…

“Okay, that’s it for today. You drink this bottle of potion first. The experiment will continue tomorrow. Take a good rest.”

Zola had an empathetic and caring appearance. In fact, she hoped that the experiment subject would quickly recover to be in a normal state so that the next experiment could be carried out. She added, “As long as you can persist until the end of the month, I will give you the requiem fruit.”

“That’s not right!” Although Chen Rui was a little dizzy, he was still quite sober about the requiem fruit. “What you said 3 days ago was that as long as I can cooperate with you to complete the three-day experiment, you will give me the requiem fruit. Why have you changed your mind now!”

“Did I say that?” The fairy dragon looked like she couldn’t remember anything. This appearance gave Chen Rui a bad feeling secretly. He was ready to “sacrifice” in advance.

“Richard, you heard it wrong!” Chen Rui didn’t say a word. He revealed a look of “as expected”.

Zola shook her head resolutely, “You must have remembered it wrong! I solemnly promise by Zola’s name now…”

Before Zola finished her words, a crystal in Chen Rui’s hand began to speak in the same tone. It was even the full version, “I solemnly promised by the name of Zola that as long as you cooperate with me to finish these 3-day experiments, let alone a requiem fruit, I can give you the entire requiem fruit tree!”

Chen Rui was secretly proud. I knew your virtues long ago. Fortunately, I kept some evidence. Let’s see what Zola has to say now.

Zola was stunned and turned around. Without warning, the recording stone in Chen Rui’s hand suddenly became lighter. It turned into a pool of powder and fell to the ground.

“What sound is that?” The fairy dragon turned her head and asked curiously with a clueless appearance.

Chen Rui pointed at Zola. He was so angry that he could hardly speak. Neither a man nor a dragon can’t be so shameless to this level!

Is there a lower limit for your moral integrity?

“Honestly, how long does this damn demonic experiment take?”

Zola didn’t pretend to be stupid this time. She thought about it seriously, “It will probably take at least 3 months?”

“3 months? Didn’t you just say it was the end of the month?” If he wasn’t tired, Chen Rui almost wanted to jump up to scold her.

“Oh, I see……”

Before Zola continued to habitually be “in a daze”, Chen Rui had already spoken first, “The requiem fruit is very important to me. I know I’m not your opponent, but if you really want a like-minded person who will cooperate with you to experiment and truly assist you, then give me the requiem fruit now. Otherwise, you will only get a numb experiment subject that will never do anything or say a word again.”

“Unfortunately, I hate threats the most.”

A ray of light flashed through her glasses as Zola’s complexion became cold. Her purple hair slowly fluttered without wind blowing.

“Moreover, you are just a weak experiment subject. You are not qualified to blackmail me!”

Don’t forget that this was the peak Demon Overlord-level fairy dragon. Even the poison dragon at his peak previously would have to run away with fear.

Chen Rui felt the elemental breath around him getting stronger. It was different from the experiment normally. With a strong murderous aura, he immediately said, “My value is fully qualified to be a real assistant, instead of being your servant or experiment subject. Take your magic item for washing clothes as an example. Originally, washing with water is a good effect, but drying with fire will easily affect the quality of the clothes, and there is a considerable conflict between water and fire. It is quite difficult to control it. One carelessness can destroy the clothes. My opinion is to replace the fire element drying device with a simple device that is enchanted with a wind element magic circle. This is safer and more efficient. There is no need to consider the origin conflict between the elements. Even a person without magic power can use it easily.”

Chen Rui barely stood up and drew a demon version of the washing machine in the air. The elemental power of the fairy dragon gradually dissipated. Listening to his explanation and the structure of the wind element magic circle, her expression was quite serious. She didn’t have that “daze” look at all.

“It turns out that you are also proficient in mechanics, but what I admire more is creativity. Although it’s just a small improvement, it’s a great innovation.” Zola showed her approval. She didn’t seem indifferent just because it was just a small prop for washing clothes. Power had nothing to do with respect for knowledge and creation. Fortunately, there was still such respect.

“I still have a lot of ideas like that in my mind…”

The fairy dragon stared at him for a while as she thought about it. She finally nodded, “Alright, you will be my real assistant from now on. You can get the requiem fruit later, but you need to find ways to unlock the magic circle in front of you. I won’t help you.”

At last, she’s not dazed or saying the damn ‘last time’!

Chen Rui was excited. It is not easy to request something from the dragon! I finally have the requiem fruit, and there is hope for learning ancient runes.

“Then my job…”

“What?”

“The real assistant?”

“The same as before.” (Answered dazedly)

“…”

Anyway, the fairy dragon finally bounced back from her worst morality value this time. There were no changes about the requiem fruit. Chen Rui got his wish to restore the elemental heart treasure. Even the entire requiem fruit tree was incorporated into the Galaxy Garden with Zola’s permission.

In fact, as early as many years ago, the requiem fruit became of little value after Zola completed a certain experiment, so she was generous for once. However, the fairy dragon still expressed considerable doubts as to how Chen Rui kept the requiem fruit tree. Fortunately, Chen Rui had shown his talent for “space” when he took out his belongings previously, so he managed to go around it.

Chen Rui dripped the requiem fruit juice on the earth elemental heart and the effect was immediate. The original cracks in the elemental heart began to heal gradually. The aura of the earth element became more vigorous and energetic. It would probably heal completely within a few days.

Requiem fruit was only one of Chen Rui’s purposes for staying in the Rainbow Valley. Another more important reason was the ancient runes. Moreover, there was still time for Earth Elemental King, so Chen Rui didn’t immediately think about running away. Instead, he stayed and continued to serve as the so-called “real assistant”.

Although he was still a handyman + chef + experiment subject after the title change, Chen Rui had learned a lot from the fairy dragon. His biggest gain was “space”.

Space magic was originally lost in the Demon Realm. Even Zola only knew a couple of it, but the creative ability of this fairy dragon made Chen Rui really impressed. She used the 1 or 2 magic inherited to create her own space power. This Rainbow Valley was one of her most representative works. Not only that, she also had her own separate storage space without any space props. This was already comparable to the storage space of the Super System, but the size was far from comparable to the huge storage space.

For Chen Rui, space magic was not his focus of attention, but the unique knowledge of space theory.

For example, other Demon Emperors and even Demon Overlord were still groping forward little by little or one by one. Although Chen Rui was not as powerful as they were, he already had the entire spatial structure concept of point, line and plane.

Not only the basic theory, but also the practice and power which were personally demonstrated in Zola’s experiment.

One-dimensional, two-dimensional, three-dimensional space, coupled with time and space, precisely constituted the entire world. (For concepts such as “five-dimensional and six-dimensional”, even the theory from his original world was not completely perfect, so he did not study further about it.)

Chen Rui felt that this should be the true mystery of the territory. Recalling the original Super System initialization, he seemed to have a vague understanding of the changes in space and the creation of the concept of time.

As long as he could fully comprehend this concept and truly master the power of the world, he would be able to break through the current “Megrez” and reach the next star level, “Phecda”.

The only pity was that the fairy dragon had not revealed any relevant knowledge of the ancient runes so far. In order to achieve his purpose, he must pay the price, so Chen Rui could only continue to sacrifice his own “body.”

For the fairy dragon, such an assistant really satisfied the dragon.

First of all, he was a very good experiment subject because he was much stronger than the previous demonic beasts. He was almost immortal. He could withstand those powerful experiments every time just like some kind of “cockroach” in the Demon Realm legend.

The fairy dragon had noticed that kind of special physique. It was not only physique, but also the special space storage talent and special space teleport ability (could cross general space restrictions), but Zola had not exposed the special intention of her experiment so as not to frighten him. This guy is probably hiding more treasures. Even if he is not, he is a “treasure” himself.

A good dragon not only knew how to make money, but also manage money. One must have a long-term plan for major returns. She would slowly discover this huge treasure storage.

Then, he was a very creative and capable assistant. Some clever ideas for conceiving and improvement even made the fairy dragon extremely impressed. (Of course, someone was plagiarizing ideas from another world).

In terms of mechanics, he seemed to have reached the senior master level. He had very strong hands-on ability. After some instruments were improved by him, the efficiency had been greatly improved. Many abandoned and aging props had also been repaired. He also had a unique understanding of Dragon Inscription and magic circle. Zola was even inferior to him in some aspects.

Apart from his mechanics, this guy’s culinary skills had also reached the master level. His enviable innovation was also manifested in food. Zola had never tasted such new and delicious food in thousands of years.

Unfortunately, he is not a dragon with a long life.

Unfortunately, his strength is too weak.

In short, he is a very good servant and experimental subject. Forget it, let’s call him assistant.

However, what made Zola dissatisfied was that this assistant actually proposed to leave the Rainbow Valley today.

Was the ice thunderstorm “baptism” yesterday too much?

Or the tenth “last time” I promised the day before yesterday had exceeded his range?

Or he held a grudge after he was knocked down because he inadvertently saw my chest as he added the bath water the day before yesterday?

Zola reviewed the past confusedly, but her face remained dazed.

Hmph! No matter what, I won’t let you go!

Now I feel that Paglio is really his real friend 🥺…

chapters.title: Chapter 344 - Stone Slab Of The Ancient Runes
chapters.body:
Chapter 344 - Stone Slab Of The Ancient Runes

The reason Chen Rui wanted to leave Rainbow Valley was not as Zola thought. It was because the half-month deadline he promised to Obsidian was about to come. That plan must be further implemented. Moreover, the earth elemental heart had been completely repaired, so he needed to go to Mountain Xilang to wake up the sleeping king.

“Don’t worry, I just use requiem fruit to save an important friend. I will be back within half a month at most.” (Moved with emotion)

The fairy dragon seemed to listen distractedly, but she did not nod her head.

——If it’s me doing the housework and being an experiment subject without being paid, plus being squeezed and exploited from time to time, I would’ve run away long ago. Since I’ve caught such a fool now, I can’t let him go like this.

“I can use Richard’s name to guarantee…” (Sweared by the curse)

The fairy dragon still looked dazed, occasionally saying “Oh”. It was completely different from the concentration and seriousness in her daily experiment. She still did not nod.

——Are you kidding? I’ve used this trick a long time ago. Besides, I’m not a fool. Who knows whether Richard’s name is true or not?

Chen Rui knew that nothing would work when she looked dazed, so he had to sacrifice the last magic weapon.

“Well, I can use a mysterious treasure as a mortgage. If I don’t come back, the most important treasure will belong to you.”

(Hmph! Sure enough, he has hidden treasures, but what treasures are more valuable than a free servant and experiment subject like you?)

Nevertheless, hearing the word treasure, the miss naturally was interested.

When Chen Rui took out something, Zola’s eyes widened suddenly. Even when she saw the best materials or precious possessions, she did not have such a shocking appearance. This expression was definitely not her usual pretense or fake daze. She was really stunned.

It was a stone slab. The material was very special. It was like gold and not wood. Even with the eyes of the mechanic master, Chen Rui, it was impossible to analyze the specific composition of the stone slab material. There was a strange mark on the slab. It seemed to be a symbol.

Before Chen Rui could speak, he felt his hands were light. The stone slab had fallen into Zola’s hands.

“Sure enough, this is it,” Zola’s eyes were still fixed on the stone slab in her hand. With a rare shock in her tone, “It has been 2000 years already…”

The reaction of the fairy dragon was completely expected by Chen Rui. The crystal dragon snatched 6 stone slabs of ancient runes from her in the past, then his whereabouts were unknown. It was finally returned to the original owner now, but it was not returned as a whole because Chen Rui still had 5 slabs in his hands. This one was to catch the fish… catch the dragon.

“Miss Zola! You know this symbol? I have studied it for a long time, but it seems to be a very old language, but I can’t figure it out.”

“This is the rune of ancient runes…” Zola’s fingers moved gently on the stone slab, and the symbol instantly turned into hundreds of luminous runes. They were suspended in the air as they were constantly changing. It almost dazzled Chen Rui’s eyes.

Chen Rui did study these slabs, but he surely never saw such a phenomenon before. Zola must have used some special method just now. It seemed that Paglio was right. Zola was indeed one of the few people who knew ancient runes in the Demon Realm. This “very few” also included Demi-God super powerhouses whose whereabouts were a mystery.

Judging from the current situation, Zola was the only hope for Paglio to get out of trouble.

Chen Rui immediately activated the [Deep Analysis] and engraved all the changes of these symbols in his memory. With a move of Zola’s finger, the hundreds of runes disappeared again and turned back to the stone slab. However, that cold and lifeless stone slab seemed to be full of vitality and crystal clear now. It seemed that the owner could really make the best use of the slab. If it was put in his hands or the crystal dragon, these slabs could only be regarded as pearls covered with dust.

“It turns out to be ancient runes. It is said to be lost since the death of the Demon Realm’s grand master, Lolo 9000 years ago. I never thought that Miss Zola is proficient in this! Your knowledge is so profound!” Chen Rui looked excited.

Taking the stone slab out now could be a logical excuse for learning ancient runes in the future.

Zola’s excitement gradually calmed down, and she asked, “Where did you get this stone slab?”

“It was given to me by my friend, Moore, who I ms going to save. Not long before, he fell asleep because of his soul damage. It happened that this requiem fruit can rescue him.”

“Moore?” Zola looked suspicious, but after 2000 years, she didn’t know if anything happened to Jacob. It was possible that the stone slabs fell into the hands of other people.

“I heard Moore said that this stone slab should be part of a complete object. I don’t know if he still knows the whereabouts of the rest.”

Zola’s eyes lit up. Besides this one, there should be 5 more. If he can learn the whereabouts from that Moore…

“Are you really willing to come back again? Or, shall I go with you?”

“No, there are still many experiments that cannot be interrupted.” Chen Rui will first play Charles to go to the capital. He definitely would not agree to go with the fairy dragon. Moreover, the Earth Elemental King Moore had nothing to do with these stone slabs. He would surely be exposed then.

“Don’t worry, I will surely come back. I can continue to be the miss’ assistant or even the experiment subject without any payment. I can even give this stone slab to miss! But I have a small request, miss must teach me the ancient runes knowledge!”

“Is it just this request? You really don’t want… anything else?” Although Zola didn’t intend to “return” the stone slab to Chen Rui when she first saw it, she was still a little surprised when she heard what he said.

In fact, Chen Rui also knew that Zola definitely would not return the slab. The phrase “gift” was just a bargain. His focus was to set off his attempt to learn later.

“Nothing is more valuable than knowledge! Miss, please promise me!” Chen Rui stepped forward excitedly, wanting to express his strong will with his body language. He even accidentally grabbed Zola’s hands which were holding the slab.

It seems very smooth and delicate…

Chen Rui was also taken aback.

Zola didn’t rampage quickly as he imagined, but she stayed in a daze as if she was rather slow-witted. She actually nodded her head and commented first, “Indeed, there is nothing more valuable than knowledge.”

“Okay! I agree to let you go! Don’t forget to come back soon!”

As soon as she finished talking, Chen Rui only felt his hand tight. She was “actively” holding him back. Then he had a chill as a terrifying electric current was transmitted along the contact part, “Buzz…”

“Parting is really sad.” Miss fairy dragon turned her head sadly with a touch of shyness. A faint mist appeared in her glasses lens. She couldn’t bear to see the burnt body with exploding hair on the ground.

As though it was not her that caused all this but someone else.

For a long time, the figure coughed up a few puffs of black smoke— This terrible woman! Behind the attribute tags of maniac experimenter, no lower limit of moral value and fake silly daze, there should be another hidden tag, blackhearted!

After a lot of setbacks, Chen Rui finally left the beautiful Rainbow Valley and the beautiful cobra… miss dragon. His destination was the Fallen Angel Capital.

When Chen Rui appeared in front of Isabella again, Isabella was chatting with Krobelus in the mansion. Chen Rui clearly saw that there was a hint of surprise in the coquettish smile of the Imperial City’s Flower. He was not sure whether she was more surprised or joyful. However, when she saw the sea-blue bead chain presented by Chen Rui, Isabella’s eyes obviously lit up.

It seemed that sometimes women were like dragons, always unable to resist shiny and expensive things.

This was a definite case for the female dragon. Krobelus was even more exaggerated when he saw the sea-blue bead chain. Her eyes almost glowed with faint blue light. Fortunately, Chen Rui gave her another large gem which made her smile.

The emerald dragon, who had insatiable desire, was holding the gem tightly in her hand, but her eyes were still fixed on the bead chain in Isabella’s hand.

“Yini seems to be surprised by my appearance?” Chen Rui smiled, “Do you think I will disappear with 1 billion black crystal coins?”

“1 Billion…” This number immediately attracted Krobelus’ attention. Chen Rui nodded secretly. It seems that the emerald dragon doesn’t know the plan. Perhaps she is not really a core figure under Obsidian.

“Why would I?” Isabella gave him a sullen look, “It’s just that men are all liars. Maybe you are a more patient liar. Betty, what do you think?”

These words seemed to be half-serious and half-joking. Chen Rui was secretly vigilant, not daring to lose the slightest caution in his heart. Krobelus nodded immediately, “Yes, but my Ranieri is an exception.”

Of course, a dead dragon can’t lie anymore… Chen Rui shrugged, “When wealth accumulates to a certain level, it is just a boring number. If I can, I would rather ‘steal’ the heart of a beautiful lady so that she thinks about me every day.”

“Really?” Isabella smiled more charmingly, “So, which lady is lucky enough to be favored by Charles? Could it be our Betty?”

“Think about you every day? Stop dreaming,” Krobelus showed disdain. Suddenly, she rolled her eyes, “But you are a good person. It’s not impossible if you want me to think about you, but you have to give me a gem every day…”

“It’s my gem that you think about every day.” Chen Rui rolled his eyes at the greedy emerald dragon. Isabella burst into laughter beside him. This interlude changed the sensitive topic of the previous “liar”.

The 3 chatted for a while. Krobelus was going to leave when Chen Rui came. When she saw that there were no more gems to receive, she immediately got up and left.

After the emerald dragon left, Isabella smiled and said, “Charles, you should go to the palace immediately. Let’s get the business done first. You have the magic badge of a high rank consultant, so you can go in and out of the palace freely. I believe the Regent Royal Highness will be glad to see you.”

Chen Rui nodded, “I understand. I will go now.”

Isabella looked serious as she said, “I have been fighting very closely with Rommel these days. You have to be careful of this person. He doesn’t know your identity and plan, so he might think that you are on my side. Rommel is cruel. He is very likely to harm you.”

“If I am going against Rommel, isn’t it what Yini likes to see?” Chen Rui gave her a profound look, then he stood up and bowed slightly, “However, I’m willing to help you, the lady who I think about every day .”

After finishing speaking, he turned around and left without further delay.

Isabella’s blue eyes moved. As she looked at the magnificent blue bead in her hand, a complex expression flashed over her charming face.

Guys… shiny and expensive things😏💍💎

chapters.title: Chapter 345 - Ambush
chapters.body:
Chapter 345 - Ambush

The badge of the palace high rank consultant really worked. Chen Rui went straight to the palace without hindrance. Obsidian got the news of his arrival and immediately put aside his business to meet him.

“Royal Highness.” Chen Rui bowed with joy on his face, “The initial capital investment was very smooth. The most difficult period of my family has finally passed thanks to Royal Highness’ trust and timely financial support. The initial 2 phases of 100 million rebates are now combined into 1 phase. I’ll return it all to Royal Highness. Here is 1.2 billion. Please send someone to count it, Royal Highness.”

With that, Chen Rui waved his hand. A pile of space rings appeared on the ground! Each of them were filled with bags of bulging black crystal coins.

Obsidian did not look at the pile of space rings. If this human can keep his words and come to the Demon Realm again, he will definitely not use lowly tricks like cutting down the amount. Obsidian nodded with satisfaction, “Mr. Charles is indeed a trustworthy person. Is there a plan for the next investment? How much do you need?”

“I don’t need it at the moment…”

The attitude of “Charles” surprised Obsidian. He actually refuses the money I’m offering?

Obsidian was a suspicious person by nature. If Chen Rui immediately asked for more money, he would inevitably have some doubts in his heart. On the contrary, when Chen Rui didn’t want it now, it was equivalent to giving away 200 million in vain. This made Obsidian frown…

After a long while, Obsidian said, “Sir, you can tell me frankly, have you found a new partner?”

Chen Rui smirked secretly, knowing that his little trick was successful. He shook his head, “Don’t get me wrong, Royal Highness. I promised that the Fallen Angel Empire will be my only partner. In fact, this is the case. Currently, the investment projects have been activated one by one. My family business is gradually picking up. The crisis is over, but it is not ideal to always be on the defensive, so we need to accumulate power to prepare for a counterattack. The next step of investment is still calculating.”

Obsidian’s complexion was slightly gloomy as he nodded lightly.

“I have a team of about 50 people, all of whom are senior calculators who are responsible for the budgeting of revenue and expenditure. Every detail must be included because sometimes, a small wound can be fatal.”

“50 people are responsible for budgeting?” Obsidian was slightly surprised, “It’s the top business family indeed.”

“Financial budget is only one aspect. On the other hand, that great matter has reached a critical moment. I believe that it will not take long to get the final result. This is the real keypoint. Once I succeed, then I have an 80% chance of winning. It will be of inestimable benefit not only to my great cause, but also to Royal Highness.”

Obsidian said eagerly, “You mean…”

“In any case, my promise remains the same. Obsidian Royal Highness will be the only partner of Charles Roland. At that time, Royal Highness will be able monopolize the resources of the Demon Realm. This will play an immeasurably huge role whether in terms of the control of the country or the diplomatic relations with other countries.”

Chen Rui’s words finally made Obsidian’s face full of joy, “Then, I’m looking forward to this day.”

“It will be as Your Highness wished.” Chen Rui bowed.

“It will also be what Your Highness wished.” Obsidian was in a good mood. No matter what, Chen Rui gave him 200 million for nothing, so his title changed.

“By the way, Sir Charles came from afar, you must have had a long day. I will host a banquet in the evening to welcome you. There will be a ball later. Sir still doesn’t have an official residence since coming to the Demon Realm, right? I will present the capital’s most luxurious house to you later with dozens of beautiful women. Compared with the women in the human world, I believe they will give you a different taste.”

Dozens? Chen Rui was secretly shy. Even the dragon talent is not enough to handle them.

“I’m very grateful for Your Highness’ hospitality, but you don’t have to. I will continue to live with Isabella. It is undeniable that she is a real beauty, isn’t she?”

“Isabella?” There was a hint of playfulness in Obsidian’s eyes. “I have heard of some scandals between sir and this madam. I never thought that sir is really interested in her, but don’t forget, this madam has the nickname of the capital’s Devil’s Snare. In the Demon Realm, Devil’s Snare is a poisonous flower. Although it is beautiful, it contains fanatic poison that makes it difficult for people to extricate themselves from.

If sir’s target is Isabella, I can only wish you good luck. ”

“The more difficult it is, the more flavorful it is, isn’t it? Your Highness?” Chen Rui gave a smile that any man would understand.

Obsidian also smiled, “The fiercer the horse is, the more vigorous it is. Sir Charles is indeed a tasteful noble. I personally support sir unconditionally. I wish sir can truly pluck the capital’s famous flower as soon as possible.”

Chen Rui thought secretly. It seems that Isabella’s identity and value is different. Obsidian did not directly say “give”, but he encouraged me to “pursue.” Perhaps the value I have expressed currently is not enough.

“As long as Royal Highness doesn’t reward me with a house for the time being, it is the greatest support.” Chen Rui laughed, “Actually, she and I are just ordinary friends now, but there are already a lot of troubles aiming at me.”

“Since it is the Devil’s Snare flower, sir should be mentally prepared.” Obsidian smiled and said, “But sir can be rest assured that nothing can affect our cooperation plan. The banquet tonight…”

“Pardon me, can the Your Highness’ welcome dinner be reserved for the next time?” Chen Rui didn’t want to participate in any banquets and dances. “My time is too tight this time. After a short break, I will visit the Red Spirit Estate to meet my brother who is training in the Demon Realm. My father has important things to pass to him. Then I will go straight back to the human realm and proceed to the most critical part of the plan.”

Obsidian nodded, “Of course, I hope sir can be recognized by that grand master soon.”

Chen Rui left the palace and returned to Isabella’s house. He proposed his plan to go to the Red Spirit Estate. Isabella nodded and offered to send him in a special carriage. Chen Rui declined her kind offer, but he asked for a good horse. After having lunch in a hurry, he rode straight out of the city all the way.

At this point in the plan, Chen Rui definitely had to make arrangements for Samuel so that he would not stay and take the blame at that time. It was said that Samuel had reached the critical stage of the breakthrough last time, but Chen Rui had no idea about the details. At that time, he could go back to the Dark Moon directly from the Red Spirit.

Chen Rui galloped all the way on horseback, and he soon left the capital city. Pedestrians began to become scarce. About 2 hours later, when he reached a loop going around the mountains, a dangerous omen suddenly appeared in his heart.

Before he stopped his horse, a group of meteorites mixed with flames suddenly fell from the sky. It instantly smashed Chen Rui and his horse to the ground. The ground was being trampled by the fire element’s powerful magic, [Meteor Rain]. There was continuous violent shock.

The cathartic meteorite finally stopped gradually. Enormous pits and cracks appeared on the nearby road. The bodies of Chen Rui and the horse were nowhere in sight. Only blood stains and pieces of flesh were faintly seen.

“Huh?” Someone suddenly let out a surprised sound, then several figures chased forward. In the blink of an eye, they already went into the mountain range.

At the moment of life and death just now, Chen Rui dodged in time. He went far away from the range of the magic. It was the poor horse who died under the [Meteor Rain].

Chen Rui realized that he was surrounded. There must be a powerful magician. He immediately fled into the mountain. He wanted to use the terrain to avoid magic at a distance. Those who tried to kill him were naturally in hot pursuit.

Passers-by in the distance only saw flame-like meteors falling. The ground trembled, and then a figure seemed to fly past abruptly before disappearing.

Chen Rui fled all the way to a forest. Due to the unfamiliar environment, his speed inevitably slowed down. A figure suddenly passed by in front of him. At the same time, a spherical black ray attacked. Chen Rui could feel a huge oppression force from a distance. He had no choice but to turn around. The missed black ray hit a giant tree which could be hugged by 5 people. The tree seemed to be exploded from the inside by some powerful explosives. A terrifying hole was burst open in the centre and wood chips were flying everywhere. There was a screeching sound before the tree fell down.

Chen Rui dodged the black ray, but another green ray stormed forward. This green ray didn’t seem powerful. However, Chen Rui’s expression was more serious than facing the black light previously. Wherever the green ray passed, the tree on the opposite side was broken into 5 sections. The cuts were extremely smooth as if it was cut by an extremely sharp qi.

Behind him, a huge sea of fire continued to burn like a wall. It contained the searing power of fire elements, making Chen Rui unable to retreat.

“Not running away?” The cold voice sounded. This was a burly man with a black short stick in his hand. The long stick had a ball with countless sharp spikes, and there was an iron chain at the end. It was this terrifying mace that smashed the giant tree into powder just now.

The burly man was from the Wrath Royal Family. His Comprehensive Strength Assessment had reached B+, the peak of Great Demon King.

Physique: B+, Strength: B+, Spirit: C, Agility: B-.

The Wrath Royal Family was a royal family with the surname of Samael. The Wrath Empire was destroyed by the Bloody Empire during those years. Chen Rui once fought against the vice deputy of the Blue Lava Estate’s Double-headed Dragon Legion, Lavat, who was a Demon King-level, in the Dark Moon. Wrath Royal Family’s [Bloodfury] talent was quite impressive. From the data point of view, this man was clearly a strength type opponent.

The sharp qi came from a woman wearing strange long sleeves. Her facial features were quite beautiful, but there was a crossed knife scar on her face, destroying her original appearance. A cold murderous aura overflowed from her slightly slanted eyes. Even without the identification of the [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui could see that the long-sleeved gown was a special piece of equipment. He didn’t know whether it was the long-sleeve or the sharp weapon hidden in the sleeve that cut the tree just now.

Race: Arrogant Royal Family (mutated). Comprehensive strength: B.

Physique: B-, Strength: B, Spirit: B, Agility: B+.

The magician who used the [Meteor Rain] shower was hovering at about 3 meters in the air. He was holding a long wooden stick in his hand. His face looked older.

Race: Great Demon (mutated). Comprehensive strength B+.

Physique: C, Strength: C-, Spirit: B+, Speed: C+.

2 peak Great Demon Kings and 1 intermediate stage Great Demon King. Moreover, they had power, speed, and long-range magic types. This combination of combat power was quite terrifying. The level of danger was far greater than facing Sulfur and the 2 vampires last time.

“There is 1 more, come out. Do you still want to be a demon ostrich with your head down now?” Chen Rui’s gaze fell behind the big tree on the other side.

“Hmph! After you become a dead body, let’s see if you can still talk so arrogantly.” A somewhat familiar voice sounded, and the figure gradually became clear. A tall, thin and handsome man wearing a set of valuable armor. He was holding a beautifully decorated sword in his hand. It was actually Lordan, the heir of the capital’s veteran family, Lincoln Family, who was once humiliated by Chen Rui in front of Isabella.

“It’s you!” Chen Rui frowned. “I’m the palace high rank consultant. You dare to assasinate me. If the Regent Royal Highness knew…”

“Although the capital is headed by the regent, not everything is decided by the regent. Many things are inseparable from the determination and power of our veteran family. Not to mention that you are not a nobleman; you are just a consultant. Even if you are a real nobleman, I will still kill you! From the last time you humiliated me in front of Isabella, you have been doomed to have an eerie death!” When Lordan mentioned this, he seemed extremely furious. His handsome facial features were even distorted.

Last time, it was clearly Lordan himself who did the sneak attack first, and he finally suffered humiliation from his own action. Unexpectedly, he even blamed this hatred on Chen Rui. Chen Rui knew that it was useless to reason with this kid from a wealthy family, so he smiled indifferently, “Since you want to kill me, you must first be prepared to die.”

“Stop bluffing!” Lordan sneered, “I have the most reliable information. Your power is at most the peak of the Great Demon King. You have not reached the Demon Emperor at all. You will undoubtedly die today!”

Chen Rui noticed another thing. From his arrival at the capital to leaving, he just went to Isabella’s house to stay for a while, met Obsidian in the palace, and then returned to Isabella’s house where he left after eating. In such a short time, Lordan detected his movements and arranged an ambush. It seemed that what Isabella said that Rommel wanted to mess with him was not a lie.

It’s just that Rommel is also extremely cunning. He actually instigated Lordan, who has a grudge on me, to do it while he remained hidden behind him. He is really sly. Perhaps I can give him the nickname of the”capital fox”?

Judging from the intel disclosed by Isabella deliberately, Rommel is one of the representatives of the veteran family. In contrast, Isabella’s background is much inferior. She is only recognized by the upper aristocracy due to her deceased husband’s family relations.

Obsidian is actually more fearful of Rommel, but out of scruples about the huge power of the capital’s veteran family, he had to entrust the important task of taking charge of the imperial military affairs to him.

It is highly possible that Rommel is not very clear about the origin of “Charles” and my plan.

In any case, the relationship between Obsidian and the veteran family has a lot of underlying stories.

For example, these people in front of me…

Lordan’s arrogant voice pulled Chen Rui back to reality from his quick thinking, “You don’t even have a chance to escape or beg for mercy now. These powerhouses came with the order to kill, but… I can give you time to have your last words. ”

“I’m sorry. I never thought about escaping from the beginning including coming here.” Chen Rui smiled slightly. “Because I can use my power without any scruples in this remote place. In fact, this is why I want to apologize. You all will die.”

Don’t judge the book by its cover…

chapters.title: Chapter 346 - Instant Kill
chapters.body:
Chapter 346 - Instant Kill

Why do we have chapter on Sunday? 🤔🤔 Because we have achieve community goal 1 for patreon 🎉🎉🎊🎊🎊. Thanks and appreciates for all the support!

Lordan was taken aback. He thought he had heard it wrongly. Before he could speak, a terrifying wave of power was emanated from Chen Rui’s body. The air was suddenly full of heat and the berserk breath. It was as if his sight was blurred due to some kind of interference or distortion. Lordan was fine, but the magician, the burly man, and the woman all showed dignified expressions. Even they all were secretly intimidated by this kind of strong breath. Once it exploded, it was bound to be earth-shattering power.

This time was better than the battle in the outskirts with the ghoul. In this environment and situation, he could perform the strongest moves. Chen Rui didn’t want to waste time, so he used Scorching Dragon instantly.

Of course, out of some precautionary concerns, God-Eating Mask and Demon Shield should not be revealed at the moment.

The 3 of them had very rich combat experience. They knew that they could not let this kind of aura to be completely built up, so the old magician took the lead to attack first. The crystal at the top of the stick in his hand shined brightly. A series of huge fireballs were sent to Chen Rui.

This [Continuous Fireballs] magic was very swift. They hit the target in an instant and exploded. Sparks that splashed on the surrounding trees started to burn quickly.

However, the gaze of the burly man and the woman shifted to the other direction at the same time. Their expressions became more serious. There was still a strong horrifying aura, and it became more and more powerful. At the moment when the fireballs were about to hit, that person already used something like teleportation to move to another location. The terrifying power was still building up. The nearby ground begins to tremble, not because of the effect of the [Continuous Fireballs], but the terrifying aura that was on the verge of explosion.

As the old magician waved his wand and murmured, a more powerful magic was cast. A huge flame swirled toward Chen Rui like a storm. Wherever it passed, the trees were all uprooted. They had turned into burnt dust before they were fully lifted into the air. The dust was flying all over the sky which almost blocked the vision. One could only feel the terrifying and scorching heat in front of the large-scale magic, [Firestorm].

The scope and power of the [Firestorm] were very powerful. Lordan quickly dodged at a safe location. The most important purpose of this magic was to disrupt the building up of the opponent’s ultimate move. The burly man and woman was focused while waiting. They were ready to make a move anytime.

At this moment, the frantic spinning and raging [Firestorm] suddenly stopped as if it was abruptly restrained by some great force, but the countless burnt soil flying in the sky did not fall. Instead, they rose higher under a certain vigorous force.

When everyone was alert, flames flickered in the dust. A figure pounced toward the old magician in the air at an astonishing speed. The movement was so fast that even the woman who had always been proud of her speed could not help being shocked.

The figure was full of strange black flames. The flames seemed to have a completely different vitality from the vigorous breath. In the blink of an eye, it had approached the old magician.

The old magician’s heart tightened. He already felt that the vigorous breath targeting himself.The opponent was bound to win with this move. It was not a bluff. It was like two deadly attacks that ignored everything else.

Danger!

Generally speaking, magicians were the most difficult to deal with in a team, but they were also the most vulnerable. They usually became the first targets to be attacked.

The burly man yelled. His mace made a crackling noise before hitting out. The chain seemed to be able to extend indefinitely, hitting toward Chen Rui in the air. Even if Chen Rui could attack the old magician, he would be blasted to pieces by this terrifying weapon.

The woman’s long-standing power was also launched. It was a dark green half-moon energy ripple. Although it seemed unspectacular, it contained a terrifying sharp qi.

Lordan’s reaction was to defend. He was wary of Chen Rui who might take the opportunity to change his target and sneak attacks. To a certain extent, his reaction was quite appropriate.

The old magician was now floating in the air. But in this position, as long as the opponent’s ultimate move was launched, he definitely would not be able to evade. At the moment, he did not hesitate to activate his teleportation talent of the Great Demon. He teleported away at a distance and landed in a safe position.

With the old magician’s teleportation, Chen Rui suddenly lost his target in the air. The 2 powerful attacks approached him swiftly. They were about to hit Chen Rui.

At this moment, Chen Rui’s figure disappeared again. The mace and green ripple missed him.

As soon as the old magician settled down, he suddenly felt a strong sense of crisis because the target locking that he had just gotten rid of appeared again. The enemy had appeared in front of him instantly.

Continuous teleportation! The old magician had a chill. He couldn’t teleport anymore. It was now a critical moment of life and death. He could only explode with his strongest power and use his magic shield. As long as he could defend this blow, his companions would come up to support him.

During the split second of actions between both parties just now, the burly man and the woman’s attacks failed. From a distance, a dazzling golden dome appeared in the smoke and dust. The old magician combined his mutated talent to improve it. It was the strongest protective magic which was his pride, [Golden Shield].

At this moment, a curvy red light appeared. It seemed to be a giant snake-like creature condensed from terrifying energy. The ground couldn’t stand the huge pressure and began to tremble. Even Lordan, who was not experienced in actual combat, could clearly feel the terrifying power contained in this blow – This intensity seems to have been reached… No! Almost beyond the scope of the Great Demon King!

Lordan felt a chill in his heart. His confidence of having everything under his control gradually became anxiety. Not only him, no one dared to underestimate this “Charles” whose power was beyond imagination.

When the red light hit the [Golden Shield], it paused. Then the shield was pushed backward due to the irresistible force. Its dazzle weakened radically, and it lasted for only about 2 seconds. It was completely engulfed by the red light in the air. The figure in the shield disappeared before he could even scream.

Lordan was secretly shocked. The old magician, Pierce, is the strongest magician in the veteran family. Although he is a Great Demon, his mutated spirit power is very powerful. He created a powerful protective magic, [Golden Shield], which earned a great reputation in the capital’s magic world. Now Pierce cast that famous powerful protection magic, but he is actually destroyed by the red light!

Damn it, isn’t this guy at best the peak of the Great Demon King?

If “Charles” is really a Demon Emperor, it would be easier to kill Pierce. There will not be such a big movement. Plus, I have not seen his territory power. The Samael Royal Family’s Lestin is the son-in-law of the Ryan Family. He is a powerhouse who is the closest to the Demon Emperor in the capital . He has shown his strongest talent [Bloodfury] now. Coupled with Lucifer Royal Family’s Mia, they will definitely be able to kill this terrifying guy!

Before Lordan could think further, the giant red beast which “swallowed” Pierce leaped toward him with threatening gestures. Lordan had just witnessed the power of this blow. He was so shocked that he quickly activated a powerful acceleration magic of his armor. At the expense of his physical strength, his speed instantly increased several times to quickly dodge.

The long winding red giant beast made a clean sweep wherever it passed by. The nearby woods had long turned into a bare flat ground. The ground was terribly ravaged. The giant beast went around in a circle. After scaring away the woman, it seemed like it was about to rush toward the burly man.

The burly man spouted a mouthful of blood without hesitation to launch his bloodline talent, [Bloodfury] of the Wrath Royal Family. His power was greatly enhanced in a short time. As he was about to deal head-on with the flame dragon, the flame dragon turned back unexpectedly. It rushed towards its “master”. In the blink of an eye, it was merged wutg the figure. The huge impact made his whole body float.

After a strange and violent distortion, the distortion was over for a while. His figure fell to the ground with a thump. The initial black flame turned blood red just like Chen Rui’s eye pupils at this moment.

[Scorching Dragon Possession].

Using [Double Teleportations] + [Scorching Dragon Kill] just now, he instantly killed the peak of the Great Demon King magician, Pierce, by catching him off guard. It was a successful use of tactics. Of course, power was the most critical factor.

Now that the most troublesome and fragile magician was killed and his 2 teleports were used up, the next step was the real battle.

Although Chen Rui displayed his power by killing the old magician, Pierce, Lestin and Mia were not afraid. They rushed toward Chen Rui.

Lestin exuded an astonishing fighting spirit, and his eyes faintly bleed. It was precisely the explosion state of [Bloodfury]’s talent. Behind him, there was a vague and elusive figure of Mia, who clearly intended to take advantage of a sneak attack. Lordan still didn’t move, but his eyes turned into 2 colors of black and white. He was obviously using the power of [Heart of Light and Dark] to charge some kind of attack.

The mace in Lestin’s hand made a thunderous explosion and slammed toward Chen Rui’s head. Chen Rui did not evade. His 5 fingers formed a blade shape, and he parried the mace.

There was a strange muffled noise. Lestin felt that the weapon in his hand trembled badly. The opponent’s bare hand power was even above his [Bloodfury]. He took 2 steps back. A thin red wound appeared on his face. He was bleeding profusely.

Lestin’s eyes flashed with shock. The opponent’s power surpassed my estimation again. He even took a heavy blow blessed with [Bloodfury] with his bare hands, completely ignoring the power of mace and the accompanying thunderous power. Not only that, an incredibly sharp qi also passed through the weapon’s engagement point inconceivably and hit me across the air. If I didn’t have a lot of experience in close range combat and titled my head, this “blade” could cut my head in half.

Terrifying power! Terrifying talent! He is an extremely strong opponent! However, he should not be a Demon Emperor.

Lestin’s fighting spirit rose as he attacked once more. Chen Rui used [Aura Blade] again. The power of this blow was stronger than the last time. Lestin staggered back. There was another blood mark on his shoulder. The blood on his body became thicker, but a strange smile appeared on the corner of his mouth.

Although he was not a mutated bloodline, his [Bloodfury] power had reached the higher level. The characteristic of a high level [Bloodfury] was that the heavier the injury, the stronger the attack!

Can’t wait to see Lordan begging for his life xD He might have eliminated a lot of rivals through this way, but Chen Rui wasn’t ordinary person.

chapters.title: Chapter 347 - Doubts
chapters.body:
Chapter 347 - Doubts

The Sameer Royal Family, known as “Wrath”, was the most tenacious family in the Demon Realm royal family. With the characteristics of [Bloodfury], many people were reluctant to face such crazy opponents.

Of course, even if [Bloodfury] was very powerful, there was a limit of “degree”. Otherwise, he would have been seriously injured and died before he could destroy his enemy.

Seeing Lestin’s bizarre smile, Chen Rui frowned slightly. Mia had appeared in front of him like a ghost. Her long sleeves swiped like a whip. Chen Rui blocked with his hand, and he was entangled by the long sleeves. He felt countless sharp qi attacking him continuously like a sharp blade. It seemed to be terribly poisonous.

Chen Rui shook indifferently. There were only a few white marks on his arm while Mia’s sleeves bulged like a balloon. The huge inflated pressure burst suddenly. Although her sleeves weren’t torn, Mia’s face immediately showed a painful expression. She flew backward without stopping. Her body was trembling slightly as if she was hit by some thunderous force. If it weren’t for the pair of black wings which appeared behind her back in time, she would have been severely injured.

Lestin attacked again. There were several consecutive head to head battles. There were a few more scars cut by the [Aura Blade] on the Wrath Royal Family’s body. For every additional one, the blood in Lestin’s eyes became more intense.

Mia’s figure was even faster. Under the boost of [Holy Wings], her speed was almost like lightning.

Even if it was Lordan, he only saw a gray shadow. Mia was from the Lucifer Royal Family, but she only awakened the bloodline talent of [Holy Wings]. Nevertheless, she had a talent for mutated speed which almost caught up with the fastest Belphegor Royal Family of the Demon Realm. No wonder the speed aspect in the [Analytical Eyes] got B+ evaluation.

However, it was still useless because Chen Rui currently had Thunderous Sound and Stridebug with acceleration effect. Coupled with the significant improvement of [Scorching Dragon Possession], even if Roman reached the peak Demon King level, he might not be a threat. Although Mia tried her best, the opponent’s speed was not inferior to her. Furthermore, every single blow would make her extremely . This was a complete suppression.

Lestin was also suppressed. He was still at a disadvantage after using [Bloodfury]. Lordan was anxious as he watched them. His black and white eyes were shining brightly. The long-prepared ultimate move finally burst out.

Chen Rui pushed back Lestin and Mia. Suddenly, a huge angel image appeared in the air in front. This angel had only one wing, and it was even black. To be precise, this was a fallen angel.

The fallen angel exuded an oppressive breath which penetrated directly into the hearts of people. It made people feel fear and want to worship it as if it was like a majestic god. Chen Rui seemed to be deterred by this kind of breath, and he forgot to dodge at that moment.

At this time, a great sword appeared in the hands of the fallen angel. It emitted a bright light when it struck down immediately.

As Chen Rui was about to be split in half, suddenly he stretched out his hand and firmly grasped the great sword. It made the fallen angel unable to move for a while.

Not to mention a mere fallen angel. Even if a true god was not within the belief range of Chen Rui who crossover. His mind was very tough since the [Refined Mind] training. He would not be affected by this breath at all.

“Flashy. Too much power is wasted.” Chen Rui said indifferently. The whole angel’s image exploded with the force of his hand. It was dim in an instant before disappearing without a trace.

Lordan who was over there also had an immediate reaction. He spitted out a few mouthfuls of blood continuously, and the black and white in his eyes were also dim and gloomy. He was gasping desperately with horror. Now that he really battled, he realized that the gap between him and this “Charles” was so huge!

As soon as he was distracted, Mia’s warning sounded. He saw a white light in front of him. A dazzling light ball rushed toward his face like a flash of lightning. The powerful acceleration of Lordan’s armor had been used up. There was still 1 whole day before he could use it. He rolled on the floor in a hurry, and unexpectedly evaded the light ball. However, the light ball seemed to have eyes. It turned and flew back, drawing an arc. After rising to a high altitude, it immediately dropped with a whistle on his head.

Lordan laid on the ground and could no longer avoid. He gritted his teeth and activated the protective magic of the ring. He reached out to block the light ball. The light ball slammed him fiercely, pressing him like a mountain with a pressure far beyond imagination. The terrifying breath of destruction made him petrified.

Although Lordan was known as a genius, he had always been pampered and bootlicked. He had not experienced much hardship and training. In other words, he was like a flower in the greenhouse who had not experienced the real wind and rain, which made himdevelop an arrogant and overbearing character.

Lordan felt his whole body sinking continuously. His hands began to tremble because he was not able to support it. The gorgeous armor on his body could not withstand the pressure, and it even began to appear twisted. The heir to the veteran family who had always been arrogant only regretted it now. He wanted to ask for forgiveness or threaten him with his identity, but it was too late as he could only turn into a desperate scream.

The white light of [Aurora Shot] gradually sank into the pit, then there was no sound anymore. No one knew whether the person inside was dead or alive.

Chen Rui did not look at Lordan or Mia, but instead, he cast his gaze on Lestin.

“If it is another time, maybe I will keep fighting like this with you, but unfortunately, I don’t have this leisure now. So… I will use the death knell to pay tribute to your fighting spirit.”

“Shameless bragging! Even if you are infinitely close to the Demon Emperor level, you may not be able to beat me! You must die today!”

Lestin snorted coldly. His body’s red light was flourishing. The sharply rising power breath was quite comparable with Chen Rui after [Scorching Dragon Possession].

The characteristic of [Bloodfury] was the heavier the injury, the stronger the combat power. When one-third of blood was lost, some excellent “[Bloodfury]” talents could enter the state of “[Wrath Blood]”, and the attack power had a second stage leap. However, if he got injured later, the third leap wouldn’t happen.

Lestin was in this particular state, but after using “[Wrath Blood]”, his vitality would be greatly injured. He would be unable to fight for quite some time. Lestin’s launching of “[Wrath Blood]” was also caused by the tremendous pressure from Chen Rui.

“[Thunder]!” As Lestin shouted violently, the mace in his hand emitted a strong flame mixed with violent fire element power at Chen Rui. This blow was not an energy bomb, nor was it fancy. It was far less majestic than the angel that Lordan made just now, but it was simple and effective. It captured the moment that Chen Rui could not avoid.

This blow has already condensed all the power of the “[Wrath Blood]”, Lestin asked himself, but in terms of the power of the attack, even at the Demon Emperor level, it is just so so.

One of Mia’s long sleeves was torn at this time, revealing an arm full of wounds and blood stains. Her long sleeve was an excellent grade equipment that could be used as a whip. There were also hidden venomous teeth that were as sharp as a knife. With the short knife in her hand, it was a powerful killer that combined strength and flexibility. Coupled with her extraordinary speed talent, even those opponents at peak of the Great Demon King dared not provoke her easily.

However, the speed, poison, and the secret weapon had no effect on the enemy in front of her. Her long sleeve was even destroyed by the opponent. Her participation in the assassination this time was the order from above that must succeed. Seeing Lestin’s breath rapidly rising to the apex and exploding with all his strength while “Charles” could not evade, Mia immediately gathered all her remaining power. The power of [Holy Wings] behind her was fully unleashed. She was waiting for the right moment to make the fatal blow.

However, at this time, Mia was suddenly dizzy. The whole forest turned into a strange environment with countless spheres… No, seeing from near and far, it should be stars…

Aren’t stars angular? How come they are in the shape of a sphere?

Mia suddenly felt that the strength of her body suddenly plummeted as if the buff of the [Holy Wings] had completely disappeared. Plus, it was still being weakened.

Hallucinations?

Mia was startled. She saw Chen Rui and Lestin had just passed by each other. Oh, this is the right time! The two exchanged a full blow just now. Regardless of whether he won or lost, his power should be weakest now. It is the best time!

Just as Mia was about to attack, she suddenly heard a clear sound. The sturdy mace in Lestin’s hand was broken in two. Then, Lestin’s head fell off right in front of Mia. His widened eyes were filled with shock.

At this time, the tall body that had lost his head collapsed.

In the blow just now, Lestin’s power should have surpassed the level of the Great Demon King. Why did… Miya realized immediately. These stars… are not hallucinations?

The power of territory!

“Demon Emperor…” Mia spit out two words like she was moaning. This “Charles” turns out to be the Demon Emperor, and not the Great Demon King! Although it is still a little weird, those who can use the territory, undoubtedly, have definitely reached the Demon Emperor realm.

After witnessing the capital’s closest person to reach the Demon Emperor level, Lestin, beheaded by a single blow, Mia completely lost the courage to confront. Her fighting spirit could not make up for the huge difference. Lestin was the best example.

Mia turned around and fled without hesitation, but she felt her speed slow down again strangely. Then she felt pain on her forehead as a faint light passed by. Her whole consciousness began to blur quickly. Finally, she fell into the eternal darkness.

Chen Rui did not explain that he was not a Demon Emperor, but quietly watched Mia fall before putting away the [Dark Star Territory]. He walked toward the huge pit near Lordan.

Although Lestin’s mace was an excellent grade weapon, Chen Rui was also a metal-specialized mechanical master. He had noticed an indistinct flaw in this weapon earlier. Every time he fought, his [Aura Blade] was actually slashing the most fragile part. Coupled with Lestin’s own full burst, the mace was overwhelmed by the collision of two forces. Eventually, it was cut in halves.

Both Lestin and Mia had considerable combat power, but Chen Rui did not try to subdue or control them. At the beginning, Lordan said that they were given the order to kill. He was just a passer-by in the eyes of the forces of the Fallen Angel capital. He didn’t need to really blend into the capital’s power struggle. His puppets were not foolproof, and the existence of God-Eating Mask must not be exposed at this time.

After he further comprehended the mystery of territory at the Rainbow Valley, Chen Rui’s Megrez state’s experience value rose sharply. His [Dark Star Territory]’s weakening effect had reached 40%. Various negative effects were enhanced, so the application was more convenient.

Strictly speaking, his real power was currently only close to the later stage of the Great Demon King, but he should be able to barely contend with the real early stage Demon Emperor level powerhouse by using the [Scorching Dragon Possession] and [Dark Star Territory],

Even if he didn’t use God-Eating Mask or Demon Shield, he was unparalleled and had no rivals in the Great Demon King level. Defeating 4 Great Demon Kings in a row this time was the best example. Lestin was the touchstone with the highest quality.

In the deep pit caused by the [Aurora Shot], there was also a human-shaped pit. That gorgeous armor had good defensive power. Although many parts of the armor were distorted and deformed, it had saved Lordan’s life. It was just that part of the armor’s metal had penetrated into Lordan’s flesh. It aggravated his pain. If it was another piece of leather armor, perhaps this would not happen.

However, Lordan was seriously injured and out of strength now. He could only moan in pain. How could he still think so much.

Seeing his most feared enemy appeared in front of him, horror flashed by Lordan’s eyes, but his body was already unable to move. However… even if he could move, would he be able to escape in the face of this enemy who could kill a powerhouse like Lestin ?

“You are quite lucky. Those 3 people who are stronger than you are dead, yet you are still alive. As for me… I don’t even seem to be hurt.”

This sentence confirmed Lordan’s guess. The fear in his facial expression became more intense. It was mixed with regret. He dared not speak for a while.

“I should say that the reason for your failure is that someone provided the wrong information.” Chen Rui’s words made Lordan feel more resentful.

“This time you are just being used by someone. I don’t want to create too much grudge with the Lincoln Family. I can let you go, but you must first tell me who provided my whereabouts and intel. Who ordered you to come and kill me?” Chen Rui said while secretly holding a recording stone in his hand. He intended to record it as evidence.

Lordan originally thought he would definitely die today because he had a deep hatred for “Charles”. Hearing that, hope was ignited in his heart. As he was about to speak, his golden pupils suddenly widened. They quickly turned into strange silver. His ears, nose and mouth emit silver light at the same time.

As Chen Rui suddenly remembered something, a blue protective cover appeared around his body. Before Lordan could say a word, his whole body burst apart in a silver light. The terrifying power made the deep pit twice its initial size. Dust was flying around, but the protective cover only trembled for a while, then it returned normal.

Chen Rui removed the protective shield and immediately jumped out of the pit. His body made a round at the surrounding woods swiftly before returning to the pit. He frowned.

He had seen this kind of self-detonation in Mystic Valley in the Crystal Valley. It was the secret medicine studied by that secret organization. Judging from Lordan’s behaviour just now, it was not that he wanted to burst. The [Analytical Eyes] did not feel that there were other people nearby. It should be triggered by some kind of suggestive power.

Once he revealed the person behind the scene, he would self-detonate.

Could it be that Lordan is also a member of the mysterious organization? Or is he manipulated by Rommel? Or is there someone else behind the scene?

Doubts arose in Chen Rui’s mind, but he shouldn’t stay here for a long time. He kept the recording stone and left quickly.

The mysterious organization still didn’t die? Were there more powerful demons behind the organization?

chapters.title: Chapter 348 - Explanation And Resurrection
chapters.body:
Chapter 348 - Explanation And Resurrection

The extra chapter for community goal 1 will be released every Monday, so here’s the extra chapter.

Chen Rui got another horse, and he went south all the way to the Red Spirit Estate without stopping. Then, he went straight into the Red Spirit City.

When Josh heard that “Charles” had arrived, he hurriedly greeted him personally. The treatment was completely different from the last time when Chen Rui nearly died in the city lord’s mansion.

“After you left last time, Sir Charles has become the high rank consultant of the Regent Royal Highness now. Congratulations!” Josh’s face was smiling broadly.

“Thanks to Sir Josh’s guidance and guarantee.” Chen Rui also smiled, “Our plan is moving in a pretty good direction.”

The phrase “our plan” brightened Josh’s eyes. He was originally worried that “Charles” would selectively “forget” the Red Spirit after reaching the capital, but it seemed this worry was a bit unnecessary at the moment. However, the existence of “Charles”‘ brother, Samuel, couldn’t be ignored.

“As the Obsidian Royal Highness invested 1 billion black crystal coins for the first time, many projects started earlier than planned and brought a good income, so I brought sir lord the rebate I promised in advance. This way, the contract we signed is finally completed.”

“Sir Charles is indeed a credible person.” Josh nodded approvingly. He asked tentatively, “The contract between us is over, but in terms of cooperation…”

“How is my brother, Samuel?” Chen Rui did not answer Josh. Instead, he changed the topic by asking a question.

When Chen Rui left the Red Spirit Estate last time, he said that as long as Samuel could break through to Saint (Demon Emperor), he would list additional cooperation projects and cooperate with the Red Spirit Estate alone. When Josh heard Chen Rui mentioned Samuel, he understood the meaning. He smiled and said, “Samuel’s teacher was once a Demon Emperor-level powerhouse. Before he died, he passed on a small amount of power to Samuel. Coupled with his own excellent qualifications, his progress has been very significant with just my few pointers. It is only a matter of time before he breaks through to Saint. After listening to my advice, he is using the power of the dark element for a kind of oppressive training. As long as he can awaken while resisting the power of the dark element and condensing the light element’s territory, he can truly break through to the Demon Emperor level. However, I must say that this kind of training is quite life-threatening.”

“As the sir lord said last time, there is never reaping without sowing, especially power. I believe that since he chose to come to Demon Realm, he is already prepared for death.” Chen Rui said lightly. “When I came here, I caused a little trouble, but unfortunately I have no time to go back and explain to Obsidian Royal Highness. Before I come to Demon Realm next time, the capital will most likely put the blame on Samuel. I have no friends in the Demon Realm, so please take care of him. When I come next time, I will bring sir lord an extra surprise.”

Josh thought about it and agreed, “Please don’t worry, Sir. I’ll take care of this matter. I will use actions to prove the sincerity and friendliness of the Red Spirit Estate.”

Chen Rui secretly added a sentence to his words in his mind, When “Charles” still has utility value.

“Then, I’ll leave everything to sir.”

“By the way, Samuel’s training for today should be over. You can go and meet him.”

A moment later, Chen Rui met Samuel in a remote house in the outskirts of the city.

As the conversation between the two contained confidential secrets, Chen Rui set out a soundproof tent just in case, and walked in with Samuel.

“Your Highness!” Samuel walked into the tent and knelt on one knee. He bowed with his right hand on his heart.

“Okay, Samuel, don’t be too courteous. Are you not my brother?” Chen Rui smiled slightly, but this title was a bit shameless because Samuel was much older than him. Unless it was 2 lives combined…

Samuel also stood up with a look of excitement on his face, “Royal Highness, thanks to your strategy, Lord Josh has arranged the best training conditions for me. He personally gave me pointers from time to time. Recently, I have vaguely grasped the edge of Saint. I will probably break through in less than a year!”

“1 year is definitely not good,” Chen Rui shook his head solemnly, “You must leave the Red Spirit in at most 2 months! It is best to leave the Demon Realm! But don’t worry about training. If you can’t break through successfully, you can flee to the Dark Moon Estate to find the Cloak Gang in order to contact me.”

Seeing Chen Rui’s decisive expression, Samuel showed the good qualities of a retainer. He didn’t ask much and just nodded.

Chen Rui knew that Samuel had sworn that he would never return to the human world if he did not reach the Demon Emperor. Moreover, the “seeds” that enable his return to the ground could only be activated at a Demon Emperor level. He immediately took out 4 bottles of black potions, “This the full set of Eternal Potions. It has reached the highest purity of the grand master level. You can use it at the appropriate time. You need to use 4 bottles together. There are additional amplification effects. The most important thing for you now is to awaken the territory power first.”

“A full set of black potions! The highest purity?” Samuel was surprised. In the human world, only Archbishop Pavaro of the Light Divinity Temple can configure eternal potions. He can only configure 2, not to mention the highest purity. Arthur Royal Highness directly took out a full set of black potions of the highest purity now. Didn’t they say that the Demon Realm does not have a potion master? Or is there a hidden super grand master behind Royal Highness?

“Yes.” Samuel showed gratitude in his eyes, but he still didn’t ask much. He took it and carefully put it in the space ring.

Chen Rui was very satisfied with Samuel’s performance. He also told Samuel about the ambush when he came to the Red Spirit this time. He told Samuel that he must remain alert and be careful to act on the occasion. After all, he couldn’t place his hopes entirely on Josh.

“We may not meet again soon, or it will extend until you leave. Before we part, I have one last request, or order – If you can return to the human world, never disclose any information about me to anyone, including my… father!”

This time, Samuel showed hesitation. The current situation of the Kemplot Family was not good. Due to the disappearance of Lord Arthur, the representative Lord Garfield had suppressed the family severely. If he could report the whereabouts of Arthur Royal Highness to Lex the Great, it would definitely alleviate his family’s predicament.

“Your Highness, with your current strength, you should be able to appear before Garfield and even Lex, and regain control of the Golden Estate. Also, when I left, the fiancée of Your Highness, Princess Landbis of Blue Glory Empire, has not cancelled the marriage agreement…”

If it was the former Arthur, he might still be moved by these words, but Chen Rui was a crossover person. The social life of “Arthur” had nothing to do with him. He had become accustomed to the life of the Demon Realm. Plus, he had lovers, brothers, and unfinished plans here. No doubt, he was unwilling to leave even if he could become a prince who did not need to worry about prosperity and wealth after returning to the human world.

“My power is not enough…” Chen Rui showed a domineering appearance, “But don’t worry. As I said before, when my power is accumulated to a certain level, I will appear in front of my enemies in an overriding gesture to take back everything that belongs to me! Not only the original things, but I will also settle the scores with Garfield! It’s similar to you breaking through Saint to regain your glory and lover! Isn’t it?”

Samuel’s eyes flashed with strong faith and determination. He bowed his head resolutely, “Yes!”

Seeing Samuel’s high fighting spirit, Chen Rui secretly said sorry in his heart. My true dream is to stay in the Demon Realm, marry my beloved women, and then go freely with my confidants and friends. As for the human world, I’m afraid I never want to go back there.
