This dream was indeed true, but the world was unpredictable. Not all plans would change, but when changes occur, it would normally lead to changes in the entire plan…

After explaining these matters to Samuel, Chen Rui gave another part of the “rebate” to Kanita who came over. Then, under the gaze of Josh, Kanita and Samuel, he opened the space door to the “human world” and left the “Demon Realm”.

This time, Chen Rui did not return to the Dark Moon directly from the Red Spirit. Instead, he entered the Dark Shadow Empire through Town Moling, and then entered Dark Moon through Town Leia. The destination was the underground world of Mountain Xilang.

Mountain Xilang.

The underground world, Earth Realm.

All the earth elementals were automatically gathered in front of the Fountain of Vitality.

Chen Rui, the friend who once unbelievably defeated Demon Overlord and saved the Earth Realm of Earth Elemental and even the entire underground world, would once again create a miracle by awakening the king sleeping in the Fountain of Vitality.

A bead was emitting white light in Chen Rui’s hand. As soon as this bead appeared, all the earth elemental felt the surging and extremely pure earth element power.

When Chen Rui got the bead, the earth element power was not so strong. It was also full of cracks that could break down fatally at any time. The earth elemental heart looked smooth and round this time. It had obviously been repaired.

According to Tag and Sog’s instructions, Chen Rui put the earth elemental heart into the Fountain of Vitality where the Earth Elemental King Moore was sleeping. The beads seemed to melt in the water and gradually disappeared. Moore’s cold statue which emitted light brilliance corresponded to it.

When the rays of Fountain of Vitality were all absorbed into the body of the Earth Elemental King, the originally stiff “sculpture” began to warm up while exuding vigorous vitality.

Moore’s breath became stronger and stronger. His closed eyes opened, flashing a gleaming gaze. When he slightly stretched his limbs, his powerful breath quickly spread, permeating every corner of the earth elementals’ Earth Realm.

All the earth elementals cheered excitedly. Their facial features seemed blunt, but the joyful emotions could be felt even with one’s closed eyes.

The voice of Earth Elemental King sounded, “Chen Rui, my friend, I know that I’ll be able to see you again. No words are enough to express me and the earth elemental’s gratitude to you.”

With that, the king bowed to Chen Rui. This action made all the earth elemental salute Chen Rui respectfully.

Would the Earth Elemental King give Chen Rui the hints about territory? Or even trains him?

chapters.title: Chapter 349 - Elemental Blessing
chapters.body:
Chapter 349 - Elemental Blessing

Chapter 349: Elemental Blessing

As Chen Rui lost the earth elemental heart, he could no longer use the earth magic. His spiritual power and the income of the Star Garden were greatly affected, but compared to being able to awaken the Earth Elemental King and a friend, these matters seemed trivial.

In the illusion of the [Refined Mind], Shura once instigated Chen Rui to kill his most trusted friends and even lovers several times. Although he had successfully passed the [Refined Mind], the feeling of regret was still etched in his heart. It was because he had “lost” before, so he cherished it even more.

Chen Rui quickly returned the courtesy, “As a friend, I just fulfilled a promise. There is nothing more important than seeing a friend’s resurrection.”

Although it was just a polite remark, the Earth Elemental King felt his sincerity. After the earth elementals dissipated slightly, Chen Rui followed the Earth Elemental King to the renovated Earth Palace.

“Royal Highness Moore, have you fully recovered your strength?”

“The title Royal Highness is not suitable for real friends. You will call me Moore from now on.” There was a hint of curiosity in the tone of the Earth Elemental King. “It seems that you have successfully overcome the crisis of your mind. You have advanced your power considerably. What I’m curious about is what power you have exerted on the earth elemental heart. I can feel that the earth elemental heart that returned to my body is more refined and powerful than before. As long as I fully digest this power, my power will be further enhanced drastically. This phenomenon can only be achieved after thousands or even tens of thousands of years in the king’s body. The requiem fruit has absolutely no such effect.”

Chen Rui was stunned for a moment. He secretly thought that the Star Garden should have played a certain key role, but it was a good thing to enhance Moore’s strength. He smiled and said, “Pardon me, Moore, please forgive me as I cannot disclose this matter. However, if this can increase your strength, I can continue to use some means to help you.”

Earth Elemental King shook his head, “Since it’s your secret, I won’t ask more. Unfortunately, the elemental heart has a unique attribute. When the external assistance like this has reached a certain limit, it cannot be further strengthened even if you use some means. In any case, I can resurrect and increase my strength this time because of your help.”

Chen Rui smiled and said, “You’re welcome, my friend. I will probably ask for your help in the future.”

“Just because you defeated Glorfin and saved the Earth Elemental before, you have earned the eternal friendship of the Earth Elemental. No matter how powerful are the enemies that you face in the future, the Earth Elementals and I will be the strongest shields to stand in front of you. ”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. Since he had the promise of the Earth Elemental King, and Paglio had lifted his seal, Chen Rui would have an extra huge support even if he confronted the capital head-on.

“By the way, I got something by accident. I don’t know if you have seen it.” Chen Rui took out a blue bead which was slightly smaller than his fist. It was originally offered by Dodo. It should be the treasure left by the skeleton dragon previously.

This bead had a strong aura of water element. Its size was similar to the earth elemental heart. Chen Rui couldn’t help but to feel excited, but it was a pity that putting the bead in the Star Garden did not give him the power to use water element magic.

Earth Elemental King took the bead, felt the water element power contained in it and thought for a moment before saying, “This thing is incredible, especially the pure water element power. It is definitely not created by ordinary mechanics or magicians. It should come from the water elementals. It is also a very rare treasure even from the water elementals.”

When Chen Rui heard that it was not a water elemental heart, but some kind of treasure, his interest was greatly diminished. Earth Elemental King continued, “My inherited memory tells me that the nest of water elementals should be in the Dead Sea area where the level of danger is very high. If you are interested, you must wait until you have enough strength in the future to find out.

When Chen Rui heard the name of Dead Sea, he thought of the 3 treasure maps that had been combined. It was said to be related to the treasure of the Dark Dragon Emperor. Unfortunately, the treasure map was incomplete. Furthermore, he did not have the idle time or the strength to go to the Dead Sea. Let’s think about it if I have a chance in the future.

“One more thing, my friend. With the power of my complete elemental heart now, it is enough to give you a gift.”

“Gift?” Chen Rui was taken aback.

“Element blessing. Accepting the blessing will give you corresponding elemental characteristics and its magic. After receiving this blessing, your earth element resistance and defense ability will be greatly enhanced. You can also have a random earth magic permanently. But this magic is related to your spirit power, so your spirit power must meet the requirements for casting magic.”

Enhance the body’s earth element defenses and resistance, plus I can get 1 magic? Chen Rui was overjoyed. He asked again, “Will this affect your power?”

“It won’t have much impact, but this kind of blessing is quite unique. Before your life is ended, I cannot give element blessing to the second person. This is not a reward, but a gift between friends. You must accept it.”

Earth Elemental King made Chen Rui feel relieved. Of course, he would not refuse such a good thing.

In the Earth Palace, a bizarre light lit up. 2 hours later, Chen Rui bid farewell to his earth elemental friends and left Earth Realm.

After receiving the element blessing, Chen Rui clearly felt that his body’s defense capabilities had increased a lot. When he charged his power, he felt almost indestructible. If he was back in the original world with this state, even if he just performed Iron Jersey [1] or pressed his throat against a gun on the street, it was enough to make the so-called “strongest urban management” [2] to be fearful.

The magic obtained by “chance” was [Gravity]. Although he did not get higher grade ones like [Steel Protection], [Destructive Shock Wave] etc., he was quite satisfied. Anyway, his power was not relying on magic. At least receiving [Gravity] meant that he could continue to “pretend” to be from the the Beelzebub Royal Family at certain specific times.

Chen Rui came to the tauren tribe along the way. The tauren who mastered the new enchanting technology had an energetic and enthusiastic vibe. Pieces of high-quality magic weapons and armors were released one after another. With tauren, the Demon Realm’s first forging skills, plus the high-quality mineral deposits beneath Mountain Xilang, this batch of equipment could be regarded as first-class products in terms of efficiency and quality as though hundreds of metal-proficient masters were making them at the same time. Even the Mechanic Association would concede defeat to such a magnificent and amazing lineup.

Tauren had already manufactured armor and weapons that suit themselves, so they had begun to build scale armor and arrow clusters for its ally, Medusa. According to Chen Rui’s plan, not only Medusa and Tauren, but dragon armor would also be tailor made for the wyverns. It would greatly enhance the wyvern’s relatively weak defense.

In the future, he would strive to equip all the Dark Moon military with the best equipment made by taurens. If the quality of the military was further improved, it would not be a dream to have a Fallen Angel Empire’s most powerful armed force.

In fact, Chen Rui was good at coming up with ideas and plans, but to be fully responsible for the military was beyond his reach. If he was allowed to truly lead and train a team, perhaps he would not be an expert at it.

Fortunately, there was a capable woman like Athena, so he didn’t have to worry about the garrison guard.

Thinking of Athena, Chen Rui longed to return home. Not only did he miss the heroine, but also the little demon who hid behind and pretended to be a good girl. However, before that, he didn’t forget his official matters. He instructed Tim for a while and checked the important personnel in a certain plan. Finally, he left Mountain Xilang with satisfaction and went straight to the Dark Moon City.

Due to the attraction of the treasure, the mobile population of Dark Moon City had increased by at least 10 times. Most of these people were explorers looking for treasures while a considerable amount of them were merchants and “tourists” who came here due to its reputation.

They initially heard that the Dark Moon Estate was just a dilapidated estate, but those who came here found that the Dark Moon’s situation was much better than expected—wide and flat streets, neatly organized shops, orderly law and order… That kind of thriving vitality seemed to be a sign of the revival of the prosperity 400 years ago.

Especially the exciting battle ball, the high-end and luxurious Princess Retail Store, the bustling night market, and the unique hot pot food… In several high-end hotels, there were some unexpected facilities such as magic showers for bathing and tap waters that could be used at any time. There were actually so many good things that one wouldn’t see outside.

Didn’t they say that the Dark Moon Estate residents would face a terrible famine after being sanctioned by the capital? How could it be such a prosperous scene?

Even if no treasure was harvested, the people who came to the Dark Moon couldn’t help but to fall in love with the battle ball, the night market and the food. Perhaps it was also a good harvest to be able to bring back a souvenir from the Princess Retail Store.

There were also some sharp-eyed businessmen. The battleball, gourmet food, Princess Retail Store, and even the densely populated Dark Moon Estate itself represented huge business opportunities with huge profits. Even the Custer Family, the top business family of the Dark Shadow Empire, opened a store in the Dark Moon long ago and signed a long-term cooperation agreement with the Princess Retail Store.

Suddenly, the originally vacant shops were short of supply. The size of the night market, in particular, doubled the size of the original. The difficulty in terms of management and public security naturally increased a lot. Chaos and conflicts occurred from time to time which gave Shea a little headache. However, compared with the rapid development of the Dark Moon and the recent huge gains, these were just trivial and minor annoyances.

As the mastermind of everything, Chen Rui felt a sense of accomplishment with pride in his heart when he saw that the Dark Moon City was not what it used to be: Dark Moon, I’m back.

[1] A type of Chinese Kungfu with a strong impenetrable body.

[2] Authorities that chase away street performers or hawkers without license.

chapters.title: Chapter 350: Troublemaker Loli
chapters.body:
Chapter 350: Troublemaker Loli

The courtyard of the sheriff residence.

Paglio was lying on his huge gold crystal bed while playing with the new products of the Princess Retail Store, card game, boringly. This damn dragon actually put his bed in the yard!

Does he want to enjoy the feeling of sleeping on the pile of money all the time, or is it a kind of “flaunting wealth” instinct at work?

Chen Rui recalled the 4 dragons he knew. Whether it was the poison dragon, emerald dragon, fairy dragon or crystal dragon, there did not seem to be any normal types. Each had their own “weirdness”.

Are all dragons weirdos?

At this moment, Paglio said, “Dodo, why does it take so long this time? Have you bought the wine?”

Chen Rui’s complexion became stiff. This fellow actually asks Dodo to… go out and help him buy wine!

“Quickly bring it over!” Paglio said unceremoniously, “I know you must have drank secretly outside just now. Don’t even think of getting a share of my wine now!”

Chen Rui had an idea. He walked over with a bottle of wine in his hand.

“It’s a pleasure to think of using this guy as a servant! This greedy human embezzled uncle’s treasure!” Paglio took the wine, and he was still muttering. As he opened the wine cork and just took a sip, he spurted out, “What the hell is this! Damn slime!”

Before he finished speaking, he saw the little black horse that had been resting in the distance running over to cuddle “Dodo” for a while. Paglio’s eyes widened. The Incubus Beast had always been very cold toward Dodo. Not giving him [Thunder] was not bad already, yet this time…

The poison dragon suddenly realized it. He got up from the bed hastily and grinned, “It turns out that you cunning guy is back! Damn it, you lied to me. Give me a bottle of good wine to compensate me!”

“Compensate your ass! Is it interesting to instruct me as a servant?” Chen Rui touched the little black horse and fed it with a handful of aura fruit. He snorted at the poison dragon angrily, “This bottle just now is a gift from a dragon who gave it back to me. The secret hangover soup. It tastes good right!”

Speaking of the emerald dragon, Chen Rui was really speechless. After receiving several gems from him, she actually gave him a bottle of the so-called “secret” hangover soup in return at the ball last time. The purpose of this rebate was naturally to get more gems.

Chen Rui guessed that this bottle was probably from the ball with zero investment cost. A standard cheapskate. It seems that Krobelus has one other attribute besides her love for money: stingy!

After Paglio took the bottle of wine thrown by Chen Rui, he carefully sniffed it so as not to be fooled again. Then he took a gulp with confidence.

“Did you just say dragon?”

“Speaking of which, this dragon should be regarded as your acquaintance…” Chen Rui relayed the Krobelus incident.

Paglio looked suspicious, “Krobelus? How come I haven’t heard that the blue dragon has such a woman? Did you get it wrong? Ranieri has a quirk. He doesn’t seem to like female dragons.”

Chen Rui was stunned. The gossip mood ignited in his heart. Paglio didn’t know that there is a dragon called… Krobelus? Ranieri is even a gay? Then Paglio had a grudge with the blue dragon… Is it because he rejected his… love? Or the 2 people turned from love to hate…

Seeing Chen Rui’s weird gaze, Paglio cringed secretly and said, “Ranieri likes demon women, especially the Great Demon and succubus. How could there be a female dragon suddenly said that she wants to avenge him?”

“Could it be that I got it wrong?” Chen Rui was a little confused too. Could it be that this is not that Ranieri? The “man” mentioned by the emerald dragon is someone else?

“You must have made a mistake!”

“Perhaps.” Chen Rui suddenly showed a strange smile, “But there is one thing that is absolutely unmistakable. This time, I really met your old friend.”

“Who is that ugly thing?” Poison dragon used an idiom learned from Chen Rui and felt proud of it, but he didn’t know there was another idiom called “birds of a feather flock together”.

“Objectively speaking, she is a very beautiful woman with purple hair and purple eyes. She usually wears a pair of glasses and likes to wear a long skirt. At certain times… she will be in a daze, and…”

When talking about the beauty with purple hair and purple eyes, Paglio seemed to have thought of something. The next description of glasses, long skirts and daze made the normally fearless poison dragon change his facial expression suddenly. He uttered a few words with difficulty, ” You… you actually met that crazy woman?”

“If I said that she came to the Dark Moon with me, how would you react?”

“Don’t joke about this!” Paglio was startled, “If that crazy woman really comes to the Dark Moon, I have to escape!”

The fairy dragons’ magic talent was too terrifying. She could easily launch the powerful Dragon Inscription to the extreme, especially Zola was also proficient in magic circles and other methods. It could be said that she was the most powerful magician in the Demon Realm. Only the crystal dragon and the black dragon who were born with [Anti-Magic] were not afraid of her. Even at his peak, Paglio was fearful of this woman. However, under the huge benefits of the silver box, the dragon’s curiosity and the greedy nature made Paglio finally take the initiative to attack. He sneak attacked Zola and succeeded. Then, he was scared witless and kept escaping until he was sealed by a mysterious powerhouse.

With the grievances between the poison dragon and the fairy dragon, she would definitely beat him brutally till half-dead once she saw him before probing about the treasure’s whereabouts.

“You’re just fleeing for your life! I have just escaped from that woman’s clutches!” Chen Rui gritted his teeth.

Paglio was not completely afraid of Zola. More importantly, Zola was related to the lifting of his biggest seal. He did not argue back as usual at the moment. Instead, he hurriedly asked, “Don’t keep me guessing. How did you meet that crazy woman? Come on, say it!”

Chen Rui reiterated what he had experienced during the days when he lived in the Rainbow Valley. When it came to the sad part, the poison dragon unexpectedly did not gloat. Instead, he shivered with empathy.

“Hmph! If it wasn’t because I want to get a way to break your seal from Zola, would I risk my life and go to that terrible place as an experiment subject? Meanwhile, you only have treasure in your mind!”

“It’s really hard for you, my most reliable partner.” Paglio showed a rare conscience and added decisively, “If this is the case, I will give you 1% more of the treasure that I put with you.

“1%?” Chen Rui’s eyes widened. Are you sure there are no other decimals in front of “1%”?

“1%!” Paglio looked righteous as if he was cutting his flesh to feed the eagle.

“…”

Chen Rui was quite speechless. Money is a trivial matter. His entire treasure is now in my hands. The problem is… I worked hard in the Rainbow Valley, and it is worth… 1% only?

Seeing the look of this damn dragon, he clearly said these words reluctantly.

This dead dragon seems to have something in common with the female dragon.

Chen Rui shook his head, “I think for the sake of my life, it is better not to go to Zola.”

Paglio’s eyes twitched, “2%. This is the final bottom line. You are cutting the flesh of a dragon!”

“Ancient runes are still too difficult for me.”

“2% cannot be changed anymore! Otherwise I would rather not dispel the seal!”

“…”

“Oh!” Chen Rui seemed to just remember something. He deliberately said to himself, “I almost forgot, this time the plan used a lot of money. It seems that there is not much left from the entire treasure…”

“What? I’ll fight with you!” The poison dragon, who was hit by the news that came like a bombshell, bared his teeth and fang and wanted to choke Chen Rui by the neck, then Delia and Athena walked in the courtyard.

Recently, the population of the city had suddenly increased. There was a great challenge in public security. Athena’s face was obviously tired.

Delia saw the posture of the 2 and was taken aback, “Dodo, what are you doing with Paglio?”

“That’s not Dodo…” Athena looked at the calm “Dodo” and the rampaging poison dragon. Her initial fatigue disappeared suddenly as her beautiful red eyes glowed with surprise.

After finally explaining about the treasure, the poison dragon stopped rampaging. He grabbed a few bottles of wine, and drank it by himself.

Chen Rui learned from Delia that with his help, Roman’s [The Eye of Evil] advanced successfully and subjugated the Demon Emperor-level evil eye tyrant as a lifelong companion beast. After returning to the Dark Moon, Roman immediately started training behind closed-doors with a hope to a further leap in power.

“If it weren’t for the leader this time, Roman would be dead, let alone break through or get the Demon Emperor-level lifelong companion beast. Leader seems to have even wasted a bottle of resurrection potion.” Delia showed gratitude, “I know that the heartless bastard never knows how to express his feelings…”

“It’s not that he doesn’t know how to express himself.” Chen Rui shook his head. “It’s just that there is no need to express. The same is true for you, Delia.”

Athena held Delia’s hand on the side. She glanced at Athena, then at Chen Ru. Her gaze was glowing with a calm look as she nodded.

“However, I think your phrase ‘heartless’ is more appropriate to give it to some guy.” Chen Rui glanced at the dragon on the side.

The dragon pretended not to hear. All is good as long as my treasures are fine.

At this moment, Kia hurriedly rushed to the courtyard. Seeing Chen Rui from a distance, she was taken aback, “Dodo, it turns out that you are here…”

Seeing Chen Rui’s playful eyes, the succubus immediately realized it. She said with joy, “Ah, you are back…”

Athena asked, “Kia, why are you in a panic?”

“The little princess is missing!” Kia looked a little anxious, “I haven’t seen her for a long time. Later, someone said that a few hours ago, she and Chen Rui… it should be Dodo, rode the tri-horned rhino out from the east gate and went all the way toward east! This incident has already alarmed Princess Royal.”

“Toward east?” Athena reacted immediately. She suddenly stood up and exclaimed, “Is Alice going to the Blue Lake Mountain Range for treasure hunting?”

“I thought so too, so I immediately came to Paglio for help.” Kia nodded.

The treasure plan was a top secret. Apart from the few people present, only Shea and Old Gauss knew about it. They did not disclose it to Alice.

“Treasure” was arranged by Paglio and Chen Rui. It was a huge maze combining magic circles and Dragon Inscription. Without Paglio or Chen Rui leading the way, even Athena and the others would not be able to get in. Last time, the Fountain of Vitality was “discovered” because Paglio pretended to be a garrison guard and guided her to find it.

Dark Moon had gathered so many treasure hunters now, but none of them could really crack it. It could be seen that the maze was complicated. There were many deadly magic circles and inscriptions, so Kia was so anxious.

Athena squeezed her fist and seemed to be blaming herself, “She even pestered me a few days ago and told me to accompany her, but I was too busy. Plus, it is very dangerous there, so I didn’t promise her. If I knew it earlier, I’ll just go and satisfy her curiosity!”

The little loli was indeed a brave character. When Athena was only an Intermediate Demon previously, she went to dangerous places like the black rainforest with Athena. Now, she even secretly took Dodo to hunt for treasure now.

“It’s not your fault. It is because of the troublemaker! I’ll go to the Blue Lake Mountain Range!” Chen Rui knew that time was pressing, so he got up abruptly.

I just came back and still haven’t had the time to be intimate with Athena and Kia. Yet I encountered this kind of thing. Seems like the little loli is really a troublemaker.

“En, you must bring Alice back.”

Athena knew that the magic circles in the treasure were intricate, so it would only be a waste of time if she followed him. As she thought of something, she dragged him and added, “Don’t blame her, she seems to be in a bad mood recently. ”

Chen Rui nodded indifferently, “Don’t worry, it’s just a kid messing around. How can I blame her?”

Athena glanced at him, “She… is not a kid.”

Despite Dodo’s company, Alice’s situation was still dangerous. Chen Rui didn’t waste any time. He disguised his face, rode on the little black horse and left the house. After leaving the city, he began to rush eastward.

Along the way, he could see many treasure hunters going back and forth. Chen Rui ignored the attention of the passers-by and urged the Incubus Beast to move forward at full speed. The passers-by only saw a black spot from a distance quickly magnifying into a dark horse. After swiftly going past them, it soon disappeared in the distance behind them.

Chen Rui sprinted all the way and came to the entrance area of the Blue Lake Mountain Range “treasure” at the fastest speed. Although the little black horse had not changed into the true form of Incubus Beast, that majestic horse had attracted the attention of many people.

As soon as he got off the horse, he was stared at by a few demons with an evil gaze. I can tell that these guys have been wandering around here all day.

“Hey!” A Great Demon who looked like a small boss came over, “No wonder I can’t find my horse. It was stolen by you, bastard! If you don’t want to die, return it to me immediately. Otherwise…”

Before he finished speaking, the man walked over with the horse and glanced at him. The Great Demon stopped speaking abruptly. His body seemed to be deterred by something. He didn’t dare to move. This situation caused the henchmen who were about to surround him to freeze.

The nearby treasure hunters knew that this group of people always bullied the weak and feared the powerful ones. It seemed like they messed up with the wrong guy this time.

“I’m looking for 2 people. A 13- or 14-year-old girl with blond hair, followed by a man…” Chen Rui didn’t have time to care about these small potatoes. He simply described the appearance of Alice and “himself”.

“These 2 people seem to have entered the mountain road on the left.” The Great Demon quickly replied. He felt the terrifying gaze slowly moving away, but he still did not dare to move.

The henchmen only dared to surround him after seeing this man disappeared from sight.

“Boss Richardson, why don’t you simply point the wrong way to this guy?”

The Great Demon wiped the cold sweat from his face as he said with lingering fear, “That person is very terrifying. Just looking at me makes me feel like my soul is annihilated. If I dare to say something nonsense, I’m afraid I will be truly annihilated!”

Chen Rui didn’t have the time to bother these people’s discussions. He left the little black horse in a safe place and said a few words to it. He then disappeared into the “treasure” maze.

Hmmm… the emerald dragon’s boyfriend is gay 🤔. It seems like someone is lying🤥.

chapters.title: Chapter 351: Agreemen
chapters.body:
Chapter 351: Agreemen

Blue Lake Mountain Range.

Somewhere in the “treasure” site.

A blonde girl sat on the ground. Her beautiful and fresh face was full of frustration. Strands of golden curly hair were sticking together by sweat. Her beige folded skirt looked dirty. It was badly torn. She looked rather miserable.

“Dodo, do you actually know how to go?”

“Royal Highness Little princess, let me think about it again…” The slime had already recovered his original green onion appearance. While looking at the junction in front, his forehead seemed to be full of cold sweat.

Dodo had already started to regret in his heart. I shouldn’t be tempted by the little princess’ “free supply” of good wine for a month and followed her to this dangerous place.

The slime didn’t know the secret of this treasure location, but he occasionally heard a few words from madam, so he understood a little bit in his heart. He secretly thought that there should be no problem with his years of experience in dealing with those “magic traps” in the black rainforest. So, under the temptation of Alice’s “huge benefit”, Dodo, who was driven by his greed, finally agreed.

Fortunately, the slime still remembered the master’s strict orders. He didn’t reveal more things such as Chen Rui’s power.

However, Dodo’s overbearing confidence was based on the inscription arranged before the dying dragon in the black rainforest. The power was completely different from the arrangement by Paglio and Chen Rui. The so-called “experience” of the slime was to use his immortal body to endure the trap. Then, he used some kind of strange force to make it temporarily disabled when he triggered the trap so that Alice could pass through.

The problem was that these inscriptions and magic circles were not purely hurtful. It was more on hallucination and misleading. The slime took Alice around for a while, but they actually got lost. There was once when they were almost teleported to a terrifying explosion trap. If Dodo didn’t become a big shield in time, Alice would have been seriously injured.

Facing Alice’s doubts… The slime had more cold sweats. He had a unique talent, so he could feel the existence of traps around the junction. There is a hint of dangerous breath… The question is which one is less dangerous? The slime who had been shattered several times did not have much remaining power. However, the slime clearly knew that if he left Alice and slipped away by himself, even if he could escape… he would be truly shattered by his master and madam.

The slime thought for a while. Generally, the middle part of the Demon Realm’s fruit was always the best, so… the middle way then.

Alice didn’t know the basis of Dodo’s route selection. She saw him jumping toward the middle road, so she immediately got up and followed suit. When approaching the magic trap, Dodo suddenly felt that the threat of the magic trap had suddenly disappeared- It turns out that the danger was an illusion! Sir Dodo’s choice is really wise…

Before the slime was done praising himself… a figure appeared in front of him. Dodo was startled. When he saw this person clearly… he quickly showed a flattering smile, “It turns out that the great master is here! It’s great… …”

Chen Rui’s strength had already surpassed Dodo now. Moreover, Chen Rui’s [Aurora Shot] destruction power could naturally restrain Dodo, so Dodo was fearful of his master in his heart. The sly slime knew that this trip caused a huge trouble, so he hurried to please him. Didn’t the master say a phrase before? No one would beat a smiling face, “I’ll settle the scores with you when we return!” Chen Rui ignored Dodo’s flattery and stared at him fiercely. The slime’s heart tightened, and then he remembered a sentence that the master once said, settle the scores afterwards.

Dodo’s judgment just now was actually wrong. The inscription in the middle road was the most powerful… It was extremely lethal. Once it exploded, Dodo might not die, but Alice who was behind him would definitely be impacted by the strong aftershock. If Chen Rui hadn’t arrived in time to suppress the launch of the inscription… the consequences would be disastrous.

“Chen Rui, you are finally back…” Chen Rui’s appearance made Alice’s eyes light up. She felt that her tired body had the strength again. She walked over happily. When she saw the human’s gloomy face, her enthusiasm plummeted. She pouted her mouth unhappily.

“It’s too dangerous here. Let’s leave this place first. You two come with me. You must follow my footsteps!”

Chen Rui led Alice and Dodo turning here and there. They finally found the safe place where the little black horse was. When Dodo saw the little black horse, he hurriedly jumped over, but the little black horse was extremely ignorant toward this guy. Its hoof stomped on the ground as though to warn him.

“Let’s go back.”

Alice had been keeping her head down. She raised her head when she heard him. Her face showed a stubborn look, “I’m not going back!”

Chen Rui frowned, and his tone became a little stern, “It’s dangerous here, don’t you know? If I didn’t find you just now, you might be dead already!”

“I don’t care. I am not going back!” Alice suddenly lost her temper for no apparent reason.

Chen Rui secretly felt angry. Seeing the faintly flashing tears in the little loli’s big eyes, he thought of Athena’s instructions before leaving, and his mood calmed down a lot. After another thought, he let Dodo and the little black horse go back first. Anyway, now was not the time for the inscription’s automatic change yet, so the little dark horse remembered the way.

After Dodo and the little black horse left, Alice still bit her lip without a word. She seemed to be sulking.

“Are you hungry?” A fragrant pudding appeared in front of the little loli’s eyes.

Little Loli swallowed secretly, but she was still stubbornly silent.

“This is a blueberry flavor. Isn’t it your favorite?”

Normally, little loli would definitely grab it, but surprisingly, she did not move this time. She said with her heads down, “What happens after eating? Follow you back?”

“It’s too unsafe here, so we must go back…”

“Really? The disobedient little girl was caught back again.” Alice’s tone showed a strange dejection. It could even be called dispirited. She really ignored the existence of the pudding this time.

Chen Rui noticed the word “again”, so he didn’t reply anything more.

“Troublesome little girl, problematic little girl, ignorant little girl…” Alice’s head dropped lower. “My sister works so hard and toiled. I should be sensible. I should learn…”

Chen Rui clearly saw the crystal teardrops dripping from Alice’s drooped face.

Although she didn’t continue saying, Chen Rui understood something in his heart.

No matter what, Alice is just a 14-year-old girl after all. Just like the “little girl” she said.

Not to mention her, even as an adult, there are also times when we are reckless and unhappy. At the Princess Retail Store alone, there will be many people or things that don’t go well. I had been 14 years old before. It seems to be the beginning of a rebellious period… This rebellion actually continued until the adult period before I cross-overed… Some things even became permanent tempers.

“Chen Rui, am I a failure in my life?” The little Loli still lowered her head.

This term is a bit exaggerated. Chen Rui smiled bitterly while shaking his head. A girl who is so young… Putting aside the hundreds of years lifespan of demons, her life has just begun even for just ordinary humans. How can she be considered a failure?

“I don’t know. What I know is that many noble ladies who are bigger than you can only eat, drink and have fun all day long by the shadow of their parents… living a pathetic life. Some even dominate and bully others with their position. No one can run a store independently and open a branch in a neighboring country. I think Alice is already quite wonderful. This is not a compliment, but a sincere word.”

“Really?” Alice raised her head suddenly. Hopeful light flashed in her big tearful eyes.

“Of course.” Chen Rui nodded affirmatively.

“Then… give it to me.”

“What?”

“Pudding! I’m starving to death!”

Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief… He handed the pudding over. The little loli immediately gobbled it up.

“Just now (chewing)… Did I make you angry?”

“A little bit, but I’m worried about you…” Chen Rui saw that she finished the pudding instantly, so he passed a glass of juice. “Alice is my most important little sister in my heart.”

“Hmph! I’m just my sister’s little sister” Little Loli drank a mouthful of juice, finally replenishing the liquid she had just cried out just now. “I want to be your most important woman like Athena!”

Chen Rui shook his head. As he was about to speak, the little loli continued, “Or… like Kia is fine too. Don’t think I don’t know why she is living back, hehe…”

Chen Rui was stunned as he thought of an explanation. He said, “Alice… You are still young. There is something that you don’t understand…”

“Why don’t I understand? I’m an expert!” Alice finished the juice in one gulp. “Athena was still discussing that kind of matter with me last time! After that, I gave her a copy of ‘The Handsome Guy Who Was Abused by the Princess’.”

Chen Rui was even more stunned when she mentioned this matter. Athena was influenced by this great x-rated novel long ago. In order to be pregnant with his child when he was in danger during [Refined Mind], she took the initiative… to perform that large-scale… She even swallowed some “turbid white liquid with a pungent smell…”

That was the first special service that he had enjoyed since he came to the Demon Realm. After all, he was also a beneficiary of certain benefits…

The expert little loli’s triumphant look seemed to have forgotten her tearful look just now, “Would you like me to recommend you some more…”

“Stop!” Chen Rui immediately stopped her. “Don’t read those books anymore. There are…some matters that you will naturally understand when you grow up.”

“I have grown up now! Some girls of my age are already married!” The little Loli caught a glimpse of her flat chest, so her confidence suddenly became a little weak. Her volume became lower. “Do you only like big-breasted…”

Chen Rui was dumbfounded- Is this “liking” directly related to big breasts?

Having said that, Athena and Kia are both… When Athena patted her chest, her two hemispheres that swayed really shocked people…

Looking at the very frustrated look of the little loli, Chen Rui quickly returned to reality from the distraction. He quickly said, “Say it this way… Alice, you are just in contact with the opposite sex now, so it created… an ambiguous good impression. It is not a real liking. When you grow up, you will run into someone who you really like and is worthy of love…”

Chen Rui reluctantly played a temporary role as an expert. He racked his brains to explain a lot. In fact, he himself had little experience, but the little loli’s eyes were getting brighter and brighter, “So… you don’t hate the girl with small breasts?”

Chen Rui was speechless for a while. After explaining with great difficulty for a long time, the little loli’s focus is actually that…

If Shea knows that I dated her younger sister, I’m afraid she will explode with terrifying power that surpasses the Demon Emperor… The point is, I really do not intend to date her younger sister, but the elder sister…

Seeing that the little loli was about to turn into a dead end, Chen Rui had to use another method to guide her.

“I just don’t like girls who are too young. Let’s make an agreement. 5 years from now, if you still don’t have a person that you like…”

She will also be a 19-year-old lady in 5 years. Even if there is something, at least I will not feel guilty. Plus, Alice is also very cute, but in terms of her attributes………………

I heard that a woman will change completely after 18 years old.

Will she?

“5 years?” The little loli tilted her head for a moment and shook her head resolutely. “No! It’s too long. Who knows how many women you will get during these years? I will probably be ranked more than hundreds!”

These sentences made Chen Rui sweat. The little loli pursed her lips and gave a deadline, “At most 1 year.”

The little loli’s idea was that there were not many competitors now, plus Athena was her good friend. Kia was also a friend. According to the “experience” in the “book”, she could definitely easily integrate into the “harem”. Then, she could unite with her 2 friends to deal with the new women.

If Chen Rui knew exactly what the little loli was thinking, the sweat on his forehead would definitely increase tenfold.

“1 year will definitely not work… 4 years.”

“1.5 years…”

In the end, the two “agreed” on 3 years. For Chen Rui, 3 years was just a tactic for delay. He believed time would dilute many things.

With this most important agreement, Alice’s previous frustration was gone. She recovered to the original little loli that was vibrant.

“You can’t tell my sister about this!” Alice’s gaze was threatening. In fact, this was what Chen Rui wanted to say, so he nodded quickly.

“In order to prevent you from backing out, I have to do one thing first” The little loli rolled her eyes, “Close your eyes now!”

As soon as he closed his eyes, he felt a warm and fresh breath approaching. It pressed gently on his lips.

When Chen Rui opened his eyes, the little loli had already landed from her tiptoes. Her fair and smooth cheeks were blushing. She dared not look at him for a while.

I’ve been kissed again! Why “again”?

To be honest, that kind of warm and soft feeling is indeed, erm, fine…

The little loli didn’t boldly stick out her tongue like the previous time. She just gave a light kiss. After all, I was pretending to be a corpse last time. This time… Looking at her shy looks, she is quite cute.

Or as Athena said, she is no longer a kid.

“Consider this to be given to you 3 years in advance… interest.” The little loli made good use of the vocabulary taught by Chen Rui with a well-experienced look. “Don’t be nervous, it is not the first time I kiss a man!”

This demeanour seemed to be saying to some girl who was assaulted – Don’t cry! I will be responsible for it. In fact, the first time was also with Chen Rui, but she knocked him off first to seize his first kiss. It should be the first kiss for both of them.

“I have already recorded it just now. If you dare to regret it, I will tell my sister that you are coveting me!” Alice triumphantly raised the recording stone in her hand. It was actually more to cover the shyness on her face.

Do you have to accuse me like that? Who is coveting who now? Chen Rui did not reason with her rationally. He just nodded.

“Okay! I am very tired today, so I can’t walk anymore. You carry me back!”

“Huh?”

“Hehe!” (Showing the recording stone)

“By the way, you have to tell a story as you walk! Something I haven’t heard before!”

If Shea knows, I bet she would be jealous rather than exploding her power… or it could be both🤷♂️.

chapters.title: Chapter 352: A Foolish Woman And The Damn Man
chapters.body:
Chapter 352: A Foolish Woman And The Damn Man

After faintly learning some secrets of the “treasure” of the Blue Lake Mountain Range, Alice was no longer surprised that Chen Rui could easily enter and exit the magic circles along the way. As an additional clause to the agreement, the little loli deliberately promised Chen Rui that she would never disclose this matter. She also promised that she would accept Kia’s protection on normal days. She would no longer be so reckless.

After listening to 2 stories, the exhausted little loli fell asleep on Chen Rui’s back. When holding her to sit on the tri-horned rhino, her tender face was as peaceful as a newborn baby. It gave Chen Rui a sense of tranquility.

3 years…

Can time really change everything?

Chen Rui stroked the little loli’s hair lightly. Suddenly, he remembered a classic saying – Worry about future matters in the future.

Anyway, at least she is the cutest sister.

When Chen Rui returned to the palace with Alice sleeping on his back, Shea walked out hastily. After seeing that the little loli was safe and sound, she finally breathed a sigh of relief. She took Alice from his hand and passed her to the maid to go into the inner courtyard to rest.

Although Dodo’s transformation of Chen Rui seldom went out of the house, he had already appeared in the Dark Moon publicly, so he didn’t need to hide.

“You have to take care of Alice’s affair as soon as you return. Thanks for the hard work.” said Shea. The two walked into the council hall together. The maids on the side had already retreated sensibly. “No worries.”

“Are you… all good out there this time?”

Shea didn’t directly ask about the plan this time, but instead she asked such a sentence. It was not the kind of official greeting, but rather a blunt sentence. It was mixed with a feeling that even she couldn’t tell.

As though there was something she wanted to blurt out after not seeing this man for a long time.

Chen Rui heard a hint of warmth in her tone. He nodded, “I’m fine, but you seem to be thinner.”

Since the appearance of the Dark Moon’s “treasure”, Shea had been busy. She had slimmed down a bit, but her spirit and outlook was much better than when she was faced with great pressure previously. Her pure and elegant temperament resembling an iceberg goddess was even more attractive.

For the subjects of the Dark Moon, this kind of majesty was unapproachable. However, for him, majesty and lord, all these were all unimportant. In his eyes, she was just a beautiful boss.

Moreover, there was a bit of ambiguity between the iceberg royal sister boss. Shea would definitely not admit it, but she had to admit it in her heart.

“Save your sweet words for Athena and Kia.”

Shea’s gaze became cold. This guy will go overboard when I loosen a bit. However, she seemed to have forgotten that she was the one who started the conversation.

Chen Rui was still smiling as he said, “Then, the initial truth that I was about to say next ‘but you are more beautiful’, can only be forced back.”

“Okay! You should talk about the plan.” Shea said in a concluding remark to stop this irrelevant conversation. Maybe she secretly wanted to continue, but that plan was related to the future of the Dark Moon, so obviously it was more important.

Chen Rui didn’t continue to tease her. He told her about the progress of the plan as well as the next possible situation and the way to deal with it. Shea couldn’t help but to nod.

“The plan that was almost unimaginable at that time has now been implemented to such an extent…”

“Compared with the original expectation, this plan has too many changes. Many of them were last minute responses. In fact, I was not sure about it. I can only say that my luck and our luck are good.”

“In any case, you did all of this.” Shea said with deep emotion, “It’s just a year of work, but the initial and the current Dark Moon… Trusting you at the beginning is the best decision in my life.”

Indeed, when Chen Rui first arrived, the Dark Moon was just a dying despair, but it was a thriving hope now. More importantly, if the plan was successful, this hope might be closer to realization.

Shea glanced at him sincerely, “On behalf of the entire Dark Moon, I want to say thank you.”

“It’s too early to thank me now.” The “entire Dark Moon” made Chen Rui feel that the atmosphere seemed a little serious, so he immediately winked, “Besides, I only accept Princess Royal’s personal gratitude, I think… there are opportunities to explore this issue in-depth in the future. ”

Shea was actually not angry this time. She just shook her head slightly, “In a sense, I am equivalent to the entire Dark Moon. You should understand this.”

Chen Rui could see the 70% determination and… 30% gloominess in those purple eyes. For the descendants of the Lord of Midnight Sun, the lord of the entire Dark Moon, and the legal heir of the empire, a single “person” would affect “the whole entity”. She couldn’t always do as she liked.

Perhaps she had lost her freedom since she was born. After the death of her father, this had been magnified endlessly.

“The last time you went to the Dark Shadow Empire, you should have met the Empress Catherine. She turned the tide and saved the entire Dark Shadow Empire. She made the Dark Shadow Empire grow step by step to the powerful empire now. She is the greatest woman in the entire Demon Realm and a role model worth emulating in my life.” Shea wanted to add that Catherine the Great was still single now, but she didn’t know why she didn’t say it. It was the first time she told others about this. There was a strange feeling in her heart. Compared to the feeling when she was facing the mirror or wind chime in the secret room underground in that deep palace… It was completely different.

In fact, it was useless even if Shea added such a sentence because she didn’t know that the first man and also the only man of her role model or idol, Catherine the Great, was actually the human in front of her.

Chen Rui put aside his playful manner and said seriously, “Perhaps an outstanding leader can really change an estate or even an empire. I’m not really proficient in this aspect. I only know that even an ordinary person has a relaxing moment to release stress. If everything is suppressed in the heart, then there will be a day of collapse sooner or later. How can a person who is knocked down by her own stress become a truly great ruler?”

He almost divulged the secret room’s matter, but he was worried that Shea would be furious after he exposed her greatest privacy. She had some good signs of sharing her concerns now. It was better to go step by step and take it slowly. At least he had to wait until the most important plan that he had planned painstakingly succeeded.

Shea nodded lightly, but the guy said another word, “So…”

“So?”

“Aren’t you taking the initiative to ask me to dance in order to express your personal gratitude?”

Let a lady invite you to dance? Shea almost couldn’t hold her emotions. She took a long time to relax before she said coldly, “If you want to dance, there are 2 other women waiting for you at home.”

Why does this sound a bit jealous? Chen Rui looked like he was reminiscing, “I don’t want to dance now, but I thought of another thing. I remember that Princess Royal promised me last time… when I said 3 words… you won’t kill me.”

A rare blush appeared on Shea’s face inexplicably. Chen Rui saw it and added with interest, “Princess Royal seems to have sworn in the name of the royal family.”

Shea only felt that her heart was beating fast. She gritted her teeth and said, “You… don’t go too far!”

Chen Rui asked blankly, “Is it too far?”

He was sure that his looks had the demeanor of a lady with the artificial daze in a certain valley.

“…”

“Next time, I may have to come back after the plan is almost complete. I’ll leave these 3 words until then…”

“…”

“Princess Royal thinks which 3 words should I say?”

“…”

Shea suddenly took a deep breath as her expression cooled down. Her heartbeat gradually calmed down. She turned back and ignored him. Her tone was resolute, “No matter what it is, it is all your business. It has nothing to do with me! What I want to remind you is to not have any unrealistic delusions! Don’t forget your identity!”

“I only go…”

“I don’t want to hear these unnecessary things anymore. You can leave now!”

The human’s tone seemed a little depressed, “Then… I’ll leave. ”

Hearing his footsteps going far behind her, Shea’s head dropped slightly. There was slight disappointment in her tone, “A foolish woman. He should say these 3 words to you.”

You really don’t want to listen to it?

Do you really want him to go?

Or are you afraid that it will be difficult to control if you progress step by step? Or difficult to refuse?

You really are a foolish woman…

At this moment.

“By the way… erm, Princess Royal…”

When the voice suddenly sounded from the door of the hall, Shea was shocked like she was electrocuted. She suddenly looked back. That guy didn’t go far! So the words I said just now…

There was an annoying smile on his annoying face, “Actually, I want to add that at that time, there are some important things that I want to confess, uh… I mean, say, to the Princess Royal…”

“Are you done?”

“I guess so…”

“Get lost!”

In the monstrous murderous aura, he fled away.

The guards of the palace, even those who changed their shifts temporarily and did not see Chen Rui entering the palace with Alice on his back, all knew that it was the human sheriff who angered Princess Royal again.

There would always be once every other time. They didn’t know what this guy reported exactly that made the Royal Highness so angry, but this daring guy would lose his head someday.

But having said that, to be able to make the normally cold Royal Princess to be that mad was also a kind of… capability.

Sure enough, it was the recently-awakened human sheriff who fled ignominiously. Seeing the strange glances of a few familiar guards, the human smiled awkwardly, but a faint warmth surged in his heart, A foolish woman? Perhaps calling her a silly woman is cuter…

In the council hall, Shea lightly touched her face. She felt the heat from the inside out that would not subside. She didn’t know whether it was shyness, annoyance, or both.

Finally, it came together into one sentence, This damn man!

Princess Royal didn’t know that this title was also uttered by her idol, Empress Catherine of Dark Shadow Empire in the Crystal Valley a few months ago.

Moreover, it was the same damn man.

How many women and girls’ heart he had to play with 😠?

Patreon update: There will most like be no extra chapter next week since the pledge amount dropped below the first community goal.

chapters.title: Chapter 353: Determination To Gamble Everything
chapters.body:
Chapter 353: Determination To Gamble Everything

Dark Moon City.

Finance Minister’s residence.

Joseph. Alvin was listening to the report of his subordinate, Royce.

“Last month, our magic shop’s revenue fell the most by almost 35%. Due to the treasure, other aspects of the comprehensive revenue increased, but the increase was very small which was about 1%.”

Joseph frowned slightly, “The magic shop has dropped so much? Is it because of the Cloak Gang magic shop?”

Royce nodded, “Yes, since master Xingxing presided in the Cloak Magic Shop, the goods are sold out quickly every time. Our customers have gone there too. Other stores in the chamber of commerce have suffered from Princess Royal’s sanctions such as being unable to join the night market and adding similar competing stores near the original stores. In addition to the new chamber of commerce co-founded by the Custer Family and Princess Royal, Moonlight, it has pushed us to the edge of the cliff.”

“How about the Mellon Family?”

“As far as I know, the Mellon Family secretly befriended Princess Royal long ago. Their industry has not been affected as severely as ours. Moreover, 2 shops have even been allowed to join the night market.” Royce showed a mocking face, “The same is true for the small family that originally relied on us. Those guys are opportunists. They are simply unreliable.”

“From the very beginning, I didn’t plan to rely on these guys.” Joseph shook his head, “The appearance of this treasure has turned some of Princess Royal’s original mistakes into the most effective methods. For instance, repairing roads, renovating shops and so on. It was as if she was well prepared. I actually even sponsored half of the fee for free at the beginning. Thinking about it now, I seem to have fallen into a trap.”

Royce’s mind shifted as he revealed a thoughtful look, “I originally thought about it this way too, but the Fountain of Vitality should not be fake. The awakening of the human, Chen Rui, is the best proof. Furthermore, the bottles of Fountain of Vitality’s water that Athena brought back last time were sold for a staggering price at an auction yesterday. The buyer was a potion master from the Dark Shadow Empire. Judging from the Fountain of Vitality and the experiences of the endless stream of treasure hunters, the Blue Lake Mountain Range does have a mysterious treasure that was originally unknown.”

“Auction?” This new term intrigued Joseph.

“Sir just came back not long ago, so you may not know that the Dark Moon’s newly opened auction house is a new industry directly under the jurisdiction of the lord. It is located in the northwest block. It is large in scale and tightly guarded. They even specially invited several masters of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association through the Dark Shadow Empire’s Custer Family to set up a complex defensive magic circle. The degree of security is high. Guests can put some valuable things into the auction house, and the auction house will appraise and evaluate these items. An open bidding auction is held at a fixed time where the highest bidder will get the items. Meanwhile, the auction house will take 20% of the transaction amount as a reward.”

“20%?” Joseph was surprised. He was considered an expert in economics. This auction house is just a transfer function, so they are reaping benefits out of the blue. They can actually get a high profit of 20%. Furthermore, the greater the amount of transaction, the higher the profit. It is simply a cash cow.

“In addition to the Fountain of Vitality, there were also treasures provided by the palace and several families this time. The most outstanding ones were the few treasures commissioned by a treasure hunter from the Blue Lake Mountain Range. It attracted a large number of bidders. The scene was extremely lively. The success of this auction has caused many people to pre-order tickets for the next auction.”

Joseph’s eyes flickered, “As the lord directly manages the business, others are not qualified to follow suit. It is equivalent to monopolizing this huge benefit. What an auction house!”

Royce knew that Shea had not achieved anything previously. Joseph would definitely think of these things, so he said, “I believe the idea of this auction house is likely to originate from that Chen Rui. He should be copying the concept from the human world.

“Yes. I think so too,” Joseph frowned tightly, “The Dark Moon has changed too fast and too much in the past 6 months. The Princess Retail Store, Battle Ball, Night Market, Dark Shadow Empire’s Custer Family entered the Dark Moon and co-founded the new chamber of commerce, the renovation of the Dark Moon and the auction house… These changes are definitely inseparable from the idea of this human behind the scenes. Seems like I have been underestimating this small potato who I first thought was unimportant.”

You are actually the small potato in front of him with your current power. Royce said in his heart, but he looked worried on the surface. “The momentum of the Dark Moon has basically taken shape now. It will not help even if we kill this human secretly. The most important thing for us is to consider how to regain this disadvantage. Otherwise, as long as we continue to develop this way, we will completely collapse without the other party’s effort.”

Joseph nodded solemnly. His situation had been a bit bad lately. It was difficult both in the Dark Moon and the Red Spirit. Although in the case of “Charles”, his father, Josh, did not seize any conclusive evidence that he informed the capital, Josh had obviously begun to alienate him. There was a hint of sanctions against Town Mordo’s policies.

The only comfort was that Prince Obsidian from the capital expressed considerable appreciation for his loyalty to the capital and the regent this time. Prince Obsidian also implicitly pointed out that there were some shortcomings of the Red Spirit Lord Josh. It seemed like the regent was optimistic about Joseph’s future inheritance of the estate.

As far as the current situation was concerned, this “inheritance” was obviously far away, and the capital’s approval was only verbal. However, Joseph didn’t regret it. If “Charles” and Kanita were to cooperate, then he would probably not be passive now, but a failure in the true sense.

Moreover, it was not entirely impossible to “inherit” the position of lord ahead of time. This possibility was based on certain “accidental” situations such as Josh’s health problems… Not only did he have the long-term support of the capital, he also had an unfathomable ally, the heir of the Gluttony Royal Family, Aguile. Beelzebub.

He just got a letter from “Aguile” just now, inviting him to go to the Cloak Gang. It was the reminder of “Aguile” previously, which made him destroy Kanita’s huge benefits in time. This meeting might be an opportunity for him to get rid of the current predicament. “Aguile” invited him to meet at the second stronghold of the Cloak Gang in the northwest block. This was originally the Mellon Family’s place. The area was quite spacious and valuable. The Mellon Family was suspected of the assassination of the Cloak Gang’s leader and the smuggling of people, so they were forced to give up this place. It was transferred to the Cloak Gang as compensation by Princess Royal Shea.

In order to avoid the fact that the financial officer had a secret relationship with the Cloak Gang, Joseph specially came to the house in disguise this time. Soon, he was led to a newly constructed stadium.

The stadium was heavily guarded on the outside as if it was some kind of important place, but only after entering that one would discover that it was actually an indoor battle ball court. It seemed to be a standard 3-person venue. His old friend, “Aguile”, happened to be sitting at the side while watching a three-on-three battle ball match in the field.

Those players all wore strange masks. Their faces couldn’t be seen clearly. Apart from “Aguile”, Joseph was the only audience.

“You’re here, my friend.” “Aguile” did not get up, nor looked at him. He just pointed to the side, “Sit down.”

Joseph already knew that this “ally” was at least a great Demon King-level powerhouse. Given his current situation, the opponent’s attitude was considered good.

As Joseph sat down, “Aguile” said calmly, “As far as I know, you seem to have quite some troubles recently. Whether it is the Red Spirit or Dark Moon, it seems that the situation is not very good.”

“Yes, it’s really not good.” Joseph sighed and did not deny. He knew that this man had a lot of magical powers, especially intel capabilities. The collusion between Kanita and the foreign human was revealed to him by “Aguile”. It could be said that Aguile saved him from his predicament. Of course, Joseph was not very grateful because both sides were using each other. Aguile helped him because he still had usage value.

Contrary to the original relationship where he was stronger than the other party, Joseph was now on the weak side whether in terms of personal power or force. Therefore, he needed to show his own value and further use the other’s strength to try to reverse the current disadvantage.

Chen Rui looked at Joseph’s expression and said, “Then, do you have the courage to bet everything to turn the tables?”

“Bet everything?” Joseph looked confused. Even if I bet everything, how can I turn the tables?

Chen Rui nodded, but he didn’t go on to explain. He just set his eyes on the battle match in the field. Joseph couldn’t reply at that moment, Did you invite me here just to watch the game?

However, Joseph was not an impatient person. He knew that the other party must have a purpose, so he did not rashly ask for help at the moment. He watched the exciting game in the field with Aguile silently.

Gradually, Joseph discovered that this battle ball game was unexpectedly intense. It was also a battle ball, but they could change various unexpected arcs when passing or shooting. Whether in terms of skill, physical fitness or overall offensive and defensive coordination, it is better than any game I have ever seen including the 2 teams of the highest level of the Dark Moon, the imperial guards and the garrison guard. It can be said to be one level higher than them. “What do you think about this team?” The other party finally spoke.

“I have never seen such a superb game, I can’t believe that they are just Intermediate Demon,” Joseph answered truthfully, “If there are 11 people who reach this standard and cohesion, I believe they can defeat any official and private team in the Dark Moon.”

“To be precise, there are 20 people plus 9 substitutes. Just when the Dark Moon started experimenting with battle balls, they already had the highest level of the current Dark Moon team.” “Aguile” revealed a secret, “Because I created the battle ball.”

Joseph was taken aback. This battle ball has greatly increased the combat power of the Dark Moon’s army. It also brought unimaginable huge benefits in terms of economy. Unexpectedly, it is created by Aguile!

“I don’t need a Dark Moon that is dying and on the verge of death. What I need is a truly prosperous and powerful estate.” Chen Rui said in a tone as if the current Dark Moon is not controlled by Shea, but him, “Aguile. Beelzebub”.

“As I said, my true identity prevents me from controlling the Dark Moon publicly, so I need a spokesperson. It depends on whether you have the guts.” Chen Rui’s tone made Joseph’s eyes lit up. Could it be that “Aguile” already has a perfect plan where the Dark Moon will be his sooner or later?

“What do I need to do?” Joseph turned his mind and asked decisively. If he could control the Dark Moon and force Shea to become a real empty shell, then he would definitely be appreciated and affirmed by the capital. With the current Dark Moon as the foundation, no matter how much Josh suppressed him, he could still be invincible. When necessary, he could also expose the Beelzebub family to the capital in exchange for his own interests.

Chen Rui didn’t say much. He just pointed to the intensely confronting players in the field. Joseph frowned and suddenly understood something, “You mean the battle ball…”

“Actually, when you came to this place today, you should have seen the dawn of your victory.” Chen Rui laughed confidently behind the mask. “It depends on how you bet on this one.”

Joseph didn’t immediately agree. Instead, he fell into deep thought for a while before speaking, “With the chips in my hands, I’m afraid it won’t be enough to bet with that Princess Royal.”

“What if you include all the properties of the night market and the Cloak Gang?” Chen Rui continued to seduce this cunning enemy, “I will create some conflicts at the appropriate time and fight openly with Shea. However, I must clarify one thing first. I’m the real master of the Dark Moon. Your destination is not here, but in the Red Spirit. After the Dark Moon succeeds, I will fully support you in conquering the Red Spirit in the next step. Although your father who is in the middle stage Demon Emperor is in his prime, but… people always have some accidents, don’t they? Future sir lord?”

Joseph sensed that “Aguile” helped him just to make use of his financial officer’s identity and his capital relationship to control the Dark Moon openly. However, this happened to resolve his current crisis. It could be regarded as mutual use. If the other party helped him without asking for anything in return, it would be rather questionable.

The ‘Red Spirit Lord’ proposed by the other party also made Joseph tempted and excited. He had already received praise from the capital regent because of the whistleblowing. If some “accident” happened to his father at this time which caused the position of the lord to be vacant, his hope of becoming a lord should be far greater than Kanita.

“Aguile” lurked around Shea, cheated her trust step by step, and planned the emergence of the battle ball. He does not hesitate to gamble on the painstaking night market and Cloak Gang in order to control the Dark Moon and revive Beelzebub. Judging from the quality of battle ball players in front of me, as long as Shea falls into this trap, she will definitely lose.

It’s now a matter to get Shea into this gambling game. In this regard, I’m quite confident because the Dark Moon’s chamber of commerce and a considerable part of the economic power are still in my hands now. As long as I don’t hand it over, Shea is not considered controlling the Dark Moon completely.

No matter from which point of view, this plan is completely feasible!

Unless, “Aguile” suddenly loses his mind and wants to hand over the future of the Beelzebub Royal Family and their painstaking efforts to his enemy, the Lucifer Royal Family while sacrificing me, the financial officer, along the process.

Is it possible?

The look on Joseph’s face became more and more determined. He finally stood up without hesitation, “I’ll bet!”

The financial officer who thought he was winning might not know a phrase – Everything is possible.

I wonder what the ghost house in the amusement park of the Demon Realm would be like 🤪? Would there be demons wearing different costumes of the human world? Also, I never thought Joseph was susceptible to playing hard to get🤨.

chapters.title: Chapter 354: Guests From Afar
chapters.body:
Chapter 354: Guests From Afar

Here is another extra release from community goal 1! Thanks for supporting the novel!

Seeing Joseph left with great ambition, Chen Rui gave an understanding smile.

Chen Rui could guess most of Joseph’s thoughts with a breeze. This was indeed the best chance for a comeback. As long as Joseph won all the economic control of the Dark Moon and rendered Shea completely baseless, he would be greatly appreciated by the capital.

Not only that, with the help of the Beelzebub Royal Family, he could look for a way to “accidentally” eliminate his father, Josh, who had been playing the balance game. With the support of the capital, he could replace his father without dispute and ascend the throne of the Red Spirit Lord.

As for Kanita, he could only be killed by Joseph after losing Josh, his biggest backer.

It was entirely possible even if Joseph wanted to betray the “Beelzebub Royal Family” by then.

Joseph’s idea was indeed correct. Otherwise, he would not agree to it so decisively. This was indeed a script that fully controlled Dark Moon. Joseph was indeed an important role, but the real protagonist was someone else.

Due to the God-Eating Mask and Shea’s action, Joseph had a preconceived notion that the identity of “Aguile” from the Beelzebub Royal Family was beyond doubt. With so many actions, Aguile deliberately lurked around Shea for the “grand plan” to subvert the Dark Moon and revive Beelzebub.

Therefore, although this hypocritically nice person was suspicious by nature, he didn’t seem to think of any problem with “Aguile’s” motivation and plan after careful consideration of all aspects.

Unexpectedly, what he thought was the most impossible was the reality.

This scene would definitely be quite exciting by then, but the director might not be able to watch it because he was likely to be directing another big show by then. He would only stay a few days in the Dark Moon.

After sending Joseph away, Chen Rui went straight to the old stronghold of the Cloak Gang’s ancient house. Many details needed to be explained in advance, including some measures to cooperate with Joseph as well as changes in case of accidents.

When he came to Lane 4 in the southeast block, he saw his gang member gathered in front of the Cloak Gang. They looked as though they were facing a formidable enemy.

The opponent only had 3 people. Chen Rui slowly stepped forward. Someone already saw the leader coming, and they gave way.

Chen Rui caught a glimpse of Skye in disguise who seemed faintly anxious in the crowd.

Skye’s strength is already at the Great Demon King, but he shows such a fearful look. Are these people related to his enemies?

These 3 people were all men. The leader was a young man with distinct features and a courteous and unique temperament. One of the men behind him was tall, strong and mighty, while the other was frail, weak and old. However, from Chen Rui’s judgement, these 2 people were by no means simple. Especially the old, he gave Chen Rui the feeling of unmatched.

Chen Rui immediately turned on the [Analytical Eyes]. The data displayed made him secretly shocked.

The young man leader – Race: Greed Royal Family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B+, Physique:B-, Strength: C, Spirit: B+, Agility: B.

Tall man – Race: Wrath Royal Family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A-. Physique: A-, Strength: A. , Spirit C+, Agility: A-.

Thin old man – Race: Greed Royal Family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A+. Physique: A, Strength: A, Spirit: A+, Agility: A+.

A Great Demon King and 2 Demon Emperors!

The Demon Emperors have reached the level of a typical great lord. Another one is at least the later stage of Demon Emperor. Perhaps he is even a Demon Overlord!

The 2 Demon Emperors seem to heed to the Great Demon King-level young man. It seems that the courteous man should be a nobleman in the Bloody Empire royal family. His identity is extraordinary.

In case they are really Skye’s enemy, then just me alone is absolutely unmatched in case something happens. If the real physical strength of the old man reaches Demon Overlord, then even if Paglio helps, there is almost no chance of winning.

Chen Rui didn’t stop thinking as he kept walking. He had already reached the 3 of them.

“Master! These 3 people want to see Master Xingxing. I told them that the master does not see foreigners, but they actually wanted to barge in!”

In Didi’s opinion, these 3 people were extremely daring to provoke the Cloak Gang. They regarded the Dark Moon’s greatest power as nothing, but he didn’t know that they had the power to destroy the entire Cloak Gang.

It turns out that they want to see Master Xingxing… Chen Rui, who had planned for the worst, was a little surprised. Hearing that Didi seemed to want Chen Rui to teach the 3 men a lesson in public, Chen Rui couldn’t help but shook his head secretly. They must be giving face for Master Xingxing’s reputation. Otherwise, no one in the entire Cloak Gang or even the entire Dark Moon can stop them.

“You all are too rude. These 3 are all distinguished guests from afar. Dismiss yourselves now!” Chen Rui’s scolding made the gang members, who was putting up a front, suddenly dumbfounded. As the prestige of Leader “Aguile” was deeply rooted in the hearts of the people, they dared not ask more and dismissed.

“Gentlemen, pardon the rudeness. Please come with me.” Chen Rui nodded slightly to the 3 of them. He politely made an invitation gesture.

The courteous young man smiled slightly and nodded. They walked into the ancient house. The 2 powerful Demon Emperors behind him glanced at each other and followed suit.

When the 2 parties came to the hall, the old goblin, Didi was very sensible. He kept away his previous attitude, and immediately arranged for the maid to deliver refreshments.

“Please have a seat.”

The young man didn’t take his seat. Instead, he looked at the surrounding environment with interest. He said, “This must be the leader of the Cloak Gang, Sir Aguile? We came from far away indeed and only arrived in the Dark Moon City today. Seems like the intelligence of the gang is amazing.”

Of course, Chen Rui would not say that the [Analytical Eyes]’s data showed the race and strength of the 3. He said, “The members of the Cloak Gang are all over the corners of the Dark Moon. We do have this little ability.”

“This is the case. I heard that the famous Master Xingxing is in the Cloak Gang. We want to meet this mechanic master.”

“May I ask the names and origins of the gentlemen, so that I can pass the message for you. However, to meet or not, it depends on the master’s own wishes.”

“Hmph! How arrogant.” The tall and strong man behind the young man said, “What if we must meet him?”

“Master Xingxing is the highest level guest of the Cloak Gang. I have no right to force him to do anything. I will do everything possible to provide protection.” Although Chen Rui said so, judging from the 3 people’s open request to see Master Xingxing, it should be related to mechanics, so they were not enemies.

“Can you protect him? I don’t like a guy who pretends to be something. Take off the broken mask on your face first!” The tall and strong man sneered. His body gradually exuded a momentum. Chen Rui only felt a majestic murderous aura pierced through the air and invaded his heart. The maids on both sides seemed unaware of it. It seemed that the power of this brawny man has been controlled to a state of being completely flexible.

Chen Rui’s will was extremely firm after the [Refined Mind]. Plus, he had faced Demon Overlord-level powerhouses more than once. He was also “trampled” by Paglio in special training. Therefore, this kind of early stage Demon Emperor’s murderous aura did not make him scared. His tone remained calm, “It’s hard to say who will win between us… But I’m not his opponent.”

When Chen Rui said this, he looked at the old man who seemed to be weak on the outside. When the old man heard these words, his half-closed eyes suddenly opened. His eyes revealed a trace of fine light like a shiny sword pulled out of a worn sheath. When he met the destructive aura deliberately released in Chen Rui’s eyes, he frowned. It was as if he did not get any benefit at all.

The courteous young man noticed all this. He was slightly surprised. He began to reestimate the strength of this dark force “little boss” in his heart while he was still smiling, “Since this is the case, how do you protect the master?”

Chen Rui looked at the young man and said unabashedly, “Pardon me, but in this unfavorable situation, I can only work on sir. Sir’s strength has not reached the Demon Emperor level. I’m in charge of this place and you may be the best hostage. Although this plan is quite risky, it seems to be the only way.”

On the surface, this sentence was a somewhat frank expression of kindness, but it was actually a bluff as he faintly revealed that he had reached the Demon Emperor level. Moreover, this was the Cloak Gang’s old lair. This would provide some scruples to prevent them from doing something hostile in order to protect the leader.

If they really want to fall out, Chen Rui’s first reaction was to escape. Then he would pull Paglio and even Guradam to fight against the 3.
