“It seems that before meeting the master, we met an interesting powerhouse.” The courteous young man smiled. The grace and calm temperament seemed to be innate. He made people feel very comfortable, and unable to sense any hostile intention.

Compared with him, Joseph just had an artificial hypocritical smiley face.

“My name is Teris. I came from the Bloody Empire. Please tell the master that it was the young man, who gave him the piece of hell feather crystal in the Bloody Empire capital back then, asking for a visit. The master may have a little impression.” The young man said as he sat down. This action caused the strong man’s murderous aura to diminish while the old man recovered his relaxed looks again.

Although Chen Rui’s plan was successful, he was secretly wary. The 2 powerhouses were almost obedient to every word of the young man who was weaker than themselves. It seemed that the young men’s identity was by no means ordinary.

Chen Rui ordered Didi briefly. Although the old goblin had been standing at a distance outside the hall and could not hear the dialogue between the 2 sides, he could see that the 3 of them had a significant identity. He immediately walked to the backyard.

Soon, Master Xingxing walked out with the old goblin. When he saw Teris, he was slightly surprised, “It really is Royal Highness Teris!”

Royal Highness? Chen Rui’s mind shifted. Could it be theBloody Empire’s…

“The rumored master was abducted by a certain Dark Moon force and was forced to stay. It seems that the rumor is really unreliable now.” Teris stood up and said with a smile.

The greeting from Master Xingxing was actually to remind Chen Rui of the Teris’ identity, so as not to cause unnecessary trouble. Teris was obviously an extraordinarily intelligent man, so he immediately reacted.

“Bloody Empire… Royal Highness? I was really rude.” Chen Rui pretended to suddenly realize something as he bowed slightly.

“Although it was only the first time we met, Sir Aguile left a deep impression on me.” Teris nodded in return, “Actually, I was the one who was rude, but I believe sir will not take Montero’s little joke to heart… Well, I know that the master does not like to beat around the bushes, so I’ll go straight to the point.

My intention this time is to invite the master to go to the Bloody Empire capital as the vice president of the Mechanic Association.”

Chen Rui was secretly surprised that the purpose of the Bloody Empire prince’s visit was to invite Xingxing to join the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association. Moreover, he did not shy away from headhunting in front of Chen Rui.

“This is the case. The President of the Mechanic Association of the Bloody Empire and dual specialized Master Nate recently had a realization. He needs to train behind closed doors for some time. The Association urgently needs a prestigious senior master to serve as the vice president. The Bloody Empire capital has prepared a first-class residence and the best laboratory for the master. As long as the master is willing to accept the invitation, you can obtain the nobility title of Bloody Empire. Your descendants will be the nobles, and the master’s lover Ms. Sasa can go with your family. This vice president does not have to be responsible for specific affairs. You can also make the most of all the resources of the association. However, on certain occasions, you just need to represent the entire Bloody Empire Mechanic Association to participate in some activities such as meetings.”

Master Xingxing’s obsession with the goblin girl from the Cloak Gang was already well-known. These treatments proposed by Terris, especially the use of the resources of the association and the hereditary nobility title, were undeniably very tempting.

As Teris spoke, his eyes turned to Chen Rui.

Chen Rui’s gaze behind the mask was still calm. There did not seem to be any fluctuations, “Master Xingxing is a guest of the Cloak Gang. He is completely free. As long as he wants to, I will not have any opinions even if he leaves.”

When Xingxing stayed in the Bloody Empire, he was treated well by Teris. Teris provided him with a large amount of materials for free without any request. He also gave him a very precious hell feather crystal when he parted. Master Xingxing had a good impression on this young man. He once promised to help him within his capacity. Now that Teris came personally and offered such excellent conditions, Xingxing immediately showed a contemplation look.

After a while, the dark goblin master finally made a decision.

“I’m sorry, Royal Highness Teris. Although your conditions are quite good, I don’t plan to go to the Bloody Empire or serve as the vice president of the Bloody Empire Mechanic Association.”

Hearing this answer, surprise flashed past Teris’ facial expression. He put a magic communication talisman on the table. He pondered for a moment, “Although it is very regrettable, I still respect the opinion of the master. If master changes his mind, you can use this talisman to contact me anytime. This time limit is unlimited.”

Master Xingxing seemed touched, “I’m sorry, Royal Highness, for turning down your kindness. I can promise to make you any magic items for free as a repayment for the hospitality I received in the capital.”

Teris smiled and said, “Then I thank you first. I will have to trouble the master by then.”

With that, the prince of the Bloody Empire glanced at Chen Rui, “I have gained a lot today as I can meet the master and know this admirable sir leader. By the way, sir leader, I came to the Fallen Angel Empire on an informal basis this time, so…”

“Sir Teris, please be rest assured. Only 3 old friends visited the master here today.”

When Teris heard his title change, his admiration expression became richer, “I heard that the Dark Moon has a lot of novel products as well as the recently discussed treasure. Before leaving, I may stay for a few days to buy some special products back. I wonder if the sir leader is willing to arrange a guide for me?”

“Royal Highness, it’s my honor.” (to be continued)

Would this Teris be Chen Rui’s ally in the future?

chapters.title: Chapter 355: Departure
chapters.body:
Chapter 355: Departure

Chen Rui had long expected Master Xingxing to reject Teris. In terms of the best manufacturing conditions, although the existing laboratory of the Cloak Gang was not as good as the Bloody Empire, it had an advantage which was not available in the Bloody Empire and even the entire Demon Realm, which were the refined materials. Teris might be able to provide Xingxing with some rare high purity materials, but Xingxing could use all the highest purity materials as he wished here. It was completely incomparable.

Although it was still unclear how Chen Rui produced these highest purity materials according to the “grandmaster’s” secret method, Xingxing did not need to look into these as long as Chen Rui could continue to provide him with these materials.

Not only that, in addition to his lover Ms. Sasa, there was also Skye, a like-minded close friend, and the trio-specialized mysterious genius who had the highest hope of becoming the grand master of craftsmanship.

The most important thing was that Skye’s true identity was Fonsaq, the original Vice President of the Bloody Empire Mechanic Association. He once mentioned to Xingxing that the Demon Realm’s top mechanic who was also the President of the Bloody Empire Mechanic Association, Nate, employed despicable acts of using secret techniques to seize the skills of others as well as harming Skye’s family back then. Nate’s power and influence in the Bloody Empire was very strong. Even if Skye directly exposed him, it probably would not have any effect, so Xingxing would never jump into this trap and become the nuisance’s vice president.

As soon as Teris left, the old goblin, Didi, stepped forward and reported something to Chen Rui. Master Skye wanted to see him.

Chen Rui recalled the anomaly of Skye previously, and he immediately walked toward the backyard. Master Xingxing also followed suit.

A person just walked out from the backyard. He seemed to have just left. He was also an acquaintance, the top potion master of the Dark Moon, Master Aldas.

With a hint of joy on Aldas’s face, he nodded slightly when he saw “Aguile.” Chen Rui also nodded back.

Aldas’ younger sister, Lisa, had been unwilling to forgive her elder brother who had lost all his possessions due to his passion for mechanics and did not even see his father on his deathbed. At that time, Chen Rui arranged for her to be a salesperson in the Cloak Magic Shop after rescuing her. For some reason, Lisa was attracted to Skye who lost his wife. She actually boldly pursued Skye. It was an easy matter for a woman to pursue a man. Naturally, when the old man, Skye, met a young lady, he would naturally rob the cradle…

Lisa was a very capable woman. After she got together with Skye, she also took good care of Eve and Alian. With the mediation of her lover Skye, her relationship with her brother, Aldas, began to improve. This made Master Aldas extremely grateful, so he was even more supportive of the relationship between the 2. Therefore, he came to the Cloak Gang to visit his sister again.

After Aldas left, Chen Rui saw Skye in the backyard. Under the treatment of the flower of mist and Fountain of Vitality, Skye’s curse had been completely relieved. His original aging appearance had also recovered to the usual handsomeness of a dark elf. Plus the gaze full of life experiences and the thoughtful moustache, he was considered a very attractive and mature handsome guy. No wonder he could attract Lisa.

“Sir leader!” When Skye’s daughter, Alian, saw Chen Rui’s arrival, her big eyes glowed with excitement. She stood up and jumped over, ignoring the chess game she was playing with her sister, Eve.

“Alian is getting cuter and cuter.” Chen Rui rubbed Alian’s head as usual. He glanced at the shy girl Eve who bowed at him, and he added, “Eve too.”

Eve blushed. She lowered her head and dared not look at him. There was joy in the corner of her eyes.

“Okay, your father has something to discuss with the sir leader. Let’s go in and play. Don’t disturb them.” Like a real mother, Lisa told the 2 daughters. Alian glanced at Chen Rui reluctantly before holding her sister to go into the room together with Lisa.

Lisa’s attitude toward “Aguile” was much better now, but she still muttered dissatisfiedly, “What’s so good about this guy with a mask? Both little girls like him so much…”

Skye didn’t care about Lisa’s muttering. He asked, “Has Teris left?”

The mature handsome guy used to be the upper class of the Bloody Empire, so he naturally knew the Bloody Empire’s prince.

Chen Rui nodded. Skye asked again, “What is the purpose of him visiting Master Xingxing this time?”

Xingxing said, “He wanted to invite me to the Bloody Empire as the vice president of the Mechanic Association, but I didn’t agree. I didn’t want to leave here, but Teris didn’t force me. This price of the Bloody Empire looked pleasing. That arrogant Aleus annoys me.”

Skye nodded slightly, but his face showed a solemn expression, “Xingxing, you are wrong. I would rather face Aleus than Teris. Be careful with this prince who is known as a genius…”

Xingxing was taken aback, “I think this person seems to be quite nice. His reputation in the Bloody Empire is also very good. Have you made any mistakes?”

“No mistake.” Skye’s eyes showed strong hatred. “Back then, my daughters and I were under the cover of my disciple to escape from Nate. I asked Royal Highness Teris for help. As a result, Nate’s chaser immediately found our hiding place. If it’s not for my fate, my daughters and I would have been dead in the abyss of Poison Clouds… If I say this is a coincidence, do you believe it?”

Xingxing was taken aback and said nothing.

Teris was the youngest son of Raizen the Great of the Bloody Empire. He could be described as a genius of the present era. He excelled in military and intellectual. He was also good at business, politics, pharmacy, craftsmanship and so on. He was almost an all-round genius. Furthermore, he was sweet-tempered, generous and kind , so he was very popular among the people.

The only regret was that this genius lacked the aptitude to stand alongside wisdom in terms of power talent. His progress was slow. Compared with his elder brother, Aleus, who had reached the Demon Overlord level, and several elder brothers in the Demon Emperor level, he was still stuck in the Great Demon King level.

The Bloody Empire advocated combat power the most. Raizen the Great was one of its representatives. So in a sense, the possibility of Teris inheriting the throne was almost zero. This also made him get along well with other brothers. Even the prideful Aleus, who was known for his arrogance, treated him well.

Chen Rui thought of some of the details that he had just contacted, and he nodded, “This Teris is by no means simple. In any case, we must be careful. If Teris is really in the same group with Nate, then we can boldly infer that this invitation to the master might be related to Nate’s secret technique of absorbing the skills of others. Perhaps he was “influenced” by the trio-specialized genius master, so he wants to use the back door to achieve trio-specialization to become the first grand master mechanic of the Demon Realm?”

Although back door was a new vocabulary, Skye understood the meaning immediately. He said solemnly, “I don’t deny such because Nate’s secret technique has great limitations. If the opponent’s will is firm, there will be a recoil, so deception is far more effective than captivity by force.”

“If he wants to capture me by force, I’m afraid no one can stop it.” Master Xingxing smiled bitterly, “I know the 2 people behind him, one is Montero and the other is Nielsa. Both are famous Demon Emperor powerhouses in the Bloody Empire.”

“That’s not definite…” Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. It turns out that the old man is called Nielsa. Since he is not a Demon Overlord, it is much easier to deal with him. At the Demon Emperor level, Paglio should have no opponent.

“Even if Teris has this idea, he probably won’t do it now as it will ruin his reputation. Not to mention that the master had already revealed his identity when he showed up…” Chen Rui thought quickly for a while, “I need to leave in a few days for a period of time. I’ll make certain arrangements for this matter. Master Xingxing, you should not go out as much as possible during this time. Master Skye, although your appearance can be changed with certain items, it is difficult to guarantee that you will not be exposed by the other party. Please be careful. Take care of Alian and Eve too.”

Skye nodded solemnly. His woman and children were here now. If his hiding place was exposed, the consequences would be disastrous. Moreover, the Cloak Gang and his friends would be affected.

In order to cooperate with Joseph’s “big gambling plan,” Chen Rui deliberately summoned Arux and Didi again. He carefully ordered them. After confirming that they understood, he left the Cloak Gang.

Returning to the sheriff residence, Chen Rui told Paglio about the appearance of the 2 Demon Emperor-level powerhouses. Paglio immediately patted his chest and agreed. Since the capital’s plan was about to unfold, Chen Rui couldn’t stay in the Dark Moon for a long time. In order to unlock Paglio’s seal earlier, Chen Rui used the [Deep Analysis] to record all the ancient runes on the poison dragon. The strange thing was that no one could see the symbols surrounding the poison dragon, but Chen Rui could see them very clearly from the first encounter with the poison dragon. It was probably the Super System.

These symbols were not static. They change every hour. After long-term observation previously, it should be cyclically changed 12 times a day. It would change again every 7 days. It was extremely mysterious and profound.

From the previous Rainbow Valley experience, if the fairy dragon was called to the Dark Moon to help Paglio dispel the magic, perhaps she would be more willing to study the rune on an enemy’s corpse. Furthermore, with Zola’s moral values, any promise was unreliable. This was true even if the reward was a silver box. Thus, asking for her advice on the runes by “copying” was the safest and most effective method.

However, in terms of Zola’s research achievements on the Dragon Inscription, even Paglio, who had always been self-assured in this, was also impressed. After comparing the space Chen Rui had learned when he was in the Rainbow Valley with Paglio’s special training and teaching, there had been new progress. The vague concept of territory had been faintly formed. It had changed from relying its existence on the [Galaxy Territory] to being able to operate independently, but he kept feeling that something else was lacking. Maybe he needed an opportunity to fully grasp the power of the Megrez state. It was also the most important precondition to breakthrough to the next “Phecda”.

The higher the level of power, the more difficult it was to break through. The same was true for the Super System. It was necessary to fully grasp the power of the current state before breaking through to the next level.

Chen Rui had to go out to complete 2 things on this trip. One was learning ancient runes and the other was completing the capital plan. Probably there was no time to return to the Dark Moon as he did previously.

The farewell was just around the corner. Athena and Kia were reluctant to be apart from him. In the last 3 days, they were glued together at almost every moment with the most tender and lingering feeling. Fortunately, the guy with a bad mouth had gone for secluded training. Otherwise, Chen Rui would definitely be called names like a stallion used for breeding, 7 ejaculations a night, or one whole day at a time.

In fact, compared with Athena who was usually downright and generous, the little maid who looked obedient and “honest” was much more proactive in bed. In front of her beloved man, the succubus bloomed without reservation and served wholeheartedly. The various inherited bloodline “techniques” were way better than the patterns in the love art blockbuster in his memory. This let him enjoy the romance of love affairs.

Of course, he didn’t neglect the female sheriff who was wisely regarded as the first wife by Kia.

Kia used some methods to persuade Athena so that on the last night before he left the Dark Moon, the little maid brought the shy female sheriff and appeared on his bed.

The eyes of this guy suddenly widened. He felt an unprecedented adrenaline rush. Could… could this be the legendary…three-?

That night, it was said that a wolf howl could be heard within 10 miles of the sheriff’s house…

The next day, a refreshed Chen Rui appeared on the road to the capital. In the whole plan, the most critical scene finally unfolded.

The Fallen Angel capital, when the palace’s high rank consultant, “Charles,” swaggered into the city gate, the guards seemed a little surprised. Then, Chen Rui came to Isabella’s residence through the inner city.

When Isabella heard the news of his arrival, she immediately greeted him and welcomed him into the mansion.

Isabella’s complexion showed a rare sternness. Her first sentence was, “Why do you still dare to appear publicly?”

Chen Rui asked curiously, “Why did you ask so?”

“Did you kill Lordan?”

Chen Rui asked without answering, “You mean the heir of the Lincoln Family? Is he dead?”

Isabella frowned and said, “This matter has been investigated. On the day you left the capital for the Red Spirit Estate, Lordan and the people from the Deanlie family and the Ryan family, as well as Mia from the side royal family went to look for your trouble. As a result, their bodies were found in the woods in a mountain. It was the road to the Red Spirit Estate nearby. Lordan was killed by extremely cruel methods. His corpse was not there. Only by using some secret technique did they discover that the remaining flesh and blood was… ”

“Isabella, what are you trying to say?”

“Now, Charles, it’s useless to deny it anymore. Several victim families have unanimously decided that you killed Lordan and the others. You’re in big trouble now!”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Why don’t you ask why Lordan and those people are messing up with me?”

“Whatever the reason, they are all dead now, but you’re still alive. This is your biggest trouble.” Isabella sighed, “Pierce is the chief magician of the Deanlie family while Lestin is the son-in-law of the Ryan family. He is the most hopeful person to become the Demon Emperor in the family. Lordan is the heir of the Lincoln Family. These 3 are the capital’s veteran family, let alone Mia from the royal family. This incident has already raised great commotions. Even the Royal Highness Regent might not be able to protect you!”

Chen Rui said calmly, “It’s not that he can’t protect me. It’s just that he may not be willing to do his best to protect…”

“This is a case of murder! I heard that your brother, Samuel, has escaped from the Red Spirit Estate after hearing the news. His whereabouts are still unknown. Most probably he has found a way to return to the human world.”

“But……”

“There is no ‘but’! Run now!” Isabella interrupted him. “Before the guards come here, leave quickly! If you can, go back to the human world immediately and never come to the Demon Realm again!”

Why did Isabella become so concerned about Chen Rui all of a sudden? Was it a trick or love?

chapters.title: Chapter 356: Prison
chapters.body:
Chapter 356: Prison

In Chen Rui’s eyes, Isabella’s beautiful face was full of anxiety and worry. There seemed to be no flaws.

Chen Rui shifted his mind and shook his head resolutely, “No! I haven’t completed the mission of my family; I haven’t achieved the real wish in my heart, and…”

As Isabella was about to speak, suddenly her hand was tight. She was already grasped by Chen Rui, then his 2 fiery eyes gazed at her, “I haven’t gone to the Holy Light Mountain to personally pluck the Snow Dallet flower for you yet! Therefore, I will never leave like this!”

Isabella felt the heat coming from her hands. When she heard the 2 two sentences, her blue eyes finally moved slightly. There was a hint of shock.

Chen Rui already felt someone hurriedly approaching from the outside. His mind shifted, and he held her hand tightly as he added, “Yini, actually I…”

“Madam!” A maid who rushed in saw Chen Rui holding Isabella’s hand, so she was taken aback, but there was still a little panic on her face, “Bad news! General Doren personally brought the imperial guards. They have already surrounded this place!”

While Isabella was shocked from the news, she felt a box in her hand. The pair of fiery hands had been released.

“Yini, go and see the regent in a while and give him the contents of this box personally. Tell him it is a gift I brought this time. This may be the only turning point for me! Be sure to remember to hand it to Royal Highness Obsidian yourself!”

Before Isabella could speak, another maid hurriedly reported, “General Doren has broken in!”

Chen Rui took a deep breath and gave her a ‘don’t worry’ look. A bell-like voice sounded, echoing throughout the house, “Lady Isabella, I was ordered by the regent to lead the army to arrest the suspect, Charles. Madam, please capture this person quickly so as not to hurt the innocent in the house.”

The voice appeared in front of his eyes instantly. It was a strong man with a tall stature wearing dark red armor. He had a moustache. His eyes with sharp gaze were somewhat similar to Sergey. It was Sergey’s father, Doren. Rus, the second general of the empire. He was followed by a group of heavily armed soldiers.

The [Analytical Eyes] showed – Race: Great Demon (mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A. Physique: A, Strength: A, Spirit: A, Agility: A.

Mutated Great Demons that could reach the top were all the outstanding ones with rich battle experience. Their actual combat power was even higher than the ordinary royal family. Doren’s strength was at the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor. He was still weaker than Athena’s father, General George. But after all, his father-in-law should be close to Demon Overlord now…

“It turns out to be the famous General Doren. We met once at the last ball. You came at the right time. I had already been caught by Miss Isabella.” Chen Rui smiled calmly as though he did not realize the catastrophe he had caused.

With a wave of Doren’s hand, several guards came up fiercely to capture Chen Rui. When Chen Rui’s eyes moved, the guards felt a terrifying breath coming. They shivered simultaneously and dared not step forward.

Doren frowned. As he was about to make a move, Chen Rui said, “I can go by myself.”

After speaking, without looking at Isabella, he walked out without looking back. Doren nodded slightly to Isabella and followed suit.

Walking outside, Doren said, “Sir Charles, no matter what, your courage is admirable. But I’m acting according to orders. Before your incident is finalized, it is best not to let any unpleasant things occur between us.”

“As a high rank consultant of the palace, I think I have the right to meet Royal Highness Obsidian to explain some things clearly.”

Doren thought for a moment and nodded, “Before that, you must put on these imprisonment shackles now. This is the rule.”

Chen Rui watched the guard holding the crimson shackles on a plate. His hands that were slowly stretching out paused for a moment. This made Doren pupils, who had been closely following his movements, slightly contracted. He was ready to launch an attack.

At this moment, Chen Rui did not escape or resist as he expected. Instead, he obediently let the guard put the shackles on before activating the magic circle above one by one.

Although Doren was surprised, he still breathed a sigh of relief. After all, this “Charles” can kill Lestin and 3 others. He is most likely a Demon Emperor level powerhouse. If he really wants to fight back, I’m afraid I will need to break a sweat.

“Can I go to see the Royal Highness Obsidian now?”

“Unfortunately, people who wear the shackles don’t have the right to speak.” Doren’s facial expression immediately changed. There was a hint of coldness in hazy eyes. Since the opponent has been imprisoned by the shackles with activated magic circles, he is no threat at all.

This pair of shackles was specially made with superb magic materials. It could greatly reduce the power of those who was imprisoned, so he couldn’t use talents or magic. It had a special restraining function for the use of territory. Even a Demon Overlord couldn’t break free. Of course, since it would take a long time to activate the magic circles, it was not suitable for use in battle unless it was put on without resistance like Chen Rui just now.

This answer made Chen Rui silent. In fact, these changes were expected, but Doren didn’t know that over a year ago, there was a similar shackle on this man’s hand. The gold crystal shackles was then completely transformed into aura. This pair of shackles was also of the same nature. Chen Rui felt the transformation prompt in the Super System just now, so he put on the shackles without resisting. If he wanted to, he could turn these shackles that could imprison a Demon Overlord into a bunch of valuable “magic dust”.

Doren led the imperial guards to bring him all the way to a well-guarded place in the inner city. It was the secret prison for serious criminals.

“General Doren!” Upon hearing the news, a fat guy greeted him quickly, nodding and bowing to Doren.

“Warden Kabang, this is Charles, the major suspect who killed the three major elder family members. You take him to the 13th independent prison now. During this period, no one can visit him without the order of the regent! Including Lady Isabella!”

This is the daring Charles… who was even said to have hooked up the Imperial City’s Flower!

And… Prison 13?

“Yes sir!” The fat man was taken aback and didn’t dare to ask more. He immediately led some people to bring Chen Rui to the heavily sentried secret prison. The soldiers were patrolling in order, and the security was quite tight. Walking into that passage, one could smell a damp and pungent smell. One could also faintly hear the sound of whipping and wailing in the distance.

“I’m called Kabang, the warden here. In this secret prison, I’m the most powerful!” As soon as the fat man entered the jail, he suddenly lost the respectful obedience when facing Doren. He completely changed his attitude, “It doesn’t matter who you are before entering this place. Throw all your original dignity and nobility under your ass!”

After listening to the fat man’s announcement, Chen Rui nodded very cooperatively, “Sir Kabang, I understand.”

A cold light flashed in Kabang’s small eyes. The prisoners are either arrogant, sorrowful or fearful. The indifference that Charles showed is the most annoying one. Many people came in like this too, but I believe that this nasty expression will turn into begging and pity soon because this guy is going to Prison 13.

The prisons along the way looked dark and filthy. Some prisoners saw someone coming and immediately called out loudly or even stretched out their hands to grab something while some lay and sat in the cage numbly as if they had lost all hope. The more scary thing was the torture room with the most cruel sights and ear-percing sounds. The wailing sounds from afar made even the onlookers shudder with empathy.

As for the female prisoners, the tragic treatment they had received was almost beyond words.

In fact, these prisons along the way were all relatively ordinary prisoners who could be arbitrarily humiliated and tortured. This method was mainly a deliberate show of strength as a warning. The felons of the real secret prison might be influential individuals, or those with the possibility of turning over. Unless there was a specifical instruction by the superior, they would not be treated badly. The Charles in front of him killed the 3 major elder families members and the royal family including the heir of the Lincoln Family. Obviously, he was not included in this category, but Prison 13 itself was a “natural” hell. Even extra torture was not needed.

Having said that, a person who could brutally kill the 3 elder families members, especially Lestin, was indeed very fierce and powerful… The fat man still had a degree of fear in his heart for fierce people, but he caught a glimpse of the shackles on Chen Rui’s hands, so he was a little bit more emboldened.

“Okay, hand over all the belongings on your body now. They will be returned to you when you are released.

“Of course, but there are very important items. You must keep them safely, otherwise you can’t handle the consequences.” Chen Rui took off the space ring from his finger without thinking. “Remember to give it back to me untouched when I am released.”

When the fat man heard that he had valuables, he became greedy. He ignored the following words – A man who is almost 100% on death row still wants to be released?

Prison 13 was a separate prison. To be precise, it was located underground. One could see complicated magic circle marks along the way. Although this place looked cold and humid, it didn’t have a rotten stench. It seemed quite tidy and relatively spacious. There was no one else in the cage. Chen Rui was the only “resident”.

“Sir Charles, please.”

When Chen Rui walked in slowly, the cell door closed automatically. Kabang showed a weird smile, “Slowly enjoy your remaining few good days, sir.”

After that, the fat man turned away and left. He couldn’t wait to count the belongings in the space ring he just got.

The cage began to show a strange light. Chen Rui felt that his body sank. He was actually dozens of times heavier all of a sudden. It turned out to be a gravity cage.

Although Chen Rui’s power was mostly restrained by the shackles, he had been training for “years” on the gravity training ground. This level was just a breeze. After turning his mind, he sat down cross-legged.

Soon, there was another warning of toxin intrusion from the Super System. It seemed that this Prison 13 was really extraordinary. However, the toxin… was just increasing the amount of aura. Chen Rui did not resist what was coming. No matter how small it was, it was still a benefit.

The “treatment” of Prison 13 was much more than that. The magic circle of the cage could further limit and weaken the prisoner’s power. In addition to gravity and toxins, there would be [Thunder] every hour. The internal and external suffering made it difficult to endure.

This prison was built specifically to imprison powerhouses. It could destroy the will and strength of the imprisoned step by step. Under the loss of strength, the torment of gravity alone was enough to make it unbearable for any powerhouse.

For Chen Rui, gravity and toxins were basically nothing. Although [Thunder] was a bit troublesome, the physique of [Anti-Magic] and [Damage Absorption] minimized this trouble. Compared with the [Thunder] of the fairy dragon, these thunders could only help him kill the bacteria in his body.

Now, he just had to relax and wait for Isabella to hand over the things to Obsidian. Killing the heir and key members of the elder family was indeed a major crime, but he believed Obsidian wouldn’t refuse the temptation of “profit”. Even if he really caused a huge trouble, probably Obsidian would also make a guest appearance as the Demon Realm’s male version of Goddess Nuwa. [1]

Capital inner city, Lincoln Family mansion.

“Elder family sir and madam, Charles have been taken to the secret prison by General Doren. According to Warden Kabang, he has been imprisoned in Prison 13. The magic circle of the prison has been fully activated.”

The woman on the side gritted her teeth and exclaimed, “Great! Sartre, you should contact that Kabang now to torture Charles severely. We must not let this murderer of our child die too easily!”

“Don’t be hurry!” The Lincoln Family patriarch, Sartre, looked calmer with a sneer on his face, “Prison 13 was built by a grand master and several masters tens of thousands of years ago. This is the only special place in the entire empire. Staying there is more excruciating than any torture. The toxin in the prison alone can erode his power gradually. Even if he is a Demon Overlord powerhouse, he can’t resist it when he is being imprisoned. Let him enjoy it for a few days, then we will go to ‘visit’ the sir high rank consultant. I believe it’s not just our family who has this idea.”

“By the way, is there any reaction from Isabella?” Sartre asked, “Did she go to see the regent to intercede?”

“It’s strange. She doesn’t seem to be doing anything.”

“You go down first. Continue to monitor her closely. Report back as soon as there is any movement!”

“Ok!”

Capital inner city, Isabella’s mansion.

Isabella was sitting in the room with an open box on the table.

She was the only person in the entire room.

Her white jade-like hand was holding something. The shock on her face just now gradually faded away. She closed her beautiful eyes gently. The man’s words appeared in her mind again.

“The lady I miss every day…”

“I haven’t gone to the Holy Light Mountain to personally pluck the Snow Dallet flower for you yet…”

After a long time, her slender eyelashes were slightly raised, revealing emerald-like eyes. A faint sadness appeared in those eyes, then it turned into a kind of loneliness before finally returning to coldness.

With a “bang“, the object in her hand was shattered. The dark liquid spilled on the ground through her fingers. It immersed into the ground and disappeared without a trace.

[1] Goddess Nuwa was a goddess in Chinese mythology who mends a hole in the sky (symbolizing huge trouble).

chapters.title: Chapter 357: Negotiations And Enemy
chapters.body:
Chapter 357: Negotiations And Enemy

3 days passed.

There was still no news.

Chen Rui felt a little strange in his heart. Although he didn’t know whether Isabella encountered any problems, he would not completely pin his hopes on that woman.

At this time, he himself was the most reliable.

However, he had unexpectedly obtained a gain in the past few days. It was actually obtained from the imprisonment shackles and the weakening magic circle of the cage.

Chen Rui tried it. Both the imprisonment shackles and cages had a special effect of restraining the power of territory. As a great expert in the magic circle and also a top mechanical master, the imprisonment magic circle aroused Chen Rui’s intense interest.

He was not only interested in the magic circle itself, but he also had a sudden idea- deduced the mystery of the territory through this magic circle.

Even the makers of these appliances, the masters or grand masters who had passed away, did not expect that one day someone would have such an unthinkable idea; nor did they expect that this person was a super mechanic and magic circle master with a kind of abnormal skills like “[Deep Analysis]”. Plus, he really put that idea into practice.

In the midst of difficulties, he saw a glimpse of hope.

After looking at the problem from another perspective, Chen Rui unexpectedly explored some areas that he hadn’t thought of before. Of course, the knowledge of magic circle and mechanics played a key role. With the progress of the [Deep Analysis], even if he could not completely crack the complex and profound magic circle, the deduction of the territory had begun to seem possible.

These imprisonment magic circles made Chen Rui unable to experiment with his new territory realizations, but he had a Super System. He could use any skill in the training ground, plus there was no time and frequency limit like in reality.

After his body adapted to the [Thunder] “baptism” and entered the training ground state, combining both his realization and his own understanding, Chen Rui’s originally stagnant Megrez Experience Value had finally begun to rise continuously.

Some people also brought him food these days. They were placed outside the cage. This cage was very strange. It had a gravity field inside… but there was no feeling outside at all. Chen Rui was not afraid of poisoning, but he was really not interested in eating these disgusting foods. He had many food in the storage warehouse… However, in order to prevent surveillance, he usually ate late at night.

On the surface, “Charles” hadn’t eaten for 3 days. No one knew if he was on a hunger strike or he was tortured so much that he didn’t even have the strength to reach out of the cage for food.

On the fourth day, a person finally appeared in front of the cage of Prison 13.

However, it was an unexpected person.

Minister of military affairs, Rommel.

“Sir Charles.”

Chen Rui’s eyes, which had been closed, slowly opened… He glanced at Rommel.

“I’m sorry to let Sir suffer.” Rommel had a faint smile on his face.

“Sir Rommel, you came to make fun of me?” Chen Rui said with some effort as if he was trying to maintain a calm tone under the pressure of gravity, but couldn’t hide his weakness.

Rommel noticed it and shook his head, “I’m here to help Sir Charles. Plus I, brought a reason that sir can’t resist.”

“Can’t resist?”

“Don’t Sir Charles want to leave this damn place?”

Chen Rui’s tone was scornful, “3 members of the elder families plus the royal family, especially the heir of the Lincoln Family, died in my hands… Do you think I can leave as I wish? Perhaps the time when I’m going to leave would be my execution.”

“Well, let’s look at it from another angle… It’s true that Lordan is the heir of the Lincoln Family, but he was given birth by a madam who was married to the collateral royal family, so he was also of the Fallen Angel Royal Family bloodline. This identity of heir was mostly due to the pressure of the royal family on Patriarch Sartre. No one wants the family business he has built so hard to eventually merge into the royal family, especially the elder family. Lestin is just a son-in-law. Although he has the strength and potential, he is an outsider after all… Besides,he’s a dead person now. How can he compare to the value that a living person can provide? As for the loss of Pierce and the collateral royal family… I can make a promise on behalf of the elder family. As long as sir provides enough benefits, everything in the past can be forgiven.

Rommel paused and glanced at Chen Rui’s expressionless face, then he continued, “As far as I know… Sir Charles should be the same as Sir Nero, a royal family of the human world… There is no need to conceal this information, I have confirmed it. What I’m interested in now is what benefits sir can bring to me? Maybe it can match the title of palace high rank consultant awarded by Royal Highness Obsidian?”

“I have to compliment that your sense of smell is very sensitive. You actually smell the taste of interest.” Chen Rui praised him, but he was not really surprised in his heart, “Samuel’s identity will definitely be included in the investigation due to this incident. I probably can’t hide my human identity from insiders. Some things about the Red Spirit, such as the cooperation with Kanita and Josh, will also be exposed.”

“Unfortunately, I don’t have the benefits you can get.”

Rommel’s expression looked slightly different, “Even the elder family that I represent does not have this qualification?”

Chen Rui did not answer Rommel, but he asked with interest, “I remember that General Doren once ordered that no one could come here to see me without the order of the regent. Is Sir Rommel’s visit today representing all the elder families or the regent Royal Highness?”

This was already a disguised refusal. Rommel frowned slightly, “Sir Charles, you seem to be very calm. Are you still holding some hope on a woman… or maybe you can call it a fantasy?”

Chen Rui didn’t speak up. He just waited for Rommel’s following words.

“Sir is a very persistent person. It is admirable, but I regret to say that you have been used by that woman all the time.” Rommel sneered, “You know, Isabella and I are political enemies. You killed Jardel, the coachman I placed, at her instigation. Thus, in order to get rid of you, my enemy on her side, I instructed Lordan to launch an ambush against you. Unfortunately, they all died in your hands. This is the case in your view, right? Would you believe it if I say that the mastermind behind the ambush is not me?”

Chen Rui remained silent.

“According to my latest intel, you should have given her something before you were taken away by General Doren. You told her to transfer it to the regent Royal Highness, but what you don’t know is that she has never seen the regent to date.”

Chen Rui’s gaze finally flashed a hint of surprise. Rommel’s intention today is obvious. He is interested in the huge benefits I may have at hand… From this perspective, the probability of the elder families or Rommel directly sending Lordan to ambush me is very small. Of course, it was possible that he learned the existence of a certain benefit after this incident happened .

Although it sounds very illogical that Isabella is the mastermind… in any case, she is worthy of being suspected.

If it is true, what is her motive? If “Charles” dies, Obsidian’s benefits will be gone. Could it be to provoke the relationship between the elder families and Obsidian? Isn’t Isabella a confidant of Obsidian? Or this decision is related to that secret force?

On the surface, that woman is intimate with me, and there is even a hint of flirtatiousness between us, but she actually commanded such murder behind my back. It seems that she lives up to the name of Devil’s Snare Flower.

Chen Rui thought of the scene when Lordan’s self-detonation was induced and the time when he had the “evil voodoo”, then he had a realization.

Rommel saw Chen Rui’s contemplative look, so he took the advantage to propose something, “With your current situation, I don’t need to deceive you. As long as you agree to cooperate, we as the elder families and the victim of this matter can naturally exempt your accountability. When the truth is revealed, that cruel woman will get the punishment she deserves, then you can deal with her however you want.”

This proposal made Chen Rui’s mind turned quickly for a while. Isabella is the cadre under Obsidian and Obsidian has always been restricted by the elder families. If I cooperate with the elder families, it may cause some conflicts between the 2 parties. In the long run, it can shake Obsidian’s status. However, my identity and business in the human world are fabricated. I am currently paying in advance the so-called huge benefits. It is not time for harvest yet. In addition, Obsidian is the center of activation in my plan, so he cannot be changed. Therefore, I can’t cooperate with the elder families now. Plus, I must use this to prove my determination to Obsidian.

In fact, as long as Obsidian is on my side in this matter, the conflict between the two sides can already be severed. This is also the reason why I didn’t destroy the corpses after killing the 4 people. To achieve this goal, the only way is to show Obsidian a greater benefit that is enough to openly stand against the elder families.

“It’s a pity that I can’t believe you.” After Chen Rui figured this out, his eyes looked determined. He raised his hand a little bit arduously, and he pointed to the cage. “Even if what you say makes sense, even if… in this situation.”

Rommel’s pupils contracted slightly, “Sir Charles, this joke… doesn’t seem to be funny. Although I have always been patient with yo,… the old guys behind me are really lacking patience at this moment. You must consider it carefully. This is a matter of life and death!”

Chen Rui replied without hesitation, “I think I have considered it very clearly. I will not change it. Sir Minister of military affairs, it is too hard to talk to you in this environment of gravity and toxins. Please forgive me for being impolite.”

Seeing Chen Rui closing his eyes in front of him and no longer talking, Rommel raised his brows, “This may be the worst decision sir has made in your life.”

Hearing Rommel walking away, Chen Rui slowly opened his eyes. Rommel’s arrival made him more suspicious of Isabella. Of course, he had never really trusted this Devil’s Snare Flower, but he could no longer wait passively in the secret prison now. He must find an opportunity and take the initiative to attack.

Due to the deduction of the imprisonment magic circle, his realization of the territory happened to be at a very critical moment not long before Rommel came. He might break through that thin obstruction at any time. He better grasp the fading precious insights, so he went to the training ground to have a good training.

After some time in the training ground, Chen Rui was awakened by a strange warning sign. When he opened his eyes, there were already 3 people in front of him.

He only knew the leader. He was the patriarch of the Lincoln Family, Sartre. Lincoln.

The patriarch of this elder family had reached A-, the early stage of the Demon Emperor. His slanting eyes were shining with cold light.

The other 2 people, a man and a woman, were both at the early stage of the Great Demon King-level power. They seemed hateful.

Judging from the attitude of the 3 of them, it was certainly not for a peaceful negotiation like Rommel. Perhaps after the breakdown of the negotiation, they began to avenge.

The opponent took the initiative to mess with him. It should be the best time for Chen Rui to attack. He could deal with 2 Great Demon Kings, but Sartre was a Demon Emperor. Do I have a chance?

“Charles, I don’t know what kind of hatred you and my son, Lordan, have. You used such a cruel method to make his corpse gone.” Sartre said gruesomely, “These 2 people are Lestin’s widow, Teresa, and Pierce’s nephew, Tont. You will not die too easily today.”

Strange images and sounds suddenly appeared in front of the cage.

“I should say that the reason for your failure is that someone provided the wrong information…”

“This time you are just being used by someone. I don’t want to create too much grudges with the Lincoln Family. I can let you go, but you must first tell me who provided my whereabouts and intel. Who ordered you to come and kill me?”

Then a silver light burst.

It was the scene Chen Rui “recorded” with the recording stone that day.

Sartre revealed a shocked expression as he frowned.

“Your son was not killed by me. Instead, he was used by others, and then some power in him was triggered to self-detonate by special means.” Chen Rui shook his head. He looked at Teresa and Tont. “As for the Lestin and the rest, I have no grudge with them. Since they came to kill me, they should be prepared to be killed. This is the most basic rule.”

Sartre had recovered from his thinking and shock. He said coldly, “I don’t know how you created those illusions just now, but… even if you didn’t kill Lordan, he died because of you! No matter how cleverly spoken you are, you can’t escape the end of a tragic death today.”

If you want to kill me, I have let you do so obediently? Chen Rui wanted to ridicule him, but there was obviously no point in reasoning with Sartre, let alone with the presence of those 2 enemies with death stares.

The elder families were so powerful that they wouldn’t bother about the so-called right or wrong at all. Even if they were the unreasonable party. In addition, Rommel’s benefits negotiation broke down just now. He had become the source of all guilt now, so it was impossible that they would give up today.

The fist is the real reasoning.

Many times I am reluctant to use this “reason”, but I have to admit it.

“You think you can kill me today?” Chen Rui asked indifferently. In fact, when Sartre appeared, he was already secretly preparing and adjusting his power.

“You can defeat the combination of Lestin, Pierce and others, so your power should be very close or even reach the Demon Emperor realm. I have not fought for many years. In other times, I may not be sure of victory, but…” Sartre’s body was steaming with a faint flame visible to the naked eye. He said confidently, “This is Prison 13 of the secret prison. Fighting against an enemy who has stayed here for 7 days and has not eaten, my chance of winning is 100%! What I want to ask now is whether you still have the strength to stand up to be killed after the magic circle from the prison is removed?”

I may have asked this before 🤔 the double or even triple spy, Isabella, what was her intention? To create more chaos?

chapters.title: Chapter 358: Autumn Territory
chapters.body:
Chapter 358: Autumn Territory

Sartre was old and cunning. To a certain extent, this tone was a kind of psychological tactic. He had considerable confidence in this Prison 13. There had been more than 1 Demon Overlord imprisoned here, let alone a “Demon Emperor” like “Charles”.

The special bone-eroding toxin alone could quickly corrode the power of his body. The effect of [Thunder] was not just torture, but more importantly, it could accelerate the spread and erosion of the toxins. Coupled with the special imprisonment shackles worn on his hands, no additional instruments of torture was needed. It could be said that Sartre’s plan should be foolproof this time.

“Don’t worry, you will die inch by inch. Certainly not too fast.”

In spite of this, Sartre still did not put his guards down. However, he did not know that after he had a preconceived notion that Prison 13 was reliable, he was already letting his guards down- The enemy in front of him was not the Demon Emperor, but in a sense, it was more unimaginable than a Demon Emperor or even a Demon Overlord.

At this time, the flashing magic symbols in the prison began to vanish one by one. It seemed that Sartre had probably bribed the fat warden. He wanted to slowly torture and kill his greatest enemy.

“Is your hatred as deep as what it seems? Although Lordan is your son, I heard Rommel say that you made him the heir because of the pressure from the royal family because the Lincoln Family will definitely be merged into the royal family in the future. The fact that I killed Lordan, it should be… what you secretly wished for right? I feel a little sympathetic to your dead son now!”

Sartre snorted, and he didn’t explain. He cursed Rommel in his heart. Some things belong to the “unwritten rules.” Which elder family doesn’t use nasty means? Rommel even revealed this to “Charles”. He even says this in front of the younger generations of the 2 foreign families. A strong anger surged in his heart.

Chen Rui glanced at the other 2 with a direct mocking look, “Similarly, you 2 are here to seek revenge, but it is only a revenge after the breakdown of the benefits negotiation between me and the elder family represented by Rommel. If I promised him at the beginning, you will be flattering me with a fake smile now… and it will not be like this. A hatred that can be easily exchanged for benefits, is it a real hatred?”

Sartre originally wanted to scare Chen Rui with words, but unexpectedly, he was triggered by Chen Rui. He secretly knew that he could no longer talk nonsense with him. At this time, the magic circles were completely off. The secret magic cage pillars began to automatically shrink back to the ground. Apart from the imprisonment shackles on his hands, Chen Rui had no restrictions at all.

After the magic circles were off, Chen Rui’s body slightly softened. It seemed to be a sense of prostration after the gravity was cancelled. Sartre didn’t give him any chance to recover. His body was full of flames. A charged punch was launched.

Sartre didn’t underestimate Chen Rui. He launched a heavy blow immediately, deliberately destroying the remaining resistance of the opponent.

Just as Sartre’s fist was about to touch Chen Rui’s body, the target suddenly disappeared. The punch was missed. The powerful force hit the ground. The ground of this special prison did not even tremble. Its solidity was evident.

Sartre’s confident blow missed its target. He was secretly shocked. The imprisonment shackles can restrain all skills including even territory. Why can this “Charles” launch a teleportation skill which is similar to the Great Demon?

At this moment, everyone including Teresa and Tont suddenly felt a magnificent shake. A strange bleak breath came, and the indestructible Prison 13 began to decay and crack rapidly. The strength of the 3 was quickly weakened by the strange force. They could not help feeling intense fatigue and exhaustion. In an instant, their body and spirit seemed to age a lot.

Hallucinations?

Teresa and Tont wiped their eyes at the same time. Only Sartre’s face was full of horror. This… is the territory power! Besides,I can faintly feel that although this territory power is not particularly amazing (maybe because the enemy has been imprisoned for too long and his power has declined), the “quality”, that is, the level of the realm, seems to be above my realization!

The most shocking thing is not this, but that “Charles” can launch the territory while wearing the imprisonment shackles! This is simply unbelievable!

Wait, the shackles that can imprison a Demon Overlord… Why are they suddenly missing?

Is it a trick that Warden Kabang deliberately played? Or Doren? Or this person himself…

Sartre had no time to think about it. He shouted loudly, instantly turning into the fighting form with a long sword in his hand. The strong flames burning on the sword turned into a hideous huge beast. It pounced toward Chen Rui. However, this huge beast began to weaken and dim at a speed visible to the naked eye while flying. When it was finally close to Chen Rui, the translucent blue shield that appeared around his body blocked it.

The shield trembled. After the huge beast disappeared, the shield disintegrated. Chen Rui’s eyes flashed with brilliance. This was the first time he used the shield to take on a powerful attack from a Demon Emperor. The reason was not only because the shield damage-absorption ability had improved. More importantly, it was his territory.

This was the first time he had demonstrated his territory realization in actual combat after passing the training ground’s training in the prison.

Autumn.

It was also called the [Autumn Territory]. It was the name that Chen Rui gave to this territory. It effectively combined the negative power of Shura which could absorb and weaken the enemy’s power before converting it for his own use. Although the aesthetics and effects were far from reaching the perfect state, and the time was limited, he had broken away from the [Galaxy Territory] skill that came with Super System. It was a real territory that he could independently use.

It was only now that he had truly taken a decisive step in Megrez. Compared with the previous ones, he could only be regarded as stumbling explorations. He had found the true direction now. From now onwards, he could take big steps forward.

The feeling of using territory was completely different from the Super Systems skill which consumed aura and Star Power. It was a feeling of being in complete control as though he was the core of a small world. He was able to control the power of every atom in this world at will. However, he was still far from getting real control of it.

The 2 early stage of the Great Demon Kings on the side were stunned by this incident. They tried their best to resist the influence of [Autumn Territory] in the corner. They did not dare to step forward. In their view, this was already a battle of senior powerhouses beyond their level!

Sartre had recovered from the horror. He felt the weirdness of this territory. His long sword faintly emitted a blue light which merged with the flames on his body. It swiftly launched a strange trajectory in the void. There was a group of strange bolts that were constantly expanding in the prison. It exuded a tyrannical power. Although it was constantly absorbed and weakened, the speed of these bolts were much higher than the degree of absorption. It had flooded the whole territory in the blink of an eye.

This was Sartre’s trump card, [Burning Thunderbolt]. He trained magic power and physical strength. All of his qualities had reached A-. It was very balanced. This trump card combined more magic and spirit power. In the territory battle, the magic power was obviously more effective than ordinary physical strength attacks. Sartre didn’t expect his trump card to defeat this terrifying opponent, but he just wanted to take the opportunity to find an opening in the territory. As long as he found an opening, he could maximize his own territory and defeat his opponent.

However, the effect of this attack was much greater than Sartre imagined. In terms of territory, Chen Rui was just a rookie after all. It was the first time he used it in actual combat. He felt that this group of thunderbolts was not only daunting, but the most annoying was the interference power. This made him unable to successfully continue to focus the territory power. The entire territory remained as normal on the surface, but in fact there were signs of collapse.

As Chen Rui’s eyes flashed, he actually rushed directly to Sartre. Sartre was taken aback. He has obviously gained the upper hand just now by using the strange territory power. I don’t understand why he didn’t continue to use this advantage, but he adopts such an extremely unwise frontal attack instead.

Sartre was puzzled, but he didn’t hesitate. The [Burning Thunderbolt] was released at Chen Rui with all his strength. Chen Rui didn’t avoid it. With his fingers spread out, a huge light ball appeared and rushed toward Sartre. The 2 energies crossed each other as they attacked the 2 separately. Judging from the situation, both sides would suffer severely.

Sartre immediately launched teleportation to dodge the light ball. In fact, it was a misjudgment. Without using [Scorching Dragon Possession], the power of [Aurora Shot] was far smaller than expected, so it would not have a great effect on a Demon Emperor like him — Sartre was still misled by the [Autumn Territory] at the beginning.

The battle changed rapidly. A small mistake in judgment might cost everything.

Chen Rui did not use [Scorching Dragon Possession] because of his own considerations. Once [Scorching Dragon Possession] was used, any skills, including [Star Gate], could not be used for 24 hours after “cooling”. This place was different from the Crystal Valley back then. There was no suitable place to launch [Star Gate]. The current battle situation was in his favor, but he still didn’t know what enemies or emergencies he would encounter later, so he must leave a backup plan for himself.

As soon as Sartre landed, the opponent’s figure appeared in front of him instantly. Another teleportation!

A strong sense of crisis rose in Sartre’s heart. Years of experience made him instinctively stab Chen Rui in the chest in order to force Chen Rui to give way or dodge to resolve his own crisis. However, this was another mistake. The other party had no intention of dodging it. Sartre pierced Chen Rui’s chest with his sword.

At the same time, Chen Rui also had a dagger in his hand. Before Sartre had the time to react, the dagger had pierced into his heart with a lightning speed.

This should be the first time Chen Rui used a weapon in a real battle. It was also a secret weapon he made himself.

Searing Shadow (Dagger)—legendary grade magic dagger. Attributes: double the attack speed, weaken the enemy’s defense, increase the tearing wound by 100%, and it had a certain possibility to cause paralysis.

No doubt, it was a very insidious weapon. It was very powerful by just accelerating the attack and breaking defenses, not to mention the miraculous effects of tearing wounds and paralysis. It could be said to be the best weapon in the assassin profession.

Sartre looked at the dagger in his heart in disbelief. He felt an excruciating pain. His whole wound seemed to be torn apart by the sharp teeth of a fierce beast. It was hard to believe that it was just a wound caused by a small dagger. He hadn’t felt such thrilling pain for a long time since he had been living high on the hogs over the years.

Not only his physical functions seemed to lose his original reaction ability, but also psychologically. The dagger hit a crucial point, and it even proc the paralyzing effect.

Demons were different from humans after all. This injury, which was fatal for ordinary humans, did not make Sartre lose all his power. His wrist shook, and the accumulated [Burning Thunderbolt] burst out. Suddenly, “Charles” was surrounded by thunderbolts. He was blown out severely and fell to the ground.

The moment he was blown out, his blade-like palm flicked across Sartre’s shoulder with a faint light. The sharp sword qi in the air left another severe wound on Sartre’s shoulder. Demon Emperor-level’s physique was no joke after all. Otherwise, this [Aura Blade] could chop off an arm.

The successive pain caused Sartre to scream. An inexplicable fear surged in his heart. It was originally an easy task that he was confident about it, but such a change happened unexpectedly!

Although Chen Rui’s Megrez power had made a huge breakthrough, and he basically mastered the territory, the gap between his current state and the Demon Emperor level was quite big (the secret weapons such as [Scorching Dragon Possession] and 7 artifacts were not used). The reason he could hurt the opponent while taking some damage with the early Demon Emperor was mainly due to the surprise combat strategies.

When Sartre arrived, he was already thinking about this strategy. Since the initial imprisonment shackles, he had been creating and using Sartre’s illusion. In the end, he fought with all his life. It was unexpected by the opponent. It really had a miraculous effect.

Sartre’s horror at this time was far beyond words: A severe shoulder injury! Heart injury! It is also accompanied by a strange numbness. I don’t know if I have been poisoned – How many years has it been since I suffered such a serious injury?

What made him even more frightened was that the man, who had a sword in his chest and hit heads-on by the powerful elemental force of [Burning Thunderbolt], actually stood up slowly again. His sharp sword-like gaze glared at Sartre, directly piercing his core. IHe was full of strong fighting spirit, completely ignoring the blood gurgling out of his chest.

In fact, Chen Rui’s injury was not minor. Without the [Scorching Dragon Possession], the power of the Demon Emperor was not something he could endure in his current state indeed. Especially the strong [Burning Thunderbolt] that erupted inside out. It almost made his body collapse. Despite the [Regeneration], [Damage Absorption], and [Anti-Magic] physique, he could hardly bear it. His whole body seemed to be torn apart now, but he used his great willpower to suppress the pain and stood up.

Only when I stand up can my opponent be defeated.

Perhaps due to the severely wounded chest, Sartre suddenly felt an extreme fear in his heart. His power was a little weaker for no reason. In fact, he had the power for the last battle. If he used his territory, maybe there was hope of victory.

However, Sartre was no longer the brave and fearless young and sharp blade under Lord of Midnight Sun. The real courage and fighting spirit had been worn down by all-day enjoyment and scheming. He had only one thought now- Run away and never fight with this terrifying lunatic again!

An enemy who had lost his fighting spirit and courage was just an empty shell that had lost its soul no matter how strong he was.

Chen Rui saw the cowardice of the other party, so he gritted his teeth to suppress the pain. As he was about to continue to take the initiative to attack Sartre, he had a warning hunch all of a sudden. With a wave of his hand, he had already caught 2 strong crossbows. They even seemed to be poisoned. It came from Teresa and Tont from the side. As [Autumn Territory] had disappeared because it couldn’t be maintained, the 2 had recovered their usual strength.

Tont saw Chen Rui contended with the Demon Emperor Sartre and still vaguely gained the upper hand just now, so he knew that his strength was not enough to fight with Chen Rui. Seeing Chen Rui’s sharp gaze looking toward him, he feared that he would be in danger. He hastily pointed at Teresa and shouted, “It’s her!”

Teresa held a magic crossbow in her hand. Her chest was undulating as her face was mixed with tension and fear, but there was still a bit of hatred in her eyes.

Chen Rui frowned suddenly and turned his head to see that Sartre had already taken this precious opportunity to escape desperately to the gate of the prison. He then activated some buttons, and the gate of the prison began to close slowly.

The speed of Demon Emperor A- was too fast, Chen Rui was unable to catch up. Only Tont ran over hastily. He loudly begged Sartre to open the door, but how would Sartre care so much at this time? He continued to activate the gear again. There were sounds of several doors closing.

Even though the imprisoned cage had been functional again, the entire independent Prison 13 has been tightly closed. It was equivalent to a larger cage.

“Oh no!” Tont was about to collapse. As soon as he met Chen Rui’s icy gaze, he quickly thought that there was still a terrifying enemy in front of him, so he quickly got up and knelt on the ground, “Sir, forgive me. I only came under the family order. Pierce is just my distant uncle. I rarely see him even on normal days. That old guy is looking for death by himself. He actually opposed sir…”

In order to beg for his life, Tont showed his ugly side by slandering his dead uncle. Chen Rui’s eyes were filled with intense disgust. He did not give him a chance to finish his words. With a move of his hand, Tont’s face was hit with a heavy blow. With the bone-shattering sounds, he instantly fell to the ground. He was gradually overflowing with blood. No one knew if he was dead or alive.

After Chen Rui knocked down Tont, he turned his gaze to Teresa who had just sneak-attacked him with a crossbow arrow. Teresa trembled in her heart. She knew she would surely die, so she gritted her teeth and said, “I had already married someone once. I later married Lestin as a tool to win over Lestin. There was no affection between. Moreover, as you said, a hatred that can be exchanged for benefits is not real hatred at all. But when he is dead, I will be used as a tool to marry other influential people again, so I hate you! I hate this hopeless life!”

There was silence in Chen Rui’s heart. Behind the children of the major families’ glamorous clothes and nobility, there are too many involuntary sorrows… His hand still moved. Teresa collapsed in response, but she just passed out.

“There is only hope by living.” Chen Rui clutched his severely injured chest and said. He didn’t know if it was said to her or to himself.

“Damn lunatic!” Sartre’s vengeful voice was heard outside the prison. His voice was probably transmitted through some kind of magic device.

“Doren and the imperial guards will be here soon. You will be executed directly for trying to escape from the prison!”

“Don’t try to escape. Even if you break free from the imprisonment, you will definitely not be able to break through this sealed prison with the power of a Demon Emperor alone!”

“I must see you die tragically with my own eyes!”

Chen Rui ignored Sartre. He was just a dog that didn’t even dare to bite.

“The wind is starting to move. Then, before the rainstorm comes, let’s add a little more thunder…” Chen Rui said calmly. There was already a walnut-sized ball in his hand. The subtle pulsating runes began to appear on the ball.

A new power with dragon inscription?

chapters.title: Chapter 359: Thunder And Temptated
chapters.body:
Chapter 359: Thunder And Temptated

General Doren Rus was taken aback when he received urgent news from the secret prison. He rushed to the secret prison immediately.

Just when he was about to arrive, he heard a loud sound. Immediately after that, there was a terrifying shake. The mutated demonic horse under Doren seat appeared so panicked that it almost turned its back down.

This loud sound was like thunder in the middle of the night. The magnitude of the tremor was quite large, almost spreading to half of the inner city. For a time, lights were lit everywhere. Many people who were disturbed by it came out to check the situation.

The direction of the loud noise was the secret prison. Doren gave up his mount without thinking. He moved quickly and disappeared immediately.

The secret prison that had always been strict had been messed up at this time. Prison 13 in the independent courtyard had completely collapsed. Affected by this terrifying power’s aftermath, most of the prisons in the secret prison had been severely damaged. Warden Kabang, the fat warden, was sweating profusely as he loudly ordered the prison guards to hunt down the prisoners who took the opportunity to escape. However, for the biggest “prisoner”, no one dared to go forward and court death.

“Charles” looked a little shabby at this time, but no one dared to underestimate this terrifying man because this prisoner had just destroyed the most unbreakable Prison 13 from the inside. That was the strongest prison to confine Demon Emperors and even Demon Overlords!

In fact, Chen Rui himself was secretly breathing a sigh of relief. Zeray’s power was much stronger than he had imagined. After the power of Dragon Inscription imprisonment was completely lifted, Chen Rui took out items from the storage space to set up a protection magic circle. He also took out the Demon Shield. That terrifying power instantly destroyed the magic circle. Fortunately he had the Demon Shield, the top armor of the Demon Realm. Otherwise, he would be in deep trouble. Of course, he could also use [Star Gate] to escape to a certain point away from the capital, but this was obviously not what he wanted.

Seeing the terrifying enemy walking in his direction step by step, Sartre’s face was full of panic. He would rather flee in public view than fighting with this crazy guy again. If he didn’t spot the opportunity previously and desperately escaped from the prison, he, the current patriarch of the Lincoln Family, would have become history like the collapsed Prison 13.

“Charles!” A bell-like scream came from the sky, overwhelming all the noisy clamor. The prison guards of the secret prison sighed in relief. The second general of the empire, Doren Rus, has finally arrived!

Sartre’s tense heart was finally relaxed. At least I don’t have to face the lunatic. The fat man Kabang, who had just calmed down a little bit, felt uneasy. In any case, he was directly responsible for today’s incident.

Chen Rui looked up and saw Doren floating in the air. Doren was condescending, and he saw the chaos of the entire prison through the moonlight, especially the scene around Prison 13. His eyes flashed with surprise, and more of it was bone chilling coldness.

Chen Rui stared at Doren, who was slowly landing, and did not panic at all. He still maintained a calm tone, “General Doren, I requested to meet the Regent Royal Highness Obsidian before. I remember your answer is people who wear the imprisonment shackles don’t have any right. I should have this right now right?”

Seeing the other party somehow showing off while raising his empty wrist, Doren’s expression became more gloomy, “Of course, I will let your corpse have this right.” “If sir general really wants to do this, then there will be more than one corpse that will meet Royal Highness Obsidian in the future. It is possible that there is also sir general, the patriarch of the Lincoln Family behind you, as well as everyone here.”

“Shameless bragging! I want to see how capable this so-called senior consultant is!” Doren already had a greatsword in his hand. This sword was 3 meters long. It was the weapon that the second general of the empire usually used, “Soul Shatter”. It seemed that although Doren’s tone showed contempt, he still didn’t underestimate this opponent in his heart. He used all his strength without hesitation.

“I believe you have seen the situation in Prison 13. This is actually not my real power, but with the help of something. I can use this item once more.”

These words changed the facial expression of Doren and Sartre at the same time. Even if the power of the Demon Emperor is not imprisoned, he is definitely unable to destroy Prison 13. Even an ordinary Demon Overlord can’t do that.

“Charles’” power has probably not reached the Demon Overlord realm. The reason why he was able to destroy Prison 13 must have been the use of some kind of magic item which “Charles” himself has admitted.

However, that item can still be used once more! This open space is not Prison 13. If the power of the previous one is really allowed to explode, everyone in this area will be wiped out.

“Sir general believes that I have this ability now? I don’t want to say anything bad. I have only one request that is to immediately meet Royal Highness Obsidian!” Chen Rui deliberately used some kind of power on his words that they spread widely.

“Are you threatening me?” Doren waved his greatsword and pointed at Chen Rui. An overbearing breath radiated from him. Even Sartre who was behind him couldn’t help but step back.

“I’m threatening you indeed!” Chen Rui sneered with an item in his hand.

“As long as I crush this with all my strength, the explosion just now will be activated again at multiplied magnitude. Probably half of the inner city and even the palace will be affected. You’re the highest commander of the imperial guards, and you are responsible for the safety of the capital. Once such a serious consequence happens, it is hard to evade the responsibility even if you died with me. By then, your family will at least be exiled!”

Doren was taken aback. “Charles” is right. If the terrifying item is activated and I died here, then the Rus Family, who had lost their asylum, might face extinction. The enmity between my son, Sergey, and Karon Family alone will cause terrifying revenge.

“Now, please send someone to inform the palace immediately. Tell them about my request.” Chen Rui said coldly, “This is the last time I use the word ‘please’.”

In fact, the so-called multiplied magnitude was just bluffing. Chen Rui was not holding Zeray either, but he knew that Doren dared not gamble, and he couldn’t afford doing so.

Sure enough, the green veins on Doren’s forehead appeared for a while, but his strength gradually converged. Seeing this, Chen Rui’s face showed a faint smile.

Half an hour later, Chen Rui’ appeared in the side hall of the palace. There was only 1 person in front of him – the highest ruler of the empire, Regent Obsidian.

Obsidian, who had received the detailed report, frowned and looked at this human without a word.

Chen Rui accepted Obsidian’s scrutinizing gaze calmly. He said, “I killed the heir of the Lincoln Family, 2 important members of the elder family, and 1 from the side royal family. I also destroyed Prison 13 of the secret prison. Regent Royal Highness, don’t you want to say something?”

Obsidian furrowed his brows even more tightly. He replied after a while, “It should be you who have something to say, Charles.”

Chen Rui heard that Obsidian had omitted the title of sir, so he shook his head, “What should I say? Saying that I took the risk to travel through space to the Demon Realm and brought huge benefits for some Angel Empire, but I encountered an ambush for no reason and was forced to fight back? Or should I say when I came to the Demon Realm again to bring more surprises to you, Royal Highness, I was caught into the darkest prison before we met. Moreover, I was nearly killed tragically by Sartre who came to ‘visit’ me in the prison?” Hearing this probing tone, Obsidian’s eyes became colder.

“Does Your Highness want to explain why I was treated so unfairly?

I’m not from the Fallen Angel Empire under your rule, nor am I from this Demon Realm! If I want to go, I can do it before I am caught up in the secret prison!” As though to prove his own words, there was a light gate in front of Chen Rui, [Star Gate]. “Why would I be willing to stay and suffer this kind of torture?”

“If it weren’t for the life-saving item I prepared with me, I would have died in that damn prison! ”

After Chen Rui finished complaining, he seemed to calm down again, “Your Highness, before we decide whether to continue our cooperation, you should take a look at the gift I brought you!”

“Gift?” Obsidian slightly raised his brows and asked rhetorically.

Chen Rui saw that Obsidian did not receive the gift he gave Isabella. It seemed that what Rommel said was true, but he did not expose the matter. Instead, he took out another box and opened it. It slowly drifted toward Obsidian under his power control.

Obsidian stretched out his hand. His action of receiving the box seemed casual, but it actually contained powerful strength. He was beware of some means by this human who destroyed Prison 13, but the expected thing did not happen. There was an exquisite crystal bottle in the box. Obsidian was a person who knew the value of goods. At a glance, he could see that this crystal bottle had exquisite craftsmanship, and its value was extraordinary.
