Going to the Fallen Angel Capital this time to recruit the human with black potion resources was the first important task that Broc had won after taking over from Manu. After learning about all the intel, Broc had full confidence to persuade this human “prince” who was somewhat similar to his own experience. Not only that, the rare black potion resources also made Broc yearn for it. Maybe this was an important opportunity for him to break through to the Demon Overlord. Therefore, he was confident to succeed this time.

In case he failed to win this human over, he had to take this human back and try to control him. In any case, the black potion would be in Broc’s hands.

Chen Rui completed his last “examination” of artifacts. He bid farewell to Obsidian and walked out of the palace. In the past few days, Royal Highness Regent had shown great enthusiasm. There were banquets and balls held for him every day, making Chen Rui tired of handling it. Fortunately, after staying at most this night, he would leave the capital and return to the “human world” the next day.

Every time when he was “observing” the artifact, Obsidian was always present. Although the 2 had become stable allies, and although “Charles” had no motivation to run away with the artifact, Obsidian still showed considerable caution. He didn’t give Chen Rui a chance to steal the sword at all. Therefore, Chen Rui could only record the ancient runes of the artifact according to the most unsatisfactory plan. He also applied a little trick on the Sword of Fallen Angel just in case.

There was a carriage parked outside the palace. As we all know, this was the carriage of the capital’s flower, Isabella. These days Isabella and the palace high rank consultant were very intimate as though they were sticking together like glue. They had trips during the day, and at night, “Charles” stayed at the home of the Devil’s Snare. You would know what they were doing without even thinking. There were already rumors beginning to describe how good this Sir Charles was in a certain way, how he would toss around the Devil’s Snare flower on the bed crying for mercy.

However, the truth and appearance were often inconsistent. Sometimes, the inconsistency was quite big. The poisonous “death kiss” was actually the most intimate act of the 2 so far. There had never been a second time.

Approaching the carriage, a line of eye-catching data suddenly appeared in the [Analytical Eyes]. Chen Rui’s brows raised slightly. He is finally here. He adjusted his breathing, calmed his mind, and walked into the carriage without stopping.

There was a faint fragrance in the carriage. It was the smell of Isabella’s favorite black tulip, but besides Isabella, there was another person. He was dressed in a robe with a big beard. The man had an unfamiliar face. The man had the demeanor of an ‘uncle’ in another world.

However, Chen Rui recognized this person at a glance. Let alone the familiar facial features, just the faintly visible potholes and spots on his face was the masterpiece of Chen Rui when he was in Silent Night Wetland. At that time, he was still just the strength of a Higher Demon.

Broc!

Race: Envy Royal Family (mutated).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A+.

Strength: A+, Physique: A+, Spirit: A+, Speed: A+.

Every quality had reached the peak level of the Demon Emperor and it was quite balanced. Chen Rui had also experienced the mutated talent, [The Eyes of Incubus] of his. It was very powerful.

“Who is this person?” Chen Rui’s tone was unabashedly disgusted. On the surface, he was naturally upset with the strange man who appeared next to his woman.

“I’m Isabella’s friend.” Broc spoke first. “Sir Charles, my name is Broc. I came to visit Sir from a long distance. In order to express my apologies for coming here, please accept it.”

When Chen Rui looked at a space ring handed over by Broc, he frowned and looked at Isabella on the side. Isabella looked a little cold, but she still nodded. This reaction was also normal. She had a bad relationship with Broc in the organization. This time, it was only for the sake of the “bigger picture”.

Chen Rui took it and took a careful glance at Broc. He used his spirit power to see inside the space ring. It was full of the rarest gold crystals. It seemed that the Bloodfall had spent a lot on this “gift” alone.

Although Chen Rui wanted to pit a lot more from this guy, with the lessons learned from Isabella, he put away his complacency. Demon Realm had many sages, especially this ambitious mysterious organization. His flaws might be exposed again. In this plan, the Dark Moon’s follow-up actions were interlocking, so there was no room for deviation.

The Bloodfall organization was not controlled by the lord and the elder families like Obsidian. It could be said to be fearless in dealing with matters. Once he outsmarts himself, he would be in trouble too. Don’t be too greedy. Complete the current plan in the Fallen Angel Empire first. I believe in the future, there will be opportunities to fight. The focus this time is Broc.

“This gift is not small.” Chen Rui turned his mind back, but he handed back the space ring, “I don’t think… it is necessary to accept this level of apology given that we have never met.”

He is not tempted by such a huge wealth? Broc nodded secretly. As expected, he is a royal noble who has seen big scenes. It seems that he is a man of great things.

“Friendship is the result of mingling. This is the beginning of our friendship.” Broc did not take the space ring. Chen Rui noticed Isabella’s “hint” in her gaze. He hesitated a little and accepted the ring.

The carriage stopped, and Isabella said, “You go to the Leisure Moon Inn first. It is in the seventh courtyard as last time. The courtyard has been booked by me for the next month. Now I will go back to the house and change clothes. I will come later”

Leisure Moon Inn was a famous resort-like leisure place on the outskirts of the capital. It was the property of a certain elder family surrounded by mountains on 3 sides. It covered a large area. The environment was elegant, and the scenery was pleasant. There were a series of services such as gourmets and beauties. High officials and nobles liked to go there.

“Yini, I’ll wait for you to go with you.”

Isabella glanced at him flirtatiously, “Don’t you know that a woman takes a long time to put on makeup?”

“All right.” Chen Rui smiled slightly and squeezed her hand. Isabella got out of the carriage with a smile.

Broc saw the intimacy of the 2 in his eyes. He was secretly thinking that Charles, as per the intel, had something with Isabella. He could consider using beauty to win over or control him in the future.

After Isabella left, the carriage drove the 2 to the Leisure Moon Inn. Facing Chen Rui’s indifferent attitude, Broc showed considerable patience. He was just talking about random things, intentionally showing the best temperament of a top noble.

When they got off the carriage, the relationship between the 2 had obviously improved. It was not the first time Chen Rui visited Leisure Moon Inn. Furthermore, the high rank consultant’s reputation was well known in the capital recently, so a maid immediately led the 2 to the seventh courtyard which Isabella booked.

The seventh courtyard was an independent “suite” on a mountain. The environment was very quiet. It was equivalent to a small village courtyard with all the necessary settings. Chen Rui came to the exquisite stone table in the courtyard and sat down. Broc also sat on the opposite side. A beautiful maid served drinks and refreshments. An aromatic incense was lit up earlier in the courtyard. The mist exuded a strange and refreshing fragrance which made people feel relaxed.

Aromatic incense was one of the hobbies of the upper nobles of the Demon Realm. The higher the grade of the aromatic incense, the more it showed their status.

Chen Rui waved his hand to ask the maid to retreat. He closed his eyes as he took a breath. He seemed to be savoring the feeling of aromatic incense.

Broc asked according to Chen Rui’s interest, “Sir Charles also likes the dragon incense of the Demon Realm?”

“This dragon incense is not the best. The taste is a bit bland.” Chen Rui slowly opened his eyes, flashing a strange light, “Listening to Sir Broc’s tone, you already know that I’m not from the Demon Realm?”

Broc smiled slightly, “First of all, please forgive me for my impoliteness. I know many things about sir, including the [Body of Light Blessing], your cooperation with Prince Obsidian, and some kind of unique treasure resource in the Demon Realm…”

“What is the relationship between you and Isabella?” Chen Rui looked wary, “No, there are things that even she doesn’t know.”

Broc thought he cleverly answered, “If I don’t even have this ability, how can I be qualified to sit opposite sir?”

“I don’t like to beat around the bushes with strangers, especially men.” Chen Rui frowned, “Sir Broc, you should be a true nobleman who is generous, knowledgeable, and courageous, but I hope our dialogue can exclude the courtesies and hypocrisy commonly used by the nobles. There is no one else here. What is your intention? Just say it.”

Seeing that the maid had left, Broc nodded, “Since this is the case, I will make it clear. I hope to establish a long-term and close cooperative relationship with sir. I will give sir all the help you need without restrictions. The condition is that the precious resources at sir’s hand… can only be supplied to one channel, me.”

Chen Rui’s brows frowned even more tightly, “Sir’s intel power is indeed amazing, but I already have a long-term partner. His conditions are the same as yours. I don’t intend to abandon this existing partnership.”

Broc shook his head, “You’re wrong, my conditions are different from him. To be precise, it is the huge force that I represent. What Regent Obsidian can give you, we can give you. What Obsidian can’t give you, we can also still give you! For example… a larger amount of wealth, sophisticated weapons and equipment, a secret potion that controls and self-explodes people, secret weapons that have never appeared in the human world or even the Demon Realm, and so on… We can also help you quickly improve your own power.”

Chen Rui’s eyes flickered and he looked tempted, but he was secretly sneering. Put wealth aside first. Those so-called secret potions and secret weapons, I had already seen them in the Mystic Valley of Crystal Valley. Broc wouldn’t even imagine that the human “prince” in front of him is the biggest “culprit” who actually destroyed Mystic Valley, Crystal Valley… At the same time, I am also the one who stole the Demon Shield!

The tempted appearance of Chen Rui was as Broc expected earlier. Judging from the intel he mastered, the real purpose of this “Charles” cooperation with Obsidian was not simply to make profits, but to seize the throne of the human world with the help of the Demon Realm. Therefore, there was no reason to refuse such attractive conditions.

After a long time, Chen Rui said, “I have to admit, what you said is really tempting, but why should I believe these words?”

When Broc heard that Charles was interested, he secretly rejoiced. He took out 2 space bracelets, “Sir Charles, you can look at the contents of these 2 bracelets.”

Chen Rui explored it with his spirit power. In one bracelet was a large number of sophisticated weapons and armors, and another was secret potions and various ordnance. Some of them were not seen in Mystic Valley—— There should not be many bases like Crystal Valley, but I’m afraid that there are more than one. In any case, these are regarded as unexpected gains.

“Please accept these and take your time to test the quality or effect. I believe that with Your Highness’ judgment, you should be able to make the most correct choice. This is just a sample. As long as Your Highness agrees to cooperate, we will continue to supply Your Highness with wealth and these equipment. Compared with Obsidian, Your Highness should know which bargaining chip is lighter and heavier.” In order to further increase the appeal of lobbying, Broc’s title had been changed to “Your Highness”. He had considerable confidence in the conditions he had set out.

If Chen Rui was really the illegitimate child of an emperor, the constructed character “Charles”, who wanted to regain the status of the prince or even the throne, then, as Isabella worried, he certainly couldn’t refuse the temptation of the Bloodfall.

Unfortunately, he was not.

Not only not, he was also an “old friend” that would be unforgettable for Broc and even the Bloodfall for life.

Chen Rui secretly calculated the time as he revealed a pondering appearance. His toes seemed to be habitually tapping the ground. If you listened carefully, you should realize that this was a strange rhythm.

Broc didn’t notice this. He was still trying his best to use his eloquence to lobby “Charles” who seemed more and more interested, “Your Highness, to be honest, I’m also the royal family of demons. Just like Your Highness, I was taken away from the things that belonged to me. I understand what Your Highness feels very well. With the help of those people now, I have regained a considerable part, and there will be more in the future…”

Broc was talking eloquently when a strange warning came out suddenly.

If he hadn’t reached the edge of the Demon Overlord realm, he wouldn’t have such a keen sixth sense.

Although the contact with the other party had been quite smooth and there should be no danger now, as a powerhouse who had experienced many battles, he believed in this kind of intuition even more. He could not be bothered about rudeness and so on. He reacted without thinking.

Reality proved that this reaction was correct. Just as Broc bounced back at an extremely fast speed, the stone bench suddenly shone out bright light. It inextricably wrapped around the surrounding.

Although Broc’s mental reaction was fast, his body seemed to have been affected. For some reasons, his power was weakened while his speed slowed down. He was firmly bound.

Chen Rui tapped the ground rhythmically just now. He was just using the magic trap of a specific sound frequency. This magic trap was one of the means set by Isabella after booking the seventh courtyard when the 2 of them “dated”. It was a combination of the Dragon Inscription and magic circle plus a little magical effect of ancient runes (Unfortunately, it was quite limited).

Broc struggled, but it was difficult to get out for a while. Feeling that he seemed to have weakened a lot as if he had been infected with some stubborn poison, his eyes fell on the dragon incense. His complexion changed drastically.

Could it be this incense? No wonder “Charles” deliberately said that this incense smells bland and it is not the best. It turns out that it was to dispel my suspicion. He may have taken the antidote in advance!

It makes no sense at all!

With this kind of favorable conditions offered by Bloodfall, if it is me, I will agree to it. It is impossible to turn away!

This method does not seem to be used in the last minute. It seems to have been planned for a long time?

Why?

Maybe he was indulged with his formidable power for too long that he never thought someone would plot an assasination on him…

chapters.title: Chapter 371 - Blood River! The “Excalibur” That Self-Exploded And Injured Its Owner
chapters.body:
Chapter 371 - Blood River! The “Excalibur” That Self-Exploded And Injured Its Owner

Before Broc could ask, Chen Rui, who was on the opposite side, had already stood up. A faint light on Chen Rui’s sword-like palm slashed across the air.

Broc instinctively felt the threat of the incoming invisible sharp qi. At this time, the strength in his body seemed to be further weakened. With a loud shout, his blue pupils turned black. The bright restraining light suddenly dimmed, and the restraint force was greatly reduced.

Broc, who barely recovered his ability to move, immediately moved his arm in front of him. As his palms stretched out, a cluster of black mist appeared. It even completely swallowed the invisible sword qi of the [Aura Blade].

Just when Broc was at his weakest point where his old power was exhausted and new power had yet to emerge, a faintly smoked shadow appeared behind Broc abruptly. Broc suddenly became alert. If it was usual times, Broc was still able to respond in time even if the opponent was extremely fast, but at this time, his state had been weakened a lot. So, his body had been unable to keep up with the reaction of his mind. Particularly, this shadow attacked at a critical moment right after he broke out of the restraint and resolved the [Aura Blade]. The timing was quite accurate.

At the juncture of life and death, Broc’s potential was finally unleashed. When the sharp murderous aura came to his body, he dodged in time, but felt a pain in his chest. His right lung lobe had been pierced by some kind of sharp weapon. A Demon Overlord physique actually couldn’t defend against this blow. It was as if the wound was torn apart by some terrifying beast. Even more terrifying was that a sharp force penetrated into his body and began to quickly disintegrate the power of [The Eye of Incubus] like it was its natural nemesis.

The damage was so severe that Broc roared wildly. The power of the peak of Demon Emperor burst out, completely swallowing the rampaging force inside his body. He waved his arm backwards speedily. The figure behind him snorted before flying out like a untied kite.

“Isabella!” Broc had already seen the silhouette of the sneak attack. He roared furiously. When he was about to pursue her, he felt his body sank as his weight suddenly increased by 10 times… His movements slowed down. At the same time, the scattered bright light around him became colorful lights which made his body heavier.

The strange thing was, putting aside the caster “Charles”… Isabella was not affected. Even the Beelzebub Royal Family with [Earth Mastery] talent, might not be able to control this [Gravity] to such an accurate extent.

Isabella really changed into another suit of clothes. It was just a tight suit for fighting. Just now she was hit by Broc’s strong counterattack, so her injury was not minor… The corners of her mouth were full of blood and her face was terribly pale, but her green eyes were still exduing murderous intent. She was holding a dagger in her hand. It was the legendary grade weapon, “Searing Shadow”, that Chen Rui gave her.

“Isabella! How dare you betray the organization. Aren’t you afraid of being eroded by the curse?” “I didn’t betray the organization, I just want to kill you. This is different from betrayal. Who are you to represent the whole Bloodfall?” Isabella sneered while spitting out blood… “Besides, I don’t plan to leave here alive today. Whatever curse or poison erosion, I really don’t care about it.”

Broc tried his best to suppress the quickly diminishing power in his body. He felt that this toxin was very difficult to get rid of. It couldn’t even be dispelled by secret techniques. He gritted his teeth and said, “Bitch! What kind of poison have you used?”

“3 kinds. The flower scent you smell in the carriage, the fragrance on my body, plus the special dragon incense in the yard… One is nothing, but when combined, even Demon Overlords may not be immune to this toxin. Don’t worry, it will only weaken your strength. It is not fatal.”

Once my power drops to a very low point… then she can kill me as she wishes. With the hatred of the two of us, perhaps it will be a tragic death. It will be more terrible than “not fatal.”

Broc knew what Isabella was revenging for. Her half-brother was tortured to death by him using [The Eye of Incubus], but he didn’t understand why Charles would help Isabella. He even gave up such a generous offer. Doesn’t this human illegitimate prince want to take back all the things that should belong to him? Is he just being foolish for this damn mad woman?

“Why?” Broc shouted to Chen Rui as he gathered his strength to dissolve the toxins in his body.

“Because Isabella is right… You can’t represent the entire Bloodfall. Your organization has contacted me more than one.” Chen Rui had a clever idea. He deliberately used Isabella’s words to say this, intending to interfere with Broc.

This answer really surprised Broc- Before my arrival, Bloodfall has already been in contact with this human? Who was it?

The inside of Bloodfall is not monolithic. Many factions are hostile to each other, but because of the interests and the coercion of the mysterious Bloodfall King, they rarely fight with each other openly. Nonetheless, there are still many sneak attacks going on. Azgalor and Manu are allies, while the crystal dragon is a little more distant. Since Manu is dead now, there must be people who envy or covet the status that I currently occupy.

Just as Broc’s thoughts were spinning quickly, Chen Rui immediately channeled the power that had just been charged fully. Suddenly, there were strange scenes. The sky became gloomy. A feeling of depression rose in his heart, and everything in front of him, including his power, started to age and decay. Broc had an illusion in an instant, as if he was several hundred years older suddenly.

Territory!

In the eyes of this powerhouse, who was infinitely close to a Demon Overlord, the power of this territory power might not be a big deal in terms of “quantity” precisely. However, in terms of “quality”, it faintly surpassed the [Incubus Territory] he had. It was closer to the real territory of a Demon Overlord.

This is a human Demon Emperor? It really is unique! It’s just that this kind of power is still too weak. It is even inferior to an average Demon Emperor in the Demon Realm.

Compared with the decay and aging around, Isabella’s body suddenly glowed with black light. She was full of vitality. Her injury seemed to recover all at once and her whole state was doubled. Broc had an illusion. This is somewhat similar to that of the Asmodeus Royal Family. … The power of Nirvana? Impossible! The power of Nirvana is not used in this way. It should be the light element power of humans.

Isabella’s left pupil had turned golden. The Belphegor Royal Family’s “[Flash]” talent, which was the best in Demon Realm, was activated. Her speed had risen to A+. She appeared in front of Broc in an instant. The Searing Soul in her hand became numerous phantasms which covered Broc like a giant net.

Broc’s pupils were full of black light. There was a soft crackling sound on his body. He actually cracked Chen Rui territory’s aging and decaying power. However, because his power had been greatly weakened by the mixed strange poison, this kind of forceful breaking free had taken a toll on him. His internal injuries were even more severe.

[Blood River], the long sword which Broc usually used, appeared in his hands… It was exuding a strong bloody qi while swaying.

The illusory giant net created by Isabella was gradually melted by blood. The 2 of them fought several times and suddenly separated…Broc’s face and neck had a few more gruesome wounds. It was hard to imagine that it was caused by a small dagger. Isabella tightly covered her abdomen with one hand, where a lot of blood was leaking.

After Chen Rui’s territory was forcibly cracked, he felt that his spirit power seemed to have suffered some kind of recoil. The Star Power in his body began to flow backwards. It was difficult to control for a while. This was mainly because his strength did not really reach the Demon Emperor level.

Broc left Isabella and rushed toward Chen Rui. His purpose today was not to fight Isabella desperately, but this human who had mastered the black potion resources. As long as the human’s territory and magical interference were absent, it would be much simpler to kill Isabella.

Chen Rui saw his intention and teleported away instantly. As Broc was just about to catch up… Ishabella, who had launched [Flash], rushed up again. It seemed like completely a desperate way of battling by giving up defense.

When Broc yelled furiously, a lot of black smoke came out his body and spread out quickly. The entire space seemed to be enveloped by this strange smoke. Broc’s current [Incubus Territory[ could be transformed into any physical object or an intangible state which couldn’t be damaged physically. It also had the ability to swallow flesh and blood and transform them into his own power. It was absolutely easy to deal with these 2 enemies.

When Isabella’s dagger pierced Broc’s body, his body turned into black smoke and dispersed. The smoke actually wrapped up toward her. Isabella had extremely rich experience in actual combat. With a point of her dagger, waves of whirlwinds appeared, trying to blow away the black mist. .

However, after the black smoke dispersed, it quickly surrounded her again. The whirlwind power was diminishing as if it was swallowed. Itdisappeared in a moment.

At this moment, the black smoke all over the air suddenly had a strange transformation. Balls of different sizes were looming, slowly rotating with a strange rhythm.

The black smoke seemed to be at a great loss of breath. It was difficult to maintain the intangible form. Broc’s figure faintly appeared again. Broc’s surprise at this time was simply beyond words- This human has more than one territory power! Plus, this strange territory actually weakens my power by nearly half! Theoretically, if he wants to directly use his own territory in my territory, he must at least have evenly matched strength. Even so, there will be interference to some extent or even recoil, so Isabella did not forcefully use her territory. The problem is that this human is much weaker than me, but he can use this strange territory power in my [Incubus Territory] without being affected!

To be precise, this was actually not a territory, but a skill of the Super System.

Isabella was also secretly surprised. The power of “Charles” is unpredictable. No wonder not only the few people like Lordan, even the patriarch of the Lincoln Family, Sartre, was defeated in his hands. Even now, the mention of this human’s name made him show unconcealed fear.

While thinking about it, Isabella reacted quickly. In the golden light of the left eye, a destructive dazzling beam broke out and shot the already extremely weakened Broc. This attack method was exactly the same as the evil eye. It seemed that she had indeed trained in the Trevante underground ruins. It should be the power of [Destroying Evil] that combined the power of a lifelong companion beast.

Broc had been unable to maintain his intangible form, so he simply showed his true body. His hand was emitting a bloody light; he had launched the long sword’s skill [Bloodthirsty] with the secret skill of his mysterious power. The rich blood qi was entangled by the golden beam like a serpentine body.

In terms of speed alone, Isabella should surpass the current Broc, but her overall strength of the early stage Demon Emperor was far inferior, so she lost in a blink of an eye. The bloody qi quickly rewinded along the golden beam. The sword qi of the “Blood River” could erode the soul. It had a special restraining effect on [The Eye of Evil]. Isabella seemed exhausted. She was unable to retract the golden beam at that moment, so she could only tank the damage. The blood stains on her abdominal wound began to expand again.

While Broc was controlling blood qi, the figure of “Charles” appeared in front of Isabella. He actually grabbed the intangible bloody qi. The sword energy that could erode the soul disappeared without a trace after entering this person’s body. Isabella finally managed to retract her golden beam due to this. She staggered back a few steps. Her face was paler.

Chen Rui didn’t retreat but moved forward instead. By taking a great risk, he grabbed the “Blood River”, the physical entity of the bloody qi. His hand carried a strange force that made the long sword tremble slightly. As Broc’s wrist turned, the sharp sword suddenly cut Chen Rui’s hand and made it bleed. He could no longer grasp the “Blood River” firmly. He launched [Teleportation] to return to Isabella and pulled her back quickly.

Broc’s long sword flicked as he gathered the remaining power to make a big move. However, the sword body of the “Blood River” shook badly and burst open suddenly. This sudden event was completely unexpected by Broc. This meant that Broc, who was caught off guard, directly endured the force he charged on the “Blood River”, plus this quasi-legendary grade “self-destruction” force.

The bursting blades splashed in. Broc suddenly became a bloody man. His whole person almost lost his normal reaction due to the sudden shock. He would never imagine that his favorite sword, which he used the most, would automatically burst open!

Isabella thought she saw it wrongly. Broc was clearly launching an extremely violent blow just now. How come this big move has caused such a tragic situation? Even if there is a forbidden technique that hurts others and self, it doesn’t need to be so exaggerated, right?

No, it’s very likely that “Charles” has just performed some secret skills. This human’s mysterious battle methods are simply endless.

In fact, Isabella was only half right. This was indeed Chen Rui’s method, but it was a “seed” planted a long time ago.

The original attributes of the Blood River were: Increase attack speed, increase water element magic power, and swallow the enemy’s vitality and convert it into its own physical strength.

After it was modified by the Master “Arthur” in the Crystal Valley, its attributes were: Increase attack speed, increase water element magic power by 40%, swallow enemy’ vitality and convert it into its own physical strength, add [Bloodthirsty] that increase attack by 20% and weaken defense by 1%, and limited use of once a day.

It seemed that the attributes of the equipment had been enhanced a lot, but the enhancement of Chen Rui came at the cost of overdrawing the “life” of the Blood River. After being modified, the current “Blood River” was already scarred. Chen Rui deliberately used his own blood to trigger a “time bomb” planted earlier. Therefore, the poor Blood River burst open immediately. After severely injuring its master, it officially declared the end of its life.

The throbbing pain, severe injury, and the “Blood River” changes made Broc so angry that he almost lost his mind. He did not expect that he came to the Fallen Angel capital with confidence this time, but he would encounter such a frustrating failure. With a roar, the flesh and blood power of the Demon Overlord that had been absorbed in the Incubus Territory completely burst out. All the fragments in his body shot out flying. They brought out strands of black blood. The toxins mixed with strange poison were also removed quickly.

However, this forceful use of power that had not been fully absorbed would result in extremely strong recoil in the future, but Broc could no longer bother so much. If he did not use his full strength today, perhaps he would fail miserably in this easy task and die here.

I would say Broc was even more threatening in such a desperate situation, how would Chen Rui deal with him? Would his power rise to another level again?

chapters.title: Chapter 372 - Flower Bloom And Wilt, Life And Death Are Impermanent
chapters.body:
Chapter 372 - Flower Bloom And Wilt, Life And Death Are Impermanent

Chen Rui was taken aback because in the [Analytical Eyes], Broc’s Comprehensive Strength Assessment had risen to “unable to determine”. Judging from my previous contacts and Isabella’s intel, Broc’s strength is at best the peak of the Demon Emperor. There is still a huge gap from the Demon Overlord level. I didn’t expect him to have reached Demon Overlord?

Although Chen Rui’s assasination was a bit risky, he was still quite confident. Now that it was almost the end, Broc’s real strength was really out of his expectations. It seems that a part in the killing plan must be executed in advance. Even if a part of the plan fails, I must kill this damn enemy!

After Chen Rui made up his mind, a walnut-sized object appeared in his hand. It was Zeray.

Zeray’s power was very terrifying. At the beginning, he had used one to escape the secret prison. There were only 2 left now. Even if Broc really reached the Demon Overlord level, he would be severely injured if he did not die.

However, Zeray needed time to activate the Dragon Inscription above one by one in order to exert its strongest power.

Before Chen Rui activated Zeray’s inscription, Broc’s figure appeared in front of him instantly. Chen Rui could no longer initiate teleportation, so he immediately used the protective shield. Broc stretched out his hand and grabbed it. He actually shattered the shield. However, when he wanted to use pure power to suppress “Charles’” [Star Territory] that had a powerful weakening force, there was no reaction at all. The skill of the Super System seemed to be able to surpass all rules.

“Isabella!” Chen Rui yelled. At present, he desperately needed someone to hold Broc in order to activate Zeray’s inscription.

Isabella also saw that Broc’s power had skyrocketed to the point where she couldn’t compete. Hearing Chen Rui’s shout, she braced her teeth. Not only her left eye, but her right eye also faintly emitted a golden beam. If her pupil was magnified, one could faintly see an image of a demon eye in her right eye.

When Broc stretched out his hand to grab Chen Rui, there was a sudden pain in his head. He was being shocked by a powerful spirit power. Isabella used the power of the evil eye, which happened to trigger the talent of piercing defense. Broc covered his head in pain as he staggered back for a few steps. The [Searing Soul] in Isabella’s hands became a stream of light that shot toward Broc’s heart.

Broc waved his hand subconsciously, and an ice shield appeared. However, the sharpness of [Searing Soul] was far above imagination. Not only it pierced the ice shield, it was even nailed to his palm, coming out through the bone.

Broc screamed, but the pain caused him to quickly get rid of the interference of spirit impact. As he raised his head sharply, his black pupils flickered. Isabella groaned and flew out before falling to the ground. She coincidentally landed next to Chen Rui who just pulled the distance from Broc. However, her right eye could no longer be opened and the corner of her eye was bleeding.

In the case of equal strength, [The Eye of Incubus] and [The Eye of Evil] should be matching. It was a pity that Isabella’s power was too far from Broc. Although there was the increase and fusion power of the evil eye, under the counterattack of [The Eye of Incubus], her spirit power had already been severely injured.

Chen Rui grabbed Isabella and fled hurriedly toward the courtyard house. Broc knew that he was fleeing aimlessly. He showed a vicious look. As he was about to pursue, suddenly a strong sense of crisis rose in his heart. Even if his current state, his sense of crisis was still strong as he had reached the early stage of the Demon Overlord.

A dazzling white light covered the sky. In an instant, the sense of sight and hearing seemed to have lost their function at the same time.

Immediately after that, the entire southern suburbs could feel the shaking.

Although Chen Rui had set various imprisonments and magic circles in this seventh courtyard when it was “booked” these days, it was not Prison 13 of the secret prison after all. The entire seventh courtyard was razed to the ground. The Leisure Moon Inn was trembling in the violent earthquake as if the world was going to end. Many people were injured because of the impact. Many unidentified guests fled the courtyard in horror.

As the smoke cleared, the house where Chen Rui and Isabella were in barely remained a little ruined, but the two of them did not suffer much injury. With Prison 13’s lesson, Chen Rui had already set a lot of inscriptions like absorption and reinforcement in the house these days. They had finally escaped from danger.

Isabella, who had been seriously injured, was lying on the ground. She looked at the completely destroyed seventh courtyard in surprise. The still trembling ground showed signs that the entire mountain would collapse at any time- Such a terrifying power. No wonder “Charles” could ruin Prison 13 in the first place!

At this moment, Chen Rui’s expression changed. When he suddenly raised his head, he saw the black smoke scattered in the air quickly condensed into a human form, showing Broc’s figure- Such a powerful explosion did not kill Broc?

The current appearance of Broc was very scary. His face was not only hideous and distorted, but also unidentifiable. His whole body was full of wounds. Bones could even be seen in many places. If it was not for the [Incubus Territory], where he could transform into an intangible state that greatly reduced damage, plus the use of Manu’s peak of Demon Overlord power to protect him, he would have been crushed to pieces.

In spite of this, Zeray still caused almost fatal and serious wounds. Especially in the [Incubus Territory], the unabsorbed Manu’s power had been used for protection. It was all over Broc’s body surface. This meant that he could no longer be able to absorb this Demon Overlord-level flesh and blood power in the future. He could only step into the Demon Overlord realm by honestly relying on his own step by step efforts.

“Die!” Broc gritted his teeth and yelled a word through his hoarse throat. The surrounding air seemed to have been frozen by some icy force. It was covered with traces of cobwebs, which made Chen Rui and Isabella unable to move momentarily. This was Manu’s “original” power. Even if Broc did not use it, it would dissipate when the time comes.

The dagger that Broc snatched, [Searing Soul]’s light was shining brightly from his hands. In the icy environment, it flew out like lightning. It wasn’t aimed at Isabella, but for the most hated Chen Rui- This human is too hateful! He caused such severe injuries to me! Even the power that I hardly obtained from Manu has been exhausted. He should really die. I must kill him! As for the cooperation and the black potions, fuck it!

Moreover, even if the method just now was used again, even with the protection of Manu’s power, it would be difficult to resist.

Facing the terrifying killer with the power of Demon Overlord, Chen Rui, who was bound by the territory, had no time to evade. He instinctively felt that if he was hit by this blow, even if his physique was special and did not die, his body would be disintegrated by the terrifying and chilling ice power.

“Dark Will” cannot be used in such occasions that contain territory power. It was cracked by Broc in the Silent Night Wetland, so I can only use the “[Demonic Flies Transformation]”, the skill of God-Eating Mask that is limited once a day. Or I can use Demon Shield to block it. Although it will reveal the identity of “Charles” as “Arthur” and the plan will also be affected, it is a matter of life and death now, so I can’t care about it.

At this moment, a figure suddenly bounced from the ground and covered Chen Rui. The dagger containing the power of the Demon Overlord was firmly nailed to the back of the figure.

Isabella.

She didn’t know where the strength came from that she actually broke free from the cobwebs restrain and took the fatal blow for Chen Rui. After piercing her chest, the dagger came out through her body and plunged into Chen Rui’s chest. However, it was not deep into the flesh, so it was not a threat.

Chen Rui was really stunned at this moment. From beginning to end, he was just putting a front to Isabella. Isabella should also understand this. Even if she was a little moved later, she still wasn’t really tempted. Otherwise, she wouldn’t kill him 4 times.

“Isabella!”

Isabella’s bloody right eye could no longer be opened, and the gold of her left eye was quickly fading. There was no trace of blood on Isabella’s pale face, but a faint smile instead, “You said that sometimes we may not be able to choose the start, but we can choose the ending. This is what I choose… my own end.”

Chen Rui felt the blood flowing from Isabella’s body suddenly become cold. Her blood flowed into his body. At this moment, he felt a hint of pain. It was a heartache.

Broc didn’t expect Isabella to do this suddenly, but the two of them couldn’t escape death anyway. As he was about to take action again to kill the two, a roar suddenly came from the sky. Broc felt the power contained in the roar and was surprised. The roar approached him at an extremely fast speed. He had already reached in front of Broc in an instant.

This was a black robe man with short blond hair, deep facial features and a beard. 3 pairs of wings appeared behind him as he floated in the air.

The supreme ruler of Fallen Angel Capital. Regent obsidian.

Obsidian finally came. The reason he came here was the invitation sent by Chen Rui in advance. He was on the way to the Leisure Moon Inn. After hearing the huge explosion from the Leisure Moon Inn, he immediately got out of the carriage and rushed there with all his strength.

It was just that the plan couldn’t keep up with the changes because Broc’s strength exceeded Chen Rui’s expectations. Therefore, the timing of Obsidian’s arrival was a little late. People’s plan was subject to fate.

Obsidian was shocked when he saw the scene clearly. He then showed extremely furious expressions. Charles and Isabella are lying on the ground in a pool of blood. Their life and death is unknown. Judging from the scene, it was definitely a terrifying battle.

All of these were done by this opposite guy in the sky!

Broc recognized Obsidian, but he didn’t expect Obsidian to appear here so quickly. With the help of external forces, he was only an early Demon Overlord at best, while Obsidian was the peak of the Demon Overlord. Even if his strength is not as good as Raizen or Catherine, it’s far from what I can currently match. It seems that I can’t kill this human today. Anyhow, I have killed Isabella, but my own loss is too heavy.

At this moment, Chen Rui, who fell to the ground, suddenly screamed. His whole body burst open in an earth-shaking momentum, turning him and Isabella into a cloud of blood. They seemed to be broken to pieces. At the same time, the equality contract in Obsidian’s mind disappeared without a trace.

A rumbling noise! The mountain where the entire seventh courtyard was located finally could not stand the damage and collapsed.

Obsidian was outraged. He couldn’t believe his eyes. This palace high rank consultant who has the astronomical sums of money raised from the major estates and major families; this human with the most precious black potion resources; my critical partner who is related to the future of the Fallen Angel Empire and myself, is actually annihilated just like that?

What about the Sword of Fallen Angel’s solution?

What about the black potions?

What about the huge benefits that are in urgent need of return?

Broc was also stunned. I don’t think my attack just now has such an exaggerated effect, right?

If Broc crossovered to become a netizen who posted on a certain forum, then he could simply reply to Chen Rui’s explosive effect post, “Although I don’t understand why, it looks great”. However, Broc had no time to crossover at the moment. There was even no time to even think about it because the wild murderous aura from Obsidian had already targeted him tightly.

Obsidian flashed and appeared in front of Broc in the blink of an eye. His fist with black flames hit Broc’s chest brutally. Broc hurriedly transformed into the black mist form of the [Incubus Territory]. The undissipated Manu’s flesh and blood power also turned into thousands of spider silk which entangled Obsidian.

Obsidian ignited a black flame containing terrifying destruction power. It was the bloodline talent [Dark Flame] of the Lucifer Family. Wherever the [Dark Flame] went, the spider silk turned to ashes. Broc’s Incubus mist form also made a squeaking sound. He could not maintain it in the end, so he had to revert to his physical form. His left arm below the elbow had already turned into coke.

The [Dark Flame]’s talent was a natural restraint for such intangible tricks. It was all Broc’s bad luck. Otherwise, with Manu’s power, he would not be defeated so quickly.

Broc didn’t have time to take care of the injury of his arm. He bit the tip of his tongue and spouted a bit of blood. The blood drew a faint blue and red light gate in the sky. At the same time, a huge ice shield blocked in front of Obsidian. With a punch, the thick ice shield shattered like thin glass. The fragments were instantly melted by the [Dark Flame].

At this time, there was another terrifying destruction flame behind, but Broc couldn’t care about it. He gritted his teeth and tried his best to rush toward the light gate- If I can’t escape now, then it would be a luxury to have a quick death today.

Obsidian’s angry punch in the air hit Broc. The part below Broc’s waist burst open. His flesh and blood were instantly turned into ashes by the black smoke. However, in the end, half of his body rushed into the light gate due to the impact of this force. Suddenly, he disappeared with the light gate. His life and death was unknown.

Obsidian didn’t think that the murderer could actually escape from his own hands. He only felt that there was a strong depression in his chest that could not be vented. He screamed, and the regent’s angry voice echoed over the entire capital.

Of course, Chen Rui did not die. He just activated a deceptive item prepared beforehand, and then escaped through the [Star Gate]. If in normal circumstances, it might not be possible to hide from Obsidian and Broc. However, Obsidian and Broc did not have the time to notice some details at the scene during the time. The most realistic was the “disappearance” of the equality contract.

Therefore, Broc became the scapegoat who killed “Charles”. Therefore, Obsidian would surely kill Broc and investigate this matter thoroughly. He would retaliate wildly against the Bloodfall forces in the territory. As the 2 forces fought each other, the Dark Moon would gain precious development time.

Even if Broc’s strength was more than Chen Rui’s expectation, things were still going smoothly according to Chen Rui’s previous plan.

Except Isabella.

Capital Devil’s Snare flower, who gave up her life to block a blow for him at the moment of life and death.

This flower was about to wilt now.

Wasn’t there still the magical resurrection potion?

chapters.title: Chapter 373 - The Battle Ball Bet
chapters.body:
Chapter 373 - The Battle Ball Bet

Chen Rui held Isabella in his arms. As the blood in her chest had frozen into ice, the chill made one shaking involuntarily.

“Broc… Is he dead?” Broc’s angry blow contained some of the power of the peak of the Demon Overlord. Isabella was now on the verge of dying. Her voice was quite weak, but she still had not forgotten the life and death of her enemy.

“With Obsidian’s appearance, he will definitely not be able to escape.”

Isabella’s eyes showed relief, “I’m sorry. I’m afraid… I can only repay you once.”

Chen Rui knew what she meant. She wanted to kill him 4 times. It was offset once just now, but he could feel that it was by no means simply “repaying”.

“Isabella…”

“You aren’t calling me Yini anymore?” Isabella barely smiled, “However, this Isabella, is the most genuine that I have heard from you.”

Chen Rui’s heart trembled. Sure enough, emotions are something you can’t play with. The more you invest, the more you can feel true and false. That means…

Chen Rui kept telling himself that this was just a fake romance script. A false and vicious woman who acted in an opponent’s play, but his heart still ached for some reasons.

“Charles, what are you… planning to do?”

“Charles” broke off his cooperation with Bloodfall, and fled through fake death. It almost completely severed his foothold in the Demon Realm. Isabella wondered what he would do.

“I’m a liar, a simple liar. That’s all.” Chen Rui gently tidied the hair with blood on her forehead. “Didn’t you say that if I was just a liar, maybe our ending would be different?”

“It’s already… different.” Isabella looked at him quietly without asking anymore. Chen Rui fed her a bottle of healing potion, but it didn’t help. He could even clearly feel her vitality was lost quickly.

“Promise me one thing. If you have a chance to see my nephew in the future… Tell him the Breeze Shadow Boots… was lost 200 years ago…”

Breeze Shadow Boots!

Chen Rui was taken aback. He faintly guessed that it was related to the man who Isabella met 200 years ago. He deliberately asked, “Breeze Shadow Boots? Is it one of the 7 artifacts of Demon Realm?”

Isabella’s gaze that was nearly disintegrated began to dim, “That year, the innocent girl met a sweet-spoken human man. She was loyal to him and fully trusted him. She did not hesitate to fight against her family and form a grudge with her sister. Even the most precious artifact was given to him…”

It turns out that the Breeze Shadow Boots fell into the hands of that human! Belphegor’s highest artifact… Damn. It’s actually in the human world now?

That is to say, Roman has to go to the human world to retrieve the Breeze Shadow Boots?

“Sabrina likes to fight with me since I was a child. This is even the same for fighting for men, but we are all wrong,” Isabella grinned sorrowfully, “This man has only the artifact in his eyes. I even took the initiative to dedicate myself to him, but he expressed considerable restraint. After he got the artifact and abandoned me mercilessly, I learned that he actually hates women very much and likes men!”

Isabella laughed more and more miserably. She even laughed with tears oozing blood. Even Broc’s frozen power could not freeze the tears, “It’s ridiculous! I, a foolish woman willing to give up everything, fell in love with such a cold-blooded liar. Even… my dedication to him was dismissed!”

Chen Rui listened quietly. The only thing he could do was to carefully wipe away her tears.

Although Chen Rui only heard part of the story, he could fully imagine the roughness and bitterness that this once pure and innocent Snow Dallet endured in these 200 years before she became the poisonous Devil’s Snare. Therefore, she hated men and affections. She even hated everything. There was only hatred and revenge in her life.

However, from her unskilled kiss, he could see that the toxic fragrance of Devil’s Snare still vaguely retained the fragrance of the Snow Dallet.

“You’re also a liar… Charles is perhaps not your real name…” Isabella’s life gradually disappeared with a sorrowful laugh, “But, I would rather run into you at that time. At least… at least…”

Isabella’s voice became weaker and weaker as the shaking of her body gradually stopped.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and finally made a decision.

There was a clear glass bottle filled with black potion in his hand.

Fallen Angel capital, the palace.

Obsidian looked at the few people who were kneeling down with a gloomy face. One of them was his favorite and trusted concubine. It was this concubine who betrayed him and revealed the most confidential secret that he accidentally revealed after being drunk that day.

Bloodfall!

This famous force is so bold! Their power of influence is so deep-rooted in my land! Even the most trusted woman around me is from this organization!

Although, according to the concubine’s explanation, the “top” person should be trying to win over “Charles” this time, no matter what, the deaths of “Charles” and Isabella were directly directed by Bloodfall.

This was not the most critical issue.

The most terrible thing was that all that large sum of money was given to “Charles”. At that time, Obsidian saw with his own eyes that “Charles” used space magic to keep the money in a certain private space. Now that this partner was dead, this money was equivalent to being vanished in the space turbulence. There was no way to get it back! This was huge funds raised from Obsidian and the major lords as well as major families. The Red Spirit Lord Josh alone had paid a billion!

Not only the huge sum of money and the black potion are gone now, even Charles is gone. It can be said that there is no proof! By then, what can I return to these families and these estates?

At the thought of this, Obsidian’s heart bled.

Even if the truth of Bloodfall is revealed, and even the concubine is used as a testimony, no one will believe it. No one wants to believe it. Those guys only want money!

Speaking of it, I blame myself for vowing a guarantee, but at that time, who knew that such a thing would happen?

Right now, the Demon Realm’s potioneer competition is about to start. First try to raise fundraising money and hold it successfully. As for the estate money, I can only try to delay it for a while before trying to find a way!

The concubine took a few steps forward, hugged Obsidian’s legs and kissed his boots. She cried, “Your Highness, please forgive me! I was forced to do so; I will never dare to do it anymore; I will be more dedicated to serving Your Highness…”

Before she finished speaking, her beautiful face suddenly burned. In the sound of screaming, her whole body was burned to ashes for a moment. A cold light appeared in the eyes of Obsidian who killed his beloved woman personally. He gritted his teeth and uttered a word, “Bloodfall!”

Dark Moon City.

The residents never knew that the man who walked out of the Dark Moon caused a shocking impact in the capital. They were currently discussing a small incident only.

Nowadays, the most discussed topic in the Dark Moon was a battle ball game.

This game was completely different from the previous ones. It did not refer to the intensity or excitement. It was a gambling game that could affect the entire Dark Moon situation.

At the recent regular meeting, Financial Officer Joseph, who was pushed to the edge of the cliff step by step by the Princess Royal Shea, finally made the revolt publicly. He lodged a solemn protest against the sir lord’s series of sanctions and suppression. However, Joseph was not trusted in the Red Spirit Estate now, so he couldn’t use the Red Spirit policy as his trump card as he used to. Moreover, the current Dark Moon was no longer the Dark Moon 1 or 2 years ago.

After the protest was invalid, Joseph finally resorted to the last move. It was to use the chamber of commerce he established, all the industries under his name, and the position of Finance Minister to publicly bet with Princess Royal. Joseph’s bet could be said as all in. He requested the Princess Royal to issue bets including joint chamber of commerce, night market, Princess Retail Store, auction house, arena and so on. It was almost all the economic forces controlled by Shea.

Shea refused without hesitation. She said that sloppy methods such as gambling should not be used to determine such a major event. From the current perspective, even if she didn’t take this risk, she could slowly crush Joseph.

Joseph was very cunning. In the name of the royal family, he used the method of goading her into action. He also used many methods that he had been preparing for a long time. Shea was a little unable to reject, so she changed an excuse. She said that Joseph’s bet was too small to be in line with the assets she currently had. It was indeed true.

If this was 1 or 2 years ago, this ratio was almost impossible. The situation was the other way around now. Whether it was authority or strength, Shea had the absolute upper hand.

At this moment, a sudden change occurred. “Aguile”, who had been standing on Shea’s side and was also named as the imperial guards reserve forces leader, suddenly turned his back and announced that the Cloak Gang would fully support Joseph’s side.

Everyone was in an uproar. It turns out that “Aguile” is actually a chess piece Joseph arranged next to Shea!

As a result, Joseph had the arena, night market, and Cloak Gang properties in his hands. Plus the financial officer position, he was barely equal to Shea’s side. Shea was extremely angry at “Aguile’s” sudden change at a critical moment. With the support of a group of families, she agreed immediately. Many of these families were fence-sitters. They were very good at spotting opportunities. No matter who wins or loses, they support them anyway. The two sides used the battle ball as a gambling method. A highly anticipated competition was scheduled to be held at the arena at the end of the month as a testimony to all the audience. Whoever won would truly control Dark Moon’s economy.

With Shea’s prestige in the Dark Moon, coupled with the imperial guards and garrison guard, which were obviously higher than the strength of the private team, people were naturally optimistic about the Princess Royal. As for Joseph’s team, at best, it was just a relatively strong team that he had secretly trained. It couldn’t be compared with the imperial guards and garrison guards that represented the Dark Moon and also the highest level of the Demon Realm’s battle ball.

One should know that the rule of the battle ball had strict restrictions on both sides of the competition. It was impossible for Higher Demon to play against Lesser Demon. Thus, Joseph and the Princess Royal agreed that the two sides playing were the Intermediate Demon team.

Shea should have the winning ticket. The Dark Moon military and civilians thought so, and most families thought so, but only Joseph didn’t think so. He had seen the Intermediate Demon fighting team under “Aguile”. The physical strength should surpass all Dark Moon’s teams. He made so much commotion in the beginning, including pushing himself to the edge of the cliff, just for this bet.

“Aguile” did not disappoint me. He stepped up in time and successfully precipitated the gambling game. With the careful planning of this ally, I, Joseph, am the real winner who will laugh till the end!

However, Joseph didn’t know that even “Aguile” himself thought that Shea would win. This was simply a trap. Now that Joseph had jumped down and was burying himself in the soil step by step. All that was left was just the last shovel.

From the beginning of cooperation with “Aguile. Beelzebub”, this gloomy and cunning Dark Moon’s financial officer, the eldest son of the Red Spirit Lord, was destined to end tragically.

Doesn’t Josh understand that there is no sure win in a bet?

chapters.title: Chapter 374 - Searching For Husband For A Thousand Miles And The Women’S Double Dragon Club
chapters.body:
Chapter 374 - Searching For Husband For A Thousand Miles And The Women’S Double Dragon Club

The sky was very blue.

This was the first feeling Isabella had after opening her eyes.

She clearly remembered that she had touched death, but she came back to life again. Although she still felt weak, all her fatal injuries were miraculously healed.

It was almost impossible, but it happened.

It seemed that only the legendary highest grand master potion could create this miracle.

Recalling the previous scenes, it seemed like a dream, but there were some people in the dream. Even after waking up, she still couldn’t forget it. It was like some kind of imprint engraved in her heart.

The man was no longer around. He only left a note.

“Maybe one day, we will meet again. Maybe one day, I will pluck a Snow Dallet and give it to you. But it’s just maybe because I’m a liar. A pure liar. Don’t believe me too much.”

Isabella gently stroked the note and stood up slowly with a tender smile on her mouth. This smile seemed to wash away the lead. The gorgeous and seductive Devil’s Snare returned to the former Snow Dallet which did not use powder.

“Liar!” She pursed her lips and said softly. Her curvaceous back was draped in the light of 2 moons as she walked forward. Her firm steps were full of unprecedented confidence and hope.

After all, the sir liar did not watch the confidante who gave her life to save him pass away. Even though it was a loss-making business as he was killed 4 times and rescued once, plus a resurrection potion, he felt it was worth it.

Isabella was not Sabrina, and she was also Roman’s immediate family member. With this Leisure Moon Inn incident, Isabella was truly “dead” and had been removed from the capital. It saved her a lot of effort.

I hope that after she gets a new life, she can truly be reborn and completely get out of the trauma of sadness and hatred.

As for the meeting again and Snow Dallet, it is the hope that a liar gives her.

Maybe in the future, we will meet again.

Maybe… maybe.

Chen Rui calculated the date. Joseph’s “action” in the Dark Moon side should have already started. Just in case, he had to go back. Besides, he started to miss Athena and the rest.

Previously, he fed Isabella a resurrection potion and found a safe place. He kept guarding her until her body was basically healed. Then he left quietly when she was about to wake up. At this time, the color of the 2 moons had gradually changed. It was twilight. It had been more than a day since the explosion at Leisure Moon Inn.

After disguising into a stranger’s face, Chen Rui swaggered back to the capital and walked toward the carriage station. Although this was only the suburbs, he was still closely checked by the patrolling army along the way. Fortunately, he had prepared the identity of the foreign businessman earlier, so he didn’t reveal any flaws.

Judging from the current tight security and the greatly reduced number of people travelling around, the furious regent Royal Highness was preparing to completely wipe out the members of the Bloodfall force. This reaction was what Chen Rui wanted. Completely wiping out the Bloodfall of the Fallen Angel Empire, or at least hurting their core power, would have a very positive effect on the future of Shea and the entire empire. It could be regarded as Obsidian’s good deeds.

Just when Chen Rui was about to walk to the station, a voice suddenly sounded.

“Wait.”

This was a sweet female voice, and… it was a bit familiar.

Chen Rui’s complexion suddenly changed. It was not a bit familiar, but very familiar.

As soon as he turned his head, he saw a woman wearing glasses and holding a book approaching. This woman was a little bloated and ugly with barely symmetrical features. Her face was covered with freckles. There was also a shallow scar on her forehead.

Chen Rui’s heart still began to tighten. Even if he didn’t look at the display of the [Analytical Eyes], he could still guess the identity of this freckled-scarred woman with glasses.

Race: Dragon (Fairy Dragon). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to judge.

Dear Demon God!

It’s Miss Zola! She is actually playing disguise!

Hasn’t Zola been staying in the Rainbow Valley to concentrate on the scientific research? Why did she come to the capital? She stops me now. Is it… a coincidence?

Chen Rui knew that he couldn’t hide, but he still asked forcefully, “Miss, what’s the matter?”

“You… are quite hard to find.”

“Miss, did you recognize the wrong person?”

“Stop pretending, you can’t escape from my hand.” The woman in glasses looked at him with beaming eyes. “Is this a transformation technique? Or illusion? There are almost no flaws on the outside. It seems that it is better to go back to research it.”

Research again? Chen Rui only felt a chill rising from his back. He had confirmed that he was recognized by the fairy dragon. How did Zola recognize me after I cast the [Camouflage]+[True Breath Holding]? It’s unbelievable!

“Let me think how I should punish the guy who escaped after going back?” The spectacled woman was thinking about it. “Coke? Barbecue? Rice paste? Jam?”

Chen Rui shuddered upon hearing. His mind shifted and he quickly said, “Ms. Zola, actually… I’m not running away. Instead… seeing that you have been working hard all day, I want to prepare some gifts and give you a surprise.”

Although her appearance had changed, the attribute of the female fake daze in glasses had not changed. She looked dazed, “What?”

Obviously, she doesn’t believe it.

The more so, the more miserable it will be for me upon returning.

Besides, I should return to the Dark Moon now. I can no longer stay in the Rainbow Valley.

At this time, another patrol team came over. The little leader in the lead yelled and asked, “Who are you 2?”

Chen Rui quickly replied, “My name is Simon. I’m a Great Demon and a businessman. I come from Red Spirit Estate’s Town Moling…”

“I’m his wife” Zola’s voice sounded first. “Because a guy sneaked out of the house without saying a word. He wanted to come to the capital to meet his old lover, so I chased him all the way and finally found him. I want to take this man back now.”

No? There is this kind of dog blood [1]… dragon blood story? Chen Rui was dumbfounded, but he was glared by Zola’s threatening eyes. He immediately lowered his head and did not dare to speak.

A few soldiers behind him showed sympathy to Chen Rui. The male Great Demons are mostly playboys. This man is indeed a bit miserable. With such an ugly and sturdy woman, his life is over.

The little leader saw the changes in the expressions of the two and nodded slightly, “Do you want to return to the Red Spirit immediately? The capital is in a critical period now. There is a curfew at night. The station has been closed in advance. It will be opened in the morning… and the gate of the outer city is just going to be closed. You’d better go back to the city and find a hotel to stay. Otherwise, if you wander outside at night, you will be arrested as suspects.”

“Thank you, sir.” Zola actually had a talent for role-playing. More precisely, she was blackhearted. She held Chen Rui’s arm affectionately. “Then, my dear, let’s find a place right away… Maybe we can discuss how to punish a disobedient man?”

Now the gazes of sympathy or gloat increased. It was as if they had seen a poor man being crushed by a bloated woman.

Those with more heavy taste had already thought of special “items” such as whip candles.

So, Chen Rui was “closely” held by Zola as they walked all the way to the city.

“What about the gifts and surprises you have prepared?”

Sure enough, whether it was Miss Science Dragon or Miss Research Dragon, she was still Ms. Dragon who was sensitive to certain elements after all. This was the real reason why Ms. Fairy Dragon had not immediately caught a disobedient man back to the Rainbow Valley.

“This…” Chen Rui’s excuse just now was just a stopgap measure. His brain quickly turned around, thinking desperately about how to escape. “It’s too late now. The city is about to be curfew. Let’s find a place to stay. You will know tomorrow.”

“Really?” Ms. Fairy Dragon looked at him suspiciously.

“Yes!” (cold sweat)

“Then… let’s go, dear Simon.”

“If you still want to escape… If you can’t please this lady… Hmph hmph!” (softly)

“Understood…” (drenched in sweat)

Of course, the 2 of them found a hotel and stayed in. It was worth mentioning that Ms. Fairy Dragon played the role of the “husband and wife” well and requested a room only. Ms. Zola created a floating water element bed on the big bed and laid down comfortably.

Obviously, she doesn’t need to sleep on the bed, but she still wants to occupy the space… “Dear Simon” who could only sleep on the floor secretly slandered in his heart. He secretly guessed that the reason he was found and recognized by Zola was because of a secret technique cast by Ms. Fairy Dragon secretly.

If he used [Star Gate] to escape back to the Dark Moon and was found by Zola, perhaps even Paglio would be in danger. This was a lot of trouble. It was better to use an open and upfront plan to appease Ms. Fairy Dragon before asking the questions related to the secret technique, then he would think of a way to leave.

Early the next morning, Chen Rui took Ms. Fairy Dragon to stroll around the capital. First, he found a place to enjoy a nutritious and delicious breakfast. Then, he took her to the busiest southern district of the outer city.

Zola had been in the Crystal Valley for many years. She had not been out for a long time to hang out like this. At the beginning, she was still a little uncomfortable. After a long time, the shopping “talent” that was hiding under research talent was stimulated. She almost entered every store. Chen Rui was also not stingy, he bought everything that she liked. Anyway he had so much money that it was more than enough to buy the entire capital.

Zola bought a lot of things, and she was full of joy (the most important thing was she did not have to pay for it). She was very pleased with “Simon”. She seemed to have completely forgotten about someone’s punishment.

Walking into a high-end boutique clothing store, Zola saw a plain white long skirt at first sight. Chen Rui was about to pay for it, but the shop assistant shook her head while saying, “This skirt is a limited edition and there is only one, but it has already been booked in advance.”

Zola glanced at Chen Rui. Normally this kind of thing was solved by the sir assistant. Chen Rui had no choice but to step forward and say, “Well, I will offer 3 times the price. Please sell it to me.”

Triple? The succubus female clerk was taken aback. The price tag of this dress is already expensive. This man didn’t bargain at all, and even offered triple the price immediately. Unfortunately, it is for such an ugly woman.

“I’m sorry” The succubus’s tone became more polite. She winked at the wealthy man quietly, “The customer will come and pick it up soon. Why don’t you buy the pink one, just like the one I’m wearing? The style is very suitable for the body.”

With that said, the succubus deliberately showed her curvaceous and charming figure to this man in order to belittle the bloated figure of the “ugly woman”.

Chen Rui certainly would not be lured by this kind of temptation. Besides, Zola’s real face was much more charming than this succubus, so he increased the price, “10 times.”

10 times! The succubus was shocked. If it wasn’t the influential sir who ordered the clothes, she would definitely have sold it.

At this moment, a voice sounded out from the door, “Vina, are my skirts ready?”

The voice was also familiar. Chen Rui looked back and saw Krobelus with green hair and her slightly shiny green eyes.

The one who ordered this white skirt is Ms. Emerald Dragon? I remember that she likes gold and silver shiny clothes? Why did she suddenly change her taste?

Chen Rui suddenly remembered that Krobelus was the widow of the blue dragon Ranieri. Ranieri was killed by Zola herself! Compared with Paglio, Zola is Krobelus’ biggest enemy!

“Who’s that. Your skirt has been bought by me for 10 times the price.” It was Zola who spoke, but from her tone of voice, it seemed that she didn’t know Krobelus at all.

Krobelus and Zola looked at each other. There seemed to be sparks in between their eyes. Krobelus snorted coldly, “Who are you? How dare you snatch my things?”

“Snatch?” Zola’s eyes lit up a little. “Yes, you are right. I like this word.”

Krobelus was taken aback for a moment. In the capital, she was the dominant one. She was the only one who robbed others. No one dared to do anything to her. Unexpectedly, there was an ugly woman who dared to touch a tiger’s butt [2]… a dragon’s butt today?

“Hmph! How arrogant.” Ms. Emerald Dragon instinctively felt that the other party’s breath was not simple, but she refused to show any weakness, “Give me all your money now. I may consider releasing you with your underwear.”

Zola’s freckled face suddenly smiled, “This is what I was going to say! If you want to run naked, I won’t mind snatching your pants as well!”

Chen Rui was embarrassed on the side. The two ladies were more ruthless than the other.

Generally speaking, when a hero sees a hero, they are sympathetic to each other. These 2 female robbers are tit-for-tat when they meet. Is it because they are of the same sex?

“Could this be… Madam Krobelus! My name is Simon from Red Spirit Estate. I have had the honor of seeing the madam’s demeanor.” Chen Rui hurriedly stopped Zola and said, “This is my wife. She does not know madam’s prestige. Please forgive her, madam. Please consider this skirt as my gift to you.”

“Okay!” Ms. Emerald Dragon heard that it was a skirt without money, so she agreed without thinking about it. Then, she looked suspicion, “She is your wife?”

Krobelus could see that although this woman was ugly, she faintly made Krobelus feel a kind of inner fear. She was absolutely extraordinary. Otherwise, Krobelus would have gone mad long ago. This man is obviously just a “Higher Demon”. How could he have such a wife?

Could it be that this ugly woman forcibly occupied his body and… property?

“Hmph!” Zola suddenly showed an upset look. Although she understood that the 2 were just pretending to be husband and wife, she felt very uncomfortable when she saw her man buying a skirt for this “decent look” woman.

No, this skirt is mine!

[1] Dog blood means nonsense.

[2] Signifying a fierce and dominant being.

The two females with weird temper… this is even stronger than Beezlebub’s devour talent. 😵

chapters.title: Chapter 375 - “Romantic” Sparks Under The Moonlight
chapters.body:
Chapter 375 - “Romantic” Sparks Under The Moonlight

Chen Rui felt Zola’s warning eyes. He wanted to pick up the microphone and sing “Dilemma” [1]. Maybe I should just let it go and let the two female robbers come to a “bloody case caused by a skirt”!

After thinking about it, he decided to appease Ms. Emerald Dragon, “Thank you Madam Krobelus for your tolerance, madam’s heart and mind is almost as great as the 2 moons’ brilliance! But… I remember that when I saw madam, you were wearing a long silver skirt. It was shiny and tasteful. How come you like this kind of dress suddenly? Why don’t I just give madam that dress instead?”

Krobelus followed Chen Rui’s fingers. It turned out to be a silver robe inlaid with special crystals. The price was more than 10 times more expensive than this dress. She immediately nodded with shining eyes, “Okay, since you are so kind, it’s impolite for me to refuse. I want this one too!”

Want “too”?

Dragons with insatiable desires. Can’t you be less greedy?

Chen Rui was quite speechless. Krobelus raised her eyebrows at Zola in a dominant manner, but she explained to the “squanderer” who was willing to pay, “Uhm… Simon. It seems that you are also a tasteful person, but I will wear that white skirt at a friend’s funeral, or… 2 friends. The only 2 friends I have.

Speaking of this, Krobelus’ gaze seemed sorrowful. Chen Rui could see that she was really sad. When he looked closely, her face was more haggard than usual. Hearing that the emerald dragon classified “Charles” in the category of “the only friend”, Chen Rui felt apologetic. He put away some of his initial thoughts to provoke Zola going against Krobelus.

Speaking of conscience, apart from some common problems of the dragon, Krobelus was a pretty good friend, but unfortunately he couldn’t tell her the truth now. In the future, Krobelus should have a chance to meet Isabella again. As for Paglio, it would have to wait until the dragon unlocked his seal and recover his strength. If possible, he would try to let the emerald dragon live.

Under Chen Rui’s repeated hints, Zola finally didn’t insist anymore. She watched Krobelus triumphantly carrying 2 pieces of clothing away.

Walking out of the shop, Zola said with a displeased look, “She is just an early Demon Overlord emerald dragon. I can kill her by raising my hand. Since you please her like this, are you coveting the flashy and arrogant woman?”

(Hmph! My beauty and virtues is 100 times better than that superficial woman! Can’t you see that, blind man?)

If Chen Rui pursued Zola now, Ms. Fairy Dragon would definitely list many reasons to shake her head and reject him, but once he showed a possible favor or interest in other women, Ms. Fairy Dragon felt strong indignation.

Chen Rui didn’t expect Zola to see Krobelus’s real form at a glance. He shook his head quickly, “I heard that this woman is a capital’s palace high-rank consultant. I just don’t want to cause unnecessary trouble. Besides, as you have also heard, the skirt is basically for funeral… Let’s go, we’ve been shopping for a long time. I’m so hungry. I have already booked a place in the best restaurant. Let’s go for lunch!”

While enjoying the food, the fairy dragon listened to Chen Rui’s short stories. She quickly forgot the unhappiness just now. Next, Chen Rui accompanied her around for the whole afternoon. The dinner location in the evening was at Mirror Lake Manor near the northern suburbs. The initial best environment was the Leisure Moon Inn in the southern suburbs, but after the changes the day before yesterday, Leisure Moon Inn was completely destroyed. Especially the seventh courtyard, which was located at the peak of the mountain, even collapsed.

Mirror Lake Manor was built on the Little Mirror Lake of the outskirts. The room where Chen Rui and Zola were at was the best location facing the Little Mirror Lake. The price was obviously expensive.

Under the soft light, Zola enjoyed food and watched the scenery of the lake. She just felt very comfortable.

How many years have I not been so relaxed and happy?

Not only that, there is also a feeling that should be called “…romantic”.

This is my first time feeling it.

And even feeling it with this man?

He has knowledge, ability, wisdom, loves research…

Gentle, attentive, considerate and caring…

Zola listed the advantages of this guy one by one. She suddenly felt as if she had encountered such a man for thousands of years… Uh, it can be said that I have some good feelings on this man. He is also more suitable for me…

(Unfortunately, it still doesn’t work. It’s just “some” good feeling. Besides, I’m a dragon. Whether it is strength or life span, the difference is too far…)

Zola’s gaze caught a glimpse of the peaceful lake. It reflected the beautiful purple shadows of the double moon. She felt that her heart had become a little softer- Even the moons are in pairs.

(Um, does this guy have any surprise gifts later?)

(He was pleasing me during the day, and now we’re in this environment… Could it be…)

The fairy dragon suddenly thought of some of the forgotten stories among female dragons such as the heroic prince defeating the evil female demon king to save the beautiful dragon princess from the imprisoned tower. Then on a beautiful night, he held a precious ring studded with precious stones and proposed to her…

This story which was unearthed from memory made Ms. Fairy Dragon’s heartbeat somehow quicker. At this moment, she saw the man opposite her smiled, “Ms. Zola, I prepared a gift for you. Then, I have a small request, please agree to it.”

(Sure enough… Is it true? It’s too soon, how long have we known each other?)

“No!” Zola blurted out nervously, but she suddenly added, “Uhm… okay.”

(Let’s look at the gift first. If it is studded with gems… then I’ll snatch it first. After that, I’llimmediately reject his request…)

(Do I really want to reject him? Although the dragons have a long lifespan, I haven’t had a man for so many years. It’s rare to meet one. Maybe I can really think about it? Even if he has short lifespan, isn’t there a symbiotic contract?)
