(No way.. I need more time to research… but then again, it is easier for 2 people to find a breakthrough together. Moreover.this man is even the best assistant and experiment subject.)

Chen Rui didn’t know that Ms. Fairy Dragon was undergoing a fierce ideological struggle, so he took out a box with confidence.

Meanwhile, Zola finally made up his mind: Accept the gift! Then tactfully reject him! This is the final decision, and I will never change it!

This box is bigger than I imagined. Is it a ring with an oversized gemstone?

(Since he is so sincere, do I need to think about it again? Maybe don’t let him down too much?)

Just when Ms. Fairy Dragon was habitually indecisive, the box opened. Inside was a strange square. Zola recognized it at a glance. It was a special item for recording the ancient runes.

Why isn’t it that thing? Ms. Fairy Dragon’s thought-up vocabulary was useless at that moment. She felt very aggrieved. As Chen Rui had opened the box, the changing runes inside immediately attracted Zola’s attention.

“This is also a seal? Moreover… it’s a higher grade than the one you brought last time! There are actually 13 yuan rune arrangements. No, it’s a 14 yuan arrangement! And these! So many unknown sentences!” Zola exclaimed and quickly picked it up. This was definitely a valuable long-term research object.

This was the seal rune on the Sword of Fallen Angel that Chen Rui copied with a special method. Seeing Zola’s exhilarating looks, he was determined that this young lady seemed happy enough today. It should be easy to approve his request for “leave” later.

Zola fiddled with it enthusiastically. She suddenly frowned, “That’s all?”

Chen Rui was taken aback. No way. Don’t be too greedy as a dragon. This is not enough? I got it by infiltrating into the internal organization of the enemy with a lot of effort!

This… is it a courtship gift? It’s a bit weird? Zola thought about it. Maybe he is giving something I like. For me, this is indeed a rare and precious thing. It is barely qualified.

Ms. Fairy Dragon put away the cube. She hesitatingly asked again, “You… do you have anything else to say?”

“Yes, Miss Zola. Actually I…”

“Wait! Let me first… uh…”

Chen Rui confusedly watched the Rainbow Valley’s master madam calm down. She took a deep breath, as if she was facing a rather significant experiment.

“Ok, you can start talking.”

“Actually……”

“Wait a minute, I need to prepare a bit more again.” Ms. Fairy Dragon had already drafted several sets of rejection words in her mind.

“……”

“…”

“Say it.”

“Actually, I have a very important thing. I want to leave the Rainbow Valley for a while. It may take 1 to 2 months or more, so I want to inform Miss Zola so that you won’t look for me everywhere… Miss Zola?” Chen Rui saw that Zola’s expression suddenly became a little weird. He couldn’t help but to ask again.

Zola’s voice changed a little, “No more?”

Chen Rui was surprised, “No more.”

“You stayed with me for a day and gave me so many things just for this?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui nodded. Otherwise why? I sacrificed so much. It should be touching enough right!?

“Oh.”

“So… Miss agreed?”

Bastard! Shameless! Unromantic! Blind…

Cunning! Treacherous! Liar…

The fairy dragon listed the shortcomings of this guy one by one. Perhaps it was called his crimes. The resentment in her heart had reached maximum.

Ms. Zola was a woman after all. She was clearly prepared to reject or resist, then when she found that the other party had no such intention at all, she was inexplicably angry.

It was a bit like a confident and peerless beauty who found out that a wretched pervert only robbed her of money and not sex. The unity in contradiction and the contradiction in unity. This might be women.

Sir “Pervert” did not notice the terrible storm brewing in the heart of Miss “Peerless Beauty” at this moment. He even made a request, “Then, the mark that the lady left on me… Can it be removed?”

“Oh?”

“Does Miss agree to it?”

“What?” (Dazed)

An ominous omen suddenly appeared in Chen Rui’s heart. He broke into cold sweat. It’s over! This look…

“Miss?” (Asked again without giving up)

“Bzz bzz…” (Answer)

Before the “wretched pervert” could react, he saw the sky flashing and weaving gorgeous sparks under the beautiful moonlight.

What’s this? Not recognizing me after getting all the benefits?

Wait! This is someone else’s restaurant. It’s not the Rainbow Valley!

Chen Rui surely did not expect this ending.

This doesn’t make sense…

This was the last consciousness of the innocent Mr. Simon before he fainted.

[1] A popular Chinese song.

In front of a woman, even if you are innocent, you will still be guilty.😥

chapters.title: Chapter 376 - The Defeated Joseph
chapters.body:
Chapter 376 - The Defeated Joseph

Dark Moon City.

The attendance rate of the ancient arena broke the record again.

There were many seats shared by 2 people. Many people even sit on the wall to watch. Not only because this battle ball game, which was about to start, was completely free, but also because this game would be related to the future fate of the Dark Moon.

The 2 sides of the competition were Princess Royal Shea’s Dark Moon Elite Team and Joseph’s Red Cloak Team. Whoever won this game would win a series of industries controlled by the other party. That meant that the final winner would completely control the economic situation of the Dark Moon.

At present, the combat effectiveness of the imperial guards and garrison guards had significantly improved. The military affairs were firmly held in the hands of Princess Royal Shea. She also controlled about 60% to 70% of the economy that she had been painstakingly managed. It was only due to the sudden defection of the Cloak Gang that Joseph’s proportion had increased a lot. The two sides‘ ratio was about 6:4. Since Joseph’s chips were still insufficient, he also bet on the position of financial officer.

Joseph’s predicament in the previous days was well-known. There were rumors that the eldest son of the Red Spirit Lord was also in a bad situation in the Red Spirit Estate. He was sanctioned by his father, Lord Josh, and fell out of favor. Once he could win the competition, then, with Dark Moon’s current economic power, it shouldn’t be a problem to rise again. Even if he left the Red Spirit, he could stand alone.

For both parties, this competition was a must-win.

On the VIP bench, almost all the leading figures in the Dark Moon came. As the leader and coach of the Dark Moon Elite Team, Athena appeared on the coaching bench of the Dark Moon Elite Team. Alice and Kia were with her, but it was said that the human sheriff, Chen Rui’s “sickness” was triggered again. Therefore, he did not come and stayed in her residence to recuperate instead.

The players from both sides entered the field. The atmosphere in the field suddenly became intense.

The members of the Dark Moon Elite Team were the best in the garrison guard and imperial guards teams. They also represented the team of highest level of the current battle ball. Many “celebrity players” were also well-known by the Dark Moon residents who liked battle balls. A large group of fans cheered when they appeared.

The Red Cloak Team was unknown. Each player wore a mask on their face. It was exactly the style of Cloak Gang. It was said that it was a team that was secretly trained by Joseph’s “accomplice” Aguile. Even the training was conducted in secret. No one had seen it before. It seemed very mysterious.

Before the game, the physical strength of both parties passed a strict test. It was determined that they were all at the same level of Intermediate Demon.

With a whistle from the referee, the game officially began.

The first move of the Red Cloak Team turned out to be a shot directed to the goal after just serving from the center line. This was a special game ball. It would absorb power. Not only that, the arena’s court was added with gravity. However, the strength and accuracy of this kick was quite amazing. The battle ball was shot out like a magic crystal cannonball. It drew a rapidly dropping curve, going directly to the goal.

The goalkeeper of the Dark Moon Elite Team was taken aback. Fortunately, he was very experienced, so he blocked the ball out of the goal with a pounce. His arm was somewhat numb from the shock.

The first blow from the Red Cloak Team shook the audience. The Dark Moon Elite Team were all knowledgeable experts, they put away their arrogance instantly and began to fully devote themselves to the game.

Joseph’s eyes flashed with certainty. They are indeed Aguile’s “secret weapon”. Judging from the powerful strengthI have seen before of this team, this battle is basically a win.

The Dark Moon Elite Team organized a counterattack after receiving the ball. However, the opponent’s defensive ability was extraordinary both collectively and individually. The burly body and accurate tackles prevented the Dark Moon Elite Team from organizing a gorgeous offense that was as smooth as usual. It was interrupted in a few moves.

After the Red Cloak Team stole the ball, they quickly launched a counterattack. After a few concise and effective passes, they had reached the Dark Moon Elite Team’s front field. The midfield front striker leaped high and launched a header upon receiving the pass from his teammate. The ball hit the crossbar of the goal and bounced out of the field. Although the ball did not score, it shocked the Dark Moon Elite Team. Even all the supporting spectators were in a cold sweat. Even Alice on the VIP seat covered her mouth in horror. Only Lord Shea was still indifferent. It looked like nothing could cause the iceberg princess to be emotional.

After a fierce battle, the first half finally ended. The score was still 0:0.

After the intermission, the second half began again.

Although neither team scored in the first half, the intensity of the confrontation and the level of technical tactics far exceeded the audience’s imagination. Even the Red Cloak Team had been suppressing the Dark Moon Elite Team in the field. They firmly controlled the initiative on the field.

This situation was unexpected by almost everyone. The battle ball should first appear in the garrison guard, and then spread to the imperial guards. The last is the private sector. So at present, the level of the military is much higher than that of the private sector. Where did Joseph (Aguile) find such a high-performance team?

Joseph could see that the Dark Moon Elite Team had tried their best and was physically exhausted. On the other hand, the Red Cloak Team was much better. Without the physical body’s support, it was useless no matter how good the skill was. Based on this point alone, the Red Cloak Team could bring down the opponent.

However, even with a considerable chance of winning, Joseph still prepared an insidious trump card. He was ready to destroy everything when he failed. These days he had instructed Royce to plant huge explosive and burning magic traps in many places in the Dark Moon. Not only at his own industry, but also near the Princess Retail Store and the joint chamber of commerce. In case of failure, he would immediately launch it while he fled back to the Red Spirit or the capital. He would stay incognito for a period of time before seeking a comeback.

But this is just a precautionary measure. Shea should also have some preventive measures after failure. When I win, I will definitely encounter various obstacles when I take over those shops and industries. I should consider how to resolve this.

Just when Joseph was in a trance, the crowd suddenly cheered loudly. It turned out that the Dark Moon Elite Team suddenly changed the way of attacking. They adopted a defensive counterattack. They finally launched a counterattack when the Red Cloak Team pressed on the whole line. The only one kick they did penetrated the Red Cloak goal.

This first goal boosted the morale of the Dark Moon Elite Team. Under Athena’s loud scolding, they calmed down and continued to adopt strict defenses to overcome dangers time and again. It constantly made the Red Cloak Team unable to turn advantage into victory. Soon, their counterattack succeeded in the same way.

2:0!

The vast majority of the audience hoped that Princess Royal would win. It was also reflected in the betting odds purchased. The score now made the audience screamed even more triumphantly. Alice, who was next to Kia, looked particularly excited. She waved her fists and shouted, but her voice had long been overwhelmed by the crowd’s cheering.

Cold sweat began to appear on Joseph’s forehead. He couldn’t sit still anymore. As he looked at “Aguile” who was wearing a cloak not far away, he saw that “Aguile” remained unresponsive while just watching the field quietly. Could it be he has the ultimate comeback strategy for turning defeat into victory?

The game was still going on, and time was running out. “Aguile” was still very calm. Joseph hadn’t seen any so-called comeback strategy yet. His face was already pale. Am I really going to lose?

It is actually a good game to secure victory!

Could it be that Aguile deliberately…

Why?

Did the Beelzebub Royal Family take refuge in Shea… this down-and-out Princess Royal?

Impossible!

The cold light in Joseph’s eyes flickered. As if he didn’t want to see the end of failure, he suddenly got up and turned away.

Alice, who was on the coach bench, was watching the game merrily when someone suddenly came to her side and handed her a note. Kia stood in front of her vigilantly as she took the note and read it. She frowned slightly and seemed thoughtful before handing it to Alice.

When Alice read the note, she looked surprised and somewhat delighted. She looked at the field with reluctance. She finally got up and walked toward the passage. Athena was fully focused on the game, so she didn’t pay attention to this, but Kia kept following her closely.

Alice took Kia out of the noisy arena. They came all the way to the empty house in the eastern block.

“That’s strange. Didn’t Brother Chen Rui say to wait for me here?” Alice pouted and asked. She then looked at the note again, “It’s here, right? Kia, when did brother come back?”

Kia shook her head and said nothing. Chen Rui has been away for a while. He is supposingly coming back soon, but this note says that there are important things rather than saying returning from the outside. I’m afraid something is wrong.

Moreover, even if Chen Rui returned to the Dark Moon, he would not see Alice first. He would also not choose such a place. But now Paglio and Delia are both in the Dark Moon. In case of any situation, I just crush the magic dragon scales given by Paglio and the poison dragon will arrive immediately.

There was the sound of footsteps outside. When Alice ran out happily to take a look, her movements instantly froze. This person was not Chen Rui, but Joseph instead.

Joseph’s usual smile was gone. He put on a cold face, “Royal Highness Little Princess, sorry for letting you wait for a long time.”

“What do you want to do?” Alice asked warily as she slowly stepped back to Kia’s side.

“Nothing, I just want to take you away. In fact, I have admired Royal Highness Little Princess for a long time. I just happen to be able to fulfill it this time.”

Kia guarded Alice behind her and shouted, “Joseph, how dare you! You even made a filthy statement to Royal Highness Little Princess!”

Joseph’s face became distorted and looked particularly hideous, “Anyway, I have nothing once the game is over! Princess Alice, my little baby, don’t be afraid. I will make you comfortable every day from now on!”

Alice gritted her teeth and said, “Stop! Get lost now! Otherwise, you will be dead when my sister comes!”

“Do you think Shea will definitely win? All she gets is the news of your disappearance and the Dark Moon ruins!” Joseph yelled hysterically, “I have sent a signal for Royce to launch all magic traps buried in the Dark Moon. Whether it is the Princess Retail Store or the night market, all will be turned into wreckage! I have even sent someone to greet the trash human who you like. You will see his tortured corpse soon!”

On the surface, Joseph had tried to pursue Shea, but in fact he had always coveted Alice. He even detected Alice’s feelings about the human sheriff.

What should I do? This bastard is too vicious! Even if I die, I will not fall into his hands! Alice bit her lip as she tried to keep herself from crying. Kia calmly asked, “Are you sure you notified Royce? Are you sure you sent someone to the sheriff’s residence?”

If he asked Royce to launch it, then there is no need to worry. As for the assassin sent to the sheriff residence, I’m afraid he will be miserable.

“Hmph! Bitch, don’t try to delay. Although I don’t like a woman like you, I don’t mind rewarding you to my subordinates.” Joseph reached out and grabbed Alice. Alice was just an Intermediate Demon. As for Kia, aside from a little charm skill, she had no fighting power at all. With his strength close to the peak of the Demon King, they were an easy catch after all.

Suddenly, Joseph felt an extremely dangerous feeling in his heart. It turned out to be from the succubus maid who had no combat power at all. Before he approached Alice, everything in front was red. He was entirely enveloped in flames. This flame breath is far above imagination. It turns out to be… Demon King level! No, with this power, I’m afraid it is the peak of Demon King!

This low-key maid, Kia, turns out to be the peak of the Demon King powerhouse! She is even more powerful than Athena, Kaguron and even Old Gauss! (Of course, Joseph didn’t know that Athena was already a Great Demon King.)

Joseph secretly thought, At this point I can only make a desperate bet. Even if I don’t have those nasty thoughts, I still have to catch Alice to blackmail Shea. He immediately shouted and transformed into a combat form. There was a raging flame on his body and he was holding a scythe. It emitted a strong air current which cut the flames away.

Just as Joseph cut away the flames, he felt a sharp qi approaching his body. He dodged fiercely, but his shoulders seemed to be cut by a sharp blade which caused him to bleed. Immediately after that, the sharp qi filled the air. The wind blades! And there are so many of them! Wind and fire elements magician!

Joseph had a shield in his hand to protect his vitals. He continued to rush forward. He only heard continuous cutting sounds. His shield was torn apart, but he had already rushed toward Kia- A magician is most afraid of being close. Even if I need to pay a certain price, I must also kill this dangerous woman!

However, Kia’s speed of casting magic was far beyond his imagination. Before he was close, a huge fireball rushed forward. Joseph couldn’t avoid it. His scythe turned into a sharp ray as he struck with all his strength, intending to cut the fireball into half from Kia.

When the scythe touched the fireball, the fireball suddenly exploded into countless lightning arcs. Joseph’s whole body was shaken, and his movements became stiff. When the fireball burst open, Joseph’s body, that had received all of the impact, was knocked back by the huge impact. He flew upside down and fell to the ground far away.

He had been severely injured this time. Before he could stand up, Kia’s [Continuous Fireballs] came again. In the continuous explosion sound and tremor, Joseph was completely defeated. He fell to the ground with wounds all over his body, and he could no longer get up.

Wind and fire compound magic!

The two magic elements are initially incompatible. It is almost impossible to successfully combine them. Even my father, Josh, may not be able to do this, but Kia can go against such a rule and cast it…

By the way, Royce has received the signal for so long. Why hasn’t it been launched?

Perhaps he was on the verge of death, Joseph suddenly had an unprecedented clarity in his mind. In an instant, he seemed to understand a lot of things. Could it be that even Royce…

It turns out that it was a trap from the beginning. I even eagerly walked into it. I sealed my own retreat…

Why Aguile…

In any case, this time… I have really lost. Completely and absolutely…

In the midst of shock and despair, Joseph’s vision became increasingly blurred.

Would Joseph just die like that? He didn’t even put up a good fight at all.

chapters.title: Chapter 377 - Dark Moon’S Initial Setup
chapters.body:
Chapter 377 - Dark Moon’S Initial Setup

Here are the 2 extra chapters for achieving community goal 2🎊🎊🎉! Thanks for the support!

Although Joseph’s breath was getting weaker and weaker and he was on the verge of death, Kia was very experienced and she did not dare to out her guard down at all. She then cautiously cast a restraint magic before she was relieved.

“Kia, you are so amazing!” Alice’s gaze was full of surprise. She stepped forward and hugged Kia.

“Someone told me to protect his little princess properly.” Kia smiled slightly as she glanced not far away.

In the direction of Kia’s vision, Delia’s figure was gradually moving away. It turned out that Delia had been camouflaged beside Athena. She had always been careful. Seeing Kia and Alice left, she followed suit just in case. She realized something wrong indeed. Since Kia had the ability to solve it by herself, she naturally would not intervene.

His little princess? Alice flushed suddenly, and her heart was warm.

Kia’s strength was actually not much better than Joseph, but her absolute advantage in equipment was superior to Joseph even if Joseph had a magic equipment shop.

The red string bracelet on the succubus maid’s wrist alone was the legendary grade magic jewelry made by Chen Rui. It was the “Moments of Beauty” that once became famous in the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic master competition. The magic attack of all elements increased by 42% and the casting speed increased by 35%. It also accelerated the speed of spirit power recovery and even came with a shield defensive magic.

It was precisely because of that competition at that time that the red string bracelet style was now becoming popular in the Demon Realm, but no one knew that the set on the wrist of the little maid in the Dark Moon turned out to be a genuine one.

As for the compound magic of wind and fire, it was what Chen Rui learned from the fairy dragon Zola. Kia experienced ups and downs, so she knew the dangers of the world. Therefore, she made up her mind to become stronger long ago. At least, she couldn’t be a burden to Chen Rui, so she trained hard in private. She finally mastered some of the mysteries of compound magic.

At the arena side, the battle ball match was finally over. The final score was fixed at 3:1. The Red Cloak Team finally scored once after the opponent scored 3 consecutive goals, but they could not change the result.

The audience in the arena cheered together. Shea took the opportunity to give a heartening speech and announced a series of favorable systems for comfort. Driven by the supporters, the audience’s mood reached its peak again. The audience shouted “Long live Princess Royal”.

The sinister traps that Joseph originally laid out in his attempt to perish together were removed one by one by Royce long ago. After this “battle”, the Dark Moon had completely returned to Shea’s control. Some families who were close to Joseph also expressed their surrender. It could be described as a complete victory.

Looking at the cheering crowd, Shea recalled the hardships when she had just taken over Dark Moon and when she was restrained by others over the years. She felt like she was in a dream. The entire estate was finally firmly held in her hands.

All these were changes brought about by that man.

The Dark Moon was just the first step in his plan back then. Next was the capital… and after that, the entire empire.

Judging from the current situation, to truly fulfill father’s dying wish… It seems that it is not just a fantasy.

He hasn’t come back yet?

When she just returned to the palace. Old Gauss immediately reported to Shea that Alice had been deceived by Joseph’s trick and was almost taken hostage. Shea was taken aback. She secretly blamed herself. Her attention was focused on the competition just now. She didn’t expect Joseph to use this kind of vicious trick. Accident nearly happened. Fortunately, Kia was there. Otherwise, the consequences would be disastrous.

Currently, Joseph had been killed by Kia. She escorted Alice back to the palace hall, waiting for her order.

Shea walked to the main hall hastily. When she saw the little loli talking and laughing with Kia there, she immediately blurted out, “Alice!”

“Sister!” Alice hurried over when she saw Shea.

“I’ll settle the scores with you later.” Although she was very worried about her sister, the majesty of the lord sister showed up again after seeing that Alice was safe.

The little loli had long been used to it. She stuck out her tongue, made a face, and said nothing.

Shea turned her gaze to Kia. The maid succubus still had a submissive and humble look, but Shea didn’t know how much respect she had in her heart.

For a long time, Shea still had a little prejudice against Kia in her heart even after learning that Kia had no “problems”. Perhaps this prejudice was more due to the flirty relationship between a certain man and the little maid. To be more precise, it was the jealousy in the heart of this Princess Royal that she did not want to admit.

“Kia… thank you.”

There was no promise of reward. It was only this verbal gratitude. Although it was still in a cold tone, the succubus maid could feel the sincerity of Princess Royal Highness. She smiled and said, “This is what Kia should do because… the little princess is a very important person to Kia.”

Kia was sent to the Dark Moon by Sabrina to work as an undercover agent, but she was exposed by Shea. She was also forced to wear a Demon Restrictive Ring, and there was a lot of surveillance. Only Alice did not regard Kia as a suspicious person, but as a close maid like a real friend. For Kia, who had been bullied since childhood and had no friends, it was a rare warmth. This was the biggest reason why Kia had always been willing to follow Alice.

Shea took a deep look at Kia. There was a touch of warmth in her indifferent eyes. She bowed her head in salute, “Then, please continue to take care of Alice in the future.”

Kia’s eyes lit up. She finally began to bow in return seriously. Kia looked at Alice, and she showed a hearty smile.

This was a good start. It meant that the relationship between Shea and Kia was gradually warming up.

For a lord, fostering a relationship with a maid was already a ridiculous matter, but from the perspective of a woman, especially from the perspective of “a man’s woman”, whether as a lord or a princess, she was not much better than the maid.

This might represent a certain key change in Royal Highness Princess’ mind. If a certain “damn man” was here, he would surely cover his mouth and laugh smugly.

The next day, Shea formally announced her new appointment – The former representative sheriff, Athena, formally served as the sheriff and garrison guard commander; Sheriff Chen Rui was changed to financial officer. Due to “physical conditions”, this position was temporarily replaced by Old Gauss; West Road defense team was promoted to the defense force as the third army of the Dark Moon. The commander was assumed by the heir of the Saiful Family and the former mining officer, Tim; the original position of imperial guards’ reserve forces leader, Aguile, remained unchanged while serving as a military supplies officer. The remaining families would have their rewards accordingly.

The most unexpected thing about this appointment was Aguile. Didn’t this guy betray Princess Royal and turn to Joseph? Why does Princess Royal still appoint him after Joseph’s fall?

Many quick-witted people had guessed it. Aguile, who had always been Princess Royal’s right-hand man, suddenly turned against Joseph in the regular meeting. It should be instructed by the Princess Royal. However, it was a bit weird that Joseph would believe him. There must be some unknown secret in it. However, it was certain that Aguile must have played the most crucial role in this battle.

Joseph’s charges were made public. It included the serious crime of attempting to kidnap the little princess. His corpse was sent back to the Red Spirit Estate. The little princess was a royal family, and she was even the lineage of the Lord of Midnight Sun, so Joseph’s crime couldn’t be forgiven. Even the Red Spirit Lord could not protect him. As per the norms, Josh must also publicly appeal to the capital and apologize to Alice.

Not only that, Shea had already received the intel from the capital. The large and small estate and capital families of the empire had all gathered their funds to Obsidian. However, the mysterious “Charles” mysteriously disappeared after arriving at the capital not long ago. There was also relatively secret news – the financial adviser, Isabella, who had the reputation of the Imperial City’s Flower, died unexpectedly. At the insistence of her friend Krobelus, a secret funeral was held. No one knows whether it was related to “Charles”.

The cause of “Charles”‘ death was actually concealed by Obsidian for fear of causing chaos. However, the truth would be revealed eventually, especially the elder families, who were extremely sensitive to the capital movements. Although Obsidian was the only “remaining” witness at Leisure Moon Inn, many elder families still had doubts – Didn’t Charles have a relationship with Isabella? Judging from the severely damaged scene of Leisure Moon Inn, perhaps it was a terrifying battle at that time. Even Isabella died, so Charles…

Obsidian insisted that “Charles” had safely escaped to the human world since there was no way to verify it anyway. However, even Krobelus faintly guessed that the human was most probably dead, let alone those old and experienced elder families?

At present, many people’s attention was attracted by the mysterious organization that had been purged. However, anyone interested could feel that a terrible storm seemed to be slowly brewing in the capital. Perhaps it was not just the capital.

Judging from this situation, Chen Rui’s plan had been successful. Although the human did not return to the Dark Moon as originally planned and she was confused about the Demon Emperor power of the legendary “Charles”, Shea did not look into it in detail. The most important thing was to carefully start the next planning step by step.

For a time, rumors were abound in the capital and other places. They were mainly about Obsidian, about how the Royal Highness Regent used all means to amass money by blackmailing and defrauding various estates and families in the name of the potioneer contest.

Rumors had made the capital’s people even more confused. Some families and estates had already started to ask questions about the fundraising models. Obsidian was very furious at this, but the first suspect was not the Dark Moon Estate, but the recent “Bloodfall” organization which was “being cracked down”.

Under Obsidian’s violent and forceful series of tough methods, Bloodfall everywhere was hit hard and suffered heavy losses. The results of this investigation also made Obsidian secretly alarmed. I didn’t expect this mysterious force to be so widespread and deeply ingrained. There must be many hidden strengths that have not been unearthed. It seems that I must try to get rid of this power, otherwise there will be endless troubles.

Day by day, just as the situation in the Fallen Angel Empire was changing unpredictably, Chen Rui, the initiator of all this, was continuing his assistant career in the Rainbow Valley.

Since returning from the Fallen Angel Capital last time, the treatment of the sir assistant sir seemed to have become a lot worse. The time and intensity of the experiment subject had increased a lot. Except for some academic discussion time, Ms. Fairy Dragon had been rough on him during normal days. It was as if he had done something bad that was utterly devoid of conscience and inferior to the beasts.

In the heart of Ms. Fairy Dragon: This tasteless bastard who wasted my feelings and even buying clothes for other women is indeed a beast. No! Not as good as a beast!

“Charles” was even worse than dead now 🤕

chapters.title: Chapter 378 - Surprising Change! The Beginning Of The War Of Lords
chapters.body:
Chapter 378 - Surprising Change! The Beginning Of The War Of Lords

Here are the 2 extra chapters for achieving community goal 2🎊🎊🎉! Thanks for the support!

Chen Rui was a bit confused about Zola’s resentment. She was obviously very happy at the capital last time, so he didn’t know how he offended this lady that she finally brought him back after knocking him out by electrifying.

In fact, with his familiarity with the Rainbow Valley magic circle, plus the [Star Gate], it was not difficult to escape, but the fairy dragon put something on him that enable her to track his location. She could even see through skills such as [True Camouflage] and [True Breath Holding]. If he escaped to the Dark Moon and the fairy dragon saw the poison dragon, the consequences would be disastrous. So, he should try to completely avoid this trouble.

Joseph is probably done for now. Shea can implement the subsequent steps according to the original plan. Even if I am not there, there should be no big problem.

Chen Rui calmed down. While studying the seal of Paglio with the fairy dragon and discussing the problem of the Sword of Fallen Angel, his level of ancient runes was also improving rapidly. Although Ms. Fairy Dragon would inexplicably give him minor punishment out of the blue, she still gave him great inspiration and help in terms of ancient runes and territory.

He was able to launch the [Autumn Territory] relatively steadily. His power of Megrez was also growing stronger step by step. Even if it was not launched, he had more experience in understanding and using the territory after the battle with Broc. In the solar system of the Super System, many planets were changing step by step, the oceans and lakes had begun to be formed. The plants had slowly evolved from the original fungi and algae. An environment like swamp forest had appeared. It added lively and vibrant greenery.

His Comprehensive Strength Assessment had reached B+, but his Megrez experience was still at the one last step.

After learning that Zola’s territory could freely convert various elements, which was equivalent to several territories, Chen Rui’s mind shifted and a new idea appeared. He once combined Nirvana in the [Autumn Territory] last time to heal and strengthen Isabella. Is it possible to separate this buff to create a new form of territory which can heal and strengthen myself or my allies? Maybe it can be called the [Spring Territory]”?

Of course, this was just a future development direction. With his current strength, it was better that he fully comprehended the mystery of [Autumn Territory] first in order to break the bottleneck of Megrez.

Time passed day by day. 2 months in the blink of an eye. Zola’s mood improved a lot. Sometimes she even unprecedentedly made some weird food for him to eat, but the taste was not flattering. It was probably another kind of experiment.

Although he had gained a lot in the Rainbow Valley, Chen Rui missed Athena and Kia very much. He was also worried about some things. Is Shea completely in control of the Dark Moon? To what extent has Obsidian cracked down the Bloodfall? How did he deal with the rumors around? Did Aldas participate in the capital’s potioneer contest…

He could come back to the Rainbow Valley again, but he must return to the Dark Moon. After long-term experiments and preparations, Chen Rui finally started his escape plan. Since the set star point would be invalid in 1 month, he could only escape by cracking the magic circle directly.

For the sake of caution, he was just testing the water during the first time. He intended to detect a certain imprint on his body by Zola. Once the speculation in his mind was confirmed, it could be removed at once. Then as long as a star point was set somewhere outside the valley, he could easily use the [Star Gate] to leave at any time.

So, one afternoon, while Ms. Fairy Dragon was taking a nap after being exhausted from the experiment a few days ago, Chen Rui carefully cracked the magic circle and escaped from the Rainbow Valley.

He disguised his face and came all the way to the capital. He suddenly felt that the atmosphere seemed a little wrong. According to time estimation, the potioneer competition should end soon. This kind of all-Demon Realm competition was also a business opportunity. He remembered that Obsidian originally planned to hold a series of trade fairs, auctions, and other activities after that, but there was no trace of these at present. Even the mobile population had not increased significantly.

Chen Rui felt very puzzled and walked into a pub. After asking for a few glasses of the best wine, he had successfully “hooked up” with the succubus waiter in the pub.

“Potioneer contest?”

The succubus was surprised, “Haven’t you heard of such a big incident? The Royal Highness Regent announced 2 months ago that the potioneer contest will be postponed for one year. However, there is a new major incident. With permission from the Royal Highness Regent, the Red Spirit Estate joined forces with the Blue Lava Estate and launched the war of lords against the other estates. At present, the alliance of Red Spirit and Blue Lava has approached the Dark Moon.”

“What?” Chen Rui was extremely shocked. The war of lords!

According to the Demon Realm’s practice, when certain contradictions couldn’t be reconciled between the lords, they could be resolved by physical force. However, because it was an internal struggle in the empire, a special approval from the emperor was required.

Generally, the capital would send an envoy to work on the final mediation. In case the mediation failed, the role of envoy would become supervision to avoid excessive casualties. Generally speaking, even if one party won, they couldn’t kill the lord of the losing party. The losing lord would be handed over to the capital for the final judgement. The loser could cede the land for compensation, or even be imprisoned.

The reason for the Red Spirit Estate to launch the war of the lords was that the Dark Moon Lord Shea conspired to kill Joseph, who was the Dark Moon’s financial officer, in order to seize the industries of Joseph, the eldest son of the Red Spirit Lord and the “heir” of the estate.

Judging from this reason alone, it could indeed become a condition for launching a war of lords.

However, this was simply turning the facts upside down.

First of all, the reason for Joseph’s “killing” was to distort the facts. Joseph himself took the initiative to propose a bet at a regular meeting. The Dark Moon officials and family representatives could testify for it. No matter what strategic struggles happened in between, Demon Realm’s rule was that the winner ruled over the loser. It was indeed Joseph’s Red Cloak Team had lost in the end. It was tantamount to losing all the industries and the financial officer position.

Moreover, Joseph’s reason for death was due to his attempt to kidnap the little princess, Alice, so he was killed by Kia. It was his own responsibility. According to the rules, Josh should apologize to Shea.

Moreover, Joseph’s identity was not the heir of the Red Spirit Estate at all. The title was just a bargaining chip for the dead and an excuse for starting a war.

Regent Obsidian completely ignored Dark Moon’s protest and directly approved Josh’s request. The villain’s plot was obvious. Even many people could guess that this war was instructed by Obsidian.

The Dark Moon Estate had all fallen under the control of Princess Royal Shea. Its economic and military development had been rapid. Coupled with Obsidian’s own foolish decision, Shea had not been affected by the fundraising. Hence, she had long become the thorn in Obsidian’s flesh. While the Dark Moon was still in the early stage of stabilization, he would make use of this opportunity to destroy the Dark Moon’s viable power and wipe out this potentially dangerous bud in the infancy.

As long as the Red Spirit and Blue Lava won, even if they didn’t kill the Shea and her sister who were the descendants of the royal family, the thriving Dark Moon would definitely become an empty shell looted by the flames of war. Moreover, Obsidian would never let Shea go. She would even be imprisoned for life or even be killed secretly.

Even if he did not kill Shea and still gave her the title of a lord, all real authority would be shifted. She would become a veritable puppet.

This move was indeed sinister and vicious.

Although the details of Joseph’s death were not clear, Chen Rui had guessed that in addition to the potential threat that Obsidian wanted to use the Red Spirit and Blue Lava to defeat the Dark Moon, Obsidian also had the intention of using war to divert the public’s attention. He even wanted to plunder Dark Moon’s wealth to alleviate the urgent need for his huge deficit.

Although the Dark Moon’s military and combat capabilities had been greatly improved, it was still a weak aspect compared with the other 2 estates. Originally, Chen Rui expected it to take 3 years or so to increase the military power to disregard the major estates and even to the extent of confronting the capital head-on, but this sudden war was far beyond his expectations.

However, in addition to the surface military strength, the Dark Moon also had strong hidden power. In terms of individual combat effectiveness, the representatives were the Earth Elemental King and Paglio. The Red Spirit Lord Josh was only the middle stage of the Demon Emperor, and the Blue Lava Lord was probably not far away; In terms of overall military strength, there was Guradam’s undead army, as well as the earth elemental, medusa, tauren and wyvern groups. Once all of these strengths were used, it should be enough to defeat the Blue Lava and Red Spirit. However, once all these powers were exposed, it would probably attract attention from all parties. The most important thing was that this power was not in the hands of Shea. He must go back to mobilize them. Therefore, he must rush back to the Dark Moon Estate as soon as possible. Back to Athena and Kia. Back to Shea!

“Thank you, beautiful and charming lady. I will come and ask you out when I have time at night.” Facing the succubus waiter’s frequent flirty glances and physical temptation, Chen Rui said a sentence perfunctorily. As he was about to leave, a familiar voice sounded from behind.

“Night? Really?”

Chen Rui was shocked. It is Zola! She came here so soon? As expected…

Chen Rui slowly turned around and saw a graceful figure appearing behind him. This time Zola did not pretend to be the ugly appearance last time. The beautiful appearance and special temperament made the charming succubus suddenly look unattrative.

“Dear Simon, did you escape from the house just to have a private rendezvous with this wild woman?” The fairy dragon asked with a smile, but her voice was vaguely murderous.

Chen Rui was a little speechless. What is this? She’s even addicted to role-playing! Besides, I’m just an assistant, not your man. Even if I have a private rendezvous with any woman, it’s none of your business…

“About this… please listen to my explanation.”

“Let’s go home first, okay?” Zola seemed to be soliciting his opinions respectfully. In fact, Chen Rui knew very well that if he didn’t want to go back, he would definitely be knocked out and dragged back.

“Listen to me, I can’t go back now…”

Before he finished speaking, a loud voice sounded. It was a young man wearing a majestic metal armor. He was also followed by a brawny bodyguard. He was obviously the young master of a certain capital family.

“Beauty, he doesn’t want to go back with you. How about I go back with you? I’m much more useful than this guy. I’ll guarantee you…”

Before he finished speaking, his voice stopped abruptly. The majestic magic armor on his body was automatically distorted as if she wanted to twist the whole person into fried twisted dough. The poor young master brother even released painful screams before passing out in pain.

The brawny man was taken aback. He drew his sword and rushed toward Zola in a loud shout. Within 2 steps, he felt the sword in his hand had an unbearable high temperature. The sword suddenly dropped to the ground with a “ding” sound. The long sword turned into molten iron at a speed visible to the naked eye.

The brawny man was shocked. This is not just fancy armor, but a weapon of excellent grade!

From beginning to end, Zola didn’t look at them. She just stared at Chen Rui.

“Understood, I’ll go back with you first.” Chen Rui glanced at the dying young master, and he sighed. After this “experiment”, he had confirmed that Zola had placed a 4 yuan rune marks on him.

“Yuan” was the basic unit of the ancient runes. The higher the level, the more complicated it was. However, the 4 yuan rune mark was very sophiscated. Even if there was [Deep Analysis] information, it was very hard to remove it. No matter how troublesome it was, he had to get rid of it. He had already set up a star point in the capital area. If he couldn’t explain it properly, he could directly use the [Star Gate] to escape directly.

Rainbow Valley.

“Miss Zola, you are the most intellectual woman I have ever seen. You love knowledge, respect knowledge, beautiful, kind, and understanding…”

Hearing this man listed many of her advantages, Zola was dazed on the surface, but she felt sweet in her heart. Somehow, she started to like to listen to these “unscientific” sweet words. Of course, it was only limited to this man.

(Forget it, let’s just forgive him for sneaking out to seduce a wild woman?)

(That’s not right. It seems that his reason for going out has nothing to do with me? I seem to be just trying to get back a… uh, runaway experiment subject.)

“Now, there are several important people in my life who are in danger…”

Zola suddenly interrupted, “It’s more important than me… our experiment?”

“In a sense, they are more… as important as our experiment.” Chen Rui paused and said with a solemn expression, “If someone wants to destroy our experiment, what will Miss Zola do?”

Zola’s aura was very strong, “I’ll not let him go!”

Chen Rui took the opportunity to say, “Yes, I’m like this too. so I must leave to protect those who are very important to me. As long as this matter is resolved, I will return to the Rainbow Valley again to study and experiment with you. Trust me, miss. This is my most sincere request.”

Seeing Chen Rui’s eagerly anticipating eyes, Zola, who was still intending to make things difficult, couldn’t help but feel sorry. She didn’t fake daze anymore. She thought for a while, and finally nodded, “Okay…”

“Miss is really a reasonable person!”

Chen Rui was overjoyed. However, Ms. Fairy Dragon seriously said, “However, you have to help me complete the splitting of the 14 yuan rune.”

Yuan was the basic unit of ancient runes. This 14 yuan rune paragraph was the original paragraph that Chen Rui used to “copy” from the Sword of Fallen Angel using the same ancient rune method. It was also his gift for Zola at the Little Mirror Lake that day.

“Split?”

Zola nodded, “En. If you are away, it will be difficult for me to complete the splitting process smoothly. As for the subsequent experiment process, I can complete it independently.”

Splitting unknown runes was a work that requires considerable brainpower and technical content. Chen Rui had the skill of the [Deep Analysis] which could calculate and process those rune paragraphs extremely accurately. So in this aspect, Zola really couldn’t do without him.

However, in the process of splitting, there was a considerable chance that the activated rune would be induced to change. There would even be a great risk if one got it wrong.

Seeing Chen Rui still hesitating, Zola added, “Well, if you complete this split, I will remove the 6 yuan tracking rune mark on you.”

The 6 yuan mark? It’s more ruthless than the 4 yuan I imagined… Chen Rui secretly thought, If it is a 6 yuan mark, the time it takes to crack is definitely longer than splitting the 14 yuan paragraph. If I flee directly, the fairy dragon will definitely not let me go. She will use the mark to catch up.

“Alright, Miss Zola” Chen Rui nodded. “Time is running out. Let’s start right away.”

Hmmm, Zola was exceptionally “nice” there 🤔. Could she really feel his sincerity? Also could Chen Rui make it back in time?

chapters.title: Chapter 379 - Crisis! Demi-God Territory Space
chapters.body:
Chapter 379 - Crisis! Demi-God Territory Space

Rainbow Valley laboratory.

There were strange sounds from time to time. Some were roaring; some were shaking. If it weren’t for this special experiment room that was reinforced with ancient runes and Dragon Inscription, it would have collapsed long ago.

Due to the urgent situation of the Dark Moon, Chen Rui was determined this time. Regardless of danger and hiding his knowledge, he started to split the runes with all his might.

In fact, much of the ancient rune knowledge he currently had was learned from the 4 stone slabs that were not given to the fairy dragon. However, he couldn’t activate all the signs of the 4 stone slabs like the fairy dragon, so his learning was limited. Nevertheless, it was enough to bring enough help and even inspiration to Zola.

Even Ms. Fairy Dragon herself had to admit that “Richard” had become an indispensable real assistant by her side.

Chen Rui’s hand pointed to the rows of slightly flickering symbols on the central stone platform. Relying on the calculation and analysis of the [Deep Analysis], he successfully split a paragraph from it with a strange gesture. He couldn’t be sloppy during this process at all. If it was messed up, it would cause unimaginable consequences. Even this heavily protected laboratory and even the Rainbow Valley would completely disappear from the Demon Realm.

When Chen Rui had just successfully separated this complete rune paragraph, a sudden change occurred. The dozens of rune signs were scattered, spurring chaotic and bright light around like a laser cannon flying out of control.

Chen Rui sensed something amiss. He immediately activated the protective shield, but the destructive power of the light was so strong that the protective shield instantly collapsed. Zola herself was also there. With a wave of her hand, several huge transparent prisms suddenly appeared around the 2 of them. When the rampaging light hit the prism, part of it was reflected while part of it refracted. However, the structure of the prism was profound and abnormal. Some of the light refracted was weakened, while some attributes were changed. However, the angle of penetration made it impossible to touch the 2 people behind the prism.

Zola’s magic skills… is really breathtaking.

However, the penetration power of the light was so amazing that the prism gradually cracked. Fortunately, after the “laser cannon” was launched for a while… it then gradually weakened, Finally, it stopped before the prism collapsed. It flew back to the stone platform, and returned to faintly glowing texts which emitted a different blue light than before. It was quiet and beautiful as if there was no danger at all.

Chen Rui wiped his sweat… and said, “The key word of this text paragraph should be destruction rays.”

“Penetration and indestructibility should also be added.” Zola added. She quickly recorded them in the magic log. These were just preliminary definitions. In order to really crack and master the power of this rune, she needed to continue with the experiments.

Chen Rui waited for her to finish recording, and he took a deep breath, “Then… Let’s continue.”

Zola hesitated for a moment. She then glanced over the tired look on his face, “You… don’t need to rest for a while? You have hardly taken a break these 2 days.

Chen Rui looked at the last 3 lines that did not turn blue, and he shook his head, “No need.”

Zola held on to her glasses… and bit her lip softly. She suddenly drew a wonderful trajectory in the air. Chen Rui felt that there was something beating in his body accordingly… and then it gradually faded.

“It is troublesome to dissolve the marks on your body right now, and it will waste a lot of time, but I have been changed to a countdown state now. It will automatically weaken and just disappear over time.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. Did I hear it wrongly? Is it an illusion just now? This way, there is no need to worry about the unnecessary problems.

With the integrity of Ms. Fairy Dragon, this is a complete rebound! No, she is stung by conscience!

Originally, he had prepared for Miss Fake Daze’s “infinite last time”, but it seemed that it was unnecessary now.

In fact, Chen Rui could feel it. At some point of time, the “treatment” of him as an experiment subject and handyman had undergone some subtle changes. It seemed to be fundamentally different from when he first came to the Rainbow Valley. Even when the fairy dragon was displeased at him after returning from the capital last time, this feeling became stronger instead.

“Miss Zola, you are really a good and considerate woman.” Chen Rui praised her sincerely for the first time.

“What?” Zola asked dazedly.

“Then… Let’s go ahead.” (This reaction makes me feel jittery with imaginary fears… Forget it, let’s not complicate the situations.)

“Oh.“ (Hmph! Will it cost your life to praise me more?)

A few hours later.

“Miss Zola, the last paragraph seems to be a high grade chain rune!”

Originally, Zola was recording and analyzing. She was startled when she heard him, and she took a closer look. She seemed surprised, “It is really a high grade chain rune! Only rune paragraphs above 16 yuan have high grade chain attributes, then this paragraph has exceeded the 14 yuan category we originally defined!”

“At least 16 yuan, so the level of danger should be quite high…” Chen Rui hesitated for a moment, “Then do you still want to extract it?”

“Of course! Don’t worry.” Zola almost patted his chest and gave her guarantee, “I’m standing next to you. I’ll definitely protect you if there’s any danger!”

I can return to the Dark Moon after finishing this. Chen Rui hesitated a little, and he finally made a decision. After repeated splitting and dismantling, this high grade chain rune paragraph was finally extracted.

In an instant, Chen Rui felt his soul trembling. A vast and profound breath hit his face. In an instant, Chen Rui seemed to feel himself as small as dust. With his current strength, he didn’t have such inferior feeling even when facing a Demon Overlord.

Zola’s eyes were full of excited gleams. She quickly recorded, “This should…… contain a trace of Demi-God-level territory’s breath!”

Chen Rui was surprised when he heard her. A trace of Demi-God territory’s breath? So powerful? This is just a copied rune, not the original seal on the Sword of Fallen Angel!

So, the Sword of Fallen Angel is really sealed by a Demi-God powerhouse?

If I really master or comprehend the mystery of ancient runes, can I get a glimpse of the realm of the Demi-God level or even the God level that is above the Demon Overlord level?

Chen Rui felt that he had touched a taboo territory. Of course, from a certain perspective, “science” was originally an exploration of taboo territory.

Perhaps, this is the way to go beyond the peak in the future?

“The level of this chain paragraph is definitely more than 16 yuan. It should be 20 yuan rune!” Zola’s eyes flashed as she felt the power.

20 yuan rune? This is no ordinary danger! Chen Rui was taken aback, “Miss Zola, let’s stop now!”

“No! This is just a trace of territory power. I’m here… no problem!” Zola glanced at the many signs that swirled and undulated like stars, “I also can’t stop now…”

As soon as she finished speaking, purple thunder lights lit up all over the sky. Zola was already prepared earlier. A semicircle electric grid appeared beside her… protecting her and Chen Rui. One after another purple lightning hit the power grid. The power grid was constantly undulating and distorting as it absorbed and assimilated the lightning power. Because lightning power was too great, the speed of grid absorption was slightly unable to keep up. There was a danger of being torn at any time. Zola waved her hand which was holding a pen, and a blue light merged into the grid. The water element power was added to greatly enhance the absorption capacity of the grid. It finally stabilized.

Chen Rui felt numb on his scalp. This is unlike the usual experiment. If I am hit by these lightning, I will really turn into a ball of coke even with a special physique.

After Zola stabilized the power grid, she began to record, “Annihilation lightning, preliminary estimated power of 18 yuan strength with continuous frequency…”

The raging lightning gradually converged. There were several dangers following that. Even Zola almost made a mistake. Chen Rui repeatedly broke into a series of cold sweats. It was really playing a death game that messed with his heartbeat.

Zola was actually a little nervous, but seeing Chen Rui’s worried look, she calmed down a lot. She added, “What are you so worried about? I said that I will protect your safety. You hold the pen and help me record now…”

As soon as she finished speaking, an abnormal change suddenly occurred. The entire laboratory became a strange place. The surrounding space showed ripples and distortions. The protective shields that were placed around the 2 people beforehand by Zola began to gradually thin out and finally disappeared. Zola’s facial expression changed drastically. She blurted out, “20 yuan-level element swallowing? Oh no! There is also spirit power restraint!”

In an instant, Chen Rui felt that he had lost contact with the Super System. It was not that the Super System failed, but his own spirit power was restrained by the strange rule. Even the contact with his mind was blocked. He could not connect with the Super System. He was only left to the most basic physical power.

The fairy dragon was a natural magician, but her body strength was very weak. The element swallowing and spirit power restraint were equivalent to a magic-forbidden territory. It was the same as completely taking away the strongest weapon of the fairy dragon.

Immediately afterward, the distortion of space began to intensify. Even collapse and disorderly faults began to appear. Chen Rui hugged Zola without hesitation and avoided a fault beside her.

Zola only felt a strong masculine breath rushing toward her face. When she reacted, her body was already carried up and rose into the air.

How dare you hug me when I’m conscious?

(By the way, it seems that the last time I was hugged, I also pretended to be unconscious…)

Chen Rui went up and down several times, and he finally avoided the danger. Zola was about to struggle down from his arms and scold him, but she suddenly caught a glimpse of his shoulder. A bloodstain was expanding. The fault area just now was full of terrifying space slicing power. If it isn’t for this man to take me away, I’m afraid I would be cut into pieces…

He is even injured…

Zola felt that her heart suddenly became soft. It seems that this man’s embrace is quite warm. Why didn’t I realize this last time…

(Bah! I should be thinking about this chain of high grade rune. Spirit restraint, element swallowing, and this restraining + destructive space territory…)

Chen Rui didn’t even bother to explore these things. The surrounding space changed more and more drastically. Collapses, cracks, and whirlpools continued to appear. There were horrible death traps everywhere. He was like an unarmed soldier crossing over a minefield. If he did not watch out, he would be completely annihilated.

Isn’t it just an experiment? Why is it so tragic?

It seems that a certain lady even guaranteed my safety previously, but I need to protect this lady now!

What bad luck has been going on recently?

Since I fought with Obsidian and Broc, I have been unlucky. First, I was caught by Zola in the capital. Later, I learned the bad news that the Dark Moon is about to suffer a war disaster. I finally managed to convince Zola to finish the last paragraph. I can leave after I split it, but this damn situation appears now!

Now I can’t use Super System’s skills, teleportation, protective shield, and [Star Gate]. It seems that I can’t escape from this disaster!

No way! I cannot die here!

The Dark Moon is facing a huge crisis now, and Athena and the others are there. I must hurry back as soon as possible!

Although this 20 yuan high grade chain rune has the Demi-God level territory power, it will eventually decline. As long as I persist in this period of time, it will definitely get through it!

After making this determination, Chen Rui put away all the distractions and began to devote all his mind to the strange space full of destruction breath.

After dodging and moving, Chen Rui’s strength had been exerted to the extreme. He avoided danger again and again while hugging Zola, but the injuries on his body were also increasing.

“Let me down.” Zola finally couldn’t help but say again while biting her lip. This was the fourth time.

Without her as a burden, Chen Rui’s chances of surviving alone should be much greater. He should be able to survive the effective time of the restraining space safely.

“Stop chattering!” Chen Rui yelled as he flicked his feet to avoid another danger.

How dare you yell to me like this! Zola gritted her teeth secretly, and she clasped him tightly involuntarily.

Time passed by, but this territory still showed no signs of declining. Instead, it became stronger and stronger. It seemed to have signs of annihilating everything in it.

Under such high-intensity physical and mental pressure, Chen Rui’s movements gradually slowed down. If it weren’t for the passive attributes of his body which were still working, he would have fallen down in exhaustion.

In the state of being on the verge of collapse, Chen Rui’s state of mind seemed to have entered a strange and subtle state. For the first time, there was no assistance from the Super System, [Deep Analysis] and the solar system. There was only a realization completely derived from himself.

This space is not only a restraining force, but also a fatal destruction. It is a very pure destruction.

Chen Rui remembered feeling this kind of “destruction” vaguely somewhere. Yes, the silver box and Shura!

No! Not quite right! If that kind of destruction is like the ocean, the breath of the space in front of me is nothing more than a river.

No immortal existence can escape the destruction rule.

Life and death are originally the simplest and greatest truth in the universe.

Chen Rui suddenly felt a sense of enlightenment. Although the fairy dragon in his arms had lost her power, her vision of the Demon Overlord was still there. She immediately noticed that some subtle changes were taking place in Chen Rui.

The destruction power in this space was getting stronger and stronger. Even if he didn’t set foot in those dangerous areas, the terrifying destruction breath could still destroy the life in it. However, the fairy dragon had a kind of “illusion” that she and Chen Rui were safer than when they were dodging previously.

Chen Rui seems to have been assimilated by this destruction space. No, to be more precise, it is a mysterious breath in him that has assimilated this space.

How is this possible? Although it is just a trace of the Demi-God-level territory’s breath, it still contains a rule that only Demi-God-level can comprehend. This guy only barely reaches the power of Demon Emperor-level at best. How can he tolerate and even go beyond the Demi-God-level rule?

This feeling was getting stronger and stronger. Despite the chaos in the space, the 2 were just like bystanders, witnessing annihilation and death “outside the scene.”

The shaking and annihilating space gradually faded. The scene of the surrounding laboratory was restored. Chen Rui felt a strong exhaustion of spirit and physical strength. His footing was unstable as he slowly sat down on the ground.

Would Zola still let Chen Rui go alone after this disaster? Would she follow him back to the Dark Moon?

chapters.title: Chapter 380 - A Big “Accident”
chapters.body:
Chapter 380 - A Big “Accident”

Chen Rui felt the connection with the Super System again. Not only that, the Super System that was isolated just now seemed to undergo a strange change due to the fusion with a certain power after the connection was recovered. In the stars and galaxies, the plants on those planets had undergone corresponding changes. They evolved from the original swamp forest to a tall, dense forest that existed independently of the water source. More and more flowering plants appeared, replacing the original ferns and gymnosperms. The greens all over were full of vitality.

In the status bar of the Galaxy Divinity Temple, Megrez’s Experience Value had reached 100%. This gain was something Chen Rui hadn’t expected before. In fact, the most important factor for him to overcome the difficulties just now was the power of Shura he mastered during [Refined Mind]. He didn’t master Demi-God’s rule like the fairy dragon imagined, but the most basic understanding of the rule itself was already imprinted in his mind.

This is a basic law, but even the most basic one makes the territory, which has always felt that something is missing, finally reaches consummation. This also represents the consummation of Megrez. As long as I find a breakthrough threshold, I can reach the activation of the next Star Pulse, “Phecda”!

Chen Rui was looking forward to reaching the Phecda realm when a voice of dissatisfaction sounded in his arms, “Hey, how long are you going to hold me? Let me down now.”

This sound made Chen Rui startled. It turned out that he had been holding Zola subconsciously as if he had just been in the dangerous Demi-God space. If he was holding Athena or Kia, he wouldn’t let go. He would take advantage first. Even if it was Shea, he would tease her a bit, but he couldn’t afford to offend this “lady”.

Although Ms. Fairy Dragon was superior in appearance, the frightening [Compound Thunder] magic alone was enough to turn all the beautiful thoughts in his mind into coke, rice paste or jam.

It’s not that I’m uncomfortable that he is holding me, but because this guy is still in a daze holding me. Am I so unattractive?

“Wait! Don’t let go!” Just when Chen Rui was about to let her go, Ms. Fairy Dragon said nervously, “The chain runes paragraph is not over yet!”

Chen Rui saw that the paragraph hadn’t completely changed color. He was secretly surprised and stood up quickly.

“Rainbow Valley’s elements were all swallowed up by the space just now. It will take at least a few hours to recover. I can’t use magic now, and I can’t protect you, so you should protect me.” Thinking of her previous guarantee to ensure Chen Rui’s safety, yet she had to be protected by him now, Zola blushed a little.

However, after going through the events in the space just now, Ms. Fairy Dragon’s feeling toward Chen Rui had a new change. Perhaps it was called trust. It seemed that this man should definitely protect her. As for when her determination to find him to settle accounts after being yelled at the beginning, she seemed to have forgotten it.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to neglect, so he put his arms around Zola. He watched the surrounding changes vigilantly while guarding against dangerous situations that might arise at any time.

10 minutes passed and nothing happened.

Chen Rui and Zola both felt a little strange. Could it be that the Demi-God space devours nearby elements, so the chain runes can’t exert its power?

Chen Rui glanced at the chain runes. He found that it had completely turned into blue with a slight change in the intensity of the luster. This included the last paragraph that the 2 thought had not been activated. Then… all the chain runes have been completely activated?

At this moment, Chen Rui suddenly felt a little dizzy, and his vision became hazy. The strange thing was that the Super System did not lose connection. There was no prompt of toxic substances.

A fragrance in his nose gradually became rich. It seemed to come from the fairy dragon’s body. It smelled very pleasant. His body began to heat up, and his heart unexpectedly beat violently.

Zola’s state was also a bit abnormal. Her purple eyes behind the glasses were watery with some rare flattery. There were two blushes on her face, which made her look very beautiful.

Chen Rui clearly told himself that this woman was very unreliable. Moreover, she was the peak of Demon Overlord that even Paglio was fearful of. Plus, she was a blackhearted madwoman who always fake daze, but he subconsciously produced some kind of beautiful thoughts in his heart- This woman is beautiful and intellectual. She loves knowledge, and has a hidden side of empathy. These strange and beautiful thoughts had shielded many shortcomings of Ms. Fairy Dragon, leaving only the virtues.

The more they looked at each other, the more pleasing they seemed to the eyes. At the same time they felt each other’s heartbeat. For a while, their breathing became a little bit quicker, and a primordial instinct began to sprout, and it became stronger and stronger.

Zola’s spirit power was much stronger than Chen Rui, so she faintly felt something was wrong. Looking at the rune, the flashing and changing light seemed to combine into certain signs.

“I got it! The last rune means aphrodisiac and lust!” The fairy dragon blurted out. She felt the strange instinctive needs of her body and mind, “There is also mating!”

After all, Chen Rui had the experience of the [Refined Mind]. Under the inner struggle, he subconsciously bit the tip of his tongue.

The pain caused him to get rid of the bizarre feeling temporarily. He cleared his mind and found that he and Zola were lying on the ground with his hands supporting on the ground. He was in the pose…uh, the standard missionary position… between the male and female beds. The hard and solid part was pressed tightly against…

Fortunately, there was the last layer of thin trousers. It seemed that it was already wet…

They almost completed the mating process.

Chen Rui was having cold sweats. He wouldn’t even dream that he almost harassed the terrifying Ms. Fairy Dragon!

This is definitely an accident! What a big accident!

Before worse things happen, I better escape!

But after hearing the fairy dragon’s words, Chen Rui also understood- Aphrodisiac and mating? Damn, there is even such a rune! Is it for some kind of x-cold person (god?)?

Moreover, it seemed to have fully activated.

“Move away! If you dare to touch me, I’ll definitely slice and dice you!” The fairy dragon screamed, but she had an uncontrollable desire for this man in her heart.

It was not purely her body, but more of her mind.

In ten thousand years, the first suitable man she met. It was also a man she was interested in.

He has knowledge, wisdom, ability and knows how to take care of people. He can perform well in the laboratory and the kitchen. He is much better than ordinary dragons with inferior taste.

Perhaps her original good impression was just a little budding, but under the influence of runes, it was magnified infinitely.

Chen Rui took advantage of the awakened strength caused by the pain of biting the tip of his tongue, and he was about to get up. Suddenly, his neck tightened, and he was hugged by Zola. Then, her hot soft body was pressed against him. She turned over and pressed him down instead.

The women’s emotional friction and fiery breath made a certain part of the man even more excited.

Wait… didn’t she say that I will be sliced and diced if I touch her?

Who is touching who?

But Ms. Fairy Dragon was still threatening nonsensically, “If you dare to move, I will kill you!”

“Huh?”

What is this? A reverse push down?

“Stop moving!”

“……”

“…”

During the pulling and touching, the clothes of the 2 people quickly reduced.

The charming face, the white and slender body, the rich and round peaks, the delicate pink buds, the mysterious purple jungle… All kinds of sensory and tactile stimulation made Chen Rui’s reasoning ability to sink in the fire of desire.

The somewhat sober blood on the tip of his tongue turned into an aphrodisiac love potion in the passionate kissing and sucking. It was intertwined with gasping and moaning.

Before being completely lost in bewilderment, Chen Rui suddenly thought of a post he used to copy and paste back when he posted on the online forums – There has been no gangsters in this forum since ancient times. The gentlemen are lined up. There are occasional rape cases and crimes. The offender is also a female gangster.

Does this count as fulfilling a prophecy?

Dark Moon City.

The council hall of the palace.

Shea looked seriously at the war report she had just received. Confidants such as Sheriff Athena, Saiful Family Patriarch Ford, Representative Financial Official Old Gauss and imperial guards commander, Kaguron were sitting around her. They all had dignified faces.

“Tim’s surprise attack was successful.” Shea put down the report.

Tim was the new commander of the West Road Defence Army and the heir of the Saiful Family. Everyone was excited when they heard it, especially Old Saiful, he was very gratified. My son really doesn’t disappoint me. He earned some reputation for me.

The current situation of the Dark Moon was quite bad. It was facing the joint attack of the Red Spirit Estate and Blue Lava Estate. The Red Spirit Estate had suspended the food supply to the Dark Moon long ago. The vanguard forces led by Kanita had passed through Town Mordo from the north road to invade the Dark Moon area.

Kanita defeated a small group of defensive forces and advanced all the way with high-spirits. He was about to occupy the Town Dico in the north of Dark Moon to use as a base, but he didn’t expect to be ambushed by Tim before reaching Town Dico.

Among the intels controlled by Kanita, the main forces of the two armies garrison guard and imperial guards of the Dark Moon Estate were still in Dark Moon City. The newly-formed West Road garrison guard was just established for a short time and they were far away. He never expected that Tim led the army to travel a long distance and launched a surprise attack at night.

The West Road Army used the secret weapons manufactured by the Cloak Gang, such as the magic crossbow, bursting arrows and so on. The Medusa Elite Team that joined the army had more sophisticated equipment. All of them were masterpieces of the underground world tauren. Coupled with Medusa’s archery, they had caused Kanita’s troops to suffer heavy losses and collapse.

“Tim has done a good job. I have to take note of his contribution.” Shea’s face was more solemn. “But we should all know that this time the Red Spirit is just tentatively attacking. Even if Kanita is wiped out, we can’t celebrate too soon because the army behind is the real test we have to face. Athena, what do you think?”

Athena stood up poisedly and said, “I think Tim’s advantage lies in mobility and suddenness. If he is allowed to guard Town Dico and confront the next army of the Red Spirit face-on, it is equivalent to using his own shortcomings against the enemy’s advantage. It is absolutely undesirable. Tim should be allowed to continue to use his advantage to disrupt the enemy from behind and side.”

Shea nodded slightly, “Well said. Tim really shouldn’t stay in Town Dico. Let him leave with a force with the most mobile nature to disrupt the enemy.”

“Princess Royal” Old Ford said, “The 2 major estates are surrounding the Dark Moon this time. The enemy is strong and we are weak, and our military strength is limited. I’m afraid we can’t divide our forces against the enemy. Can we consider concentrating our forces to attack one side? We can use delaying tactics for the other side.”

Old Gauss also put forward his own opinion, “What Sir Ford said is correct, but it is very difficult to implement. The enemy will not let us do as we want. I’m afraid that we will lose sight of one another and be attacked all around by then.”

“Then let’s continue to pay close attention to the Red Spirit movement. Be ready to fight with the army at any time.” Shea pondered, “The Blue Lava in the south has not moved yet. After the Blue Lava’s trafficking incident was exposed, I built a secret fortification in Town Soto. It should probably be able to hold the enemy for a while, but not too long. I need someone who can manage to delay Blue Lava’s pace now, but this task is quite dangerous…”

As Shea said, she turned her gaze on Athena. Her intention was evident. Athena was a brave lady. She immediately stood up without thinking, “I’m willing to lead a team to Town Soto to complete this task.”

“Okay! Athena, it’s up to you this time. Ford, you have to pay more attention to the movements of the families in the city, especially the Mellon Family. If there is a change, immediately take measures to directly control it. We can’t let problems occur on our own side.”

Old Ford hurriedly got up to receive the order. Shea nodded, “Then, we shall end today’s meeting. Athena, you stay. I have something to instruct you alone.”

After everyone left, only Shea and Athena remained in the council hall.

“Athena,” Shea stood up and stood side by side with Athena. “Is he… back?”

Athena shook her head, “Not yet. If he comes back, he will definitely come to the palace to meet Princess Royal as soon as possible.”

Shea glanced at her, “I received news that a certain human in the capital has probably died 2 months ago.”

“I don’t know about the one in the capital, but our human is definitely not dead.” Athena replied with certainty. Dodo and Chen Rui had a master-servant contract. Now the slime was still alive and vibrant, while the other servant, Tim, had made great contributions, so the master, Chen Rui, must be fine.

A listener might perceive an unintended meaning in what was said. When Shea heard, “our human”, her heart pounded sensitively. She said calmly, “I hope he is safe, but in this critical situation, it is better that he does not come back.”

“He will definitely come back, and he will definitely help Princess Royal to solve the crisis.” Athena showed a firm expression. As she and Kia were here, perhaps also because Shea and her sister were also here, that man would definitely come back.

Shea sighed, “I know he is very intelligent, or he has some abilities that I can’t imagine, but it is useless for him to come back this time…”

Athena didn’t say much. She was very clear about Chen Rui’s power. Even in the weakest area of the Dark Moon, personal strength, Paglio alone would be enough to defeat the 2 lords. However, without Chen Rui’s permission, she would not disclose some things to anyone including Alice.

“Look at this intel first.” Shea handed over a note.

Athena looked at it, and she was finally emotional.
