“I’m asking you to stay this time because I have a special important task to give you. You must swear in the name of the Wales Family and faithfully implement my orders. You must not disobey or disclose this task to anyone in advance.”

Athena took the oath with a solemn expression. Shea gently said a few words in her ear before taking out an envelope to hand it to her.

“Princess Royal, no, I…”

“You have to do this. Don’t forget your vow. Now, hurry up and prepare.”

Athena left the palace with a heavy heart. She shouted in her heart, What should I do? Chen Rui, where are you? Come back!

Meanwhile, he was being “raped” by another woman…

chapters.title: Chapter 381 - Papapa” And Upgrades?
chapters.body:
Chapter 381 - Papapa” And Upgrades?

Rainbow Valley, laboratory.

The man and woman lingering in passion still continued.

Up to now, who was above, who was below, were not allowed to move… Ms. Fairy Dragon couldn’t be bothered about that long ago. The high erotic desire made the initial pain and discomfort disappeared. At present, she had a kind of wonderful feeling.

Well, to be honest, it should be a pleasure feeling.

Chen Rui had a special physique in certain aspect that was comparable to that of the dragon. If it was another woman, even Athena would not be able to withstand the long-lasting “battle” for the first time.

(His first time with Her Majesty Empress in the Silent Night Wetland was a protracted battle because of the lust suppressed by the Nirvana power.)

However, Zola was a dragon. She possessed a continuous combat ability far superior to ordinary demons. Besides, the physique of the fairy dragon was somewhat special. Gradually, Ms. Fairy Dragon felt more and more joy from it.

The power of runes finally began to fade. Zola’s mind, which had been blinded by lust, also regained consciousness.

However, even if her mind was a little awakened, the joy of the soul and the flesh made her had an unprecedented feeling of not being able to extricate herself.

Chen Rui was still immersed in it. He was happily performing the most intense action. When his nerves were constantly being refreshed by successive pleasures, he also gave waves of climaxes to Ms. Fairy Dragon who was under him.

But his current feeling was not just the most primitive pleasure, but a truly strange feeling.

Half of his consciousness was immersed in the passionate collision with the fairy dragon, while the other half was uncontrollably integrated into the Super System.

In the Super System, the entire galaxies were covered with a bizarre veil at some point of time. It was like an unknown mist in the universe.

Among them, a blue planet faintly emitted a strange light. Although this light was not as hot and dazzling as the “sun” in it, it had another kind of magnificence and charm as if it was breeding something.

After a long time, the magnificent light became brighter. The mist in the entire solar system gradually became thinner as if a certain special energy had been concentrated.

In reality, Chen Rui’s body and emotions had reached the critical point. His frequency of movements had reached an unprecedented high speed. Although the fairy dragon had basically recovered her consciousness, she still clasped his neck in intense pleasure, while moaning uncontrollably and loudly.

The mist completely disappeared. The light on the blue planet suddenly blazed, spreading almost to every corner of the solar system. In an instant, even the hot radiance of the sun was covered.

At the same time, Chen Rui’s desires had been completely vented. His mind had completely recovered from his half-awakened state.

After experiencing several orgasms, Zola took on this last wave of shock and slumped softly on the ground. Her snow-white skin was ravaged with red marks. Her face was full of blush after the extreme excitement. She just let Chen Rui press on top of her; she felt that she didn’t even have the strength to move a finger.

The intensity and time of the fierce battle between Chen Rui and Zola was enough to humiliate any strong and burly demons in the Demon Realm. Although Zola had a dragon physique, it was her first battle after all. Moreover, the man’s power was too strong. In addition to the physique comparable to the dragon, there was [Astral Form]’s cheating attribute of restoring stamina. Even Ms. Zola couldn’t bear it.

The strange thing was that, by right, the 2 of them had been lingering for such a long time. Chen Rui should be extremely exhausted to the point of losing all his strength too. However, he felt that his body was filled with a new and powerful force. His whole person seemed to undergo some kind of qualitative transformation. He seemed full of energy.

(It should be okay to have more rounds…)

Chen Rui knew that it must be related to the passionate lingering that happened just now, but he had no time to study the Super System and the newly acquired power. What he had to face was Ms. Fairy Dragon after being “screwed”.

He never even dreamed that he would screw Zola! Especially in this situation.

No matter how Zola insisted on extracting these high grade rune paragraphs at the beginning; how she guaranteed to ensure that nothing will happen; whether it is caused by the power of runes or not; whether she was on top at first… Uh, this seems to be changed soon… No matter how unexpected it is, it has now become a fact that I had sex with her.

When Chen Rui’s gaze met Zola’s murderous gaze, he shuddered and quickly got up. He took out a pair of trousers and hurriedly put them on.

Escape?

Zola was not a little sheep who would follow him loyally after being fucked. The 6 yuan mark was only a countdown now. It had not been eliminated. Also, it was unknown if he had any other marks besides the six yuan mark.

If I escape to the Dark Moon, I’m afraid that the entire estate will be uprooted by the angry fairy dragon. In other words, with Zola’s personality, even if I, Arthur, escape to the human world, I will also be chased and killed to the last bit.

Unless… I do another cheating crossover…

What should I do?

Zola really wanted to kill him now. Damn experiment! Damn rune paragraphs! And that… damn man!

(The most hateful thing is that he still shows such aggrieved eyes! You know, it’s me who suffers loss!)

By the way, since I have been taken advantage of by this man, I must tear him into pieces! (This reaction seemed to be slower than the previous one)

(I don’t have any strength anymore, but my element power has returned, so I must take him… take him…)

For some reason, Zola reminiscenced the scene in the destruction territory where the man whose entire body was bleeding still refused to abandon her. For some reason, the warm feeling diluted her killing intent. Then the lingering nakedness of the two and the kind of pleasure that she had never been experienced once again came to mind. She felt more shy than anger in her heart.

“Ms. Zola.” After the man put a thin blanket on her, he suddenly made up his mind and made a strange posture.

This posture is a bit familiar. It is actually the etiquette of the dragons. It is even… the etiquette of courtship!

(It turns out that this guy knew my identity long ago! But he shouldn’t be a dragon…)

Chen Rui learned this etiquette from the bored Paglio when he was in Blue Lake. Unexpectedly, it would come in handy one day and the subject would even be Zola.

“What happened just now… is only an accident, but it is only slightly bringing forward our future. Miss is beautiful and full of wisdom. No flashy words can express my love for miss…”

The Dark Moon was facing an urgent need, so he must rush back now, but this kind of accident actually happened. Chen Rui could only stabilize Ms. Fairy Dragon by comforting her. After solving the Dark Moon’s crisis, he would use skilled and fine efforts to settle her. Although she was very unreliable in various aspects, she was his own woman after all.

Speaking of this… After personally turning her into a real woman just now, we were immersed in the wonderful blending. At that moment, it seemed that we had forgotten the coke, rice paste, jam and so on… I have to admit that a man’s certain sense of responsibility… Uh, it’s actually possessive, is quite strong. It can definitely be described by the 5 words “driven by strong sexual urge.”

Excluding some shortcomings, Zola’s charm is still quite tempting. Her beauty alone is enough to compare with Catherine.

Moreover, Paglio is still trapped by the seal of ancient runes. If I can form the closest companion with Zola, then I can also resolve the grievances between the poison dragon and the fairy dragon… Consider this as sacrificing myself for this damn “friend”…

In the face of Chen Rui’s sweet words, Zola’s gaze was still sharp, but she felt quite comfortable in her heart. Hmph, although this guy may not be telling the truth, it sounds barely good…

“As a man who sincerely admires Miss, I don’t want to deceive your feelings. I must say that I already have a wife.”

Chen Rui’s words made Zola’s eyes widened instantly. Bastard! Since you already have a wife, you still… Damn it!

“My woman is in great danger now, so I must rush to save her as soon as possible. It’s like… even if I risk risking my life, I still didn’t want to give up on you in space previously…” Chen Rui’s mind turned quickly. He immediately connected it with what happened not long ago.

Sure enough, Zola’s eyes eased a bit. Chen Rui saw a chance, so he immediately added, “If it happens again, I will do that without hesitation.”

Zola thought of his roar, his blood , that warm embrace in his wide and secure chest, and her tight heart finally began to soften.

Although the life of a dragon was very long, not every female dragon would meet such a man who was willing to sacrifice his life for her. Perhaps, she would never meet one in her lifetime.

In the stories circulated by the dragons, there were many warning stories about dragons whose feelings were being deceived. Some were even killed to snatch their wealth.

“Due to some special reason, my life may reach tens of thousands of years. I will always be with you, protect you, love you, and make you the happiest woman in the world. If you are willing to accept my feelings… then please accept the most precious gift I can give.”

Tens of thousands of years of life? Zola was taken aback. It seemed that he met some of the original inadequate conditions. When her gaze fell on the gift Chen Rui took out, it instantly fixated. Those were the last 4 blocks of ancient runes slab she lost!

It turns out this cunning bastard has been deceiving me! Those stone slabs are all in his hands!

With these 4 stone slabs, the basic yuan rune signs of the ancient runes are complete. Many rune paragraphs that I couldn’t understand previously can all be solved. This has a great significance for future research!

The question is, where did these stone slabs come from?

Chen Rui seemed to see through her doubts, “I stole these stone slabs from the crystal dragon Jacob with some tricks. A friend of mine made him seriously injured. Even his dragon scales fell into my hands. Now that I know that he is your enemy, I will definitely help you kill him if I have a chance in the future.”

Zola watched Chen Rui take out a few fragments of translucent dragon scales. At a glance, she recognized the scales of her enemy, Jacob. Judging from the location of the scales and the degree of damage, Jacob must have suffered a lot.

“Ms. Zola, I sincerely ask you to accept my gift and be my wife, okay?”

Although the dragons had an unimaginable pursuit of wealth, this kind of courtship etiquette gift couldn’t be casually accepted. Once accepted, it meant accepting the other party.

When Chen Rui saw that she didn’t speak, she knew that she had no energy to speak, “If you are willing, please blink.”

Zola stared at him with her purple eyes without blinking.

(Hmph! These are originally my things. They can’t be regarded as proposal gifts!)

(Why don’t you change another one? For example… a ring studded with gems?)

Subconsciously, Zola had already taken the role of a person being courted.

Chen Rui didn’t know [Mind Reading]. How could he understand the contradictory psychology of a woman? He felt a little anxious when she didn’t blink. Taking advantage of the rare soft-heartedness of this black hearted lady, if I can’t make use of the opportunity to get it done, I have to get ready to run for my life.

Chen Rui shifted his mind and changed his method, “Zola, if you are not willing, please blink.”

Zola? It was the first time Ms. Fairy Dragon heard him remove the polite title. There was a strange sweet feeling in her heart. Seeing Chen Rui’s worried expression, lest she refuse, she finally resisted the urge to blink. She just stared at him indifferently.

(I have been lonely for so many years. I just found this man who barely meets the requirements. I should just make do with it…)

Chen Rui finally let out a sigh of relief when she saw that she finally didn’t blink. He remembered that Paglio seemed to say that after he succeeded in the pursuing etiquette, he needed to kiss the woman…

Chen Rui courageously approached Zola. Zola knew what he was going to do. Suddenly, she couldn’t help being nervous. Both seemed to have forgotten that they had a “deeper” contact than kissing just now.

Finally, their lips touched together. In an instant, the strange sensation spread quickly from the contact surface to the whole body. They were actually in a completely conscious state.

The soft kiss gradually became an entanglement of lips and tongue. Chen Rui keenly felt her fierce heartbeat and the joy in the shyness. It turns out that Ms. Fairy Dragon is not very disgusted with me? Besides, there is a little… liking?

Not just because of the accident just now?

Not just because of the irresistible gift?

Not just……

(Nonsense. If I want to be disgusted, you would have been wiped out!)

Chen Rui suddenly recalled some details of the past, including the last time when Ms. Fairy Dragon was inexplicably angry. He suddenly understood something.

It turns out that she really likes me.

Anyway, coming to this point, those who dares to take huge risks will have great returns!

Women all have the “talent attributes” of ever changing, especially this woman. I better do it all at once to avoid endless troubles. Otherwise, it will bring inexplicable disasters to the Dark Moon.

Chen Rui was determined. He daringly lifted the blanket on Zola’s body gently and grasped a snowy white round object that couldn’t be covered with one hand. Zola’s complexion was even more reddish. Her body trembled lightly, but she did not cast magic to resist it. In fact, she was not as weak as she seemed to be. She had long been able to use elements.

With this acquiescence, Chen Rui became more and more daring. His hands moved down, sliding into the muddy purple forest that had been ravaged previously…

Soon after, a certain strong part regained its vitality, enjoying the wonderful feeling of being squeezed and wrapped tightly.

Compared with the previous madness and fierceness, the man’s movements were obviously much gentler and careful. With the high level of physical and mental pleasure, Ms. Fairy Dragon’s moan sounded again. Her vision also became blurred.

This time, there were no external stimuli such as ancient runes or aphrodisiac drugs. There were only the men and women who truly merged their mind and body under the condition of mutual consent.

Chen Rui really “worked hard” 😫. He had to “sacrifice” himself for the greater good…

chapters.title: Chapter 382 - Faith
chapters.body:
Chapter 382 - Faith

Compared with the previous long-term intensive battle, Chen Rui’s lingering time with Zola was much shorter this time. However, that feeling was by no means comparable to the subconscious state previously.

The way Zola looked at Chen Rui was different now. It was full of a rare kind of… gentleness? Yes, it was really gentle.

Rainbow Valley, which was once hell-like, had become a gentle home.

If it were normal days, Chen Rui would definitely stay with her, but the Dark Moon’s situation was urgent now, so Chen Rui couldn’t stay here.

“Sorry, Zola. At least for 1 month. At most 3 months. I will definitely come back. There are many things that I will tell you in detail by then. You wait for me to come back, okay?”

Zola really didn’t even have the strength to nod, but Chen Rui read the answer from her eyes sharply. He nodded in satisfaction, kissed her on the forehead, carried her to the bed, and covered her with a quilt. He then left the Rainbow Valley.

(This damn man really left… but my heart is at ease as if I something that supports me…)

(It’s a bit strange.. It seems that the communication with elements has become more refined. Could it be that doing this kind of thing will increase my strength? It seems that I need to research this properly. Also those stone slabs, I finally got them all…)

(Oh no, let’s think about those later. I’m exhausted now; I just want to sleep…)

(1 month. You must not lie to me. Otherwise, I’ll catch you back even if I have to find you till the end of the Dead Sea!)

Chen Rui left the Rainbow Valley. Under the influence of that newly acquired powerful force, he was full of energy instead of exhausted.

In fact, his original intention just now was to stabilize Zola with gentle means. Otherwise, if this unreliable dragon lady flared up, perhaps even the entire Dark Moon would be turned over. Even the Earth Elemental King and Paglio would be buried in the end. Based on the current situation, this handsome wolf strategy [1]… the handsome man strategy was still successful.

No wonder Sir Freud [2] had a famous remark – Sexual desire is the source of all human achievements.

But I also seem to remember that the sir later died of oral cancer.

(…)

By the way, Sister Zhang Ailing [3] seems to have also said – The way to a woman’s heart is through the mating road…

This was definitely a powerful saying that required harmonization. But at the moment when the 2 of them were completely intertwined just now, Chen Rui did feel Zola’s heart. It was a hidden or depressed emotion. It was not only toward him, but also to herself. For thousands of years, she had been alone. Perhaps the crazy experiments were just the habit of enjoying loneliness.

That kind of rare gentleness, which was unintentionally revealed, made people intoxicated. It was as if the stronger the wine, the sweeter it was.

(Regardless of fake daze, blackhearted or unreliable, she is a woman after all, my woman. I will have plenty of time to taste this bottle of wine in the future. The first priority at the moment is to rush back to the Dark Moon where my favorite women and most trusted friends are.)

Chen Rui managed to find a griffin. He flew at full speed in the direction of the Dark Moon.

Along the way, he finally had the free time to calm down, so he entered the Super System to examine the “windfall” this time.

In the Super System, the strange mist of the galaxies had disappeared. The tranquility of the past had been restored. However, as the owner of the Super System and the controller of the entire galaxy system, Chen Rui instinctively felt that this galaxy system was different from the previous one.

His gaze fell on the blue planet that once radiated dazzling light. His consciousness instantly enveloped the entire planet, including oceans, land, mountains, rivers, and forests… Oh, those are animals. There are even… humans?!

Humans who were exactly the same as the earth, but the civilization was still quite undeveloped.

Chen Rui looked surprised. From the void of space to the desolate solar system, to the evolution of oceans and plants. This Super System finally imitated higher creatures such as animals and humans now. It’s not imitating, this feeling… should be real life.

A life with own thoughts and independent consciousness. It is not walking dead who are controlled.

Chen Rui didn’t know what this meant, but in any case, the appearance of higher life represented a qualitative change. In other words, the evolution of star level.

His consciousness returned to the Galaxy Divinity Temple. Sure enough, in the light screen of the status bar, the light ball of the 3D human body became 5. Apart from the original white “Alkaid”, yellow “Mizar”, blue “Alioth”, and red “Megrez”, there was an extra purple “Phecda”.

Phecda!

Title: Star Lord, Evolution Level: 5-star, Experience Value: 0%

Aura Value: 154.8 million, Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A-

Chen Rui almost burst into tears. This isn’t easy. Including the training time in the training ground, there are more than 100 chapters since the last 4-star evolution… Well, more than 100 years.

That Megrez is really deceptive! After comprehending for so long, I have learned all the powers of Shura, territory, and destruction. In the end, I found a breakthrough while “mating”. I finally reached the 5-star evolution in one fell swoop.

However, this huge gain is really exciting. The reason for the breakthrough may be the stimulation of some mysterious power of the ancient runes. Perhaps it was due to the understanding of the basic law. Perhaps it could be Zola’s physique. Maybe it was also related to the mental involvement during sex.

Anyway, I finally “upgraded”.

Chen Rui habitually checked the 5-star skill tree first.

This time, there were 4 more skills.

[Dual Training] (passive trait)- the training of both soul and life; mental and physical training effect bonus; skill power bonus; bonus effect was proportional to realm. Another note was that there would be special effects at certain times.

At first glance, this [Dual Training] seemed like a very wretched “sex” skill such as “Dong Xuan Zi” and “The Imperial Girl” [4]. It turned out to be similar to the method of dual training of soul and life in the neidan training of China’s Taoism. Generally speaking, the closer the power to its peak, the harder it was to improve. This feature could speed up the training effect and enhance the power of the skill. It was indeed a pretty awesome feature.

[Star Diversion] (active skill)- redirect all the opponent’s attack skills. The duration was 10 seconds, and the use was limited to once per hour. Each usage would consume 1000 aura.

This skill reminded people of the unique skill “Star Shifting” of the Murong family in Jin Yong’s [5] martial arts novels. However, Star Shifting leveraged the strength and shifted the attack power back to the opponent itself. The effect of [Star Diversion] was closer to the “secretly substitute one for another” written by Gu Long [6]. Although only 10 seconds, there was definitely an unexpected miraculous effect for some big moves.

[Flying] (active skill)- Flying skill; able to freely change speed and movement in the air… 10 points aura per minute. It still had a “Sonic Boom” stunt. Able to fly at high speed instantly. Cost 3000 aura. Limited to 2 times per hour.

[Royal Star Transformation] (active skill)- Powerful combat form transformation with time limit. The specific form was unknown. Need to consume 100,000 aura and 1000 faith crystal.

Transformation? The specific form is unknown? Could it be Ultraman? Judging from the introduction, this should be the strongest battle skill of the 5-star Star Lord.

Chen Rui noticed that in addition to the aura consumption value, there was also a “faith crystal”.

He suddenly remembered… Zola once said that God powerhouse’s territory is different from that of Demon Overlord and Demon Emperor. It is not only the use of the natural power of the world to construct the scene, but the existence of life. It is called [Kingdom of God].

Compared with the devotion power of the believers in the Demon Realm and human world, the faith power in [Kingdom of God] is the most basic source of power for god. Otherwise, once the devotion power in the outside world is lost, wouldn’t god lose his power and become a mortal?

Faith crystal… It should be related to the faith power.

Then, according to this theory, planet… life… isn’t the entire Super System itself a God’s Kingdom? Then I’m the God’s Kingdom’s…God?

Chen Rui then shook his head. Impossible. I am still some light years apart from God’s power… Besides, this is not just a country-like territory, but a real galaxy system— The deceptive system… Uh, Super System which caused me to crossover to another world. It is originally a mysterious and special evolution system. I should not be able to mechanically apply the concept of this world.

However, the “faith crystal” was really intriguing.

In addition to the 4 newly acquired skills, the original “[Analytical Eyes]” had evolved to become [True Analytical Eyes].

When looking at the mount griffin with [Analytical Eyes], it showed – Race: Griffin.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: E+ (E+).

Physique: E, Strength: E, Spirit: E-, Agility: E+.

Analysis: Wind attributes.

E+ was the current strength. The real strength predicted in parentheses… The final wind attribute showed that [True Analytical Eyes] had additional analysis and judgment functions. It could accurately locate the opponent’s true strength. This was the final state of the [Analytical Eyes].

[Aura Blade] also reached the final skill of the “True System”.

[True Aura Blade]- Star Power attack skill. His palm was specially strengthened like a sharp blade… When using it, there was a chance to launch the “weakening aura” attribute to weaken or ignore the opponent’s defense power. It could directly attack the soul state. Cost 1000 aura per minute with no time limit.

There was also [True Destructive Aura Blow], an aoe skill. All hostile creatures within a radius of 30 meters would be instantly slashed by the high-speed sword qi. It required 1000 aura. Could choose to exclude a target. It was limited to 1 time per hour.

The [True Aura Blade] that could ignore the defense was also lethal to the soul or mental form. Besides, the time limit was removed. Even the accompanying [Destructive Aura Blow] had also been upgraded, and the range of group attacks had been greatly increased. Moreover, he could also choose the target that he didn’t want to harm. It was quite intelligent.

Other than the 2 evolved ultimate skills, some other skills had been upgraded and adjusted. The star point of the [Star Gate] had been increased to 2.The effective time of star point had been increased to 3 months.

After launching [Scorching Dragon Possession], the recovery time was shortened to 6 hours. Furthermore, the skills could still be used during the “cooling period”. It was much better than the previous restrictions.

Although [Galaxy Territory] did not evolve into [True Galaxy Territory], the effect of strengthening himself and weakening the enemy rose to 50%. This special territory skill that could be launched regardless of the territory restrictions of the other party, plus [Scorching Dragon Possession] was his biggest reliance when battling with higher power levels.

In addition to [Galaxy Territory], Chen Rui’s own comprehension of [Autumn Territory] in the Demi-God space had reached a perfect state. Its power was completely different from previously.

Inspired by the use of Nirvana to heal and strengthen Isabella during the battle with Broc, he also had a vision of comprehending the buffing territory, but the time was too tight at the moment, so it was just a vision.

After upgrading from Megrez to Phecda, the consumption of aura by skill had increased 10 times or more than before. If it was in the past, it was not of practical use. However, Chen Rui now had the aura provided by Galaxy Garden and Aura Tower. His Aura Value had reached hundreds of millions… and it did not include the 100 million aura that was consumed by the previous evolution to 5-stars. This skill consumption was definitely not a problem.

[Aura Conversion] was more often used for other miraculous effects. For example, convert and make the Prison 13 shackles, which was able to imprison Demon Overlords, disappear.

Chen Rui left the skill tree. His consciousness entered the building light screen. Sure enough, a new tower-shaped model was added.

Tower of Faith.

Activation condition: 10000 Aura.

Function: Collect the devotion and beliefs of living beings and convert them into faith crystals. When the power of faith in a certain area met the requirements, it would automatically build a Pillar of Faith. The value of faith would be doubled.

Chen Rui immediately confirmed building the construction without thinking. A huge tower-shaped building appeared in the Galaxy Divinity Temple. When his mind moved to the Tower of Faith, a prompt appeared.

Tower of Faith currently automatically generates 1 faith crystal every day. The amount can increase as the faith level increases. Current power of faith: 0. Current faith crystal: 0 (1 power of faith can be converted into 1 crystal)

The source of faith- Not entered.

Faith crystal—— Current quantity: 0

Pillar of Faith: can concentrate and increase the power of faith of all lives within the effective range, and transform it into a faith crystal. It can be automatically built when the power of faith in a certain area meets the requirements. Current quantity: 0

The Pillar of Faith was required to gather the power of faith. Although it could be built automatically, there must always be the first pillar as a foundation. Chen Rui had searched for a long time, but he had not found how to build the Pillar of Faith… He turned his attention to the source of faith again. Faith refers to the ideas and doctrines of sages, the belief and respect in gods, the fear of ghosts, monsters, demons or natural phenomena, as well as regarding it as one’s own code of conduct.

The source of faith was equivalent to standards such as world outlook, values, and outlook on life. What provided faith was a truly thoughtful and conscious “human” rather than a digitized walking dead.

At this time, a voice sounded in his heart. “Enter killing, lust, fear, and so on into the source of faith… The dark side of human nature will be infinitely magnified. You will have countless fanatics. At the same time, you will gain a huge amount of power of faith.”

It’s Shura.

Sure enough… even after the 5-star evolution, Shura still had not disappeared. It was still tempting him further. The current human civilization on the blue planet was still extremely undeveloped. It was like a blank piece of paper. Once Chen Rui really did this, the blue planet would become a real world of [Refined Mind] Illusion state full of darkness and desire.

But, Shura was right. All he needed was faith crystals. Compared with persuading others to do good, it was much easier to induce evil because good required more self-restraint.

“Don’t deny the darkness. Aren’t you like this yourself? Look at yourself. You are greedy for beauty, insidious and cunning, bloodthirsty and ruthless… Did you rely on the so-called fake goodness to survive until now and gain the current power? Human nature is inherently selfish. Even if you give some hypocritical and useless kindness now, one day they will show their cruel, cold-blooded and depraved true colors! Why not give them a true world?”

During [Refined Mind], Shura once showed Chen Rui scenes of darkness and ugliness in the original world. The root of all these were human selfishness.

Chen Rui thought about it seriously. He had to admit that what Shura said really made sense.

Chen Rui’s own hands were also stained with blood. There are many conspiracy schemes. Not to mention “greed for beauty” – Athena, Kia, Catherine, Shea, and even Zola now. With the increase of power, his desire increased. Once he couldn’t hold his own mind, he might become a real demon.

If I am already like this, why should I influence the beliefs of others?

He suddenly thought of a classic line from “The Return of the King” in the fantasy fiction, “Lord of the Rings”.

Facing the countless army of Modo, Aragorn said this – Sons of Gondor! Of Rohan! My brothers!

I see in your eyes the same fear that would take the heart of me.

A day may come when the courage of Men fails, when we forsake our friends, and break all bonds of fellowship, but it is not this day.

An hour of wolves and shattered shields when the Age of Men comes crashing down, but it is not this day!

This day we fight! By all that you hold dear on this good earth, I bid you stand, Men of the West!

Chen Rui took a deep breath. A day may come when Men or some of their offspring will worship power and money, corrupt, and degenerate, but it is not this day.

Perhaps one day, the people will become more and more cold-blooded, shattering love and ethics due to certain circumstances and influences, but it is not this day!

There are some things that a great man does, and some he’ll never do.

No matter how harsh is the reality, people should always have something persistent in their hearts.

With this kind of persistence, one can look up to the light even in the darkness full of despair.

If there is no such persistence, even under the sun, there will only be a haze in the eyes.

Human nature is selfish.

However, we cannot let selfishness influence human nature.

The dark side cannot be denied, and so is the light.

It’s not just for the so-called fake goodness or “Saint”, but it’s “selfishly” for the little dedication that I had when I almost fell and collapsed in the dark back then.

In other words, this is faith.

Chen Rui’s gaze became more resolute. He felt Shura’s temptation voice getting smaller and smaller. It finally disappeared without a trace. His hand glowed a strange light as he reached out to the Tower of Faith.

[1] Wolf is used to describe a person as cunning or perverted.

[2] Austrian neurologist and the founder of psychoanalysis.

[3] Chinese writer on love stories.

[4] Ancient sex education books.

[5] Famous Chinese martial arts novelist.

[6] Famous Chinese martial arts novelist.

What would Chen Rui enter for the source of faith?

chapters.title: Chapter 383 - Shea’S Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 383 - Shea’S Decision

Chen Rui was not a noble philosopher, great thinker, or religious maniac who could create a set of faith teachings. However, he was a crossover with the memory and knowledge of the previous life.

Confucius once said – If you guide them with policies and align them with punishments, the people will evade punishments, but they will have no shame. Guide them with virtue and align them with propriety, then the people will have a sense of shame and fulfill their roles.

Penalties could only prevent people from committing crimes, but it couldn’t make people understand that committing crimes were shameful. Meanwhile, moral education was much better than punishment. The same was true for faith. The fear of god and punishment could only passively curb people’s behavior. However, through a spiritual belief in morality and ethics, people would know why they shouldn’t do it and consciously adjust their own behavior.

10 words appeared in the source of faith.

Benevolence, righteousness, etiquette, wisdom, trust, loyalty, filial piety, integrity, shame and courage.

Benevolence- humanity, loving, kindness.

Righteousness- righteousness, justice, equity, impartiality, fairness.

Etiquette- courtesy, manners, modesty, rites, rituals, boundary, respect for others.

Wisdom- intelligence, wisdom, wit.

Trust- honesty, trustworthy, and credibility.

Loyalty- faithful, patriotic, considerate, loyalty to faith and duty.

Filial piety- filial intention, honor parents, respect for the elderly and the virtuous.

Integrity- clean handed, incorrupt, upright and pure.

Shame- a sense of guilt, know how to be ashamed, acknowledge and correct mistakes

Courage- bravery, persistence, fortitude.

In Chen Rui’s understanding, the reason why the Chinese descendants had overcome the suffering, frustration and even the crisis of life and death step by step all the way to the present, was none other than these cultural cores deeply rooted in their blood.

Get rid of the dross used by the ruling class to imprison ideas and consolidate rule. The true Confucian essence, perhaps as the name suggests, was “Human needs” [1].

What human nature needed.

Perhaps everyone had this kind of world and faith in their hearts, but the choices made in reality were different.

Chen Rui’s knowledge was limited after all. He was just an ordinary person and not a perfect saint. He didn’t know whether this choice was right or wrong. He also wouldn’t know what it would be like in the future.

He did not expect to establish a so-called ideal kingdom. These humans had independent consciousness. Furthermore, there would be disputes wherever people existed. In the future, there would be believers who believe in killing and desire. Some things couldn’t be avoided. Light had always coexisted with darkness.

It was impossible to have everything as one wished, but just have a clear conscience.

After these 10 characters entered the source of faith, they began to emit a strange light. 10 kinds of strange totems and symbols appeared on the Tower of Faith, emitting a strange light. On the blue planet, a strange totem pole appeared. Many humans began to kneel and pray.

The faith power on the Pillar of Faith began to change, 1, 2, 10, 20…

Some had faith in just one word. Some had faith in two. Correspondingly, the totem on the Galaxy Divinity Temple of the Tower of Faith was also glowing. When the accumulation reached a certain level, the Tower of Faith would give back a certain amount of power to the Pillar of Faith on the planet. Perhaps it could be called “miracles.”

The conditions for Royal Star Change were 100,000 aura and 1000 faith crystals. Judging from this consumption, it should be an unprecedented powerful move, but with the current progress, perhaps he couldn’t test it at the moment.

After Chen Rui established the Pillar of Faith, he was already near the boundary of the Dark Moon. To be cautious, he got off the griffin and changed to walking.

While passing through Town Dico in the northern part of the Dark Moon, Chen Rui found that this place was completely occupied by the Red Spirit army. Judging from the distribution and estimation of the barrack, there were about 80,000-90,000 people. It seemed to be the location of the Red Spirit’s main force.

The Blue Lava Estate dispatched no less troops than the Red Spirit Estate this time. The Dark Moon’s military strength was far less rapid than the economic development due to various restrictions. The total number of garrison guards and imperial guards after reformation and expansion were less than 40,000 people. They were at absolute disadvantage. Chen Rui didn’t know that Tim’s West Road defense forces had become the West Road defense army. However, due to the short time of army formation, the main force was still the original defense forces. The army forces that were able to fight was less than 10,000.

In terms of numbers, 50,000 people facing nearly 200,000 enemies. Moreover, the disadvantage of combat power was very obvious. Almost no one was optimistic about the Dark Moon. They all believed that the Dark Moon would undoubtedly lose. Many merchants had withdrawn all their investments and assets in the Dark Moon. One after another personnel including some families fled away from the Dark Moon.

In this war of this world, the power of a few individuals might affect the outcome of the war. The main manifestation was to take the head of the generals and make the forces retreat, critical strikes, and so on. Boosting the army morale and commanding them were more important. It did not mean that these people could easily destroy the entire army by themselves, otherwise the army would be useless.

If you did not consider factors such as equipment, quality, morale, and so on, and simply consider frontal confrontation, powerhouses could indeed destroy a considerable number of troops on their own, but their power was ultimately limited. Once their power was exhausted, even a strong powerhouse could only avoid the tide of armies who were fearless of death. (Of course, this so-called powerhouse was just a powerhouse in the conventional category. It did not include some special powerhouses like peak of Demon Overlord, or even Demi-God and God.)

If at this time, a powerhouse of the same level sneak attacked, the Dark Moon would be in trouble.

Generally speaking, in wars, generals would fight with generals; soldiers with soldiers. Fighting generals had a very significant impact on the entire morale. After all, soldiers did not want to directly face the terrifying powerhouse that could wipe out a group of people on their side.

Knowing yourself and the enemy was the only way to win hundreds of battles. Chen Rui currently did not have the accurate intel of the entire battle. In order to avoid alerting the enemy, he did not act rashly. He left Town Dico directly and rushed to the Dark Moon City through Town Leith and Town Jumo.

I must go back to Athena and Kia as soon as possible. Go back to Shea!

The closer he got to the Dark Moon City, the more he could feel the tense atmosphere. Temporary fortifications had been built at many important roads and intersections.

Most of the residents on the outskirts of the Dark Moon City had moved to the city. There were numerous checkpoints. Some restricted areas were also being set up and reinforced with magic traps. The soldiers had solemn expressions. They strictly checked the incoming people.

Chen Rui recovered the face of a sheriff, who should be the financial officer now, but he was stopped by the soldiers of the garrison guards because they had not seen the human financial officer go out before. The soldiers suspected that he was a spy-in-disguise. He only passed the checkpoint smoothly after the person in charge, Arux, was alerted.

“Master, the current situation of the Dark Moon is very bad. Princess Royal ordered Madam Athena to take a small group of people to go to Town Soto in the south to delay the Blue Lava army. She is planning to concentrate on defeating the Red Spirit army in the north first. However, except for the first battle where Tim defeated Kanita, our 2 sneak attacks failed. The garrison guard lost 2000 people in the Town Dico battle. Assad, the patriarch of the Lot Family, the deputy commander of the garrison guard, also died in the field.”

Chen Rui frowned and asked, “You just said that Athena only took a small group of people to Town Soto?”

“Yes,” Arux said, “However, Master Paglio, Sir Roman and Madam Delia also went there.”

Chen Rui was relieved. With poison dragon, Roman and Delia, Athena could still retreat even if she encountered any danger.

“Master, there is another news…you must calm down after you listen to it.”

Calm down? Is it bad news? Chen Rui was taken aback and asked, “What is it?”

Arux explained the situation of Joseph’s death in the shortest manner. He said, “The Red Spirit army is entrenched in Town Dico. Just yesterday, he also threatened to ask Princess Royal to hand over the murderer of Joseph, Kia for a 7-day blood sacrifice. He will not launch any attack in these 7 days, and let the Dark Moon have a chance to reorganize the army in order to start a decisive battle. Otherwise, they will immediately launch a general attack against Dark Moon City.”

“Hmph!” Chen Rui’s eyes flashed with rage. Kia is my woman. No one is allowed to touch her!

Anyway, I have to settle the final accounts with Josh this time.

“Princess Royal… has promised.” Arux’s following words shocked Chen Rui’s heart.

Shea actually agreed!

She knew Kia is my woman!

Chen Rui’s heart was instantly filled with haze. He said with a sullen face, “I will go to the palace right now. You immediately inform Royce and Vasasha to think of ways to protect Kia secretly. No one is allowed to take her away!”

“Yes!”

As soon as he finished instructing, Chen Rui’s figure had disappeared from his sight.

Chen Rui sprinted all the way to the palace. The demons along the way only felt a wisp of smoke passing by. They couldn’t see his figure at all. When he came to the palace, he happened to see Kaguron commanding the imperial guards at the gate.

“Sir Chen Rui? Long time no see. Have you recovered from your illness?” Although Kaguron was Shea’s confidant, he didn’t know Chen Rui’s plan or the hidden secrets. The only person around Shea who knew this was Old Gauss.

Chen Rui did not exchange courtesies with him, “Kaguron, I want to see Princess Royal.”

Kaguron frowned, “Princess Royal is discussing military affairs with Old Gauss in the council hall. She instructed that no one is to disturb…”

“I want to see Princess Royal.” Chen Rui said again with a fairly firm tone.

In an instant, Kaguron felt a strange tremor in his heart. It seemed like an irresistible feeling. He was taken aback at once. It must be an illusion. This human only got some knowledge of Master Aldas and knows a little bit of poison. How can he give such a feeling to me?

Kaguron was not blockheaded. Knowing that Chen Rui was Shea’s confidant and it was an extraordinary period now, the human must have some important intel to report. After thinking about it, he let an imperial guard go in to pass the message.

Soon, the guard hurriedly came to report, “Princess Royal invites Sir Finance Minister to go to council hall immediately.”

Chen Rui walked all the way into the council hall and saw Shea sitting while watching Old Gauss explaining something on a military map. There were sand board and other facilities on the table.

The Princess Royal’s face was thinner. She looked haggard a lot. It seemed that the war this time had put a lot of pressure on her.

“You’re back!” Shea quickly flashed a hint of surprise in her eyes.

“I just came back. I want to ask what is going on with Kia.” Chen Rui asked straightforwardly without being wordy.

Shea frowned slightly, “Gauss, will you go out first?”

Old Gauss bowed, nodded to Chen Rui, and walked out.

After Old Gauss left, Shea asked faintly, “You know about it?”

Chen Rui was still asking that question. His tone was even more stern, “I want to ask you! What is going on with Kia?”

“You seem to be very rude, Sir Financial Officer.” Shea’s eyes were a little cold, “I don’t want to hand over Kia too, but the current situation is too critical. The excuse for the Red Spirit to launch the war of lords is that she killed Joseph. Besides, the capital regent has specifically approved this war. At present, the Dark Moon has just been defeated. If the Red Spirit attacks now, not only will I not even have a chance of winning, I will also not have the time to prepare some moves!”

When Shea’s personal confirmation was obtained, Chen Rui’s enthusiasm for returning to her was completely gone, “I don’t care what reason you have. I only know that Kia is mine. I must not let her suffer any harm!”

Shea’s gaze became colder, “Do you know that the capital also sent envoys this time. At least one of them is a Demon Overlord powerhouse! The real purpose of these envoys, despite labelled as mediation, is self-evident. They are here to help the army defeat the Dark Moon! I know that Kia is your woman. I also know that you have talent, strategy, and perhaps other abilities that I don’t know, but tell me if you can defeat a Demon Overlord? Can you defeat the army?”

Capital actually dispatched Demon Overlord! It seems that it is inevitable this time.

Chen Rui shook his head. At present, my combat power should have a considerable chance of winning against an average Demon Emperor, but due to the lack of faith crystals of the [Royal Star Transformation], it cannot be activated. Facing the peak of the Demon Emperor or the Demon Emperor powerhouse with special abilities, I’m afraid I can’t win. I am definitely not a match for the Demon Overlord level.

However, I do not need to deal with the Demon Overlord opponents personally.

As for the army, it is not impossible.

“With the help of your black potion, I have absorbed all the power left by my father. I have reached the early stage of the Demon Emperor now. The Dark Moon’s army is much stronger than before, and there is a secret wyvern legion, but so what? Facing a Demon Overlord and an elite army of 200,000, we will still be defeated!” Shea’s voice was full of pain and helplessness. “I have already vowed to live and die with the Dark Moon. All I can do now is to exert all my power and sprinkle my last drop of dark blood in the battlefield! I can die, but Alice can’t. I need time. Not only to reorganize the army morale, but also to send Alice out of the Dark Moon safely, so… Kia has to be sacrificed.”

“For Alice… You sacrifice Kia?” Chen Rui’s heart became colder. Whether it was a plan or an arrangement, it was stuck in his throat.

“I know she is your woman, but Kia is just a little maid. How can she compare to Alice? How can she compare to me?” Shea suddenly stood up. Her tone of voice was unprecedentedly emotional.

Chen Rui’s heart was shocked. It was the first time Shea truly revealed her thoughts in front of him.

Perhaps she realized that this was the last time. If she didn’t say it now, she might not be able to say it in the future.

“Chen Rui, you now have 2 options. The first option is to ride the wyvern to the temporarily established Leon checkpoint in the direction of Mountain Xilang. Tim and Alice are there. You escort her to the Dark Shadow Empire and go to the Custer Family! Second choice…” Shea’s eyes revealed a rare eagerness, “You stay with me here until the end.”

“Shea, I know you very well, even better than yourself” Chen Rui calmed down as he stared into her eyes. For the first time, he was calling her name directly, “Tell me the truth. You just want to use Kia’s matter to force me to leave in order to keep me away from this dangerous battlefield, right?”

The answer to him was Shea’s rare laugh, but it was full of coldness and disdain.

“You overestimated yourself, and you are too naive. You never really understand me…” The laughter gradually stopped. The enthusiasm of those purple eyes faded. “You have experienced so many things including this time at the capital… You should be very clear about the so-called upper-class power struggle. How much cruelty, brutality, shameless, decay, dirt and nastiness are covered under that gorgeous coat… It’s a pity that I’m also one of them. Even if I have ever had that meaningless kindness and foolishness, they have all been annihilated in the darkness. If not, how can I, Shea. Lucifer, become the lord of this estate? Just like you, if you have no usage value to me, I would have immediately killed you! Oftentimes, I have to make some sacrifices! Do you know why I want to go to the White Feather Estate? I just want to take advantage of the coveting of the White Feather Estate Lord, make use of the ambiguous infatuation! When necessary, not only Kia, I can even sacrifice Athena and even myself!”

“I still don’t believe it.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I need you to give me a real answer. This will affect many of our future…”

“The real answer is…” Shea’s tone became colder and colder. “Kia has been subdued by me this morning. She is being held by Kaguli in the Town Jumo now . She is about to be handed over to the Red Spirit army.”

There was a sudden chill in Chen Rui’s gaze. He glared at Shea with a look that had never been so cold before. He turned around and left without saying a word.

“Stop! I order you!” Shea yelled. Chen Rui felt a strong murderous intent behind his back, but he didn’t stop at all.

Shea seemed furious, “Do you think this lowly maid can really compare with me?”

Chen Rui’s eyes became even colder as he continued to walk forward without a word. He felt that something precious in his heart had suddenly shattered.

“Wait! Stay, okay? I really want you to be with me.” Shea’s voice suddenly softened, “Have you forgotten when I first smiled at you? Have you forgotten the duo dance we did in the moonlight? And… those 3 words?”

“I just understand now. It turns out that the closer I get to you, the farther is our distance.” Chen Rui, who had reached the door, stopped, but he did not look back. “As for those 3 words… I have forgotten them.”

You would never remember some things again once you forget them.

Initially, he really cared about Shea in his heart. It was not the initial life-saving perfunctory, but he would rather never care about her, and he would never care about it again…

I need to go and rescue Kia now!

Then, considering the promise to General George, considering… I will help Shea resolve this crisis.

Then… it should be time for me to really leave the Dark Moon.

[1] Chinese character ‘Confucian’ is a combination of ‘human’ and ‘needs’ characters.

You only needed to trust him, Shea…

chapters.title: Chapter 384 - The Feeling Of Loving Someone
chapters.body:
Chapter 384 - The Feeling Of Loving Someone

“Old Gauss! Catch him!” Shea’s voice was full of anger and sharpness.

The figure of Old Gauss, which emitted strong magical waves, appeared in front of Chen Rui instantly. This scene completely chilled Chen Rui’s heart. His eyes showed a faint killing intent, “Move away if you don’t want to die.”

Old Gauss was frightened by Chen Rui’s gaze, and his entire body suddenly felt cold. He couldn’t produce any strength at that moment. When he reacted, Chen Rui had strode out without looking back.

“Princess Royal!” Old Gauss came to Shea’s side in shock, “He…”

“He’s gone. If we go now, we can still make it in time.” Shea murmured, “Sure enough, he didn’t give up his woman until the end. It can be said that he passed the final test. However, I’m really jealous of Kia and Athena…”

Old Gauss did not mention the feeling Chen Rui gave him just now. Instead, he just looked surprised as he watched Shea’s eyes glimmering with extremely rare tears. He recalled the last time she shed tears was a few years ago when her father, Grimm Crown Prince, died.

Since then, the once gentle princess had become a cold lord, and she never shed tears. At least, this old man who watched her grow up had never seen it.

Shea reminiscenced the time when Chen Rui left the Dark Moon. She and Alice bid farewell. Alice once asked her what it was like to like someone. The answer in her heart was: If you like someone, you want to live happily with him forever.

Alice asked her again: What is it like to love someone?

Shea couldn’t answer at the time, but now she understood. It turns out that the feeling of loving someone is that… you hope he will live happily even without yourself.

“Am I foolish? I’m not a qualified lord.” Shea did not resist her tears from flowing. Perhaps this would be the last time in her life.

Old Gauss’s eyes showed the kindness of the elders, “You and him are both foolish.”

Shea took a few deep breaths. Her tears gradually turned into icy flakes and fell. She said faintly, “Gauss, you go too.”

Old Gauss shook his head and sighed, “I don’t have many years left to live. I watched Princess Royal grow up. Please forgive my disrespectful words… It is like looking at my own daughter. Please allow me to stay. Let me be loyal to the Lord of Midnight Sun’s descendants till the end.”

“Thank you, Gauss.” Shea heard the firmness in Gauss’ tone. She straightened up her waist again, “Then, mobilize all the troops now including the wyvern legion of the black rainforest. After the assembly is complete, we will take the initiative to attack. Fight against the Red Spirit to the death!”

Chen Rui left the palace and found Royce and Vasasha. Sure enough, he heard the news that Kia had not returned all night. He was even more anxious. Although he still doubted Shea’s attitude in his heart, Kia’s life and death was at risk. He couldn’t afford to gamble.

In any case, I must rush to Town Jumo immediately to save Kia first!

Royce got a wyvern, and Chen Rui immediately boarded the wyvern. He didn’t have the time to conceal or disguise. He flew at full speed in the direction of Town Jumo.

This Higher Demon-level wyvern was not brought by Chen Rui from the Silent Night Wetland, but it was originally used by Joseph to go back and forth between the Red Spirit and Dark Moon. Although it was not comparable to the Demon King-level mutated wyvern, its speed and endurance was way beyond a griffin. About half an hour later, Chen Rui arrived at Town Jumo.

The soldiers of Town Jumo showed a high degree of vigilance against the wyvern that suddenly descended from the sky, but it was garrison captain who was from the garrison guard recognized the human Finance Minister, and he prevented the soldiers’ hostility.

“Sir Chen Rui.”

“Where is Kaguli?” Chen Rui didn’t have time to chat with these people, so he asked directly.

“Sir Kaguli is in the defense station.” Garrison Captain replied. The human had disappeared. Only the wyvern was left to remind everyone that it was not an illusion.

Kaguli is at the defense station! Then Kia probably hasn’t been handed over yet!

Chen Rui rushed to the defense station at the fastest speed. The soldiers at the door only had a blurry vision, but they could not see Chen Rui’s figure at all. Just as Chen Rui rushed in, a warning sign suddenly appeared. A figure flashed before his eyes with fast speed. Almost at the same time, a blow with a powerful force tore the air and struck like lightning.

Chen Rui hurriedly stretched out his hand to block, and he was staggered 3 steps back by the strong force. Each step left a deep footprint on the hard ground. A prompt to convert toxins came from the Super System immediately. Even with his eyes closed, he could also know who launched the blow. He immediately blurted out, “Paglio!”

Didn’t Paglio follow Athena to Town Soto to deal with the Blue Lava army? How could he be here?

Chen Rui’s voice made the man’s second punch suspended in the air abruptly. He then suddenly speeded up and punched Chen Rui’s shoulder “violently”, “Damn it, you only come back until now. Besides, your strength has reached such a level!”

Chen Rui was not in the mood to joke with Paglio, “Where is Kia?”

“Look, it seems that a leader who cares more about women than friends is back!” Another familiar voice also sounded. It was Roman. This guy had already come out from closed training. Although the [Analytical Eyes] was not turned on, Chen Rui could feel that this guy’s gain was certainly not small.

“You are here too? Where is Athena?”

“I’m here.” Athena’s voice came from the door of the defense station. Chen Rui saw that not only Athena, but Kia was also there, followed by Delia.

Chen Rui faintly felt that he had overlooked something from Shea before, but he couldn’t think about it now. He quickly stepped forward and tightly hugged Athena and Kia, and couldn’t help kissing her in front of everyone.

Great, they are all safe. My partners are all here too.

If one only knows how to cherish after losing something, everything will be regrettable.

Although Kia was very bold when she was alone with Chen Rui, she turned away and her face turned red for the first time when he embraced and kissed her in front of so many people.

“Hey, sir leader, why don’t you give me a hug?” As soon as Roman finished his words, Chen Rui rushed forward and gave him a warm hug, but this time he used A-level power. Roman had already heard the protest sound of his bones which almost broke. Fortunately, Chen Rui let go in time.

Roman feet softened, and he almost fell to the ground with a bitter expression, “Dear Demon God, you are too unfair to your left eye!”

I worked desperately, using the evil eye tyrant’s power to finally master the power of [Destroying Evil]. I miraculously broke through to the peak of the Great Demon King. I didn’t expect that the leader completely suppressed me purely by strength without any skill. This is unfair… Oh, in the leader’s words, it’s too unscientific!

Chen Rui let his guards down on the most worried matter in his heart. He finally calmed down and asked, “Athena, what is going on? Didn’t you go to Town Soto in the south?”

“We went to the south, but not to Town Soto, but to another place. The real order of Princess Royal is to let me retrieve the things buried there. They are all the belongings accumulated by the Dark Moon over the years. This includes a considerable part of proceeds from Princess Retail Store and the rest of the shop. Originally, she ordered me to go to the Leon checkpoint to bring Alice out of the west of Dark Moon and flee to Custer Family in the Dark Shadow Empire under the escort of Tim’s defense guards. I suddenly received a magic message from Princess Royal this morning. She asked me to come here to take Kia along…”

Chen Rui finally understood. When the cold female lord ruthlessly tore his heart with “facts”, the pain in her heart was 100 times worse than him.

This foolish woman only knows how to keep her tears and pain under that cold mask?

Kaguli hurriedly walked in from the outside of the defense station. He was stunned when saw Chen Rui, but he did not ask further. He said, “Madam Athena, you must leave right away. I have received Princess Royal’s order. The Dark Moon will do everything possible to fight to the death against the Red Spirit in the outskirts of Town Leith. Our army will be here in at most 3 hours!”

Chen Rui was shocked. 3 hours. so fast!

“By the way, Chen Rui, when Princess Royal gave me the secret order, she asked me to pass you an order if you come back. Princess Royal said that this is her last order, so you must obey it.”

With that, Athena took out an envelope and handed it to Chen Rui.

The envelope was sealed with a wax stamp. There was the seal of Lord Shea’s ring on it. It seemed that Athena had kept it unopened.

This was also Athena, who kept promises and worked devotedly. If it was Chen Rui or another person, he might have opened it long ago.

Chen Rui took the envelope and opened it. There was only one sentence in it.

“I order you in the name of Shea. Lucifer, you must live.”

Chen Rui’s heart trembled. He ambiguously remembered that when he accepted the biggest test of [Refined Mind] back then, he seemed to have heard the same sentence vaguely.

This was her last order.

The cold and ruthless woman keeps people far away. No matter if she is joyful, angry, sad, or happy, she is just a piece of ice that never changes.

Who knows that under the frozen surface, she is gentle like water. Just like seeing the real her in a magic mirror in the secret room.

With his head down, a drop of tear finally came out of his eyes and dripped on the letter.

It was just like when she was facing him who was in a coma and dying, her teardrop could not be frozen and fell on the ground.

At this moment, 2 teardrops seemed to crossover time and space, blending in one.

Even Paglio and Roman felt Chen Rui’s emotions. They didn’t tease or bother him.

Chen Rui slowly raised his head. There was no longer any crystal in his eyes, only strong determination.

“Kaguli, I need all the information of the Red Spirit army, especially the capital’s envoy.”

Kaguli was taken aback. He couldn’t help being infected by that strange determination. He took out a military intel report and said, “The information of the Red Spirit army is here. As for the capital’s envoy, there are 3. The leader is Krobelus. It is said that she is a Demon Overlord powerhouse, and the other 2 are royal families of the Fallen Angel Empire. One is called Rus, an early Demon Emperor powerhouse, while the other is called Diak. The latter’s strength is not powerful, but he is with an undead magician at the peak of the Great Demon King. Diak is in the Blue Lava army, whereas Krobelus and Rus are in the Red Spirit army.”

Krobelus? It’s actually her? Chen Rui frowned secretly. Diak is not a problem, but the undead magician beside him is a little troublesome.

Judging from the scene, the alliance of Red Spirit and Blue Lava have absolute advantages in both army and individual strength. The Dark Moon does not stand the slightest chance of winning. No wonder Shea uses such a strategy to force him to leave.

Unfortunately, time is running out. It is too late to resolve the grievances between Zola and the poison dragon. Otherwise, I will return with Ms. Fairy Dragon. It will not be a problem even if there are a few more Demon Overlords, but according to the current strength comparison, it is impossible to win.

Athena looked at Chen Rui who was in deep thought. She asked, “What do you plan to do?”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, showing confidence, “Athena, don’t you plan to do something?”

“But I swore by the name of the Wales Family in front of Princess Royal…” Although Athena said so, her beautiful red eyes were shining.

“Don’t forget that you are already my woman. According to the tradition of our hometown, you are in my Chen Family now. The vow doesn’t count. Besides, you definitely don’t want to leave like this… Alright, don’t deny it. Your eyes have betrayed you.”

When Athena heard him emphasize that she was a part of “Chen Family” in front of everyone, she was shy and joyful. Chen Rui held her hand and said to the poison dragon, “Paglio, Roman, do you want to stretch your muscles? Perhaps we shall meet some old enemy of the dead duck (it means stubborn in Chinese: even when the duck is dead, its beak is still hard) dragon?”

Paglio grinned, but he still bickered, “You’re the dead duck. Your whole family is a dead duck.”

Roman smiled along. Only Kaguli, who was in the dark, looked confused.

Due to the current tight schedule, it was too late for Chen Rui to mobilize the strength at hand calmly.

Chen Rui’s plan was that he, Paglio and Roman would go to Town Dico to block and disrupt the Red Spirit army as well as cause chaos in the Red Spirit army.

Athena would head to Town Yankou, south of the Dark Moon. There was an ancient battlefield there, and a subordinate who had signed a master-slave contract with Chen Rui. He was a Demon Emperor-level corpse necromancer.

After such a long time, Guradam must have established a terrifying number of undead army. Together with his powerful undead magic, I believe that Town Yankou will become the nightmare of the Blue Lava army. Even if there is the undead magician with Diak, he is nothing more than a “little sorcerer” in front of the corpse necromancer.

Guradam knew the relationship between Athena and Chen Rui. If she went there, she should be able to mobilize Guradam’s power.

Delia and Kia would go west to the Leon checkpoint to meet Alice. Kia had another task, which was to find Tim and go to the base of Mountain Xilang with him. They would mobilize all the Medusa and Tauren tribes and invite the Earth Elemental King.

After all, Chen Rui didn’t know whether he could stop Krobelus’ power. He definitely must not reveal the identity of “Charles”, especially her enemy was the poison dragon. He only hoped to restrain her or draw her away, then finally the Earth Elemental King would deal with Ms. Emerald Dragon.

Athena and Kia knew that it was an urgent juncture, so they immediately acted according to Chen Rui’s arrangement. Chen Rui, Paglio and Roman went to Town Dico at full speed.

There is still hope! When the generals and envoys were defeated, the number of soldiers alone couldn’t influence the results of the war much.

chapters.title: Chapter 385 - Enticing The Powerhouse Away And Beheading Operation
chapters.body:
Chapter 385 - Enticing The Powerhouse Away And Beheading Operation

On the way to Town Dico. “I’m afraid it won’t be long until you catch up with me.” This was Paglio’s long sigh.

Chen Rui was unusually humble, “Not yet. When your seal is lifted in the future, I will be far below the poison dragon.”

“Bullshit!” Paglio’s eyes widened, “Don’t think that I don’t know. With your abnormal speed, it’s only a matter of time to step into that realm. Perhaps I even have to look up to the height that you will reach in the future.”

“ Hehe , good that you know. Be nice to me now, or be careful of my revenge in the future…” Chen Rui laughed unceremoniously.

“Who’s afraid of your whole dead duck family! If I don’t bully you to the max now, wouldn’t you step on me in the future?”

“Two masters, slow down. Master Roman can’t keep up with you anymore. If I just use [Flash] now, I won’t even have the strength to escape later anymore.” Roman wailed after the puns.

“Then let’s hurry up. Anyway, it’s too wasteful for Delia to follow this kind of guy. I can just set her free earlier so that she can find a more reliable man.”

“Master poison dragon, you are too vicious. Didn’t you kill the man of the female dragon? Maybe you can sacrifice yourself and compensate her with your body. Turn the emerald dragon enemy into your concubine.”

The 3 best friends reunited after a long time. They had to sneer and tease each other, but they didn’t slow down. They rushed to Town Dico like 3 gusts of wind.

The original townspeople of Town Dico either died or fled. This place had completely become the barrack of the Red Spirit army.

In the central tent, Red Spirit Lord Josh was listening carefully to the scout’s report.

“The Dark Moon City is gathering troops?” Josh frowned, “Didn’t they agree to hand over the murderer who killed Joseph?”

A blond man of medium stature began to speak, “It seems that the enemy is determined to fight us to the death. She is obviously weak, but she still has such guts. She is worthy to be the line of Lord of Midnight Sun. Sir Josh, we should still prepare to face the enemy. Let Princess Royal, who has no blood on her little hand, see what the real battlefield is.”

“Sir Rus is right, but we have agreed with Blue Lava Lord to wait for his main force to arrive, then we will attack from 2 sides. I think we should try to maintain a stalemate and not move first.”

It turned out that the so-called 7-day blood sacrifice by the Red Spirit Estate was a strategy of delaying the advance of the enemy. His real purpose was to wait for the arrival of the Blue Lava army.

Even if it was just Josh’s Red Spirit army, their current military strength and combat power still had an absolute advantage. The reason for not moving was not because he was afraid of the Dark Moon. Instead, he had his own plan. As the saying went, one could not defeat the enemy without severely injuring his own army. The Dark Moon’s 3 combined forces had a strength of about 50,000. If he attacked them all, his loss would be much greater.

“With Sir Josh’s power, destroying the Royal Highness Princess’ resistance is effortless.” Rus saw Josh’s thoughts, and he smiled slightly, “Madam Krobelus, what do you think?”

Krobelus, who was sitting on her chair and playing with gems, said absently, “Let’s get rid of these guys quickly. The old mother wants to go back to the capital soon. I wouldn’t be bothered to come to this filthy place if the regent didn’t promise me a lot of benefits.”

Madam “old mother”, you should have the demeanour of a capital envoy! Rus was secretly embarrassed and said to Josh, “It seems that Madam Krobelus also has the same idea. Since the enemy is proactive and weaker than us, if we avoid fighting, it will also affect the morale of our army. We may suffer unnecessary losses by then.”

Although Krobelus seemed very unreliable, Josh dared not be negligent because this was a real Demon Overlord powerhouse!

Josh thought for a while and finally made up his mind. I took the lead in investing a whopping billion black crystal coins at the lord meetings previously. My finances are already quite tight. The Dark Moon’s economic development has been rapid recently. There are even treasures. Although it is not a long time, there should be a lot of wealth. I shall simply defeat the main force of the Dark Moon in one go, and then loot wildly. Maybe there will be unexpected gains.

As for the Blue Lava, Lord Titan is overcautious and dilly dally in doing things. I disliked him long ago.

(Titan, you are too slow. Don’t blame me for not leaving a share of benefit for you!)

“Kanita! Pass down the order. The army shall prepare the equipment. We’ll set off in 1 hour. Get ready to fight the Dark Moon in the outskirts of Town Leith!”

“Yes!” Kanita hurriedly took the order and retreated.

At this moment, a herald reported, “Capital envoy, Sir Diak’s magician, Sulfur, requested to meet you.”

Isn’t Diak at Blue Lava? Did Titan’s army arrive in advance? Josh’s eyes lit up, “Let him in quickly.”

Soon, a fair-skinned, black-haired man walked in. He was wearing a gray robe. His skin looked a little pale. He was Diak’s undead magician- Sulfur.

“Greetings sir.” Sulfur bowed.

“You came just in time!” Josh asked, “When will Titan’s army arrive?”

Sulfur replied, “The army was obstructed in Town Soto. It seems that Athena, the daughter of the first general, George, led her army to disrupt them. However, the Sir Titan has defeated Athena. The army has crossed Town Soto and is marching in the direction of Town Yankou. It will probably take about 3 days to arrive at the earliest.”

“Athena alone obstructed his army? He is fearful of General George?” Josh smiled contemptuously, “ Hmph , he can only come 3 days later. By then, he can only come and clean the battlefield.”

“Sir is right. Sir Diak has been urging the Lord Titan. Unfortunately…” Sulfur smiled apologetically. He said to Krobelus, “Madam Krobelus, Sir Diak has asked me to tell you one more thing alone. He said that it is something madam is very interested in.”

Something I’m interested in? I’m interested in … Krobelus was initially lazing around. Upon hearing these words, her spirit was lifted. She got up from the chair and said to Sulfur, “You, come with me! ”

Seeing Krobelus swaggering and dragging Sulfur away from the big tent, Josh and Rus smiled bitterly at each other. However, the strength and status of this lady was evident. It was reasonable for Diak to flatter her.

Krobelus grabbed Sulfur and came to a secluded house where she was resting. She asked, “You came together from the capital. You should know what the old mother likes. If you dare to lie to me, the old mother will poison you, together with Diak, into a pool of ashes!”

Hearing Ms. Emerald Dragon saying “old mother” and “this lady”, a strange smile flashed across Sulfur’s lowered face.

Sulfur whispered a few words to Krobelus before taking out a beast skin. Judging from its appearance, it should be very old.

Krobelus’ eyes lit up, “This is…”

“This is the map of the Dark Moon’s treasure. Sir Diak toiled hard to get it. He doesn’t have too many requests. He just hoped that upon returning to the capital, madam would recommend him appropriately in front of the regent so that he is put in an important position.”

“Okay! No problem!” Just saying a few words to get the treasure map. Krobelus would definitely do many of these easy businesses. Ms. Emerald Dragon immediately showed suspicion, “Why didn’t Diak go hunt for the treasures by himself?”

“To be honest with madam, Sir Diak and I have studied this treasure map for a long time after the occasional opportunity of obtaining it, but we still can’t understand it. We know that madam is very knowledgeable, so we plan to do a convenient favor by giving it to madam.”

When Krobelus looked at the treasure map, her eyes appeared brighter, “Of course you can’t understand it, the icon on this is Dragon…”

Ms. Emerald Dragon was so excited that she almost leaked the secret. She quickly shut up, and she revealed a very reluctant look, “Well, since you told me the truth, I can barely agree to that guy’s request.”

Sulfur hurriedly saluted, “Thank you madam! I am returning to the south, so I shall leave first.”

After Ms. Emerald Dragon sent the undead magician away, she carefully studied the treasure map, “There are many Dragon Inscriptions, some of which I don’t understand, but this mark shows that the real entrance to the treasure is only opened every 3 months. Calculating according to this, it should be… today? Ah! It will open in about an hour! By the way, that Diak probably copied a few copies of the treasure map. He may give it to Prince Obsidian. If I wait for another 3 months to come again, I’m afraid… No! Taking advantage of this best opportunity, I will definitely get those mysterious treasures!”

After Ms. Emerald Dragon made up her mind, she immediately went to the big tent. She claimed that there was an emergency, so she needed to leave for a period of time. As the army was about to fight, and the Demon Overlord powerhouse was about to leave, Josh and Rus were helpless about this. However, even without Krobelus, with the power of Josh and Rus, plus the Red Spirit elites and the army, it was a sure win.

After witnessing Krobelus leaving Town Dico, an ordinary minotaur soldier guarding the door showed a weird smile. This minotaur was the undead magician who gave Krobelus a map of the Dark Moon treasure a few minutes ago.

The minotaur was naturally Chen Rui. The map was initially prepared in advance when setting up the Blue Lake Mountain Range treasure. It was actually put into crucial use now. Paglio separated from the 2 on the way and went to the “treasure” of the Blue Lake Mountain Range. At that time, he would take advantage of the location with Dragon Inscriptions and magic circles to greet the enemy’s widow.

When Chen Rui handed over the map to Krobelus just now, his [Analytical Eyes] showed that the comprehensive strength of the emerald dragon was: S- (S-). Her attributes were: Wind attribute and poison attribute.

The S-level should be the Demon Overlord level. Zola had also mentioned that Krobelus was just a “mere” early stage of the Demon Overlord. It seemed that the real strength of the emerald dragon was fixed at the early stage of the Demon Overlord. If Paglio was not affected by the seal, then dealing with Krobelus was just a piece of cake, but now his power was sealed at the peak of the Demon Emperor. He was unable to progress at all. Even with the combat experience at the peak of Demon Overlord, his power was still much inferior. Odds were against his favor if he faced Krobelus directly.

This time, Paglio’s main responsibility was to hold the emerald dragon so that she could not participate in the decisive battle between the Red Spirit and Dark Moon. Pinning down the opponent’s Demon Overlord powerhouse with a peak of the Demon Emperor. It could be said that he had succeeded in the first step.

As long as Earth Elemental King Moore arrived, it should not be a problem to subdue Krobelus.

The next step was the task of disrupting the Red Spirit’s morale before the battle.

In the big tent, Josh had put on a battle uniform, while Rus had also gone to make preparations.

At this moment, there was a commotion outside. Kanita hurriedly walked over and said, “Something happened! Sir Father, a large amount of poisonous fog suddenly appeared in the barrack. It was very terrifying. The poisoned people either lost consciousness or more severely, reduced to ashes. Even the potioneer can’t detoxify it!”

“Damn it!” Josh was very furious. Such a change happened before the army set off. It must be Dark Moon’s dirty work to disrupt the military’s mind. This kind of poison is probably related to the Dark Moon’s potion master, Aldas.

Josh guessed it wrongly after all. The source of this poison was a poison dragon that was countless times more terrifying than Aldas. However, the crystals used by Chen Rui and Roman to spread the poisonous fog were limited in power after all. If the poison dragon personally made a move, it would be dozens times more terrifying.
