They captured and imprisoned countless soldiers, not to mention seizing various weapons and so on.

The defeated Red Spirit Army fled and discarded their helmets and armor. They suffered heavy losses. Finally, under the leadership of Kanita, they gathered the remnant formation, crossed Town Dico, and fled into the Red Spirit territory at full speed.

40,000 armies actually defeated nearly 100,000 enemies. Furthermore, they were fighting head-on!

The Dark Moon won such a big victory for the first time in hundreds of years. The morale of each soldier was boosted. Every soldier’s face was filled with excitement and pride. Although the Dark Moon Army also suffered a lot of casualties, the entire army had been qualitatively sublimated after this fierce battle. A truly strong army began to form.

After leaving a part of the army to defend Town Dico, Shea led the army back to the Dark Moon. Someone had spread the news of the Dark Moon’s victory against the Red Spirit. The people of the Dark Moon who had been worried about being looted, humiliated or even massacred after the defeat were all excited, so they all cheered. They took the initiative to organize a long line of people outside the city to welcome Princess Royal and the army’s victorious return.

“Red Blood Flame, triumph in every battle!”

“Long live Princess Royal!”

“Long live!”

Hearing the neat slogans of the army and the cheers of the people, Shea acted very calmly. After giving a morale-boosting public speech, she began to orderly arrange post-war affairs.

The Red Spirit Estate’s defeat this time was mostly due to Josh’s underestimation of the enemy. Besides, if we don’t consider the man’s unexpected help, I’m afraid it is the Red Spirit Army standing here to celebrate.

We need to be vigilant because defeating the Red Spirit is only the first step. There is also the equally powerful Blue Lava Army later. The power of our light cavalry team and wyvern legion has been exposed, and nearly a thousand people of the light cavalry have been injured or dead. The wyverns also have a dozen casualties. With the cautiousness of the Blue Lava Lord Titan, he will definitely be on guard, so we must not be carried away by victory.

I must calm down and pay close attention to the movements of the Southern Blue Lava Army. Be ready for the second fierce battle at any time.

Back in the palace, Shea removed her broken armor, simply treated her wound, and changed into a long white dress. After experiencing the excitement of the victory, she felt an unprecedented exhaustion.

It’s time. Where is Alice now? Why is Athena or Kia not here? He must have arrangements.

He went to deal with Krobelus… I don’t know how he is doing.

There are too many mysteries to be solved… You must come back alive, no matter what your identity is!

Unconsciously, Shea had already walked to the pool deep in the inner courtyard. It had always been her forbidden area, so there was no maid nearby.

Involuntarily, the scene of the first encounter with her old enemy here appeared in her mind. She still felt extremely angry that her biggest secret was discovered. Unknowingly, hatred rose in her heart.

However, some unrelated scenes emerged in front of her at the same time. For example, the dual dance under the moonlight; every time when she saw that person, she couldn’t help being angry, but she really wanted to see him.

Also, his statement that made the entire Dark Moon army high-spirited on the battlefield.

“Shea, you are such a foolish woman. A foolish woman. Yes, it is these 3 words.” Shea only felt that her mood was unprecedentedly more complicated and contradictory than ever. She lowered her head gently, sighed, and walked toward the pool under her feet.

I’ll wait for him here. No matter what his purpose is, no matter what is the end result for both of us, I’ll just wait for him like this.

Shea walked into the pool. After a strange space distortion, she came to the secret room under the pool.

This used to be the secret place where the God-Eating Mask fragment was sealed. Only the lord knew about it.

The biggest secret in her heart was here. It recorded her true pleasure, anger, sorrow, and joy that she did not show in front of anyone including Alice. Only in this small and secret room could she truly have the freedom to laugh or cry.

As soon as Shea entered the secret room, her pupils suddenly shrank because there was already a person in the room.

With his back against her, he gently moved the memory wind chime.

Within the tinkling sound, familiar sounds came from time to time. It was hers.

There were relaxing humming sounds, crying, laughing, and low longing whispers.

As the greatest privacy in the bottom of her heart was seen through, Shea couldn’t restrain her anger.

He turned his head slowly. It is really this face. Not only this face, but also the familiar feeling from my heart, which is definitely not what ordinary transformation techniques can disguise.

Although she had a thousand words to ask and say, she uttered a cold sentence with killing intent even in this most authentic secret room.

“Where’s… your mask?”

“Here.” A strange mask appeared on his familiar face, and Shea’s heart suddenly tightened.

This kind of breath…Yes! It is the highest artifact, God-Eating Mask, of the Beelzebub Royal Family! It’s even completed!

In an instant, Shea’s killing intent had turned into an extremely strong murderous breath. Many hypotheses were confirmed in an instant.

Beelzebub!

No! I should call him Aguile. Beelzebub!

The so-called “symbiotic contract” is just a lie that covers the disappearance of the 2 persons at the same time!

In the blink of an eye, the God-Eating Mask disappeared again, and his familiar face was restored.

Shea’s eyes were sharp like a knife, “Why don’t you keep wearing it?”

This made Chen Rui sigh indifferently, “If you wear a mask for a long time, you will easily forget that that is not who you really are. Maybe one day, when you decide to take off the mask, you will realize that your face is already the same as the mask. Do you understand?”

It was an answer with a hidden meaning again.

Shea subconsciously touched her face, and then she coldly said, “I don’t understand! I don’t understand what you actually want?”

“So, tell me. What do you want?” Chen Rui walked over step by step.

What I want…

Shea’s gaze seemed slightly distracted, but she immediately recovered. Her murderous breath had reached its peak.

“I want you to die!” Although she said so, and her murderous aura was still sharp, she was retreating step by step. However, the space in this secret room was too small. She had been forced to the corner after 2 steps.

Chen Rui looked at the Princess Royal Highness who was glaring at him furiously. He recalled her determination and ruthlessness when she used Kia to force him to leave. It was just for that last order, “I order you in the name of Shea. Lucifer, you must live.”

He closed his eyes, gently recalling his feelings and his teardrop that could not be controlled at that time. He blurted out a sentence.

“A foolish woman!”

The familiar 3 words caused Shea’s body to tremble slightly. She finally suppressed her thumping heartbeat, gritted her teeth, and she said, “This vow has been fulfilled on the battlefield. At that time, I didn’t kill you. Now, it’s either you die or I…”

“Then, let’s change a word.” The man’s eyes showed undisguised sincerity and affection, “My foolish woman.

Shea’s movements became stiff, and a long-depressed emotion in her heart finally surged uncontrollably. Then, she felt a strong male breath approaching quickly. Although she kept telling herself to dodge, make a move, and kill this “enemy,” she couldn’t control her body, and she was gently hugged.

When the trembling red lips of Princess Royal Highness were captured by the man, her mind was blank. Her entire person was spinning around as if she was flying in endless flowers and green fields.

(What do I want?)

(Lord? Power? Throne?)

(Those are just “ideals” imposed on this Princess Royal identity. I have no choice.)

(Actually, all I want is a shoulder that can bear my tears when I’m frustrated and allows me to take a bite when I’m happy.)

(All I want is a warm light… not a cold throne, a cold mirror, and a cold wind chime.)

(Just like that… only.)

Suddenly she thought of a saying- If someone is willing to be by your side, even without any words, it is a kind of happiness. Even if you lose everything, just stop and look around. There will be someone in your sight. Then, please don’t be sad or be in despair. Don’t forget that you are by no means alone in any case.

The two pairs of warm lips slowly separated, and she slowly opened her watery purple eyes. A pair of black eyes was imprinted in her eyes as well as in her heart.

Yes, I am by no means alone.

Perhaps true loneliness was not inborn, but it started from the moment she fell in love with someone instead.

At least for now, she was no longer alone.

“I’m not a Beelzebub, I’m just Chen Rui. Chen Rui’s Chen, Chen Rui’s Rui.” The man smiled slightly, “Your Chen Rui.”

Despite the evident proof of the God-Eating Mask and his power of Demon Emperor level, she did not know why she believed him, plus she believed him with ease.

She was the lord of the Dark Moon, and she had many things on her shoulders. According to a certain plan, she was likely to ascend the throne in the future. Even if he was not from the Beelzebub Royal Family, both of them would definitely encounter many difficulties that they couldn’t help themselves.

She didn’t know what the future would be like.

She knew that she couldn’t suppress the emotion in her heart now.

Even though she had been sensibly warning herself to abandon her feelings to be a truly cold and calm lord, she still couldn’t suppress it.

It was even as strong as a volcanic eruption.

“You’re not just mine. You have Athena, Kia, and maybe more women.” Shea suddenly raised her head, and she stared at him without evading, “You can choose to love me or not, but I can only choose to love you or love you more.”

There was no gentle tenderness or timid shyness. There was only this bold confession that made Chen Rui’s heart tremble violently.

The vague and warm affection in the past became very clear in an instant. That feeling was like when he heard Athena’s final confession during the life and death situation when facing Glorfin in the underground world of Mountain Xilang.

Those words seemed to resound in his ears again. I order you in the name of Shea. Lucifer, you must live.

Chen Rui suddenly hugged her tightly, and he kissed her passionately as if to crush her lips.

At this moment, the 2 heard the voice of each other’s mind. Never ever separate.

Finally, the iceberg melted…

chapters.title: Chapter 392 - The Sea Of Undead In Town Yankou
chapters.body:
Chapter 392 - The Sea Of Undead In Town Yankou

South of the Dark Moon.

The Blue Lava Army had crossed Town Soto, and they came near Town Yankou.

Looking far ahead at the deserted town that was once an ancient battlefield, the Blue Lava Lord Titan frowned, “According to Town Soto’s captives, this place was once eroded by the dead qi and power, turning it into a cursed place?”

Next to Titan was Nader, the legion leader of the main legion, Azure Legion. The legion leader said disapprovingly, “This so-called cursed place is just haunted by a few undeads. Could it be a threat to our army? As long as our army walks over and moves our feet, we can crush those skeletons into powder.”

The legion leader of the Double-headed Dragon Legion, Mallorca, also said, “Sir Titan, if we want to avoid Town Yankou, we can only walk on the steep mountain trails. Then we must go the long way. Taking into account the terrain and demonic beasts, there will be some unnecessary losses inevitably. Besides, we will also delay the date initially agreed with the Red Spirit Lord to besiege the Dark Moon.”

The capital envoy, Diak, on the side was a little anxious, “Sir Titan, I think it’s better to crossover Town Yankou directly. The besiege of the Dark Moon this time is a great credit. If this credit is snatched by Lord Josh alone, wouldn’t the Blue Lava Estate be humiliated?”

As the envoy of the capital, he was also the military governor. The sure-win war this time was his best opportunity to earn a credit. Diak won the position of envoy with great difficulty, so naturally he was worried about letting the credit slip away.

“Josh? That guy is very sneaky, so he won’t easily fight against the Dark Moon.” Titan smiled confidently as he shook his head. Josh, like Titan, had the plan to preserve strength, so he would not simply let the elite soldiers under him fight desperately against the Dark Moon’s main force. All he needed to do was to join forces and attack on both sides. Even if the Dark Moon was holding on to the city, their loss would be much less.

However, Titan didn’t expect that Shea would take the initiative to attack despite her smaller-sized army. He didn’t even expect that Josh would be defeated in his winning battle.

Currently, Josh was seriously injured and unconscious. Kanita was taking care of him. Kanita was also temporarily making all the decisions about the Red Spirit Estate.

Diak saw that Titan didn’t seem to be in a hurry to proceed, so his thoughts changed, “Speaking of the undead, my subordinate, Sulfur, happens to be proficient in the undead magic. Sir might as well listen to his opinion.”

Titan expected Diak’s reaction. He nodded and said, “I have heard about the reputation of this Master Sulfur. I have this intention too.”

Diak hurriedly summoned Sulfur. Facing Titan’s question, Sulfur seemed quite confident, “Sir Lord, this small town was originally a famous ancient battlefield. There are many powerful heroes buried in it. In theory, it is indeed quite difficult to deal with them if all of them are converted into undead. However, the soul power of many heroes is extremely powerful during their lifetime. Unless there is a magician close to the Demon Overlord level who is extremely proficient in the undead magic, then only it is possible to use these truly powerful heroes’ souls. This kind of powerful undead magician… As far as I know, there isn’t one even in the entire Demon Realm.”

Since the legendary undead magic master of the Bloody Empire disappeared 2000 years ago, as a side of dark magic, the undead magic had gradually declined in recent years. Looking at the current Demon Realm, let alone Sulfur, even Titan had never heard of a magician who was proficient in the undead magic as well as close to the Demon Overlord or Demon Overlord powerhouse.

Would the Dark Moon Estate have this kind of powerhouse? One would know the answer without thinking.

“Are you sure?” Nader asked again.

“Sir Nader has experienced many battles and is well-known far and wide. I’m definitely not as good as sir in terms of combat. However, when it comes to undead magic, you probably cannot find anyone who has done more research than me in the entire Fallen Angel Empire.” At this point, Sulfur showed strong confidence. For this, he really exerted a lot of hard work in this aspect.

Titan nodded, “This is a very important judgment. It seems in the attack of the Dark Moon this time, Sir Diak and Master Sulfur’s credit will definitely be significant.”

In fact, when Titan heard what Mallorca said just now, he had already made up his mind to pass Town Yankou directly. His pretentiousness was just to find a way to give Diak more credit. Diak was a royal family member. Judging from Diak’s appointment as the envoy this time, his future would definitely be bright. It would be better to do him a favor so that Titan had an extra support in the capital in the future.

“Thank you sir lord!” Diak was overjoyed. He deliberately demonstrated his ability and said analytically, “Since Town Yankou is just some trivial low level undead, why would the Dark Moon classify it as a ‘cursed land’? They even moved all the residents to Town Soto? I think there is a mystery in it.”

This sentence really reminded Titan. Thinking of the recent rapid economic development of the Dark Moon, his mind moved.

Mallorca had already reacted, “Could it be some kind of base or a hiding place for wealth for the Dark Moon?”

“Pass my order, the army will advance directly through Town Yankou. If there is any discovery, Mallorca, you will lead a team to stay.” Titan glanced at Diak, and he smiled, “As for Sir Diak, you are definitely indispensable.”

Diak was full of joy. He quickly thanked Titan, and he was secretly proud of his intelligence.

Just like that, the Blue Lava Army marched straight toward Town Yankou.

When approaching the area of Town Yankou, the temperature was inexplicably lowered a few degrees. The surrounding was filled with an eerie and chilly atmosphere. The soldiers also appeared a little cautious as they proceeded with caution under Titan’s orders.

As Town Yankou was originally an ancient battlefield where countless heroes were buried, plus there were rumors of small groups of low level undead, Titan did not take this to heart. Instead, he was very interested in the things that might be “hidden” in this land designated as a cursed land by the Dark Moon.

Just when the Blue Lava Army passed through the ancient battlefield of Town Yankou, a large amount of gray mist suddenly appeared. The road underneath seemed to be completely distorted, and it was impossible to see the way forward.

“What’s the matter?” Titan and others were taken aback. Even the magic horse they were riding began to become uneasy, as if it was full of fear.

“Could it be… the Mist of the Netherworld?” Sulfur was surprised, “It allows the undead to exert stronger combat power in it, but… this is a high level undead magic which has been lost for more than 1,000 years.”

At this time, the herald reported in a hurry, “Sir lord, there are a large number of undeads in front!”

As soon as he finished reporting, they could faintly hear the screams of the soldiers from the mist in front. Not only that, there were even people reporting that there was a lot of mist at the back. There was no way to escape.

Titan was taken aback. He quickly stopped the demon horse, and he shouted, “Order the army to stop advancing immediately. Prepare for battle!”

When Titan led Mallorca and the others to the front quickly, he saw countless indistinct and staggering figures in the mist. Despite trying hard to focus their eyesight, they could only see what seemed to be all skeletons.The amount was unknown. There might even be higher level undead hidden amongst them.

This is “a few” undead? It’s actually a big army! Nader, who said this previously, couldn’t help but to take a cold breath.

Although it was only the lowest level skeleton soldiers, it might be related to the Mist of the Netherworld. The combat power of these skeletons seemed to be much stronger than Titan expected. Furthermore, the undead did not feel any pain. After a skeleton was cut into half by the soldier, it still chopped off the opponent’s feet with a rusty scimitar.

Facing such a terrifying enemy, the morale of the army was greatly affected. Titan made a prompt decision. He ordered the elite Ice Blue Magician Legion to dispatch. The magician legion was the strongest “special force” in the Blue Lava Army. Generally, it was considered good enough if an estate army had a magician team comprising dozens or around 100 people. Titan did not hesitate to spend a lot of money to build a team of 600 magicians. It was dubbed the official legion title, called theIce Blue Magician Legion.

Among the magician legion, most of them were of Intermediate Demon power while only a handful of them were Higher Demon. The legion leader was a Great Demon King-level fire magician named Tulam. Although the individual combat power of these magicians was not very strong, the power they exert together, especially on the battlefield, was absolutely amazing.

Tulam gave an order, and wind blades, icicles, fireballs, and so on flew toward the undead like hail. This large-scale concentrated magic attack was far more powerful than cold weapons. Once struck, a large number of the undead were killed.

Tulam quickly chanted a curse. He waved the wand in his hand, and a large meteorite that was burning with flames fell from the air. This meteor fire shower had a huge lethality and cover area. Within tens of meters, there were all ruins of the burnt skeletons.

However, the skeletons had no fear at all. Many of them were still walking forward with their remnants, making the soldiers’ hearts tremble.

Just when the Ice Blue Magician Legion tried to cast magic to smash and block the offensive of the skeletons, a strange wave of magic suddenly appeared in the mist. Right after that, colorful rays of lights shone, and countless rays of lights charged over. The attack area was far wider than the Ice Blue Magician Legion.

The Blue Lava Army in the front was caught off guard. Flesh and blood flew everywhere where the light passed. There were constant screams. Many soldiers were injured.

“So many magic waves? Could it be that the enemy also has a magician legion?” Titan was taken aback, and he couldn’t be bothered anymore. He shouted to Sulfur, “How long will it take to dispel these Mist of the Netherworld?”

“A few minutes more.” Sulfur was using a strange “paint” to draw a strange magic circle on the ground. This kind of “paint” was the magic essence that he had carefully researched. It was very expensive, but the situation was urgent now. He was the one who guaranteed that there was no problem previously, he couldn’t be bothered anymore at the moment.

“Front army, retreat! Shields up! Fight back the enemy with bows!” Nader was already commanding the soldiers to defend. Tulam was also ordering the magician legion to carry out a supplementary attack. However, the bows were not very effective, and the number of magician legions was limited after all. They may be able to play a key role at certain key moments, but they were not strong enough to be the main force to eliminate the enemy head-on at this moment.

Soon, many magicians had exhausted their magic power, and they had used potions to restore their spirit power. A large number of soldiers had begun to fight at close range at the front. The casualties of the Blue Lava side had increased rapidly. As for the undead, they were already dead initially. The scary thing was that the skeletons in the mist seemed to be endless. It was mixed with large magic lights from time to time.

The magic circle drawn by Sulfur finally came into play. The Mist of the Netherland gradually became thinner, but the clarity of sight greatly increased the fear of the Blue Lava Army.

Undead!

The endless sea of undead!

Blue Lava Estate was located in the south of the Dark Moon. It was not adjacent to the Dark Shadow Empire like the Red Spirit. There were only some small estates in the Fallen Angel Empire nearby. All the way south was the Dead Sea, so there was no fear of attacks from behind. Therefore, even though their overall strength was inferior to the Red Spirit Estate, the Blue Lava Estate dispatched 100,000 troops this time, which was 10,000 more than the Red Spirit Estate. The main legion “Azure” and the elite legion “Double-headed Dragon” were all out, leaving only very few remaining troops. It was intended to show their contribution to the capital.

Anyway, this is a sure-win battle. The Dark Moon can be killed by just the overwhelming number of people!

However, the advantage of the huge number of people that Titan relied on had become an absolute disadvantage in this sea of undead. Judging by vision, this group of undead consisted of at least 600,000-700,000 undead. They surrounded the entire Blue Lava Army. It was as if the buried heroes of the ancient battlefield were all resurrected!

The Ice Blue Magician Legion of the Blue Lava Estate also saw the true face of the enemies who casted the magic— thousands of skeletons!

Skeleton…magician?

The most low-level undead skeleton can actually cast magic!

This is simply unheard of!

However, these skeletal magician’s magic was not changeable like a real person. It only launched a single element attack, and after launching once, it needed to take a period of time to recover before launching the next round of attacks.

The shock of the undead army to the Blue Lava Army was not only the skeletal magician, but also the rows of skeletal army riding demonic beasts’ skeleton mounts at the back. Their combat power was obviously higher than the previous cannon fodder skeletons.

When does the skeletal army have cavalry too?

In front of the cavalry, there were a dozen knights riding black horses and covered in black armor- The highest level of undead, terror knight!

Facing the highest achievement of undead magic, Sulfur’s body trembled a little. He was either fearful or excited, but the soldiers of the Blue Lava obviously only had fear.

Titan never thought that they would fall into such a desperate situation. It was useless to regret anything now. He exhaled loudly, “I’m the Blue Lava Lord Titan. Abbas. May I know which powerful magician is controlling this undead army?”

“Hehehehe…” A creepy smirk sounded and spread throughout the battlefield. A figure appeared in front of the terror knights. He was shrouded in a cloak of black air. One couldn’t see his true face. He exuded a kind of eerie feeling.

“Sir great undead magician, your strong magic power is something I have never seen before,” Titan complimented, “Today, my army does not intend to offend sir, but we are in a hurry, so we want to pass by this place. Please excuse us, sir. As a reward, I will offer sir a satisfactory gift. Sir can choose money, magic materials, or magic items as you wish.”

The creepy voice of the undead magician sounded, “I only need 1 thing… That is your body. Tsk tsk tsk. With so many fresh bodies, it’s just nice to form a zombie legion! Plus those magicians, I can also expand my skeletal magician legion!”

As soon as the opponent spoke, he left no alternatives. Titan’s pupils suddenly contracted. It seems that it is an inevitable battle today. With the comparison of the military strength of both sides and the characteristics of the undead, I’m afraid that my army is in danger of being annihilated. The only chance is to behead the leader. As long as the undead magician that controls the army is eliminated, the army will naturally collapse.

Without waiting for Titan to think about it, the opponent had already launched an attack. The skeletal army attacked the Blue Lava Army from all directions. The Blue Lava Army formed a defensive circle under the command of Mallorca and Nader. Facing the sea of skeletons surging like a wave, the number of casualties of the Blue Lava Army, whose morale plummeted, rose sharply. The defense circle began to slowly shrink.

At this moment, the magician legion began to launch the most powerful attack magic, and they launched it toward the skeleton cavalry where the undead magician was located. At the same time, several figures from the Blue Lava Army all appeared. Their strength was very powerful at the Demon King level or even the Great Demon King level. Their target was the undead magician who commanded the army.

The skeletons reacted quickly. Those figures were gradually submerged in the sea of skeletons. Some of them didn’t even have the time to scream. The undead magician suddenly raised his head, and he saw Mallorca’s figure in the air. Mallorca was holding his greatsword, and he beheaded immediately.

The previous magic attacks and figures were just a cover to attract firepower. The strongest combat power under Titan was Mallorca at the early stage Demon Emperor. He was the real killing move.

Mallorca had already used his full strength in his attack. A huge and deep dent suddenly appeared on the ground. The surrounding terror knights were all unstable under this powerful slash, and they were overturned. The undead magician was caught off guard. He was cut with a sword, and his body suddenly fell apart.

Got him! Titan was overjoyed, but his smile soon solidified on his face. He saw Mallorca being wrapped in black smoke from the undead magician’s split body. Mallorca screamed and tumbled on the ground. Before long, his voice gradually weakened. Then he stood up strangely like a puppet with a faint light in his eyes.

“Very well, an early stage Demon Emperor-level material. I will have another powerful terror knight.” The undead magician’s ghastly voice sounded from “Mallorca”‘s throat.

Titan, Nader and the others were shocked. This undead magician actually killed the early stage Demon Emperor Mallorca in close combat! Is he an immortal body? If so, he has no weakness?

The undead magician said to himself, “By the way, that lord should also be of Demon Emperor level. Great…”

Titan shuddered, and an unconcealed fear rose in his heart. He suddenly thought of what Sulfur said earlier, “Unless there is a magician close to the Demon Overlord level who is extremely proficient in the undead magic, then only it is possible to use these truly powerful heroes’ souls.” Then the opponent is at least the peak stage of Demon Emperor? Or Demon Overlord?

How can such a terrifying existence appear in the Dark Moon territory?!

If I don’t escape this place today, I’m afraid I will really become a death slave enslaved by this terrifying magician. He immediately hissed, “The whole army retreats and breaks south!”

“It’s too late. None of you can leave today.” The eerie laughter was even louder. A lot of hideous mist began to fill all around. The whole sky became darker with only the occasional light rays which showed the soldiers’ desperate and fearful looks.

The Blue Lava army was destined to lose in this one-sided war…

chapters.title: Chapter 393 - The Strongest Legion In The Future And The Capital’S Shock
chapters.body:
Chapter 393 - The Strongest Legion In The Future And The Capital’S Shock

Town Yankou, the ancient battlefield.

The [Mist of the Netherland], that had been dyed red with blood, finally dispersed gradually.

The oncoming wind was filled with gruesome bloody breath, but Diak couldn’t smell it anymore. Compared with his almost numb sense of smell, the strong impact of the corpse mountain and blood vision was enough to completely collapse his mind.

Out of the entire Blue Lava Army of 100,000 people, only 2 survived.

1 was Diak, and the other was Sulfur.

If Diak hadn’t yelled out his capital envoy identity, his fate would have been the same as Titan, Nader, and all the corpses on the ground.

Sulfur’s survival wasn’t due to Diak who was still protecting his subordinates at the moment of life and death, but because the corpse necromancer was interested in this “little guy” who had previously dispelled his mist, and Sulfur also possessed undead magic breath.

Athena suppressed the writhing sensation in her stomach. As she stared blankly at the hellish ancient battlefield, she felt difficult to calm her mood. Although she grew up in Warlock Fortress, followed the father of the First General, and had witnessed some small wars, this was the first time she had seen such a large-scale death.

Is this the real war?

Are those glorious credits built on so many corpses and blood?

“Madam Athena.” Guradam’s voice interrupted Athena’s thoughts, “I want to keep this little undead magician by my side, is that alright?”

After a little interrogation, Guradam became more and more interested in Sulfur. It was rare to meet a little guy who also researched undead magic. If it weren’t for the master-slave contract, he could even accept a servant.

“Of course.” Athena came back to her senses. Her father once said that being kind to the enemy is being cruel to oneself. If these troops were allowed to invade the Dark Moon, then the soldiers of the Dark Moon and even the innocent people would be the ones lying on the ground.

“This is a brilliant victory for sir. If it isn’t because the capital envoy may be useful, I wouldn’t deliberately ask sir to spare him just now. Sir’s undead magic accomplishments opened my eyes, especially the skeletal magician and cavalry. The emergence of this new type of army will signify a kind of war revolution.”

Guradam laughed triumphantly. This woman did not pretend to be “that man”‘s wife to give him orders, but she kept showing a respectful gesture. It made him feel very satisfied.

At this moment, Guradam had a warning omen, and he looked into the air. From a distance, he saw 2 black dots rapidly magnified. Obviously, their flying speed was extremely fast. When Guradam focused his vision, he found out it was actually 2 giant dragons.

Guradam instinctively felt the power of these 2 giant dragons, especially the petite green dragon. Even he inevitably had a feeling of palpitations.

“Madam Athena, get out of here!”

Athena was taken aback. At this moment, a familiar voice sounded from the huge tawny-colored dragon, “Athena!”

Athena felt relieved. A smile of joy appeared on her face, “I’m here!”

A black shadow stood on the dragon’s back, and he dashed toward them at a terrifying speed which was faster than that of the dragon. He had appeared in front of Guradam in the blink of an eye.

It’s him! Guradam was secretly surprised at this speed and power breath. It’s impossible!

Immediately afterwards, the 2 giant dragons also began to accelerate. When they landed on the ground, they had become a male and a female.

Guradam recognized the man whom he feared most, the poison dragon, Paglio. He didn’t know the woman, but her body exuded the Demon Overlord breath which made his heart tremble.

Chen Rui looked at the bloody hell around and frowned. He saw many of these scenes in [Refined Mind]’s Illusion state, but this was the first time that he saw it in a true scene. At this moment, his heart throbbed more than Athena.

War is the cruelest and also the most beneficial topic of higher beings.

No matter how sacred it is depicted, war is always the cruelest act of violence.

However, the establishment of a peaceful and stable regime depends not only on dreams and hopes, but it always resorts to blood and iron in the end. With the current situation, if we want real peace, we must first have war.

We are likely to face such a cruel scene in the future, so we must adapt to it.

Chen Rui calmed his mind and said, “It seems that we are still a step late. Athena, are you okay?”

“I’m okay, Sir Guradam unleashed his mighty power this time. The Blue Lava’s 100,000 army has all been killed.”

The 100,000 army has all been killed? Chen Rui was secretly surprised. Initially, I only expected the Blue Lava army to be defeated, but I did not expect that Guradam could actually kill them all! I have not seen him for a long time, and Guradam’s undead power has improved so quickly. I now feel very fortunate that I have decided to subdue this corpse necromancer.

Of course, the successful establishment of Guradam’s undead army was inseparable from the special environment of the ancient battlefield. After the residents of Town Yankou migrated, a large number of magic circles and altars were set up here, which was equivalent to Guradam’s home stadium. If it was another place, there would definitely not be so many undead for him to transform, and he would definitely not be able to achieve this kind of result.

Guradam proudly presented his research results to Chen Rui. These skeletal magicians were actually inspired by Chen Rui.

Seeing that Guradam turned his vision into reality so quickly, Chen Rui couldn’t help but to admire Guradam. He said, “I have a little suggestion. These skeletal magicians and cavalry are powerful. The elemental attack of the skeletal magician is simple, but it is very effective. The shortcoming is that the defense is low, and the element restoration is too slow. I’m afraid it will have a bad influence on the battle situation. As for the cavalry, the shortcoming of the skeletal horse is speed and stability. If the cavalry cannot fully exert its mobility and impact ability, it can only be used as a decoration to shock the enemy.”

Guradam nodded, and then he shook his head, “I have done many experiments on this, but there is still no optimal solution.”

“Is it possible to consider… borrowing the power of equipment?” Chen Rui thought, “Skeletal magicians can use certain magic equipment to speed up element power restoration. As for the cavalry, I can also design a set of equipment to greatly enhance their speed and stability .”

“You… Master, please forgive me for being rude.” Guradam’s eyes flashed red, “Do you really know how to design magic equipment which are capable of dealing with such a difficult problem?”

“Of course.” Chen Rui smiled with strong confidence, “Not only that, I think you can also add the categories of troops. For instance, archers, air force and so on. Also, the elite troops should be separated from ordinary cannon fodder skeleton soldiers to use some special high grade equipment. Especially the terror knight, they should at least be equipped with excellent grade weapons and armor. You don’t have to worry about the funds and sources of these equipment, I can be fully responsible for it. You have let me witness the power of the undead in the battle today. I believe that in the future battlefield, our undead army, your research results, and your reputation concealed for 2000 years will all shine with unprecedented splendor. This will make the deepest mark in the history of undead magic in the Demon Realm.”

Chen Rui’s words were definitely not to win over Guradam, but he had complete self-confidence. If we continue to develop in this way, Guradam’s undead army will definitely be the most powerful force of the Dark Moon in the future battles!

Perhaps it will even become the most intimidating and terrifying army in the entire Demon Realm!

The red light in Guradam’s eyes became brighter and brighter. He bowed respectfully. Although he didn’t say a word, the thoughts in his mind were already flooding.

“When can I leave this place? The smell of blood is too unpleasant. I have to go back and admire our treasure,” Krobelus said.

Guradam looked at the emerald dragon vigilantly. Chen Rui smiled slightly, “This is Ms. Krobelus, Paglio’s wife. She will be our trusted partner in the future. Athena, you two should get to know each other.”

When Krobelus heard the word ‘wife’, her face blushed slightly. Her impression of her own man’s symbiotic partner improved a lot. Athena didn’t expect that the poison dragon actually had such a beautiful wife. She started talking with Krobelus immediately. Both women had very open and straightforward temperaments, so their relationship became harmonious very soon.

Hearing the name of Ms. Emerald Dragon, Diak, who had been in a state of numbness, finally reacted. He exerted some force to rush forward as though clutching at straws, “Madam Krobelus, help me! I want to leave this terrifying place!”

Before he got close, an intangible force drove him out. He immediately fainted to the ground. Krobelus, who was regarded as a savior by Diak, was the one who did it.

Although she knew that the “Sulfur” who deceived her into the Blue Lake Mountain Range at that time was Chen Rui’s transformation, Ms. Emerald Dragon still felt upset when she saw this real Diak now. How dare he disturb me chatting with Athena!

Sulfur wanted to say something on the side, but he immediately lowered his head and did not dare to speak anymore when Ms. Emerald Dragon glared past him.

(This powerful undead magician is actually this man’s servant!)

(The Dark Moon actually has such a powerful force!)

(Madam Krobelus is actually a dragon, and she is… actually in a group with these guys!)

(If this continues, maybe this empire will really change radically…)

Fallen Angel Capital.

Royal palace.

Obsidian was sitting in the Imperial Garden with a gloomy expression. Even the concubine who was accompanying him did not dare to say a word. Just the day before yesterday, when Royal Highness Regent received a battle report, he smashed the bones of a concubine who was still teasing him.

Since his favorite concubine leaked the secrets previously, to be more accurate, after this leak caused “Charles’” death, Obsidian no longer trusted anyone around him. He also became more cruel and violent.

For the next 2 days, Obsidian still had a gloomy face. No one dared to be the unlucky one to touch the Royal Highness.

Facing the encirclement of the Red Spirit Estate and Blue Lava Estate, the Dark Moon did not defend, but they took the risky initiative to attack the 90,000 army instead. The Dark Moon actually defeated them!

In this battle, the Dark Moon used a new weapon such as a continuous explosion crossbow, and there is actually an official dragon knight aerial legion! This is not dozens of wyverns with the title of legion, but hundreds or even thousands of them!

Only the capital has a dragon knight legion in the entire Fallen Angel Empire!

Not only that, there is a mysterious powerhouse hidden in the Dark Moon. In addition to Shea who has reached the Demon Emperor level, there is also a mysterious powerhouse. Josh was defeated by the mysterious powerhouse on the battlefield. He was seriously injured, and he has returned to the Red Spirit Estate to recuperate. The capital envoy, Rus, was also beheaded by this person. As for the Demon Overlord Krobelus, her whereabouts is unknown.

According to this situation, the Dark Moon, which could barely rank at the end of the 4 estates by its area and population, is definitely the first of the 4 estates!

How can this barren estate, which has been tightly controlled by me, have such a strong strength?

The only hope now is the Blue Lava Lord Titan. When the Dark Moon is exhausted after just defeating the Red Spirit Estate, with the cunning Blue Lava Lord Titan, the Blue Lava Army should be able to inflict heavy damage on the Dark Moon.

At this moment, an emergency report came. Obsidian got up quickly. He took a few steps forward to take it.

After merely glancing at the texts on the emergency report, Obsidian’s gaze was frozen. He exuded a terrifying breath. The unlucky guard who sent the emergency report burst and succumbed to death before he could even scream.

For a moment, everyone including his concubine held their breath, lest they became the next innocent victim.

The content of the battle report was – The Blue Lava Army has disappeared strangely in the area of Town Yankou, and their whereabouts are unknown. According to the news released by the Dark Moon not long after that, the Blue Lava Army of 100,000 had been completely annihilated. The capital envoy, Diak, who accompanied the army has become the only survivor. He is currently “a guest” in the Dark Moon.

Obsidian’s eyes fell on the word “completely annihilated”. He felt utterly shocked. This is not defeat, but complete annihilation! There is no survivor in the 100,000 army? Including Lord Titan who is at the middle stage of the Demon Emperor? How powerful is their army to be able to do this?

After receiving the news of the Red Spirit’s defeat, Obsidian believed that he had been underestimating the power of the Dark Moon. However, after receiving this report, Obsidian felt that he could not identify the true strength of the Dark Moon at all.

How?

How did this happen?

Is it the power left by my dead nephew, Grimm? My brother, Midnight Sun’s descendants is about to rise again?

No, we must not let this kind of bud continue to grow!

The problem is, judging from the powerful force displayed by the Dark Moon, there is no estate in the empire that can compete with it. Unless… I lead the army personally.

However, there are also some concerns by leading personally. After the capital specially approved the Red Spirit Lord Josh to launch the war of lords previously, the military forces headed by Warlock Fortress General George expressed strong dissatisfaction and accusations, and they even showed signs of unrest and mutiny. Now that the Dark Moon has defeated the joint forces of 2 major estates, it will surely spread throughout the Fallen Angel Empire and even the entire Demon Realm. The diehard individuals of the suppressed Lord of Midnight Sun will definitely be more eager to take action. Those fence-sitters will also be tempted. Not only personally leading the army to attack the Dark Moon was not justified, but it might also give excuses and opportunities to those who are dissatisfied to initiate a mutiny. This is temporarily undesirable.

When Obsidian was in a dilemma, another person came to report tremblingly, “The Red Spirit Lord Josh sent an emergency magic letter, claiming that the loss was extremely heavy, and he was also badly injured this time. The casualties are in urgent need of care. He hereby requests the Your Highness Regent to return the 1 billion fundraising money and part of the interest in advance to alleviate the urgent needs.”

Obsidian’s face suddenly turned pale, and the man was still reporting, “The Blue Lava Lord’s son, Chandler, asked Your Highness to return the fundraising money of the Blue Lava Estate to resolve the predicament of the estate…”

“Your Highness, the elder of the empire, Elder Roy, is outside to request to see you. He asked Your Highness to return the family’s fundraising money in order to compensate the Rus Family who died in the war.”

This completely ignited Obsidian’s roar, “Asshole! An elder family needs to reach out and ask me for money just to compensate for a dead person! Get lost! Ask him to get lost!”

The depression in Obsidian’s heart had reached its maximum. The serious consequences of the “death” of “Charles” had gradually manifested after this war of lords. For Royal Highness Regent, this depression was just the beginning.

Was there a psychologist or counselor in Demon Realm? The king is drepressed🤕

chapters.title: Chapter 394 - Six Major Initiatives! The Beginning Of The Rise Of Dark Moon
chapters.body:
Chapter 394 - Six Major Initiatives! The Beginning Of The Rise Of Dark Moon

The Dark Moon’s result in the war of lords shocked the entire Fallen Angel Empire. In the people’s minds, the Dark Moon was just a dilapidated estate under the control of Regent Obsidian, and it was barely sustained by Princess Shea who was the daughter of Crown Prince Grimm. It was only a matter of time before the remnant glory of Lord of Midnight Sun was lost.

This battle completely subverted many people’s perception – The Red Spirit Estate and Blue Lava Estate of the 4 major estates joined forces to attack the Dark Moon. In the end, The Red Spirit Estate failed miserably, and the Blue Lava Estate was wiped out!

This is an unbelievable victory. When has the strength of the Dark Moon risen to this level?

Although the Dark Moon won, the people were still not optimistic about it. Obviously, the war of lords this time is due to Regent Obsidian instigating the 2 major estates’ lords. The Dark Moon showed such a dazzling light, which is equivalent to exposing its own strength. Obsidian will never allow this hidden major threat to continue to grow stronger. He will definitely act on it.

What’s next? Sanctions? Leading the army personally?

Even if he is not leading the army personally, the Red Spirit’s suspension of food supply to the Dark Moon is enough to cause a heavy blow to the Dark Moon. After all, such a large estate cannot be self-sufficient in food. Even if it can be imported from the Dark Shadow Empire, it is also difficult to meet the needs of the entire estate. It is nothing more than transferring the vital point from the Red Spirit Estate to the hands of the Dark Shadow Empire.

At this moment, a surprising news came from the Dark Moon.

According to the captured capital envoy, Diak, the Red Spirit Estate and Blue Lava Estate were instructed by Regent Obsidian to attack the Dark Moon this time. This was not surprising, but Obsidian’s purpose was actually to seize the wealth accumulated by the Dark Moon and the treasure!

In order to seize the property of the estate, a regent actually instigated and launched the war of lords! Diak also divulged the news – Obsidian has been doing everything possible to plunder the properties of major estates. The former lords’ “fundraising” is the biggest scam!

Krobelus, who was also the capital envoy, also issued a public statement confirming the truth of the incident. She also expressed strong indignation toward Obsidian, claiming to leave the capital to join the Dark Moon.

The news quickly spread throughout the empire. Although there were some problems with these “statements”, due to the vital interests, especially the large amount of black crystal coins, various estates and major families began to feel uneasy. Many had already used various reasons to request the capital to refund the fundraising money in advance.

As a result, Regent Obsidian became even more frustrated. His initial intention of the war of lords was to divert the attention from this aspect as well as a way to plunder properties. Unexpectedly, it was actually counterproductive. At the lord meetings, he had made a guarantee. Now that the date of the final return was getting closer and closer, and there were so many estates and families requesting to withdraw immediately. He was suddenly in an unprecedented predicament.

Contrary to the capital which was in an unfavorable situation, the Dark Moon Estate was immersed in a celebration atmosphere at this time. The predicament that had originally enveloped this estate was swept away by an unexpected victory. Princess Royal personally led the army, and she took the initiative to attack. Everyone cheered her heroic deed of defeating the Red Spirit Army with an inferior number of army in the wilderness of Town Leith.

In contrast, the incredible war result of silently destroying the Blue Lava Army was strange and mysterious. It was said to be the work of the mysterious powerhouse invited by Athena who was the sheriff and garrison guard commander. Some people said that it was General George’s secret power in the Dark Moon. The opinions varied for a while.

As the winning heroes, the mysterious powerhouse who defeated Josh and beheaded Rus; the West Road Army commander, Tim, who attacked the Red Spirit Army; Old Ford and his son who subsided Mellon Family rebellion; the brothers and sisters – Cavalry Commander Kaguli, and wyvern legion commander and imperial guards commander Kaguron; the brave human financial officer who was the first to raise his weapon and charge to the enemy in the face of the temptation from the Red Spirit; and the Dark Moon’s mysterious wyvern legion which rivaled the capital, had become favorite topics of the Dark Moon’s militaries and civilians.

This victory not only boosted everyone in the Dark Moon, but it also revealed to all the estates of the Fallen Angel Empire that the Dark Moon, whether in terms of military or economic, was already the largest estate of the Fallen Angel Empire!

A large number of people gathered at the Dark Moon’s central plaza. Shea was giving an inspiring speech on the high platform of central plaza. Many people realized that this Princess Royal seemed energetic and vigorous. She showed unprecedented confidence.

In addition to the public announcement of the award of meritorious officials and the punishment of removing the names of traitors such as the Mellon Family, Princess Royal Highness also announced 6 major initiatives. It could be considered to be 6 unexpected good news.

The first news – The Dark Moon finally cracked the secret of the Blue Lake Mountain Range treasure! There was no huge wealth as imagined, but the unexpected things found were more precious than any typical wealth or treasure.

The treasure was an ancient leather scroll which recorded the secret method to improve the barren land of the Dark Moon. After the experiment by Princess Royal and Master Aldas, it was found that it really worked. Furthermore, the improved magic land had double the harvest than normal fertile soil.

At present, Shea had improved a large number of lands outside the city so that it could be cultivated by the people. One only needed to hand in a certain amount of crops each year to obtain the ownership of these magic lands. In the next step, the improvement would gradually be carried out across the entire Dark Moon Estate.

This was a huge piece of good news that excited everyone. It meant that the Dark Moon would completely get rid of the biggest dilemma of lack of food that had prolonged for tens of thousands of years, and they would never be controlled by anyone because of it. With the protection of a powerful army, a booming economy, and fertile and abundant food… All this fully proved that the prosperity and glory 400 years ago would soon reappear on this land.

No, maybe they would even be more prosperous than 400 years ago!

By then, everyone in the Dark Moon would be proud of their identity.

The second news – The Dark Moon had obtained permission from 2 major alchemy forces, the Mechanic Association and the Potioneer Association, to build a mechanic branch and a potioneer branch in the city. Master Xingxing, who was well-known in the Demon Realm, would be in charge of the mechanic branch while Master Aldas would be in charge of the potioneer branch. All mechanics and potioneers are welcomed to join. The Dark Moon would provide the best conditions and treatment.

For example, for the Dark Moon Potioneer branch, there would be free rationing of the Fountain of Resurrection located in the Blue Lake Mountain Range “treasure” area that had been converted into a military site. The potion master Aldas and mechanic master Xingxing, who were famous in the Demon Realm, would also regularly exchange experiences with the members so as to improve the standard.

The third news – In order to revive the glory of the Lord of Midnight Sun, the Dark Moon imperial guards officially changed its name to “Red Blood” Legion. The legion leader was Athena. The garrison guard was renamed as “Flame” Legion, and the legion leader was Kaguron. The West Road Army was renamed as “Moon Shadow” Legion with Tim as the legion leader. The 3 legions would recruit more warriors to defend the Dark Moon homeland. Those with strength, courage, and elders with skills could register at the recruiting office. They only needed to be screened to become a glorious soldier with favorable treatment.

The fourth news – The Dark Moon would renovate the city’s water supply, sewage and other facilities for free. The new magic water supply developed by Master Xingxing would be widely used. Residents only needed to pay a minimal monthly fee, and they did not need to go out to carry water. The filtered clean water could be used conveniently at home.

The fifth news – The Dark Moon would hold 2 large-scale events next month. 1 was the auction house trade fair, and the other was the first trade fair of the Dark Moon in 400 years. There would be many precious goods there. For example, at the auction, there would be 3 devil fruits commissioned by a mysterious guest!

The sixth news – The transformation of abandoned houses in the city had basically been completed. Before the huge business opportunity next month, these shops would be sold through bidding.

This series of radical and positive measures caused strong feedback among the people. Suddenly, there were thunderous cheers, shouting ‘Long live Princess Royal’.

Soon after, the Dark Moon Palace.

Council hall.

The irrelevant people including Old Gauss had retreated.

Although Old Gauss was Princess Royal’s most trusted old officer, Old Gauss was irrelevant in a sense, so the old man took the initiative to leave. Only the Princess Royal Highness and the financial officer were left at the council hall.

“The news of devil fruit will attract a large number of demons and merchants to come. As for the strategy of publicly carrying out land improvement in the name of the treasure, it is even more ingenious – Not only can it divert the attention of adventurers, but it can also carry out land improvement reasonably. It’s just that the credits of your real meritorious officer have been overlooked.”

“How many of my credits have been overlooked?” Someone had a distressed look, but he held the hand of Princess Royal Highness. He touched it again and again with a lewd look. “Let’s see how Princess Royal compensates the wounded mind of her subordinate.”

“Are you sure what you are doing now fits the ‘subordinate’ status?” Shea said angrily.

Although Princess Royal Highness confessed her feelings in the secret room, she still had the same majestic and cold appearance of the past when they were outside the room. However, she had not withdrawn the hand held by him. “My loyalty to Princess Royal Highness can only be proved by the 2 moons in the sky!” The guy, who was not bothered about his subordinate identity, was still indulged in the profound ideal of the employee molesting his royal female boss.

“In that case, there is no substantive proof?” Shea snorted coldly, “You have hidden well all this while. Tim is actually your servant long ago. There are 2 powerful tribes in the underground of Mountain Xilang, and the Earth Elemental King as an ally. You also have hundreds of thousands of undead army and a corpse necromancer close to Demon Overlord in Town Yankou! With your current strength and financial resources, let alone subverting the Dark Moon, I’m afraid it is not a fantasy to subvert even the entire Fallen Angel Empire! ”

Chen Rui told Shea about the strength he was managing and many things. Since returning from Town Yankou, he had to “report” to Shea alone for a long time almost every day. Of course, it was in the secret room.

The relationship between the 2 had heated up rapidly, but Princess Royal Highness was actually a very shy or perhaps, a very conservative woman. She was extremely restrained even if it was just holding hands and kissing. As for the last step, it seemed that there was still a considerable distance, so his ‘revolution’ was not successful yet. Let’s go with the flow.

“I’m a lazy person. I don’t want to be a lord or emperor. I just want to hide in a leisurely place, flirt, dance, and be at ease with my beloved women.”

Hearing the word “dancing”, Shea’s face blushed slightly. There must be someone else who he flirts with, but this dancing with “beloved woman” should be no one other than me for the time being.

“By the way, what do you think about the weapon enhancement for the undead legion on Guradam’s side that I mentioned to you? This powerful undead army will be one of our most important forces in the future.”

Shea deeply agreed with this, “We can see how terrifying this army is from the complete annihilation out of the Blue Lava Army. Fortunately, that place is an ancient battlefield, so there are enough raw materials for the undead. Together with the Blue Lava Army this time, it should take the combat effectiveness of the undead legion up a notch. You can make a decision on this matter. As for the establishment of the ‘Dark Demon’, do you have a better idea?”

“We humans have an ancient proverb, ‘know the enemy, know yourself, and in every battle you will be victorious’. Dark Demon must be established as soon as possible so that we can grasp the movements and the intel of all parties quickly. Perhaps we can still use the team of Cloak Gang in the Dark Moon, but it is definitely impossible for the Cloak Gang to work across the entire empire or even the entire Demon Realm. Many things have to be trained from the beginning. I have 2 reliable partners who are also close friends of Athena. One of them had helped you deal with Rus. I can ask them to help out temporarily. Actually, I still have the best candidate for the commander in my mind, but unfortunately her whereabouts is unknown. Let’s talk about it later if we have the chance.”

“Alright.” Shea nodded slightly, “At present, the Blue Lava Estate is no longer a threat. But for the Red Spirit Estate, their remaining power is still very large, so we can’t take it lightly.”

“No, it’s the opposite. I think that with the recent death of the Blue Lava Estate’s lord, and his son Chandler is insufficient in strength and prestige, all forces are tempted to take action. So, we should focus more on this estate. As for the Red Spirit Estate… For the time being, don’t worry about them. Perhaps this former enemy will become one of our indispensable and important supports.”

Josh was seriously injured, and he was dying. His son, Kanita, was in control. All decisions were conveyed through Kanita.

Kanita had become the puppet of the God-Eating Mask during the beheading operation in Town Leith.

These 2 conditions alone could explain a lot.

“Really? Then we have to step up the investigation for Blue Lava’s intel.” Shea’s eyes brightened, and then she became shy, “Your hands… behave!”

“I just want to feel Your Highness’ outstanding… great… uhm, ambition(also meant chest). Why is the size bigger in the secret room? Princess Shea, don’t restrain your soul. You should give it a loose and comfortable environment… Ouch!”

“Enough! Sir financial officer, you can leave now… Asshole, what are you trying to do… Hmm hmm hmm…” (sound of mouth being blocked)

For a long time, the imperial guards at the palace gate, also known as the Red Blood guards now, heard the angry voice of Princess Royal Highness coming from the council hall from a distance. However, without Royal Highness’s order, no one took a step forward. They then saw the human financial officer walk out dejectedly while covering his mouth. He seemed to be scolded, so he did not even dare to speak loudly.

Sure enough, even if he showed considerable courage on the battlefield, and the Dark Moon won a huge victory, the human financial officer succeeded in angering Princess Royal Highness as usual, and he was kicked out.

Could it be that his courage to face the Red Spirit Army is… trained on normal days in the fiery rage of Princess Royal Highness?

When the human saw the weird gazes of the Red Blood guards, he shrugged with a smirk. He walked out in a grievous manner while covering his mouth. No one would imagine that the reason this guy covered his mouth was just because his action was too intense, so the Princess Royal Highness bit his lip in shyness.

Although I paid the “price of blood”, I still managed to feel her warm red lips and… “the outstanding ambition.” It is definitely a value-for-money action.

The moons tonight are really round.

Looking at the 2 hook-like white moons in the bright sky, this irrelevant remark surged in a certain person’s immanent heart.

Another woman joined the harem… When would Alice’s turn be?

chapters.title: Chapter 395 - The Leisure Life Of The Financial Officer
chapters.body:
Chapter 395 - The Leisure Life Of The Financial Officer

Sheriff and financial officer’s residence.

The courtyard in the evening.

Paglio laid leisurely on his big gold crystal bed. Dodo, the waiter who usually served him wine, was missing. Instead, sitting beside him was a beautiful green-haired woman in a long silver dress. She was none other than Ms. Emerald Dragon.

The green gem-like wine was the emerald jade wine carefully brewed by Krobelus using her secret method. The materials were expensive, and it had a high alcoholic strength. Even Chen Rui or Roman could only taste a little, but there were no restrictions for the poison dragon who was her own man. Paglio was now inseparable with this fine wine.

Krobelus fed a peeled red fruit into Master Poison Dragon’s mouth, and she wiped the corners of his mouth thoughtfully. Master Poison Dragon grinned. He hugged Ms. Emerald Dragon, and kissed her on the face. A trace of blush appeared on Ms. Emerald Dragon’s shy face. She then took the initiative to kiss Master Poison Dragon back without bothering the presence of Chen Rui, Roman and the rest.

However, compared with the food fed to the poison dragon’s mouth, 90% of the food on the table went into her own stomach.

The scene on the side was quite the opposite. Master Roman carefully held a bunch of freshly roasted vegetable rolls and brought it to Miss Delia’s mouth. Miss Delia glanced at him indifferently, and she did not speak. Roman put down the vegetable roll. He smiled apologetically as he handed over a bunch of purple berries. Delia was still staring at him coldly.

“Delia, just forgive this guy,” Athena held Delia’s hand.

Roman showed a grateful look to Athena. Then Master Paglio said, “Yes, this guy didn’t make any major mistakes. He just flirted with a dark elf girl on the side of the road, and then peeked in a female bathroom for 10 minutes plus. Next, he hooked up with 2 succubus in the bar… Uh, there are only a dozen of them in 1 day.”

Chen Rui was holding a report with the detailed content and time of these dozens of occasions. He couldn’t help but sweat. It seemed that Master Roman’s day was really “fulfilling”.

“Delia, you can’t appease this kind of man. If it’s me, I’ll give him a severe beating every 3 days and light beating every 2 days. You must let him know what honesty is.” Ms. Emerald Dragon said, completely ignoring Roman’s bitter gaze.

After getting along with each other during this period of time, Ms. Emerald Dragon and Delia, Athena, as well as Kia had become very close best friends. Their relationship was very harmonious.

Ms. Emerald Dragon didn’t have to face those nasty guys who were wearing hypocritical masks all day in this place. There were only sincere friends instead, so she felt extremely relaxed. Not to mention, her most important man, Paglio, was here too. Um, plus maybe the equally important treasure of some guy.

(The only pity is that Yini is gone.)

It was Paglio’s opinion not to disclose everything to Ms. Emerald Dragon just in case. The most important thing was that no one could beat Krobelus at present, and Master Poison Dragon was not completely sure that he could subdue Ms. Emerald Dragon with his charm. Therefore, it was better for some secrets like the identity of “Charles” to be kept secret temporarily.

Perhaps Master Poison Dragon was afraid that Ms. Emerald Dragon would share the benefit that Chen Rui was giving him.

Roman blinked as he looked at Paglio with a little sympathy. Severe beating every 3 days and light beating every 2 days?

Paglio didn’t get it for a moment, “What is that look? Jealous?”

Roman was already rolling his eyes. I’m jealous of you?

Ms. Emerald Dragon saw Roman’s gaze on Paglio, and she said with pride, “Look at our Paglio, his strong body and sharp teeth. Let alone these handsome appearances, the most important is his loyalty. In this aspect, even the flirty playboy, Chen Rui, is far inferior than him.”

Once this sentence was uttered, Chen Rui and Roman, who were despised, glared at Paglio at the same time. Right, putting aside those sharp teeth and other “heavy taste” handsomeness, but loyalty… I remember a dragon has boasted more than once about his ideal human life… dragon life. It seems to be flying with a large group of female dragons in the Dark Moon sky?

“Um…” Faced with 4 sharp gazes, Paglio was unprecedentedly guilty, and he said, “Little Betty, everyone knows my strengths, so you don’t need to say it anymore. Judging from this secret test, Delia is indeed quite suitable for the Dark Demons’ job.

Chen Rui nodded, and he added a sentence, “In order to completely eliminate the possibility of someone cheating, I think you should accept the position of this commander, Delia. When you find that he has some signs of misconduct, you can immediately stop him at an early stage. Although Krobelus’ beating suggestion is a bit too violent, you may try to use it at certain times. I don’t mind exerting some effort to tie him up before handing him over to you.”

“Compared to the leader, that guy is just lusty, but he’s not daring.” Delia looked at Chen Rui, then at Athena and Kia. She added with dissatisfaction, “You recommended me as the Dark Demon commander in front of a woman who you want to hook up with, right? It seems that now the leader’s ability is increasing and far-reaching.”

In any case, Delia was still quite protective of Roman in her heart. When Roman heard something was up, he was about to jump up and criticize Chen Rui for his insidious attempt to divert the heat. However, once Delia glanced at him, he sat down obediently with a docile and submissive look like the most loyal and honest man in the world.

Chen Rui knew that he was wrong, so he forced a smile. Athena was still fine, but Kia sighed lightly, looking self-pity and wronged. Krobelus’s righteous heart was triggered when she noticed Kia, so she angrily denounced Chen Rui’s unfaithfulness. Master Roman was secretly pleased when he heard her. From time to time, he would add fuel to the fire.

However, Delia finally agreed to Chen Rui’s request. She had been in the Dark Moon for so long. Although Roman as well as good friends like Chen Rui and the others were by her side, she was often bored and wanted to do something. Once known as “Madam Black Widow”, she had been in contact with many related matters in the Dark Shadow Empire. Although she was not proficient in intel and assassination, she was by no means unfamiliar with it.

Magic land, alchemist branch, devil fruit auction, trade fair… After the war of lords this time, the Dark Moon had already stepped onto the stage in advance. It would soon become the focus of the Fallen Angel Empire and the entire Demon Realm. They needed to have sharp eyes and keen hearing.

As for the candidates of the Dark Demon, they would be based on the Cloak Gang team. At present, the spies were mainly for the surrounding estates of the Dark Moon. In the future, they would consider expanding into the entire Demon Realm.

“Without further delay, I will now research a set of preliminary plans and proposals.” When it came to work, Delia was a swift and hard-working type. After agreeing to this matter, many ideas suddenly appeared in her mind, so she was unable to sit still.

“I’ll accompany you.” Roman naturally took the opportunity to hold her hand. Delia snorted, but she didn’t shake it away.

Seeing the young couple leave, Krobelus stretched out comfortably, and she snuggled into Paglio’s arms fairly openly, “Dear Paglio, what about the Vapour Glaze Eyes you promised me yesterday? When can you give it to me?”

“Vapour Glaze Eyes?” Paglio was taken aback. “How do you know I have that thing? When did I promise to give it to you?”

Krobelus smiled slyly as she held a recording stone. A familiar voice sounded.

“Little Betty… Your ice flame pendant ain’t nothing. My Vapour Glaze Eyes is the best! Next time… Next time, I…”

“Give it to me?”

“Ah…”

It was the conversation between Master Poison Dragon and Ms. Emerald Dragon. Judging from the slurred voice of Master Poison Dragon, he should be drunk.

Chen Rui, Athena, and Kia all seemed to have suddenly realized something. No wonder Ms. Emerald Dragon has been patiently and carefully serving the emerald jade wine for Paglio to drink. It turns out that she actually has ulterior motives… Master Poison Dragon stared blankly at the recording stone which was instantly disappearing in Ms. Emerald Dragon’s hand. Then he looked at the emerald jade wine in his hand, and he was speechless for a while.

I am actually set up by Little Betty again? This is unscientific!

I still haven’t seen Little Betty’s treasure yet. If we continue this way, I am about to go bankrupt!

If you live a life of crime, sooner or later you’ll pay for it. Maybe this counts as retribution? Chen Rui muttered in his heart, “Er, Krobelus, Paglio, I think you two have important things to discuss. We better leave first…”

Chen Rui quickly left the courtyard with Athena and Kia. They walked all the way to the room.

Athena smiled and said, “Finally someone is controlling Paglio now, but why I think he is quite pitiful.”

“Pitiful my ass,” Chen Rui shook his head resolutely, “Back then, this guy cheated her money and sex, he then drove away. Now is the time to get his retribution.”

Athena looked at someone gloating, and she pouted, “Speaking of cheaters, it seems that the man in front of us is the biggest cheater. Right, Kia?”

Kia nodded repeatedly, as though following the lead of the main wife.

“I’m innocent!” Chen Rui cried out for a while, “I just used some strategy to lie to the Regent Obsidian. I’m the most genuine and good man in front of you 2!”

“It seems to be more than that right…” Athena looked thoughtful, “Why do I hear Krobelus say that her friend named Charles has a very flirty relationship with Isabella? He even lives in her house?”

While Kia nodded, she assumed a posture of ready to torture him to extract a confession as long as the main wife gave an order.

Chen Rui quickly explained, “That’s also a strategy. Isabella is an important officer under Obsidian, so I must deceive her trust. There is really nothing between us!”

“Then…” Athena switched the topic, “What about Princess Royal Highness? It should not be… a strategy?!”

Kia blinked her charming eyes as she continued nodding.

When Athena misunderstood that my favorite woman is Shea in Mountain Xilang, she generously stated that she could accept Shea, her sister and Kia, but now why is there jealousy in her words?

Although Athena’s father pledged allegiance to Shea, and Shea was her immediate boss, from the perspective of a man’s “woman”, they were all the same.

“Princess Royal… actually, uh…” Chen Rui wanted to smooth things over by coaxing, but he suddenly remembered that it was not only Shea, but also Ms. Fairy Dragon!

Chen Rui secretly shuddered. I haven’t mentioned Zola to anyone yet, but Athena and the others will know sooner or later. How should I break the news? Should I say that I abducted a beautiful woman back after just going out for a while this time?

In fact, neither Athena nor Kia rejected Shea. Especially as a lord, not only Shea did not sacrifice them at the most dangerous juncture, but instead she kept them away from danger while she chose to fight the enemy to the death.

Both Athena and Kia knew this in their mind.

Nonetheless, no matter how generous a woman was, she was still a woman. If they really didn’t mind, it was truly unscientific.

“You go and settle it properly on Princess Royal and Alice’s side,” Athena thought that Chen Rui first “liked” Shea, and the Demon Realm men often had dozens or more wives and concubines. In fact, this guy was already restrained enough. She added another sentence, “Especially Alice, you must make her happy.”

When Kia heard the last sentence, she nodded seriously. It seemed that the little loli was quite good in social relationship.

Wait, why is Alice involved again? Could it be that the little loli told Athena and Kia of my agreement which I used to delay time?

Chen Rui felt guilty. He took a deep breath, and he decided to confess Zola’s affairs altogether, “Actually, there is 1 more thing…”

“What’s up?

“Uhm… It’s like this…”

Kia blinked her charming eyes, “Is it related to any other woman?”

Women’s instincts are terrifying… Chen Rui was a little sweaty.

“There are other women?” Upon hearing Kia’s words, Athena suddenly thought of Krobelus’ previous adjective of “flirty playboy.” There was a little more scrutiny in her eyes.

With a guilty conscience, someone’s words changed again, “What are you thinking… The auction will be held soon. The devil fruit is the highlight. The Dark Moon defeated more with less army this time, and its famous reputation throughout the empire can deter many small forces, but there will inevitably be many people with ulterior motives. Your task is very crucial this time. While recruiting and training new recruits as soon as possible, you must arrange various defenses, especially the auction house area. We must strive to be foolproof. .”

“I understand. You have to make corresponding arrangements in the Cloak Gang.” Athena nodded, and she didn’t think much. However, Kia showed a hint of suspicion, and she coughed slightly as if to remind Athena.

“Kia, are you unwell?” Chen Rui asked deliberately.

“Hmph! I just feel like you are hiding something from us.”

Chen Rui’s back was drenched in sweat. He quickly changed the subject, “Uh… Did you not notice one thing? In the past 2 days, do you feel any changes in your power?”

“Speaking of this, I do feel a little different,” Athena said, “It seems that the power in my body has become a little more refined. It seems that this effect can only be obtained through long-term hard training?”

“I also feel that way. According to my training schedule, it shouldn’t be so fast.” Kia looked at someone who was beaming, “You seem to know the reason?”

When Athena and Kia heard that it was related to the increase in power, their attention was really diverted.

Chen Rui showed a lewd gaze, “Have you forgotten? Didn’t we train hard these 2 nights?”

Athena and Kia blushed. Indeed, they were quite “hard-working” these 2 nights. If it weren’t for the soundproof magic circle effect of the bedroom, perhaps the sound of them “working hard” could be heard throughout the block.

“Can you be more serious?” Athena blushed, and she grabbed him. In response to the main wife, the little maid also took the opportunity to punch him.

“I mean it,” Chen Rui grinned and said. Last night, he accidentally discovered that during the sex, the [Dual Training] in the passive characteristic glowed strangely on the skill tree. After 2 days, his power showed signs of condensing. It was more handy to use. It was equivalent to the results of hard training for a few days or more.

The higher the level of power, the more difficult it was to train. For Chen Rui, this kind of “refining” was undoubtedly a rare improvement.

Judging from the reactions of Athena and Kia, this benefit is for both man and woman.

I initially thought that the characteristic of [Dual Training] was only for life and vitality training, not some kind of obscene skill. Unexpectedly, it came back again. It was actually a mating skill. No wonder this obscene skill has another note – “Sometimes, there will be special effects.”

This “special effect” is very good and powerful.

Tsk… I like it very much.

It is truly [Dual Training]!

“The grand master has really passed a good thing to me! Since this is the case…” Seeing Chen Rui’s lewd gaze, Athena reacted very quickly, and she dodged his demon claws. As a result, the little maid became a scapegoat, and she was directly caught.

“This is a serious matter to increase power… Hehe, let’s continue to work hard…” Chen Rui grabbed Kia’s waist, and he “conveniently” touched her large booty. The succubus maid softened, and she “followed the flow” and fell into his arms.

“Master, how do you want to work hard? Or how do you want me to work hard with you?” The little demon girl winked her eyes, and even her voice became very seductive. Her body wriggled cooperatively as though she allowed him to do anything to her, making a man more excited.

Athena’s cheeks were burning while watching them. In this regard, she couldn’t catch up with the succubus maid despite trying. She bit her lip and said, “You two work hard, I have something else to do.”

At this moment, the little maid did not follow the steps of the main wife. Instead, she pushed Chen Rui playfully, and Chen Rui caught up with Athena and hugged her. He carried Athena on his shoulders, and he walked toward the bedroom.
